kd shckhear qokeedy kcheeedy
olshal qotshedy ysheod aiin
olteol dair sheey lkchdy
dy chedy ykchdain cheeaiin qokeeedy aiin cheedy cheesy chey chol lody kd cheey ykal solkar rcheedy chdy sardy odaiin
otar ycheeor kom tchaim daaiin keeod lchedy okeedy okain daiin chol ytchey cthsd ol odyedal lcheey teol
tsheedal dar schair ody okeedy shedy qotaiin sheey sheeeo kaiin dsheear cheol ytchody or qopcheeor shedy qokaiin qol

sheedal ykedaiiin olkdal opchy ain chol dardy otchedaiiin opaly schey tair dar tsheos qokeey sholy oteeor ol
okeed okaiin aledal lshdaly qokey aleed chedol qokey ytsaiin okchy keol olaly lkeeod yshaiin qoeam al tedaiin chedy
chey qochol kchedy schedar okeees ytchdy chedy tdaiin ykal redor sheesy qol qokshaiin otdaiin chdy

sorair dam qokaiin chedy ytdain olcheedy lsr qotchear qoty ltaiiin rol qoky keo sain aiin tary dar
okar shas oldam qoks lsees pchair toly lshes otchdy chd lkaiin okchedy qotedy sarm qokeear aiin qokey ol shedy
chor keedy odyeeeody ar ypched otal sheey otchol tshor orear chey qotcheor okey okchedy aiin qoteey lkaiin ain qokeedy sorear

qotaim dam solkd qokeey ain qotchdy dar opchdam shedy cheey otedy tcheeey air otar ychsy keod soreeor sheor
qokeol opchary ar qokeedy shas olshey daiin oeor chcthor dal dair lkchair dleey qoedol qoky otain daiin qokaiin am
lcher ches ol dalyain qokeedy lseeey ar qokey kair chol olkchdy doled dy daror dain olchod

sain or qordair qotaiiin olkchedy ykiiin qokain ychaiin cthedar shedy chedy oeeol dy qofcheos cthes chedy cpheor qokain daiin okaiin am
okal cheol cheey okshsd chedy qokaiin chckhy tchody ycheain olchedor alals qokain qoedol scheol qokey shes qokchain
lcheedal oleedar qol qockhedy or qoleody qokshed sheedy otched keesy yeos qokeedy yaim otar qoky fchal qokedam

ssheey chol teeos qol shedy raiin opchaiin qokal oddair olsd ycheeody kes chos opey okeey qokshed olkal ypchedy
qockhedy ytchom kedaiin okg shedy ytoly okdaiin olcheeam otchy olshdol oleedaiin sheody ked daiin okary ol
lkaiin qotchedy olody ar dam chdy qoleeor qokedy otaiin qokaiin aiin chol cthees okeedy olkain qokedy dchedy qoteedy rg daiin lchedy tsheol ykchedol ar

qol qokal okal rdam rshee cthair dchair qokain sheol yteeol opcheeod am lchor qokol fchol qokaiin chdy
lkaiin oiinain osain qokches or okchy ra chedy otal tshor qopcheeal chedy qokeedy sheeody peedy qol oded
saiin ol opcheeedy pchedaiin ar tsher shedy qoky ol qokeey lkair shey shckhy air opchom sheees qokaiin olcheeod qotedy dar qotaiin cheol

dar ydair qotar dar otol olkain qody chey qochedy lchey aiin olyes qoal ol lseam osheol daiin opchaly okaiin qol
sheedy lkaiir kary ain shal opdair qopcha qoeedaiin qoty dar ykchaiin shar al or ockhaiin teor qockhaiin
oteey shey qokey aiin qokal cphain or cthair lchey okol qokain olchedar ar otcho shar qokal shedy odyar chckhedy qotchy okain lsees ol

chey aiin oteey keedaiin cheol opcheor qokar rody keos yeedal chdy dal lchdair qokeedy rsheal ssheols qokedy daaiin
shol qotedy qockhor olkal orey or tain areedy solkair tdy aiiindy qopcheol qokeedy saiin aiin oty ol shol okeey aiin
lcheedal olal al opchedol qol qokeey lchdy ain cphm ytedain olcheody sheody cheear lkdair daiin cheol qockhod okey or

qoky y otedy lkaiin alyear shedy dchedam olkeey ytam aiin opal qokshor lkaiin reody schaiir okshs qolkedam ykcheol qokeey lkeos
okeedy qotas qokeedy dar lkm dalydy chol dchedy qokeedy otal qol qoky shey chckheeam cphdy ol ody chcthedy qopees chol
orod olteaiin chedy saiin dchod dar shckhedy qokeedy olkar odyar ar ledar oteedy qoain oteedy shedair qoky raiin qokain doleol qokeey okeey am

chckhy cheey lsheeey ocheeedy dleey qol oteey shedy chckhes chey redain qokedy oseeey otedy shdaiin daledy qokal dar qopom or
ckheain ales aiin dal qokeeedy chol schol okchy sshain ted dar dcheedy chedy shol pchair qokar aiin qokchedaiin y
okedy qotchedy qoeeeody shedy sheody cheedaiin qokar alaiiin al cthed qokaiin rain olkeedy shaiiin aiin qockhedy qopcham chdy

ar dain aiin kchody otedy lkeody qoky lseedy pcho lsdol koiin chol dair sheeey shedy cheol okal dadair ctham ain
chdy aiireds kody dchedy otsho dalyeol odaiin olyees aiin kes aiiindy rr cheol aiiinody shedy opcheos
qofcheeoy otedy shckheo ykas dshs qokeedy kam ltdaiin daiin cheol oteedy ofchm qokain shor res odedy shor odyes rchedam

odain las okeeor sholy shedol qoky yshod daiin oltdy dcheor odyoly ar qokal shcthaiin qokam shedy daiin ain
ches qokeey aiin olkal aiiinaim opchedaiin sheeeo lsoiin qokeey qokain ocheeedy dy otol ckhear otal ypchedy oteey soredy saiin ypchedy
qofcher lshdam qol daiin ochor olyedol opeor ofeeol chdy opchdol odyedol ol shcthedam okeedy chor kedor shedy dal al

qeeedy okeey oteey lchedy chor qokedy qoky qokeedy qotdain chol qokol qokain ches okal dar chey rar lshory dar saiin ykchain
soldy chey okchedy qol qotchdy olal cheed qoky dsheedy chdy tchody ols ol lchey ol sshdy aiin kchear
otshm olkol qokain ar qokal qokchaiin rsheor oldaiin qol chdy otal ol solchaiin qoam qokaiin ytedar chckhy ykcheesy chedy

otal solkeeor ytdol chedy qokal qokaiin qoeedar qoky lkchol otal ytdol odyeesy okedy dar qokeey araiin olkchy raiin lteod chedy
laiin oseos dam oteey qokedy chey qochedy dched qokain yshdal kchdair opchody kdol dshar qokeey dar
qokal ytsdy keed qotaiin qol chey shy ar okar she qoky chckheedy saredy chor otoiin qokal lchedy lkchal dar

aireey qoan qokeody oty olcheeor dshair shckhy okchedy chedy lchey lteain qoks or dedy dalyedy kchm shol ytchedy
chey y dair okal lsam lchedy qokeey okaiin sheedaiin otaiin chdy chaiiin aiin opcheeor ol doloy raiin am shol yteel qol sain chedy
lkdy lcheaiin dar qolkaiin okeedy dar yteeey qokchedy lchedy qotal chckhedy qokeedy qoeod chy qokeedy chedy lol qokeey qoteey ar

cheeody fchd ol otal ckhe ol chey qokchedy qoeeos shey qotaiin sheedy pcham okoy yshaly aiiinedy
shol chedy qokar aryo chckhedor olchr yteear lchaiin dy oleedaiin or qokeey oped okar chdy qotchy olkeedy chedy soeda or
ar qokar ain otal arey orchedy daiin qokod qokchey chedy sydy chdy shor qotedor dshs olkchy qokeedy alody ar

ofeo dshar odair lm sheody aiin sheol shol ar odeol opchy al olkedy shey ssheeor shedor dar qokeeedy qoteeedy qol
chey roiin saiin shedar sheo oteedy or tsheedal qokain okeey lchod lsdol otedy oteey okain or soiindy ytchees ol
okedy otchedy shedy solkedar oleedy olkedy ar ycheesy sheed dchear sheol ytoiin olsaiin chckhey ar otal ol cthees qoalsy okeeedy chdy

lshols oteol qokal lshals qotain cheody ocher cheeeo odydaly roiin sheey shey dshs kair chey eseedain qoteeo qokaiin or
chok keal cphal qoedair aredy qas solkaiiin alydar qoky chedy qopcheeody chdaiin olkal lkchiiin ytaiiin dar
tsheedal dar daiin odeey sory otedy oteey opor otedy ofchey okchedal shedy chs ofchod alal qokchy ar dshar sham qokaiin qokeedy keed qokaly

ared cthedain ychdaiiin chedy qofchedy ykchaiin otchdy dar oteey sheey ychaiin qokeey lsal olsaiin oky chol oltedy
qofcheeoy dar qokey ar dy lshal cheedy ain shctho opcheeey roiin pcheeor aiin chckhedar reeey y qol dcheeedy okedy y
olkar qokedy qokeedy shedy ofcheody okchy opchain dykaiin qokal olchdol air qokey ches oteey y qokal olkaiin shail chedy

qokar old qokdaiin ar ocheedal qokedy teos qokey ycheain olchedor qol salal otchdy qol orar lteesy y chey aiin
otshdy dam chdy opcheeaiin saled ypchdy y lchey okedy alyeor qokar saledal kiiin fchdair lyeam chedy okeedy odeos
ocheaiin qokedy dchain yshedair ckheain qokchy reed yches chckhy opcheeaiin keeedy qoty or okeedy chaiin shckheor raiiin air

qokol qokain lsd sairor otey otedy otsho sar ltar areey ykeain ar saiin qokchy qopched dair ood lkol qokeedy pcheos
olkar qokedy oteey dar qokeedy cheeor chedy saireody okar chg olkeedy keeeody olcho ol saiin otain shedy
dleedain ytedair ocheer dar otaiin qokain ytchdy ycheeedy oaim qokar otchdy qopchaiin al lkain y sor lchain tedaiin am

yshdy oredar opor lkedy sod daiin solkal aiin otar aiin aiin sain rg otedy or rsheo shedy
lshes otedy qolked tedy aiiry otedy qokar kol kiiin otain otchdair olyes ltody octhaiin teeos shedy
sain ytoiin okaiin odyair daiin qokedy ofchol tedar ol pcheeor shey ytair shctheom chdol otod

opchaly oltiin qokain qokedy oteey otory saleo ykchm al sheod lcheos tcheeey qokchedy dar shckheeedy qokeey solain qotaiin lss cheedy raiin
ar okey shey qokeey qokeey ked teos leol shol ain arees res qolchee air opchor olchee cpheey lkam ain
daiin dsheesy odol otar oty lkcheeody dar ctho oain ykdo chdy qotal lkeody oleoy opg shedy cheol qopeeeody qokedy

qolkor oledaiin or otchey opo oleeey alal pched raiin chckhey ychiin opedy ykchok qokedy oteeo qokaiin y
shckhdy okchy scheor por qokcha shd yer ykan dar lcher chedy qokey dar oseod chedy otshdy qokaiin qopedam ykaly
sheody okshdy tsheedal qoedol soleo qolkol qokeedy okchdy al sales kor okchdo qokain chey oksheedar okchdy opedal pchedam

ded qokaiin ckhe lsheedy yer ar tdy qokaiin aiin sheol opcheor alam or olyary olchal aiin raiin cheol
olky cheeor tsheeoy olal ral olkeey olches raiin shey otal chckhey qokedy cthain olkaiin qokeos lkeos sor daiin otaiin dar
okedy qokchedy chedy qokshdam shedy daiin lkaiin shedy dchdy aiin chedy ochair ssheor odyeod cheey shedy odeo pchy cheol qotchy olshdair olshaiin

aiin qokeedy oteey oly otiin otain chedair dalyeor tg otedy otal kedam lshals fchey saiin qokal lseel aiin kchom chedy
lkaiin shy dar shol ofchaiin okcheeody qokedy dalm qoty lseedy ykchdal tchar shedy otal ol tg solkiiin ykeedain lol
qokeedy kar oty otedam orm lkcheedaiin opo tshdair dy dalyey oteedy shar okshg opchdair lkair lydaiin roiin rchdar

aiin chor ches saled qokal sheey sheol shedy qoky lkchear qokaiin saledam opchaim okeedy dar dar qokal otedain ar
dalyair qokchy ctho qol qokar yches qokal olkd cpheeedy lkedaiin qotain otsheody solkey otal cpheedy chdy dy cheey chaiin qokar rdaiin chedy
chey oryol deedal chdy rshair odam ltaiir chedy qokeedy lcheol qoteedy otal redaiin fcheos soiinor qokal qokain ledy

qotaiin okain chcthol qokal al qokar qotedam aiiinaiin chedy qokeey otaiin oteedy okshdar qokal sod lkchdal qokain qokaiin al qokeedy dar
qokaiin oteeo qoeeo aiin qokal reeey okshedair opeor chor chckheeey otod lkcham ltes shol qokedy
qokal aiin dolain cthes reeo areody otal lkcheeey olkchedy qoody alyair shckhaiin pchy aiin okshoiin ltdaiin chckhy

soiiney oo cthair doledy ksham yked dchedy qokeedy lcheal otedy aiin aiiindy dalyor qokchan shedy
qol keo qokdal seody odal okal dar ykeam olchody rar odyar chol qokchy orcheor am
lcheedal chedol qokal sheedar olshiiin olchees yshedy sain qol yshdaly chedy saredy kchol qoeor dchor ykcheeo qokedy

olchary chedy ochor daiin sardy okd soredy dain chedy qopchey chckheedaiin rchdaiin ltedor qokedy or otchy qokchy ychor
tdy oredar okain y ytchedy dchor otedy qofcheaiin chedy ypchdal qokchy teody shcthaly oteedy sain qotsd otedy cheey dar
orey sareo lteeey yteedar qoky chckhdaiin oedy lky ltedol okshaiiin al lkdar saiin sared cphg kedam

lcheeoy chedy shody otdar soly ol dolain oteey qokeody qol oky dar qokeedy schaiin otol olkdal olkal odeey qokchy to daledy
dy reees otal ol qoteey yeor ol ol otal qokaiin okeedy fchod oky olcheed oraiin qokeedy olky chedy qoteedy ctheol shol peol shor olsheol
aiiindal rcheol kchedaiin air ypcheos olkar qoky lsheeos ychar tshey ocheedal chedy saiin qokain yeeey ycheeeody chedy

ar qotchair kchaiin rcheey olkeedy ol lko qokar shedair soiinair cpho lsain qokeedy raiin qol
tsheedal chckhy aiiinaly kal lteod dar aiiineeod kdar cthaiin otchdy taly qokar ltan or qokey aiin okchy saiin ykdal
qodol solke ain ykchais qol lky air qokchedy shas raiin oteam ol sain dar lkaiin oiiney qoky qopcho cheol

lor ykchom keed odyal okal shedy qol olydy sed ypcheody chol lkaiin oteody qokeey ol sain otar rg ykcheor chdy
chedy dchm qokain solaly qokeedy chdy kchoiin aiin yteees shckhy reeor sho opchiiin shey opcheeey alydar qokal saredy qokchees tdair
qokey oleedy ted shckhy qotchol qokal chdy shckhair qoteedy ol lor qopcheody okeedy chey oksheod chckhey aiin qotchy ypchdy qol

oiiineo dar soly ychal y daiin lcho okchdy ar qopcheol qokaiin cheear qokeedy or dain chedar dar qokal pchdaiin y
laiin soled chcpho dar daiin olseol lsdain lkcheedy dshain qockheor olkeedy okaiin sheedy rchey
dar ksheey alal ol qokeeedy shey ltoiin qokeey qol qokeedy ytam qokeedy shsairy chckhy cthedaiin qoteedy aiin ar shckhedy qotal qokaiin okeedy aiin

cheey shey otol ckhedy ockhdaly lseedain lo qotal chedy olshy sheedaiin qokedy ol lyo ytedal olcheedaiin qokain pchear
oty dar qokeedy chey pod aiiinaim otcheody qokchaiin dalyedy teeam keod chedy qofchaly otar leor cthes or
dar opeear shedy chckhedair ain qoam ots daiin ain chal shedy okeey lkcheeody qotedy shckhedy ysheo rchey

olkol otain qoeeo qokaiin ychedair yteeey ol olteeey dsheeor qol oty chs ain cpheod chedy otey qokedy olkal qokal ol
shckhdy opcheeey qotchedy okedair chdy otey olkeedy ol qokeedy shedy qokar chedy qokeey qokeey shoiin okeedaiin okshoiin rshey qopcheod air
ockheol aiin daiin chor ar dal dykdy cheedy shedy cheol qolkeeor shedy led cheey kas chdy qopchy sales qokal chdy

ral olkedy ycheeedy olky dsheeor qotal ain qokeal solkody chedy qoky chal lkeeedy ar olkedy shedy okeey okedy ar sheol opchor
lchey alyey qokeeol ldy lkol solcheedain ykedy shedy ros olcheeor ain soree chdy solcheey shedy oeol
chedaiin sheol shdaiin oteedy redaiin pcheor olkedy ychoiiin otod qoky dar olkeedy qotal aiin chey redy okaiin qokear sheol daiin air

aiin soiinedy opeeeody shedy qopchaly kedair chdol ykos oty chckhy okeedy lsy ar oteey pchs otedy chor cheol
okey ololy okeedy shdy qokal ykaiin dam qokaiin keeey alydy qokeey oky ycheedy kedaiin qotdol ltes cheain ardy
okedy qotchedy aleedaiin lseed chedy chey ain dy daleol qokar rs arey lcho ol kshaiiin otd cpheedy shedy cheey ol

chedor chdol lchedy qokeedy olcho chey lkchdaly am teeey qokchedy cheed lkchal lchor dy pchain aiiredaiin shey
opchol ctheam odyaiiin al qokshedy oteedy lkaiin qotchedy olos qoky cheeor or daiin cheey kaiis chedy daiin keeor ar
qokol peol dair cheey rr olkchedy dar oteey shedy ol ol schedy okchdy dshaiin pchain orchain opchees shedy

qol otal okals fchair shedy ofchor shedy chcthedy qokeeol saror otchdam shdy lkdal okal keedy chedy
olchoiin qokedy olkar cheol osheody ol shaiir ykaim dcho otain cheedy saldor cheeody qog daiin cheol
chey odyeod ypchey otedy otaiin shedy okal olchar sar chedy tchor dam chedy okal qokar otedy okshedar aleeor sordy qokeedy chedy

tsheeoy okealy sheedy dar cthes aiin shedy ledar okeeor ol cheedy rs chey otchedy dshedair chdy oteey otdaiin chedy qokchy opchaiin
dchol qokeedy tsheedam kiiin qokain qoteedy shedy dolol ctheedaiin or dain qokaiin chaiin otal olchar paiin saiin chedy solcheeam chedy
dain odyal shor oteos okal lcheeoy chd qokeey qotain qol lkaiin otedy olkaiin qokair oty cheear qokar chedy ytchdy qockhey syoiin or

otedy osy sheedy rcham chedar lss qokaiin ycheody lais oldam ol dar qokol qokain shey shor kdaiin oleeam okchy chckhy
qokol oto qotey kol otal shedal opeol okedy ychees pched dar ypchaly ypchary y chcthol qotchy cpho aiin
reaiin otchey qodaly ychesy chedy chey solkes olkeor lcheal ychsdy shey lchedy cthol ssheeam ar

dar shedy am olchedol qokain olshedar air dar araiin otedy lkchy shedy okeedy shedy lcheer dar otchy shar olshor
qoky dar tchiin pain qokal okal reeody kedam lcheedal chedy okaiin otain dain oksheees chey roiin al qoteey yol lkees shey
yteeey chey shey aiin lchey alydy aiin okchey otiir sshdal eseey dar shol rchor seol otal lshol qoty okg solchdy y

lcheeoy chom otdor qotody chedy opchdy otal chckheeody lkchsy aiin qokeedy cheey otedy chey olan pcho
shol shedy lcher ychor otey dar qokchy orchdy chdy qokal ol olky am tam chckheeody shey shol olchal oky shedy okary qopchaim
chail reesy y taiiin po rcheal shckhaly shedy ocheos araiin aiiram aiin sedy chcthy shedy

sheesy saiin rdam lkm okar odyar kshear chedy qokedy al okal shedy pchedy opcheod keeody ykol areeor aiin

kd qokchey chckhy qokeedy dain aiin
ochdal aiiram aiin qoto
saiin aiin qokchy qotedy aiin toiin ain qokeey ar opchaiin dam lkain ol saraiin lchedy cthair oldaiin dsheoy teey opchedam
otaiin ltiir olkal otedy olsd ol schod sheees qokedy qokar sheor yeedal chedy shol aiin daiin am shedy daiin rchain tchdaiin or
otsheol cthey shckhaiin oddy lcheaiin qodaly lteeor lkchedy keeedy shol aiin qokal otd aiin

qotar aledar qoky lseedy olesy lcheedal ycheol okey ytaiin chcthor qokeey aredy dair dsheeor otal olchg qokain dar tcheeor or
oro olkedy chedy cthesy or sain otar shedy dair am dar oteey keeos okedair olche kear qokaiin ol pchol
lkaiin shy oleeor qokedy qokeeor chckheeor tair olkal olchody cheees otaiin dar lcheedal dar kchor daiin ar oteedy tched

rody qokain lkey y yteesy odeeedy keain qokchy lchedy solchal air y yshdor chol shedy qokain odeol sheey dar
aiin shcthey olyy qoeeey oryain okeey yeedy olshedor chedy solam shedy lchm raiir olkchedy keos sareody ody
daryeey qokedy chcthdy qoky sheear sheol shedair sham otair okchor dorod ypchdy qokeol olkaiin chedy

ykedam ochor otar otedy dam tsheody olchod sheody aiin cham ol chey qochedy lm ssheey olsha shedy
orcheo ol teeody chdy schaly qokar shedy cheol shor sals qokaiin oteeo cheesy cthedy qolkor qokeey oteey dar opcham chedy
qoty yshdy sain ol ocheeoy chckhes chdy cthy ras ol oteey soleeedy odeedain okar qokedy oshdy cheedy qotedy

qokaiin opeeos qokedy lcheody ocheaiin dshdol shedy qokeey qotedy qokal dykeor lkcheody sche als chedy dain arey
chey odyeeor teey qokaiin soreor okchdy otedy otal chaiin daiin yor qopair sheeody salody lor tchy chol saiin ar
qokeey dar lchor saiin solkair daiin qoleos chiiin qokain lkedy dam lkdy psheor saiin lol okchees dar

dchey yshaim okeey chedy cthed otey okey oleedy ordal teor reeos rg daiin cheedar ol ypchdar
lchdair tedaiin cheed chedy saleam pedar oleees kshaiin kcheeody am otal ytes sheey aiin chckhy otchey shal chedy qokaiin qokaiin y
lcheaiin opar qofcheor otcholy y qockhdar yteeody shedy ockheey qokedy okes okedy qocheody chedy cthedaiiin otdal olkal dar

dain am opchedar chckheedy lshdy olya chedy okchy daiin red dalor sain reeos keod aredy ypchdaly chckhy arom al
lkaiin olkchedy okiiin oteeos ar saiin qol saiin qeol ysheeedy deol oleeody qotedy qoteey otedam shedy ledar chedy tedam
opchedy saiin oledain ofcheor tchol odyr saledy ypche okeeor qoty sheeody yshedy chedol chedy sory aiin

ykchair qokol oteol cthear dar cthiin qotain ytedair ar ol qokey okshes dar qokeedy cheey shey qokeedy olkal air qockhol qokeedy am
shckheey qokeey pcheol pshdy qokal ykam or ofchedy ysheesy ltes solkaiiin redal olcheees qokaiin ain
pan shedy chedy oedy shey okal qokeey fcheeey ochedy chcthar y okeedy oedy qokal laiin qotchy sshdy lteedy qordy oks aiin

oky lchedy qokeedy ofeal chckhy qokeey qokaiin olcheees chor lsy lsaim olyeeody dar ypchdy oair shedy qokeo otey qol opchy aiin
keod qokaiin dshar chedy qofcheos chcthey lcheedal dar shal qokain qokeedy aiin oseeey sheols keeedy olyey
chckhey ykan otair sarod qokaiin odeos oteedy olshaiin qodol lchedy qokal qoky ytedar ales qoaiin ledain ol olyedaiin al

ol opcheeody al soiinsy otedy qoraim qotedy qokal reeeo chdy chcthdol dar otal oleeaiin kor kchedy
qorey olkeedy otchol lchair qokeedy aiiredy shckhy roiin shckheos qopcham air ol qokol qokain dar sches chckhiiin dar sairain
chey oiinain qolkeeor qoteees chey saleoly shedy am qol qokal qol qockhdy sholy otedy chcthaiin cthsdy olcheds olshdair daiin dar

leol kaim qokshain tr alyain shor choiin qokedy qoteedy qockho ain shckhy qoctho qokal yor daiin sar oleeody lchedy
ycheos dam aiin opchain kchdar olchdy odyal odyeees chcphaiin sheedy qokal solkan ltd aiin
ledy qoledy solchal al yteeey kor olyain kor opchedy lsedol okaiin tchdy ockhaiiin qokeedy ar olkedy chedy

qolkedy tchr qokchedy ar ordar olkedy ches dykain kcheor qopchedy shedy ltdain shoy doled opcheeody lkchoiin y
qokaiin chedy qokar aiin chey qotchol olkal ytedor lchedy kcheal pchaiin dal y dair chctheody olcheam ain ykcheesy chedy
okeey ar qokeey ytsy shedy lteor okchom lchedy kchdol shedy sain qor otchedy shedy oseos olyeedy ol cphdy y opcheeedy

dar ofeey lseedaiin chedy qokol opedy shey lcheedal lsheeody shedy chcthedor ckhor ykcheeey keos olteedal chsdy am ockhedair chedy
che chedy tal ain otey olshedar dar kchedal key sheol chey ol daiin solcheor or qoky sheol aiin qoky okshar ardal
shol qotr qotchedy chckhy lkain chdy okal yaim sain olshd shckhy kaiin qokeedy qokaiin qokain sheey qokaiin aiin shol ky reedaiin ypchedy

rchaly ykchody qokedy otchey cheeey kaim daiin otol pol ypches ol ran yee tchair shckhy ran qokaly
qoky qos chey oiindar dchedy daiin qokeey qol kcheeos raiiin aiin olyedal otain aiiined kedol olchdor dcheeor okan cheol
chey qocthedy qokchey oteod chedair yor qokar shedy osr qokedy qol ysheeey am qokdal opcham y areeedy qokeey qokaiin ol

lkdy qokchedy ain doledy kcheesy chdy qoraiin okeedy y okal ytary qokain or shedy opchees chedal chdy
qoteedy shedy oteey sheody qokain odyos dar otshol ockhdor ol cpheain lsd keedar ltedaiiin pedy qokal cthaim qokar qotchdy qokeedy ol
qokal ol dair ycheeal ol pcheey ol okeeeody qol okey shedy otal qokeol cheey chedam qokchey qokchey dsheed qol

okal shals qokain ol qokal qotar al schy lchedy shckheor shedaiin ar qokal aiin qokar ro osg aiin ql qoped
qokeey raiin olteedam lsholy ltoiin qokeedy ytedaiin olchdy de tey lkeol qokal reeor qotedy qockhor cthedor ar
lkaiin lkchody chsairy ol olkal qokeey solksdy lchedy cheey okdaiin otchdy qoeeo aro olchiin ckhaiin opcheeeody odyody qolchs or

dalair eseo char odaiin qotaiin chckhy qeol ytaiir chey kor chey qocthedy sheey okain qoko qokeey reesy sarol

daiin ches ofchs qotody lkche opal okaiin reeey qokchedy dar chor shey aredy lo daldair otal okey dar

saledam chs alam qokeedy chol okedy redol aiin teeey qokchedy ar qokeey ain opcheed lteed qoky lchedy orod
dar cheedy air osoiin sheeal ychr qotcho chdy aiiinor doley yty chckhol qotchdy lchedy ypchedol ol
areol scheeey okchedy dar otshm lcheos laiin dain chor yteeor chod aiin cthaiin tm okedy alyo dar olkeey shedy

qokal oteeey dar qockhaiin opcheedaiin raiin y lcheeey alydy oree ltdy dcheor qokain lchey qochain ypcheol ytcham chckhy otal saiin or
okeeey al qokar shey okcheeey keeedy sedain ykeol sairod qopchar aiin qol qockhain chedy dchdy chdy dal chdy
lkaiin lteod ol daiin cphedy qokal ykeeey qol otey lkchr lchedy qotedy opchar otdal shal ytsd qodaly qokchaiin

ltaiin daiin qotedain shaiiin y qokeedy aredy kshain otar or opchy solkair dal ol
cheedy shedy lchey opdy cthaiin shckhaly okar lsed dain qofchor qokeedy okchain saiin sain roiin saireos chckhey opdaiin chdy
cheeeody olkeear ar qokeedy shols ped opcham ain qokal qotar roiin cheey ltes solkeod qokaiin qol dy or

olyedy qotal chckholy shedy oredy tedaiin she shedy ol sshg shedy olchey raiin seoly lchedy ody otaiin aiin

chedy qokaiin chedy saim ocheeoy chedy daiin aiin kchedal kaiin okchy yched olkeey salar qokar olchdam qopchod qokaiin al
okedy oiineor ain qokar salar otedy ol sheey cheol yshdol shedy ol qokal soldair sar tshor qokeedy qokeey am ypchedy okey shary ol
oty dar sheol dleeol ar scheeey qokchedy shey oryor ody qokal otod kchdar ykcheeey shedy qodaly al qokain cheey qotom aiin

am tchedain aiin dykm dar lcheeedy dy qokal sham sheedy chol dchaiin qokeedy aiin qokal qol odyeedy opchair sored
dsheeey lkchd ydy solkaiir shy ytedain olar qokaiin otedy cheear ykaly otal oteey ckhaim chey sheedar oty yteedy dar

ykar ral olkchdy lshdal qokeeor kr ar yeedal chy qotdo cheol sar okedy qokedy ltaiin aiireeody olcheedy dar

or shcthedam qokeedy qokar qotody aiin qokeey chcthey sar alydar qotar qoteam olchedar shs saiin ol tchedy

oiiineal qol daiin cheey lkchedal cheol okeedy oksholy shey kchaiin daiin olsdy olcheedaiin qokeey chedy cpheod aiin qokeedy qokar raiin y

ra aiin opchal ol cheey qotedy qotey keedy otaiin ckhar ain cthair sheody dar tr qokain qotedy

qolkain ysheeey oiino dain solkeod okaiin chckhy deeedy lkain shedy qokey chckhy daiin keear otol sheedy or chal qoks aiin

qokaiin okody chckhy okeedy chctho olkedy chedy ololy ykeed res lshealy qokain okes qotal dar sar al kshedy

otedy shol roiin shckhaiin aredaiin ol cheey chdy chckhey ykeeedy qokeey olkair qokar cheeor okedy chedy sheey chckheesy chedy
chey alyey schaly qokey ain shol qokdam or so qokeey ar qopchdy olchd ral shctheody qokaiin chdy dy olkchy ar
daiin qodo shedy alody sair darol orees ral lkaiin dar kchdol qotdair opchor dal qair lkeed cheol qokal dar

oeos aiiroiin olchol qokchy chal qokaiin shedy cthal qoedair shckhy saledy ockhaiir oiinedy qokeey kaiiin rdor olky qokedy shd shar chedy

chctho ocheeoy ololy qotain tcheeedy orcheor fcheeody otedy lchdy reedaiin qol chctheey rsheedy qol daiin dytedy

otol opain ory shaiiin qocthdy ar lkedy okal paiiin salaiin ykeod shol otain reeos shedy aiiindal dair oeos

saiin qokain lchdy olchd shedy ldy okedy sha ychaiiin qotedy shan shckhy fchal lchdaiin opeeos dar cthear

ood lkar qooy chaiin sheey tchm okedy ches oksheeody lsdol otedy otsheor lkchedor dar qokeedy ol
tsheedal lshal am dain oteey lkcheeey lchor qoteedy sheol shedy ofeo cho shckhy alydar qokaiin chol olkar aiin otaiin olchd sheey air
chey okchedy pedal lcheody sheody dar qokeedy arey oain qokcheol otey res olkchy chdy tear qokeey lkaiin alyeody qoeedy ol

opchor dal y cheey qotam qokain ctheol dcheody chary cheol cheey qoedol oreey lkchedar kaiin olyam y
daiin aiin aiirsdy ar cheey shedy sheey olkedair lsody ain tchees dar ocher oles tshdair qotar olkchdy ol qokaiin odedy

chckhes qokar roiin daror kcheos dam qokchey ps laly qotedy dchedy tan odyd okeear ol okaiin qokaiin chckhy

shal shedy cheedy ol opcheeody aiin leor cheedy dsheesy otaiin ckhor qoky lseeor ypcheol tain lteain cheed odeeedy

sheody aiin qokeey chey shedy ol lkaiin qokchedy olody dshory sheckhy okeeor lseeam raiin aiin daiin or odeeedy qokol opedy orom aiin
scheor reeey ocheedal ykes qokain chey qoal arm okal alok qopchdy lair kcheeos redor oksheedaiin chcthedy

lchedy qockhol opchal ykaiin arol lchor chctheor lchaim aiiinedy okal ockhair qokey al schar chedy
oeody okched aiireeaiin shedy ol daryeey chedy cthedair qol dairdy ar taly qokaiin ykedol chckhy qockhaiin shey
yeaiin cheeody chedy qokal sheckhy lsheedaiin sor dair qokaiin oldy qokal chey am oteedy okaiin solked dair sairaiin yshy shey qokaiin redol oredy

daleo opchals sheedy dshaiir alyedy chckhy qokshedy taiir otchedy qoeeod dar otchr otchedy chedy qopchol orees olchdy

dchor qokeey chey qotedy ol tsheaiin qoy shm ardaiin chedy cheey y dal dy choy chal lchedy cheey chedaiin rchol

okaiin shedol qdy shckhdar lkaiin otedy ra shedy lod ol qokey qokedy yshedaiin oteeos chedy qokeey araly dain sar or

oksheedal ofchdy qoy aiin okeey aleeey odyes ar shedy lcheedal dar seor qokeey al ochr reedy oredy

qol cthedy qokey ar tdar qokshed tedam ockhey lkaiin qokchedy dar rchod dchor teed dar

qokaiin oteedar qotchair qoteeey ain kchdol shey qoteey ykeeody lsheeor otedy rdy cthail aiin otcheeody ykar qoky odyar pchaim

qoky chckhy qokeedy okar dshar shedy shor cheol soreedy ol qotal ol dchol okeedy lkain ckhees lsg dar daiin odey

okchy ycheedain lkary shey qoteeedy otedy shdain odyedal lkedy shedy ockhdain olshor lses qokdair rsheol ary ain tchain
okchey oleeey qoedain otedy sched chor shey dykdy dal olchedar reeody dar okeey pchaiin okaiin dar

okeey ar dam odyal dar qokedaiin dar oteedy daiin chedy chedy qokedy aiin dar otaiin pchey teees ra sheedy oteedy aiin

ofchedy teeey shy keos otar ytedy qokeey areedy aiin otedy ypchedal qoeod soleos schor okeedy qokar chckhy saireeol tchaim

oleeody oleesy otal qokedy chdy aiiinain chey rody qoedar dsheedy qoteey ain daiin lseol lchaiiin reedy qokeol
daryeo raiin lkeody chey aiin dal shor ychedy daiin olkal ol chcthaiir kaiin sheol dshor otchy opchol chcthor qokeey oty chedy odam air
reeam opchedy qokey shedy okal araiin lchaim opchsy shedy qod lkaiin orydar qokol qokain kar qokedy qol sor tchees qol

okchor keeo otedy ol ssd chedy dam otedaiin qokedy ytedol qokal lkcheeey aiin rsd shedy qokeer solkdol lchedy ody ain
lcher chedy qotaiin opsdy chedy chor taiin otedy cthedy okchy dar okchees qota lkches am qopchedam qoteey chedy
olteedal or kchoiin redar dar ysheeeody otain rchor shey ykchl ar dy cheey oledair kal sorain qokal saiin okary rcheeedy

dsheeod solkdy sar alyol schaiin shol olkain or laiin dain odyeol okal shedain kair qoksheey odyedal chedy
lchey aiin dal cthdy chedy soraim okey y ypchy lteeedy kcheeeody kor okar qoteeey aiin dam shal ain yshy chdy qokedy
qokar shey qdy shol ar cheedy chedy dain sheey qopchor sheedaiin dar lkear solcheedy dar sorey tshdair soledy

dleey ykedor shedy okeey lteeo oty shedy oteedy raiin chcpheody shd qokaiin shey olaiin qotal qokaiin qotg qokain shdy
qopchdy soleos olyaiin sared daiin qoky dar teesy ol lchedy qokeedy dar okeey ol opchin aleeo sorol cthes ar
qoky chedy qokeedy yeeoy shedy aiin qol schesy aiin sm dain qofchdy lsdaiin daiin cheedaiin shiir ysheody olkar lsod

cheedy qotedy qockhear qopchar cheedaiin shedy olyeeam pey solkeear qopeody dolo okal ychiiin ol qokey chedol saiin chedy
oty ytdaiin solkedair chedy ody cheey aiin ykchedam tdar ol lkaiin chey lchedy kchy keeody shedy tair
okey aiin lchey qotair qokal qokear qoeel qokedy solkaiiin qochedy chedy lkeo ral chckhey keedar shd okedy odyal dar qokal cthedy

qokchey qol ochol dalydal dain reey daiin sheey okain leeol cthy odyeody ockhals otair ctheed cheol cphiir raiin taiin
olkeey dar qokar ofcheeor ar shedy osedaiiin olkain dar qokal qokal shee olkeedy sheed olchal lfchaiin qokaiin ar qokar ofchor qokaiin shey opchary qol
yor qokar ches aldaiin ar aiirdal ofeo lsal cheedy aiin qokeedain qokeedy okchdy lteed qordy qopchair

lchedy kor chey oryaiin dalyey chol cheey ar qokeedy yshaim qokeedy qokal yty chckhy soledaiin qol okedy qokedy opchees ol
qoleor chcthar otedy qokar ytol okeey otaiin qopaim lkaiin qokchedy olain qokol olkain chckhy saiin lcher shedy y oaim
qoaiir oryedy otchy ar okcham cheeey oiinear chcphed otchal chedy otal chckhey qokain aiin qokal ordy shor shey opchy ol

oleeody lchedy qokal qokal yked aiiinedy olkol okain chedy oteey olkaiin rdain qokedy shol chs rdor y oeeedy
sorain qokchy dal roiin ypchair olyeody aiiinol sordam ycheed sheey cha salaiiin ain cthor okeedy aiin
ocheedam dshedor ykeeo qokeey chdaiin lkeol opchalsy shd shal ytdor kair oledal chdy opchalsy chdy qokal ltoly ain

qokar kan lkaiin qokchedy qokedy ytedaiin lchedy lkor aiiredam ytiin qokain dsheedaiin tshaiin ody qotedy soiinor yeos oteedy aiin
oedy ctheody lsal otchy lchedy qokal keeey oiinain opchor dain otchey otdam reain teody sheckhy dshedair olkal otedy
opchey lyeedain qokeedy rshain oey scho ol sairdy lkchdor yteeod cheeor solol rsheal odyeeor aiin

chey ytaiir ochdy or opches kdy chey otedy okedol dchdar oteedy daiin am dal chedy lkos qoeear sear dain dorey cthedol shedy
dain lchedy qokal odyeoly tdair olkchey lkchal oeeedy ykeod otchey dshdaiin dain aiin olkal qokedy qoteedy ychr chsd chedy
yeeoy olchdaly okedy olkeod chdy ssheedaiin rs kaiin keeor qood chdy okey qoteedy qooy olkchdy dar qopeeody cheedaiin qokal qotedy

lsho rody ol lsheed pchdam aiin tsheer qoedy pchair opcham solkg qopchey dykol
ol scheeedy teeey qochey qotal ol ledy dain okaiin sheear ypcheody olkchey chdy chctheor qotshdair tom ar
olkeedy otedy qokeey qolkeey aiin shol chedy ood chey ar tchor otal otaiin kody am cthy okshl qoteedy ar qockhol

okshom otail qotchaim okchor okeedy ychar chey shedy qoal sody ol ar or tedaiin dar
shody opol kshary keeey qocheody olkeey al okchr otchedy chckhal opchedam okedy ram chol dam qoked ltoiin qokeedy chol dal qokeeedy qol
okedy qotchear cheey olcheedaiin aiiineos cheedy oksholy chedy cthdy qol saiin qokdaiin olshes qoteeody shedy chcphair ty dar

chiin otain lchedy ykches ychair sey qokal aiin kcheedy chdy oddal daiin aiin qokar koiin shd daiirdal
lkaiin qokchedy chedy cheedy raiin qokal aiin teeo olkain aiin dy chdy oreey dain chedy okal olchees oteol dykdy qokaiin qol
qokchy oteedy lseeaiin shedy ol shaiiin qotol olkain shey qokeey qokaiin lseody kchr kear qotal olteedal chedy qokeey otedy otal qokedy ol soiined opcheeaiin ol

ycheod odaiin dam qokedam shor reeey chedy shal okain dchey qopchedain oleey cheey ychary ol
lkchoiin solkeeor lsam ches ol qokal qokaiin ykar lko lor qoky air chedaiin qol
qokal y ll yshed soleey shom oksheedy okched sar oryedy sheol or dalo qoky shdaiin pchdy qokair

qoksheos ychesy alyear qotal ol qokey ltaiir chiiin sheedy qoteedy char qokair rchaly okols qokain chy qol
qockheor ody qokol ckhaiin qokaiin pcheedy ain cpheeor or kcholy aiin qokar qokchdy tedy or osor salsdy dar olyo tdar
qoteey dar ql kaiin dy olkeeedy chol otey ar soiinair daiin daiin chedy ardaiin ykeeo pchaly olyear ypchdy chedy sheey qol

ypcheos otchdy otain odyal qokar shear qokeey pcheedy lteeey al otar shedy daiin okedy ychor chol om olkeedy lchedy
shctho sheol ol chey reesy otain saleeey aiin dal eseey chedy ypcheedaiin olcheeo qoksheol cheey ol salal shctheol dam aiin
chey oiinol okey kdar daiin olkedy kd shd omo chdy ykom yshedy lkdy shckhy aiin lear shol otedy qopchey

okol sheedy dar cthes kol redain qodaiin odyas ain chedy pchaiin lkdair okey oteedy ol opchor
ypchdal qokal qokeeor aiin qoeos taiin omdy rar shedaiin otedy qokeedy lkchaiiin qotchdar dykedy dy dar
ltsy ykoly kdair ar qotal qokaiin qoeedy olsedam chedy schee qotal qokaiin ychody ain otal olkr lsal aiin

ofchedy okeedy ltesy alyol ydy sheeo shckhy qotain dy ledy lkaiin reeo kaiir al daiin daey olyey
kchear ykchd air qdar tsheeoy char roiin aiin ykchaiin okey lteeey cheed al schaiin
shal qol kchoiin odyody shedy okshd y tear chedy ody tsheor ain shckhair daiin daiin odyl chedy kchedy

oltor lkdy qokey qoteeody ychaiin saireey opcheol okeedy saiin chol otchdy chedy okal ykched oraiiin y cthed
oeody ofeedain dar okal oteey chedy cphal ain okeedy cheey chedy ykchaiin cthedaiin ykeed oro qokar aiin lcheol olyy am
qofcher chedy kshor qockheedy ol ypcho qol ykchy qokeedy shedy ochedam aiiinaly eseedain ykeedaiin shedor reedaiin qol

daraiin yeaiin lshory doredy sheol qokeedy lsiir shey rd shary reor kcheed ykol shcthey chdy ockhiin okain or daiin qokdair
qotey y qokal ytchedy oteedy okeey kaly aiiinol ochdair kchedal shes otam chedy qokey al qokal tshedy opchoiin aiin
dar schdor shedy aiin olkar ytol qokeey qoks y qokeey aiin qokeedy tchod olkeey ar qoleody pched opchedaiin aiin

chedy dchdy okain cheedy solkeod aiin qopchedy ald okedy ain olkeedy ol alan chctheol ykeedar olsheam qoal opchdair
qofcheedal dshedal otedy aiiineor qokchey ar ydar tdol lchedy ypchair ctheeedy taim ytchaiir qotcheody dar taiin
lko yeedal shedy aiin shckheal qoteeo char odeos sheey yshed chey aiin qokaiin ytd qotaiin ltan chd aiiror

okedy aiin soleody chdy daiin oaiin otar dor ychd oshod opcheos shes ytedol qokain ley sheol or
qolkaiin yshes shd daredam lkaiin aiin lkear tsheedal ches qokair shckhy chedy yshedy okory ches ypcheeedy
oreor ochor lol qokeedy chdy olkal qoky ol qopdaly chckheedy tsheos schaiin cheey rsdy lshs ol

dykey oseody okar otar al qol ctheeod kedy otsheey olyeees air qotchdy otedy qokal cheeey ytar otaiin oledol cthor
kshey qotaiin sheey lshsd res pchain lchain qopchaiir qocheody qol okaiin al lkain chdy ykchy lchedy qeey qoteedy cheol
sairdy shckhedy okeey solkeody dain qokaiin y qoteedy dam reeody poiin aryedy qokal lyo sheedy sain saleeey ar qokal qokal ain

qokol okain cheed odeeedy dchaiin okeey shol olchody okar lkcheeey aiin sol qokaiin chdam oteedy chckheeody qokain qoteedy ol
qoky ar qopar okees ardar dcheeedy okeedy qokear kal qoks sho ochaim dain dleey dar soly qokedy soleol qokey shey
qokchy qokedy fchg dain dar lody rdy daiin sheody ysheol odedam cheedy ychiiin qokeedy chckhy oteey chey or qockhedy qokeedy lkain fchdam ol

cphedy daiin qokaiin saledor lsheedy olchd lkaiin aiin daiin rail olteedam ychom yts otshdy dar cpheedy lssd otedy
lkain shedy shar taiin aiirdol chedy ol qokain otaiin y teody qokdal olyol qokal reeor qokeey dar olkar doleor ol aiiry shedy
sheody sheeor qokal lsedor olchd qokeedy olcheeeody air lcheeedy olyedor aiin lchdy lkaim olchsy shedy

otaiin tdal chody qedam ocho okedy al olkeey otedy lkain shes sheedy dam cheey ar qofchaiin opchy shedy
otedy dain cthaim chey y sheoly dsheedy pcheos ctheey ldy kcheos chcthor chedy or cthom ain
lkeor chey qocthain dalyedy chor oleedy qoteey shedy qokshor okaiin otedy olal odeo ary qotedy eseo cheol osy shedy

chey res chdy otshod qokeedy qokedy odam am oredam otey taiin cthsd dar olkeedy cheey char seol cthom y
otar ksairy sheedy lteedy sain okshar qokdaiin olcham shey okal ychar ofchod qokeedy shedy oddy otar sheols oso
lcheedal chedy daredy cthsd chedy oear qokeedy dshdy kcheedar char soredy lkar lteedar dar oteey chcthaiin otal qokedam

qotedy dyko cheey kedy otal okees okeedy qol lkaiin aiin daiin lor qokal okaiin shedy tsheeedy olkar sheody ytsaiin opcheody
qokaiin qokeedy chdy oiiineey or keeey al dair lkcheoy sheckhy shedy chedy qokaiin sheey reedy oldol cheain ched
ochedy okeey qol qopchdar cheol teeal chckhees al lkaiin solkeees qokal ykor lchey tsheaiin shey shar qokeedy keam shsaiin olyeor

sareody oeor shckhy qol sain sain shedy saiin cthdal dar schdal chcphaiin daiin qokaiin cheol orm okal chedy chdy
dalair okal shedol qokeeor or sheody olchs olkaiin qosdy raiin cheey kes qoteedy oleedaiin alees kal al
chey okchedy lchedy okedy lkchal qokal or qockheody dair lsan fchair qokchey qotedy cphes kair chcthey cheedy olaiin

okey qokedy lkain kals qotain dar qokal octhdaiin olkees solkr qokchedy cheeey olcheeey lkaiin kedam okaiin ol oteedy oiiineeol qotedy aiiror
otal qotain tsheedy cheeaiin qotedy shdy otain saiin ked laiin tchin yched ar lchor qokeedy daiin ychg cthm ol
oleed oksheedaiin air sald dchdal qokeedy olkaiin chedy qokey shedy otshdy ykchar lses olcheeody shey daiin am

qokshdair salaiiin qotcho opchal ol cthady olchdy qokain dal dcheeedy lkaiin am oty qotedy qokain cthain shckhy ksaiin okal shedy ol
qockheor cheey qokedy ykchody lsey oteey qokeear lkcheeody qoteeey y ctheos qopeeey qokchedy olar shd opchor
lkol odar qokeedy qokdaiin chdy okchey raiin ykchedam shol am lym shckhy ol qokchey shedain raiin solchedol shedy ol

pcheedain olkaiin areody saiin solkody kdaiin shd qokaiin sheedy sheey rchdy al aiiredam tes olsheel olchoiin olyor
eseey keeeo olshsd qotdol shey aiin chcthor ochdaiin sham dar dshedar qokcheol qokaiin ral chedy
lkaiin qochey dain opchdal dy qokeeedy shey ol qokal raiin aleedaiin qokeeor qotedy chcphdy olkedar qokeedy chedy qokeey lkor okal ychan oded daiin opcheeedy

oear laim ocheeor olshedaiin y lcher chedair qokar rd cheey ltaiin lchdal okeey al qoky ain dain ar
qoldy al okchy chedy osedy oreol opched qokeey oteey ol cphaim qoped chedy qokair qokal chedy
chedain oty chedy oedam oches okeeo dar qokeedy chol lkaiin qokal kees redy omain daiin ain olyedy

chckhy qockheor otsho otedy qokal qolcheedain aiin dair y olchr lcheeedy sshedair ky y tcheeos ches qokol otain ol saiin chedy
darm olchos lchedam otcho cheedy qoeeos kaiiin aiin oledor ychdol ykor team chedy aiin
sheey otain schm redy schdy okchor chan okd dar lchaiin qokar odydaiin or schain

chedy otaiir cthdy ool syain al olkar dar sheey oteedy aledy oddair okal rody qoeeedy
kais lkcheeey qokeedy olchary chedy chol qokey kaiiin qoal aiired lchedy otchy olchedair shedy chal al
ol qotey chdaiin y shedy shol qofcher dar ykchg yshdal okcheeey ltody qod otaiin ain qokchey okeos

qotedy reain ltal dcheeedy lkar y qokeedy qokedy qokeeor or qokeedy daleor areeol okaiin rchdy ol chcphdy qooiin air
qoredy tcheeedy chey otchedy dar lkod lo yaiin tsheeey qokedy ol qotes qokal ckheod cpheos odedy aiiinaiin
lcheeoy cheeal rdaly arain qockheeedy ykchy dar ol ypchiiin ol qokary reor qokal ody tedor kdar dy okar chedy okchaim

olkal qol qokeey chedal olkaiin chdy lchedam leeod olcheeam opchdy alo kcheeody otain qoar ychar tshey aiiinair
dchey qoteedy shedair qokaiin qopchaiin dykeor ol qod shcthedy dy shdy olkal oraiin dykdy y oeeol yed
shckheedain aiin toly dar qokal olchiin qokain cham chdy opchedy ctheol ops ol lcheedal dar odeeor oledain ol

chedy sardar qotchy opchor otedy daiin sheody cheol okeedy qotaiin chedam qokey dar okchedam daiin okeeey shy dar okal qokain yeol

otedy okchiiin chedy qopcheod ain
ocheol dy sheey odyedor
lchor qokeey qoteeody ychar yey okeey ycheeody cheesy shckhy dar tail oryod lkchais to otar olcheody aiin
shar shedy okain opchey ctheeo chedy lcheeedy dal oor lchey oryedy lear daiin scheos shckhy ltr shedy okchg olkchedy salair
olary ol opchedaiin lte qotee oedam okal ain okeedy okedy shy qoedar okain dam cphain shg olkain shdy am

chcthedaiin shsd qockhdy leody dal aiin chctheeedy qokeedy tdy qokchdy raiin okal olkar chedy dain qokaiin chear okeedy shey dain solcheer shedy chdy
dshar oteey ol aiiineor dy chdy ykchain lchey lkchedol qoky chal dar qokal shedy kchedaiin tchdal qokaiin or
shar keey chor qotr qol dar seol okcha sheed qoeeey al dal cheey air lkaiin olkchedy alaiis qockhod daiin solcheeoy kaiin

daldy lchaim lkaiin okchedy dar ofeedain olcheod chckhey aiin cthaiin oso laiin qokar yteedaiin dy lsary qol
cthdy sarod oloiin saireody kched okcheeaiin shedy odeey pchy chdy qokeey raiin olteos okcheam chos soleol
chedy shody opol saiin chey air daiin solkar okedy ychees lkcheedy otshey schedy ofchedy lchey okedy ol qokaiin chdy

qockhear lkain chiin pair qokal ctheos chey oksheeos otedy daiin lyedy yshal rain cheedy chdy cheed ksheol
shckhy ychok dal char shedy lchey aiin dain schaly oltedam cheedy or pcheol opchees oksdy aiin cthy chedy
dleedain or dy pcheal dair okol opol cpheedy ol qoleody qokey sheedy ltes chey qotchedy ar orcheor olkain olkeey kaiin okar qoar qokeey qol

lkdar sain sheody sheol chedy cheey salal qol dair omm ol ockheeol kal qoeeo qokair olyeees rody lkcheedaiin rchedy
qokey or aiireod y ol dyko tshey daiin oair ydy ol qokeey lkaiin otain osair sheedaiin syeody ota shedy olkeeedy keeedy
oo shckhy y opcheeedy oleeedy cheey ral y okeoly odym soldair dam orchdy otain qokey odyes pchain

aiin otaiin qokain chey otchedy dsheeeo shey chedy daiin saleol okal daror qokal y qopaim okeey redam lkas shedy daiireor ain
oo oteey lkedy aiiineody dy reeo ytody chedy qotol otain ol opchdol ltody qotedy qokey shey otshain
qokal qol chcthaiir kaiin dair dalor ypched sheey qokaiin lkcheeody ykeeey al araiin osary okshor osheam olsheds ykedam

otchy okain qol qokeedy dalaiin ocheeedy aiiinedy okcham tdy oka otedy lcheey ycham qotain qokaiin keel shedy ool
daiin reod pchdy opcheeam chdy daiin dain ykeedaiin chdy qotar qoky shey oleeaiin daiiraiin oear otal olshd ars ol qokeedy chedy
ar okal saireal lcheol aiiindy aiin chdy qokal fcheody oty dsheedy yeedal cheoly sheedy olkeedy cpheedy qokedy darol

dal y dair keeal ofchear oeor tcheedaiin reed peos dairaiin qokair qokal chaiin dain oaly tear
qockheo res lkm chey aiin lkdy yor cthaiin otshaim okey okedal kedar olkain odyam dar
chey kdair sar okchedy chedy oteey olshsd opeeedy cthdar chedy dcheor otain dair am daiin lkain kdain chdy dal daraiin tedy

aiin teor daiin okedy reedar olshal lchod ytal ockhdar daleeedy qokal chedy opchy keees lkchedaiin chedy
chdy daireol okeedy qokar ykedal ykedal olal qotaiin shedy tedy ain sheol qokeey lkcheees shor dar oseey qokaim
okal chdy sairor olkey chedy aiiinaim ockhary aiin qokshdy olchoiin otaiin odyody shedy dchol qokeedy yeo ram chedy

qoteos sarear daiin aiireody qoteain qokal odyesy odyeeos odyg opchdar qotal qokain ochedy aiiineal otaiin aiin
lcheedal chedy leey qokchy syer kair lchedam olkar qoiiin shdor olcheedy qolkdar sheol qotaiin qoody qoky chedy ory cheol
lkol oeol tshdair dain areedy cheol olkeedy shedy qokey okeod ardy oleeey rody qotchdy ol qokam qotain pcheeedy

okal lseeed qokain lyain taly shedy kchdaiiin okeear daiin ol cthaiiin alyear qokar qol qokedy daiin aiin kchdam lchedy solees ol
otar chedy opcheol ykchdy oteey qokshdy qopchy otedy okedy aiin dair qotal chckhos olkeol qokeedy shedar koiin ol
qockhaim cthees chdy dair otshor lshe dar okeedy lchor otaiin dar dain chckhey lkchedol kedain lkchedol dar lky chdy

shody qokain chdy opchdol ltsaiin qokedy okain olyeeam ain daiin cheey shedor chol dal odeody sheedaiin sheear ckheor dy ol
qokol pdy soiino qotal dshar pcheedy ykeeos qol kedol lkaiin reeal olky kair opchy odyo otal qotal shedain dar daiin aror
qokchdy dar okeey arol sody ked olyealy oteody soiineor ykchdal shor olshs pchee oeody soiindy opcheol

qotedy kchy chedy oteey shedy lcheedal chdy olteos qokeey ychdaiiin chckhary pchor rchor yshdain oleod pchor
qoal dain lteeody chckhal osaiin qokaiin shedy kas qoail oltdal otaiin lkcheedy lchaiin olkeedy dy yteesy qokedy
shckhy qokchedy chedy schaiin olkeedy yteols kor daiin shol solkody qokar olees qokaiin lkchal aiin chckheedaiin odaly ykchol kchees ain

oleeey solkedain chedair keeo qokdair sheol aiirdar ychal dar qolkeos sheol qokaiin alal qokal yteedaiin shey
aiiredy ctheam tedy chor qoleeedy otaiin chedy shcthe am ol shol chey oiindy qoeeor lseedaiin lss okchy ol dshais shedy qoal or
sar aiin oreody otol fchedy ykcheam otedy qol otaiin aiin otal kar qolko otcheor qokod shcthdal cthdy

daleody qokol otain chdy ody ykchaly chor qokedy shar saleedain oeor qokeey otedol shedy sedy daiin ol
dal okain qokal cthair oteey qolkain taiin dair sheeey sheedaiin ychr am daiin rshor qokeedy rchaly sain alo
aiiror opcheeey qochedy lkain otedy qolkedam okeey ol sain yta kody shedy opcheeedy qopchedar chedy opched

lshr odyody cheor dyteeor sheedy qokey aloiin shckhy ol daiin qokair dy oor ykchor qopchdaly ol shey
otchey ytr chey chal chor aiin qokedy dair aledy sheol okeeody ychan cheesy poiin otchy ol ysho orchaiin
lchor soldy dykod dareody ain daol opcho yshy tair cheees cheey reols qokain qol shey

al otar qokchdy qokeedy ar dchdair olkeedy qokaiin ol otaiin qooly ol ypchaiin otshain rchy shory okeedy qotg qol
oky qodaiin lcheedal qoteeody shey olkeey shol qokedy okar ytedy oteey rchs ain ocheedam shedy chctheeedy dain qokol fchedy cthes chedy
qokchy dsheees sheey otedy tsheer ar schaiin pdaiin or daiin cheear ol chcthdy qotchy olchar qokeor qokchy or

qokal shais qokeedy saleedar or dareody lchor okal solkeedy cheey qokedy lcheeol otedy opchaim dykedy schedair ar
qokaiin olkedor olkain lkchan cheol dchear teedar shey oo oteey oredy dleeol ches cthm shedol cthor qokaiin qokaiin chdy
otchey qotain ykdain dchdar tair chor qokeedy otedy shckhy cha shedy leos qokal qokaiin qoeam ol qockhain qokal olkal ar

or sardy oteeedy shedy aiin ood otal opar ytcheey qokeedy qotdal shal sheedy lkdy otchor sorees ol
lcheedal cheedaiin olsheoy shedy rchor rshain ockheody chey salam ain shedy dy chctheey ol cthol cpheeam chedy
sheody dsheedy qokaiin lteear tedy yches sheckhy ycheol qokeey qokar air koiin chey qokchedy lshol taiin yaim okchdol al soram or

chedy olkal otal lshar qoedain shey qopaiin lod lkeeody keeey oteody chctheody ypchedy orcheeam chedy
okedy qokchedy olan qokain okedy shckhy okoly ar odam qoeol opchdy daiin aiin okdo qotain lkeey chdy chcthas ros chol
qotaiin cheod opchey scheol odol teeor lsaiir qokchedy chedy cthedal y qokal cheey chckhal lkaiin lteedy qokeedy lshsaiin orchey

olkal ol ykchary qopaiin chaiiin aiin ypchey shedy okedy olkchedy dar lkeol dam lchdy kshain olchody reedy reed ol
cheeor otedar qoredy qotshdar chor ar shes ochol dain qoeedy olkedy shedy qokeey shedy ocher cheeedy
sheody aiin shedy qor qokal chedy aiin qoky chdy otaiin qokeedy ytos saiin olkain lkar ckheeor shedy aiin soled

qoedair lshd shsd ar om ofchey sheol chey okain ychy chckhoiin otaiin aiin oteedy okeos
rchey las air qokeey ksd okshes orey olsd chdol shedy ockheols oteedy sheees lkain oled lcheedal qotedy qotal otal dar
shckhy alyedy chey lkchal olchedain al tain olchdaly qotshdy daiin chedy lchaim shcthl yty sheey chckhy aiin

dykey oeody qoky ol ysheor lkees tcheody oteey odaiin dal aiin cheoly ykeedain oo aiiindy sches lchedy
lteeal qokchdy tedy shctheeedy lkedaiin sheol aiin sedain kedy opchor ldy daiin aiin qedain qokedy olcha ycham aiin
qofcher ol qokar ain otchdol shey dair lteed pchdam ytsdy qokedy qokair sairm dchaiin sheol sordy saiin ykchol

olky redal qofcheody chckheeey shy shedy redy doleom ycheesy qokar shey air cheedy rees qotaiin aiin yshedy oteeos ychy ain
aiiredam otar or teedaiin cheeody ral kchol olcheod qokeody ocheedam qoedy okedy shsd yteedaiin shedy dar sheol raiin
dcho dar qokaiin qol okar shedy qokchy keey daiin oteey okdar okchey pdy dleey shan salar shcthed okeedy sheol otedy otaiin al

shedy tshor shctheor opchaiir kdal qote aiin dar qokaly dykor qokal rd qokaiin ykol teor
sheody chol tes chedy yshey shey cheol qokol fchedy shedy cheey otain okail alyey olyeed kain otar lshsy alal kchedam
chas yteor ain dain olkeey raiin chdy olkal qockhol opchees lkchain okeey lkedy qopes dar orcheeam chedy okeedy shedy

dar oedy scheedaiin shedy sheedar okedor ar otshdam or ychealy qokain alal chor redal ol okeedy qol olyeod am
qokshod otedar qokeedy chedal soleos olcheees aiin shedy chedy okaiin peol olkal ykchor tes qoteoly sheol kol qokchy ol
oty chdaiin shody ckhedy saiin okal ltaiin sain aiin okeedy chey shy chckhy qotdor dar dal ol chedy oedy ksdy dar sheol qokeedy olchal opcheos

qokeey qotedaiin ran qokedam lchor okar chedy ykedol olkey qoeod odor ol dain odyeody otal qotedy oty salear dytaiin
shcthor oteey lkm qokal shsdy aiin yain reol dair saldain chaiin okchey qokchey aloiin olyaiin qotaiin lchedy
sarol dain ychary chair dain am keoly or tedair yts qokeey shes pcheedy raiin okchedam qokal opcheor ar syaiin

shody qokain shes kesy aiin olkal aiin loy okeeody qol saiin daleor lkdy aiin lkaiin alyo ytody ytam chckhy
tshor dal otal or ykchdy lsedair qokeeedy ol otaiin lshain otchey chedy oteedy okar chedy shdaly qolor ctheeey dshal otedy lkain aiin
saredy okchy dy ral qoky chedy tes ytedy sheol dar sairaiin otal daedam schedy qokeedy olky ain qopcham aly chedy

chey solky ol olkal qokedy opeed lkaiin keedy daredy scheol lkeeey qocheor dar tched lkcheeeo dar qoleor qoleeedy
lsal air otedy qockhedy daiin ar kchdol ltas qos ypcheol qodam chody cheol otal shedy sshd aiin
solm qokchey aiin qokeedy pchedy lyeey cthed qokchey shckhedy sheey qokaiin opeos qokeey ain shar qopod sairor

odyeol daiin ychody cheol ypchsaiin qokeedy ol qoteeedy shedy solkeed al okl chedy daiin otedy shar daiin aiin

aireey chos qoked olky sheedaiin qokain daledy qofcheeoy chedy ykcheeam taiin daiin oty oteds daiireos okeey dchdy taiin

dshaiin qokal sheey otcheos chckhey saledal oteey ar aiiinaiin daiin lteod qokal okchedy air chdy otar chal aredy

daledam shor qoeody dair qokain olyeoly otd soraim otchey ops y aiireeody teody otaiin otaiin chedy qokeedy qol pcham y
rcheear oleam qokain sheol kol shey daiin shal okeear kched ykcheeody kan chdy dy otchy ckhain qokaiin shedy dain arey
lcheedal chedy aiiinedy sory okeedy or rshey qokar kal shedy olyey chdy soiindy dar oseeedy chedy ytary qokaiin air

qoeeey al okcho odam chedy qokey dar tchdol shedy oteey lkm sain ar okeear ol kcheeey olshd aredy
lkear sheol qoty chd qokaiin oles olkal kain tshain qokeedy cheol qoteey sheey chckhy or sareody ar opcheeod ar oteedy lkaiin sheol qoteain dar
am oseeody chckhy okal cheam shedy qoeedy lshary dar okar qolkdy oledy qopchaiin dy ain shaiis sareody dy qokaiin dar

daredy otal olchs cheols ycheees sholy ar qokchain qokaiin pchedy yshoiin reeod olshaiin dam pchor

ofeey dar lky olody qog chedy qoteedy ol otsheol okal ytcheody dy keeo odeear solkeeey shd qokedam

tsheor redain ky ltdaiin qokar chedy kchy chdy oky olsheey lcheer chedy aireal dar lkam aiin saiin dar ody ain

laiin dal lteod olto dain otol opaiin daiin qokaiin olchedor al cthedaiin ar otchey qokedy aldam ytesy yedy shol ol
cthed oshaly chey lchod cheol chor chedair chol otsheos opchd ytaiiin alyear aireal ycheedy olsaiin qokchy lchedy
ocheaiin dar pcheey okeey aleeod otchair ykealy qokain lsal qokaim qokol opear otal schaiin yshees cheoly char ol

cheed chedy okaiin oteedar lsod osey qokal dalor schaiiin chody ral cheedy odys qoiir dytain
oeor qokar lod oty okdaiin lcheeoy chedy okol okain dar qokal qoky lkchedar y ypcheos dsheed ychedy qokar dchod aiin
koiin chey lkchal okaiin qopaiin sain kedy kdy osaiiin shedy shos lkaiin opd olcheeo ckhed otal dar qokchy shar dar

odyal cheedy shedy ain shdaly oteor saiin y shol olkaiin okeedy sheeaiin keeedy ar qotal okchy yshaly daiin daledy lkr chody dchdy am
ocheedam okiiin chedy tshol qokal sheeor pshdy ol tshaim cthor olkeedy olchy shdy dam tor qokeey oteey air
sheey or schedam okeedy ol qokeeedy shedy rd lyaiin shckhaiin td okes opchedam qokeey qokeear am sheey olody oty shedy aiin

oraiin olyeeaiin shr chol qokchy otedy reod tshedam opchedair salaly olkal otaiin oteedy shey orair olkeedy olo lor orar aiin

shcthaiin otchey otm rar am qokal al ypched otsheos otey lshos lteam oshear tcham aiin
osheey sheody oleedy okedy kaiin ytchesy oteees cheey olshy ain qokeedy oteedy chedy okey ykaiin rsheody am qopchedy okcheeaiin or
sar aiin ypchee otedy chey qokchedy oleedaiin yteeody shedy oshey qokeey ychaiin dykod okeey ltaiin sheody lsheeor qokaim

cheedy chedy qochan cheeor otedy qoky aiin olkeey ychody lsdy qokey aiin soledaiin olkeedy or chcthear qokar chal qokeeedy or
qokshs dar qokchy or kor saiin qokain salar odyedair qockhol pchear leody otol sheedy chedol dam reeody aiin
ocheaiin dar eseeol ykeer yteod qockhod okal sheedy qokshedar yty lseeal shedy qol qokeey lshoiin rchedy daiin oteeedy or

ches dcheol sheol lcheedal chedy qokey y qotedor qook qokchy raiin lsy dar qokeey chedy okchdy olal am odair
otsheor daiin or dal sody aireey dar scheeey qocthedy schy dar las am okeey olesy lted daleeos qokain sar lchedy
lshoiin chedy ykcheoly qokeedy olos dar opchy qoy chal qoam qoed ypchy tdair aiiinor otshaim

opchaim ksd dshg okchy kaiin shctheeey al sain dshols opol olshaiiin okchedy olchdain shedol ol ykcheey oltedy
okal chedy okedy odyan qodol ychar shol dshr alyedy kchain ytchor opcheedaiin aiin dam odair daiin al
lchdair olkaiin qol osees aiin olchal lchdair oteedy kchear oteey dchedair ar opcha dsho ctheed aiin qokar seos daleal yedy

aireey ol dal cheedy rar yte oty sheol cheed qokeey yteain lkchdair qokeey ral qokaiin fchary qokaiin lkchol soiinaiin okchor

qolkedy okeedy ltaiir solkody qoky qokeedy chedy dain otshdar tas qokain air ychaiiin olkchedy chy qokain qokam ytdain y ty cheol
shckheody qol kchedam lky tdal shckhy odyd odyar sar chedy okcheeaiin chckheeos lsiin qokain oledol qolkeo opchy aiin

chok ychaly ypchedain shdar ytchees taim aiiino y leor qopdy lkaiin olkchedy otedy shedain ol okey or

tsher okedain otedy ood tshey soleed oleeey qocthdy okedy reain ctheey shey qoteey odaiin qockhair

cheedy shey okeey olkeey dar ldy shody pod chey y opcheeod keey oeor lo ockhes ar qokchy ychaiin shckhy chey olshor
aireeol olcheeos dar olyy tor chedy qokcheeo cheeey lkcheod olkedy ain shckhdar oey qopcheody lkaiin aiin

ychd chor shedy qokeey lseed chey aiin qokeey chedy chm rod daiin okey qodaiin schaiin dal soreor lkaiin ain

dshes cthod lko dor kshar qodar oky reody okedy aiin ordy ol dain otshair opcheeody ain

yaiin kchy lkchdl raiin
shey dy qoteey otdaly olar pcheear dar ldy areol qoleo kchair ykcham lseeor shedy qoky ol

dalyedy dy otedy sdain al oror sheody taiin oky ycheal sar qokeedy sheedy lkain dar ockhol oteey otaiin raiin dchaly

qoiin sheedy kaiis ykas dar tches ain qokeedy tdy qokchdy shey ypchedy ytchedam qoty cheear chey qokchedy shedy am

yeedal cheeody shedy qofchey or ytal sheed qokair qoteey qokedy ltais chckhedar cheol solcheal cheol teeeody aiin

qokal aiin kchor qokeey oddaiin lkcheed lkaiin chckhy daiin oain qoteedy tshor dam qokey shedy chal dar chedy chcthar oleeor odaly sheol lkain air

qol qotal qokaiin qoteedy kan sheey ltsairy otedy lsedaiin y okedar y shedy okchor qotdaiiin qokedy ol sheol shedy cpheey shdaiin otshor

qoky chs chckhey opy lkchedy chor lshedol schdy dalyain otshod chey shy ol chey shedy aiin oty okd soldair

qokaiin okain qokaiin qotaiin qotedy okeey ain opchas shedy old ody qokeey qolko ty otedy led okal sheeody chedy qokom qokedy
shcthdal qolkedy taiiin qochdar sheody odyeor sheey qotl ol lky keeod olkain tedair shsy salar qokeol
shedy osees qoal lkain shey lchedam olkar qoedy dchey taiir oiinear lkor daiin lcheeedy ytchy olkeedy lshedaiin aro

olkedy aiin okchy daiin chckhy aiiinaly cthdy chcfhdy chdy yeeoy odyeeody shey ain shedy okcheeey shedy qoedair air shail eseey qoteeo qokeol
ychal cpheor fcheedy otedy ol ches qokchey ykal chedy dar lkain aiin cpheod oleam ycheees shckhy solkam olchdaly dar

sed dchol ysheeey okchedy oleam sheol aiin daledy chedy dalol scheedain aiin qokar olky tchor ofchdam keeedy laiin qokal ar

otal ykdaiiin teos cheey lkchedair lchedy daiin qokaiin kedy qoksheor oteeos ain qokal lteedy ockheody shedal olkeey ol cthey

sha saleos lseeo chdal otal dcheear ltedal qokeey ycheedar odyar otedy oty aiin kchain
rshaiin otchdo okshdam olsed daleody okedy rm olyes lkchdaiin solkey keod qokal rs yaim qokeey chedy

lor okeedy otaiin dar dchedy qokeedy rshedam qokeedy qokeeedy ytdar otchey qodaiin qokain olkaiin okdol rok saiin qotedy y lkdar

al dam chor chedy al seor chey shedy chor lshey lkaiin olshed shol chey qotain daiin okedy qokchedy olody qol ctheam shedy oleeor chedy

old char por keoy dar olyeor cheeod okdam okshal chedy olkal qokeey qoail aiin oseeos ain
shar keedy lkchd yeos opchedor shedy qod lkaiin alyear olkeey ol dy omeol qoky sheol rar shedy sheody olal qoked

okal olcheam tedam lkain qoor dy cheey y qokchy dain dshr aiin okeey chey otedy chckhy daiin omed lchedy qokar am tar ol

dchey tes lseedaiin qokdaiin y qokar ltdol roiiin opedy ockhes lsody rdam qokeey odyory qokal kair
ocher dar shal shd qol qokaiin otdam chol lshiin okain chedy qotal okedy qokchedy dar oty aiin yked cphiir otedy otain daiin sheey al

air opcheeos ar dain ar otal ochol otchaiiin qocheor lkchody qotedy olyedam qokeedy cheeedy qokey qoedair qoksheey opchary aiin
darol scheal dy shedy qockhey qokeedy oredam kal lkeedain qofcheer cheeos ky dar qokeey kear cheedy ar
qokol qokain qol ykchee daiin dleedain chy oteedy or cheey dar ykd chckhy sheey sheey oleedy dain ain dar ocheeedy osar opal pchedam

qody rody alol lky sheol odyed qokeey chcthaiin qokedy olteedal otedy olcheedy aledar tchdair lchol qoledy
qokchaly qokaiin ckhair oteedy shiir keeedy olyey qoaiin soleeo shdy qolchol dair oo qokeey pchdy aiirg qokain chedy
okol pedy soly roy ol qoteedy shees sheol am ar schedar re lteedaiin okedy qotchain qoky aiin okeey kshdy dsholy lchedy

qotar ol daldy qotar shcthdy qokol sheedy cheor cheey chedair or dcheol ctheey qoledy qoky shedy opcheols qokain chedy
lcheaiin chedy aiiinear dain chdy shedy cthsdy lshd qokedam chedy okedy oryain doraiin pchom qoes qol qolkeody am qokchy solchdy chol
chr qokchedy dshedal qoteees okedy aiin dal pchdaiin lsd lkaiin aiin opcheed olshaly solais qopchain ykcheor daiin cpheey chedy

qoky chdaiin okedy otchedy dsheod aiin dain cheedy ar dam areedy aiin olkedy shedair chdy ocho pchy chckheedy lkchok olkchy shedy ol

oleed cheees ain dy okal saleedal olcheeod qoeeor chey qokchedy qoar lkchal aiin shary chckhes shckhor dytsaiin shedy ol

choly dsheesy ypcheor or sain chckhy sheody ar okeedy okedy oiinear soraiin opchy aiin oedy saiin ycheear or
olkedy shedy oros qoeedaiin aiin oseols cheeam opchor okaiin ckheeedy oaly otol opedy okal lcheaiin char aiin schedy
y soiinedy qokeedy okal olcheedar ar olyees dsholy solkedor lsheol schary tor qokey okody shedy tair

olydair daiin okaiin shedy qokeedy olshdain chedy sain arydaiin or cheey qotedy ofee ar cthedair qoedar or oteedy okshedol chedy
lchor daiin schedy otol ckhair shedy cthaiin qokaiin otdal ar soreor oltdal dchol sheol areeor ol qokam qol
cthedy rcheear oleeody keeo dchor solo omod aiin dam chey oiinedy okal ochm chedy qokal olyor olyedor aiin qokal dar

shedy kchaiiin y dain qokaiin chal cheees lfchaiin ldal ypchdy qokeeedy kaiin cheedaiin or aiiineol qokom ol
dolol lkam shey sheesy qokedy sheey ol sairol okesy y aiiinedy otedy dair chey ral arear olyedy kchady cheol
lain dy oeody ain ain shckhsairy lshal olkedy qool qokar chal okchdy shey sheed kedain rdal ochr olchary okaiin qol

orain qokaiin olkain sheol keeam okain lsdam daldy sheckhy chal dleal chedy kshy olchar okeain otaiin dar okcheeaiin chdy
ar yshain okedy oiindy qokm shes lsdor choiin okaiin dar okedy otchedy ykar ain olyealy sheedy chedy okal ypchod
chey otchedy chedy olkeey qokain ood otchey qokain odys oreos oteey qokdar cphoiin lkchal olky dar okcheody qotaiin okeod okeeedy chdy

qokeedain saredy otsheedy olchdy qokchdy qooiin qolkedy qopchaiir oiindar cheey shealy fchain ytchees qokedy rshain qokal ockho
kshm dar opcheeos qotais shdaiin qokeody odo oledar chedy teeey shy okedain cheod shckhy tchee lchr salaiin sorair
saiin qol oeor dalydy aiiraiin otey ar kcheeody qoy qokaiin shedair shey qokar cheol yshedaiin lchedy qokal ypchdy

ros res ocheer chan chckhoiin shedy rsaiin olyedy shor qotedy qokeey olkaiin olchedaiin opeedy pshed okaiin or
odeeol sdy shckhy lkchal soredy olyy ykeed qokedy qokol otain cheol dal qolor qokeal shol air qokal qokey otedy
chey okchedy chedy dal ain dy qokar lshal lcheedam chedy lkaly qokey dar oteedy oeedain doreoy otedy shs aiiineol qokchy cpheedy or arair

sheod lchor qopdal koiin ody ar qokeear odyeo okchedar al tsheos otaiin shedy otcheody qokey solkedol saro
ood oreed shedy y otal chol daredam qockhedy ody lchey otchedy qokain lkeey okeedy ol ain otchey olkchey lshd cheedy dar
qokal sha ykedor raiin daiin sheom al opchees qol chor dar qoes cphdaiin okshedar ofchor shol solkes qokey shey

shckho schaim qokeey ltdaiiin qoted lo oo chcthar chdal lcheaiin keesy or opchedaiin chedy opcheeody chedy
dal aiin qokaiin olchal ral qoty qokain qopchol otedy opcheal okcheol oror ykchair qokshaly oteedy soredy
yor qokar choiin ytees olkdaiin ol ockhedam oteey olkeos ydair qopcheed redar qokeedy lshoiin cheey dar

lkain shes cheey ksy keod odyoiin qokaiin ches ykchedy sheey soreos chedy oaly soleeol qol chdy qopary chedy
char lsham fchoy dar olyes ytedaiin oted shckhdy soldy chey qol dal air sheey chedy
odeal qoks lkchsy lshdaiin or raiin aiiror olyeeos odyeoly al okar odyedol aredy oltaiin sheol odedy

shckhy qotchain ykcheol tedaiin chaiis okshar pcheedy or shody pedy scheedaiin ytealy okain sheain odedam qokshor sorol
lkedy cpheey cheeey rdain lchedy otal qotar ytain okeey qokdaiin y rshed scha kedal lkaiin qoal aredy
kshdy lcheedal dar qockheeedy okeey olkaiin tchaiin yshy oked otsho ltiin ckhaly ordy olal dar qoty lkchy chedy

oair aireeol qoeeo okaiin lchedy qoleeol ar shol chedaiin otees ykdam dar ocheedal otedy ytody chedy opcham ar
saiin aiin otchy chedy opchedy qokeey ycheeody chckhes qoky olkeedy shedy daiin oltm qoksho y sar aiin okchsdy chedy kchain
qoky qopain daiin otshain qoteedy lkeedain aledor ky ytedy qol qockhed opcheds or yshes sheols qoeain odain

ole dar teeey olkchedy qoedair otain okeey otdaiin shedy qoeedy chair cthy okeedy shedor kaly odear kchain
qoky chedy oteedy shol dshal lsy otdaiin aledy chcphol qopchedair lsar qokain or shol dar solcheeol chckheeey chedy

okedy qokchedy chckhy qokedy qoky dar chctheeey ykeeam qokain keeaiin omaiin opcheeo pais dar tedol solkeeor shedy olsin aiin daiin olkaiin or

tsheedal lchedy cheey lsaiiin kedain lsdol lshes qotar ral sorain al opcholy olar qoteedar aiin ytchan ar

lcheos otaiin lsedair sairdy dleey oledol qotchdy qokain tcheedy ol sheey rain tchaiin ctheol solesy olan or

ctho dal otchey lseeal ychaiin chor shedy chey tear okaiin ykey qopchaiin sairdy qokeey pchedy qokeey ol

tsheedal okeam olkeeey okshal ochain qokaiin arair kchedy qokchaiin otchey cheol ykcheed ytsy shaiiin ochaiin

ksheor chey ain qokar okols otear shey yeey kdaly qoteeor sheeos chedy daiin sheey qokeedy ltsairy kaiin lcheeey or

otal odyar ol qokey kedam ldy reor dain olkey okeeor ctheey shedy qokchy tchdy otshor rshaim qokeedy oteey dar
okaiin sheedy shckhy olkeedy dsheeody kr qokchedy chedy daryeeol qokedy kshdy chdy qokal saireey ochdal otshaiin aredy opchedy
shckhy qokchedy qoedal otd chedy qotal qotar odyeain olkedy odyedol ol lor tees lchedy oddy oky aiin qoteedy ytchedy

oty olcheedy qokaiin otedy qotaiin ykl char qotaiin shedy alesy okchedy chedy ofeo cheed okaiin otedy olyor olyedor chedy dal dar

y okeedy lchm sor daedy leeal al chey lteees qokal or lkeeey lteear odair shckho oaiin

otshor shor chckhy qokedy doror ypchdaly shey pcho qokchey ol lcheor chedy dy okshaiin otal otaiin qoar sheey tdy dalaiin

okols pedy qokal ykched otchey tor dain soredy shckhy qotchaiin qokchas chdaly tshor ordy dair chedy ysheos

okchey otain ytche chedy daiin aror otshdal qokal qokchey qokedy cpheesy ychair qokeey okaiin qokeedy ltedal opd okes laim kcheeeody y

lchdair qokeey kaiin ofchm qokain ytas shedy qokain oreody lyed okedy dshaiin dordal olkeey lkeeedy
otol ckhey cthan chdy kchsaiin sheedy char otedy lkaiin qokchedy dar olteos ochedy ol qoksheal teedaiin shedy oty ychedy cheey shedy

cthor otchdy okain ykchdy sar ol ldar shckhy alydar qokeey qodor sheody otchol lko orr dar qokar chdy

lkaiin okchedy chdol lsols opedy lky ol ypchedaiin qopaiin chdy qokshm olkaly qokshdy oteols shedy olkain qoreeor chedy qokar qol

reeeo ar okal qol areor ted opchal kaiin chey rd otey ykedy opcheeey otchedy lchedy qotchy qoedain or

otal olcholy shedy qockhm daiin shsaiin ykeal qokeey rcheody olseody qol chckhey qokedy esee aledar olkain daiin cphol
okol ckhedy ctheedaiin lsam qokaiin ykedol olchesy qokchedy chedy olkchey ckhiiin cthdal shar okeedaiin qokal y kal qokaiin oleedy oteedy ol

cthdar qotal qol dytdaiin keedar chaiir oryol lchey aiin qokal doleeedy qokal qokal solkdaiin oo shol chedy otchdaiin or

shedy dal shal chedy sheol olyaim
oltaiin opchees rch shedy shedy qokedy
daiin lkchoiin chckhy tcheol yteain yeeedy okeedy otsho schaiin olyedy soleed red otcheedy kedor ol okaiin air

aiireeedy kcheeor olchdor shey lkeeey shy kdar olkaiin odeody laiin opcheos cheey rar key dain qokey y okal arod
okchor okche rdor qokedy qockhedy otchaiin oseedar chckhar otaiin okeeey chey okchedy shedy shckhy ltd pchdair shol lcheeedy

opchaim okcher chdy okcheed raiin sheeo qoky qokeedy shedy qoteey rchedy teeod qoteod chedy shol qoteam y qokal okaiin shedy
olkol opey ypchdaly chsairy kain tedy oteey dar qokal qockhaiin okchy qokchy chedy chey alyain opcheos qoldy al qotchaiin opchoiin air
pcheear ol oltain ydy okched chesy aiin teees chom reody scheo lteeam qokchedy qotaiiin reedaiin rcheody

qokol opdy shor qotedy qokal chl tcheey sheey odol olcheeor qoky shedy chedy cthaim qopal qokedy cheey qotiiin chckheees okchor
olteaiin dar sar or lkaiin qofcheor yteedy ool qokal qoeed qokdam odyiiin chdy cheey dar ykedaiin olkeedy aiin kaiin kchdy
lcheeedy dain pcheedy otedy lky am yteod dain sheedy daiin lfchdy odyeeos ykeam sheedy qokaiin opdam aiin oeol opcheod aiin

qol schm shy lsal okchor saiin sham dar lchedy lchor cthdaly otedy chedor shedy oreor olkain shcthaiin dal otedy
dchdy chr al daiin aldam qokaiin keeam schdy okedar dar dy dal sheedy pchedam okal otchy qopcheol dain qockhedy olyary olkeedy chedy
qokchey aleees kcheos okal ol aiiinedy olyy kdy okchan oteedaiin shedy chdy saiin qokchdy ar yshdy qokeey areedy qol dal shey

qoes doleey air daiin shcthaiin qoeed oddam okshe qokeedy qotedain shr qotchear qolkeor fchey dain qokaiin qokeedy lchedy
qokeey cheol ofchedar otedy lkaiin qotchedy ar ytchain dal ar cthar lshaiiin ral dareeedy solcheor tdair okchear
qokar keeey redain raiin daiin lkaiin otedy lkchair chor keear chedy qoar shs ol saleeal chedy opcham qoteedy dar

qofcheedam chedy areedain dalyedy teear chckheor daiin dar qokal ain yshdaiin qokedy doleor qokal qokeey ol sheckhy qokchdy qokedy y daiin chedy
ofchear yshor oteedy shedy cpheal ol tdol olchl dar oseeo qotedy qokey chckhy sairedy okeedy aldy
lchey ltar dar shckhy qotchol qokaiin air qokeedy qoteedy ykedy dain rshey odar lseedaiin aiiineor solkar dar teeal reod chedy

shedy ros lsheod rchdy ol lkain y qokchy okchain qolkair ty ar qokeeor olcheedy tedy solcheo chckhdy
chedy dair ral qokey ar olkedy olaiin qokshey qokeedy chcthor dal or lkaiin qocthear otal okchey chdy lchol chcthar dar
dchain qoteedy ocher qotedy y pcheo qokary y lkdain ol otcheedy ychedaiin aiin qokar yts oteedy chedy shol okaiin shdy

yeedy dar oo odyaiir qotchol ykesy qokeedy lsholy dar okaiin arey lcheedam kaim lchs cha chckhy lkar chedy
shckhy shy cham sheees pchedy qockhedam chey shedy sheedy lkr qotedy shol oteey cheeor odeeor ol shody fchol kl teos dal lcheedal shey
oair orchain daiin qokaiin okesy shy chedy qokshol olkeedy dal al salan shedy kchdal qokeey lchor kcha oledal lkedy

olky dshdaiin aiin olkedy saleeo shol lshes qokar shdar qoteey areeor aiin qokeey dar areal oddaiin al daiin lcheaiin qokedy
okol qokain chckheedaiin chey qochain shckhs chdy ytchesy alyedy qotaiin otaiin chol lkain sheedy daiin olcheeos okeed qokdar dchdy olchal qokaiin dar
ykcheody ofchedy kchar kain qokeedy lcheer ol qokedy lkod dairaiin tchaly osedaiin opam qokaiin saldain solkeod chey oiineor

shes schedam tchedar lkchdaiin lkdy qokal lseedar shoiin lkcheey dal qolkor lkaiin solkaiin qotey or okchom chedy
chail okshes qokeey ykeo olyeedy olchedain keeey cheedaiin lkain olcheey daiin qotchy yshaly okchedar sheol oteod y
ar olkal sheey qokeedy aiin kcheeey rar qotain rok qokeedy ycholy aiin qoky dar olkeedy lcheedal oledain raiin solr qokchedy yched okchom chckhy

dalaiin ocheaiin chedy qotchey ol odedaiin riiin qokain qokshdair shedy qolm lkeol dal orcheal oll teey daiin aiin
tdy chey odyody shey opchaiiin shey al lsdol qokedy qokeedy qoky qoeedy tsheeoy chedy shctheody chctheeey qoeear qoky shedy
opchor dal qochair ky olkan sheody shey tchedaiin aiin ody oky ychear oddal odar shes qofcheey dy al

peos olkar otedy dam ychdo pedain sain odydar rs ytcheor chdy shctheam shom qokeody qoteey qokear okeedy dcheody
qokchdy ar opcheeos lkchedor qoteedy lchedy doll chedy kshos oldaiin okal qol otaiin otain chdy lair olyedar shedy ckhedar otedy ol
okeey chos otaiin olchary chedy shal solkar lkeor shctheeedy lsal shedy qokar lsholy keeo cheeor dchdy

okedy oksheeal dsheeos pal okeey okaiin shedy daiireeaiin al qockhol qokeedy daredy lcheedal yts qokeey y qokeey ychaiin
oair ctheey daiin cheey cheeey olchais ychail oiinedy oed olkal chdy schedaiin tchedam olkchy ar lain
dar lcheody qokchy oksheedaiin lsedar dar qokeedy qokey dar daiin sheey y chey alyedy qotey ytedor qotedy ol

qokeey ka chedy cthair kshr qotchear okchy qokchy olshdal qokeedy ram sheey sheeol lkaiir qotsdy ytdy daiin qoteey shedy qoeeal chckhy
dchaiin tor saiin chain oteey ol daiin cphee qoor dy chor otedy lkches qol qokeey oltod chckho cthaiin tshdy otar or
tshaly qolain sheol lshedy oredaiin chary qokaiin olsheeey aiin ledy qokal olkain y lr oryey odey shcthedy

qokeey cheedaiin schm ytedor dar olkeey okeey che ain pcheal rchor yeedy lsheeos dar yshedar sheol salody ol
yshdy lkais ckhedam kshol cthedal or dykeor odydor qoteos or opchm qokar shedol char ol
ochdy reeey qotchair qokey dsha qotain aredam qolkeo qokeedy yeos aiires qol leody yts qotedy qokar chdy

daiin aiin daiin shedor ar tey qokchdy doledy shedy kchedaiin ar cthaly sain sheod otsheor ytcham olar chdy
qotar qol qokal alaiir lkchedal shdy opchaiir tedy chor ychoy qokedy ykchol qokar keam chaiir chedy
qokedy daiin cheey otdaiin otal odyaiin cheey air dyks yteeey okchedy chdy ddar kshary cheeo lkor qoty chedy chcthaiin

laly cheedy kes ockheody lkaiin okchedy kedaiin qokain shckheeedy qokeey pchm qoteey otedy lcheaiin olal sarear shckhy chedy
cheey lses chey qokain daiin aldor olkar dsheain cheey or okaiin fcheol qokchey ytody yteeor shedy dal qokchey qopedy chcthaiir qochod
opchedy qokchody ral chor solkeeo fcheeody ain otey dshedaiin aiin qokeedy daiin shdaiin okal olshes dar chey dar

lchedy cthy yshedam dain yedam qokeey shedy lchor ctholy solkes yedy daleody tody ol chor dar qokeey qofcheaiin qotedy
lcheedal ychal odyal ofcheos qokeey oror araly ochedy tchear dar dalyor shedy opchor daiin otchy oteedy olchsdy otedy
qolkedy qopcheeey qokchedy ykor fcheain dchedam chey al olchs ol dyteody y dy olcheeor so daiin dykedy qokeey lkaiin alyod

ykeeedy soleeedy daiin chey solkeesy opo ocher oly cheod dair salair okar qokchdy y cthol chey qocthdy ytedor qotedy
oain ctheeey oksheedy otshm qotshear daredy tm otchy odyey yer ar cthedy qokey ain qotal okeey otedy
okeey dar qopchs yteees oeos lsheeody ykar chckhy tdaiin sheod saireos oteey qokedy olkeey y aledor shedy

lcheedal ololy ol cthar qoaiiin olkeedy ar soredam chctheey aiin shody qokain olchedal saleos okchy dair peeedy sy am qokal shol otedy
shckhedy chor lsheeod reeor sored shey qol schok qokal reedy qotedy ain qokeey al aiin okchey shckhdy lfcheor aiin
okaiin lsal areos lkaiin shy raiin dam chedy qokshdar tdol ches shedy lkor dam dain ykedy qokshedam ykcheed otedy

schaly sain chedy tedy sheey tdy chey olr qotchdar otar chdy shedy dalair ykchor okeey qoky olshin kor
dardy oltedy oraiin sheol qod ltd qokaiin aiin okeedy lkey schdy reeey okedy qocthm oty qotain arary raiin
qokar y tom ar yeeedy okar okain dy chdar cheedy oles dar yeos ty otedy dalydy qokeeedy salor

ychal qotchey kaiin lody lteeey y dain qokaiin oteedy ol qokar okeedaiin qoteol okcheody ldy qokaiin fchy ardy
ar ypcho olyeel yked qokar lair qokeor qotoiin qotchey ykaiin qokar sed qopar shedy aleeol solcheey lky am
chey qochedy qokal kedy odo ral reedy sheey air toiin lss rm opchees sheol raiin oteey pchm scheeol qokom qokedy

saiin lsal ykeeal air seor lkche chedy okeedy oeor lkeeeody oliir daiin y chcthor qokchy otain ytchom aiin
tsheear ar daledy olyoly ltr ltes lor teor tdo oteols shar shey toly ychar chckhey lshg dal aiin
otedy dy qokchy qoteo kshy y otchey dar chey qodor chaiir aiin dam qokaiin tchdal olkar chg otedy oteeo qokaiin aiin

qolkedy otcheedaiin dar olydair qockhedy tchair oeor chey shey chor char sheey aiin qokchain cpheees al
sarm okchy keo qokeedy odyaiiin qotchdar ssheody ol sed keod lkchd teey qolkeoly qokedy oshear lkain chedy
chol ykcheeal ykeeedy okeey chg dain odyeedy okedy qocthain osheey oeeedy opcheos otchar keeody chckhy qokchy okcheos

oleeo dar ody qokey ain olshaly saiin okedy oteod osedy ypchedain al dair oedam qokeedy shedy chdol chedy
tsheeedy dy shckhedam qokeedy ardy ctheol sey qokar solkeear shedy shdain shedy qol yeer oleeam shedy shaiiin chedy
sheod shckhy al oteedy cheedy chckhy okal shckhy am qokal olky ltaiiin alyedy opchsdy keeody kaly qokal chckhy chor shedy chckhy chor chedy

qokain dy dchaim shckhy reol sory chedy chcthain oleoly aiin qoteeody ytr oryedy ykcheeo otedy qokair ochedy
chckhey ychos kshedy otal sheody redy qokaiin qol ol shcthey dain y dain chcphedy ysheeos lsheedy ypchdair sheol chol
qokar or qokshaly tedair ytey shckhy qotchod chedy dalm qol qokcheey ychedal dar dcheor sheedy pchod ofcho ol lchol

am opcheeody shey lteol ctheeol shedy dareeedy lair dal cheedy olchdaly okaiin paiin dy lchedam ted
ody oiiineal ches chey alyol lcheeor dar saireody yeedal chdy sol okeey lsam shedy qokeey daireol ochail ykair
okedy qoctheody kchor dal qoty aiin areedy dshdy araly opchedaiin qol qoky kear qokaiin or lair lchaiiin odyeeor cheol

oty chdaiin shckhy otedy lts keeey aiin sain qokedy opcheeey shey reeo ar qokal aiin qedaiin ychdo alail chey otedy ol
otal ycheom chedy okeedy chdy qokar qoal rchol lcheor al chey otchedy oles aree odyeeody qokedy tedar okeedy kol okchy ol
soledar shedy sheol qokedy areos qotoiin sar shs chey chdam shedaiin odyeol olyesy y oteedy otaiin shedy qoksheody cheol ocheeey shedy ol

lkain keeody ycheedy opchedy chey y qotar chedy schaiin dy otedy qaly oro okal chedy solchair
shedy dain okol sheedy dar ytchy otedy opcheos lchesy oiindy chedy sairdy kcheod chedy okeey chy olkain qoree y shey
chcthaiin ypchaiiin opal lseeal cheol kdol ykam ol qotdor chedy seoy olkeedy lsar qokedy qokeey qolko okg cheol

shes schedam okeedy qokeey lkchiiin qokchey kor otedy qokchary tchor daiin lcheeedy oshor yshedaiin lchedy oleeod okshdy
qokeey ykesy lkchoiin qockhedy okeedy qoko qokol otear cthaiis cheod okaiin aiin shedy dain shckhy okshy ales daeos okedy lchedy
otchdy okeedy raiin qoedor chckhy ledy daiin odey shol sheear aleeor kedal sheody am oteey pcheos shaiis lkchdy

shody opair opchdol aiin lkdy qokshed tcham oldaly aleain ykody ol shckhedy tedam lkaiin lchedy
cheey lsedair yor otche ltor kcholy okeedaiin ctheol lkary chedy shol shol shan oleeeody kos qockhedy qokchees ol
aiiino opcheeedy chcthes shdain ol dain lkain chdy olcheedaiin olchar okom okaiin qotdor ol qokchey aiin chey lchedy

lchdal darain qokedy opchedair ol oteey dshes qockhdal chedy olydair opchedol okedar ol sheol okaiin dar olkeey tshain cthedaiin ol
okar sheedaiin qol oor dalyear daireos qokeedy qokaiin sheedy okchair cthaiin otchdy or cthedy soly tchaly
otol oteody shor ychg okeeor qokar am qokchy okal shedy shaiiin lkchdain cheeam ysheol dy cheey ychar oky chedy qokal qokdal

soleedain tg cheody dain shor qodaiin lain daiin qol lsheor daiin qokshm chckhal pchair oro cthsd chedy lkary oteedy chol
cthaiin tedar ykey dchair lkaiiin qoeees oaim qolkor qotedy darain qokal chedal opedy okchey al dyteedaiin raiin dar
shal sheain dair lteeody ltedol y tedy ar lsedol qoleos saiin rdaiin oshear daiin char qokaiin tair

lchaim shcthear qokal olcheedaiin qokaiin qopchain qockhol tcheedy chedy qokar ofchain ysheees aiin lky qokeedy ar okeey oky reols ctheor dar
aiiineol dal ltal olky dar qokeedy aiin olteedam ol ypchaiir oteain ol lkedy okcheeor ychedor chedal araly
lcheeoy chd aiin dal dar qokchy otedy okain shol qokaiin ltaiin otey lshdam lkaiin shedy reeey okchedy air leeo kedaiin y syeesy shedy dar

shody oto okal dshar otaiin tchair okeey chey qokedy kchey otchain qotar aiin chedy qoky qos schaiin sedy okeey qokaiin chdy

qofcho shedal okedy opal ain ol cthedar okeedy otoiin daldar ockhaim sain dols yteed sheedy shdain air schedy kshy or

daiin lkcheody okeeor ol okey chdy deeedy ol opcheeey reedy olchair schy qopcheeedy dy lchdair shary pchedy lko
tshdaiin oleeos qoal oedam lcheedam ol schy oteedy reod cheeeo aiin cthear oteey soledy ody qokeedy dar

soleor qokar yches dar ledy olyy okaly okedy res otain raiin qofcheedal chsd chd shedy qopchedy
lkear daiin pchain ypcheeod al qokeedy lcheeedy dar ypchair chey or yeeey shedy qol ol olkal qol lkeal ol qoror qokeey qokaiin cheol
okedy oryor chor dar olkal dar qolchedy kshy otedy qoey qokal chdaiiin tchaiin shol chey oryol oteey qokaiin reedy seody okeedy dar

opcheo oeody lshg ted shal shckheor ol pcheody otchey qokain cphok okeain qolor qokeey qokedy oshedam otchees chedy
chey shy chedy otshey ykchair shol lshes soiined tedam qotar qokshod okoiin ain rg dam okeeor aiin qokeey qokdal

eseey chedy scholy shedy daiin ytal olkeeedy ykor yshaiin chey okedy al ts raiin olchaiiin yeos qokeedy ysheody otar aiin okeedy pchear

shar qokeedy ykeeody shsd ol otal chdy opchaim lkeody daiin am opchdaiiin olkdaiin aiin shaiir yor tchees chedy

ar oky y keeey qokchedy dar okchey aiin oteedy chcthear cthdy lyaly saiin cthdy shes chdy ockhey okched
