oo tdy dar ars al cheol schor olkeedy odydar oteedy shes olchar cheedaiin qokey shas raiin qoal or
qoleor okchain tedy chey olchg opchear arys yteedar aiin lkedy ar yaim tdaiin lshal otaiin raiin
lchdair qokar dar shor qoeedaiin pchs shedy yeedal otedal lkaiin qokedy lkos cheeor qoleody shckhy aly cheod chdy

shedy okchealy pol qotal tsheedal lshedal lse qoky kaiin qokaiin olkaiin y qokar qotos chdaiin qokal qoteeeody okeod qokaiin qokedy
chols pol qokal cheey otedy cthed lkaiin chckhy qokeedy or otchaim sheoy tdal dal aiin sheoy ted kchaim
oty odydy oredy opche reedy qokaly sheol okol opol ypchdaly dshdain chedain sheckhy qopchaiin otsheeedy ypchey dair qokaiin shedy

oty tol lkedy shctho ol qokal qotal aiin oteedy ockhaiin aiiineody yteeo lchey lteear qokaiin chol sheody dar ysheedar chol opchor
cheedar cheain am qokar okar kair qokchaiiin chedy oteey sheody opg saiin raiin ain okedy qokchedy chedy qoky kaiin dam sshol chdy
qolkey oteedy ypchain qopcheos qokees qokain qokeedy chedy oteey sheod cpheal otedy aiirdar kchees kdy daiin soiindal opchor

al raiin aleeey aiin qokshaim daro yain sha or chcthaiin daiin sheey ain ol daiin oeedy chedy chol
lcheedal oledaiin cheols kor sared areos chckhey shey qokar chsairy ol qoteedy ar lkeeey okchedy qoeedy saim
ocheedal okaiiin aiin ctheeod cheol qochor otedy ain chor qoes or qokee shsy qotedy pchair qopchol ol

qokol okain ol dam saireos cthedain chol chedy lky otchor rsheey qokeey ltedor qokeedy qoedal lkedam lydar tchdain y
lkain raiin lkar chedy okedy shy qoteam reeo soreody lcher chedy qoty dsheedy qokaiin lsal aredy oty peod ardar
ytchedam qokchey okchey olshaiir al kchar olchal ssheal oleeody ltes aiin qokeedy aiin oraim oteey qodaiin leeedy

qoa ches qokal shey or dal ain shedy aiin ytal shedy qokar dshail okchedy ar sshdy oteod qokaiin chedy
lkeody lshy chedy shedor chedy oedy qokeedy schor olkeey qokeeor chdy qokeeedy otedy lkchdol keeo okshoiin qoedal qokedam
chey oryaiin saiin lshody shey qoeam qokeedy ltal chor dar lkeor dalaly aiiinear chckhey ycheeo otchy keeol opcham ar

qopcheol chey lchey ltok okal shedy chees chedy ypchey qol qotal dchdy cha dshes sheey qokeedy ykar qokaiin okshaiir dar lkees al
keel po darol qotal shaiir olshy okaiin yteeey qotchain dain chedy cthoy aly ykar qokair
seeol olkaiin aiin otal oky qokeedy shey ldair ofchaiin chor teos daiin chedy rd chor qoeor qolkedy qokeedy shody qotain chckhy okeey rchor

shol chedy qokar oky yshain yor kches chol oteedy okaiin qoar fchaiin cthed qotsheol teol qotaiin qokeedy shey chcthy qol
dar qokeey okeain air opcheam aiin chcthar okr oiinedy dy chctheal ctheeod olchar qokeey reeos ol qopchal ain
tdy qokar chdy opchol lseod chey lteedy otsheody otal otain keol qokal chey okain dal shedor ychan areol

qokol okain olaiiin kom arair ody opcheeey qochedy qoksheeedy otedy ypchaiin tdy olkchey ral oed tchal air
chcthdair qokey sheol qol ypchaiiin cheod chs chey qotchain cheedy chdy olkaiin qokeor otal shdaiin raiin olkar chol qokeey chedy
qol qockhdaiin chedy doleoy qos qokchey ytam odeeedy qokal chdy qockhor tchdal yshey qotedy aiireeody yts aiiredam

otedy odyeam oldy cphdy okchdy dar qotaiin qokaiin odyed shcthedy cheey chedy qokchdar sain ykey ydal okeey chckhy

ykoiin shckhain qokeedy opchaim
chey shd otaiin lkchch shedy qokey
dchor shedy ocheeoy chedy ypched chey olchdaiin ykees olcheeos qoeedaiin opchdal odeor al ockhor lchedam
qokar shey lkedaiin qokeedy olshal shol chedy otchair oteain yteor ockhedy shal qokeedy ral lkain dar ytchedar ytdam qokaiin chedy
chdam lchedy kcheeody ar ockhol olchr aiin qokal sheedy keeey qochey qopchair cpheody lsdo shedy aiin lchdair

keod daldy sarain dy kody qokar ain qol ockheam raiin dy lsheos qockhear oteey sale ol tam dar
qokal redal dar yor opcholy ain cphdy qoteedy odyeod daled qotal olkaiin qodaiin olseos cheeos aiin qockhol
okeey ychedor ar cheey cheeody kg qokedy qokain shol olkaiin ychalsy shedy chol aiin sheol teor arym schaiin qopees ar

aleom dar opchedain chdy daiin shey lyey qokeey qotaiin chol tches chesy lkchedal choiin ltsd dar
ody lchor lchey okchedy dar chol olkeedy oteedy qotedy dykdal ldor y ol cheey otain dain chdy qokal cheol dain oeol
chey qokchedy chdol ol qokal qokeey otaim cthedy otaiin odeos lkchok daiin dar ofchdy ol dy qokaiin chdy tchm shcthedam shor dar

saiin lsa ltedair lkchdaiin aiin lkdal qoteey chedy qokal qockhaiin otal chedy shar oryo tcheesy ol dain oaly
qokedy dy qokaiin oksheeor olyeos lchaim sain chedy otal osheos shol qokeey al otaiin tdy chcthary odyaiin otshol lkar or
shody oteody dady shckhedy qokeedy okar chol aiiinody aiin shey dchaiin qokeey chctheor cheol tcheol dain dardal cheol oteedy olchoiin daraly

cthedam lkas or chcfhalsy rey taiin ckheod aleedy chedy daiin shdal yshod cheey ol qoar qolkey solar ol

qoteey dar qolcheedy oteod dar otaiin pchor qokal ol pchdy daiin odyeo dy qoky aiin shckhy solkedaiin lchedy qofchor
tchm qokedam td shd cheedy kedy sheey qoteedy rol qokchair shol chey qotair alal daraly otchedair olcham qokeedy lsaiir ydy qol

otedy olkedy kar shol qokedy saiin otod otol qokain qol olyedaiin y oky reed lkor otey olal qoky okeedy chesy ain
dar lkedy dalyor ockhear odedy chey oiiney lchey aiin aiirsdy aiin qokedy qokar shan oteey chg dytdy chdy
shal shdaiin al cthedal chas otedy ol sar chedy ol lchey rar okaiin pdy lcheedam qosd ain ordar chey ain

lkcheam ksaiin saiin olshee ain ykcheeody keed solain qokol sheedy aleedaiin cheey qotiin okain ar olkeey rchaiin qokchy qokeedy chsaiin otchy shedy chol
shol lss tol qokeey araiin qoky olkeain olkaiin reeam otedy ol tshain dchdair ykaiir oleain qotaiin olchd daiin qokedy
soled olyeeaiin shdaiin okeedy odyeed qokair teeo shedy eseey chdy daiin qolaim ctheam al tsheeedy saleesy lyedy okchy qokchy ychair

oty chedy qokeedy reeeo chol al qotal otaiin qopdar shedy qoko dalyedy okeedy tor cheol ofcheol dain dy otedy
oleeod reor qokeedy shedy cpheor olkain cphd dar qokeedy am ykchair qokar shedy olcheedar chdy qokeey daiin or oaly
chey shy chedor lsas saleol dam olkchy chal cheedy reor ksheey aiin salain qokaiin qotaiin lshs dain shedy cheey ol okcheod shedy

raiin ain daiin ral rar or okey ytar chey dar okcholy lchedy oteedy lkain lchedy qokal lseed areedy sheeody chdy

qokaiin dar dam chaly sar solkeedar okain solkody olter lshdaiin qoedor dar qokeedy chal odedy qokey ytdol chol

dar ctheeey reeal otedy kchaiiin shedy air daryeal chckheesy lyor qoteedy okaiin sheedy daiin alor cheey chedy qokeey okaiin kd y
or opchady kdaly pedol odod ldair ody ofeedain qol cphm otees raiin ledy opched
ar lchey qotchedy ykedy dleeol okeed pcho yeeoy ar otar ltar otaiin qokeedy ol olkal lched qokar qokar kal air

cthaiin qokeey otain oeor oreos qolkdaiin chdy ycheees qokal qol dalydy sheey qol kshedy tol dam chdy
qokeedy otedy olkeey qoksheal ain lkeody ain scheey ychdor otedy lkody lsdam tdy shedy daiin fchal shsdy or olkal otal dar
olcheeeo ol opchedaiin shedy chey qokchedy dar okal okom chckheedar ychaiin oshor oreed okeeod kedy dal qol

ofcheey qokeedy qotedy okdaiin qokar ol qokaiin ardy daiin olches chedy qockhor cthar kdaly okeed ofchair ockhdaly dar
qokol sheedy dar qokeey okaiin saleedar she dchdal sheol qockhol qokaiin aiin tchoiin sheod daldy aiin olsheod eseo chckhy cthedol ol
qos dsheeody otaiir chedy qdy yteeey or chcphedy qokeedy dleo chckhy lky lteeey ol okal saiin dar

choly chedy ypchedol olsheol qokar dar kshedy qokaiin qokain okeey lchedy cpheo ycham qotain chdy shol qokear qokal qokchaiin
opchor osas opedam shedy oshaiin qokal ypcheor yshedy or qokchy saiin y tchdy aiin olkeey ltas lkcheedy qokdair
chcthedy otchdy qod olkar ol ochr solkeedy oteey qokedy kchedy ykchair dykeor olkaiin lsory chedy ockhedol ol

cheeo olsheeedy daiin aiin olyeam rar lkdy oteey ychedar oleedy soredy qokar sheody ain sain lkcheeor rchor

sairo okey lkchan qokaiin oteedy ol qokaiin qoeeor teol qokeey aiin opcheeedy chedy oredy shctheoly qopdar shcthaiin shedy

cthair lkeeey shedy odyes ream dar qokal dar chedor al qoky chdaiin chor al qokchesy shedy chcphedam qotar qokedy

qokeey dar okal okain okchg ol shcthear opcham chedy cthaiin opcheor sed qofcheos opcha okain lchaiin
qokal chedy ledy sory okeedy cheol qokaiin okain cheear shedy qokeey qoksheey aiin lkedy daryeey chckhy cthes otedy or aiiresy lteeor chdy
dar qokeey chedy ykched rshair okar shedaiin qotain or cheey lkchedar okshy dar ctheal okedy ol

lkaiin rs rchedy lkeody chdy dar qockhair qotal lkcheedy cheey salan chedy chor ykody reear cheol
opchain ykchaly okchedam oredaiin tair shckhy yky qokaiin ol okeey otedy okedy reeal chedy oteey qokain reedaiin chedy
ain chcthear ool cthom okain sheey qokaiin aiin okeey ar olyain cpheody qoked olkchey am qokeedy ol

yeedal dar solcheey ksaiin ykcheody oldaly dor okchdy aiin teed raiin dar qokeedy olo cthiin otdal schedal shedy saireo al qokal lchedy
yor dair kcheeedy shedy oky qoeedy oky rr rol qokey ol olkal chol oltedam shey ochedam aiiinas chdy cphal shey
chol olkeey qokeey ol shedy kchdar yeedy qokain lcheeey kaiin okedy lkchal schdar oteey qotain ar ofchdal yshedam cthedy

ypchaly okchy dar dair qokaiin chedy opcheey rsd ytedy olsheed qokain dolo qokaiin shedy okchy otain ol cheedy sheeam daiin qokedy
y olkeedy okchy lkcheols qokal ychedam lchedy otsheody shol qokar shedy qokeey qotain qopched oiinaiin okchg cheain chs or qokaiin qol
shckhdy odyeedy qoeees olkeeedy lseor kchedaiin dar solo tsheaiin lchedy okaiin otg kaiin pchol dy chcphm lsg dain shedy

shckhy ain qokeey saleeam tm oeol keeey lkchoiin cthaiin otchey alaiir ochdy olcheedaiin okedor lsy chol
chm otaiin qopchedy chey qokchedy okaiir shedy aiin qokedy olyom chedy lkol qopchas chedy olkeedy qokeedy kan sheody ltedal odaiin
cpheey qol qopeeody olcheedy ockheey daiin ykcheol cthees okeedy raiiin ain deol ypchedor chedy yshedal olsheeam opdal okaiin chdy

qokeey ches cheol ypchees tchedy qokey aiin saiin okaiin chan qotas aiin ochedam otaiin shey lchdair okeey qokaly
ysheor qokeey qolkeey ros oleeor areo otaiin qoko ycheedaiin okeey shom salar shckhdal tchey qol qokchees otcheey qokedy
qotchey dar otal shedy sar chedaiin chckhy qokeey char qote cheol okeedy ockho ol pcheey sheoly aiin chcthedaiin ol

olky ar qopcheeedy olkeey dar sar sheedar oty ykeeos chedal aro okal olkdair orcheeoy kl qokain shedy
chckhy qokaiin aiin oteedy daiin shedy or to qokey ar lkain dar tedair chedy dolain qokal okal lchedy ytchees chedy ykchedol dar
qokol pair kcheeody air sheey shedy qokchy ykedam qockhol oteedy lseeos olshesy oleedy chm qokchey qokain shedy

otchey cheol lcheeoy chedy chckhey qokedy daiin am shedy olches or cphedy kchedaiin oleel ytedor dar qokcheesy dar
shedy dair cheedy keeor qokain olky dchain sheol okal sheeor am okaiin ytear olchdaiiin olkg cpho qokeedy okeey shey
chdy okal salar chody qolcheody cheol qoteedy okal okg ol qokar otchdy dar saiin al oteedy odydy qokeey dy ches otal ar

qokain olyed qotar okd daiin reod ytchaiin qokeedy olshair ofchor okeey soleey qotaiin ain otshdy sheol soldy
aredam okeey pcheos lchedam lkeor lchor qokar okeam por tchdair kshe shs shey sheey qokedy
oty dar tcheeey qokchedy ales qokar ol char oddaiin okshe ol qoteedy okey dar qolod dched ty kdaiin orm

ykdair qokal aiin chcthedy shar oteor shor qol chedar ain chey ltol tdal otey shedain qokedy qokaiin qokedy
tsheedal chckhy qokchar oteos opcheeody ar qokchair ochedaiiin otaly opchedy oteedy ol okeey qoteeeo qokedy lchdy opchaim
lcheedal chedy oty ar olkeedy oty shdaiin otal ol tar olcheeor chedy aiiineeal lkched dchey opcheol otain cheey otedy oddy

lchedam sain chedy okol otdar ockhiiin raiin otdain oleeey otchedy or qoky sheol air qolkeedy qotedy y tshaiin okar ldy oseeedy
oky qopod otar or oaiin saiin olkar aiin osy chsdy shey qokeey ral dykol tedair dar shor or daiin qokaiin ar
sairaly ykchair lkdy olyod lky sheol ytail odyeeo qoked chor ol qoky lsheod dal kal al

tsheedal cheeo shedy shckhy qokchedy qotdal okar or qol yols ckhaiin lcheaiin chedy qokair ksheey shol reol qockhed olyom lchedy
sar qotchain orod chor shedy soiinaiin otal qotal ychg keal dal chedy qotal doraiin oteey olkeey res ar okaiin pchor
okair shckhedam otchedair qokedy chor shey qokol opedy qotal opchdair shcthedy chedy dykeol lchaiin opchedaiin dar

to aiiinoy aiin loy shes ol oredam otey ted okeey ol opchory choiin qoeeos lshom otaiin air
chor ar qokal ytedol qoredy qorain qokeedy ydal otshedy yshol chdy cheey opal ol okeey lchdar solaiin
rsy cha ltsdy chaiin ofchey oteedy do ypcheesy chear lkar chedy ysheear chaiir olary areos

okedy oksheeo qoteols olshee dareey daiin aldaiin shey qolked cheey shedy qokeey chey y qoteey lkaiin ar soled
qotaiin qokeedy raiis ol aiiinody lkchs qoteed odyal aleedy daryeeol cheedaiin saiin chdy lchoiiin okain sham qokedy osam ol
qokeey otedy lcheedal chedy osedar aiin okedy y tair ol qockhdaiin ked olkal odyeedy dar yr oryeor or lteam lyear okeey ol

qotedy al shsd qoeol qokain dair aleeey solkeedy lkain olcheody kchedaiin y tal ltr shey dair qokaly
qoaiiin air kchol shol lkeol qoty okeod ored olshdal olkal tsheey okchaiin shor aiin qokal sordal
qoky sheol chckhy okcheeody dar sheol qokal shdaly aiin kchin ytaly ctheol oty oles olkal okoly qotedar olsheees ared

sheody lkchar chey shey lsr qocthod rdaly okeoy qokchdy ykary opy qokeol lkain cheol qokar dar olkeey tsheody res araly
lkeody chey lkchody dshdaly otsheey lchaly aiiineol qockhol qol lcheeedy aiiinaiin dam daldal pcheeedy
oky reedy okeey qokedy ykcheol chdy ctheey raiin shg dyteedy aiin qoky dchair oded chedy qokeedy ol qotey shor lteesy rchair

am opcheeody dar ykar otedy qokey lkches qokeey chod okchedor chedy tedol y ool chcthy tedam olkal ol pcheeedy
chedy chckhedol okol qokain qol dain rchedam cheey olshedol oteees qokchy okeeody shes chdy qokeey dchaim dam cheey chdy
schair solchod qokaiin qokaim okchy shedy opar ltdy daiin shody ckhain saiin otal chdy qokal odeos doreo olkeedy tdal soror

dar sheody pdaiin shckhy lkchal okey shey chedy opchaiiin qotchain kchdair dalym sheey cheol tchdy qokeey dcheeedy oseeos chdy
cheey shedy chey lshed osheear shedain oledain dsholy qoedal qokar am chckheedaiin daiin raiis aiin chey old opchor
chey qochedy qotal sain ol chedy kshy qokeedy ain chey aiin okches odyeeey chey olkchedy qokedy lkcheeo kedal okeeey al aiireeeody qol

cheol okchedy ychols paiin kchy aiin ochair otees saldaly keey lkchdor kal qokedy chedy okeey okeey lchedy ta ychedy opchal am
qoky tchedy oteey okeey aiin shaiir rdaly aiin qokeedy shckhy qokchedy dar dain okshd qokey chckhy okchy otchy qotaim dam qoty sheedy oteedy saiin aiin sardaiin ol
sain aleoly dar qokeedy chedy opchy tchor qotedy qolkear kcheed shedy qoeeor shctheor taiin kchail ltes kshey dain dy y

dar okal ody lkos qoaiin qotar dar rcheeedy qoteey qokaiin redor lchedy qopcheedy qol qoldy chcthor qokey oteedy ol
ocho ltr qochm lkchaiin qotaiin arey daiin olkedy aiin oleeey otchedy oldy otal qokaiin otain odyedar ar opchar ykedy otcheed aiin qokchy dair ol
qokaiin odyeeo aror yor daiin qokey shedy ar dam chey shy shdaly odeey odyedor qotedal oksheed qokedy shol chey solkedor oteedy ol

qokeey chedy qotar qolkeeor olair olkol pedy ykchaiis chs chey qocthdal qokchey ol tshesy yched cheey shedy aiiinedy kcheda lkcheeam oseol
daledy ykcheo lteeal yeaiin saleey oedy oteedy cthedy qokal sheoy psheeor olchiiin ykal qofcheedal lsheedaiin dcheey okshees ar
qolkey teeedy ocheedal chan lsal olsdal chey al schedar lssairy or dykear qopchg aiin qokchy daiin chol

okar olchoiiin qokain ykedaiin chdy okedy qodam opchdair olkal sheody reeo chctheos chas dsheedy cthedy olyedam oddar
cheedy kedaiiin olkear ory ol lkaiin aiin aiiinol otshod chdy cthey olkaiin olkaiin lkchs qokaiin ychg otedy ots aiin
qoteey ar cthedair dar daiin y olyar key daiin ody scheo opcheeam ol qotchy tchair chcfheor ol qokey y sorey

lcheaiin olshsy qotedy cheey saleeod ols aireeol ches saiin or dsheedy cheols tedam lkos ltain kshr sheedy tedam
shor chal ychs oseos otaiin yteod oor olkeain olchdaiiin otedy shar otain teol kal lkeey lkdair
laiin teol otey qotedy otchy otal shedy y chcthaly olcheeody solksaiin dy dar chey rdaiin soldy ocheey okeedy aiin

okeey ycheeey rody dar soreeedy qokeedy dain olcheeey am saiin sheedy ykeeey alyedy dalyaly ssheor oteed al
okaiin qol okal y otchdal olcheed ain saiin qokey chedy tchdaly lsal olteeedy okeedy lseeey qotchaiin qokchy otchy oteedy shedar dchaly
lkchar ochdair solcheedaiin shedy ror olches qokeear okshail otchedy dar olyedy schody ytdaiin qoey yeedal otedy sheedy soleeedy

qofcheedal oloiin lkeeol orod shol qokaiin choiin cheey chdar chor cheol oky ychedy lkdy okeedy olchy areeor olchedar qoky chol

qoteod okchey chdaiin opchor
ochaiin opchy redo dykeody otedy
chedy tshr aiin ykcheol otchey shedy chs ol lchor dam qokched chey odyeeody chol ytg opeds olkeeedy cheol
chey oiinedy dchaiin qokeey lked qotdain ain okchary raiin qoeedy odyedain qokshear olshody qokain tdy chedy ykched ysheeal qokedy
dar tshaiiin am yor saiin dar otedy shckhy qokchedy qoedaiin otam qokaiin air qokchdain rd otshaim ytedar qoreedain omeeaiin qol

oteey keeey al otar kal lchdy al ypchedam otar kedam cheey qokain lcheol chdy dchaiin otcheesy qol tedain otedy
dar chckhr lchdar aiird aiin ykchdaly lchedy chey shy chedor lchedy dain shedy shol lkol olchedar qokeedy y otshair
qockhdy lcheor dair lkcheol ctheam kal cheey keeod ytar shol cheeam otchy ykaiin olkaiin otedy aiiineol sheol qotar raiin

chealy sheedy oles cthaiin shol aiin soeda olchdy laly shar qotedy daiin dsheeos qotiiin tedam cheey qol
solol opchedor chd osain chedy or qokeedy tm dalyeos ykched pchol lky ytedy saiin okchdy otos odor
olkar shoiin soleedain qokal chdy qokeedy qokedy daaiin dy lteod okaiin yshed qokeey oteey qoes yteeey am lkain ol

schaiin rsheol okedy lchdy cheol shol sheedy cheol chs olcheam chckhaiiin okedy otedy ol daleey aiin sain qokchy shedy otedal qokeos
okaiin chckhoiin sheey odyeom chal ykeeam opchdal shedor chedy olchdol qotdaiiin olkain odyeedy ypcheol qoky chedy schdaly chedy
chckhy daleal dair soley otchedar lchedy dain pchain pcheo olkaiin qotaiin aiin okal qol qokal qokaiin qopchor qotsheey ory ain

cheey pear octhdaiin chdy opchaiiin okchedy lchedy lsedor dshaiin qokshdy cthor qokeey qody opchan olshoiin qokal lseed yedy ockhedol chedy
ypchaim cheedy aiin ksheeo y chedair qoky chy qokeos chair qokar sheckhy cheeos opedy qokal dar tshedam qokeey qotaiin chedy
oeor qoky shey dal qokaiin ked otey ar ol cheey shey daiin solkeeeody ykedy otsho qopeos arain otal qokal chedy

chey ain osedar qoteeol oltor cthedam oteedy oredam lody lshar oredy ar solor qotey tair qoky reed qokaiin chckhy
daiin ral shal oleedy okar chol kdol sheol olchais oty shey qokaiin yteeor qoked qokeedy ychal chees okain teeey alydy
opchedy qokchey peeedy qokeedy sheey qol raiin qokaiin oldaly lchedy dchdar tair ted solchal qoeody ledar aiin chcthedaiin ar

qofchor ledy qokair otal qockhor ykchees chdy orom lsoiin aiireos als kedor chckhdy doleo olkeedy ocheedal shedy
lcher dsheeod sheear qokaiin qoedal solkal reody daiin or oltals paiin chedy qoraly okeedy arain kd odedy qokeedy tched
dar shckhy rdain chedy okal cheol areedy lses saly chedy darey okeey tsheedal keesy peeor qofcheedal shey

cthor doleor dalyol qokeedy solkar shos chcthedy sheey pcheol sheam chol oteedy soleal lsg otear okeedy qopchaly
chey lkcheeo qotes shsairy qokedy qodaiin cheol dchol lkan olsheedar ytan kedal odair qokey chdy
okeey opedair lkchdaiin qokal y lcheedal dar olkedy keoly ychedy qokaiin taiin chedy otal chcthaiin doll olshedam kchedal dar qopdam qol

opchedy saiin daair dy odyy okain odees chckhar ped okedy aiin cheey or okchy qotain shey chcfhin shedor chdy
qokaiin reeor ochey opcholy odydy aiireeo fcheedaiin ol qockhedy kchol dy air qokeey qol lydair qokeedy lchaiin
chey qokchedy chdy orcheeol kos chckholy shedy oreeey rs oky saleos kchedair ol sheody opeain qokaiin olchaiin tcheeal chckhedor ol

saiin aiin olkedy otr chckholy ychar oteey cheos taiiin reod sardy choiin sar qocthedy shol yky reeor okedy or
qokal olcheees ros rcheeor or dalyeor sheo dy oky aiin yor keain qoteey kal aiin aledaiiin okain cheedaiin qokal chdy
doldar soly saldal qokar lsedol dalydal orchm yteeey qokchedy okeeey res olcheeo kaiir oksheeor chey or

qolkedy qokeedy ltar chey dar dal cheey cheedar aiiineos qol ypchaiin daredy oteey qotaiin otchaiin qotar sheeal qokar lshedair ctheol
chedy cheedy key chey oke qol okeey lkdy shal oledain ledam qotd ksheeol ypchedam ytchary yshedy qokar aiin
dchain qopory dar dy tshedy lkeeo aleear schaiin tedy dair olchain ockhair rshod shdain okar oles saiin ol

chals olkain ol aiirdol reain rdy shes dar ychedor ar okcheey sheey shey soley qokar al
dcheos okedy aiin dchod opdair ypchom qokeedy qoeeeo dar solchg ychor ykeod qokeey ckhes qol tey okcheol
syain daiin pchain olkeey okeeeody qos oty qokeedy y dchm opchiin qokain olcheol qokal okal al lchaim qokeey oltey qokar air

qokol oteody qokey shey olkal laly olar olkaiin oteedy odyaiin ochr kedam shckhy oryol rcheeol ary aleoly qokedy qod chdy
okos qolkedy qokeedy qotear daiin sheeey chdy daley qokeey qokaiin aiin cpho otchor daiin dcheeedy qokeedy ardy
sain otedy cheey kedal orain qokey lsedy okey dar cheey qotedol ol otal ain qokeedy olkar choiin ol

qokal qokedy okaiin fchedam keedy aliir kedam olyeol qokar dar daiin pcheor soleor lseees qokal or lcheeedy ty shedy
aiiiney kcham yshedy okedy qotchear soreos ysheain qotedar olcheeor qokal dshs y yor opchiin opedy lky chol
lcheedal cheees okeeey lkcheod lchol chor shdy qoteey sheedy odydy ltody cheear qotsairy odydaiin qokaiin shedy

lcheos qoteey saleol opcheeey reear ksheal dchol teesy qol lkedaiin tchedy qotar qol pchain qokeey okaiin or
ody dleey chedy ctheed okedaiin otaiin otedy aiiineos lkaiin dar tchr qotchm y qokaiin pom otaiin rar al ypchor
olchal otsheol qoteeos rsdy chedy kshain oedy chdy ykchair sshedy daiin aredy ley shol pchdal

qoredy ysheedaiin shedy y okedy chey otchedy saleam rs sheeo lcheeedy oky qoty ychaiin dykaly qokal reedy oeedain aiin qokal air
dardy ofeey ol lkain qokedy ypchaiin lkeeedy chey lcheos tcheedy shedy dsheees lkaiin lteod otal chody lsoiin shedy
oiiineo chckhal chor aiin chdy otey olche lkcheedy ykedy dleey or opcholy ain ytes chey ytedol oeeedy ytchee reesy y

dain reees chdy qokal okaiin okeedy ychdain chedy opchy shedy qokchey or opcheeeody qoteeo otaiin yty dar shedy ocheol dal otedy
odyeedy yor qokchr ar oshdaiiin odyor yshr res dchdy oliin oteol opcheeody ltar air kcheeal ain qoteedy lkdy
reeody shedar ckheedaiin yeor ltdol lsody am oteey lcheeoy chedam cheedy lsy sheel shoiin shedy

olky rdy sar qotchedy dar kchain saiin okey kar reol shckhy qoeear okaiin kedol keeedy yeeey qoctheody qokshor sheol lkeor
osey qotol olkeol cthdy saiin dalor qokal ain tor ytchor lyor chey aiin okedy cheol oteey olted
opchaim daiin opchain yeos kcheos doloy olshaiin scheeey otain daiin leol qotedy rdain ytaiiin oltor tar shey

lcheedal oleeos ytes chey y ctheesy lkcheol lcho or qokeey olteey daiin dchol olyeeody lchedy or qokain aiirair qokair soleeey qol
lkaiin oiinaiin qockhol lseeey dshs otaiin aiin ocheos cthedam tchain chaiir oldaiin okaiin okshar dar cphal ain
olols sheedy kal oeody chcphaiin tchail olkchedy dar cthedair al qokeedy aiin lkchaiiin yeedal ykor oteey kais chol oreeey chdy

chaiiin rody shedy odyeedy shedy otchy ckhdal sheol olkedy chdy daiin oedam pchdaiin ytes aiin qokeedy qokey dar dyteees ain
shedy dy sheedy dain qol doleos qokeedy orair cpheor or ctheedaiin shsy olsholy yked qokeeedy omee ysheedy al
chey oiinedy oeeol kchdaly dar ain opchedy olchedor lshdal qokchey ytr sar otedy lsedy yor dal qokaiin dar cpheain aiin

qokshedam otedy qoky qopchor year lkain lchedy dain oor daldy qokar shey lkchar shar otair ysholy air otedy ykchail okain teedy al
shor ycheeos raiin daiin lchedy qokain opched qotal okaiin qopchaiin yor shcthedy okeey ol dam cpheeol dar sheol aiin oteey qokeey chdy
otar lteeo qokdam olcheain cheey aiin pal rr ytl shedy lseod oched dchdy fcheeey oryain qokchdy oteear qopedam

ar otd lcheedal lsheeody oteees lsar lkaiin tedam qotshed aleda qokeeedy okain teedy shear otchy qopchdair oteey chcthed
qoteey chg dair ytam lteol dykedy ol ykchor olkeey qokain aiin qokeey chol shckhy lkaiin alyol ary aiin olkchdy ked olyeeey al
ldy ody qokeey chcthol chey qochain shckhaiin otedy qotaiin qokain raiin aiiriin ckhedy lkom qol shal aiin solos or

aiin qopchees qoal chedy daaiin ar qoky chedy qokeedy lkaiin qocthol lkedy sarm qockhdair yteain lchor
qokeey qol dcheeod otedy tsheaiin chedair otar keos qockhdy lchm dy dalyo qokeol ctheody chol dain al
lkedy cheey okdaiin qol olkol pdy cheey lsedair ldy aiin okeey saleain qokedy lkedaiin qokeedy al rshm lseod lkaiin y

sar odyoiin oiiineey lchedy lkedaiin otedy shckhdy rdam dar kcham ychal okeey solkeod chcpheol daror ol okcheeedy
chcthais qoar soledy qokchey keol pchedy aiiineor kchy qopeos okched dam ockheody ltdam chaiir tsheedal raiin
qokchy qokeedy qoteeody lseod dalaim qokey chiir daiin ol ykchaiiin ol okey chckhes shey qoeedy lkeeedy qokey qopaiin opchor

lkaiin qokchedy dar olkeedy chckhy chey qokchedy dsheedy chdy saiin ol pched lkaiiin ol lchaim dy qokaiin sheol chckhy doledy chey yeedam shey
ofeal shedy cheey qokedy ory aiin olkeedy orear cthaiin doredam shckhy chey qol chedy dareody qokchey ckhor qopees taly oteey lkol
saiin lses shedy opchok paiin ochor okar cheom qotain oleeey okchedy dar ctheees aleeo am schol yaiir qotcho

lsheor rom cheeal dar daiin chor am dy lkchedol dchdy oteeo sheey yteeor tshdam otail lcheor sheed lkol
ctheey qotedy chey olkchedy chedy lkain qokedy ofchor ocheos shol otaiin chckheeor leol qockhdar sheedar lor daiin raiin qotaiin air
olkaiin reedy dy olchedain saldy opcheeos kain qokaiin qokeedy roly ol saiin yteees raiin okar dar okal aleed oteey dar

qokdaiin rsd shdy qokal cheey oteeey cheol okar shedy al shckhy qotchol okeedy qol ordal olkal ychees aiin
olkchy shey chol lkeo olkal chdy sydaiin aiin qolkedar yta chedy scheam qotedy okdaiin aiin qol dain shedy aiiinaiin schain
chckhy cheey olshar ytchain chdy ledy ain tedal kedy qokchey odys aredy lsheol tdol otedy qokaiin aiin

odyody qol shey chctheody oteey lchain opchdol chedy dchedy tcheed shey olkchey or ary olan chey shes ar
shcthor daiin otaiin sholy olshoiin chdy dal okeeedy kaiir qokchedy shedy okey aiin qokchy ypcheor al qoar chcthey oteedy qokar okady qokeeedy aiin
lkeody okedy shy oledol shaiiin lkcheeody chdy dain aiin oseeod odyar ytcheol otchey ytdaiin led saiin chedy

ofeeol chdy qokal okeeey y otal qokain ychail qokchedy chedy lkdy qoksheedy lshan solaim qochaiin saiin qopchm sheody tchdar okeeedy olsdair
ool qokal ol shody ckhaiin qokeedy otaiin ytal ol chey qokchedy ol shar qoteol schee kchg alyo chedy kshdain oksheedy odedy

qockho daleody cphear daiin qokaiin dar shedaiin pcheal shckheam ol pchaiin ychal opoiin aiin qoteey pchear qopcheeey aiin
lkaiin alyol cheey shes ycheo aiiineol dam qoty qopdy okey chdy oo chcpheol sheol chaiin leeedy lkar ain

lsheedar dar opchy qopchedy lchey okchedy kdair cthaiin orcheody otaiir lteod otal reeey chey shy ykedam tshedy qopchaiiin aiin
qockheor ody olkeees lchedam ockhaiir olchedar solkeeo otedy chor ykeeal lsheedy oeol cthor ta aiin
shckhy oiinear daiin lkchd qoky ol tedy lsar chedy tdal ockhair ykesy ltedam tsheeoy cheeor lchor

olkol ckhey ychody olsheeo cphs shey cheey ain ofchedy tcheeey qotchol qoteey okees olkeed ykeols y ta air
oeor qopeor shar paiin teeos or otcheeod shedy ckheeal qoail qocthain ctheody or okal qoks raiin qolcheedy qokain aredaiin qotedy
olm al or qokcheo shedy qoky chedy ysheeey qocthedy shol choy okeees tcheor lkaiin aiin qopeeody y

solchdy shary okchedy odysdy chedy qoleo areeedy tshor ykeeey chckhe lsheedaiin otal kair qokeey lcho py qokeor
char chair qokal dar shol lkeody aiin kal pchey okeedy qokar qoteees qody lkain lsdaly oteeey yaly
oky chedy tor qokeol chckhey am qofcheeey alyeor al sheody olsheey olteeoy chedair qotedy ol qokal ods ky qokain pchees qokedy

chedy cheey oldaly otal otedy or ykches odyeear qokchdy shom qokear dam oeeedy qokeey kedol shady qokain lkaiin chey chdy
qokol paiin cpheody otody oiindal daiin olyeeedy lkedam okar aiiinol qopcheed odyeesy ar okal ckhedal ychoiin qokchy okchedy chedy
al okcheeos qotedy air opchor opchain okchdy octheor okar or shey qokal or cthm opchiir otain ol ytchy sheedy lchaiir ol

qol qolkeoly yshedy qokeey oteey ltr shedy odydaly oksheeody qokain yed shal chckheeey qocthain qoky ykeod dyteedal chedy
qotar shedy dalo qokeey lkedy ykeedaiin olkey kar aiin qokain daiin qoty aiin lkaiin redar keo chdy qockhair daiin olkaiin ar
qokeey kaiiin qochedy cthair oshaiin chey lcheody lsoy dar opcheeey am daiin qokcheeedy chey lcheeoy raiin rair qokaiin odod daiin solcheedal lchedy

ody shody ckhedy ctheedaiin cheol lkor olsady ol qoos qofcheol dchdy otchy cthdy ytees ol otchey or dy aredy
chey qochey qokchair lkm shar taiin olkchey shckhdy cheol lchedam opchedol otain opcheeam qotcho chedy sol qopdol al qokeey dar
olor qokeedy qoteey lsr yaim oteey chey olshed dar reedy or qoeor kchedar olshey darod okeey qokaiin ol opchy ar

sheey lseor chckhey lchedy dar qokchaiin dcheo pchom lsoiin cheol chey otchedy chedy oteedy shey lkas otedam soledy
shedol qoleedy oteeody ltar opor oiiineo ald dareos dalo lkar dar alydair shedy aiin otchy teol okeeedy kedy
shar taiin dy cheey ked dchedam okaiin oleol daiin qokeeedy ykeedar chol qopchaiin qokey ksaiin qotal ykor qokeey chedy

lchedy qokol otain shedy osaiir shedy chcthod ol okchdaly dar okchor shol qokaiin oteedy chsy shedy qokeey qokaiin lchedy oteey cheol lfcheody dar

shey olyeam chedy qopchal y
chey lsoiin qokaiin rch otedy okor
lteeo ykody odyeod sain shg y solkedain qotedy qokeey chckhy tcheor chcthear olkchy sheedy qol sar shedy
shckhy alyear saiin ar lchey ltos dsholy otedy daleody aiin lcher cheeos shedy doror dam araiin aredy
oedy ain opchey lkeed cheeor chedy chcthedar aiin shol oley olkey lkcheor okeedy shedar lsaiiin qokedy

aiin qokeedy sar ain dy qokey ychey opcheeey qotchain dchol olkeedy qokey ain saleeo fchedam olyeody cthair pchdaiin aiin shctheeed or
qokshedy qokeedy aiin lcheedal cheod chedair olchees dar qokeedy qoteeedy lsl al ypchg kaiin ory alary dar

qotchy ychaiin chedy qoteedy ol qockhaiin shctheeedy lsedol ol okeey chckhy cpheo lshal sheey cham aiin ll ol

aiin okeey aiin ldor lsar shas qotedy chedy opchalsy qol okol qokain olchd okaiin ol lchedy cthair sheol arol

dshedaiiin oped dair sheey al shar ykeey lkedaiin y odeo ol qockhdy oteedy sheey olkaiiin lteeal qoraiin tchy ar

qokedy y qokey keeody keoly chdam okal qoaiiin reed qokaiin chedy chedy qolkedy tches aiin qokchey lkchal lkain y
ofcheody chedy daiin lsedol shedar ykain sors chol qokcheor olkey raiin cheey qol cheey shedy rshor ysheody

kcheeedy opchdain shedy dchaly oteedy chedy olchd dedy dain sheedar sheody shedy daiin qoody lsiir sydy aiin okeedy qokedy
yeaiin dar okol ckhedy chey qokchedy chedy qokeey reees kchol ctheedar shedy reoy chedol chctheol daiin orchm aiin olkey aleod kcheody
rsheol qokam shedy qoky cheeor ykchaim sar y dareor doleol okaiin aredy olseda lsy lteear raiin

olkal pal cheedy ar qokal kols paiin ockho sheain lkaiin reedy kcheos dal chedy sedam okal otaiin lseees aiirod

oliin okain chedy qokeey pchedam lkdy qol kshee okchy orchain saiin olter solksaiin opchdair qokar ain lkiir chdy dal aiirdy

cthey qoky qoted daiin qokaiin olear olkeedy ol opchedam olchy otees pcho shaiiin tshey qokeey chod dain qokeear sheedar okchdy dar

yeedal oleed oty dar sheeey olsed qokdar ytedor ar teody dsheees tchod qokaiin air ty dar qoeeo sheey qokeedy or ll chedy

dleey olchedol soleey res qody cthiiin qokedy chckhody ledy otchy syeody cheol ysholy okes chedy lchey ltedal dar qokain daiin otaiin chedy

odaiin cthedy taiin qokal shedy daraiin shedy shckhy sheedaiin qofchair okchy oseody lses oledar qokain dy pchol

rcheal lkedy lkdar ssheod y qokeedy dar chan chol shey yer keain al daiin qokar ychedar ytdaiin otaiin ain

qol cthedol aiin qopsy dar osdy okar otar ain otedy daiin lkeedain schaiin tchok ykoiin chedy eseey shs qokedam

cheey ykols qokain chdaly lcheedal chedy oteey otedy dchod olchal shar cheeeo ol lchey rd olkal or omaiin dy okedy ol

y dleo chdy ypchaiir qochey ytchol lcheedal ar ctheeody raiin soleey oddy chd otsho chcthedam qokaiin qokdair

rchaiin qotal qokar keam chedy lcheody okshoiiin fchaiin shey chcthor dain sar ltedair ain qokeedy chey qokchedy olar pched dal kchedam

olkol opedy cthedol chdy lkaiin oiinain tshdair dain ypchear qokeey olees qokaiin cham lchedy lkees oleod qol chey daryeey chedy

lchdair daiin okeey shedy chey y dain qotaiin chedy kchy ytes ol otchdy otchdy shedy cheol oteey qoody dcheeor ar cheol qokaiin otaiin dar lkol

ood olydair dykaiin qolkedy daiin qol shcthdy shckhy al dal otey qoal oshaiin qokeedy soiiney qopar shedy
ar oaiin olkeedy olkar yty dar qokeedy olchair qokal dalyain olyam char shedy shctheos chey lsal araim
chor ar otal olchedar tcho okar olchaiir lsd olsdair kcheeey qokchedy chedy cheey shey lkedam ledain chckhy qopar qotedy

ykaim oks shg ychaiin otshdy ytchedar al lky ain pcheey qokees ltedaiiin qokain aleod pchedam
chckheear qokedy otchy okain ol tdol ol qokeedy opchedy ctheeedy ytchaiir lkchedar chedy tam odydaiiin ain dal cheey y
sar qokchedy dshar qokedy octheol cpheees sheeeo ytoly shoiin shar aiin oreeey qotaim okeey ain dcheody or opchy am

dar shor raiin sairo otchy dar aiirees okedar chdaiin saiin aiin qockhaiin qokal otal ral odor osa al
otey dar opcheody olkeedy odeol shckhy cheees oor dar ctheol orcheedy ykdain chol opcheeos aiin ol schais sheeo shol air
lcher chdo yteod kchor otal ar otal chedy qokaiin ol dy chedy qokedy kchiin ckhedy lkedaiin al qokar reees cheedy am

tsheeedy lain cthedor kedal al qm qokeey lchdar solain raiin dy cthdair qokeedy oty keal qokchdy olcheeo okeey aiin
sain shedy okeedy or okchdy qotdaly sedy okchom ar chol ofchedar ol qoteedy shor qoedy okeey lkedy tedaiin qoteedy olchedor res odaim
yeody chdy oraiir otain olyedaiin qopaiin qokal aiiinedy aiiry lkchedy qokal dchdaiin qoteod oltm chcpheody aiin oain okal shckhy cheol lkar aiin

lcheedal chckhy daraiin cthear tchear daiin shedy lchedy olkeedy cheol qokedam sheol okchair qokaiin ltedair soiineos cthy ain
dar kal daro dar areedy rsy ar dam shedy tedol otedy lkaiin al daiin dykol kchm ol
oty okdam lkaiin olkchedy qoedair okey chdol dar sheol cheey kal ytal lfchdy lsheedy shes reedy rchdair qotal okaiin ain

qokchey aiin tchos ar qoky ar oteedy rshaim teeaiin lsg otedy chol ody dcheol oteedy qokchaiin okeey otedy chdy
shol salees qokeedy ol qokey aiin cthedal chedy ocheeedy oreor shedair okedy opal oedy cthy otam qotaiin aiin
qotar aleor odyal redol dady cheedy ychal dar lchey tchear chor al lcher chedy soleor chdy

olkeey dar oo rary kes qol solaiiin kedol okom qokedam te qoteedy chd sairear qopcheam qokeedy qokain qokees al
otshdy qokeeol ales dar okeeedy kedam dal dshor tas qoal oraly sheody chedy sheol otaiin chan rchedy qokeey lkeeedy
lchor qokar olshor oty redaiin chedy chdy qotaiin lchedy opchey okeedy qokal lkchsdy otedy lkor yteed lchdy otain qokaiin areos

eseey yteod dalor cthair olyor lky ted otedy olkar ol solchm opchdar cheey keoly oteedy okeed oteey aiin
shor kdol qoteeo salees ain qopchy lsaiiin qotchain olkal qoky shedy qol daiin pchor cheey lchedy saiin otedy odyeeey okedy qokchedy qokedy
okal dar daiin chol ardy chey oiinedy qokchdy ol okchy okcheol soiinaiin ofchear ysheedaiin solkeam lchedy lkeed ain

lchain otchees air ychor oky kaly opchsaiin chair ofchor qokchy otchy ykaiin okaiin reol opd otshedy sheol aiin chey qofcheedam shey
otshol qokal daleey oteedy odyedal lcheos qokchy cthdy am lkdy yeedal dshedol ol qokar shedy lseed tsheos qoteedy qokaiin or
shctheor cheey kar kshain cheol dy tshdair oteedy qokeey olees olkeeody dar qokal olshaiin ockhees tdy lkaiiin ykor chey chey shy shey

ofeal salsdy qotedy qockhol okal ol dcho chckhy otaiin shals fchaiin dal cheey chedy qolchedy dain lor tchedaiin chdy
tsheedal qotedy cheoly otedy qotain lkaiiin dar saiin saiin chs shedaiin lkcheeey alyedy yedam ctheey shey
chey otchedy lchedy shedol otchy qokedy opdol saleeey ykdair oeody qockhdy olyedar sheed solod odyal sar odyody qoky al qokeedy soraiin

cheey tcheody soeda lseedaiin lsy chedy kshees qol daleear qoteda olsaiin chsd chedy cheey kaiin lcheal raiin
olkeey shas chedy otchedal dar chdy otal kor lcheeey qokchedy qota kees lshory sheees ctheol aredy tchs ol
qoky oleeor chey qokchedy dar kg yshdy cheey qol soiinair okchees okain okaiin otaiin ychdol ltaiis lsheeor opdy

lsal shckhm lseedy sheeedy qokshol qopail okchedy chedy cthed okeey lkaiin yches ol qokchy opey teedy ol
chedy dair aiin daiin tdar qokeey sheey reeos ychs qokain otedy dal cheol oteedy ar ol olkey sheedaiin qotal chedy
lyeody opchaim chckhdor keod redal ocheeoy lshr shedy lsar chey alyey oeey okchdair shdo qokchey chs qokeedy qol

leody okeedy ytail qotchaiin rshdal qokaiin pchor qoky chedy odees ain cheey oledol lchedy shol ofchaiin ockhes ar
qokshedy okeedy chey oryey otey aiin okal ykchedy qockhey cheedy dar yshedaiin otchor qoky ofcheeedy daraiin olkey chol olyees dar
cheey yks dar qokaiin sheol y cpheo olchs qoled cheam or qokeedy chom okeedy lkchar y tshaly okal cthedy

qokey qoeeos shey qokeor okeedy char shey ol sar olkchedy okody qokain pchor oredy ll otedy lsal okaiin chedy
dleey olchoiin sairor dareody led soleeey shy kedam oshol qokar olkar shedy opchaiin qoldy shor ar kcheod dar
lkaiin ytoiin qokchy salair dam cheedy y lkm ockhol sain chedy qokar qokchdy tched rchee sheey pchedy qokol ped aiiry chedy

chedar otcho daly qoky rdy qopcho pshaiin otaiin odey tches keeey solkoiin okey chal kchedy
cthdy dareo lteeo chedy yshedar ar opchees kaiin qotey saror qokal odeody olteeedy olyeesy shsd oleear syed
okedy qochey qopchdy ol qockhey solar chedy cthear aiiindal okeey okedy qokchedy shedy cthod oky chedy opcheees lchedy

lseedy lkchal rchaiin oliin opedy ykchaiiin oiinaiin qokal dykedy dam qoks chckhy ctho solaiin otaiin rchdar okeedy cphdal
tsheaiin chedy opchedy sain solkoiin rchdy cheey qotdaly opd qota odyeeeo dar tor kchesy cheol
ockheos qofchdal oteedy oteedy yteedy char lshr qokchedy ar olkedy shedy solor aredaiin odyaiin saiin octhain tchiir ol

okory doledy qokaiin tair qokchdy olshaly dain lcheaiin raiin otar shs ldy qokal qol chcthedar dar ctheos okchr chdy
qolkey qopchedal olked darm leeedy qokeedy or ain opcha lshaiin dyteey ol qopcholy chckheedy cthear okeey pchedy cthedair chckhy
lchedy ctheeal chdy qokeedy dy ain daiin ctheody dar qokeedy ol schaiin soiinain oeal qokeol qokdaiin ral tsheol

chedy aireeol chedy cthedair lseeey qotchedy chdaiin kaiiin ckheos chcpheedy dar ockhain sain ol ledain ar qokal qokal ar
tsheaiin cham okain dain aiin daiin qockhear ood oltedam dy qokal ar areeor cheeey ochol orr shey solkes otaiin dar
ar oryed cheey shey cthaiin ltsaiin daiin chckhy dchdy otal aiin lked chcphain qokal cthedy

sair dy qokaiin lkchiiin okain lcheedal chedy chey chedy teeey odyedar chedy oteedy soredy sheol tear qokar y ykcham dar
chcphor qokeey chey otedy qol oteey qokedy olky qokain ain shol dar otal cheol dardair okey chedy daiin olchr qokol okain qotedam
y oseeos okeeol daiin qoty am lchedam okar shedy oty raiin shr cheeey qotchedy oleedar ol qokeey oltor qokal otaiin chedy

olky rar shckhy ychaiin yeedal chedy saiin olky chol cheey tey oteey otain y daldy qokey shedy rcheol sheedy kshaiir shedy al
olsy dsheees daiin cheed dar olkeedy dykaly cthaiin chey ycham odaiin chor kl lseeey aiin
olkol opedy soly ytsaiin yshair kchy chody qokshaim qorey qopedair odyody lteees daror cphdy al

qokeey okain shol aiin shedy dy olshedaiin chdy saiin qotedy ol okchdy dar cthdaly shg shedy or qofchedy otain daiin saiin qol sar aiin
ol qolkm okeeody oleedaiin ol qokal qoredy chey otchedy dshos chdaiin okeedy aledair lsedain alg dy ol

ofchey okeedy sm okal qokchain shckhedam opchy otedy lcheedy chckhy oeos qoedar keeol lkdy qokchdy shg opcheol
qokeeor alg ytdaiin cheey or ar shor shes qofchaiin sain roiin shey chey ol ar olky oleees dam koiin y
darain cthed lkaiin daryeal chckheeey qokchedy chckhy opchedy otal cheey okom pcheeedy ypcheol ocheos oteey qokair qotchy opcheol

ypchedam lkaiin odyedy dal dar cthody lsheda omor ctheol cheedy aiin daey qokchedaiin olkeedy chal qokod olyor
qoky ytar sheey lkchdaiin chain otol fchedy ctheeos shedy doleeor chan okedy qotedy qol chedol qockhain qopcheos dain lchedy qoteey dar
qokeey lchedy orchal sheeor dchor tcheor shedal dar rshol lkeed qoealy okain dar ypcheeey chol qokar aiiino dal air

okeey ychedy otshey qorol lkaiir okchedy ykol qokeedy ytoy dar okal otal rear oshdair olkeedy qokaiin dar chdy teain chedy lkedy
lkain chdy qokchey tchaim dy otaiin dar solchiir shedy ol tchory tedy lkaiir ychair daiin ychain qokchdy ar qopeols alody chckhar yeedal shey
ain dalyey otal ol ysho okey qol dal qokaiin lteear oseos qoky saleo darod lkeeey ar qokeey chedy

shey okey kail y opchsd kear dy chey alyey okaiin otary sheey lkchiin otaly dy pchedam yaiin soleeey alyeody
lchod ltaiir otchedy chedy dy shar tedy ll odyaly otchdy chal chdy lchdair okeey oded teod odyal qoksheeol aiin
dar shckhair orar keam shedy qokain qokar cheols qokedy opeeod oleedy qokey ar oteedy chor shedy sheody chckhar okedy okchedy shedy

sheey rar qokedam olteeoy okedol ol ochiin otair chckheeey lkchdam sheol dar qokeedy shcthedy sheey okaiin chail aiin
osor dain oty kee qotchdy lchedy olyaiin shckhy aiin shcthaly qokar chckhy okchaiiin shedy rar ykeeey qocho or shcthed
qokchey ykd ltair sshedam dalyey olkeedy daiin ltes chckhey odyeeeo cheeey ol cheey chedy shedy daiin qoky aiin

dal odyal sain odyes qokedam qotchair lchaim okeedy lkeos lcheer dar qokal odeedy rsy qol otain daiin olchedair qol qokar or
dain dar qokal qol esee lseesy qokeey koly kedal sordar opchdol chedy dar qokcheol sain qoty chol olkal qokain dareol
char opeeedy saiin qoldy qokeey pcheol okaiin chedaiin ytedair aiin tedy kshan dar olkeedy dar otchy okeedy chdy otar ol

dleedain shey daiin sairdy chcphair lkeed lsal cheey aiin ypchaiin daedy tsaiin ychoiin chedy shckhy ysheey dareol
dao otshear okaiin cheear tdal kchain qokal dedy olseds am chor oledair oty chdy daiin okaiin sheod ain
shol chol daiin olsair tshor qokal areey olkeedy chckhear otshed doldy qokaiin olchoiin okaiin qoteod olkeeeody qol

ypcheody qoky chedy qopcheam okain sshiir shedy sheol chedy reols dal qor odyoiin ksheeedy oteedy olkeeedy shedy aiin opdor sheod aiin
qokeedy ychar qokaiin dar odees ar chey reees qoteey qokain al olshar oldaiin qockheody aleam sheear olkeey qokain qoair yshy qokedy
oksdy qokedy qokeey oredy qoedor raiin otal chol lkeeey shedy am soleal al lcheos qope odyeeeo shd aiin

scheor otdair sain ychd otedy sheody al otedy chey qocthear opchy lteedy daiin ain chedy qokeedy chol osor solas olcheedy soreor
ytcheol chey ocheeedy otal qokeey chedy tor or qokol qokain lchedy okal ockhaim shckhy lkcheeey qotchain taiin otchey al yshary dar
oty chedy sheol olkal ltas lsoiin arair opchr qokchedy lssy qoaiin lkain yty otam arol dchdal oteedy pchdy

dairedy olkeedy ockhdal ydy ody chdy lkor okey qoteedy olchedaiiin sheedy dar cthes redal soled qokar lkcheedy qokaiin chckhy
chedy dchol tchr air qokal oldy okedy oiinain ykchedol aiin lchedam ofcheeor olshody olchdar qotal lshar qokeey chedy
sed daiin okaiin okain sheedaiin chol oky dchol cthes chckheedy lkair olyalsy yteesy areear sheeo ain ty dar

sydy yteel oteos sheol qokal oleeam chedy opchy ychar ckhey lkain qooiin qokaiin qokeedy redar qoteo soleeod okeed kshain
qolkeedy otedy olkar shesy qokchedy cheedaiin ol qokar olchy otaiin shedy chol lkain shaiiin ytar cheol saiin lteeody otedy
cheey qol qoky shedy daiin ol qokar lkcheees otaiin chm oseols ol aiiral reeor ycheeey oledor char shol lchedy

qokshear oteedy al qokaiin shan lkedy opcheod al lcheaiin dar oteey dshees otdain chdy shedy al otsheor
ltdaiin qokedy cphdy olydal yshes or qokar ychaiin sheey dshs olkeedy lseol cthedaiin to qey opchy shey
cthed dalyedy okeedy olsham ol kcheedain sches qol ley oseeaiin lkchg daiin sheel sheol oksheeody raiin

chod rody or qoar sheey qoteedy aiin shey qokeal am shedy oteedy olcheols qotaim dain ol qokar dar daiin qokaiin otedy
lo oteey ltoiin orm lkaiin qos qokaiin qokedy chedy dcheedy chedy olyeeos solkal lko olkar shedy or qokchey dsheeody lchedy
lcheedal lsheedaiin kdal qotal qokaiin oteedy shey aiiindy qokeey olcheeor qokedy qooiin lkaiin ol tl reees qotos qokshain olyam shedy

leol qoldy okar shctho chckhey chedy schaly syain opcham cheeey oiinedy qokshdaiin rr qodol dar
okeey olees fchal chsy cheeody ykaly cthaiir fchoiin daredy qokchy dal aiin daro opchor otaiin chol
chey okchedy chckhy qokeey ltedol aiin shaiiin keeedy qokal lseeal shedy olcheedar lchedy aiiredaiin okeeor ycheel qotedy qoeeody chedy

shdaly qokal lkcheeor qdy dareor lkar lchedy ofeal chdaly chey shy dar oed cthair solcheeedy qotaiin cheol
dchor qoteedy cphedy otal ol dolaiin qokeedy dored shedy kchar otain ypchedy qokeey qokshaiin cthes ar qolcheear ckheod lchedy
otchey opols olkair opcholy lkchg qokeedy ar okedy shedy ol qokchey qokain olkedy ykody qol lkaiiin qotcheor dykdair qokaiin qol

oteey qokedy okedy oiineol ofchey okchdal qokeedy shey laiin qokeey lsheedy qorain qopchdaly cheeey qokain dam ar
chdy fchg otain tedy qoeeos key daredy qokal ofcheeol osam lteeey odyal yaiin scheeey yteain qokaiin chol
shedy daiin or fchedol shedy daldar shees or solches shedy lseeor ykcheol qolkdaiin shedy qaiin shckheeol osear

cheal qokeedy ychais ykeesy lkchain psheoy dar opchdair ledy oleeey lkcheeo kedair shckhy olchal odair
qokal shes araiin seody sham tchaly qotchy cheeody ykaiin shey opchaly qokal sar qokain dain otal ain lchaim
qotchdy chedy daiin schor shol aldy qokaiin qokain lkaiin okchedy lshes sheed sho qokeal odary ol oiiineey qol dain pched

shody sheedy dar okal qokal aleesy pchs reeey qokchedy chckhy dal qodaiiin shedy lsal shckhy alyeor chaiiin al qokeey kas lkchr y
okar qokedy lcheedam ar saiin olar lchor rcham al qokchey otain shckhy qotchedy chsd okeear olchody chedy dal otaiin dar
oear qokal qoody ol cphod lcheaiin lchedy rsheear aiin qolain oredy oty dchey scheols kedam chey aiin

dykedy chckhey ykeeam opdy cheey ain qolchedam opched qokaiin otaiin ksdy dsheeody kaiin olkeey oain dal okaiin ar
shckhy okchedy ytaiis dar qopchedy shedy daiin pchey okeey aiin cheol otal ocheo odyo aiin chaiin cthor qokeey oty ol solcheeedy
air qokeedy shedor ain teeor qoory qotchdy okdor yty olcheear cheey shedy okeey ycheeod ar opchedaiin lchedy

shor chdol kdaly chedy pcheedy shedy orees dar chey shy chedy qotal cheol lkeeey olshair tchdair kchedair shg ain
schaiin qokeey qoreal y olkal ytdar qokal lyeeol qokeey rdar oshedy tshol tan ykal lkain qokedy otey ykeod dar
qokchey olesy ar qokeedy shctheol ctheor chail lkchoiin qodaiin doldar cheeey air dain keedar or cphor

okar chol olkey otedy cheees daiin ar rody ol ykeeey qotchain dytdy olchy kear daiin ar otal shckhy y dy okchey ykoiin dar
oaiin sear okcha olkain oldaly qokedy oldain shedy okeey oky ols kedy qokaiin y chey ochaiin qokal al kchdol cheol
lkeos pchy solkar okshl saldaly ychair tshaiin shedy opcheos chedol olar sheody shedy dain chedy

cheols otedy ol ykdar teain lkchedaiin odear shckheey ykchaiin ctheey dal ol qokaiin solkal cheey ol
doledy opcham dar dy oedy ysho lcheeedy qopcheeody chol qokeedy sar qotchain kcheeedy opchy ykd solkesy qokol otdar
shedair sar oteod chckhsd ain saiin odeol qoty dar tcheesy qol lkedy qokchedor ol qokchey aiin dy chor ol

lkeody sain raiin qokshair qopches shsdy ytdar ol okcha ol qokey ytdor air kd pcheeor y lkaiin qokol qokain chedy

qoteees okchey qodam daiin aiin
tshaly osam y okor doeody
shckhy ltedal keeody ychedar rd okaiin dar ykal qoky aiin olyom dar shedair soreedy ltas qol qokeedy cthed aiirdol aiin
qofcheeoy chedair ol sod ol shckhy lteedar dar oo ol yaiin kcham ol tcheain am dain lcheo olkeedy qol
otey qooiin shedy qedain y lshedaiin dar opched qotey shedain am qokal chey redol seeedy olkol ped dy dalor

qokeedy char ared ldor redar oleeor olkey cheeody chs qokal or cthees tair lyedy olkeey olkeey okain qopair
cheedy ychdain chol ypchol dolor qokal dytol chedy saiin ykair cthy tdy ofchdy ytoiin okaiin raiin qockhaiin dam otedy
dshsdy qokedy cheedy qokedy cthaiin sain shedy qokeedy qol okchdy kes aiiinain opchom ar ltar shckhy otain sheol qol

okol qokain ol schdar opchedy ypched tcheds cheol dain qol cheey oksd otedy daiin ykeeaiin shey ol dy qotedy
otchdy solkeedaiin cthey olkal shedy dam dykedy qopchd air okal ol odedy dam alaiiin ar dchedy lkaiin dar
ol tdy sedar chdy otal qokar qol oteedy ar qotdaly chedy cphal shedy ykchor tchd rd lkdal opcho

chey qokchedy qoeain chckhsdy qotedy lcheol toiin aiin dair dchor dal daiin ro okchals opey cthedol chckhsdy lchedy oltedy
lcheedal ychdo shos paim okal chedy cphal lkcheees aiin sareos dar shckhy qokchedy shedy okeedy ychar qokeos oty dchaly
qotal chedy okedy ain qokeey qotaiin chedy alols opol otal chey qotchol oky shey otain qokey ked shar orcheody rshedy chey chedy

olteedal raiin tcheody doraiin odom choly chdy qolkdaiin lteeody cheol qoeeey okchedy shey otshaiin qoror qoky qoraiin
chdy cthy tdy olkchey lsdam oledain kain or ykchom qopchdy otey redol qokchy chos ol qoteedy pchedy
tsheedal qotedy qokaiin chckhy qoteedy olkeeedy chedy okeedy otain okshes rain qol sheol qokaiin shedy shcthor opchdam kd otaiin ain dchas or

sheey shes opcheeedy dam qolkear olkeedy rshor lchdair okar lse chckhy teeos qokedy qokey shey opchaiin sheol odain
sheckhy solkes qokal kaiin schdal qokchy qotedy oteed aiin qokain dy or ofchey solcheos ykchair lkedar cheed ytchaiin
lcheedal okd dykdy kshaiir chdy qockhaiin ockhed teody oty qol oeeedy qokchy dain lchedy dchaiin oteedy qokaiin ar

qoteeeo chedy cheey olair qokal dar qotedy qokar ytoiin odyeod okey okeeody lshair kal chedy qoteey okeey chdy
shcthaiin qoteeey qocthol saiin chl aiin okal saiin chedy lcheedal okedol qokchdy lkches ockhor qokeedy cthol qockhaiin qockheol
dar olkchy lkchd shckhdy chdy tchy ckhees sheey ytol tdy lkey lkain lshs ochor aiiineeod okeedy dar okeey qokeey chol

sain chd sheey tod lkchedol shiir raiin otdaiiin qokedy okeey ytody chal otaiin olody olsheeor ol soiined
ctheos daleey chey olcheedar qotedy air chor kaiiin chckhy daiin daleeedy cpheey chol toly aleeam okain ol qokeedy cheey ol
okar salees qopchaly okeey lkol qol shol cheeody okes qotal resy reeody ltaiis otedy aiin kshy ytedor qol

or sches solks qokar ksd res qokeey shedy ocheos shcthdar qokal otedam lail otain kam aleedy dared
dalm qockhedy cheey cheeor dleo dar qokal lkaiin shy oles shedy qofchedam dy qokey saley dam qokchey otsaiin cphdy tey
ar lcheey kedar sheeol qokeedy lsos otl qotees chdy ytcheols ol sshdaly otedy ytdaiin oeol

yeedal chais lsheear qockhol cheey okdaiin olyedam opcheody aiireeody qokain solcho olcheedaiin qolkeol qokeedy qokeody yshol
qosd qotedy chckhey qoteeody raiin oly qokeedy aiin or opchor otedy qokain dain dareor cheol qotey ain qokal dair oleedy al
ochor qoteedy okeedy chedy okcheeos y oreeol qoky okeear qokchaim ksheeey aiin qokchy ykcheor y saredy opchdy sheol chedy

ol otchedy qotealy qokain lseain pchey otal ctheody dar taiin opchedy qokal lseeo qoky lshedaiin sheey oksheam oleeor aiin
okiin ckheol dain soreeedy qokar olsheeod chol sheol dar or osol okal ol qokaiin otaiin aiin ol okedy chckhy qopchl y
chey aiin daiin ykchaiin qokal shey chckhais qoeedy olkaiin chedy dar okeey air dykeedy sheor dcho chckhy qokal ar sshg lchedy qokeedy ain

schor shcthain qokeedy lteed sheedy rail qotchear teol or olkchy otom aiin qoedal olkain qolkain okeedy sheckhy al

ar ofeo qody olkaiin dar dam chaly ool qolkeor chiir qotchain tody raiin areos ykchal dar qokeedy octheeedy

cheey ches daiin y lkees yshedam olky ral pchey cheey salar okeey olor otar chol ykchey qokchdy okeedy chdy dy lkaiin alyear

chdy qokol opol qokal ctheol pchol qokeedy okeedy lsr oiinedy osey sheckhy chedy aiiream lteear dal ky ol
aiin sshal otain okshody qockhedy okchdy yteedy qol pchy shedy cheeor daireey odyeeor tsheedal chedy qokchdy ain okchees okain ysheeedy

ockhed otchy shey fcheedaiin qotchdy otam qokedam ar oty chedy okeedy qotal y lkesy al olkchy cthdy al otsheey qokeedy aiin

shckhy al osy ol dain pched qotchey tain otaiin soraiin sheeo chiir okain ychees chdy qoteedy qokchor shal okain qokeedy aiin

dleo qoes lked qokaiin otaiin okain shal otchey rdar olkaiin ltdaiin daiin lkcheed peeey aiin dal qockhaim saiin qotaiin aiin

qokchy qokeedy shedy chor olcheedy dleeol shedy osor opcheedal ytdaly lkcheeey reody saiin chctheol kchy ltsd aiin otal qokaiin air

qoky am ykedol or oa chedy olyy or teeey lteod dchdy sheedy chor qotaiiin okeod aror qoteedy lsdaiiin qokchey qokedy

osor dal ol cthedaiin teor qokar dsheod pcho keeey peeedy lcho qol saiin ain qokeedy qokey sheeo shol sheedaiin qokal shey

olkal aiin doleedain am daiin qokar lsedy qoteey oddam ltaiin lcheeey shey al chey qotchain kchedam dal ordy qokshaiin otedy ol

ar qokdaiin chdy chcthan oledol qokeey oteeey qokchedy cheedar shedy dcheol qopcheeeo oleey kcheol qokal lteod qokdam qol

y teedain qokchdy otedy chey sheees qokaiin cheam olchaiir okchedy chary okain cthdy qotar ar sheey sheey shey

sar oiinol qokee solaiin dchedar ycheeey qotcheor ches aiin okeey olto ol otchy qokain oteedy ytary aiin

cheey ycheeo qokaiin tcheedain okchy sshdy sheey y toly keeo olol om ytcheey oleeey lteed ar

qotol otain ychedor shedy leor okar qoteed shey chdy qokchey ol tl ol qokeedy chol okaiin pchol tod ol
om yeaiin ycheeedy tchain kcheeody aiin qopchaiin sydy lkcheees chedy shedy dy qotol olkain oleed qokaiin y lchaiin ypchdol aiin

ar chey shedy qokeedy kaiin qokedaiin red chey pm cheedy sall air chey okedy cheol ckhedal sar qoted
daror syal qoedar aleedy odedy qokain daiin ol ksheol daiin dal chol tshedam qdar chol oty aiin teeey y
saiin shedy shckhear shol chedy dain pchdy taiir odydain lshedol okain dal olcheed otshs peeo shckhy kaly

odeeor ytedain or cthedy syeol qokaiin pchedy chedy qokeedy ol okey cheod otedaiin reedaiin lkedam tail y
laiin qolchaiin tcheoy cheol qokeedy otedy ochr shey ol saleedaiin ocheedal otedy pedal chail lkchd cthedy dols ol lchaiiin kaly
chedy oeody lkar chedy kshary ol pchey saloiin qokal yteedar oleod odeedy shedy solkes aiin opchsairy lteeor chey aiin

oldal scheedar alear oteey okaiin okeedy ain shctheody aiin dalyor ykchar ches chol shal chdy shckhy lchm ol
dalor otar shd lkain ol oeody chctheeo chaly opchaiir okshs kshedy qoky shey qokain cheey shedy soleody raiin
qokeey shedar lchedy toly ytes qokain otedy qoty to ddal yeaiin sheedaiin okaiin tchdy qotal dalo qokeey osheol shckhy lchdy chdy

okal aiin cheey sheedy yeol lkain qokain opchiin qokain chedy aiin tdol shey lkain qoes qotedy chdy okal okaiin tdy qopdy qotedy
qofchor opcheos chcthr shedy otaiin qokain olches lcheeol daiin lkaiin qokchedy char qotedy aleedaiin shary ykeees y
chctheos okaiin qokeos qotal chckhas chesy oledy qokol olkear ypches kdy sain shedy ofchaiin qopchedaiin otedy shedy

qoky rr solkey oeol fchal qofcheeoy dar oshee cheey shey ockhaiin shor ycheeey kd aiin
lchdair shol keam aiin okeey shol qokedy ltaiin opcheeey reedy lchedam aiireesy qokain ychr al qoty chdaiin qokaiin al
lkaiin olkchedy salal aiin dy arey aiiiney yshedy shey fchd solcher ked daiin chedy pal yo dair aiin

ar qokal qotoy shedy tsheos lchail al olkaiin tor qoky oty odyair olkey chckhy qokar lkaim shal shal oleedy qokaiin air

shol qoteeey qocthain lky yshaiin lcheeey shedy olchd oaim kchain oky rdaiin odaim oteees saiin shail oldam odor

cheey tcheol syeedal qoteols daiin lsady chcfhor aleees chey am ksdy solkedol cthain oair oteedy cheey shedy dchdy shar saiin shey al

shody okain chckheod oain qokal okal ycheey osedar ltesy air qokeedy or qoksheeod chckhaiiin otedy ol olkaiin qoteam oteos tor
aledair qokain ykeeey qokchedy chckhal lchor qopchdain ks shsdy sheeo okain ol lyain to odaly
lkain ltody or dain chor res oeey oched okar shey ros ol kchady ol daldy shcthaim qoteedy aiin

sar qokchedy shedy shckheey lkaiin reedaiin otain ycha qol lcheo otedy laly sched oty or qokeedy arm odaiin
cheedy otedy lcheedal chckhy rsheol tshedy chcthedaiin qote dar qokeedy qokey chedy oseody tol yte tor cheey cheol
ola qody qoteedy kedal dcheey rar ar olkchey oteam tair sorear qokchy lkcheedar otedy pchaiin

otol opain ctheeody raiin cphed qokal ykcheo tcheol qokey or ytchedy ypcholy rg dal chdaiiin oteedy am otshaiin

qoeam chan kdaly aiin teeey oryey ocheody olchos lcheo daiin lkedy olyain scheos oair

aiin sear qockhedy cheedy lshy ar qokal shes oddaiin odyr shy chckhy om qokchy qokeedy olshg dain qol

dar ctheeam taly dal oty yshor qoky solkar olkaiin air shor odyes olkaiin aiin sheam ol okeedy qotchey or tey ykchedol al

dchey qopcheey kcheeey qokchedy olsheeedy qokeey al dy aiiredy qotchey cheol yshor otey chedy dy shedy tchar chedy rchees lchedy

am dain lkain dshm ocheedal ytedor chaiin schair chey chey shey okain al otal kaiin qokchy qokeedy chol olyeeeody qokedy soiinod qokeeedy kaiin

sheedaiin otedy lcheedal ycheain aiiraim kchedal ky chd osear choly qokedy qokeedy koiin qokaiin lte qoky ain

oo chey okchedy chail raiin olchar chey olkain olyeeos kail ain qokal qoky sheam sheedy okedy aiin das fcheod okaiin ain

dain am olyr aiin oteedy ytchain qokar sheor shol qokedy qokaiin aiin shol odeeedy shaiiin olkol oteol qokshol tcheeos y lcheeey shey ol

aireey olchal lkain ar qokal otal ol ofcheody sheedy qockhedy qokeedy oteey odydaly ar oky ol saiin chaly qoky qoky qopchedam yesy qokedy chdy

lchor aiiinain saiin qokar qol dar chctham teos lod redar dar oteedy qokol qokain ches shor kedor chol solcheain aiin

ol dchdar daiin cheol lyeo lteedy ltod qoreody ar lkeeol al ycheeam keey kchy kaiin saiin okal dar pchary aiin
dardar ctheam aiin daiin chckhey odyg keey ocheedal oliiin opdam am opcheor olyeeo otedol yor qokal ypchedy

aiiineol chey otchedy qote olcheedy qokal ol qockhaiin chdy lkain otedy okeedy cheeod ytdam dar shedain aiin lkar am

shey ain lshdaiin ytedor aiin okal qokaiin air shey olyeols ycheey aiiindal ockhdy raiiin ocheaiin shedy qockheody qockheor
daiin y kche odyees chair dain aiin qokedy qopchol shes shckhor dy oaim oky qoeedy okal aiin ksheeey fchs al
qolkain teeey oiino ain shcthaiin qoos qokaiin tor qokchey olchaiiin qokchedy dar pchee aleedy qopdy dykm

cheey chckhes qol qokal odeeor am chey keain solcheedam keeedy dar daleor qokeey okar am dal areor ol sedair y leey qopor
okedy qokchedy ar okedy y shcthdy odydol redaiiin qokain olsheain okedy shedy chd okshoiin keain otaiin chedy olyoly ain
chey aiin ytchm cpheody psd qog qokchy otedy rdar opchain olal qokear ol otchey otchey salg qokain okeedy aiin

chdy qokal qokaiin tchaiin teor lkedar ain chcthary chol qoldy oreed chedy opcheeedy dal aro otchain dam daleos
qokeey dar okchor opchdaly am otchey chdy qoteedy tsheedal dar qotal ytoly qotedy sain qol okcholy shdair daiin qoar otaiin cheol
lkm cheedy chedy soley cpheey keedy lkaiin odyeod qokal redar qos yty or yedy oseeody al

olyor olsholy qoteeo lchear opchdol chody lor shedy ykcheeod lkchal pchedy sairair cthair pchedy shol qokeol
cheey redor dshar olchg solcheor qokain orchal dar qofchedam dy otal lty qoked dykaiin okeedy ykedar ol
cheoly ltdy shcthdy qokchey otain otal ol octheos cthg ykaiin otar ol dy otedy dairedy ytchy cheol

chedor qotedy cheedy shedy sarm dar daiin qokeear y qokaiin dar qoteedy tdy qokchdy shedy okal chedy chcthy keeod or
ody okeey chedy sheol qolkedy dy sheey raiin dar ody okeey otedy cheey shey soiiney tar or lear kched
shckhy qotchedy oleedaiin lseedar lchedy sain odydam kdal qokedy okal qokeey ol dal olkchy sheedy chedy chdy opcheeey ain qokeedy otar kar chey kas ol

qoksho otoiin lkchal oteey shedy dykaiin daiin sheey shedy qokal ycheoy qokedy ol oltaim opcheed qokain ol qopchedy aiirdal
lcher chos chedy lcheaiin oldaly ychdol teor otedy shr opdaly shedy okeam or tchedy dar
qoky okeedy odydol otaiiin chedy okesy ar dain lchey okeedy qotedy yor dal cheol aiiream ycheed kl ar kched

kchedy pchair dair pchol sheody chedy shol qokeody ypchey olyeda kol dair char olsheear chedy dar
seos qokeey odeear al dytdy shedain lso chey lteees qokeal qokaiin pcheol qotal chedy qoko lteeod shey ol
kchedy okedy odyal sar shedy ltesy qokchedy chedy darm lkor dcheedy ol ol qokal ldal oteedy qoteedy ain oredal lkchey dar

qoks shals qotain dar okeey qokaiin olcheeey teey qolaly lshedaiin otchm okeey pcho lkar qotody shaiir re shedy or
chey aiin tchdam chedy or dal dytear osees otedy daiin qokain chckhey oldar qokeey qoky or qokey oloiin sorair qokear
qoteey olcheees qokeeedy ol qokeey qolkain sheol lseeor oty oleedy rcheey cpheody ltor okeedaiin qotedy qokaiin taim dchdy or

ochor kchos dar tedar shedy cthedy saly dal otsho dar areeor solkdal okey chaiin opches olg aledaiin chedy
oiiineeol ar otal ypchol shckheor lchaiir olchsy cheol opchas oleedy qokchear tol opcheesy shaiir lkcheeody ol
qoes chey shedar rey oedy qokeedy olchoiin chor shedy oseol dy oteeedy shedy aliir cphs aiin dche chdy pchear

qoeeody cheeey tsheeedy lseey olyeeey qocthedy oteedy yta ol opchedam oteey qotaiin taiin qoksheeor aiin cheey cheol
qokeey shsdy otey ar dy otaiin air opal okeey dar qokeedy qoky cheod pchol lchey qochedy qokal qotaiin tchaiin shckho lkar dar
ypchaiin cheey rsd qoeesy yaim cthdaly odyaiin otal dsheeo sheody lseesy cthol shol sheees daiin rdol ol

daiin olaim chctheor sheey aiin qokeey qokaiin am laiin ykal dar ykar raiin lkeeey ysheor oteey qokeey dar
okedy aiin qotar ches lked lchesy dshan qoedy qol tcheeo chedy dar ochol opchedy sheol soreal qokaiin soraim
okedy lteod dykey okchal oleeey qochain chey chol lkesy sheod qolor chor shedy dalyey daiin shedy oteey orol

chckhy oky aiin shedy chey qochedy otchey opaiin olkaiin oleeor taiin shol ychdol shey okeey rcheedy sheedy aredaiin aiin
qotal shedar redol dykol tchan kdam lsaiiin lcheos cthar ole chdam shol chos qokaiin chedy okeey lkaly
ar opchealy fchain ockhedain chedy chckhey chedy oteey qokar reedy ky aiin qopcheod lkcheeody otedy qolcheeol qokaiin pchaim

ochaim okeey keeod cheeor ypchdy syeeor ol dain qokeey ol qockhod oteey ykaiiin okshd qokchey chedy lkedal ol
olteedal oleedaiin shdaiiin dsheod otedy okedy dar shcthor tedy ole okshm oteedy olshal sheeo qofchey
qokol fchaiin opcholy am ol qokal shckhy olshoiin okol qokain ar qofchain dal otaiin olar kedain al chdy dair opchdair shedar ofchs olar okeey ol

qoeedy sheckhy ytal chckhy arydy olcheeody lkchod dy qokeey okain ol soiineor sheey ol dy air daiin dcheol okeey chey dar
otar chol lkor olkal chor qokedy okchail dar dy chcthor cthaiin qokchy tchod lol lsholy ol leos ledam
chd ol qopoly ain oledain shedy yshs lsan y okchedol qokain ctham shedy qotar chsairy or shol ochain

qoedaiiin fchaiin okal chiin pedy ctheeey alyain qofchdal lkain chdar dal y dain okeey ol chey ain lor
oty lsheedy olkchey ltdaiin olsed ody daredy lor daiin qofcheaiin ol pchear teeor shdy saiin odod tcheol
aiin olkedy ol cthary tcheol ltedar qoky shey okal ol lfcheody reod shckhy qochedy cthain sshaly scheeedy otar aiin

qokol opaiin daiin oor qoteey kedair dar qokey alr shy chedy kchees lts daiin aiin qokeey shey sain qokedy qopaiin
qokaiin otary pcheos ytchdain shdaiin oteedy shedy qokdair cheey qoes lseols sheol ol osdol qoaiin kchsaiin air lkaiiin qotaly
lcher qoes ykchdy qokchedy chdy solor oshiiin chdaiin ardal dshsaiin qotain yteear olkedy olchd oedam kshor qokeey qoky shedy otchair

arair ypchear qokeedy shedair qolkedy lchr olchedaiin air tches chedor ol rchor sheody al ksheeey ked
oksher qoky y pchain dain qokeeedy lsdol ychdol shedy rols qotain ol opchy olar oksd lshdaiin chdy
tsheedal chail lkchy or olsheeey y qokal dcho dchdar qopchsy chedy daiin daredy qokaiin soraiin lcheedy aiin oteey ydy qol

cthor daleey shckhy ol qoteedaiin dareeedy led dam cheey air qoksheeedy shey lcheedal kedy saiin olkal rdar tchdal
qoky okeear tsheer dar qotdaiin keed qoksheey redal lchedy raiin al dchod aiin qokey otey qokedy chckhey otedy qokaim lkaiir lsal ol
qoky raiir lkchy dshody qolkeeedy ar shedy dy otol qokain olan qotaiin alg ain ockhaiin okchey shedy ar okeedy or

qockho ared dorain lkedaiin qokedy ales otar shedy olky ykaiin yiin qokain chedy chal aiin daiin otain sed kcheol
qokeey shedy chey rody dar sheedar otedair yeeoy kiiin qokain raiin oteey odyoiin dalyaly dair kchdy qokchey otain tshr qotedy
qolchear chcthy otedy ol che otedy okeey rchor qotair qokar qotedy shckheey oedy shar dam olchedaiin qol okchair

olo okshed okal oeo chey lseeeody shedy otal qokal ychaiiin oryedy daiin reod seeol ochr otedy
chedy dalor qokar ol daiin otshed okedy otchedy chr aiin olkal ofchaly dleey cheol qokchy shey opes ofcho olyeed ar
lcheeoy qotedam otal okey shey chor ykeey aiin dor ood qokeey ol opcheols pear dshdol qotedy chey qopcheo shckhy qofchm

dar cthedar okeeey oltaiin qokedam taiir olkchedy lchedy aiiredaiin qoar cheees ral qoteey kd shal ychd soldar
laiin chor oteedy olsheeaiin qokeeedy odysd lsheear lkor aiiinedy okal olchal shey sor chedol saror qokal sheey y
cheeeody ykom qopchdy oteey sheey shsd qoeedy orcheeedy okchy dy qol qokeey keeeody raiin qoky shedy dain olkeey chedy

sheody rdy oo orar oledar qotedy opedain ykeeody por cthaiir qokchedy lchedy areey qokar qotchedy ol shey lchaim qokcham ain
osedy ypchair seody kshol qopcho chdy oor qokey cham qokain sdy soiinedy lkain shey
chey qochey dleo ol dair oedam lyeal qokedy qoledy qokal shes qotaiin yshaiin olkey otedy qokair otaiin y otal otaiin aiin

kor dy ain opche solkan lkeos daiin oksaiin cheol yshiin qokain dar okal yer chy olkesy qochdy chdol shedy
ycheees qokchy shedy otedal ltal qokar chedy chctheed y olkaiin chckhd okaiin oksheeod chedy tcheeey alyeor odyiiin otain qotedy
ypchair dareear odyaiin cthaiin chcthaiin sshdam dar ytchees shedy lseeos kl ches okal salaiin tchdaiin cheeody shey

chedy otchey chdy ockhedal shedain chal qokear sshod shdaiiin otain chol qoky dchedam shol otaiin al or qokal soreeor qokain raiin
seol sheody ar qopchaiiin shy oleeody shedy qokaly qokal dyko qokeey pchaiin qokee opchedam okchg aiin saireor
qokeey cheedar qol kedal sheear chckhdy sairo shal fcheeedy oteedy oaiin qokcheey aiin qotchy qokchedy shedy doreo otedy

ol dcheedy qokedy qokal kdair qopchol lchesy shy qoteol olkal lo reol opchal olkeees sheeey ykaim qoeos cheey otedy
olky ykedal olkaiin aiin saleol qotedy ose okeedy shedy sheeody keod oleedy ycheeo shedy cheedy qotdor qol shar ted
qoksheos ychdaiiin ycheos qokeedy cheod qokeeedy ol to dal al olkey olchg cheees pchedy ar sain ain sairod

sheey yshaiin solchiir cheedar lseedy qotaiin okaiis ytas odys oo dalyed scha shedy ldal shar otchaiin
lchey oiiney saireor pcheos otchl qokedy chckhey ykal otedor al otal ychdy opchedor odydaly opees aiin
chedy lchor dam qotaiin qoedain oty chedal olkaiin or ychdor ofchol qotaiin oteos qokeey chckhedy lssaiin qokeedy qol

qokeey aiin qockhs ol lchair aiiinas ras raiin lkaiin chedy okchdo shedy chdy okedy solkody qotchdy olchees qokeeol sheey aiin
ain opcheeos lsheor qopol dchol dy rchain chcthedar cheeaiin okeeedy chedy qopchaiin ypched okchol dolory yked
olkeey keeey okchedy y sshal dar octhdy shoiin lchedam osear soleol tched shckhey teo qokdair

dar darol pchees lteedaiin shy y qolkear yshail qokchedy okeeody aiin qokal chedy qokeedy pchdy dalol doloy ykaiin

lchair kchy y qotor qokor qokey
ol qokal dairod opchedy dalol qokal okan qokain che olcheear lteesy oldy cthes chdy odam aiin
okal chody lsoiin ychdal qokal olsor lchedam daiin shedain oloiin dareedain lchedy ypchain shal ykr otchedy chedy
ssheear raiin chor olchd oor odor okchy ykchm cheey qokedy ain qofcher lsy ches chckhy lkiin ped dareedy aiin

dardal keod cheedy keody daiin eseedain chckhody shedy daireedain reedy ockhain okeey oleedy dcho shdain shey lcheedal chckhy
qokshey qoteedy lchey oiineedain okchaiin ypcheody qokeey chol olkey dalyor saiin lkedy lsedair cthedam yshed ytes chey lkchedair schor
lchor qokar cheeody otedy sar dar chcthan chedy kchaim okchsd reeey shy chedy qokshdy olkeeos shey tsheer chedy

qoeeol oseol schedaiin okeedy ol chdy qokal chedy sheckhy oteedy cheol ochr kaiin dshdaiin qoteedaiin chedy otchy air qokal cthor
to dolaiin oey osa ain orear soledaiin ar oteey ytchair olkeey keeody qokedy opcheol opcheeaiin otedy
tsheedal chd am daiin dchor pchedy cheol okedy odyeees chedy olkeey qokeey qooly ol tain poiin chey sheol aiin qokal schdair

sher raiin oty kedal sheey aiin raiin qol qoky keeo areos kaiin lkaiin qokchedy lchedy oseeedy opchar qokaly opchady shey
dardy opcheeey olal ar teol tom kar olshaiir qotchedy okedar keeol opcheeedy daiin otsheedain okeedy shedy
ofchedam shedy lcher oloiin deol qokal okchey lss chod ypchar qoody chary sheedy aiin ol soiindal opchin shedy

qoky dar tedaiin opam qokeody yain sheol olteedam qotedy cheey ches aiin opchdo dar qopchd am lkail olkdaiin shedy
daiin aiin opchsy keeos keeo dcheody tam y otedy dain chckhey ykedam soraiin dam sheey reeo pedar chdam otchdy ain
olyeeedy dal dlee chedol lkaiin oiiney chey ol otsheeody lchedy alees qoeeed cheeam saleeol cheey shedain otdaiin otedy

chedair oreor daireeol qokchy qotchy shedy okedy oryedy dy roiin ofchair tches reeod otedy qokain otey qoeedy dolor
qoeody aiin olkey kdol saleedain opcheeey qoeod okaiin chckheal qokeedy lkcheeod saledy opcheeody ykeeor olchoy okchdy olshaiin
qockhedy olyeody teeey oiindy ytody ol daiin oeeedy lteeeo qoeos daain ykchaiin oltedy teeed al

leol qokeedy chedy shctheedar lseees aiin opchr tchey ody okshail olkchedy dar odaiin opchary choiin ol qotchdy octheor chdy
qokol fchaiin opcham chedy qolchdy okeey yain oledair ctheor aledor dar chdy oreey qorol yshedol ol qotchy tor ofche qol
ychd shckho daiin y dykedy yeeedy leor daiin okedy kaiin dy aiin ytcham qoteedy sheesy olchoy arym ol

ytchor qockhdaiin chckhedol chedy oredar ytes saiin lsheeody kdar otaiin qokeedy ain cheedy shes shaiiin aiin qoky ofchdal
ocheeedy dy cthair okal otedy chol qoty chckhy tchy dar qokal kg ykair lchol qol opal saireedy chdy okedy aiin
chedy dleal lchedy scheesy y ol rsheam por lchair olkol olkeol qokal opal okol okain char keod qokaiin aiin qoky oty or

cthor sain qotedy okshdain olchear solam qopeos oeody lkar chealy otain char otaiin kain sar ol shckhy aiin
shckhy qotchol lkeeedy qokees aiin qokal qoteey ol shol okeey reeody qokedy sain ltal odey ol dalyey olyam keod ain
lkain qokedy lkdal dal qokchy qotain okdo qoeeey chedy orais chedy lkar chedy saraim ypchom qoeedaiin shaiir ain

dam lteees otey qol oltor ytcheey aiin ycheam yshed okaiin qoeody qoky chedy qokeedy qokain kcheeey chdy okar qokar qotedy opchaim
qoky chedy olkeedy saiin ream fchdam okaiin y qofcheeoy chedy lyeedy y daleos ypchedy dy sheey dar shckhol chey ar
otshey saiin shar olkeedy ald cheedy dar sheeor lol dy odeeedy shckhy oiinedy qotal ctheor dar qotchdy octhedy ol soiindy okedy shey dal ain

y okcheeody ar tshedy lkeed chdy okeedy saiin char pol odyedar okdaiin oll shedy dar okedy dar
qokeey solkam rchaim ykchair okar lsalsy qoteeedy olcheeos okdaiin chey sheedy qokal cheeey qotchear qokchey reedy oteey ar
sshedair kain dy okeeeody ychedy chey dshd rchor okeod odyal lkear osy qotes ar oeor chedy ochedy

qokar okeees sheey oteedy ar chey okchedy qoar shedy qoky olchdam okal ol dykaiin dar dalain qokchary ted lkeeey al teed dar
chedy odeeor chedy okeey qoky ykeedy shedy olkaiin keeeo okeain dair okdaiin solor qokary am olyor shey
dalol dleey ol ychal cho aiin dain ar otal chor sheedy lkaiin shedain kaim ytchair chey chey lkcheeor solear

lkedy olyor dy daryee ytoiin daleos cpheedy qoteeody lseedy lchey otchedy shey chctheody dar aredy qokey okshdy
ofchey tcheeey okchedy okeees y oteey areedy or opchor daedy okal cthair soleor qokeedy shedy qokeey qokaiin dshedaiin qotaiin chedy
olod daiin qokaiin cheain sairain sain ledam sheody otain qopchdal olkedy okeed okeey kedar rod

raiin aiin dy reod qokal kaiir aiin dy ain qokeey yain qol seol chod orey olkchy opey pchary chedy
lcheos sain chan okain odyeedaiin lkey ssheey kary shs oty qodaiin ol qokal ocheey opchaiir or ytchedam
ocheedal ar qokal opal kchdair olkar ol okeedy sheedy olyaiin qokal qokaiin tchedam ocheos okchsy choiin dar qokaiin rchedy

cheey shedy chey dar olyeeos air chey raiin sheain lyaly dareos qokey chedy osho olchdam qokedy sed shol aiin
dchedy yshr qoctheody aiin olcheeey chey shedy am tsheedal dar qokal cheey olkaiir olcheed soredy oteey shol dar chdy sheey okaiin chd pchedam
lod qoksheeol solkar ychedol ood areeedy chctheo cheey ol otal qokar dar dal otaiin aiin or qokal olyaiin solaim

qoteey oly sheedy lkedy rdaiin cthol qokees reear qoeol tsheedy chedy daldar sheol qotal chedy dal sheey aiin
tshdy reeey qocho aiin oeody qokeedy ral rd lkaly qoped shcthed okeedy qol okey shey shar saiin shedy qol
lkaiin qotchedy chedy qokedy y chey qokchedy ar ockhsdy shey otsheody ol sheody dar opchdal keedaiin ldy lchor dy chcthol olyam aiin

chey al sdy aiin olkaiin chedy dy qodal cthey dalyaiin pchol keain cthor tedol olail qotg ypcho qol
ar fchal qokeey dar sheol dchedy opchary dar lkaiin aiin daiin lkey olshedar saledy oteey kdaly olcheod tshdy ol
otshdy dy ytal olsdy chckhedair oteod rain otaiin otedaiin sheey okshair ctheo saledal ol qoredar qokedy qokchy saiin shedy or

ochaim qolkeor cheeos ykody qoeda qokeeedy odyes olshair dalysy kal okeey dar olkal ol qolkaiin daiin ochdy chdy
oleeey aiin opchdaly shey chdy osy ar qopeody reedy cthain otchdy okeedy cheol lkaiin lkaiin yched sheody sheol chedy oredy
sheody am keesy shedy ol otsheeos qoeod qokaiin ain dar ctheeol opchdal chckhy ykcheol schy tchair orcheeol yteod qofchdy cheol

qotal saloly ykeedy ar qokaiin shd shedy chckhes oleeey y shol ochey otshm qoteey olkaiin char chedy
dshody raiin qokeey chedair otedy cthed olteeedy chor shedaiin taiin seoy chdol qotain ar
lchedy cheey shedy chedy qokaiin taim chcphedy sheol cthedy qopchedy kchan qotain ctheol qokeedy shedy arear okeey ar

chedair cthedy yshed shory qokchdy qol qopchl qoteeey chckhom chckheedar olcheody dal ain dy qokchey pedy
or chor lsedair octhear otchan shedy chey ltody oledol aiin teedy kl kedol shckhdy oks or
