qoky lteor chcthaiin chcphedar shedy lchaiiin shdaiin tshor ley lkain shedy lkaiin shes cheey chdy okedy lshdaiin ol
shckhor oredal chedy okeedy redal sorair qokaiin ychedy ldy chctheeey okchedy otedy chol teedaiin am ysheeey lkchdaly ain qoteedy chedy
dam chedy saiin qokain daiin dain qoeesy ytes ods oksheeam ychaiin qokshaiin qokeedy chaiin qokol okain oledol lkaiin qotchedy chedy taiin

lkaiin lkcheedar dar sheody qopeos okedy okeeody dar saleain olyaiin daiin oteeedy raiin cheedy aldaly ol oteedy cheey aiin olkeedy chedy
qokshey qopches ras olche shey oteedy am okeey qotain qoteey am okain dam ochor saiin lteeor sheckhy qokeedy ckhoiin air
chey oryain daiin ral qod chedy teeedy shoiin oltdair otched chedy olkal doleor ol dair chey rody aiin qopchedy

cthdy or qokal ars ycheeody qokain chckhy okal okeedy shey shar fchair tcheeody shsy alal ltain tshod lseed lcheey kcheeedy
qokchy tchod cheey qol qockhaly aiin okar ched qokchy dy qodaly tsheeedy qokar chedaiin kdain okain qokaiin qokedy
soiinear dareody tsheaiin chg ykaiin kcheeedy opchar cheees lsheeody otain chal chedy oteod y

cphdy lsain yshaiin opchedair shey qoleey okeeey or qoty keeol oseeos shedy qockhain opcheey otaiin qotedy
eseey or daiin chckhey aiin dal olchas dchaly qopchedor chedy yshdol qokain cheam otedy cphee tchol lod solees dar
otedy daiin qotain dy ol qokchey olcheeey olteody cheol ain shor chedy sheol olcheod daleey chas chs cheey okain qokod

okchey cheear lkeor ykchedy okchdy qopchair ochr shedy ol daleey cheeody olshiin qotain chdy otaiin ods aiin ypcho solom dar
qokal dsheeey ain shol shckhy lchedy chey ain daiin qokal qoeols shedain olkchdy olol qotal dalyedy dal pchs oley qokal lchaiin lkos y
om dykedy olyoiin cheeor ldar ll qokeedy shr otchedy qoeain lkcheod rsheeol aiin qoteedy otar shdy qockhod soly ar

solkeeam opchol qoky oteedy shedy qokar ol otedy lkchaiin oredar dshy qokaiin aiin shedy olkey qotedy okdam olchaiiin lsar okeey aiin
saireal qoedy kchol orar oteod ockhdy qotar chol sydy kchdar qoky dar tchedor cheeor soled
ofched tchedy ol oledaiin ol saiin oredy okchiir ykor shckhy aiin okches chal qokaiin air qolkeol qokeey olkeey y

ocheeedy aiiinol schdaiin chdy laiin tcheear air ksheeedy soredaiin reedaiin ol qokchy qopaiin dain shal chdam okeey ol
cheedy ar shedy daleody yaiin dy saleeey opes or qopchaiiin ol dam otchy shedy ol opcheeody air lkey dchdar
shal aiin ypchsaiin rdaiin cheoly or sheol qokeey qoeesy chdy otey shey or yty qokaiin okeedy olchaiis dar qokeedy ordal

ytcho qolkaiin qokeedy olsy ytsd chckhy olyedy okcheeody am qokey oleear lkedam qokal cheoly dar
daredy ockhm ytes ars qoteeos otear okain dain qokeey chedy yshedar dsheod aredy okal ctheeedy chdy lchesy lshar aiin
qokal ychsy saleeody aiin chedy dain cheear reeey odyedain dar otchy qopeol opcheeody shedy oky chedy ofchedy

chiin olkain oles qokched qokshed ty okeos kcholy lshedar qokeedy ychdor lsain qokshs oleed aiin
opchor ytchy oteedy odyaiin ykcheody dedy olyy y chckhes olkd otsheor qokal lteedy sheey otchaiin daireody orar ar
qoksheeedy shedy tshair ooly chok keal qoteey ain shedy opcheod chol daiin okeeedy qotedy okal qokain otedy cheey shedy oteey rchedy shol am

ykchdair odeedy yteam ky aror schody keedy rody lsd oteedaiin otal olcheeody otedy shol orain
qol kcheeaiin kesy redar qokedy chdo chedy tedain sham shedy lkeoy olcholy ychg ctheor ytaiis qol
sheody olkdaiin lchor shcthedy lkeos kchoiin ror oshedy doll tey qokal lsan ored otal olshar oteey dar

qoeesy okal ycheedaiin shol chckhy qopchedar oloiin aredy chiin qotain chedy shedy olkal oto qokeedy kg qokain or tcheeody olchsd qol
qokal otain opchedar qoeedy qotal ol qoty shedy cheol qokchy ol dar cthaly ypchary ysheeedy oty ar sheol qokal aleeed reeey lkaiin ol
qokchey okain sdain qol okey ytal qokchey y tchedaiin chain ctheam peedar aiiindair ordy qokeey sar okshoiin otaiin qokeedy shedor ol

pcheol ocheeey ykeol qokal oteeey chckheod ain lkcheedy shcthaiin qoteesy cheol daror dalyol rchdair chey okedy ol
cheey dar qokal sain ychar chdaiin lkchos qol otchdy qoes cthdair lsha raiin dair yteed shedy oo al
dar ol rchy cheees cheey ol olcheey cheey qotedy oteedy dleo okes lcheer odyeedy lkeody oreeey aiin ochaiiin qol

odeol lchesy ychaiin ody qofchaiin oody redy daraiin qokeedy okary opar ytdair qockheody cheedy qoteos
lkaiin alyey kshedy ofeedain oles okal reor dam solear qoteedy qokshey opchary chedy oliin ckhey saiin saiin shdy opchdo odyal qokaiin chedy
lcheos opchsd lsheedy pchey ofchor dar soreol osoly reor ral reain qokal reees sareor otsheody y

lcheedal dar chckhey okain ar opchair otaiin fcheedy qodain shdy shdaiiin qokeedy reod okaiin qoaiin qotshs ain kchy dar
aiiror olyedaiin sheol sheeo seeol qokaiin aiin lkm chey okchedy shdain chedy daiin cheedy sheedy chedair ar shckhdair qopchody lchedy
olchr yteedar qokchdy shey als qokal aiin tody ol olkaiin okeeor ol qotchey air shol soldar qopcheeod okeedy y dal aredy

qotoiin chcthdy ar qokar chedy lkeor okeedy shedy oteey qoky opeeedy shol okeear aiin chol pchaly kd solkeedy lain
tsher dar ockhedal dar tas chal odear olkal or lcheos cheey ytdy dy qotchey odyeear yaiin oshol olkeey qoteey chedy
dar ockhiiin dshdaiin qotain qokedam teody olkeey areeor shedy daiin okeey cheody dam lkeor olody chckhy qokal ain qokeedy qokar chedy

cthol okchy chdy qokar octhedy chey aiin oseedaiin chedy okedy aiin okeey ochol lkol chey reeo aredy soleed chedy
lkeol chcphedar qotedy shckhy tshaiin qokeedy lkeor okedy qochol opchas odyeeey am saiin olchok ykeo opchedaiin qokain sheol qol
daiin ltal dairaiin chey chedy chdy oredy otchy daiin rair saiin qofcheeol dal okedy qotchdar qokeey sale aleear oledal chcthedy

qokaiin rg ctheor lsheol qokal chckhaiiin aiin cheey olchiiin lchedy soleeo lses or okchey shedy orchee qokeedy ol
olteedal chedy qokeey otedy oky qos chor chedy sardal schaiin chedy qokched oteey okain ytedar chedair qokal chedy
qoteey otedy lyed chey dshaly ldair scheedaiin ar chedy qokol pdar saiin cthed ody qokal qol daleo okeedy ol

shedy reeeo qoteeody shey ykoiin olkaiin oteedy sheeor cthol okchdy qopaly lkaiin tshdy chdy ofchear qokeedy okal shan ochain cthdaly chedy
chedy qokedy dareey ar ofcheor lsheeody qodaly yteam kain qokeedy shr qokchedy okdam ol aiirr lkcheedy odod
oded olyy ain cheol qokal ykcheo dain qotchy yteeor dleey ol opchom al ol lchey okedy aiin qokeedy chey shedy shsdy olcheees shody opain sches chedy

qoty aiin ytcheeey shedy olchedair ykas kain daldy yshdy ar areear reody opchedal shedy dshdain chedy ol qokaiin soreos tees shedy
dardy qokey chckhy opcham lseedy roiin qokal rdain lchedy sory oteedy lkcheeey qochedy ctheal lkcheeal chey oles or
chedy ctheedar kar cheeor aiin cheedy dshdaly soleal okshd or soiiney olcholy ckhain oky ltdaiin qokaiin shey

shcthedy opcham oteedy chedy chey shy okedol shckhee sain sain am ypcheal olyeeedy dshes cheol cthedaiin yshaim qotey chedol chdy
oeor lkaiin solkdaly am qoteedy daiin ltedor redy cphdar daiin okdaiin shedair ofchedy scheeo opar y
ofchol tedol okain olyaiin dchaly qopees ar chckhy cheey shedair sheedaiin otaiin qokeedy ol raiin olkal ody qokshol qokal chdy

ypcheedain dal lkdy cthedy qockhor chedy saiin qol qokchedaiin qoteedy raiir lseeody oain olkchy keeol oreeedy
kchor daiin otaiin reedy lchain okcheeody odye qodam ltes dshedair okain shckhy chedy qopchd olain qais kedy
okeey ltees qokaiin am cthain eseo ol shedy yeor ol okeey chey qokain dy tshed aiiinory kaly shor shedain pos ain

dleeol dar qokal lcheedal chdaiin or oeear qotom rchor ykedol otaiin ted orar lchedy qokey lshdaiin saiin dar qokaiin chody qoksho chedy
okeeody qotam qokeedy odyais sheody chol laiin sheey lchedy qopchaiin lcheaiin qotoiin ykcheol dadar daiin kchedy
qokain qokeey okedy saleedy cthdy lts chr ocher qoteeody chedair qog ain arain lkr dsheeal chcpheor chedy

lkaiin ykdair qofcheedal dshal ain opchaiiin reedy shol dar keod oo chom tchedam olar otedy qokeedy ycham cheain kchedy
oo okol qokain oles qokeey ain olkey ar qokeedy olteeoy otedy air otchey oleain ol lkor ol qokal lseam qol tsheeey shedy ol
chedair ar qokal lseeed octheedy ol shedy aiirg ysheeedy oros aiin otol qokain cheol opchy rr reod qokey okoiin opchear

qokol otain chedy ypchaiir oiinol qokchy qotedy ol yedy ytm qokal qeedain qokeey reor kchd lsal daiirm lched tshail shedy ol
qoedair qokedy al tol lchail otchedy qokedy qopm okaiin qokedy taiin qoty chdam ctheol qokdar chcthedaiin ol
lchor shcthedy otchey aleeey ar cthain tsheos qoteedy opchaiin ypchaiin qokal qokain aiiinaly shckhy ocheor qol

chedy ypched okal olsheod ssheey ol lcheedal shedor chedy or qokain dam otedy odair dshas qopdar shol qokdal
qors otedy aiiinaiin ol sheody olcheeor cthaiin okeedy lkm qokchey old cheey lshol okal olcheam aiin teeey olkam ol
opchear cthed cthom taim solm okeedy raiin lcheer shedy olkeeody dar oledair otchey otody aiiindair oteedy dar lkedaiin qol

okal chol dal shedy otar ol shckhy alydar yshaiin shal raiin oks lseeody ksdy chal fchy cheol
ksheal qotchey shckheeedy sched opcheeeody ain ordy qokchey qokain otchy solchedy dchol qokeedy ykched saraiin olkal qokal dar

qoky aiin lkr olshair qokcheor qockhor saiin qokeey lchedy cthedy opchor qockhey qokal schol lkeeod or ctheedaiin dar

shckhy aiin okeey raiin qokey ykeeody olshedam cthed kshol sheey olkaiin kdain shady ytedor rdam qopched

lshaly shor okey chg opchaiin sar okchedy okedol shey odyaiir chey qotchod sdy dar shedy lcheos opcheam olkos shedy

ochdal dal odeos qokor dksdy shedy

okedy qotchdar okal shctheor lkchaiin dy qokaiin chedy lchain shol okeey odyeear opchor daiin lsheoy qokchdy cheeey olchdaiin dar

cthed soiinedy ctham ol yol oteedy otar ykeam qokain chdy qockhsd ykedal air okal sheody chedy qokchy sydy al
dar chor ychar lkeody qoky lseeody qokeedy dar olkedy yteeey qocthol qokeedain lod qokal lssy qokedy

dalo daryeedain dar qokal dchedy ocheeey yty aiin aiin okey shey odydain okshail chckheeeody dsheedy cheedy lchedy dyteols kor
qokal sheedy ossaiin ol qoreedy lkchody okedal chcthaiin chey lkchal qotal shees sorol olya lchedy taiiin reedy qokedam
qokm qokchey ol qopched qokaiin qopchdy opal otchey ol qoteedy daiin okedair ol okal odeos soldar dytsaiin otedy aiin

otchey tair dam lchol lkesy aiin qokey dar aiird ar dchedam kaiiin y ldy ream okain sdair tchedaiin ain
oty chs ledy lair olkain opcholy ykeees cheeor ycheeey orydar qokeedy opeoy qotedy dain shedy
cthdy ody chctheeo ar dair al daiin qoky y yshy cheol qoteedy dy ltd aiiindy okchey shs qokeos qopchees ain

daol aiirdy oteedy lkedy opchey darol chedy otchy shedy qokain odeedy ytdain shedy chedy otedy ledy lkaiir okchedy qokedy kchdy
qoky chedy ysheeey qochey daldy dar cheey oledair lchdair dal oteey kok okal keeedy shal qopeeedy cheey lkches ar opchy dar
cheedy aledair eseey ol cthain shedy opchals pair oredaiin yty ltedair salar am opcheeedy shaiir qokeedy qotedy daiin raiin

ocheer ytar oteey ain cthedor chedy yshal y opchar shedy dchee ain shckhy qotchm okchor daiin qoteey qokedy oty chedy dal pchol
opchear qoky chal sorain tain chsd al ypchedy qokeedy qody daiin qokeey shey ar okar che ckhor lkeed shey
qolkedy qopes cheol okedy odyeod ars sheeody otedy lfchdy odyal qofcheedal chal y schaiiin am daiin orey dy soredy

am otchedy lol cheey lkchedair chckhy opchy cheeey ltody cheeal ykdaiin saleed shckhy aiin lkeeo otedy
esee olchal lkain al qdy qoky sheol qoedal chedy cheey ychaiiin ar okcheeody am lo shckheos qopchar dar
qokaiin qokain dain odyal dchedy opcheeo olchsdy olshesy qocheor odyeesy aiin qoteeey al oshor ytchar otedy

alody ykd odyar okar olshedar lkchs oddair qoiin qokain chedy schdaly shedy qol odam aiin yshar lchedy
ltees qokedam qockhor qokal okaiin chedy qokal shail al qolaiin shes daleos lkedal aiin cheey peeor aiin
chedar reor chey qotchear oty chedy qoteedy cpheedy yteod oteedy chdy qotchdy qolchdy lsedair ol chctheor sain lkcheeor qokeey ar

oo orar chedy ofeo dar chcthedaiin olshear daldy qokeedy oko chor dar ctheam aiin yaim qokchey sheedy qokeedy ain
oty lchedy qokeedy lcheeoy qotedy rdaly sheeody ain qokey dshsd qodol keeo aiin aiiredar dar tdol qokain otaiin y
char ychaiis dar shol qotaiin otedy aror ol okcheeody ol oseeody reeal qoteeor chckhal lcheal qokeedy al

shody ckhed dain daledy qokchedol shey ar doll qoes okeey ckhedam chor ykeedy lchor qokeey shedy olteeedy okar qoky ykeedain qokeos
okal qol osheody olcheedar laiin daredam ctheos qopchaiin okcheeos ran otedy qokshaiin tam shedy ain
qokaiin solkeeor shckhy chal odair chedy lkain ykl ol sheey qokaiin okeain oor scheeey lkcheedy daiin lkchair olkchy otedaiin ain

olydair qotedar lseed okeey qol lody odyes qoks chdar saleeedy oledair oeeol chey yteeal ykaim

shedy opchsairy qoeedy dair aiin
lchey yteod qokaiin aiin dkedo otey otedy otedy qokedy

sheody dsheedy okal shey rchs odyo olchal ykey qolkedy qopches cheol cthee kchg ol orcheedain ar qokeedy taiin

yor dy qokol qokain cheedaiin qokal shesy shy dar okeey chedy dam qokaiin qotedy aiin qolod lchdair ykchas ycheeody air cpheedaiin qokedy dar

chckheeey cheeod lchedy qokeedy ol dy schaiin otshaim dalyedy shckhee qokchdy okain solchm olchdaiin cheey aiin

cpho sheeeo qoeeam dyteor or qoky ar qoteedy qokar dar daiiralsy qokain schas oks cheey oleedy qoeos qokal sheedy cthedol chol

lcheedal dar qotar ar ysholy shdo yteeody qotedy ofeey lchedy saiin lcher chedy oteey shey sheey otcheol opchok otain ssheody ol

odeal chey oryain lke saleedy qol opcheeody aiin sareol kedor lshg qokchy chal chor ain qoteedar air tam qotedy

okal ol aiiineeedy cthees ol solchedy kchy chedy chckhy schedy chor shedy daain okeedy oteey lshedar ykdal cpheer dar

daleos qordair ypchair oeeedy qokal reedy air olkeey olcheedy y qokedaiin ytedaiiin olkain ol opchdol aiin

daiin lteod okeey ain daiin aiin lkeor odey qokeedy qokeedy qokedy qokchdy qokedy schedain chd qokaiin qodair qokeedy cthaiin daiin sairaim

sheody am shckhy lteeod rs qokaiin cheol raiin kal okal chckheeeo aiin qokal qokaiin lsedair aledaiin dar lkary qol
shckhy qokchedy chdor che qol qokeedy qokey chckhy sarol chor lsheedy shctheos cthees chedy qol cthom okees reedy oteedy shedy
al daiin lkain shey oksheeal olchear shol okaiin qokeedy aiin ody ocheeoy chedy otaiin chedy ysheedy ytey shody pedy oteey rchaly

dshdol dar saiin ypchod qol okar ar qoky oleeor reeey alyol pcheey rchdam lseeo chey am olkeedy oteedy shedy
chcphedy teesy chedaiin chedy daiin chl yshey otaiin qopor qoky qoky odyeeody yteedaiin shes qokain okchok qotedy
shsdy dady dar dain lcheedal chais rdy opchol saiin shcthed cphod osdal tchol ol qokchdy sheckhy aiin okeedy sheol otedy

qokeedain otey dsholy oteedy ol olsheeed dar kchar qoees pdaly lsedaiin shedy lcheos daiin orchdy otd olkchy qokedy
qokol opaiin okchees okshedair oredy olyeeo ain qokeey kal orchaiin dair dair yta shey cthaim dain pchair dain ain
olky cheeor reol cthiin fchaiin dain qokaiin odyais saleey pchey qokeey soredy oteey solor oky opeod orcheor

qoky ain otedy tshaiin okeedy lseedar olal pchain qokar shedy qoty okeedy chedy chcthedy qolkedy otchdor or dam aiin
chedy sairo shol soledy qoky qoteedy ykaiin chey qokchedy lsheod aiin kedal qotedy aldain qolkdy peol qokey yteees qoko
chdy lchey chey qokedy y chey qotchain saiin oshaiin pchedaiin ain sain dar dain soreody qoky ol shey ytan okaiin otchdal opchor

kshaiin dchedar ykesy qotchedy ar daiin roiin oteey odyeod okaiin ain oteedy yshdy aiiinaiin shar salg shd qokaiin raiin
chedal y osd dar okal oty reeaiin olsor kal pcheos qoteedy daiin odyoly sheedaiin yteedy olshe ol
chckhey or ockhee ql shey saiin keeey rdy osg shey otain qokeey okshedaiin otain ody qokedy dleeol chdy olyam raiin

shckhy reedar chedy qokol olkair opcholy ain qokal ol osol sheckhy okchdy kaiin lkdy cheedy ykos shol raiin qokshair
saiin air lkeols ckheol otcha rair oky aiin chey okshed oky odyaiiin odyeeor yteam qokchey shedy cpheey tair
sar shedy y lcheaiin dar okedy chedy cthair olkal olkey shedar solkeedy lchey qotchedy chedy okal ytain oteedy dar qokeey qokaiin shey qoky chdy

chey rar qokedy qokchey reedy ol dy daror schaly opeeor ol otchy teeedy solar olchol oreeey qokain tchaiin
qoksho qokain chedy chcpheody paiin dchedar tchedy oteey shol ol opchdol reeeo chckhy oteedy saiin cheol kshe ral daleol
shal sheedy cpheeam shedy lshedain ykear qokeedy qopeos yshain chedy lchey oteedy chedy okeey chey shey okdain shedy sheody lseal taiin

sheody dar yshor shckhy qotchear chey aiin shcthol lkeal okal lsesy dar qokeedy tsher shedy yty solkal olkedy or
aiiinedam daiin qokaiin cheeor chg solchdy y daiin daldy soredam qokeedy teody lkod tsheeedy tchor dam or

syeor ltsd oleeody ar ypcheeey kdar qokchor chol okchaiir reear ol ofeal qol dair cheey odyees qokain lkchal cheol

cheor am oreeey rdaiin qokchy chckhy saraiin ssheor sholy chckheesy chey sheedy opches chckhdo ol okedy lkaiin shey or

qoky ar tchedaiin y sheol tedy qokdal qokal kol oteey chcthear tsheal qokaiin aiin qokeedy shedy lsody ol yshy chedy

cheed qoeedaiin scheol daredy qokal lsheam sheain qokeor qooly qokedy doldal cthdar dain ar
dain al opchar ycheeod dar dain odedy chey olkchedy ychok fchaiin sheol cheedy qol qoteey al qokaiin okaiin sales lain daiin qokear
qolkm fchg shedy sheedy lky ol dar oky keal otsho qokeey lcheedy chedy otaiin qol qokcheol opchedy okaiin qoal dar

chey qotchear dalaim qockhey ykchaiin qopchg reedar chedy dair qokaiin al cheedy chedy olkal or qokar chd otaiin lchedy

dain okeeo lkeey okcheear shedy qokshair sheol al sardy ofcheey odyeam sheeor schaiin cphedy dy qokaiin dar

qokchaiin otchey aleeey lcheor sheed sheedy lseedar qoteeod or sheol ar olches olkain daiin qotchy ol cheols ysheos olkeey chctheol

ytcheor ocheedal okes or teody chcphaiin chey otchedy lchedy taiin dchain qopdy olsor olkar qol

otal chdy qokeey lchey qokedy qol osedair rar rcheol yshol dar opchor daiin qoreol tches ycheol lor olchsd redaiin ain

chey ain sedy okchor olshdaiiin otain qdor rg ycheeol olyain schedar air daiireds air qokeey lcheey oteedy al

lkain ykr chs chckhy qokain chckhey shedy okar kg sheedy lsdaiin darair okedy ltody che or lkar shey
qokey shos otedy tsheedal dar sheey qokain opchedam kchail ol ctheeey okchedy ykail okshoiin cthol ofchdy sheod odol
ypchedy aredy chcthy dar daledy lys lsy cheor ddy orol qokeedy ychedol shedal olkeey qokedy

qoky oleeor lchey alyeody al otar ksdy ain ypchar kain okey keeody keedar ykeeeody olcheeeo chckhal arain
dar chctheos rchees aiin ychais ykol cheedy ycheal okcheesy ol qokchy rr qotchear dchey teols ches ain
olchsy chaiin lkain shedy qockhain qotaiin sheol redy osor daiin chckhey yteeey qokol opaiin soley sain psheody chdy olyary dar

daiin al dy lyedy sar chedy shedair sar odyeear oror lkeey odyar shedy cpheedy redal oteey solksd dar okal al
lkain ykedor qoeeor opchor qokchaiin cheedy ytal lkcheody lsdy olyor ory lshs qokal kesy lcheeoy otedy
daiin dar qotaiin cheol daiin chdy keedaiin ol qokeey ltees qokaiin reedaiin daireedy ar ooly lkchail qokedy chedy qotal aiin

daiin rd ol otey tcheor shais otain qopoly sheesy odyeedy saiin lteel shees okaiin solkeeey tdy lchesy qochm

dain y daiin ol qockhdar cheol opcheoly lchedy dain opchedy otar chol dardy okey keed oky salar qokaiin tedy ypches ain

ykchdal cheey odyedor kor lkor daiin otchey lkchod aiin ofeey qoeed qokedam sareody olchg okchy ychor
daldy kshan kedam qokar qol olcham chaiiin aiin sdar rchair dal okaiin ol y ysheol soror qokal qokaiin or

lsheeody dar otal okal ycheol sain chal chedy qoteey soleedain dam qokar cheam sham odor air saiin qokaiin okeedy shg cpho aiin
qoteey chedy qotol qotain dar ychaiiin qokchedy ches chedor lsiin okain ol aiiroly redy lchey peor qokal qotedy sheody ykeol chey chedy
dcho olkeeeo y otal okaiin chedy seedal cheol opchdar solchair qokedam qoedal sheey y qorair lkar olchok orchm ain

lcheedal chedy qoleor sshdy par rchedam sareos ykchey yshedair solkar oteos oteey keam cheol shckhy ar
qockhedy taiin sain chal okaiin chedy lkain olchedaiin olkeedy dar olkar qoar qokedy dar cthedol keeoy lsary okshes areos
lcher keeoy shsy ain scheedain sheey aiin qokedy kcham sheol ol qopaiir aiin dam okaiin py odaiin sheody chdy lkaiin dar

ain dam lkain otedy aiin okedy alyedy ted y taiin ol cthaiin otar aleedy qotoiin chdy sareeedy saiin rchaim
cheedy odyedor okdaly olcheeey otol otair ood arol dykedy teos qokeey kd okeey qol qokal ol
sheckhy dar kcheody sshoiin ol otar dar dal odain qokchey fcheeos chckheesy qotain shedy qokeedy kaiir am ockhy al

olchedaiiin opain qotal cthaiin shckhor oltol alyaiin ches ockhdy al qopdol qokeedy shedy odees ol okal ytes qol
dchol okeedy lteeey okchedy char okedain ofcheedy chiin olko shor shey kshdy yshdy lcheeedy syes ychain
otol ckheol otal olkey chedy tchar odyaiin okedy okchedy chckhy qokeedy okshoiin rchain osor opchar shedy shckhy olchedair qol

chckhy qokedy oksheed cheod olkedam qockhair qokchain okchy solchedy dy ral qokaiin shey pchor shar cthdy lchedy
shcthain lor qokeedy shey ytdair pan aiin or cthaiin lor tchedam lkdair chey olchd qokeos
chey oryedy aiiino oteey y cthedy shedaiiin qokain dshy ytdaiin qokeal otaiin pchdar aiiinm ar qolor solcheesy kedy

cheey qotesy otedy aiin qokeody dcheody lsr chey shey ol qofchedam dal qokeey lkcheedaiin ol yshol ol cthealy paiin opchedaiin y
ykchaiin osdy qokar shedain ychair ocheedal chaiir oksheees ykchaiin soleey qol dchey otchar roiin qol
dalyedy daiin chedy okcheeos aiin ofeo shedy dar aldo qokchey yteain dy lsedaiin cheol qokaiin shoiin okaiin air

shdain solkeedy lkaiin otchedy ar daiin okes chckhody qoal qokaiin dar ldy sheol or otchy qotedy y dain ol
shckhy okshedain otedy opchail qotedy ain oles otal keol cthes lkcheedy ordy cheedy am ctheeey qodain chedy opchy ar
lkaiin oiinear saiin chdy cheey ain saiin chey chckhy lfchady chckhaiin okcheeey al okeedy cheey okoiin rchs reedar qotedy qokeey otaim dal qol

ykcheos okar ykdair qokar ol chedy chcthy qopchedam chedy otedy aiin chedaiiin ckhey qokal otal qol okchy dar opcham ar
chey qokchedy cheeor olcheain shckhy reain qokal qotain kas ol qopchedy qockhair daiin ordy lkaiin y dy odear olyy qokedy
chey ain qokar lshdal opchain orar pal otaiin al chey oltaiin qokeey shol qoaiin cthy oteedy ltedol shedain chd qokaiin chedy

daiin y shedy chedy tchaiin dykaiin dedaiin pedaiin okaiin qokedy qokchey shedy qokeey orm chedy qol otaiin qokaiin chd ardy
olches dar okeey opol daiin ain pchedy chedy daledy chey qofchaim sales shor dar qokchy olkal otedy ror dy oleeo pcheeedy
shar to otsheol opcha ain lcheedal chear lkaiin ycheeedy oteey qokshdy qopchod sheey shey cthol dair qokaiin qokedy

dleeol lsedair aiirey qotchy qokal keols chd sheeey olchals opair olkal okedal pchaiin tedy chiin ckhear lky y
yeeedy tchs chedy aredy ol qokchedain aiin opchy chaiin kshedar lkchsaiin ypcheor lsdaiin qockhdy qotal y okeey ochor orcheedaiin otedy al
ocheaiin dar ytcheed oldaiin daiin oksheod qokchdal lkeeey shedy qol shsy okshdy cheedy shedy aiin shcthed dain qotedy qokchey cheeo ardair

chey ltody okiin otair dain chor am chey odyok ctho cheees lkain okshory yched qolor lkches am qokchy qotal kor
otal salaiiin redair aiin otar aryeor lsoly fchal sham shey ytedair or qoraiin qokeey qotaiin fcheedy ol

chey alal qokdair shey otedy raiin

qoes aiiindy dcheol tain olcheeody lsedal chedy solary chedy qoteey lkedam tdy qokar am qokeedy soleos

ypchaiin sain qoeees qotaiin ar qokar shedy yteeey qokchedy oledar qopchdy aiiineol chedy taiin qopcheor soly qokeedy qoy pcheol

lchey qokchedy qooiin dalyear qokeedy solor schaiir shedy cheedaiin dcheor olkain yteedaiin qokdair lkod ody qokeey ykchaiin qokchy chdy

ykcheos lkedam qotal okedy oiinedy sairdy chedy otaiin oteedy ain qotsho cheol sain qokar chedy solchok shedy ol soiinaiin teos shar sshdy al

olsheos seody dykdair ykchedal otedy oaiin ypchedair chckhees al okedy roiin ofchaiin qokain qokeedy chol

oteey ltes solka ykal ol dal olsdy or sain chedair olchy qodaiin ted redal chey qokain sheol ol

ches deor y qofchor dain shckhor sheol olkaiin reeod dar tchaiiin oiiney chcpheal qokeedy qoldy qokchey okchey shedy chckhey shey
aleeody keear shctho shckhy aiin lm opchaiir qokedy y okaiin py qokaiin lkchdaiin ycheeeo ltedol sheey aiin

shor okan dchol yshor dar cpheody cheol yedam qokal yteeody aiin olkey qoeeo chedar reedaiin olkaiin am

daiin yte odyes kedol qotched cheeos ol qokchdy tair daiin oeor okeeedy olshaim dar odedam qotal odeos

reedy chckheed cho daiin opched daiin oteeedy shey aldain chal otdaly qokal sheeo chdy aiin qokar doreedy qol

sheeo aiin shal otchey lsheedy keedy qokedam qokeedy qokar chckhy kchary shedy tshair okal cheey otedy ar cphedy ykcheor
qokeey shedy shcthdy ctheody lchor tchedar yches ol qockhm yshom sheedy cheey qokedy shol qokshdair dal chedy
lchey qochedy chey air ldar shal lsoiin odyd sareo lkcheedaiin tsheeoy aleain rdy ytchdy okeey qockhedy scheody

qokar or otaiin sheey redy lcheaiin shey qokeey qolkey okeedy chdy ocheedal chedy osdair chcthy qopchaiin qokeedy chdy dyteody aiin daiin chedy
dcheos qokeey qokeey ytedaiin ted qokeey lcheeedy qokeedy otchear qoteedy ypcheol shey okcheam otedy opcho olkaiin chdy shor kaiin
lcheedam chedy qokeor olal qoeey dam lsar olkain lkedaiin chol opcheeaiin shdy kchy yshey dchey tchan odyeod chedy

soledaiin shedaiin cheeey aiin dal olkaiin oleod pcheody olkdain yteod chol okchy cheod qokaiin ar qol cthoiiin pm chdy
chey oiinedy shol dar qokshor okaiin otain pcheos chol dykedy okeey odedy qokey chedy chor chedy qokeedy sheey olkain qokedaiin al
otar ar lkees shedy chedy qopchal ral chdam ytas lsdaiin odeeol sheol ks olkar chol okeedy kaiin

dar cheey kan qoted yshedor cheeody lchedy oteey arain chcthair kcheds ol shckheedy opary olkaiin al
qoked qokedy chey qochedy ordal qopchol doll qoeedaiin solkdaiin dardy qoteey shey okshiin fchedy oddal qokaiin ain
ocher ar pchy dar oteedy okchdal olkal otar chedy opchy chckhy chedy oed qokedam cthaim oteedy dchey oteedy qokal olkedaiin pchor

qokedy aiin oeody yeeedy cheey olcheedy saleeo aror otaiin raiin qokal qodar chor shedy dches or sheey aiin

dar olky olsheeol dain aiin dair oeor lkos chedy chdam ycheedar lsedal chy otain yshory ol olkaiin ain

opcheeedy koly qoteeeo chd kody qokar aiin otedy daiin qotaiin ytal pchaim olchedar otedy oka ches sain ain daiin qokear
dleey qoteeeo ky sheol ain dalyed otar sdair qokal or tcheeedy tshr salair lkm chdaiin qokaiin cheol

ardam chdy otal chdaiin keeey ar ar qokaiin fchdam okchdy kdal otal olcheeod keey lkain olsheeo oleedy qokaiin ol
okal chol dcho fchdam ain otaiin qokaiin lsdaiin opdy olyair chedy oteees qol okeey lkaiin ol cthaiin

rs lcheedal qokedy lkdal oaly qokol otain qol otal laiin kcheedaiin shail air qokeey oded ochaly ykched
otsheor lkeeo ar cthody ol chedy qoteey olkaiin tor lod ain shckhedy yshody olchoiin oedam cthe shedal oteey air

chedy aiiinedy aiiredaiin qokeedy qor qokchedy lshees olal lshd otshor saiin otey kar aiin qokchdy sheeo okeey am

oeol aiiinaly daiin lkm dy shedy shol qotaiin taiin sain shedar dchaiin oteedy raiin otain kchaiin shar chal pchain
lkain sheod otedy qedy qofcheedal ar laim dalydy chal reor qokshm qoedor chs dy aiin shedy

qokchy paiin qopoly odyaiin saiin schor tchdal chaiiin lkcheod ockhdy dolol sheol lkchais shedy okchy qotal ykor

oleeey kor lcheeoy dar rshdal ockhair qoty teor okar ytedy okal shedair qokaiin yshedy lyed okchal aiin

ordy okey sala qokedy solkody sheedy aiin saredy qopchedy shedor qoal raiin qokeedy qokchaiin arain chcthy or

lkdy lkaiin oiinain saiin aiin loy tchaiin chedy qoteedy chdy otshaiin aiiinol ytdaly or ssheedy lkchy qokaiin or

aiireeedy olyeeo chdy ofche ykol okcheeody al cthedar chedy oteedy ocheedal okeam chckhy daiin dain solkaiin cthy tchdar qokees sheain qokeos

orair okcheeaiin ytedor rar areedy shdol am qotar sheod dareol qokedy rsdy kail okshal shal chedal qokeey y

opchedam dain shor shedy led sheol olchsdy shey shar ypcheody shees chedy otar alaiir tedy daledy okaiin dar
lcheaiin dar dain aiin opchos sheees qokeeedy cheol dykdy ty olkain lcheedal okeeos chol lcheor okedair okey dar sshd ol
shckhy lchedy qopeeey qokchedy shey cheey otedy okeey aiin soiinedy teeey otchedy shedy qol tedaiiin qokain lchedy qoteey otaiin ol dcheol tchain pchedy

yor qokeey shedy qokcheeal lsain lkary qokeedy rdar qokol okain oleesy otal yteeam qoeod qokear cheey okg opcheol
odeeedy teain chdy pchear olkedy shedy qokeey lkedy shey opchy yshaiin okaiin qody kchoiin or opcheeaiin qotedy dareo daiin ofee chckhy
chey al shey oedam chctheeo ycheeody lchedy cthol qokar olcheees qokchey olcheeey lchear opchdol lkcheor opchan lshok dain ol

chedy otain daiin darm ypcheeedy okeedy aiin kal chey aiin sdy oseeey otedy aiin yeedal ycheo olyiin qotain dar
okaiin qokain okeey olaiiin am qokeey keol opcholy cheol dy olkedy ain qokey res qokchy raiin qokal okey salar y
ofcheos dain qokar okeees qokaiin olar okeeody shedy otal yteedar keeeo cheeos chedal pchdy poiin oiiineal dar

otedy y otar ychedor y ctheeo qotsy cheear ctheey qokedy dar qokchy oteol teeeody olchod cthiiin otedy olkeey air
qolchm am daiin chor al qoeeor ol chedy dorol qokal otal rear olkedy olshg ar dair rchdy qokal qoeol chcthedar dshy otaiin ain
aiiinair ockheey dal chor okesy otedy qokchy scho qokain dy chey ain qokal ofcheeedy ytedor chdal chor qotedor ykan aiin

otol oted daiin cheey shedy rody ykiiin okain keeol qotar otedy ockhdor oleain arol olkedy shedy oroly chckhy qokees aiin
daraiin qockhain qopchedair lkchedor ychar qokaiin aiin laiin shedy lsheesy lkain qokedy chctheeo olor qokeedy okey chedy lkain shedy
chedy sain y orees yshor qokar aiiindy pal shedar kaiin qokchy olchaiin oror seeal lkches dchey pchary am

qoky y shedy okeey reedy olkeedy kdol dar kcheeody y chckhey olsheed ytchain kor kshedam opcheedar cheol opchiiin tchol cheey shey
dain qoedar odyam cheeos olsheeey reeo ardal daiin omeol saleedar dchol sheol ol os ychesy chedy
lkchal qoleody lkchedaiin qotedar qopchdy lshg raiir qotchedy chedaiiin otain chdy okcheeody aiin sheey qokain teody chedy cheey shedy

qotey or cheey shedy or otar olshed qokchdy chedair sched rshdy orches otedy ol otchy chedy olydy otaiin okeedy qokedy tshol

om leedar otedy chcthedy daeody dar opchdol olshd otchey chedy qopeod y chedy cheedy kiin qokain ol qokal olteedal otedy lteed soreedy ol

yshdy soledar sheedy aiin qoteey chckhy ockheey qotedy lkedam dy shedy aiin cheey qotiin olkain ol qockhey daiin qokain qotaiin aiin
sardy okeedy okaiin okain darain saiin oltdy chedy qokal okar qokedy leeedy qokeey chcthain lchedy chey y dair cthey shedy soiinol cphal aiin

daiin okshd qoty lshs qokchey chdy yshody shedar dshs dal reod shckhdal sheol chedy qotchedam sheody chedy oteedy lkain pam y
ol qokey dar lkain oldam ockhaiin ypchy solkeeo odyeedaiin chey qotchain olkaiin qokain oeody qokeey ycheedy shey
chedy qofcher dar qotchey olkedaiin yteedy otshm qoty dar sheol aiiinain lchor osor chctheeey qokedy opedaiin aiin

qokal fchdair orchor dar qokal ol syeor otain dair ltd areedy shedy okeey aredam lkain ykody yteedy otaiin ks shey
aiiinair otshm qokaiin dar kchedy doldam qoeeo ltes aiin solksy oldy ockhed qokar dar kchy shey
daiin air daiin oreo lteod ol opchaiir aiin qokar dar cpheey lsdy aiiinair okeey aiin dy olkeey solkeed qoro otcheor

shody otain qokedy sareor oteey soreos ykor lcheeedy yke yts otchy res ko opchal al qofchain dair qoko
dalaiin shedy ool olyedaiin qoteedar oksheeor orm lkain cheedaiin ytody lteedy qokaiin dar ytedor sheod qokaiin chedy

otol sheedy qotedor otedy oteey okaiin reody aiin chey lkcheod qokol otear ycheeey qochey ypchedy qokdam lshar qol okcham chedy

lchey aiin dain am qotchdy dolain okeedy cthdal cthees qokeedy chedy dsheed chedy qokchy okain qokedy ty otain pchedaiin dshedaiiin qokain qol dy pchol

qokar ytar chedy qokaiin qokain chcthaiin ychedy chcpheeol ro or ypchail opoiin rdy dair cheedy otedy sheeey olsheeedy

oteedy qokedy lkedar opedam qokeey dshes aiin yedam lkaiin ar qopees reod lkcheees tshey dchaim lky ain
ypcho chey shedy aror olkar dar lsd cheey lseeor oteey ckhedal redy qokedy opchary al qopoiin aiin

qokar ol dykedy cheey otedy otchy shedy shr y aiiindar cheey ykeeey qotcho dair chdy saledol otchy ykor tchal air

chcphain qokeedy rey qokchdy qokain ltd qokshedy osos ol oteedy cheey ykl oles soleeedy qokchy okchy ycheeedy olkeedy opchdair

or kchdy aiiinain oteey aiin daiin aiin ol cheey qoos qokdam qol ofeey shs chedy qor okaiin ar

olydair aiirsdy shs lchey qocthey okeedy chedal pchdy oor oty aiin ykchar ltedair olky als ardy areos

dy am kche chckhy teos chey alyeol olkal ods shr aiin okeey ol ool shol ytchdar okchdy qopchdy cpheol

ofcheeedy shckhy raly qokal ypcheey kchg sham ykesy cheear sheeeo ytody chor shedy cthod lkaiin qokedy

chcthed ykchsd chedy olkeedy cheeam ykal ol ykal oteey peedaiin qockhedy qoteedy chor oledy daiin okeey sheedy olkchey kdair teody

ofchdaiin salody cheol qofcheedal ches qoky lteeey lteeo res lshor shcthaiin keed shoiin kcheor chor shedy
lcheeedy sdy dy okedy ychor cthody ol daiin qokaiin lkchdal kcheeey qochdar tsho alsdy chckhy lsedor ltes odeor
otaiin taly shckhy solkes y qopd okshal saraim cphes shedy lsy chedy lcheaiin salor dyko orcheey ykeeody otedy

ykchor qokchy saleos dyked dain ar qokaiin otaiin lkchesy qotchain tol pchdaiin rdal saiin qotain shedy ytcheor ar odar

taly oedy otey res pchedy qopcheor qokeey ckheedy cphey qorol tchedair shedy okeedy shedain otedy

lched aiiry al olkey shedy qoteody

rchedy ykcheey chey otedy solaiin dair pchear qokeey ychdol dar qokey odyy qol qokar cheod okaiin dar

chedair shdaly ars ole lkchdy chckhey lkchedair sar chedain qoal okaiin ar cha oksdy ltam dar

or qokey lchedy dy cheey ain ctho ltaiir chey oiineor ol ypchear lkeedain ofchedy tchoiin dar qoteedy y rchey

ocheer lchedy qokal otey oles air chedy ltdaiin ytl chedy opchees sheod sheey rar lkcham sheey shey cthedy
tshdar tees aiin lcheeoy okedair oddaiin cheol ofchdal lkar chdy sheol lkain ar dal qokaiin sheol lkchedy olkal cheeam cphol tchor

qotdair okey qokedy cheey shey qokol otain okedair saiin air char qokeey oldaiin shckhy ky reeam oleain okaiin keedaiin dar

ar qockho cheey keey soleeey keedy odar ockhair qokcham al chedal tshey dam chor chedy qokeedy cphod opain
daleey chedy ol dain otchy okedol ychaiiin lkchoiin dareey char qokshaiin oedy lsiiin qotshedam chey qol olkaiin chedy

qockhdar okeedy chor shey ochor shcthol daireos olkchy cthdy dar ary cheeod okain yshody al opchaiin qokear
ols shd al otedy okchaiis dar qokeey soredy ocheedal lchedy otshaly qockhedy qokeedy lkain ykas chedy kchal chedy

otal qokain opchas okshr odyar rsd qokeedy ol opchor ycheol lky chol okeedy qokeey qokedy daey opcheain dar

qokeey olshail qocthol qokal chckheeam oloiin odear koiin sedy okeeedy okeeedy ltar ychaiir odyal aredy kchd chckhy

doledy opcholy shedy kshr ar toiin qoed saleain ockheos qokeedy okal olchedaiin oledal qokaiin chdy qokchdy shedy solkeod sairaiin

lcheos sol dalyo otcham qokain lcheedal ol qokaiin tdair chcphedar air soleor ocheos kcheam aiin olyeeody chol

ol okar qokchdy aiin qokey chok olyor opchdol lchedy okal shar tedy ll y chor raiin otar aldaiin ychaiin
qolod soleeo cheeo aiin otcheeos chedol cthor olchg okain chckheedy lkain ykaly cheedy ches olchsd shedair ykchain
dchain qopches lkchos oleedy qoredy olyees qoail qochedy okey lshs tchaiin dao ar otey shedy qol

ral sairm aiin qofcheedal chedy opchaim kcheed chdy ofchey soiinaiin ofchear qokeedy dleo qol saiin qofched qokal qokal ar
otar qokedy shor y scheeo qotedy shedy daiin rchor tal air olos otaiin tol sheey soreeedy qokar or lchail y lkom ytdy
odeo qokary al dytain cthair rcheeedy sheedaiin chedy shckhdy cheey ytedaiin oleed qokshaly cthedol chedy

dar qokeey aiin olkeedy chor okeedaiin qokal aiin olchal lchor odyeedy or soiinedor sheedaiin okal ked otar solkeeedy shcthed shey
qokaiin taiin okal qog taiin olyeeody ychor leom tchey dshedar chdy sheol schedy qoteedy lshdain al sheeos chedy chctheed chedy
qotchy sheol sheeaiin shedy aiin okeey lkchdaiiin shedy lses lts qockhol cheey chs dykdy chol qokeey kshaiin raiin

lkedam okal lty tchol dched shol orod qofchdaiin dar sairedam chey alyo qokeey tshol opcha chos oteey chedy
chckhy qotsheey keeody ychos y qotaiin pchor dar qockheody cheey keey dy yeeoy ar ldy qopchaiin otey chdy
qoky opeeor qokar dsheeey ltedain olaiir reain ain olkeey chey qoeeor olkar shedy shor y qokal cheeo lkedy

pchol qokar qoky chdaiin ol olkchy olshaiin lcheedal dar okal lsedy qokeedy olar ol dy dy dshdaiin aledor cheol
leol opchedam opchar qotr shy oly yshaiin okal otedy okshaiir lcheaiin shey qokeey qotain odyo okody kedy shedy
daiin aiin opcheeeody otedy chey alyo aleedy shedy qokeey chcthedy okedy qotedam qofcher chas teor alar chs qopair okey ol

sarear qokeedy shcthedy oreor otchey chedy chey dar lchedy shedy reeeo okdam okal sheedy kdor shedy shckhedy shey
okchy keey om lkaiin dshal shedy kcheeam cheod arod qokal eseeol qol kchedaiin lkchdain ykas qotedy ol yiin fchedy
oiiineo or kcheeody y pchdy dykod om opchor dain cheeo chcthedy qokeedy rcheear ytdaiin chedy shedy

daiin fchdaly schor qolchol saiin ored otal ckhy ol qokeedy qokeeor or kchor shey qokeey olsham shaiiin shody qokain dar
qoky aiin qoteeos raiin olkar olcheees qoledam otol sheedy aleain okaiin dar lkaiin qokchedy chedy odeey okey chedy opchdy oram shedy
chdy qoky shedy dshdol oles leos dy qokaiin ar qoky chedy tedol chedy cthdair dy sheey ytd lchedy or tshiin opedy

al oiineeody shedy solan ychor ypcheey shey qoky chs chedy olyy otchaim otedy ykcheo odyg olkchedy salam yshdy lkedaiin shedy
qokey cheain opcheody qoteey sheey chckhedain cheol okchear okos ltal aiin shedy olyas tdy qair dalydy odair
or daiin sar rdaiin lcheedal chedair qol ypcham olkeedy sheed otedy yteod chckhey ol opcheeody raly chey dlee qoteed sordy

cheeey ain dedy okchey qotain qokal ol so or oteedy shedy lkedar okshar otaiin chckheeol cheedy shedy odair
qokeey reear oey qokchedair odyey dalear olkal qokcheor qotoiin cheey shedy chy tor ordy tchaly chey okedy y saiin okeey chedy
okedy y shcthdar qotchy chal qokaiin chedy cheey raiin lkeey otchdy kees al qokeey sain chdy qokeedy olkeedy saly chdy

saiin qokain dy aiin qol qockho qokeedy cpheody ockheody rain ypcheol saiin qokaiin taim qol poiin shol shedy qokey aiin ockhar ar
lcheedal oleeo oleeody okair ctheor dyteedy shedy daraly oseeody okshar otr qokain qokeedy qokeedy ol chor al
qockhdy cheod raiin chdy dalyol otshedy qokeedy yeedam chedy cheey otedy odyedar chs qokchy qopchaiin qokeeedy saled shor solkeesy soledy

ofcheos ksd okshedair odedam chdy okar ar dchedy qopchiin opedy qotal lkdy kchiir qokain qokal chckheear qokchy okeedy chol otshdair
olteedal qoedaiin sheedy chckhey oldy ol lchaim qotal olkain ycheeey oiiney solo dair or okeey qofchedam okchdol dar
okal ain lkeo solkedar qopcheor olkar ras dsheedy shckhy qotchol lcheeoy okeees ain dy qokal key cpheo cheol qoledam

shody okain qol daiin qolor qokeey sheear ol otedy olkedy shedy ypchaly cheey chckhes qoedol chckhdaiin solcheaiin dar lkchal lkain chedy
dareor yteols kedam shor or olyal cheol otar ychaiin lcheedal cheoly chedy otchody chedy chey otchedy shedy or okar shey
saiin sha al qockhedy ytdaly qotedy dain opchor tshedy olyam kar ykeedy qotedy lke ltal otshain

daiin odyeod qofcheedy ar otsheeedy lcheaiin chedy saiin chdy qokeey opair leol saireedy chas raiin okain qokar chol ldy
oty redal chey ked chey qokchedy ar otaiin tchaiin kshedain qokain qotaiin aiin qokal dar doreor lseees chey okchedy chedy octhain daiin olkedy chedy
cthedy dleeol aleody ochaim daiin dao chedy okchaiiin otchedy qoody shedy shol oldaiin aldal olyeeey rdaiin octheedy shdor shey

qoty lsheeor otal oldy or oteey kshdal ycheeos keedaiin shedy chsdy dar lkod ochaim shcthedar qopchey dy daredy
dleedain qol opcham lto dal otchey ar ldor shedy dair olchdo odyaiiin oksheeody shdor rdaiin chor qokain sheol ol
ytchain ypchor lchaiir qotcheor raim ctham olchary pchor ore cheeo qokeey ain dy aiin kches qol lchail qoal daldar

daiin al dain qokal chedy qokchey sheeor ytar qoteoy oleedaiin ockheol kshedy dcheo qotal soreedain taiin
otal ol qockheody qoky ar yshaiin chey qochedy shcthedy cthaly dal dar chcthm chol ochaiir ol ledar ol
shckhy lteedar shsd qopdy qol olkchey or qokaiin odedam kedol otchy or ykches ain chor qotedy cpheol qokal qokal qokain okeedy ol

chey reeo qokedy chor ykeeey oked lkol orchoiin shees lkcheeos lchedy saiin chckhar qotaiin ol leeod chdy
kchedy ctheeo opedam olchan dchdar otaiin areos otshdy otol ckhain qokal cheedy qoteedy shedy pchy odyeds oledair aiin
lchey alydar ldy lkeeol qokeedy lsy olchedain chal soredy ykd chey al qokeedy lshed dykedor shedain oky qol

ykchdy solkaiiin okedy qokchedy keeal ychol kg alydy lkchary oddy shd cheey ytedor chdy osais qokain otchair okal lchdy okdaly y
oky opeeor cthair cheey aiin qockhdar qokal chos odear qokchedol chedy qokeey al kchedar shedy otedaiin ol teeody chedy
oreor lkaiin lkchody chedy qopchor okaiin ytedar qokedy qokain qoreeor chedy oteey lkor ol cthor chcthary chedair ain

qodaly dareey okedy chol sain keeedy qokchey qokedy cpheedaiin keey aiin olkal yeedal chedair olchedal okain qokchy olkain ol qopcheeeody chedy
cheor air cheol qokcheey kaiin qokol fchear scheedaiin chy qokeedy oldaiiin qol sar chedair qokal lchedy
ody chey qotchedy chedy ykchedar ltes am dardy otol okain qol sheey qotain arary y qokol qokain cheol opcham aiin ol qokeedy cheedy ar

roiin cheedy ches saiin raiin olchedain dar ypchain dleo lsam qokaiin sheol odyr shy raiin ol qokeedy oleed odol cthes dar
lcheaiin ar qockhain darain sareody oredaiin or sain qol daiin chcthaim dy cheedy shedy qokal shory olchar lkedy
dar eseey char sheey lchedy lkdair kchedal ytes ychy olor qockhey taiin daiin qotol otdar cthedol chckhy

lcheeedy dol shey sheody olcheeor qokal ol daaiin ar lkeos okeedy daledy olkal qokal air sheed qody olkal okaiin qokeedy chckhan okeey chedy
chor qoteeey lshoiin daror qokey dar cheey qokedy ctheol ctheees ltos qokaiin tedam cheol qockhsdy ar tar lsdaiin aiin
cheeeody to oteeedy oteeedy y keedaiin ody okaiin ltais chedy otcheeey qokchedy chckhy dain otal or qokchy otaly ysha or okeey ytchol

cheey ol shody ckhain saiin saiin olcheeod aldaiin qokaiin chckhy al okcholy chedy opchedam daiin qocthaiin tchdy oty shdaiin aiin
okal sheeod kaiiin chey shedy lkches ytsy ales cthain ytol yshaiin sheedy daiin ol qokchdy qoteeo ochm ol
oshor okeedy chcthdar qokol qokain cheol otal qoldy lsheeody ched daledy qokey qol kdaly qofchdy pshor olchedain als ain

okaiin qokeedy olches chs qokchdy chol oleam ycheos qopchaiis oleod shedy ol qokal ytody qol qotal olchan otaiin qokeedy otedy shol chey qotedy ol

schedy tsheeey qol daiin dareos sar lkchedain lsheoy dar lkom shey olchaiiin qokchedy char qotes shey ytchesy keol

shedy aiin dy ral dady olkedy otedy dar sheody dar tchor otshdy oltol toiin ral dchedam lkar air
lchedam qokar chedy sain lteed soledy okeedy qokal otedy or qoteey olkaiin al tchaiir ar cthey oteey qokaiin ykaiin cthdy
shcthair qokey ycha qokedy doley kchedy chckhy olkal okain olyor qoes chdy qokal sheey okeedy lkchody rar lkor

chcthedy olyom okeees oeeedy otchey dar okchdol dsheear qokal alain yshedy or saiin chedy daain tcheeeody ykaiin ockhdy
rsheey qotchy solchod olkal lkedy sheol qoky dshd sheey chedy ar ockho ol kchsaiin dar ctheor cheey shey cheeor soiineeedy cthy chdy
oteey qokain qokeey odydal qotal oledar lkchedal olkaiin lshdaiin kedor aiin cthair opcha ro orcheal chol saiin shey

olkal rdain qokchdy olkeedy ytaiir otchedy cheed ar qopair ol qokal solcheody opa shedy chey chedy taiin ocheeey air qokal arair
aireey yteain lkain lkcheeey qotcheor sheedar odyas oldaiin areal qokam riin pdar ockhedair aiin ol ytcheed ol ykchedaiin am
qoksheo kchees ain kchedam daiin daireey cheey chdy qokar chok otair ysheeeody qol sheol chedy qokeey ochdy ltedol qokaiin ol

chcthedy ypcheol scheey lchol qoteedy dain ol lchey qotchain sheey kody lchedy kched ychal qol schy am
rcheedy qokain aiin okey ychd okes areey aiin ol qokeedy okchdy qotees qopchm y odair opchy chdy qofchedy tched
okol otain ol olyom chdain chckhy lky shedy dar yshain kal qotchey keod ltair okal qokeey aiin sain sor qokeey shcthaiin okal qokaiin am

chey lkchedain ykal olto ain dar qokal qokal ol okeey dar opchor dalyain ykchedol ol shor qos ol
daldy qockhair qokal cheedy shedy deol qokchy tched oksheeody raiin ofchair tees qosdy olshaiir raiin opchair
solaiin qokedy otsheor otal qokal okshaly dol shckhy qokchedy chedy cpho or qokchy otched opcheeeody cheedaiin chckhol oteedy ol

qokchey okain shey okedy qokchedy olshaiin qeol areeedy lcheo qoteedy okeedy qol cheedy aiin laly cthaiin oteey qoky shedy aiiraiin
opchor dain qoteey ral schdal dy areor lchor qaiin daro ctheeol qokedy lkain kan lkaiin lsheeo qotedy
ytody qotedy chedy shey olky ltdaiin oded kedair alody y okeedy yer chckhy dleey ycheedy ol shckheam salal chdy

ain qokchedy chckhey qotedy chctheed shedy res okain qokedy oty cheeor olkal kedor ltar sheey yshdy qolkaiin chedy shol qotedy
otchy kaiin qokar cheol kal solkd shal opdy leol cheedy ain qockhedy oteey keeos kedain solkeedy ol
ofchey ty otary okaiin shdar qokain qokeedy ain qolked chey qokchedy qoeody opchor olyos saledy dam oty chol otal dar lkdy

scheol okchey shdor ytaiir qokchedy chedy qokal ol olkey y shol otaiin olkeedy qol chey ol lkdal ral reeor ol
dyteeor shedy oed kedal qoeeam dain rdaiin kedy cpheedy ka ol ockhair sar y dal qokdaiin chdy odal
ordy shckhy qochol aiirey soldal olter shedy olyor dain sardy okchey olkain lsal chey odydaiin ol

cheody odysy qokedy qokchy shedy ops am chcthdy al dardy qoteey aiin qolkeeor ol qokey qol sairaiin
olteedal chedy saraim chcthees qokeedy ytg chal odedy rd okeedy ytees lsal ain osar shedy qokeey qokchey qoteedy oleeam salaiin
otshedy ypchedar tchain cphdy ain chckhey chedy otal ol okchdy al teed ol dar olkedy qoedol chdy lke or oaly

qokain qokeey y okeees chdy qokeeol yshed lkdy olkal sheeod ysheody olkey keedaiin lshg kaiin
shckhy qokchedy chedy oky okdam chey qokchedy ar otedy cthail qol qolkdair sheol chedam keesy ledam daiin lkain rom reedy chey or
solor ykcheol okey sheeeody olkeedy ykam qokdal cheesy qokar or ockhr shdain otar kal cheey shedy lkeoly qokeedy lsheeam shedy chdy

oldol oleesy ypchod reedy qockhair shckhy oiinol olkal shol aiin cthd ral lkeody ysho lcheeedy qopchesy chdy
okeey chees odey otey res pchain opchey ypches chedy okaiin qokaiin resy oryedy saiin qokar reod qokdair olyol
qofchedam dair odeey qokary olshedy daryeo ol pchedaiin qokeedy rdy oty qotdar shckhy peos dcheedy qoain olshal otchey aiin tchaiir ol

lcheedal dar ydair okaiin dar olkeey pcheol chey lkcheedy qokaiin cheed chckhy re oty otedy dain ycheeedy dain lchedy
qokaiin shedy qokchey otedy ytaiir orydy chol qockhaiin qotaiin qol ykeain sain dar qokeeedy qokeeedy reeos qoeedaiin shees olos pchaiin
tshor dair laiin cphg otedy odydaiin lcher ykeeedy otey otedy lcheedam okeeody ales qokaiin okeedy ckhdy lkey tdain roiin ar

ofcheey qokeedy orchaiin odor qopo aiin
okedy sheees qotaiin reor qokor
qokal qol tshor kcheeey otain qokchdy otedy dy aldol ychees otedy odor kchey alal qotaiin shey chey air

shckheo lkchdaiin chor cheedaiin okeeed taly ocheeey qotedy ol chckhey dar cthar peos sairedam scheeey chedy lsdain salail aiin

otshdy shar okdor okar dar cthair shol fchair qokchey qokeedy aiin dair qokdar dar taiin okal qokain yedy kchees chedy
qoky ltar sheey cheody dam shckheor qokchy qokain qokeedy or lkain ar qokal okchey okeedy ololy chor ltair daiin salody lseesy dar
chey alyey lkaiin lkchal qokal chol chey odyeeody ol qoky chs olteo ry oledair ytsaiin dar aiirom chckhy

okchey lsom pchm lsedor chckhy chckheeeody otain chedy kchedy scheedaiin ltaiir aiin ain otey ar qokeedy chdy otey lsody ain
ar otal soredy qokeedy qokeeedy lkchsaiin kaiin ocheedam qoteod ol qokey chdy qotoiin okchy qokedy opar air schaiin cthedy

daiin lchedy ockheos qopchaiin ocheeoy chedy ochor okar saleod chey qokedy sheor ods kar oddy qokal yteor

qokchey rs soley ol otar chedy sain al otcho ol daley qoteey opeeedy qoky tdy lod qokchy paiin qotedy

dar shckhy oiinedy ypchdal okar chal sordar daiin rar soreedy lsas ar qopchain syeedy saloiin ol

qotedy olyar aiin orchoiin odyedain shedy dchaiin tchedy cheol qokey dar chor cheeor okeey ltar oky olar ol
sheedy opchair cpheo dytedol qokedy ol daiin okdaly lchey saledy ypchr ain opchedar cheod dy cheeody y ysheeedy
lcheos okchedair cheol ctheody chdy dchedy qopchees olear or lkaiin ol qokal ol qokeedy okod dair sheey chedy kshaiin

cha dar lkar qos olkar ychedar olchs dar chckhedair or cheey raiis oliiin okain odyeedy aiin
chckheoy dolair opcheeeody aiin daiin olchees shey ychar ckheos keeos or cphed dal olshody lsheeody chedy
daryee ol okcheeody air okchey ckheedy shees olkaiin lkchaiin ockheeo aiin seeal lteeey ral solo solary al teos

qokchey qokeedy lsedain lshedar chedy opcheeo chdy otey chdy daireos qopar dar dleey chedy qokeey pchaiin lydy qodol lchedy

qoty am otedy aiiindy qoty yts chaiin lkaiin qochedy olky rod qokeedy y oded okaiin chckheal opche al yeeedy
rchedy sheol oteedy shedy qokchdy qotes okedy rdain cheam lkches otchy y qopeeeody otedy oteey ochey kcholy dar lkedal chedy
okedain chedy qokeedy ytedar shedy lkos chckhy qokeey par oksheor dair daireor dal ain ol cthsairy raiir aiin

ychsdy shedy dchair sheol lshaiin lkaiin qotchain ar olkal cthair dar kor chol qopoly chedal ytchedy
olar qotedy ykchor dy okedy ar opcheeody shedy lkcheody qaiin okchy saleod lsam am yeeedy qokeey qokeey dar
olteeoy chedy okedy okshd qokey qoal opchedy chey oiinain cthos ain aiireod aiin solo yshor qokar qoky ar qoteey chcthey

dair reod ol qokal qokdam ychedain qoeain qokaiin kaiin chey qocheody schedol chedy ordy tcheor lkaiir al lkos chckhy
ypcheor y chey lcheer shey chcthedor dar cphes saled qokaiin qokedy teor dalyeeedy scheols ar dy qoldair saleod cphdy otchor
okd ral qokeey ol qoky ofcheody chedy dy chckhey al qokal ol daredam qockhol solo lyaim chcthar chckhy

dleeol ytal saireos sched olkar ol daleedy dar oaiin lkaiin qocho qopchor olyaiin qokeey chey alyo qopedam
ardaiin chdy lyee cpheols al ypcheey yka aiin olkeedy ldar opcheeody aiin kal cthear soleey chckhy doreeor lsaiir sar shedy qol
ykchaiin aiin daiin oain qolkedam qokedy saiin saleeam oteedy dar shckhy raiin qotes oo dchdal tees shedy olkeedy am

shckhy al qedy shckhair qokal oteos saiir qochedy qokeey qoksheol qotey qoal qokdal oddair ol cphsaiin qokchedy qokedy ol yesy kaiin

darair saiin qokal sham ain olkar chs chckheeo solkedair aiin ycheedaiin shctheody ltr ral lyor qokeedy aror
dar otal qoteey redol qodar ysheol saiin odor sym shais shey oteeey qochol oeo chedy y okeedy chckhy
lshes sardy oteey aiin aiiinedy qokeedy lseol cthaiin qaiin qokeedy shedy kchaiin aredam qopchom aiin

okchdair opched okey dsheear odedy leol cheey shedy qoteey oteey oko cthdain salor okeey chedy orchal y tchedy

areey qokeey chedy aiin qotar chdy qotedy shes oky fchdam cphed qokaiin aiin qopcheor ain qokchy ykeal dal okaiin aiin
qokey oleeeody otedy ykchaiin shey ctheoy shedol omedam okedy olkchedy ches yeedal raiin oteeos okeeos olshd aredam qokeedy dam aiin
qokey dsholy shey otal dar daiin sheey otchaly odaiin otal cheol qockhey oty qol okeedy daldy solcheody oteain pchor

chor yched olyeeaiin qotedy opchey cthaiin ctheeed ol olteedam okeoly qopchaim chey cheeos oled okal qokchy otedy al toiin al
oiiineey ol opcheeos lkches lsoiin qotedy aiiineol qokaiin opair otshedy dam rcheedy air oeos tdain qotaly

okes ypchdal qokaiin qokedy rcheos ypcheed chedy chedy olteeedy sain chedol chor kdaiiin fchesy qocheody sheear y
okeey lchedy dal dykain daiin daiin qoar otain lkeeedy chedy kedam dchear tedol dar okeey okain dsheeedy tchody chedy

qoraim otedy oles cthed ches olkeey lkchal daiin ain sheeos qokain opched lkedy okcheol dy oair teos

dar tsheedal lshody olkary ytdy kchaiiin y daiin shckhor qokeedy qokdair ksheey cheol dchaiin qokain sheol or
qoty odydy lcheedal chedy ykched qokey ar okeedy kedaiin or cthdy chedy qoldy shol oltor oky lsheedy qokaiin qol

qokar shey okedy ytdain sheckhy ked shedy lkchain chey lkchody ar qoteey olcheees omdal chey opeear chdy
daeor cheey lshody qoedair oee oched lo reeo otas qoeear ctheeedy octhaiin qokal daiireeedy
lkeody okar y oteey lkedy chedy qokedy lkchdol qots shedy dar pcheear lto daiin qokey qodaiin qotal qol otal qotaiin opeeor ol

otal oledaiin pchedam oteedy rcheey qockhedy cheey shedy dolain opcheeey aiin ldy al ycheod daiin ol ockheeaiin ain

okcheos keeey olshair qoty ofcheedy chedy lkeed chdy ledain aiin okoly chedy oteedy chdy qokey chol qdair qokedy dy chcphair okeedy pchain

dar okain dy qolkeos qokeedy qokaiin qokedy dsheedy okedy alyaiin aiiraiiin reedy kcheeedy dy oshaiin oltedy ytody ain ary al

dar sar ain qokar ar okal odyeeey lcher shey aiin dchdy opain qolkdy olkain qokey olcheoly qoeedy oteey shedy

rchaiin cthd chedy otal chdy qokchey ol tshr ykair lcheedal ychaim dy aiin olyedol y qokeey aiin osheam okdam oteey qotedy

oleeol opchaly lkedar ol lkain yteod otain cheey or olchsd chdal shedy dal deol opchedam
okedy shy oldaiin dar qokchey cthol odam dar chdy shedy teol sshg olsheeo kedor dar teain y qotedy
tsheedam shedy roly qokeedy qotalsy oteeedy ol qokey or kshas chedy chcthar am qoteesy qokey raiin oror otedy kchsdy ol dain al

ody qokaiin chaiir solkeed pcho daiin shckhy qotedy lkaiin qochain otey am qokal ar olkaiin oledor reor

lsheeody chedair otal or olshe chckhar lkdy qockheeedy lkees tod shedy dal octhain osear ytsd ol dal olso

cthor arain qoteedy olseos ocheedal okeeody shedy ytcheeedy qoksheedy aleeo qol shcthody chdy ytcheed qokedy chey tsheor chdy

shol aiin okey tedy solar ycheody okchedor qotedy shol rched chdy ypchedor lshd otaiin am qokeey saldain ain qockheody choiin aiin

qokal lsody kan oleedy ar otal saiin or keees qokdam ol sheey qokain otaiin qokm tsheos soledaiin aiin teeedy
oty chdy tchain olkey qol lkain kdam chcthey qokchy olyor qopeam sheedar qokar ychsdy dshal lkain chedy okaiin oded
otsho lm lkchdo kg qokal keal ain saiin chey okchedy dar ledam okeedy odedam ral olkedy shey redain ytail chey aiin qopcheeedy

odaiin okchom air tsheedal ky odydaiin opchdy chiin pear ypches chckhedal dar shar opchor tcheedar keos

oteey dshary otoiin lteod pchedam olkeedy okcheody dar cheey ar kail qokchedy olshdaiiin shedy aleeos rsd ykedam
scheol arm oshair qokeedy or oleeody chckhy saiin cthair qokal or cthees okeedy peody olkchdy chedy daiin dar

solkeain chor dar ctheedaiin kdair oteedy pchdy lchaim dam qokchey ltdaiin qokaiin qol chey qokchedy dar otedy ocheos dal sardar opchear

yor ykcheey shedy ocheedal chedy aiiineol saloiin air okchedor keeody lchedy chey lteeo or daiin al qockhed

ar ofchedy qopes y shal shl olkchdy qopor ctheos tor shsy qooly dar qopchail cheol qopchol

ar yeeey aiin oeor olkol opair deol oshaiin olyal reor qolkaiin shol qokeey qokedy tair daro

ykcheody reeey yeedal kedain ykain shedy chey otchedy shdain keedy yts ar qoeear olcheees shckhy odyal otaiin olal qokeody

okchor kchsd lkche dar qokeedy reesy dar rchedaiin lkchs lcheeoy dar pcheey sordy shol aiiinaiin qokchy olkchedy shedy

olkeedy otedy oteey ofcheeol ran qoiin otair dain daror qokedy qoky chey alyedy oreos opchs kody shedal raiin

shol ytdam aleod dal reeey odyody qoedair pal cheedy cheesy odeeol pchom aiin qokeedy ol orod

qokchey kain tchedair kees sheedy ltod qoky shey ar oair saiin okchdy oteos ossy y qokal dsheedy lkm qokey ykd pchdy
lcheaiin chedy daiin am aiire qokain qokeedy olyaim daiin rshdal qokeor lcheol okeey dar dy sheey ycheear ytd dal aiin
okar yteam olshaiin cheey shey schedy sheey otaiin lkchdaly lkcheedy lkchain chcthedal qodam shol peeod raiin osy otedy

or ykchedol aiin tcheam lshaiiin qotaim shckhy rdor chedy lchey aiin qokal air yshaiir qokchedy chedy qockhair dy kchor
lchor daiin okedy lkchar olchdy daiin lchaiin chcphor dain am opcheeos qol qokchaim teeo chckhedar qotain qoked
ytchain opchaim dair lcheedal dar lkaiin ar opchal qotair ykchees teo qokedy lkor lkedar olr oltdy shs daired dal olyeeedy

oty chdaiin chey alyain olkal ytody olchoiin air qol cheey lseeey lchain yshom shs ordal saleal qokaly
chckhy ochain tchaiir ol cham qokeedy olkain odyedor chol dar otol fchol okal cthor riiin rshdy shckhy kedam cheol sairey qokar qolkdy ar
ocheedal chckhy kcheeedy osos shey qoksheo aiin qokchey air toiin keedy qoky dar yshedair ol dalyey oeal sheey ol

cheeey al dair cthedy lkain qotees chckheeody okedair olcha lchedy chcthary tair qokeey okedy chckhy dedar kol
rchs odysdy shod ofcheey qopcheed dar shedy otal dar ypchear olkaiin odedy tedy lcheedal dar opchr shedy lkear
aireey dar ykchdol olches qoeeey qocheody or qokey ychair ddar lkdair okey sheol shedol chy okody chcpho chedy

cheol lcheaiin olg okain ol sheol cheedy chol daiin lkain rdy ctheeal ykeos cheey sheedy lched ksheeedy sheol sheol ykeeo chckhy

oky qokain qoteedy cphed qokaiin am qopchod y
yair opcham y shaiin ychdy otedy
daiin reor oldaiin or saraiin qor or schos rody shcthdair cheey qoes ol shol lcheol qokal cheol
otshor shor qoedal ar oltor dain cheey ytdor chedy dain otaiin chos keeor keeo qoiir ol
cthedam otar al olyom chckhy chey okchedy qoedal or cthey dain dardair chol qokal pcheear qokain shedy cheey kan aiiinaiin okal qol

shedy sardy sar lkchedal olsheo dair shr y qokeedy daiin ychaiiin dar schdar sshair
cheey shey opchedaiin air td aiin ykes oky odyg qokchy shedy ltaiiin reedar ar ockhed sheody tchm qaiin ychaly
chcthain dair ral shckhy oiinain ykcheol tchaiir aiin soleo reeod keo soredam lkam lteoly saledy cphair

aiin okar qokchdy tair daiin aiin daiin cthdy chckhy dain char chedy orchd y ocheedal chedy oteey ychas qol ykeol
qokshaiin okeedy oteey otedy okal sheeor shedy olky cheol okedar olchdaiin kshdy cthaly dykeor ol chcthr oiindy chees pchdal
lchey ain ypcheedaiin shedy dady olkedy al yedam ykchor teeody dar ctheol chcphedy okaiin ysheol ked

okeey chedy oiiineo ychedar chs oeody qotar or dy cheey chdy qoteedy shar choiin sheey chedy chcthaiin lkas chom soraiin
ysheol orchdy rd ol okey sho ypcheeod odyear pchaiin salor pchol qokar ain shckheeedy otcheed chedy
ocheedam chedy qokeear lte sheody al shsdy taiin lkain kal qoleal okchy otedy odyd ain orees tair okdaly chedaiin pchaiin

dcheeedy qotiiin qotedy lkaly aiiiney opchy qoed ykchan rdaly ches shedy reeey tsheaiin ykais reedy chcthedy
oshain lchear oain scheeody cheed qokaiin okeedy redol ol qokaiin lkchaly olkar ckhor olkey oks qofchedy dam sheey tchedam
dar otal chol oteey ychal kar okaiin qopeol sheody aleedy arey ody soley qokaiin ain otcheeo chckhy

y cheedy lkcheesy chey chedy qokal qokain ledy qol qofcheey saldo qotedy lkain ytal daiirair shey dshal qokaiin yshor
qokshear tedol reees y dalyaim okedy olchody ldy kchedaiin ckheees lsheeey aiin dy cheedy sheedy lkaiin shedy
oeody chey chedy ol tshedam lol tshor dain otsheal yshedal ychedor olkain aiin qotal aireo ykal lchain aiiredaiin taim

okaiin otan chey ol ctheeody raiin qoteesy qokar ltal chor aiin areey okeey redor sheol chan oteey redol ckhr qotedy
qokeey qol cthom okeedy shs shok ykedam daiin ar kal lchor kchees qopchaly yshdy odyal lkcheees qoreos kchy ol
dar okeey kshol sheol cheedy qotear dal qokeey chody chcpheedy dsheesy shedy qokeeol y shedy qoteedy ol qokchy qokchy ycheeody qokain ocheody

shody otair opcham reeeody otedy qokol pair dchear ysheo dain qokar qokedy qokchy saiin qotedy lseody aiin chcthdy chey solkal odeol
olkaiin chdy opcham aiin lkain shey ypchdal lchedy sheol cheol qokey ytedain opcheeedy shedy sshdy olcheor ardy
shckhy y dal dchor lkaiin rees lchedy qotar dcheeedy oky cheear ypchair shor solksaiin ockhdy lse okeedy ral qokaiin ol

dar dalyol oteedy lkeos olyeos shedy daeos ypchaly tsairy sheedy yshor opchar qoal otaiin olshees raiin
opchor opchais chdaiin al sareody lky kar qoky qokedy oteedy qotom kedar chdy tdaly olcheod daredam
qol qokal ol shcthedy dal oraiin oaiin qokar air qopesy lts qokaiin qoedal olsheor dam dykdy odo

qokal chdy dcheedy kody lssdy lteeey qoaiir qochdar qoky qol oros raiis lkches olchd chckhey aiin
soiineor okcheey sain opchor opcheeoy qol otchdy chal qokaiin ol ykchees ytedain chckhy opchedaiin lchedy cheey ykos shol ar
dshdol qokedy chedy odeedy oksheol dain al yches chdy daiin daraim tain salees lchedy qokeedy ol dal oeeedy

oke yshdy aiiinair tsheer dshdol chckhy okal olkaiin qokain qokaiin qokeos okchaim dam qokeey kee lkain shedy okeey chcthain
dchain tched cthedair fchal orched tchar shedy okain opcheol saiin otaiin qoteedy olcho solor dain reos qokeedy chedy olkeey rchol
oky shedal qokeey al cphdaiin raiin oeol dair cheedy odyedy shoiin lchor opchor daiin oteey shdo qotchey keeo soley

aiin oiineeody raiin okeey qokeey salor qored lkain yshedy ocheedal chedy dalyeeedy tsheody lkor okchedaiiin olkain dshar qokaiin ar
dsheeey aiin lo ain cheey ltody sheod chor ol ykedy qofcheeey aiin ypcheol sheey chedy qokeedy soeol
lkain qokedy shckhy dar opcheeody oksheol qaly sheey qodol ol lcheo qokedy shcthaiin saiin chaiin qockhedy qokeey arol

okes otchdy qokain ral qokar lsedy shol ods air shody ckhdar ytchees reeey shedy dam solcher shey am qokeey qokchey ols olseol
cthair tsheos schedar chdy chor qoeesy sheor dy qockhdy saireody olchdar qoky chedy okeedy reed reees y
areear qol otaiin odedy sairdal leeedy qopches lchedy lchey air qokeedy daley otshedy saiin ol qotchey dar qokeedy sheeey ol

cthedam lys chedy opchsy fchor okal dar lkar dsheedy odar saiin tshor opchees taiin teor ain chctheal solkeees aiin
lcheedy chdol raiir qotchdar otal ckheeody raiin okeedy cheol ykeeod okeear shcthdy odydal shor qokey qokedy qokeey aiin
sheody yshm qokar olcheeey shy lsheeam ykeal opchsaiin otchedy shey shes qoky yteeo chcthor oey cthedar lsheeor cheey al opchor

leol lym qofcheeey olches kedam chey qofcheeoy kais qodaiin ykchair dar tchol qokchdy oleain qokchey otedy oteey y
olsd dsholy yshair kg choiin rchedy shedy opchal ytd qokeeedy qokedy sheod reor shol lsheeos qoeedy lkod
olail otedy chdy qokeey tsheey dair oleedaiin qokain olyeeam am qokal ol sshdam lty odaly olcheed chcthdy lkedam

sheedaiin qokal aiin qopchaiin qoky otedy qokain qofcheedam olais tcheody laiin ypcheor raiir lcheedal shey chdy qolkear tcheed shedy
qokchy paiin yshdol aleedar shedy qoteod dy ytd olso chckhy dady cheey qotedy al sain otchdy qokeedy lchedy lchor kcheeal or opchy qokedy
chckheedaiin chey lkchedair reedy daldar qotal sheeod ychdar areeor olchal reain chor qotsy dsheedy shol shey

oleoly rdy lkaiin oiinedy qokchey okain qokar sedam otain opchedar aiin sar am qoksheor okain or qokey olchoiin pcho
ckheeody shedy olchg tdy cheey ol yshedain sheear ked lteeor ol qolkedy tal y shey
qokchy to cheey aleedy sain olsheeey qokchedy chedy okal dar chedar ykdar otaiin qokeedy aiin chedaiin qokain qokaiin qotaiin kedal ol opchees shedy

dy odyal lkaiin qokeedy qoeeody solkail qotchol chcphol ty oleeor tchaiin saraiin cheey or cheol dy lchdair shedy
ain okar lkchos ykeeody qokain qokeedy y chey otchedy chedy dy odyeees rshor qokeey ytchedy olky qokain dain sheey ain
ofchedy qokeedy ochor aiiinedar chdy qokeey ytcheor y dal daleody otol qotain oleedaiin olter ychsy kdol ycheeod rod

shckhy qotchedy dshiin otain olchoiin dareeedy shckheey raiin lkeody dchdaiin qoar oteey oksholy shedy otal aiin teols keo kchy al

oky chs qokcheody oksheeey lkaiin qotcho qokchey ckheor lkain keeam sheol ol qokey chckhy oedam ykchor tchody okain kcham aiin

om qockhod qokal lkaiin kdaly keeey okedy qokedy ain qokar ke or okeedy olair dy ochor chcphol tchees qotedy

dar areal pchy kdol chol okal ol tdy dchaiin oks ol dy oteey lteam lyear tees qokedy

lchedam okeey qotedy qokal ycheeey shedy dar okedy qokchedy shedy shesy olkm okal olcheeor al sheckhy qol qotshed ctheesy ol

dar ctheo opchor shedy otal chey shas ros odye qokeedy chckhes shes rchdaiin lteol dykedor chol qokal schaly

qoky lchedy taiir oiinain opchair olkal qokaiin qopcheal shedy qolkdy ar araiin otaiin aiin oteey odor okeey qotedy qoty aiin syd cheol
okcheeedy daiin qoksheey okeedy dchedy qokeedy okal ain solaim daiin yteeor chor ar cthey qoky olcheeor res dar
leol dchdar tdaly ol dalyo lky or tsheedal dar dy ral sain chal ltair qotchy okshsaiin opchaiin

tsheeoy chedy or aree pchy otedy qokain okcheam shey qokcheeody ychiiin chedy tdam ain shedy tshdy syedair olshdo am qopchaiin

oteey otedy qokchey lsedar cheeor ain chey qochedy okol otear pchdair okchor oseeody shedy aiiineos qokeedy or

chckhdain chedar olchs lshedor ytaiin dal cheey lsal chor aiin olkchey lss chedy aiin qokchary ted qokchy qokchy shedy al
olkey chedy qokchy qokchy choiin cheey rdal qotal qokeeor peor kchdair opchedy okeey oredy kcheeody am qokey oldol qokain oddair
sheody chckhy qopchr qokchedy shey aiin so olkey solkes lkeor sheesy leody ltr ltal oteey shedy qokchy cthod y qokeey ytg olkchy keeedy

dordar daiin lkeol qoky okedor lsheor okedy oryey dalyedam qokal dshed dareody sheol qokal am otar otedaiin aiin
oledar chs aiin osor dal ol rchy char qoedain shey sheeeody qoteedar chckhd dared
laiin ood olkeey solain qoksheol tcheedaiin lsedy ordy ar qotchdy qokeedy olsdy chedy chedy chdy qoteedy dyteeol qokaiin aiin

dyko tiir kes shey solkdain shey qokey chedy dal shedy yteeody shiin sheedy okeesy cthaiin octhed kcha chol
lkain chedair or lchaim qokeedy dair ycheeey ar aiin dy chor chesy ol oedy qopchar ke peos sorey
dchol tchr shy chdol ol dam opedol saiin sheeo qoky solkeain oaiin lkm olyeols otchedy shedy qokeedy qokal ytal lkain ol

olkedy ol qokal aleesy sheey qokeedy ol dched qokeedy arol shcthedy okeedy ytal ykchedy otshdy qockheeedy qokdar
al qokar psheedy ar yeedam chedy qolkol tches y qopchdam qokedy dordy cthain shckhy y oteey olkaiin oteeor ol
dchs cheeal dar qotey chckheod qoteey shedy tsheer chory sheols dal olchsy olcheees schedy solcheeedy sheey chedy

qockhor ykcheeo shey okar otedy or qokchor yshor chedy aiin dytey dam qotaiin ar lkod olteey qokeedy or

shckhy oiinain qokcheeody shey qokeey shey al okey aiin soly yshor lkdair okal aiin qocthdal kd ksheeol ol okedy opdaiin cheol

lkedy rchaim lkedaiin rok qoteedy shady shedy yteedy chedal ain schsy qol qokal qoar tsheaiin ykee ledy
ood okey redal sordaiin lsaiir okshar chey salain opcheeaiin ol soldy chey alyey lchey oiindy ol yshedam
olky lsheeor chedy qokeey soldal solaiiin chal oeol darol qokal olchody dshd aredy qotes qotsheody otedain dar

oeor pchedy qokar ychaiiin qokchedy chody qoteam ykaiin orcheedy sheds kor olkeey aiin dar qofchdal teos

rdaiiin oteedy chdy qokaiin cheedar qokedy y shckhy kair lkeeey otd lsain lchdy qotaiin qokair cheey otedy dair cheol

oddaiin chckheedaiin ol cthy okeedy dar shor kdol ycheey daiin lkchdain olkchdy okeedy ol lkaiin qotchaiin okeey sheody qoees qokair qokey qol

soleoly keedy pchor qolm okeey shol ykeos lkaiin qocthey dchedy oteedy chcthdal ykcheor ty keeody al sain dar

olkchey olcheedar otar raiin otaiin qokedy ochor opchedaiin aiin aiin qoky dar qokeedy ctheo rsaiin aiin re qoeedy dain rdor chedy

qokedy air lyee qokedy orair opchdar lkedy qokeedy keeo qoky opor shol qool lchaim dal eseey okedal sheey shey
chol cthees ysheor sheol shedy qokar dshoiin dalaim daryeal otedy qokal chdy qockheor qotaiin qol to ol

lkeol sardy shoiin aiin kcheam qokain olshair dalyedor dar cpheain chol yeedal qoar ytedar keol
shal al solan shey ocher ychdal otar lsees shdar shckheey ka ches shedy or ypchom teey ykeeody lseod okchm
dchdy qokain ypchdy cham chckhaiin ytchedal lso chey otchedy lsheeos ychsdy choiin qokeeol teol shctho or

aiin lkain shey lkdy qokchey qokain salaiiin ltedain shedy rary saldol kesy odysairy oksheedaiin cthol

qos qol kchedol qokedy lchey qokedy rcham lseeody kd sdy qody qolkeedy chos qoteey aiin chol yor ctheesy dar

lsheody redar yshdar cphed otey lso cheey qolo solkdol olshiin okain chedy qokal lcheedal oksy ain ykchdaly chedy

qokeedy ltom qokaiin kiiin opeeedy tals otm qokey shey olsdy lkchedol sheey ycheod chedy ypchdy ol laiin qopod

otal chy qokedy qokeeedy ychair qoksheeor chan qokedy qol qokaiin opy pchedy lses qokaiin tey chor otedy lke aleear otedy

qokaiin ol dair okaiin solkesy oryeody lkchedor aiin qokal soleody salal okeey qokain saiin olcheedy saireor oded oshaiin tshaiiin shey ol
cpheeor shedy otsheol kcheeody okshed otshm aiin ltdain yteody sheody shedy pal aiin opchees kam dar laim
lcheeedy otar chdaiiin dar cthdain dar qokeedy ctheos qoky chckhy tchedar solkeeey ol olkchdy odyal lsesy chey raiin ol

qoky olchesy chsy ltes okal shey qofchor dain chor shedy lkcheor opchar okain okal air qokeey olkaiin tain aiiinor
lkain dar qokal ytody shedy olchsd shedy pchaiin dar ytoiin lchdair qokeedy opchor opchan chckheedy chedy qokchdy sheckhy lchedy
qokal lkchody ycheeedy sairor otey dar qopcheeod cheeor qoky chal olshary okeod olsaiin lkail chedy otar aiin

shol lsheeey raiin odyd aiin kcheam al solar chedy yeedal ol qokar lchedy aiiinor oteedy olshair qokar olory dorain
ofchod chedy okeedy qoky dar qokam qokedy dain sho ain keod oreeol chedy solaiin daiin arear y taiin sheeey olshedam dal shey
or yeal ka kdor dshedar oleedy tsheol qokeedy shedy qotaiin shees cheody opcheeey sheol qoeoy sheckhy dar

sain lsees olkeeey alydy qokeey chesy qocthain kchor lky okeedy chedy chey ain dy cheey ykady kedam aiireody
otey qol shedy cheedy ykdain chol dain oed opcheeos okshol qoky reedy qokeody saiin shedy aiin lcheeey qoctheor okeey qofcheody okshedair rchdy

saiin kor yeeey shy kdol raiin qokeey oro reeal qoteel shedy chckhy dam al chol olyeeey ain tals olkeor aror ykchy shedy
sed dcheor chey okedy shey odyedair olkaiin ar shcthe ltail qochdar qoty lkchaiir ol cheesy ream oshedy qoteey ol
qotshaiin okaiin odair chcphol oteedy cheed shol chedy okeedy lcheos dain olshd dykdy otshdy ol okey aiin cthy shedy

qokeeor ltedar sheody ytey dchod okain otal shedar ol otain qopaly okshd cheey dar lkor chcthedar chos or
okal qol daiin saldor ytody ked daredy ykchees lkcheedy shcthedy okchees solkeeody ykeeo rom soror
lcheeoy okg ykaly schor dal shckhy yteedy lchey aiin dalo cthed okchy kee qokar kedar cheed or

chckhy cheedy dar cthes shdal qokar lshaiiin qokchedy shedy qokaiin qokchedy shdol olkain dain eseey lsheeey ral oeos pchy al
qokol fchair qokeey okain qokaiin tdal opcheeedy shedy qokeey chedy shar shey okain olkeedy saly ain tcheees ol teeey olkeedy dar ody

dar qokey shedy shor y lkeeedy oseos chckhy qokshedy qokeedy rody raiin qoteedy ychr qokchedy otedy dsholy otedy
ksheeod shey okeedy saly aiin oledol oly soror lkedy pcheey dalyeey resy qokchedy keedar y qockhair
daldy ockhaiin oky cheear qotaiin chaly dy chey reedy ctheor okar solkeedy qokaiin lsod qolkdy okdol raiin

reedal dleal cheeo qokair lshaiin otain lkain qotedy sheol ordy tshor oraiin okcheal aiin qockhaiin

sheey shd rchedam qoky cheol tedy daair cphdy shdy daiin qockhain qokeedy ypchaiin ytchey yshaiin

qokey ar qoteey qokshedy qokeedy res lsain aireeol qokedy qokar dar qokeeedy qoteeedy ol dy lty arol lsheear or

shody otain or olya shedy lteed dshal otaiin ychaiin qokar dshsaiin yshaiin dalyaly qokeedy qokal lsdaiiin qokeedy al olyam chedy

lteod chor qotedy am otal chsdy qol shedy cthol sain ytd shedy otedy osedor chedy qopedair shaiiin otedy qokar ol
ool qokchdar qokar ykedy lcheor otchy saiin kair dshiiin dar chey ychedain otedy qokal qoteey lkcheesy chedy tsheeey qochdy al
olter chedy cheedy chedair qokeey aiin qotey oks lchey qokchedy shedy ain sarod shol shedy doleody saiin oledair keedar ol

chdy eseedain dar cthaiir oiinedy lkaiiin ar daiin daledy dar pchair daiin ardair qokeey shedy cheey olshas olcheedy odear

lkaiin shedy odyeeey okchedy dshsdy choly okedal aro olkchey opais dar teeey alyey dair aiin okcheed shckhy olkain oredy

shckhy olcheod okaiin solkedo qockhdy

yeeoy ar ctheeedy oltr qokchedy otedy lkchar ardal qopey chdy qoky dar yshy aiin oseeedy opcheed lteam qotchey chdaiin oredy

lkeody lchaim aiiiney yeody chedy lcheeedy olkey or otshdy chary tor or lkeeol chckhg opdy cheey ol
qolkain tal am aiireed aiiinaiin tchdam ykdam ksheor dar qoky oleeor okchor aiireeody olchdaiin otsheor chey lkcheds olseos

lair dam dalair dykaiin otedy reoly chedy teesy olchol tain ol laiin sheol aiin dar lkeos olsady aiin
chdy lkeeey am ypchy ol dy oor yches qokar qokedy rdol ckheeey chdy chey qokchedy choly keeey dar otey chol
ofcheedain tg qokain ytdaiin cheedy qol olteaiin qoeeody chckhdain lchedy sheey olkeod ral qoteey keol olkar ain olseeaiin al

oky oteedy okg olchdam qokshol qokeedy olky ytr ar dshedar dar oteedy dod oteey chckhy qokeedy kaiir aiin sheol oo ol
cthair orchal oles cheey otedy oeor am tsher ar saiin chedy sheody lsheeey yaiin okaiin cheol qotal chedy shor ol

ofcheeol taiin orchal ckheed chckhey dar olshear yshaiin okches dar ykchedam qoteedy redy oreed lkcheear otsho or
opd ol dchaiin qopaim qokched qokedy daiin pcheey pchees oley oteedy ol oleey daiin otar odydol aiin
soldy shckhy otchedy chas yteedy chckhy ytam qokeedy qol qoar qokeey chckhy odyeeam opchdar okedy ltal lcheeedy teeody kaly

qokol qokain dar kedal am dair lkcheeo qokshdy qokeedy oddy saly qoar otaiin tedam chey oiindy am cheey y
qoldy orar otedy aiin oldol qoedair qokal ykeol okar chedy olkaiin qokain qockhain qokeedy raly qokshedar tain opchdol qokedy
oka qotedy oteedy olcheeey otoiin cheedy ykaiin qockheol osar odyes dykol kcheeos ain yches olyor oor

ain tees sheedy lcheeoy otedy qoteey ar yeer dshedol dam ltar ods riiin qokain lody odyiiin choiin lkain otedy
ar cheedy ychal y otedy qoty chckheedy qokal yke qokain taiiin am sol oteey chedy soreo dar
dchaiin olkeedy sheey shey qokeey oreody cheol opchr al tchedair odyedaiin dshody qoty reeod oleedy lkaiin shes qoeod qoldy

lchdair lkeody sheody chckhy otcheey dam ytsdy rr chedy otshedy aredaiin lteam pain
y osa chedy otal shcthaly olos pchdaiin aiin sain qotdair oeor oran chckhy yshdy shol ofchor dain otshdy
ar oeeedy sdal olyeeos olcheed oliin qokain olsheees lkaiin kar shedy shor olchar ckhedy

lshdy aiin al shckhy qokeedy chaly areey qokeedy lseeey okchedy chary qokedy okar ltd chor shedy
qorear qokeedy pchedam sheol osdal qokeedy octhedy otal cthair yteeey aiin ctheey olshesy qokchedy oly qokedy oshear yol
okar olchdam shaiis ychok ockhdy ol fcheeos keedy olcho qokeey dar leody chcthey shckhy rd cheedy shey

qoteos arm okeey okeols sheedy ky qoeedy roiiin paiin daiin rchor sm schear lchain
qokeedy ycheeo qoky qokain ltar chedy char dar qokey dar lkain dar okeedy otchey opody ledam opchor daiin ockhed orr shedy cheol
scheey sairdy qopcheeey ychy chedy okeedy taiin sshdy ckhoiin qokaiin raiin koiin otol opedy okal ypched otey lchedy lchdar

chdy ockheedaiin ain teol shey daiin yedam ldy opcheeey kaiin otedy lchey solkal aireey dar cthes chdy oshaiin qokeey okedy ykaiin
yeedal dar ockhaly sor qopchedaiin cheeody shedy kshos aiin cthedor dar sain qoeees dalyor oreal lkeeedy
cheeeo cheod dal shedy daryee qokedy chcphol olkeedy scheor daiin otchey oldaiin olyaiin qotal chedy ol leeed chckhar shckhy olsheol

cheed oleeody keos aiiiner ol olshal okeey opair solcheeor sheds kaiin qoteedy kal chey oiindy opedal air
qokaiin qol aiiram y olteeoy chedor qokain aiin ypchaiiin qotcheor qockhedy sshiir kair ypched ksheey chckhr air qokeedy sheey chedy
sheody dar tcheedar odyeeos aiin rcheo qokaiin qokaiin odyiiin ckhor qokeedy sairol saiin otar reeody chedy tcheain lteal solor

opchor okcheedar saleeey oledair or teeey qocthdy rshedam olkeey odod chckhd oteeedy qokedy okal or qotar reedy otaiin chedy
qokar cheol ody cthedain ychol cheey shedy olkar qokar qoteed saleeeo ltl qoal dar lseesy okey olchdaiin lchor
chy opear qokshair qokeedy redair dar shal olshedy qopchedair ar daiin rar sors dar qokeey yor qokeedy odedy

okal rody dolaly tcholy odydaiiin sheedy shedy chedy shckheal lchey otchedy shedy cheol qaiin qokedam qokar sheeor chey air
cheey lchedy cthody y aiirdol am oredy ofcheeod key otol okain chedair dadal olkal aiin qokeedy chedy chol laiin qotedy
shedol qokol sheedy chdy cthedy oryair am tail kaiin lkaiiin oteod cheey ykos sheey lchedy olkeey odyes shdam tshedam

ofchey qokeedy olkar y aiiram ol otchar qokain otsheor qokeedy ychy olkaiin ol qokar choiin sheey chckhy qokey ytdy
tshor lkeody yshdy lkas fchor ytchain char lkchg olkchy keeol opcheed oldy okaiin shey qolkdaiin chsaiin y
shckhy shy qoeoly qodaiin otar dar dchs ykedy orcheedal shedy qokol oteol daiin sairedam okeey qotain lked okeedy qol shedy

qody ain sheedaiin pod oky chedy tdo dar chor chedain qotam qotedy olkal dar olkchy y
chor keam chdy oteedy chey raiin reeey okchedy dar shctho lcheaiin shey chdol shedy laiin keeedy okeey chey am qoras ykdair
chor choiin qokaiin tor chckholy qokain opchdol olkoy okchdy ychedam qokeey ychor okchaim okchdor chd chedal dchdy dar olkchy air

dchs shey leol ar oteedy shos sar chody dchdy ain qoedam tchair dar qotsheol qokaiin okaiin aiin qoleos dcheeod otedy am
okchain qokal olcheed lsheod pchain aiireeaiin lsam paiin lchey qotchain qotar ychiiin shaiiin chedy qokeedy qokdair
shody qotain qokedy chedy shedair qokaiin tcheeedy otey oloiiin ckhol scheedaiin aiin y qockheody aiin cthed lchey lchor dcheeod shedy aiin

cthedam sain am dal cheey lkchdar qokchdy ar kchaiiin am oreor qokaiin olkedaiin sheey odyeeody raiin ytchain qokeedy qokaiin aiin
cheey reeam dal chedy soiineody tam qotain pchain lcheos qokar dar okaiin fcheedar shey chctheeedy opchain
chedy sairod shctheol qokal kalsy ychaiin ssheedy ol okey otedy oor lshail ltsd chedy qopchy aiin

seol dchs ykedy orchdair chey qokchedy olody ol chor cheey otedy pchol qotal chckheeey ol orcheor oksheod dar
shol shedy lcher shey okal qol qockhedy syok otedy shear shckhy okchedy keedaiin alody ltan pcheedy otedy shedol otaiin oteedy otm
lcheaiin dar daiin qoeesy lkaiin saley ctheos fchal rey olkain opchals qokain olchg shedy olkedair ol qokshor olyedy

ol cthary air oreos okeey sheody keedy yeaiin chdol qokain res odyos qokaiin teody olyeeo chedy kd qokain otchedy raiin

qokcheos okar aiin daiin chckhey aiin lsheeey shedy oleeey al chy sheedy sareody cheod dolol olyeeody olches qokain otedy

soiinedam shedy lcheedal chedy sareody qockhedy qotaiin chedy solkeeam daiin dshaiir qol sshdy al daiin tedy lchaiin odedy
qoksheal tchedal otedal aiin chdy qokal yeody dar qokal ltedar qotain olkeedy olteos ledy lkol qokeo qokom aiin
otar am dalyain solar ar lkedy okedy roly ychoiin dar chey chedy lkar olsham ol otaiin dar

lkdar shckhy aiin qokeey otedy rshor solos olod dam dalyor shey qotchey reeor qol qoldy qokeey areear olkam pchedam
cthdy qokchdy oldam al qol otchl shey pchs ychor dar daiin lteod dairdair sheol shg ykeo olkeey pcho oteeedy kaiin
ofchedy okeedy otchdy dar daiin qotal chedaiin olsheeaiin qokedy chckhol qokshear qokeedy qokar aledair qoair dykain qokeedy scheeol pcham y

otal aiin sar kol otal solkdy qockhedam lky okeedy qokedy dor otey qotody dar daiin qokaiin raiin otedy dain shedy olseody cheol
opchaim dair oeody okedy aiin qokeeol qokam kody chol oky aiin orom raiiin otchedy shedy saiin otsho ochaiin
ctheeol sey dykey oaiin qokaiin ain shory lshal olain chdy olkar shes saleds shedy qol

chedy qokal ykory dar sheol rsy am okal oldam lchey alyey qokeey dshdaiiin qol odod lchaiin
opchain qokal ole qopeody shcthedy doled otaiin qokaiin lsiir ctho oleeey aiin olkal sar ykedy okal otsheey otchair
dchor raiin dalym opcheeey chy otees oddair oteey dshl ar olyos ychoiin lkchy qokeedy kesy cheol

lsdor ol shar solcheody aiin sheol shckhedam sheol qokeeedy ol lshed olkar kiir olkal kdair qokeedy daiin olchy peedy or
ypchdy qokchdy chedy yshm kshor otchy otchy ykaiin tshain odedy lchedy qotol qokain dar ctheedaiin ol ochdaiin shedy ol
ctheol ledy okchedaiin qoo dal qockhor ykeeey olkchedy chedol tshm oles olyor olyeedal ol qotd qokeey pdal ochee qoteedy chol

oky chckhy tedam oteey cheesy dedam opcheeody lteeod qopol lkey dy arol chor kan dykeody chol
otedy dain dykeos shedy dar qokal shr chckheeam shey al dal chckhy shedy osedor ain kedal qokedy lcheedal dar cphg shedy ol
