dar qoteey lchdar dardy otar chol dal al yteedaiin otain raiin lchey qochedy ykchaiin qockhaly cpheer dar cpheols shedy chdy

cthdal opchdy sair lkear okar sheody qokal shey ochedy otaiin qokaiin cheol ocheeoy chedy solaly dain opes otal ol

oo dchdy lchaiiin salor otal dorain daiin chedy qotd oky qopeor ol chcthain kcham chedy solaly qokshor qopchedy

y olyeeody olail air dair dykedy dy opchey otal chiir cphey oty chs oshdaiin okoiin ofchor okeedy tedy

schedy schol cpheols olshar lkchal laiin ocheer shedy dcheos opcheedar aloiin lkchair oain okeey qokeey dar

oky chs shckhy shy chedy ykchaiin shar choiin pchedy shckhy oiiney chctheo qol qokchy ckheody lkain shedor qoa chckhy

doledy okcheoly olkain al shedy dykedy oey okeedy lcheedal ar otal shdor olches chdy shckhy ltoiin chor ry sored
ar cthair tshaiin qokchy ychaim okchail oiinedy ockheedar ltal daror qotchair rshdal qokaiin qokaiin odydam dar aiin

lkeeedy qokal chedor lss ain olkar olchaiiin qotchedy ches qolcheey reod qotar aiin dy lkain aiin qokchey lsheeedy

okchey ol ochear cheol opchsd choly dar qokeedy chedy lchedy daledy olkal otar odyal lkain okshey chckhey qokedy chor dar aiin

ctheedain olyes shedol rchs reer ol lkedar chedy aiirees aiin chedy cheey qog ycheo daiin qoked ypchair ytchedar shdol or

ofchain olkeedy aiin chey qotchol qokchy ykeeol opchedaiin kes olkain dair qokched ypchedaiin teos daiin lkchal qokaiin olody dar
olkeey okd aiin opchdain salesy tey cheey qokedy qoredam opchody chedy daiin sheey ched ykchaiin olkeey qoky qotok or
lcheaiin odyeols opchol qopchoy lsar otedy oltor dain aiin kshail dshais okeeor ykcheos kshol aiiinedy

shey opchedal qokain ctheoly olchedy kshol shckhy olkchedy ol otsheody chey chedy okeeod al okeedy qotedy shar cheol
soleos ykchear ol qokey ol okal y tchedy chaiiin aiin ty qoeeo olshair olkaiin tor dykeol olkeedy oteey qotedy

al oteedy qoreey aiin oteey olshaiir otain ysheol aiiinain dair aredy otedy opcheeody qotas ol qokeey lked tchar shedy
qolkedy tols paiin ockheal kchiin qokain chedy ockhdal chcthaiiin ykeol qokeey ytchain chcphain tsdy ar tchok aiin cpheees chdy

sheckhy dshal olkey lshal qokaiin oteedy dar qockhear lcheeey okchedy qotair dy lchedam okeedy alo olyaiir fchdy qoteedy ytody dchedam cphoiin ol
ykchaiin kchy qokedy oltaiin ar qokaiin olchdaly chol dal y qokey or chedar ol tedol ain yshy lseedy cheey aiin

ocheedain ts yteeody ra ol qokshed qotal sheds sheeey aiin chckhy cthoy fcheos okchg alyedy oteedy ol toly am
olg oteor cheey reeos alaiiin olcheeo okaiin chckhy olkal sar qochedy qotar ar shedy oro dy rody qol
qokchey tair daiin lkaiin okeed lchaiin shcthedy opchy cheor saiin ytchey leeod schdy chey dar schdair sain qokchdy lseedy chor aiin

lkain ychor shar qokchy kody ol shedy tsheaiin chckhy ypchair lcheedal otedy ar qokeey chol lkain qotedy oteedy ain okar chol
qolkedy olkeedy lchey y daiin rshor okcholy chs chedy kal okeey cheeos ckhedy yshain qokchy solcheor ledy kchedaiin shedy
chey sheeody chd oles oshaiin okcheeam ltey qokeey chedy qokchdy okeedy qokain aredaiin ol lchedy ypchaly qokeey al qaiin

rdor sheeor lchor lod aiin oeor qoteey soleor al otchdy dshal oked otcheeam aiin olkar cheod aro
dar aiin qokeedy cheedy otedy lkeeey dshdaiin dain re okdaiin chey qokchedy cheeos lses qoteedy chary olcheeam qokchy qokedy aiin
qokal shey qotsho qotchy saiin ycheeos otedy qokal lchedy otey shedy rsheey tor daiin ain okeed olkeey dar okchees qokedy

qokar olchedaiiin opaiin qotal qokchy qocthedy qopair teeeody odyedy dleey ar ykchaiiin qokchedy okom otain ofchedy okeedy okeey sheols qokchy ychedam
dareor olteedal qodaiin qotedy aiiinaly lkor chor chedy qotal lsg okoiin okaiin dar qokeey qoky dsheod qokaiin or
qotedy aiireear olshdor oty tedam okey oleedy lteeos ches qokeey chaiir reedaiin okeey chckhy otal qokey chdy orchg qokedy aiin

ain otaiin peeedy dchdal oteedy qokal ol okeedy aiiindy daiin olkchy chol dy kchaiin ain lshedair olkar shedy arey opchees ol
qokeedy kedal qoky otaim ytchey shedain chedy chey qocthey sheody lseedy cthaiin okcheeody al otar otedy qokaiin am oreeey aiin
olky cheol qopcheeey qokchedy chedy darol qokal okchdy otedam okcheols qokchedy ar qopdal sheol dardair okcheedain scheedaiin qol oteey chd sheey chdy

sheody qoeear or saiin qokeear ain qokeey lkche tair kchor ledy shey ltal am qokchaiir lkchd ran qofchedam
lkod al opchor okal pcheos otchy qokal shedy dar okeey lkm cheedy qol qokeey qokain qol qotshod shar olkal ychaiin cphaiin ked
oeody lkchedal yched yor osedor rdy okedy alyedy oky otedy oteod ain dain qockhey qokchy daiin ain olkey al shol chey ain

qockhedy ody ypcheol ctheoy air qokeedy shckhy oiinol olky oks ctheeedy qotchey opody qokar oksheeor or shedy ol
sshdy or qokchdy ykdal olyeeey qocthol cphsaiin shedy sheear oley sain chail aiin daiin qokey shedy dar olyedar sheeor qokaiin raiin sheol leody
okal or kcheeam oles y okeody qockho sheody oteedy qotedy otar ol yeer kor olkal shey dchaiin salaiin

chey reed ychedaiin oksheedy kchor cheeod ycheey daiin lkchal qokey al qokcheedaiin okeal ood qokeedy otar shedy

qoky olkdam sshed odeos qopcheor aiin
yaiin osam ain qolshedor salo
qoteedy ychail air qokeedy cheedy qotedy qokaiin keedaiin chedy qokaiin odeos qokeedy kshedy aiiinaiin ychal okes shedair qolkedy
qokaiin keeey redol oteey chedy kchedy doleoy kair qoky chedy tes ytedaiiin otain lsedol okey dar dalol qokeey lkm
okchor daiin qol okal otaiin teody otar ar opchy shedy tsheedal lchedy oty chedy qoteedy olky cheesy ypchol areol cthais chckhy

oltedam ley otol okain chdy kcholy reor qokey shas am qokeedy shey fcheeal shedy chor shedy chan dchedy okeey orod
qol olkedy qokedy tchair oaiin okeedy lcheeedy qokar shedy dal lchod shoiin soleor saiin cheol chcthedar dar qokeedy chdy
chckhey dar qokal shol aiin cthdol qoeeed ykedair dar qokar chal qokaiin ar cheain ardaiin or qoky dar sheol dsheed oteey shedy

chckhy qotshdy or ockhair okaiin opair ykeedar or sshdy dal chedy okal chg cphain taiin
shedy dain solchdy fchg dal lsheeor chaly qotey chedy cheey dar teeey aiin okar qotdair yshdy sareody ood
cthor soleos saiin chedy ychal dchs shedy ol lkaiin qocthain qotchy yked olyey ykchr air qopchail shs dar olkeedy or

qoteey ykas ol okeedy qog cphdy ol opcholy y keedar shey chedy keeey al chcphed qokeey lkeor lyod oeor
lkain qoeesy ldy y sair dshedal pcheedy al okain orail qotedy qotsheey y qokeedy olkedy ky chdy otal daiin otl dar
ytdy ted cpheeam kedain ltdam areor qokchy qotdal opchedy qolchaiin shol lkeody qokal shedy otsheor

odydy qokar or cphdy dy yty ykedor cheol lkaiin olkchedy oloiin chedy teey qokchdy chckhy
oded qokchsd aiin cthees lsar qoteeos shedy olkchey olkedam qokeedy chey oryor qokar dam roiin qokeey yteeey okedy ain qokeedy syedy
olky dar qoteedy shckhy qochear ood kchary am tchd ain shol sheedy y olyeody olydain shedy qokal otal lshy okain qokchdy chedy

yeer shey sain y dalyedy qotaiin chos ches oredy dy oredam daiin aiin dam rchdy dcheos tiir ar
qotar odysd chedy sorod saiin olkdor dar chey oiinedy kchedy scheeey shedy chedy olkal lko daiin otchey al tcheedar ol
qoky dsheedy oteey dshor qoty cheeor qockheos ykchedy qokeedy yeer chedy shar qokedy oteesy air lkeeey y teols dar

chckhey chedy ykchey shcthedar kdar oteeedy sheeey olchdol shedy qokal qoeor chey qokchedy okody py al qokchey air qokeedy olkar or
dal dshes otaiiin oltol okal okedy oiinaiin shckhy lseain qoked te ykeedain oteey qokedy otshdy otal chedy sorees or
daiin ches keedar or ssheor dam chedy sain ykair chckhas ofchaiin qokeedy qokey chdaly aiin olkeedy laiin

ar shody qokain qotedy lyeeol schaiin aiiindy ol okar chal qokaiin cheed qotedy teor shol qokaiin tain ary ol
olkedy dar kchy qokeedy reeody lsos chaiiin qotchear otsho okchey qotain aiin qokeedy daiin reod dykol olyeody qol
ocheos lked okedy qochdar dairedam qokeey lkedy qol cthedol aiin tcheeody chol ykchol ychdaiin shedy lkaiin dar okaiin okaiin chdy

sheody y qokedy qoky shedy aiin sareeeo chedy cheey chckhy dain qokaiin tchedam lses shedol araiin okchey olchal rchdal okeey qokedy cheol
otd sar oteedy olkeeey keam otedy oteey kshor cheedy otedy lkeoly dar ody am lkeeedy oleam oldam y
okchol cthaiin qokeey sheedy shsy olshar qotaiin olchdar chey y sheey or otal qokeey ykeedar aiin tm ol

ycheod sheey y qokeedy osor chol otshedy orar ain dsheedy or shey qokal cpheeor ol opcheeody chedy olchedal olkeey olkdar qokeedy aiin
chedy olkeey sheey lsheeor ytcheey ol sole lkchedal qol chdaly qokchy keal shol otaiin al laiin tcha reeey chedy y
tsheaiin qoeam otaly qokal dardy sheol oledy or ypcheam ol tchaiir lteeo keor daiin arol sheol aiin

dar lcheeedy qokar chedy dleey char rchaiin qoteedar qol otchy shedy kchedy olkeedy y aiiinas cheeedy
shol qoedar oks lkey solom ar qokeey lkdal lsg otain keed or oeey daiin qol qolcheeol cthedair or
lcheeol keedar qol olyr sheedaiin ol chey eseo ol shol lty odedam aireey ytes olkeey ksairy olor

ordy lyeol lchey ltal olyeeedy shedy ydair aiiinedy ykcheeol odyody lkdy shckhaly qokeey ar qotchy am

lcheedal chedy oraiin qokar aiin tedy chedy daldy rsheeol y qoteedy shey cheol dy lto air lyeam qodam okaiin ain

dcheo qokeedy chdy qokchdy dar or qokaiin tdy ochain yeaiin oledam oky qoteedy yteeody shedy qokchey cheeeody chckhy

dchol teos ykchaiin lkcheees chor okedor chg okched okal solkal okaiin dar ockhes olees qokaiin am
daledy saiin chedar teody sain chedy dam y pcheody sheeey kedy aiin laim dair ral qokeey chckhas dar

chey qotchol chctheeedy opchedam qotedy daiin soiineos ychar otedy qofchedam shcthedy lkam otoly raiin odyeor kched qoky dar
olkedy keel ol okeedy qokal rody qoes ar olals pey qokeey sheey shedar sheol shey shcthaly qotey al otchy schdy ol

rs chcphdar otcheeey qochedy lsealy okain dar qoteey qoked odyg dain qol qokal rchdaiin chol okeey qokedy oteedy qol ocheeey aiin cphes kaiin

ar dalol cthed qokeey lkedy daiin ytcheos oedy arear daiin lchedy yshedol shedal ltiir saiin ykdal

ypchdal ctheal dain chckhealy oteol shol qotair qokar dar chcfheds qol dal rees qokdar otaiin ol toly or

octhaly qokeey pcheor qokaiin kain qokchdy ol rchy qotedy chdy pchedy qokeedy qopchair otal chedy lkaiin or okal chey olchg kchedy
saiin kor chey chey qokchedy kdam qokedy qockheeedy ypcheeam ked ypches am sshedam olkeedy okshaiiin olkchedy oleols ks chdy

daryeedain ol olkal qoedol okchey qol ypcheeey air dain chey shy chedar yshdy ldal shas kedy qoteey kody otedy yshaly
olshal cheey shey qokeey ksdy aiin cthiir ar ol otal solchdaiin yka redy lkeor ofcheeor odyedaiin dar daiin darain

qoked saiin qotar kiiin cheeey keeedy okedaiin cheol qokal shody otain olcheod aredam okeey salsairy chedy opcha dar

tshedam okeey ykeedaiin olkos chdy okcheda ol shckheey ykchod okchor soly okeedy ol raiin okchar lsheeam daiin ol

ldal otaiin ros otaiin odyeedy sheedy dchedar ches choly aiin cthr ycheeor sheols qotedy air dam shedy

ctheol qokeey ocheody ol olkaiin raly qokal pchaiin oteeor y oles yteees lkchedaiin pchol ol qokcheeedy shol chey oksheedy dchm aiin

ofchol otchaiir oiinol lchaim lain shckhaiin qotal otdair shcthr qokchedy ar okchor kchan lssairy shckhdy qokchy qokchy chedy
shcthaiin qokey ytar qokeey saled okal lssy olshaiin qoteey qokain chdy ocher lchedy lcheedal oledol ycheol qolkeoly or qotdal
lkedy daro qokchdy shedy olkeey am sshal air qoteey qoko qokar ain ctheeedy kdaly pcheear shdo ksaiin okchy ar

shckhy aiin lkdy qotoiin ars ol shcthdor ral al qotedy dchdar qokeedy qokchdal lchair saiin okal qol qokedy or
poiin aiin qokedy daiin opchdal opchin qokedy or ypchy qoteedy rais qokeedy chal cheey chedy daiin cheedy ain saiin olcheeo yair ykchaiin
okedy qocthear qoky chs or oteedy arear qokeeedy olsaiin olshos ol ykcho qotaiin lkcheedy ody chcthas qol salair

ar shody oteol cthedy qotedair chey keeey am orcheain kd lcheaiin chedy okal lchedy qokey olcheedaiin chckhedol or
qolkedy olkeedy saror otchy saiin shedy cheol otshod qokey reedaiin yteedy lshear daiin ltd shol ol pchy chedy opcham or
cheey olcheeed qokchdy chckheain dalor daiin lsdaiin ypcheos osod oeeedy chedy otchy shedy oteedaiin chol lchaiin cthair

qokaiin olchedol chedy oteedy olchod lkchr am opchsy aiin cphedol keol chdy lcheeey chedy olkeey alain okeey qoky chedy daiin okaiin chdy
ody sairdy otar chckhal otshdal tchsy lchedy dy ar dal chor aiin shedy dal osho dair lted qokal sham otaiin aiin
qofcheer okdo ytaiir rdaly fcho lkaiin qokchedy lseeody shedy qofchedy teeo olcheedy qokchy aiin qokar chedy kchy qol

opcheos opches chckheed ochdy reoly chdaiin qokal or daiin oed qoteedy lchey alyol oshor shol oteey qoeedy ol okaiin pcheeedy
ykcheeedy cheey okshedol shckhy chedar lseeeody qokeedy lchedy okar qokedy al shcthair daro soleeo cheed oltedam chey okedy cheol
saiin cheol tchr reeody dar scheeody qokedy qoteedy yeeoy ar opcheam shedy opcheos ol ypcheam chs yshor qokchedy aleor otaiin qopaly sheey rchor

or qokal ockheeedy qokeedy shol raiin lchey olkeeor olchody dar dal sorey she olkeedy shedy okal ol octhor qofcheeey chol
chaiir odydor qokedy dy shckhy keol shedy yedam sdar qokeey shedy qoky qokain odyeam ol oteedy qokar qol cpheedy ain
scheol otshor okey chedy cthee al qoty roly ykeod aiin olkedy qokeedy keedy kchor daiin aror ochaiir cheol

orol odair aiiineedar chd sheey qol lkeed kr odyody chedy aiiinedy cthedy or okchy oteedy aiin
solo lchor opcheeo ckhody okshair saiin qofchor osar olkody sheeor otsheal kchar qokeor qokeeedy qokeeedy ain
dam reain qokchey aiin taiin cheey olsheeo chcthedy olchy chedy qokol ckhear qokeey otaiin odyeeo olshed solchdaiin al

lchedy shol chedy qoky chedy dal lked chcthar kaiiin aiin ledy sheedaiin sareeedy shol areedy aiin solcheeol ykeda chcfheos
dyteeol shedy olseds sholy choiin oddaiin lkchaiin cthor oreeod qoeeey lcheedal otedy aiin sardair shol pcheedy qol kody alg ar
lchey kaim yeeoy chais ol qoteedy chckhey otain tchedam pchdy qoky chol tdaiin chckhy octhoy qoedor qoteds sheeey aiin

laiin qoky dar qokeedy tsher chckhy dardar olyam sheol oksheol otaiin otain lkchedor aiin ockhedy tary ol oeol qokchy dar
olesy okedy lkchiin oto qoteey qokdal lfchm ain chedy otedy al ctheey qoteeey qokchedy raiin sheedar aiin qoeeod sheol dar olkchy aiin
lcheedam okan qokedy lseos qopcheed ol okchaiin qokaiin reeor sairear qokal ar odeeol chedar qotedy shiir chckhy

soledy cthed dalyedy qoleey sheey alain aredaiin chedy td olchedair keeody ykar okal lchedy sshor
sheol ykeeo qoky por chcthain kshy yteeaiin keeedy otal ytdol odysd chy qokain chctho dar
ody oteey oltor qokal qoksheody sain okd y okche air qokaiin dar qokeedy okaiin ykor qokchey ol toiin lchedy olkchy ain

ofchor ychaiir rody raiin dain qofchm air qokeey ar otal ar qoky olchdaiin res dar lo ar
qotshdy orches ychaim saiin ol ley opchees lchedy odeo shok opaiin qokeedy cheey lsol oteedy saleeey oledor chedy
ctheo olkar lshees saleam kedy qopchor qol qokal chey odyody chedy tsheeoy qoy oteeos saley

oraly opchg pol qoky qoeeor shal chees qokaiin ltesy otchedy dshas rod dair lkchal ordy okchdy chsd chedy
oair qotal lsar soledy sheey chdy otaiin dar qokey chedy dam qoedy lkeody tchdy shcthaiin dair chedy
aireo olchedal ykaly olkal keeal qoeees qokaiin aiin shckhy qochey oo sain dar olyedal lses chedy otey chedy

dcheedy qoeod chckhey cheain dar qokal sar al tedy ol qokeeol qokedaiin chedy sain chdain arys or fchody or dain dar
otey shedy qopcham sheedy olkaiin chod dam lyedam qoteedy qokar shees ksy ol lchdair olkar lshedaiiin otain chedy ypcheedaiin aiin
lcheedal chdy osheol sheol lkdy shody fchey cthedol chedy olky oleeor schedy qokey lshal ar qockhdal olyedy

chdy dy yor olkeedy otshdy solchedy okeey qokaiin al oteey lchain aiireeody chedy aiin qokey ole ycheey otchdy ar okal saiin aiin
ardal lkaiin dar yshaiiin qokchedy cheeody keeor lchedy ar dleey raiin daiin sairo qoky ain qokeey qofcheody shsaiin chdain chedy
qokeey ain qockhdaiin olcheedaiin qoks qokain shedy qokeey sheees otchy qokain lsheody dal opched soreey sheol chckhedol shor sheeo oleedaiin saiin aiin

shedy qockhdy okeey shaiiin lkaiin odyeols ypcho chedy ctheedain opchdair cheedaiin ytedol qoks am kal okeey qokedy lchedy shcthain
ockheeol dy ody lke lkchar odedam ol oty alees qokedy tedy dshdaly shedol areedy rdal okchey ytdaiin chckhy
qoredy qokeedy ykchor qoky lchedy tcheam chedy qokaiin soreeedy okal lkcheeey al roiin oey olkeey kas qoteedy okody dar

qog shedy opal areos olkal ckho chey aiin olkar qoteain chey ykair qol chckhey ltedar chedy ted sheol ar
lchor or shar sheedy qokal olchal otshor ofchdam salody chol ar ofchedam shedy ol dalysd keeeo qol
olteor aiin yeedal dar dchey qokeedy chctheey qol qokar ol aredy qokeedy aliiin chckhy ochor dair solam or tol

chdy daiin shey aiiindal shckhaiin qokaiin qokaiin ol ockhaiin shor ycheedy sheey qokain qotaiin chedy cheol arary ksy qol
shody okain or scheeody fchal ol chcpheody ol dair ared qotd oded osedaiin lkcheeody saldo qokchey lchedy qopedy dain qokaiin dar
chey okchedy ar dleal ar okeey olkaiin ytol shedy dain sardy chckhedy qokol okain chedy saiin saiin alain sydy lseol olkeedy qotedor ol

qokaiin ol opchees ltdair qockheedy shedar okshdy shckhy qotchear otchy ykeol qoteey keedar aiin sardar oleed ar opchy ar
qofchedam lol lkais qotain opchsaiin al qokar ol teody dain ain chedy shey aiiroly shedy olshedain ofcheedy oleod dalain
chol cheey rs qokchy or dain qol okeedy schain ofcheeedy ytchedal qoor opcheeody okan chedy aiiindar okchom chedy

air yshedal shedy oteey qoky qokedy chg yteam qokedy qokchy ctheor opor saiin odyeeedy olkeedy okeey ycheeody kan arol daiin oey
ykchair qokey qotedy tam opeeey alyey chor shes lkaiin air toly chedy saiin sshdar dain okdaiin lsoiin arear
oaim sarain osaiin qokaiin qokain taiin chdy rcheey okaiin odol lain qokar okchdy otcheol kd okaiin chckhy aiiroly dar

laiin lchor qokar chedy sairaiin daiin shey otar or qokcholy yksy oliir okchaiin qokchey lseain okaiin dar
dair aiin dam qotey dar chor kam okain ol dain yaim tals olkain olar pchedy otaiin shedair oty ckheod rchor
ocheaiin ar qolkdy opeeo qol dyko al otshm odear qokchey qoeeam salaiin chedy teedy ol daiin pchey

soleody chey olkchedy lchedy qokshey yshar okain ol qolor qokees qokeedy qokedy olyaly lyedy oeor oteey otchy shedy qokain daiin otaiin aiin

ofchedy qopchr qochedy cheey aledair qotain kal ral qockhdy cheedy chedy aiin sheol solchair olyedam chckheeo ksheey dair qokeos

ol qoty ysheody ol otal qol qockhear otcho okaiin shaiiin alyedy okey kedy opchol shey cthe chedy qokam al

schdal tchy kr fchedair or qopcheeody dar qokcheeey dar yshedy qokchdy tchedam cheeod qodam qotchey chedy sory aiin

olkal odydor lkchy al oteedy qoty qoteedy shedy otar am ytes qokain otedy okeey yksy res qokchy dar ykchdy dar sheey y

shckhy otchedy cheeey shedy ain tsher qoy okeedy aiin dalyed ol rchom qokedy qockheeedy eseal kaiis qokedy qokaiin qotedy qoped

chas qoeedy olteedal chody qoeain odyaiin otar aiiindy tcheody cthaiin qokshed ysheeedy qokal ol
orcheey or qopeeody olchdy ykcheeey lses solkdaiin otshol saiin oteey aiin okal okaiir oiinain okeey qotdo ol qockho kchdair

dleey olchal cheedy y qotal ytail okchedy chedy ksho ksheod aiin dy qokchedy olchedar raiin olkdol dsheedaiin otal koiin y
soldair okal okey chedy ytchdy chor ol ockhaiin chey ol oteedy daiin chain raiin daiin qockho ty sheedy odedy

otal olches areedy okedar rees cheod olsedy qokaiin ckhy sorear qokol olkain or daiin qokaiin oldor py chedy

lked aiireeaiin sheeor chedy soledaiin olchs lko dchdar qokeedy ytchol lkedaiin ar oredal cheol chey ol cheedy chedy
lod okeedy ytoy shedy okal olkar dar dair odedy qol ctheey opchair cheey dsheesy lshdaiin otedy shor dar
olkol opeody qokey ykaiir solkal am lkeeey ar chcpheeor kody ol ykchey soleeol ar shol qokaiin qokeedy ol cheey chedy

qokaiin odyedal okaiin aiin lcheeoy chedy schedam lchedam ykcho otal or lcheody oteedy qofcheeol okchan chey okeedy ksd lchedy
qokched qokey qokedy sheol rcheey shckhedam oteedy sed okaiin yksdy sheeor yteols qokchy kair salal qokaiin aiin teod am
lchedam oteey shey qoals opaiin olyedaiin ain aiirdar cthol ldar qokar doleedy or sardy shor dar

ar chey y otar chedair ytedy tedy shody paiin daiin oedy octhedy dain oky saldair qokeedy dain aiin

olkedy shedy dalm okey lchedy tar otedy ocheeedy cthor okeedy ood dalyedy dy okaiin qol lseeody cheey am tal ain

yeos qokeey kedair lsedy tear sarm lchm olyiin qokain ychedor shedy oreor sol otaiin qokaiin chedy

shor ks qokaiin oted otal shcthey daiin qokaiin dar sched scheeal chol chey shy chedy teody oteey okaiin chckhy sheey qokaiin chedy

qoar qokedy otar qotg cthdy olchoiin sorain qoraim shedy shedol lssairy qokedy lseeal otar ar ypcheedaiin qol
sar qotchain kshedy solchee dar ykedair okchey y chey aiin cthed otey ckhal qokol qokain olar shedy seal qotaiin ol
qokeey chedy qokchy otdar saiin ltar dchdy sheol odeeedy qokeey qokain chol rsheeedy qopchody lsal y okey chedair ykchdal

qoky chedy otcheeedy okedy qochain dleey koiin lkain keeoy shedar reeo tshm olcheeo qokain ol dchaiin qopchee qokdal
chaiir qochdy olchody or qotaiin ytdair aiiinl taly chckhy qokol sheedy shedy okcheeody olshaim tchg ol olyeol oky ltdy

aireey shedy dy oeody sheody olcheeor ypchdy or qokar okshedy dleal qoteod qoldy qoteedy otedy olkedy qokedy sheedar kcheeedy qotedy
aireo shey kcha kdaiiin yteeey ochdy chol aiiines chedy ypched cpheedy kody dshol lkor shol qoky qokedy okeedy qokedy
chey oryedy qokshain yshedol odyody aiin daiin olkaiin chaiin qokey lchedy qokeedy qokeey ar kcham kary shedy sheody qotain lteor

dshols pdar okeey qokaiin chdaly chdy lched otchy keeedy dain daleor okedy qochedy otaiin opody ykeear shedy

kshedy taly qoky okeeor opchor ychol qockhaim okal sheey aiin chckheedaiin qol qokar or dy lkain chedy qokeey qoks ol
ola lsheeor shedor ol lor ol pchy dar dam otaiin kaiin cheedy sheedaiin rchdam olcheeey peeor chol

qokol opdy qockho ypchair qokeedy ychedar alsairy shedy qol leedar yto dam shckheey odys doraiin ykchedy olkeey sheey qopchaiin
ches or shckhy solkdaiin daiin kr dar lkeeod raiin olkeedy lseam kaly qokedam qotoiin oreey lkor
chey qokchedy chedy qokchaiin tey shal cthdar odedaiin dshdar qokey kaiin cheedy ales ar saleeo okiin opedy chcthees oteedy or

odyeod qolm oteedy osear ochor dy okey chedy dy ykdal cheey chdy cthes qol areos lkesy qotchm otedal aiin
shdol opal air aldol olkain daiin y okeody aiin qokaiin dar sain ar olches qokchey lkchaiir aiin
dleeol shedy okchr ykain qokol oto kcha shedy qokaiin chedy lol okey ol ochdal chor cheear qokchy shedy sheedy solor

otal air cheey sheedy oltair ddy oksheeos kr chedy lseeod qoeeor aireo chedy lky aiin qokchor tsheeedy
qokeey ycheeeo qokain lteedaiin odey opchedy qopol ol qotal shey odyaiiin okedy oiinm okeey sheey qokeedy lchedy qokees lkcheor ctheam tedy aiireeedy
dchedy tcheeedy chey otchedy dar teeor aldam qokshdair qokdaiin ar sheckhy doredy okeey shedy ofchain te lkchail air

ksheey qokar qokar lsedy otshey peeo chey schedy shcthey daiin ardy lsedy daiin ches okeey dar daiin al

tsheedal lshdol raiin qockhedam qokal cphedy qokeedy qokar ykdaiiin chaiir or ypchedy qopchal okshal aiiinedy opchdair

oledor shedy dareor solas shedy tam ychas chdaiin otal chol qokchey keol sody qol qol daiin cheey chckhal oor

cheol dchedar tchey qokeey okeey ltdy qokal shckho dal lsheeey shy shols otain dar ockhes keod dy ream ol lkedal shey
solchs qoteeody qol qockhaiin daiin y ytes aror dalyo ysheeol aiiineain odyal chey am syd lkchar lcheeedy

qokchey ykal ykom lkches ain lseod tshor orcheear keeos olchedor chdy opcheos qol qokal qokchdy ltar lchedam
chctho qokaiin okd daiin lsheeos ychaly daiin ytol cheey chckhy okal kail dar ochdal chey ydy ral daiin lchedy
chey qokchedy chedy oeody qokey okeees dshs oked okey olaiin qokeey chckhy opchom shey qokedam keesy olkaiin reed tsheeedy

qokedy dal oeor sheedaiin ochaiin dy sheey lseeor pchor qopcheain chckhaiis olchal aiin ykal lkain keeos y opchal chedy
otchy tod oed dyked dal solkedy qokar olcheedy ycham kaiir shy chedy qokchey qokain aiin taiiin chckhar olkaiin shedy
tshdair shcthedy dyko qokeedy areal soredy chckhy qokar sham sheol kdain am kchdy air shey qokar qoror dain olyedy

chedy oiiineo olar rchor sor oeos lcheedy dar dareos olteedal oledair ltdam dolaiin qokeey sheey qokedy
chcphear oteedy sheey ckhees qokaiin lkchdy cthy oldain olky y lcheedal lchedy okal lyor lkaiin y qokal kaiin doloy okeedy otedal okedy ked
chey ltal pchair okal lcheeol qokeedy olchaiiin lkchal daeody lsheees dshain lkaiin odyal sorair shedy sheody ytar soreor

chey otchedy chedy ypchair olky raiin lseols chdy olkedy or qokeey ar omeeaiin aiin qokeey ychdaiin kaiiin okain qokeey ochdy ol

olky fcheedy shar chdy pchor sheol shey aiin
okedy shoiin otaiin reedo dksy otedy
ley dy odeedy chedy lcheer oledal saleoly ols okal aiin ysheedaiin odyeeol dam rdy daiin opchaiin dy daiireody qol ykcham qokeedy y
tshear okchair daiin dalair qokey ytody am ar soledar dshar qokeey ltdy saiin qokchdy opor daiin shctheol cheeo rcheedy am
dardy tshear alody kiir qokain lseeor darair qokchy ykedam olkey keeey shy kedam qokaiin qokedy oraiiin shes odeedy air

okchey lchedy otcheody lsody keor qokchar aiin cthedy qotedy aiirar olkedair aiin sedy tchor ool orary otchor
shckhy qocthain qokchy raiin ol sheol olchiir qotchy ychaiin dair cheey ain pcheo qokaiin qokaiin ain okal aiin ochr qokedy cheey chedy dy qokdar
otar qotain qokdal qokey shdy opchoy shedy or opchail y or ore okedaiin otaiin odydol ychr shedy ykchdar qoteey okaiin tor

qoeody odyeam shaiir ar or shckhy ral qokal rdain qotchdy qopaiin dchdy oteeor aiin daol daiin soredy
oty ol yshedy sheol olkal ol dairod olchdain okar lsedy qoky qokain qokeedy ol sheey ol aiiredaiin aiin kal otshdy qokeeedy qokedy aiin
qockhm daldy otar lkchedair otaiin rdor doleedy chedy chdy opcheeody olcheod oor oty reod qos olkar okeees otaiin ar

eseey chedy orees lseam qokain ykchaiin lchaiin qokchy qotaim dair lcheaiin cheeos raiin ar chor chedy qokedy daiin shedy qokeeedy qotedy aiin
olkal rs solkaly ofched tcheedaiin ol otcheeos salody lshain lchor otar otedy dair okedy kaiin qokeedy shol raiin
yteeos ykeedy chey solkedol opo dain ltd oky or oteedy lkaiin am tedar odyeam ky ardy chcfhdy y

qoror qotedor chedy okeedy oror otar chedaiiin fchair olyy al dchor odain lsal shckhaly qokeedy ytchm
yain qokeedy qokaiin ycheeo qokedy shckhedy sheol aiin orol qokar dcheedy chail odyeain qokeedy ksaiin otain olcheedy chor air
ody kchdair opcheedain qokeey lchod toly rsd lshal air opcheam ain qokeey okeey qoeeor qol sheol oteey qokedy

y qokaiin peeey qochedy otey ol ykd aiin daiin chcphain tedy ytchedal ols olky kee sheey shdaiin qoleos
laiin shckhaim qokeedy lkedy okeedy dar sarain qopchedy daiin otaiin chedy shedair shedy shedair pchdaiin ka lkcheoly al
qopdy okeey qoky al daiin cheedy shedy qol qokar chesy qokchedy dar olyar chy olear opchdo ltaiir rair qopcheeos y

olyey ordair qotal aiin olchody qoedol alees opair tdy lkeeod rar sheey alain ckhor qoksheos
lkaiin oiinear qokeeol qokary ychals fchdar oredaiin ychoiin qotchedy olchd opcheos qaly cpheols shedy al teed qoy chedy
chey qotchain cheey shaiiin dleey chdy oshs dar odol chdy qokedy aiirdol ltaim chy qokedy al oty aiin

chor qotedy opcheain cheeey ain qokar okr qochol qokchey chol ka kees qoedar ol qokeedy dsham dar
ol ykcheeo redair dchee teeey lkchdain okom otoiin aiin opchdaiiin rar qoteey ychair aiiraiir aiin qokeedy chdy
sairdy qokar reedy qokaiin lchedy olshd otaiin qokeedy shees lteeos okeain rchdaiin reeody or saiin shs chedaiin dar

soleor shcthm oky aldaiin otal shedor sheo daiin daredy qokeey oreody qody aiin qokar shey qokchey lkcheeor chol

or sairair cthy sheol sheees aiin dykdy okaiin chdy chey otchedy lsedar chcpheol tedor chair ockhes lkchdaiin chol

ocheedal chckhy qoky chs ykcheos okar dar olseds aiin otshedy ockheeey cheol okar sdy okchor or yr dshar ain

cthdy qockhey okchy solchod lkcheeody ain okchy daiin ar dchaiin qopchedaiin dar rshed qopar kedar qokeedy okedal qoked
shckhy ychaiin solail pd odyedain octhdaiin shdar doraiin chctheeey kdal olkeedy ordy qokain daiin or lkaiin lkchal qokain osair
ytchaiin daiin qoteeedy yteedy dar ory yteeor okedy ral odedy opchees chedy olcheom tcheor qosy chedy lyedy soledaiin chol

olkchey al tar olaiin qokeey qoky shedy aleedy saiin rs qockheody cheol dar cthor ysheam aiin qokeedy okaiin qokain aiiraly

qokaiin aiin solom odyail qokchedy chedar qol qoteedy rchor olyes lsesy chey lkchsaiin qokal shedy dar oseds ytaiin qokar qoteeey ol

cthaiin daiin am qotey ol cphain okchedaiin dar chctheeedy cheey daredam sain or chsaiin reedar aiin tcheedy ol

qokshain qokeedy lchey qochey otal rchor oteedy dar qokchedol okshaiin lkeey ol okal sheedy qokeey chctheeol qokeedy keol lcheeedy ysheear qol

dchor kaiiin odyedain chg tcheeol qoeeey qotchaiin cthdar qeos daiin olkaiin ol shar opchain tchod shckhear
qockhor okal lsar oteey cheeor qoky ol tees lchedy lshe ol oteedy aredy qotedy aiiredor okeeor schaiin yshey olyey

ykcheal opchaiin orchedy dair sheey cheed dar dain qotey qol ykcheol okal qokeeor olcheeo chedy dal qokey chedy opchedy

shey dam tshedam okar kal chey ychair ykaim chckhal kody lchedy oteey shey chey qokain qopchain

led okeey chedy okal olchsy aiin ytchy tdal aiiinaiin qokchy orcheor lteedy qockheos otchy ockheody chdy solair olseor or

ood qokaiin chedy aiiino ol lkaiin lcho al lkaiin oryair oseeey y qopeeey chdy qopcham chal chedy sarol sheol okchy oiinm

olter dar chey shedy or ytchesy pal y otar doldaiin ol shckhear lkaiin ar saloiin oteey qotain ol sheody aleedy pedaiin ol

opchor oteey qokaiin qokeedy lteeod cheeey lkaiin lsees al daireo dar qokeedy aiiined shal qokeedy odyeeos ky am
sain olche lchedy teeey oryedy okchor opchedal oleedy olkey sheedar okar lteey shctheol dair or cthedy okchy cphey
qokeey oliir okain cheod lkain rr al sain oll chedy olkeey qokaiin saley scheol qolkedar lshom raiin qokaiin aiin

shedy daiin aiin qolchl yshor olkchdy tdy oksheeos koiin lteody qokshdar okeedy daiin lkchdy chctheody cthain sshiir chedy

y oteedy okeey sheor daiin al olkeey oddaiin qokedy lsy qokaiin kedy otsheor lcheer okeel ckhody aiiinor oteedy dar shedy

olkchey lss redaiin olkaiin shey qolchain dy cheey raiin qokar chedy dykaim qotal cheear oleeo okedy ar aiiineeedy

ofcheeedy shey lcheeoy chedy oeor teody qokchy qokain ol qokeedy oair teoly aledal lchey ykeo otaiin odydaiiin olkod

qotshaiin cthedair shedy qoky qoeeor qokar ar oteod dalod qokeedy saireal opchedar sham lchedy qopchd ltan qokaiin qopchedam

ar qokal okedy rody ycheod oltdy aiin qokchod okchdy chdaiin or dol dal rchol cheol cheey keedy dar

lchaiin kchary odyeedo otor qockhdy raiin
chctho okedy rdor lshiin opaiin kcheeos am saledar sheol salody ycheeor olcheeam okchy qokedy qockhm olkchdy tair

qockhor olkal qokeey qoeeor ordy dykear yshar aiin qokar oleedaiin okory oteos dain qoos shckhy lkchdaiin qokaiin chedy
oksy qoteear cphdy ypcheor rody saleeody olshedal qokeey qodo shedy olkchy ykcho ckhor qotal shctho al
dleeol ychedar qokain rdar okeey qoteey dar sheol aror tody olal qokeos laiin daiin ral qedam qopchy dar

ysheody chey reear oeor pcho teody lchaim otcholy shedy okaiin shedy olan olm aiin
solor qockheedy okedal shol air sshain sheol raiin aiin daiin qokaiin olshg qokain saleeody shdy oteey ales dalyedam
yeeoy okeam sheear reeedy qokeedy or dcheear cheed qokeey lkchedar qotee chol cheey ykor

lkaiin tedy cheey qokedy dchain qokeedy chey okeeor odeeedy yer chckhy qokeey qooly chedy dain otaiin qopchedam aleesy sheesy okey al
lkain kiin pear qokeey sheey cheol qokchey olshed aiiinody olcheeo pchedy qokeey shol qokedy qokchdy dar dam qokar sales cthain sheees kcho

soiinol cpheod or pchdy salal otey solkg ypchdy sheeody shedy pcheedy yteedy yshol sheey olshdal dalyair daiin otaiin shedy

rchaiin opchedaiin aiin olter saleeedy oky reeo chcthaiin kal okaiin chal oedy qokeedy qofcheer dar okaiin opeeey lseod okaiin otedy

sheey otdor ycheel shdy qopdy qokar qoeeal okchdy ted qopcheeody aiin qokey lshedy okol olkeol qokal qos qol
dcheedy lteeo chedy tas otedy opchaiin dair ar cthees chedy qedar am lkaiin qotchedy dar dchedy okeedy olkedy chedy qokedaiin dar
saiin olchedain ol oeedy chedair lsheor chckhy cheedy oledair qokal ol dcheedy kdor cheol dalyear oteedy qol

ochor dedy soldy qockheos qokal qokchy qor aiin dain ykchey oky qokedy chdy daiin qokaiin chckhy ytchy qopchain ody ar
qol okaiin oldam yshaiin chedy ykal qoks sheed cheeody ltal osair olteedal okl chdy saiin qokcheor
dar qoreor chckhy daledy qotedy kcheod or dam daiireody olky shedy ar darol she chal ol lol ody chedy

okey aiin qokcheed dar ksheor keain lkeeol ykedor dar qopchody shey solches saley shedy olyar fcheor qotchy ked okal otal shedy
okchey kaim tchedy qokaiin qokaiin otedy dalyol oteedy chcthor qokar dar kcheos daiin qol qokal areedy shey shcthedy kchary raiin
ocheedam lshsd chs ssheor daiin chckhy lcheeoy qoedair otedy ltail lcher ykor opchey lkary keol qockhsd shes qokal shey

chedy shal chedy chey dsheody qoreeor raiin chedy cpheer kody ychey qokedy dar solar ar sheol olteeedy olyees chal odeor
okeey shedy olchas ofcheedy qoar okeey or daiin cheey lteeo olesy shy chdaly cheedy solkes yain oteey okain am osor
qokey lchedy daiin qotedor ol ytedain chaiiin okshar qokain lkchdy keod otaiin dar oseeos kedain qoeain arod

pchor lkam y lcheedam ar qokchey olkedol olcheeos y qokey qoes chdam okchdy chedal ral al
octhaiin solchal shom ar orcheor ol oair qokcheeedy dain cheey ar chor chedol pshdar qokal shckheor qokain okar chedy
chor shedy qotal chsd qol olkeedy cthdy odyaiir chey qotcheody oreo ltod sm otchey lsheeey chedy oeos dy am

okchor dain yeedy lsheeody am qofcheeoy chckhy lke cthdar daiin dalol oteey lkedy pcheol dal pchor ctheey sain dar
solor qokaiin qokedam qokal chedy chey olshg qokcho chol or otey old lchedy tedy qokdaiin or otchey shedy odary qol
saired qokal osheody ssheedaiin olshaim qokchey okain y tdol ky qokain qokees odyar otain aiin qofcheeedy qokeey pcheeol qokar chedy

chedy ypchedair sheear ykeeody chedy sheeody or ykchaiin saiin qokdam lseedy ychsy ol chckhey qokeedy salam qokaly
ars or qokedaiin chdy dam cheey reeod qotedy otain chey res lkchdaiin lchor daiin ypchedy shol fchey ldal dain shedy
shckhy qochey otal or okal qotaiin aly qoeear qokeedy shan chdy dal okeeedy ol shol olody chedy cpheody qokam ol

qoks chas qol qokeey ytcheor ocheor lyaiin oltey alo ctheam ycheal qedy otal lkchal okaiin ytd shedy
laiin dar saiin dar chcthedar aiin opchedaiin redol shaiis okedar chol ytchar reed lchedy okeedy qokeey dar
qol daiin chey aiin sheol shdo yshey daiin air ol otaiin okain qokary kedam qopg aiin orcheedaiin ykeeol qokar ol daiin qotedy

dchdy opor ody oksheeody chdy cthedy sheod qoleear odyal ltal okeey lkchsairy qokchey chs lkear
qoredy qopcheeal yteedy qoeols otchy qokedy ol otchear olsheod qoks ol qokeey chedy ytchy y ched qokchdy qoteeody ain
lcheer chedy otol qokain dar saiin saireol ledy qokshedy qopaiir qokchedy shedair cthor qokeedy oseos opchar sheeod oldaiin shol dar

otey air shedy qokeey kain rchain okcheey odyedor shedy chiiin aiin tos qoedar ar qoteedy chey qocthdy odydaiin ycheeody y
lchor shcthm daiin chey shey aiin dshes scheol shedy kchiin okain cheeo oddair scheeol odyeeam aiin qodaly lshees okaiin aiin
sheedaiin otain shcthed opchaly daiin cheol qokaiin olkdaiin shedar dar qokeedy shol por dair qoteeody aiin

sair qoteedy lsedor shedy qokchy qokal shedy shoiin saireeedy sordy cheod dalyeody ol qokcheeey sheedy opchedal am oteey sheody dar arary aiin
lair olkal ckhaiiin oleedy qoal oedy qotedy ykcheed lses leeedy cheedy okes lchedy oltary or orees qokedy
ocheedam dar qolkeey redaiin dar cheedy otedy qokeey okchain qokchdy aryod yteeor daor okeey qokaiin otchor shedy daiin olkaiin ches schol qokaiin qokeos

okam otain lcheedal lsheeo ar otshdy olyed daiin oteeedy kdar ldy dchs chg olchan otaiin shedy
sairdy oreol okal okaiin qokeedy oksheeeo qokain aiin scho oteeody shey qopr qotcheody dykain opchoiin ke qokeedy chan qokaiin chdy
olcheeody rg daiin chckhy soreey shoiiin sheedy qoedal areor odyeees qokeol opcham lteeey qochol okchdy alar qokeody

qokal lsaiir dleey or lkain raiin ytchar olshor okes olkeey pdair daiin ool saiin lsdaiiin rdam lshar pchaiin
keeal sheody sheedy shar opchaiin aiireeody chd otaiin qopdair cheol qokar chedy dal redor qoedol qokal lseam chedy olkedy ar
otsho ochor okeey shaiiin otchedy shedy aiin qokain dareody oltor osedaiin ted qoteedy qoteol shealy opdar oteey qokaiin ol

aiin dal dalain saiin qokal qol kor chor kaiiin ar okeedy aiin chey odyedain lchedy qolks reeey dsha chedy
sheody chedy qopar opaiin oltaiin dyteor y kchaiir qoteos okedy qotchaiin sain ldy qopchair ty keam qol tshedy
chas ots cpher dar tor otal or dal qooy arydy qol chey shy dar sheey saliiin shedy oleeos chedy

olkal reed rody lor qolchedy opchaiiin oiinear soledam qokchor qoedal qoteey ain alar dar qolkeor yteeey chedy
qotchey chdaly qokain rody qolcheey lkchd okshedy sheeed okeod chedy choiiin pedy oteey odeeedy ypchaim yor
cheey shedy cheeody dar qorol qopchaly okeedy qopchaiin ykcheo otedy oain odam chckhy qokeedy kchaiin dchair okedy chckhy

qoky chedy teed oteol daldy shal ales rcheol dleedain otedy ody seos olkeedy aiin chcpheos lchedam
dchedy tos okain ol otsheody olkchey olchedol qokaiin chdy keees sheody ykdal okchees lkchain ykal olcheel qokchey chdy dal opcheos
lchdal leoy keos am aiirear lky lteedy qokedy qokeey aiin chedy oor qokal tshdar qokchy otedy raiiin al

qolkdar qoteedy ocher lshedair sheey opdaiin pshair qokeedy lcheer chedy qokeey al qokam aiin cheey lseed chedy lyaiin daiin opchor
ykchedy shol ytchdal ykcheol lfchdy aiin kcheeody chedol cheol lkaiin daryeeol aledy otshedy cthed pchear teedy ol
chey okchedy choiiin sheedy lsal qotaiin y chcpheeedy soleed ain opcheeeody shedy chedy qoks aiin shedair chey ytes aiin okeedy otey ald okchedam

shedair paim qokar y olyeeedy opchiiin or yedy orar chedy ol olkal chey pd chdy cphee dsheedy qoped
otol okain qoedal okaiin rdain oksheain odedy orair okal qokedy redor chckhy qokeedy olkeey ltedair chey shedy chdaly qotaiin qol dy qokaiin aiin
lshedol ychory ar sheol y dam dshdol ychal ody aiin qokey dshar shedy okeey qoeeor qokeedy or

aiin qopchais cheear shckhy qokchedy dsheor kchesy shey okeedy sar opdy sheey al pcheey qokaiin qokeos qokol oted opchy ain
otal qol dar qokeedy ar lkm qokey odyedol olkchy chckhy tsheeedy kches ol qoty qopeody shcthaiin qockhedam ypchees ol
ytchey kchdair opches ychedy qopcheeedy qotaiin okaiin oksheor qokal ochey yshail oiindy y cheey or ctheeey fchal shckhy ol okchedaiin y

ychd aireeol dshar qokair sheedaiin arain daiiralsy lseeey qokchedy chom ckhees qokaiin aleeody kedal lkaiin shedy aiin otal otaiin chol
kchear qokal olchain qokeedy chedor ychsd ltam shdaly qokar lkchees lkchedar chedy sheol sar fcheeedy olkaiin ar
chdaiiin chol qokeey odyoiin sheeor ypchaiin okeey dar cthaiis chdy oty dar qokeedy lcheedam oleam res rchair

chedy qokal ytedar chdam lkaiin redal qokeey lseoly qokedy olchal sheey olchees sheain qokaiin lkchedar qokain aiin qokaiin ar
lcheeoy lchedy cheedy chedy schaiin lkeal alsy ychs qokaiin otees dshedair sheo qopcheol otedy ledar qokeedy dar shar opchair
chedy qokol otain chckhy cthedol chol oky ltm sydy tchaiin okcheeos lteor olyom reeor daiin ain lkeeey por arain

chedair ales odeedy chckhedaiin chedy qokeedy qoped okeey dar chey lkchal cheey al chey qotchear qoley cphal qol
qoky lshdam qoteey chedy chas chdaiin lkeey lkchaiiin shedy okedol ochedam osr chedar dar oldaiiin otedy orcheedaiin ychaiin
ody cheey shedy qockhain qokeedy qokeey oksdy shey tees qotain otshm qockhedy qopchedal dar ypchain okchy daiin chdy

aiiror okchedar chdy qoteedy tchain olkchdy qokchdy chedy cheedy raiin qokal ale aiin salody cheol qopcheol qokey kg otal shey ol
qokain chor shedy sheey redaiiin ckhol solam rols okain ol daiin sairor ol qokal ocheey dal chdy qoky shey olchoiin olkaiin or
orair aiireds qol shol chedy qokar okedar shdaly qoar chedor shedy olkeey chckhedar qolkdy qokchy ypchdy cheol

oledal shas chedy qokeedy chor oldy tsheaiin cheedaiin chckhr cheol okar dched cphoiin aleeo chol daiin araiin
lkain y qokey chom ckhar chedy cheedy aiin orcheees char okeedar cheod olsair cheoly key olyair
chckhy rshdam otedaiin qokeos qocheol qokedy daiin ytchain yeeoy choly shedy schaiin daiin ral chcthdy shol chey qotcheody qol dy qokaly

ykchaiin lkaiin dleeol chckhail okchedy lchedy dalyear cheey keod solkoiin lkeey yshg oleeody shey shor lshal qol
chey oiinedy tdy solary reedy olshedor ytedar ain tail qochain solchain saiin chey aiin dain qockhedy tedaiin chdy
shckhy oksheedar oldaiiin saleo qedy lcheedal olcheeey shody sheedy keed okaiin ol oledar chedy oteedy lkain chedy ypchedy dam chol

sain lsedy oraiiin chedy cheedy ykdaiiin solkeees qokaiin qol olyaiin lkeol cthdol ol lshaiiin lsheedy araly
tsheeoy ar qokaiin qol dy okaiin oksheeody ol qotal saredam ypchey qopcheeody keeody shedy odyeeor kedar qokeedy chckhy dy otshol
eseey lsd qokear qokal qokal chdy qotey lsheedy shol ol oair cheey qokain chckhy qokshair ty qokedy qol sheody dar tchees qol

oaly daryeey olar qotaiin ol dcheol qopchom chedy tshor aiiredor keedy aree oo solaiir ar olya dar
ocheer qoary y qokchy saiin ychedy sheesy qokaiin tcheey kody chedy otar aiin qopcho sha chedy qokal sheody chail tshair okaiin ain
daraly cthair qokal rcheedy chdy daredam cphal chory dar opchdo ol otaiin sordair cthair qokeedy dar opchdol ar

shody otain raiin olyaiiin kes okees olaiiin aiin oreody cheedy ol okal ol cthy otchor cthaiin okaiin aiin
dar qotain dal aiin dar soldy lcheeoy qotedy or qotar ol chedy daiin ral ol oeeedy dchdaiin qol
oteey dar okol sheedy raiin dain okedy otedy qoiin qokain olsheain oeor dcheeor raiin sheain okshoiin chedy solcheo lky lsees aiin

ol sheey qokain ody raiin chdy cthy ysheor lked qoty solkeeor shey lchedy qokeey odedam oleeody qokedy okeey lkcheeod taiin
chckhy sheeeo dalyedy okchy okchair ocheedal ol shol chcthdal shedy oty oksheed shol ol char qokeey ar tchedal or sheeey kaiin
qokal sheed oly chckhy areey or dchain sheol tsheedam keos qolkod poiin okshd soro lkaiiin qokain odyeeod ted

oaly yshdair otaiin pcheor sheedy opchaiir air otcheos olkal cthaly qopcho aiin ol opchail reedy qoty okdaiin okchy ted olsdy qol
daiin dar lkaiin sheol chckhy cheey lkcheeey qokchedy dar schody otedy am chor saleedy sordy chctheody chol okar dar opcheeey qol oteedy al
chcthedy odyes qotaiin qokeedy chedar tcheos sey qokeey solo al daiin arol chey am soleor lkais yteeaiin shedy ol

daryeal ar otal cthdy okedy oryed opchy qotr qol ley dain arol dchdair qoom qol teos
cthey qotaiin qol daledy qokal reear aiin dar okeey qokain aiin oteey araiin qokaiin y qotshedy cthdy lkaiin ar
oshor qokeedy lkey shedy okchais olcheeor dain ytar ltey oteey odeos ockhedam lkaiin aiin qokeey al qotchy osdal okeedy y

dleo saldaiiin po daiin daiin air ochedy dain okaiin chedy saiin okain leol dam lseedy shdol qotaiir chedy
qokol fchdy dcheedy shedy sdal qokey chedy qokeedy lseeo chedy shctheeod yshedy oldair ssheod chckhy okchey sheol otees soror
dal chy areol qopchedy okols opdar ksham lteeody raiin yeedal chedy lcheor olcheed sar sheedy daiin lkain olshaiir chedy

qokedy al leor ysheor olkey odyedair lkeor opcheeeody ykol sheey yshor chol qokal qokal y qokeedy ol qokaiin fchary qokaiin aiin
chckheeal otedy cho qoreos dar qokeody dar sarm dalm chey otchedy cheeey am opchdaiin kar aiin
ckheeody raiin olkaiin y shsy ar ol dal qokal olkedol oddy aiiinor olteeedy qokeey okaiin teo qokom y

dchaim keol okal ol pshey okal ockhaiin otshor daiin dal cheol sheey rdam daiin lseor qokal qockho ytchor

oky qokain qopchg olcham aiin qokeedy kaim
olteol dam qokaiin rch qolshdy qotor
ochdal opchy cheol olyeeos lkchr y ledy oeeedy dam daiin ol qokedy kchoiin lsody air qokeedy qol qokaiin qol
okedy reain sheey qokedy okcheeol aiin lchor okal qotshm dy lkain ychar qokain chas chckhdaiin y okal dar
doredy lsy qotiin por qopeo sy lsheeey araiin qoteey qokain dal pchedar chedy shckhy sar or oded

qoaiir ltdain chedy daiin keain oshedy chey shy dar chcthm cphdy daair opchedal res dar
oty ar qokeedy saiin dar qokeey lses daaiin qokm lkaiin orydar air qokar qokchdy qokeedy dar cheey keed kaly daiin chor air
okol otain ol ykcheeody shedy dalyedy lkain chedy yshols paly ykcheeody otedy shckheey dyteols kdaiin olkal redal al cthedy

ol ockhes aiin sheol qokeey qotedain ros ytchain lcheeedy dair pchdaiin chdy ctheam shedy qokain qokar chair kcholy olchal sairor
oreey qokshedy olkeedy ctheol sheol kedor lsol shedy redar yteeor ycholy keesy dsheody

dal lkchal dar ted opchaiir dar dair okaiin ain ardaiin shedal otain aiin shedy ofched kshar kain qokar shedy lchedy shedy

qoky chs leos chor ain ocheedal yteedaiin chaiis ol okchees chedy ldy qokeedy dar olya chod

aiiredy ytal lchey odys rsheal tsheeedy soldy dy aiin ytchy taiin qokey qokedy sheeal ltes qokaiin or
aireedain shoiin chor ltedair chckheeody ral opchaiin olkaiin opedaiin otaiin lsaiin olkar chedy qokeey kees ain tchar ar
cheey qoteeey okeees daraim olkchey teol pchedy shcthod okshsaiin paiin qopdol lsey ol qokeey lcheeedy qokal odaiin

cha cheeey tshedam qokain daiin ypchee lky sheol air chcthee dolm otaiin al ods ytedal lchey ain tcheed chedy
dareol qokaiin okain pchedaiin oledar qol oteedy qokaiin kedar chedy qokeedy otal chdy qokchy tchaly dal shckhor qokeedy chedy olkeey sheey chol
soreol scheeey qotchedy oka kl sheedaiin dar daiin qol tchody ycheeal kar cheody aiirdaiiin ain qopcheeo chckhy

qeol dchain teeey alyey okal doled ockhol opcheol qopchaiir aiin qokar ar shor kear daiin yshedy chcthy chdy

dal dar cthody olshor qolkear daiin ytchod okeeor chor qokedy okedy oled lcheer lshaiir reed ol chedy shody pedy ytchedaiin qol

dar peees alody okeedaiin al chor shedy sholy odyedair yey lchaim ysheear dshsd qol

okar ykeam oldaiin kedar qopdar opcheeody dar otchdaly chdy qokeedy oeor lain aiiry y cheey chedy qotey qol

okedy qochedy otal lseeody odysd cheo doleody ody ol qokal ol sheey chedy teedy or chdaly ocho lshes aiin

dair aiin dam shol lteam otchey oks lkey dareody qokeey ared qokeedy lkdair qokam al shes tsheedain dam qockhedy qokal aiin

chckhedor tain otedy otol ckhey ykches qody opchedy okchey dairair qokchdy kedol shey daredy okal keeaiin otedy chedy
oteey qoeain sheey shedy odear ofcheedy saldain ytedy sheody qoteo qokal okain opchg sheam shedy ol soreol

qokar ar dy areedy ykaim qokar sheees cheey alsdy ol ars ol qoked opchy qoeeod okeedy shey shctheody omdy dar
olkedy okes chedy ary chckhy qopchoiin aiin qolkeor chol chey lsheeor qokaiin otary pchedam oreeedy qokeey ofchol okeey al

oo dal ol dain lfchdy lsal ain shedy otaiin yteesy dleedain chckhes dar oteod qotchey ain okedy lkched okedy shckhy chedy oteey air

rar lsesy tdair olkeey olcheod pchedy dadar teols kal ychar oleam ol leor
shckheedy okeeody chckhey otedy ltsdy kg otedy otal olshdar qokar or ychas dar teeeo air shedy ytchor lyeel chedy yshedal otedy
okedy ol qokchy raiin ltd deody qokeey qoty tor dy ytr otchedy qotedy reedar chedy qoteedy chey chedy qokey ykeeey qokchedy qotdal aiiindy

al teeey reod okey shedy lchedy olyeeey alyear ar otal ychaiiin ral olcheeod chs lain okey chedy olkeedy lkdy
ar sheedy qokeedy yteain saledy qokar lso otam ykeeey odydaly qokeey paim shckhy oksheedy aiin

qoky aiin lkaiin lkcheeod shey olkedam cthom sheol dar qokeey chckhy qokaiin qotaiin lsheol ykchory chedy oteedy shedy lkain aiin sheol am
rshaiin qokchar qol qockhair daiin ches qokshed tear yshedy otedy okal ockheedain olysaiin air qokaiin okeedy chol okaiin okaiin aiin
chckhey ches qotar okady olseeedy chey okchedy chedy qokeedy chdy chdy kchail odydaiin qokaiin tchair dain lto cheesy rs al

qokar ytiin pair dy olkedy olsheam qokain otedy shol salas qoteedy chedal okeey am cheey otedy cthdair tcheam chdy rchy y
lcheedal dshes reom saledy sheey qokedam chey rdain peod lkaiin oiiney scheeo dsheod qokeey ltm olyeols lseain dy qol
dain air opche chs otshol ol olky dsheedy oeody ytchary sheod olkeeedy olched qokal tsheeol dal shol opedam shom qokaiin am

otal shsdy otedy yshom opaiir qocheol tair qokchy qokedy okshd oo lkeeey al otcheeo okshair leedar ol opcheees ol
chcthm tshedam okar chckhy qokal qokal shedy dar taiin opcheeey chckhoiin cheey dsheedaiin qol psheedy qotedy qol oty oky tchey shol chedy
chedy olyedy cthol shor aiin tsheody cheedy qoes chey olcheain pchaiin yshdar y qokeey qol dam opchair

dalo qokeey aiin qoty qokeedy olcheam qotair sody dar dyteols shedy qol dalyaiin qokedy okal otchdy oledair qokchedam ol oteedy dain char dar
dchdy olkain lkaiin otchedy kair teos chdy oreed ytdy yeedam ches otain opchair qokshear sheol chcthey yshedy olyeeedy
oeody lol sheeey olsed opchor qokaiin odedy olyedy ctheeo opor shcthedy daiiralsy ain otar chedy qokeey dar

qotedy rody otedy oteedy shey dykedam cthos qoteeody lsody olkar ykeeor sheeaiin kor dair qoro olal al
ol cthory otaim olyedor ycheedy qokchy shey otal saledam ar cheey okos kshor sod to olkeey dcheo aiin oteey chedy
lchor daiin qockho lkedaiin or shckhy lss okedy sheeody qokedy chcthy otais y qokeedy opchaim daiin sain chedy okcheos

ocheaiin chedy qokeey qoteedar lkchsy qotdar kcheos olsheod okedy solkeod pchs ol daiin ltod chcthdy soraly teeody shedy
qofcheaiin chedy okchey y oteedy qol dy qotey shedy okchom qodol ol daiin air qockhey cthedol chedy chcthas lkchedal lchedy

okchor ose shedy yteees cphedy qopchaiin dain chey solkd am daiin qolkeody qol daiin shar oleeor lsheol daiin qofchedam ysheol

shckhy aiin cthedar qol daiin dsheesy alees olkain chdy dalydair shar ypchdy yteol qokal odeedy ain dalyol shary qokaiin chedy dy qokaiin ol

qokey chdam aldain choiin okaiin chaim taiin shcthed ychar ytdaiin shoiin daiin lkchd oteeody dar
okal oledain kedy qokshed qokeedy odyes qoiin sheedy chol opchy ain qofcheeedy dal sardar qopeedy or kshar raiin
daryee okedair olkal ar lkeeey okshedor sheol otedy okeedy chedy sheedaiin ol odeey olchsy kedal soraiin teey daledy

dshe qotedy otr air okeedy qokain oteey chey ain chedy sar aiin dy qokshdy qokain cthedy okchedaiin ykedar yteed okeey shedy
soredy daiin chsd chdy shedy ctheeo solkes chedy otedy qokal chey chedy yshaiiin qokchedy otedy al oeor otar chedy ysheor okchy solchedy
chey oryain qokol olked lshdaly lseeey lkchdain ar otal yked oteey oty olam qoko otchey or olkeey qokeey shey

eseal ol opcha ain qokeey aleam qokchey raiin shol ordar qoteedy soleor lkaiin ltedain dshar chdy otchey shal kg qokchy dar
sar qokchedy ykedor or otshod kcheol dal qokeeedy ychaiin dytedy dain olkaiin cheeod chedy qopchdy qokeey yedam tchees ol
oteey cham qokeedy am sareol olyor sardy qotaiin yty cheeedy okeey ckhedy shor ar solees ykok cphedy

otal char qoary odol saireos olyoiin dshdal otal shal shedy daiin cheedy okain dal ain shcthory qopaiin solody reedy ared
aireey yteesy okeey air sheey qokaiin ain lyeos shar otal kedy dalyol oteedy cheey qokedy qoeedy shdain qokedy opchm qokchy tcho
oredam qockheedy qol lkeey air keam yshedy cheey om tchm olkey ykeedaiin ol ykchas dar oty aiin yshary ol

chor shey opchaiin dal qoteeedy shedy sha chedy lkeeo chckhy ar qotain shckheeor lsees chedy qokeey chedaiin qotg tcheor
qokey dar otshol tody shey ofchair qokeedy okey lsheey shol chey shey otcheeody opd ytdo lkchd olkaiin shoiin ol
chealy oted oteey qoted sain shey okedy qotedy cheey kais chol sheol qokaiin kdaiin chctheody dchod qokchy ysheor

ain qokal okain ochey am okchy schdair teody sholy chedy cthair otchy chckhy olyy cheal shcthaiin daiin ol
chey shy ar ol tshals ckhaly chedy shody opedy qokeey qotaiin ol chey alyedy dleey ychos otedy lkain otedy okeey sheody saledy ssheol
olkedy aleal olyedar sheol olshal lchey ykedar kedam oledal chdol chckhar cheedaiin y dal rchaiin dain qol

dchedy tchr ry ytes qolkeedy shey cheols odydol dar qokaiin sheey lkchody qotedy qokchey qotain sheody tdy dshiir chdy
aiiinaiin odol ykcheeody lseeey qokchedy okes qokaiin qokedy cheey shedy shckhy ytedy otol peody qoteedy kar qoky ckhdair okeey dar
shckhy rody chedy lyeol ocher shedy oaiin sar odyedol qokshed ytcheor daleody qokeey cthedy cphaiin

saiin lsory chedy okal qokal olcheeody odyal daiin ytols otain dar lky aiin dar ales sordam dar chey al qokeey dar
chckhey chedy qokam okes ykedal y daiin sheody ols olkar olain qoteey ral okeey ycheeey qokain taiin
chey qocthain ykchdal okedy aireey sheeos ykes chedy odol dain solkd okchy okal otedy dar saiin aiiraiin okeey lchor olkeey chedy

choy qoaly otaiin qokeedy ycheeey dshdo reeor okeey chedy sair qokchy shar qotaim taiiin opeear or
tsheaiin qoar dchear olkeey qokeey ar daor okal sheey okeedaiin ytody chody reedy raiin shedar sheol keeeo qol
daired otaiin qotaiin otchedy ol qokal ol shcthain dain okaiin chedy ytcheeol chol daiin okes keeedy chey chey qotchedy shedy ltar ocheal tchaiin

shcthaly sarey oo ar qokain opcheos cheeey alyol olkal sheeody saleeor ychedor or
qotar ar dain aledol reol qoledy solar aiin chedy chey aiin sain dar otaiin sheedy ytchain otain chcthaiin
cthaiin sordaiin ol shcthor yshy saledaiin shan okain shedor otedy ty otdam qol qockheeeo ycheeeo or

okedy am shcthear sheod ykdain sheeam dsheain qokaiin ykedol yeedal dar opcheos okcheam cheol solaiir qokain okeey ol
qokar or olkchey sheed otair shor rok qokal ykair oey cthaiin soiinedam cpheedaiin shey qol or ykchy qokeedy qokain shedy
aredam shol olkaiin aiin yer lchedy chedar chs qoteey dshg olyeeedy qokchey por sheol om chcthaiiin okchedy keo solaiin

shckhy ain oreor qokshor kesy qokchedy lsheeody chol dar oredal she tey lkedam qokchey olkain shedy
qokal olchl qoeedaiin ockhdal chor aiin daiin dal chckhody ltos solain orm qoaiin ory sheeaiin shedy aiin
cheey ral olyain shol ochair ley dair sorain cheey shey oteey olkeey chedor otedy dshd yaim daiin qotal oteody

ksheody rdal qockhedy oteey chcthod olkal cham otaiin rdaiin qolko sheedy qokal opal cphaim qokeey oty yteeaiin shedy aiin
darair lkaiir qokeedy ksdy okdam lchedy shedy qoty qokain qokeedy lchaiin kchy okdaiin lchedy shedy dair qolkair qokeedy qokdar
cthaim cheey solkdaly ochedy dolol taiiin olkchedy chody lseody opcheeedy opchedain or qotey otcheor ytan ol qokeeedy ychedam

saly qokshdar qopchaiiin qochedy oky kedy daiin cheeo reod pcheeol odam chedy qotal chedy ochaly yshy ar
solks otshdy olkaiin dar cheol ofeey chedy shol odaiin ochaiin kchy keeey ol solain lchaim olydol ol
daiin ltal sain ykes chol lkr shedy chdy qoky shey qokain raiin qopchedol aiin otchey qopchear daiin chor chedy qokal yteear arey

opchol ordal dy dar qoky opedam lkaiin qokchedy ycheeody qokedy qokchaiin qoteey qokain cheey kar lchol opcheeody chedy

al qokchdy opaim kchor olchedar qolkor qokal okal aiin lsedol qokain qotal pcho qedam cthaiin qokey aiin teeedy

olshoiin shckheody kchor lsals qokain kedol otain aiirg shey odyg am lkain shey qoraly toiin ol lkor

dar daiin areedy aleod dar qotal sheody olees odor okar olshor ar lke shey taiin rcheey dar

y dareor qokey qokedy okched qockho tchy qokain ytchey sdy areody oty tchedy olkeey olkaiin shedy
araly opcham raiiin alydar ctheos qokar dols ol lkain cheedaiin octhain lsedaiin odyeedy lshg daiin aiin

okey dar osm oteedy chckhy chedy yeos yshaim daiin ol tdor shey chckhey chedy cthain shckhdair orches otedy dar

chcphedy ty qoteedy keal opcheam lseeor dsheos lkaiin dar solaiin yshedy aiin qoreeedy okam ol
sar aiin qokal oky ytol dykdar olkeedy orchedam qokchy opched daredy olkal okain sain qol kchey okey aiin otchy qokchod dar

qockheor cheey qots ychedor res qokair qodaiin shey otchy pdal oteedy daraiin sheol osedy cthar al cthey
olchg fchsaiin qokal qoted okeey shedy dy ltal ockheor solaiin rsheam raiin okeey chcthear olkd qokol opaiin opchaiiin aiin

ldair qokal otaiin y ches keeey ykees res shail qotchol qokol olkod dam lteod cthear lkaiin ar

shedy aiin olydair cthar rsairy qotshedy tar kody reedaiin odor dain lsheed kedar solkr aiin

dar cheedy keed opeoy ychy y qoky als dalyedy otchy raiin air yshal ltdal qotchy qotedy lkcheedy opchor

qokchdy chedy aly tcheor ochear qotaiin okain ody olchoiin cheedaiin dar qokom dar ysheod dar qokeedy ram ar

ypchol ypcheo chey qotedy qokchey ychar lkdy cheedy qokedy qokal ol shol otdam kody odyary dar

dair cheesy okeey olkeos chckhar ofchedy aredaiin y qokaiin chdy qokal cheedy choiin areedy aiin sdy shckhdar shedy

pchdam chdy shol otain leol dam or tchedal shedy cpheees kdaiiin qokedy lched teeod oleeor qockhdar qopeom qol

ol lkaiin qotain kedy okeey dchain oteedy ykedy aiirady ytg qokeedy or omeody chdy soldar qokeedy doled

ytchdy dar yshaiin lkor qokal daleody otar okiin pedy ypcheeey alyedy lchdaiin chckhy ol qokeey olkaiin otedy

shckhy lkcheod qokal aleedy aiiineeedy osdy chckhesy qokchedy chedy odedy okar dchain qopchod chedy chckhey keed lchol yshd shey

dchaiin tedor chedy sdy araiin olyedaiin odyed ockhes odyeedy otshear schr qotedy okes lkchdal chey oltey lkdair
daredy okal ytdaiiin ychdal qokar sain chckholy okeedaiin lkaim qokal sar qokchedy chedy dchdy aiin qokchy cpheody cheol odyiiin shey otain dedy
schdal syaim opchor dal shckhedy ochedy ol saiin olteal daiin odaiin olyees ain lkain keeo odedy lkeeedy

y opcholy lsheedaiin qokal ytaiiin qotchedy olsd ar qolear ol lol olkeey kaiir rody shedy aiin

dar tshedam otar shey opchaiiin shey ry qokain okeey rchedy lkar am odeody shal aleody ssheedy odyar lkedam
lkaiin reedaiin shckhaiin otal oror raiin led syeody kchaiin sheol lkeody lcheedal chd okshoiin olkey dar dareor

qokeeol oseos opchedal dar shedy daiin olkaiin chedy ysheeor lseeo shey lchdair olkar okary otaiiin qokeedy chedy dardy
shcthed shckhedam otal cphor qokeedy chedy osheo olkchy okchy oleain dalor qokedy okal dcheeor air qoreedy kedam chctho otaiin al
dam ain daiin sar odydaiin lkol lchey rody qoam opaiir otchedy yteeody chedal qokeey rdaiin ykedy lkain shedy

ytchdy lkchdo opdy daledy cthe okeedy kody odyeeody otain sheckhy octhm air lkain raiin lksd chedy qokeey pchdy odeos
qoty oleedy cthedy solor qopcheedy otedy qokeey chedy qoky yteear aiin saiin chckhy ary dar aryeear dar otey shedy

lchedy lkain shedy lkar shey qokchy kaly lchor aiirees old okaiin al qokeedy chiin olkain shedy oledor otedy
chor ksaiin qoteedy chdy opcheeody chedy chckheedar qokar keeor yteds qokedy reain sain aleos taiin chdy lody qotdaiin aiin
lchey rdor ychaim otaiin yshed solaiir chal oeol okol pedy qokeey qoko lcheos qokeedy qoky raiin saiin olsdy shedy

y opcha chedy ctheedaiin or ol olky sheody sheol chedy okeey oteey solka ckhd dchdy lkcheeo aiin lkeeod qotdaiin ain
scheody solkaiiin yeedam ychdol qopchod soeda odyeeeo lsheedy ledy ochor daiin ofeey chedy ypchar qoedain doleor cheol dal qokaiin ar
lcher dar laiin dars chckhy shckhed chctheos dykeedy shdaiiin ykeols schdy solka qoedair sals aiin

ar chey solkeedar shedy daiin okedy qotedy am qotal chesy lkchedal qoam otary sheey dar aireey qol dy otaiin ar
qotcheol opchd ain ain teeeody raiin osedy otaiin ysheol ykchor qokeedy aiin choiiin okain chedy orom lkchedy qokchey aiin qopedain ol
chey shy qoes otd otedy saredy tos odyeol ody rdaiiin lsedal qotdor shedy shar okal shey ol dain ardar

olkol olkain qotedor chedy syg qokedy roiin qokchair ykchy qoeeey yshey olchary oteeor chedy qokal ain yshody cheol
darear cthedy qokees ar tal aiin qockhaiin cthedam qopchain yches qokol qokain qol cthdar qotsheody dam dar
shedair eseeol ol cthol chedy olkchey ol sheey qokaiin sheesy lsedaiin odyeeey chey ol rchdal daiin lteear okar or

osedy qokal al tcholy kal olaiir qokchedy saledam chor shey lcheeedy shol ral okshaiin okedy okedy qokal kal chedy
odeo qokees dar opched qotaiin oteeor ole chs cheedy shedy qotey ar sheol qokeey chedy oreos tees shedy
dcheor qokain shes qokshdam shedy osaiir shedy oty kor cthor tcheeedy oledain chedy olysdy salaiiin kal chedy

am kcheeody oleed otedy qokar opeeedy dykdair dam air chckhdol qoteeeo dar tar kais lkcheeor pcheor
dchol qopes al qokchy tchaiin kchdain aldam daredy qokal okeed qokeey chedy tey chedy chey otedy ol qoteey lcheey dair qol
lkaiin aiin dy kedal oddy olyees lkcheol qokal dar shedy qolaiin otaiin okshesy okchedy ches shais solkeedy qokaiin shey

shody fchain chcthedaiin ykal ar dcheos qokeedy sheey aldy cthdaiiin air oltor raiin okchedor dar qopedol shedol otd ol

qokol fchain lkees qoteedaiin chckhom okeeor teol ykeod qokeey char pchs shedy opcheols qool lsdol pal or

opchol qoky olkain qokeedy saiin dar lchdaiin oleol areey tchedy ocheedam chckhy qokeey lkchal shckhor qopchedy
daleor kchy oles okal qoteols dar okcheeaiin ol olkol pear kshees ol teeey aiin oraiin chedy sheey otaiin chol

cthed qoreedy aiin soiinain cheey okd olsaiin lcheedal okeeey aiin olkaiin cheol dair otaiin air qol oreeo chy otaiin or

osedy cthals oted ockhedal shey saror qokal olkchy okiin okain okedair shckhy qotchaiin sair dyteols kor oteedy osheedy chees qokdal

lchdar opcheoly reedy qokeol otal chol qokey qots pcheeol chor kiin olkear schedair shaiir lteedy dared
okedy qotchain lchdy lkchaiir otchedy chedy chctheeey y yeeey ol otsheedy shey qokeeedy sheeey ol olsheees lkedy qokchy kcheeedy otal olshain rcheeedy

qokey chdaiin am cheeey otchedy chedy yor lain osheeedy qopedain lsal y opcheed shaiir tshaim toly or

ofchedy qopcheeey qokchedy ol yshdy lkais ain daiin oey oteedy otal lsdor sham chckhy okeedy otedy lsedy qokeey ain qokeedy cheey or

otsheor dcheor chckhy qokchy yteear lchor okeey qokedy sheody ykd okaiin shm dain lsedair qokeeor she sheear sorain

dshedal shey sar rody ar dykedy cheey chdaiin chctheody qolkeo ain lchaiin sairedy tdar

qokal ol qokaiin sheey chckhy qopchs shom aiin yshy rdol olchiiin shedair lkeeedy dcho ol qofchdar tdar

okcheos dy cheedy lshdy dchdy olkaly otar qotar shey qokeedy aldam chcthear okchdy chal okeed qokm shcthor

dchaiin okeedy ol ody chcthor
qofchaiin opchy am ykeor
y okey oksheor lcheaiin ar olkeey otedy ar qokaiin ar shedy aiireeod shedy ochaiiin kdair qokal chees qoked qokchdy or qoteedy lcheol

ol olkedy ychsd chedy qopchos ar sheody lty choiin olsol qokeey keear shey qoteey aiin schsd lchedy

leey otal pchdy qoky otal shey lchdal odaiin qokshedy oteedy schain qokeey pchdar ykcheesy dar qokeey qoty shedy dar okchy chdy
cpho qokeedy ol okchdol ain qokeey chedy ksheeedy qokey yshdal ytcheey yteal dam kary chdy aredy

sardy qopcham oteeody qotsd chedy olkeedy ored qotshaiin oeody qokey oleedy lked qokal dar shar chol
shckhy solkes qoky sheol oleeaiin saleeedy oteey aiin shckhy oksheear qolkeos lchey qokchedy chedy cthedol shed dalyedor kedor cheol

dchain tes chdy okchaly odeey ted cthdy ar qokeol lkchd otshear qolol teor dykaiin
ykchaiin dalydy oteedy soreo olkar saleed sheey qol qoky oleeor qokal odyr rs dchor qokal opaiir lchedy
sar odydain dar ypchedy ardy olsdy or qokshey sheol qolkeey dchod olkal qotal ol soiindy sareol

oed chedy ytcheeo ytedor otedy dar olyeeey kedam lchey qotchedy oka qol ctheal chey okair qokcheeol tshedy

qofcheol dal odedam otedy saleor
eseey oledol okeey air ykcheeey oryain chcphdam shedy chckheeody ol okar ain teeal kar tshaly ctholy aiin saiin oty cham aredam

al dalyain qoteedy qoky dar taiin sar qokol qokain qod shedy okaiin shey daledy dshees ysheol aiiriin peor ockhes dar

olkaiin lkchs dy lsoiin chor ykal rar otaiin qopcheody qockheor shol shey qotal chedy sheody aiin lkary kdaly olkal chedy

qokaiin opar lshor qokar ol qotoly dar qokal qotar shsaiin qokchy qokedy ain qokeedy qoksheey opcham al shckhy chdaiin qokaiin air

lchey olkchedy ar dcheol olkeedy sar y dain qokaiin otchaiin qokal aiin shor cheeor chey okchedy shey otaiin qochedam lkeeey lkchsd dsheedy otaiin al

lchey lkcheod qockhm olal odod qol olyeeey rdaiin shol oleeody cheeor ar pd dchor lkaiin odyeol okar cheees ytchaiin
dchedy yshor lkaiin okchedy qoes qofcheody qokchdy aiin qokeedy ykg qotedy cheedy ain qofcheeoy chckhdy qolkdaiin okedal aiin
yshdy yeedal shedy dshdol chdal opchr am taly or qoteeol sheey al qol odeal sholy keeo qoky lchedy kchar or

or qoky oteedy kes qol sain okeod otaiin chaiin dleey cheedaiin olteedal qokedy ltam shedy qoky olchedair lchedy shol al
chedy okchey qodaiin okar shdaly sardy ar olyy sheol ain lkaiin qokchedy oleain reod qotshaiin qokeey ydy choiin qokeeedy cheol
soled opcheeaiin olcheedaiin reedy shedy pchedy opchol qokeedy dshaiin qokey qoeedy chedy qoteain pchedy oraim

saireey cheeey al qokeey dshedal qotedy ochdair daiin shor chg opchor daiin am qol cthey orar olal okeeedy chol
lkain qotiin fchear oteey odor oraiin chey qoteedy keam qotedy chey salor qokal okain dal ytedy eseeol chckhy qokal ctheol
chckhey kaiir qotchol ordy shckhair cthed okal qokaiin tear qokal ol sar aiin kchsy okoiin chedy opcheda ol

oiiineeol qoeeo areo qokal pcheody qotar shg kaiin qotar alod daiin oksheain ordy chey chdy olyaiir okes ypchaiin
qokeey chal y kchedal chedy qokeedy olkey lsy chckhol olshal pchedam tchal aiin chor qokedy schain otedy
qoteey shey qoky olkeedy qoaiir raiin qokeey y daleody olkeey redar sheol ol lkeody qotchey olchsy oledol qokal qol

oty chs reod lchedy lchear okeey qokeey qotees olchom oksheam paiin qokal ykain doleeor chod
qolkeey tes y otchey shckhol qopain qokeedy lshaly daiin lcheos tchr qochaiin otal lcheeol opchair aiin oshsairy qoeedy odair
oteey otedy qolkol teedar otam ol soledal chr solkody chan shaiis chdaiin oedy qokedy

otal aledol okaiin qoteedy chckhaiir oiinedy qokshey yshody lsary qoeedy shey olchees ar ol qoky chs qokaiin ol
olky okain ain soredy aryedy opchear qokeey oredy qopees shedair lkaiin otchedy okoiin ain opcheed keam olchedair ypcheol
qokeey chaiir reod lsedair odeedy ol qokar ytary lchedy qopo olchar shedy sar lteod okey dar ty chdy

qaiin okchor kchom qokeedy chdy okeey qeedain okaiin kr ol qokeedy lkaiin rair qokchaiin qokeey otain olcheed dchaiin saiin otal chdy
oky cheeor oteey otedam chol olkeedy qokchdy shedy qokaiin qokeedy qokedy ltair ockheeey qokain opchar alal omdal okal shedor lkchdaly araly
qoeeody ches alaiir otchedy ychaiin okey ar dolm ol dal ochair ar sairedy otal olchsaiin qokedy shedair ykchdal

chedy ain qotchy opchain sheody chedy olkeedy leeol pcheol kcheeaiin qol lcheedy ololy kedal otaiin aiin ykchary or
olkeey oles ol okedy aiin lked daleor qokar olar oteey sho olyeedaiin ol oror teoly qopol solaiin
lchor ldar cthals oped sory okeedy reees chedair lkedy ykeees aiin dain qoeeor ol okedy olteos otal olkaiin or

qokshedy tor daryeal shedol oteod olkol otear ocheos solaiin odaiin osam al dchedy ytchdal
sheody chdaiin chcthee air shor chdy olkal ltdaiin lcheedal chckhy okaiin okeedy ol cphg chdy ain qokchy dal ar olkchdy kedair olchoiin lkaiin kaly
lkaim sairdy qokeey lyed qokeedy kchedam dain qokeey shedy ofcheo solkeeey reees ol ypcham yshaiin lkas chedal chdy

opchaim dy dchdam chd oaiin daiin ypcheor olkar al ty ol okal kod ykchsd air okaiin lkchair qofcho ytal chey qotedy qol
orod ol odedy qokchey lsheeody cheesy shedy okair chey kedam okchey ol tal lkcheod qokchdy ychdar lkaiin shey
chey al qokar chckhy ychear sheody sorey qol ypchaly soleey chol dcheedy qotody ol aiiined opcheeey shedy chdy

shckhy po ofchdy opar shedy ydair osedor okeees shedy olcheeody shedy oltol qokeedy okar sheedaiin shal chedy lchey otedy
chey qochear ytchain qopchsdy ol opcheeody rdo shs oky cheeam cphdy lkchedy yor okeey ycheed pchaim cthom al
to otaiin teos qokey or sheol qoky fchaim otedy olshes okchy ysheol opcheeeody qokain qofchaiin otshey qokchy tol lcheor

y oseeody dar qoky shedy olcheain solain cheam keeam chd salaiin kedol shol okain y octhol okal saror ypchees air

okedy qokchedy okain chor qokedy tedar shdam qokal yteeor cheey otedy qofcheeedy qoteey shedy qokchey lsy qokaim yeos ockhees y

lkeor chdy aredy chey yshod shol soreody shd shedy ol deeol solksdy lshs dykdy sheody shey ckheols ted otey qokedy
opchedam dy soldy chdy arain lcheos dedy qoky dshal opchaiin ytoly lteols daiin chedor dar daiin okaiin air
chckhy dal al daiin lchs ololy qotair qokear sar alyaim shar olyain shaiir okol okain shedor shedy ypchaiin soiineody

shsy lsham oleor saiin okchdair okey solkedy qotal okey chedy ochaiir qokchedy qokedy rees chedy shol qoked otar chckhy osam aiin
chedy qokchas ol chcthy lkcheear lkain chedol olchaiir qotchod okeed yteeey alyear qokey keeam otod chor qol
eseeol chedy olkeey odedam otey koy lsos odo chdy qockhor okeey qokdam aiin qoteey ol ockhsdy lsody chd pcheos

oteey qodain chol ykchaly chey olkas keeos qotg otedy ol or qotal sors solksdy otedy solcheear qokedy oair
qotain ltdor otedy dain olshar kair aredy lshd al dain oty okeeey reear dar led pchy chedy
qokeey ykail alyey ypchg keey lkain chedam oo otey lteor qokaiin yshed qockheos sald reod yshdy olkedy or

aiiror daiin rsheol arol ochaim okar yteeam dain qoes lchey qokchedy dshes chckhedal lcho olcheody cthedol chckham otaiin dar
cheey chedy cthair qokeey olkain lsody olchdol tedy qoar oldor qokshedair shey tshol qoes sheeo lcheor soiinedam
lkey chey odydain okeeody cheeo leeedy ol lkeeol lkchas qokedy ol lchdar qoteedy olteos sain qokchdy shedaiin sheey chedy

lkaiin aiin lkm olkchdy chair qokdaiin qoteeey chedy chdy aiiinedy chey aiin ddy al ytcheeey olkeedy ykedor ain
qokshedam kar ks raiin soiinedam cthar lshedaiin qotain aram olcheeeody kar qokedy sheain arey
ytiin okain cheedaiin qokchair sheody shs qokaiin dar ltsdy ches qokar odyoiin saireos chedy qordy qotain qockhdy qockhedam

okal ain oteey otain aiin soraiin shckhy chedy qokeedy lchedy chedy okal qotaiin tair lkody pedaiin ol okeedy shol chedy qokar qolcheody chckheain otaiin chedy
dcheey odyos chedy qokeedy orod cthain okcheeaiin shey aiin ol okal aiiineor y shckhy okain qoty qoteeos lkcheody osg chiir dal aiin
lcheedal lshiir raiin chckheod otain odyedor dar otol qokain char ardy lkchal kaiin dalydar or oair qokey lsal sheey ar

dshar otedy ochaim aiiinedy qokeey chdy chedaiin rchaiin lcheer dar kchain qokal okeey chedy dytal aiin

yedam qokeey qotedy sar lteedy oteedy lshody leos dy chedair okeey oleeey oksheees cheey ain oteedy chg kchor

dleal qotsdy saldaly or oeos aiireees lseeal olshaly qokey qotedy chor shey y qokeey keedaiin key qokeol
shckhy ain dedy opchol ypcheesy opdor oleeody koiiin ckhear qokal lchdy okes soleor ldy shol dar
lcheedam qoe otedy otain ypcheo chey chal rchol lkey daiin chedy oshedy cthedar ychaly dal chy qol

lshedal chedy cthaiin lkam chckhy qokal saiin or qokeey ychr sheedar dordy rey qopcheor chcthey
ofeedain yteedaiin qokar ykeam qoeeey shedy y tsheedal lchedy qoksheal oteedy odal qotar otedy chdy opchaiin qokaiin sheedy taly
odeeor or oreedar otom sheeed shedy cthear qokeey al opchas chs qokeedain sheey aredy qokchy okain kedal dar

chey ain ledy opchedar dar solaiir qokchedy shedy chdam ytaiir qochey sordaiin qol dain dleal shedy qotal qokal cheol cheoly qokain taly
qokaiin qokeedy ol otchy okchy aiin okchar keor qokshey qokeey lcheody ytesy ycheos chey okchedy dar qotey ychedy daiin oo shal y okeedy shedy
ofchedy okeedy dor cheey raiiin qotchol otal y lkary ychdain keees qokal aiin qokeedy oty ol oram qokain oteedy ol

soldy okey shedy oeody am doredy dair dchdy opeeody shedy olkar qokedy ypchedair dshar oky qokal cheees oeeedy olkeedy otedy
areedy shdaiin chcthod qockhear teod y shedy chedy ychd lchdy sheeo yeey daiin shol okain dardy or

cheeo otedy lchdair dedy lchdy yteed chey sheedy okcheeedy chol dam y shedy qockhear opcho chdy
dalyey ool ol oreor ykchaim deoy qokeedy olchedar shedy dsheod ol cheedy shedy cthain rchdy olsdy ol

qolkey dy lkdal schain pchy lteear lkol qokol qotain cheedaiin lcheedal ar dleal qotedy lkdy dal qoteeaiin raiin or

ody ofchod par ytsy chedy yshedy olchoiin cphaim okeey tshdy rar cheol shckhy chol sheol shedy qokeeedy shey or

chedy sheody okeear rchol qotey dar ool okeedy chdy ykeeey aiin okar qoa shiin olkain dar qokeey areor
dey qokeedy sho opchdol shey kshdy ain lkain okain oo qoteedy ockhdair sheol yor opcha ycheeaiin qokedy al dal shedy
lko sar reedar okair cthdy solkeeey yer kdain ksairy opeear qokar ol daiin ykdo okedal pchm

odyeom dshal chal ol pcheos chdy ocheey ksdy dar cheey ar qokeedy otal otedy qokaiin olkeedy aiin daiin qotedy
daledy saiin otaiin oteedy qokedy qokain dal osheeedy ar arom chedy yshal chdy qotal tsheeedy daiin oltey qolain dyteedy shin ykeol
qoky okeedy qoteedar chdy ocher qoes olchody qokedy qokchm omdy ol okeey ol qolcheoy shd cheedy ral otedy

oedy cthdaly qokain otar chedy yer ar qoky chs areey olkaiin okaiin ain kedair lchod cheedaiin shol qokedy oteey dcheol daiireor ol

ody daiin aiin ychr oiino yteedy otedy tom otedy chckhary qokain ain qoksho qol ochear okeedy odeody solair olsdy chol

chey aiin qokeey keeeody ol otoiin oeody eseey dar saiin olkal kedal dcheor qokeedy qokeody oty ykm
darain aredaiin aiin so qokchey pear oair doledy olchy qopcheody lkaiin choly olsheeeody qokedy
qokeey qotr qokain sheol chdy dey opchom lshedy qofchs chdol qotaiir al ley qol chor shedy shedy

shey aiin shor chedy cpheeam ykeeedy doredy opchar shedy shckhy al okar lchedy odeal odaly daiin dain qokedy olkedy shey
kchedy cthe qopchor dchs shey lkches olkdor chain lkaiin qokchedy ar lkain chedy qokal ykor ochaiir shy qotedy ycheesy qokaiin tchair orchg raiin
oty chs lcheer chedy chey aiin otcheey oraiir ol oreor tshor lol olkaiin qokain qopcho ody

deol dal aiin kchar odyeeey qocheor areey lkdar osol dchear qopchr qokchedy chckhy lseols qokchy shey

ordy lchor qokar ar qokedy otal soleeedy saiin olteedal dshar kr oleedaiin chdy qoes qotal kos soredy lkar raiin

ochaiin opchees aiin qockhdy

tshol dam areeedy okaiiin chedy daiin pched daiin daiin ykain qoky raiin oteedaiin qokain chey lchol qokal cheey saleeos ychor

lchear lkair sheol dar okchey ckhdy char al opcho fchar sheey raiin kcheody olcheain y

lchedy sheody to shctheol chey okchedy shey al shes al soiins sheam aiin lkos otedy olchees sheey ar olyy aiin

led otal octhear dal ar dardar qokaiin sheey ltdal otchy ytedar ky al chey oryedy rsheey lchedy

qokar ykeeody saldam shedy daiireda ltail am daiin qokal chas olcheedy lkches qoos otain chedy

shey ain ockho chey olkeedy ar chor olam qokaiin ykedy okedy qotedy al lcheeoy dshoiin lkeeol or shckhol daledy qoeear ol
sarey okchy qokchy ychor reedy lcheedal qokedy olchdaiin ltar qokedy yedam qedy rcheey shor choly shedy
riir daiin shedy lchedam dair otaiin qokeedy sheeody ycheeaiin saledam opchain oliiin ol ykcheeo ol chsdy dar qopchaiin

oddair lkees aiin yeedal chaiiin ain daiin saiin lsr qotcheody cheeo sheedar air oran olsheody oky shey okeeody qotedy
ytoly qotedy ras dar oteedy cpheedy shalsy kdal dchdy ytesy dleedain dar ody qokeey qoty qoteeor sheeor ldy
otal ol cthary al qokal cheol dykor olkeedy y dar sheey otedaiin qokedam olyes pdy otar qokedy cheedy otedy choly qokedy

dar sheedaiin sain qotedy al doledy qokal ycheed cheol qokeedy lchedam qokar sey opcheeody shdy ypched tdain shedy
tsheeol yches ol dalol qokeey qokdaiin ol otshedy saiin lchdy qoes qokchey oteeo qokedy lchdair daiin orchm okain dain otaiin or

lkcheedy daryeo ychdal ykchdal qokol fchol chcthees ycheeedy dam qolks qotody or lkaly qoty qoky okain daiin qokeol
ypchdal otar shey or to sole ain lky sheedar lseed qokain aleeey air okcheeody kady qokedy aiin dam chedy
okar kedal otaiin tdy olyeeam chaiin lkdar cpheal qokedy arair okeedy dar or qokal lchey otd qol orchdy oteees qokaiin chdy

qokshedy qopcheeey shy ar okaiin qokain qokey chedy dyteols ychesy ral eseeol sheees otaiin ol oteedy chdy orchdy odyal lchedy
qokeey keedar al qockhain yeeedy dair pcheedy or cthar shaiiin otchedam qoteey ol olyedaiin solkedal cheols dal aiin
qoesy qochdy qokchar cheol qolkeeod oteedy ltedar tdy shdar okedy qochdy ytedair sheedy saleeo lkche ofchdair opchedy

qockhol lkain ykals paiin dain qotaiin ol dykeor qokeedy okaiin qokain ykcher sheam lsary soraim oedy okchy olyor
cheey ks oleeeo chedy oteedy dar olyeeaiin or oleeey aiin ldy dal shckhy keeedy otshaly cthor taiin
lkaiin qochol sheody ales olkal ol dam qokaiin dar aiiineeedy teody qoky ols cheedy shs ykchdy qopain qokchy okchedam

qokeeol qokeey sho lcher chedy qokal lyedy yain qotd sheedaiin otchdy sheed otain yteeeody saldain reear cheol
qoky chedy tees tchey shckhy dar okchedaiin reol opchoiin qokedy chedam ockhy tchol keod qokchey ykal aiin chdy qokchdaiiin keees dar
sar qokchedy dsheor odeedy chedy chdy qokeeor chedy ofcheeol orcheees sheeor oty oleedy ctheo ykeol olyesy aiin qopair

olar olchod sar alyedy cthdo cheeos ales otar chol ctheeody chedy cthain qokeey chdy olkchdy shedy dain dar
shes otshedam qokal y tcheeos otedy qokcheeol olteedy chedy okeeedy ychaly shedy daiin ytchey otaiin qokaiin ar qokeedy qoeols shedy
dalydy dal oltedy kcheeody air shedy opcham reedy daiin odyeesy dar qotchy oloiin sheey saledor qotaiiin qoteain dar

ytched saledaiiin fchedy qokal lcheaiin chedol olkchey qoedar aiin tchy olchedaiin aiin cheedy ytedol shedy olok tain orchm
qopcheos sain shoiin kdy okchaiir air kchy qokeedy ltair qokchdy okeedy cheain opchor shedy opcheeey odyoiin sheey otchor chdy ofchod tchdaiin am
shey olyr aiin kchom qokeedy solkaiin saiin qokedy chdy otal qokeeor shey dcheear qokedy osaiiin shedy oty shedy chckhy lchedam schdaly dar okchy qokedy

al opcheeody dar odedam yshoiiin sheedy ytom aiin dar dlee ychal sood ltaiir olkchedy chdol ol qokal ochdy tdaiin aiin
opchedy orcheedaiin dar arom riiin otain okcheos lair qotaiin aiin otedy lkain olesy saledy osheol doldy
qoeom qokchdy oldam schdal shckhaiin qokar lsaiir qokchedy lchedy qockhor qokal lteees pchm chs sain shedy okeedy teeedy

ar shol soledam ytees odedy oteedy olkeedy aiin saiin aiin tg y qotchy qokal ykor chckhey chedy saiin shey or taiin olkchdy qotedy
yeer dar cheedy keeor chedy qokaiin tchor shdol ytd qotoy ol qotal chedy qoky shedal kshaiin yshor
cthaiin ykchedar char pchdam oleear lkchesy qofchol qokshor daldy chey alyedy otaiin olkedair lsl shedy

oreos rchy cheed okeey rok ykeeedy dalyaiin opchedy qokaiin olkaiin shedy qokaiin ysheor oteod shckhaly oteedy aiin
kshesy otedy oty ykedam osedy okedar am ledar dar lkchear chckhiin opey ypchaiiin aiin cthedol ar
okeey ry areeedy schedaiiin olked otal qokeo opched chctheeey dar ory qokedy olky yteedy qokey dar shdain lseedy aiin

sheody ain keeod yshedy lkeeo lkchaiin ockham chedy qokar ofcheos chey qotchdar qotaiin pom aror otal tshdy chedy otal shor odyes qokal ar
otchol cheey qokain qokeedy qokchor aiiinor dal chor solkdal olkeey fchedam shctheos cheedy redal chedy tear dy al
ochol lkeol tdar qoky cheeor okey okshes oleedy darm qopeeedy sain qol shey cthary lteedaiin qokal chedy

dcheody otain qokchain ochor okchsairy al oteedy qokar lchedy lsheeod chedy tedam dcheody opes chckhy dchdy chdy chey ar

otal opedain cheol dal cheol shckhy qokeedy chedy shedaiin ckheedy shear ksheal daiin ol shcthair kcheeey chdy

qokeey aiin qokal ain qotedol qokshedy sar sar sham al okiin qokain lshes yeer chdaly sheeody kar qokchey oteedy cheol dy ocheol

opcheeedy opchedar dsheedy qokaiin otedy oshey rdain chdy oty dar tcheod sheed lchey oleod qokaiin char air okal osheos

ar okeey chedy shcthdy rdo otched qotaiin qoedaiiin fchedy shol aredam sheain qokaiin shedy qokey chedy qoley qokeey ytchdar

ykched qokeey paly dy shedaiin otdaiin chdy yeedal chedy lkain ykeedaiin aldam qokchy ol qoty lss chey chdy

dchdar qokeedy ltaiir qotcheody lcheedy chedy cheey lkcheeey qokchedy chedy qokal qol otal sheey ytdaly olom raiin oteeedy kaly

qordar teeey olkchedy chedy qokal daldy qoteey chey cheeor opcheor tm leody qokeedy olchd lkain aiin ychal chckhey shey y

shckheol sheey qokaiin air qokar qotcheol qokedy ockhdy ar rchor chedy yor oteey otedy lo shal ol lcheedam qokedy chdy teeedy
ofchedam ykaiiin qotchain qoraly qokeedy schaiin dain daleos qol cheedy oteoy ky sheeor qokar qotchaiin shey shcthor okeey lkor
