sain am lky qoped tcham qotedy oteod qokey dar yshor ol daryeey chedy cthaiiin oryedy sheey otain daldy olkar chdy opchdol qokedy
sheey cheeor qopeol kes y otey salar al yor ldar otaiin otedy dar dair okal lkcheeody aiin ksheed ain

ykchor dolear daiin lchey qotchol pcheey qokees reody okal qopchdar okchy dy odyeeey oryedy odeal solaiir ol olya shedy
dykeos cthok ar lchedy yeeedy dair aredy daiin araiin shckhaiin qoar shol oldaiin qokey ykeedy rcheedain otaiin ar
chctheey sheeod tor qokey ar olkedy chal olkeeedy shod dy dleal dar ory raiin chey aiin ysheeod shey orcheedy or aiireeos otedy

lshoiin ain dain chcpheeol tches chd ol qotaiin oteeor cheeod tedam qokey cheeos okain arol
kshdair olyor qotedy opches sheedar dar daiin aredy sar otchedy cheeody olchedal qoas chedy qopchiiin olom okaiin ol
shcthaly ar qokeey okeey qood dain lkdy oleedar chedy lchor olydaly ytes lkchs lked otal qokain qokaiin dar

qokshedy qokeedy lcheer lchedy eseey chckhoiin qokaiin pal dleeol chedy shody otdar lkees ol qokeedy chey ltar chdy lshy qokaiin ol
ody chcthedar am qokeey otaiin al okedy or daledy shedar teos dykedy chckhey otary odydo ykeod lchedy
lkeor lchey ltedain chedy lkaiin rar olchm osar olkeos solain qokchy dal ain dareody qopchedy qotaiin araiin

okeey chedy sar kaim olyor dair rshor lkar dar shedy qokal tshdy lchedy saiin chey qokchedy okedaiin ckhaiiin or qokar leor daiin chedy
qoky oteedy ra qokain yol oteedy lsheeed okchdy qoeed otedy cthm oreal rdy cheel qotchey chedy qokedaiin shedy
ocheedal chal ral chcthaiin tdar okchdy dorear ysheeedy cheol tedaiin keedar yts qokain sald chedy

cheeey qokedy y cheed okeey oldam opcheeedy oseoly oteos lkey scho osy qoes qokal olary pchm
ocheer dshdain sheedy redor ltd ofeey oleeo otaiin chedy lky cheedaiin cthain dair am opchar y dain aiiinaiin dam lcheedal shedy
dar laiin dy shckhy lkchdy ykcheoly yshdy qokar ltaiiin olkchedy lchedy daiin solkal otal otedy oiindal qoky qodaiin qotchey chedaiin pchdy

otey otain ram opeeey alyain qokol sheedy chedy qokeey rchor otey ar otche keey otaiin shey qokeey kody olkchdy shedy sheod lcheedal otedy
oldy y opchor daiin okchy shey shail otchedy dsho qokar oky aiin lkar qokedy dordy schsdy cheols solcheor y
yeeoy dar cthair dair chdy qokaiin peedy sheor osals qokain okes yeaiin cheal aiin sheody ran olkaiin ytal qofcheaiin otedy

ral lkain dshes okal kaiin dain ocheeedy yshaiin rs ody okeey cheol tchol okchdy octhain shedy schedar chok cphdy aiin

shol shedy yshdy lkais fchedam oteey keos chedy olkol opeor qoped qokchy saledam opcheain ain daiin lcheedam chsaiin qokchy keos

qoedar olkdair pchain cthes key kshos chedy sheol lkdar okchy qoteal dal solkal oteey kedor qoteeeo dar

dain ral shol okeedaiin qaiin dshedal olkaiin oteedy am qockhor shol otaiin olkeedy y sheckhy ar kchsdy qoteeo lcheear ksy chedy

qokeey shey dalyain opchd lshdol chedy chor qokain sar dsheod otshor kal qokchey keees solkaiin okol peody lkaiin shedy
ofchor qokeey lkaiin ked lcheos dal yeaiin raiin okain oteey ar oeedain dair daryeey qoedy shol ytchain qokeedy om qockhol qokeedy lkol

ofchedy ysheeey oiineeol opchal chdy oresy char am qokchedam daiin chear qol ykchedaiin otchor okeey cheeor qokeey dar
ol qotal olkaiin teos shcthedy ctheeey qochdy ytchear darain lcher dar qol qokal otaiin okeedy y okol pedy cthes y

schair oltod qokeedy lcheey cthaiin okeedy dal shom ots aleeey oiinain oreey sysaiin ches qokal y
chdy okal lsaiiin oks chol qokar am oteedy qokaiin ytedol shckheol dolain daiin olkeey opeol ol tedaiin dar

oksheedy eseedain qoeedaiin yeedal dar odedy qokeedy or dardy chedy qokaiin qokeedy okshedaiin dar cheedy sheeeo or dair qoko

lchaiin aiirary al ychery
lkain ale solkdy qofcher ar shckhy shs ykchedam qokaiin otaim pshedy scheedaiin or lkaiin okal dar ledy daiin lfchaiin

oo qokol olkain chedy lkedaiin ales otain shckhy otes ar dy rchaiin chaiiin qol olkeedy cheol cphdy y ykeol

ar lcheody rd aiin aiiredar choiin oraiin qokal lsy pdaiin qolchdal oty qopchedy qokeey cheain sorain

shckhy olkchedy okoly ain opchol tair qokol otear chcthary air chcpheeor chedy pchedy lchey aiin tees chedy oteey dar

ockhaly laiin sshg ykdair yshsdy lseedaiin qokal chedy saleod shckhy qokchedy okedol lseeey dleey qol qokeey qotedy lkedar qol okcheeody or

shckheeol lteedy chckhey shedy dleeol chedair aiiined okeedy qofcheedal ar qokal ol olkaiin oleeor olkeedy lseor opchg oiineor tchdaly aleod cheey ol

otaiin tdal cheedy shedy shol lchor olkeedy cheedy chdy opchy shedy ypcheody qokaiin qotr aiin kchom qopchair ykchar ain qokal chedy

cthair chor lkchsdy chedy ykcheos olkeedy keds olsor dair sorol ofchdaiin kaiin rshaly qokeedy chctheey al qokchain

sairdy dleeol qoes okal shaiis qol sches lsheam olko reesy saly reedy sheod y
otaiin taiin okl olkeedy aiin chckhy aiiinaly lkaiin qopched tsheaiin qoas cheeor lchaly lody olshal lkaiin reedy rchedam

ol oeeol daiin oksheeey chey cheol qokeey aiin okol okain chol ordy dar qol oeo okchedam okeedy olkaiin air

lkaiin oryedy shckhain cheey dshes shol olchal syeo chedy ksheal okshg kaiin shckhy yteedaiin daror kes oty al tam am

dairor ypchaiiin lkcheedar shedy lkain ychar qokeey qoealy opedy ctheedaiin chol cphedy kchedaiin chedy chckhaiiin qokain otedy
shal opal aiin qokaiin lto ypchal rody chdain keeedy qoals pain lky air ocheor dshdaly aiin
sairod otar char shedy sain dcheedy chedy osy ol sar lkchedain shedy y otchey dsheeody ykedair otain qokedy

lcheaiin oke qotee daiin al dal or okeedy qoteey ches shsairy shedy solches ychair chor keoy chedy ypcheeedy
dal aiin shedy lsal oor dar ytar shey ocheedam chedy lkchedy cheol lkaiin tedy okain solaiin
ody lear shedy dam otchey ykal lcheeoy chedy lkdy lcheeedy dam shor cheees daiin dshair ypchedar lshedair al

dal okiin sheedy qoedol ctheol qokeedy lteeeody redar ar olcheeey olkchedy dar lkain chedy saiin okain lkdal
qokchey oteeody yteeos qoody oksheam ltaim kchom chedy opchol chckhedair lchod cheey chedy

dain ral qoty dar ysheos qokol oteody oro chcphear opchees olody ol oreor qokeedy shedy oedy

laiin sairain cthsd ol scheeedy teeey qokchedy lkcheeor dardy dal redy oty okeedy ltedor otedy sairear

dleal kan ks shedy shcthod qokeedy lsal chedy ockhair tam oleeey qotcheol cheedy oeeedy td chdy

qokeey shedy sheey y shol odedam lchor sol scheeol ykchy ychedain shedar yteedy aiin okal qol
schdal doledy opchey oedy rchees aleam ychaiin shctheedar chdy qoky chs ody yshedaiin aiin qokchedal lchedy
aldam am qokeol oteedy tshor sain saloiin tsheor aiin saiin cheol okeey chol daiin areol lor qokal qol

chal dshdaly soleal lkchg shedy qopcheos qokeal odary sheain ltal okeey olshsdy y otal orey
qoky olkeedy shedy aiiinaiin lcheaiin opal cheol ypchy qoped cheey kail dar teeey qotcheor al ypchair okedy alyeor ckhar dar
cheedar rary am alody ltedaiin lkchedy qofched opchedaiin air shaiir or opchees raiiin al otal solol

sar ytal pchor yeedal chckhy pched daiin qokaiin aiin okey qotedy opchaiiin qoeod oksheeo odeedy chedy leey solol
opchor solom qopchey chcthol qokeedy chedy daiin okeody dy qokol qokain chedair qotal dar oeeedy ykchr shey rcheo sheckhy lchedy
shody ckhaiin opcham ltedar oteedy shey lor kshedar ykchedy daiin cheedy lkcheedy aireal chedy olkal tsheedal chdaiin chdo fchedal dar

lchey y sedy oteey salaiis okshes cphor dain qoky dar ty ar dal chedy otchdal okcheey qokchdy chedy
qoleey chckhy shs chey alyeody sheody shs ol qokal lchedy qokal schm chaiir ltal shckhy oksheedaiin lkcheedy qokedy
oiiineey shoiin cheey aiin ycheal opcheeedy dain lchedy ol lkeedain shair okcheeey okeedaiin schaiin ychee sheckhy ar

dain ol olkeey lchol daiin saireos dardy shody qotain dar qokal daredy kchy qopor qokol otain ar qokal cheey shedy qotchey odyeeor shedy
lseeam otain shey qokeey ytdol chedy qokal qoky sheear ctheol qopdol kealy ckhey saiin olkal chdy daeol orchaiin
yeeoy lseedar lteedy ocheeedy dal ytcheey aiireed chaiiin al olkar chedy okeey res qockhair dchor sheol qotedy

qoiiin aleod oseos qokol ckheody qokchaiin cphedy olyom dar chedy qoteey qokeey ols qolks chedy soled qokchy qol
qokshol oteedy qotal redar ol qokedaiin odyesy alyedy chor shedy lkchail aiin dam opcheeedy chckhy qoksheey am oredy
otshedy ykchody solkal otshor yeeoy chedy sshm ol qokar chol ykedar shey otoiin am olyar lses okal shok qol

lchedam qoteey qotedy cheey raiin dleeol ches okal dar qokeey chckhy ledar otedy pchey qokeedy daiin chedy yshor kshol
sareos cthsaiin olshol opchar shey okedy shey sheol yaiin olyeeedy shedy cthedy cheey opey dyteedam olshs qokcheol dy dalain
chedy qokeey kes chedy lkam oteedy chedy otar ytaly cthod dy qokm qaiin oteedy qotedy soledar opedam oredy

qoror shey lkaiin qochey ykchom ysheody dcheo cheey ycheos dar cthaly saiin qokaiin qoteedy ol qokchey okedal odeol qokchy oteedy sheod oedy
ordy cheedy chckhy ykcheeey olchal rcheol oteedy dar olos shedy daredy cthdo shedy sheedar ledy qokchy orcho yteedy qoteey otedy
ctheeol chey chail ral okal opaiiin chedy orchaly peeos kaim solain dar octhes or opchdol chedy

ycheod shol kain lol qol qoky fchd qokedam olaiin qokey aiin ockhol tedaiiin okain chedy qokaly tchar raiin
qoksheeol qopchaiiin rody chedy qokal shey lkchesy yeer otedy sar qoctheol qokal qoro chckheeey oleedy lcheeoy cheor aiiinor qokey chedy
ochor daiin dalydy ar daiin dar otedy olyar shedy okdain qoeeey qocthdy oteeody chckhy tchol dar ockhol otey olcheedy oteey raiin

cheey chedy qokal tshor qokeedy lkain lsheedaiin qotain okched cheey okes dar qokal olkeeey qotedy dal ltsy dar
lkeody lor solar chckhy shor resy lchedy chey qokchedy okeedaiin lsg solkaiin qokchaiin solees dar qokal schair
oky lseedy chedy oteedy sain shey shckhedy tshear shedy kchsdy am qokal solchain qopody shey ytdaly qokeey opaim oeos qockhain

olaiiin okshedain olsheees lcheody solkedair lsdor air qopchesy qotchol okar shedy qokchey olcheoy ar saiin ctheol
sain salom teol sshg dar ol sheol ol cpho am kchaiin olkeedy dalain saiin ol ypchees qopcheeedy cheey olkr qol
oky dar qokeedy chey oteody otshdar otal qokar ykeos lko aryear olyeeey shedy qokeey raiin qokchey cheol qokey qoes qokal qol

darol orchd odyey lcher chdol ain qockhdar okal opal cthaiin qokal okaiin teeedy shol koiin oeedain okedy chdy
qokeey qotaiir okchedy olail oksheedar chckhy qokal ctho or cheey otoiin chckheeal yches shey pchdal qokeedy am
tshor shol keedaiin ol cpheedaiin reedy qotedy lseedaiin reedy odydy daiin oteey kedy sedy qotal otaiir qol

cthedy solar oks chey olshedaiin al dardy yeedy qokedy chcthy ain okedy qocthain qoteey keeey chdy taim
tshor lky ain lseedy keol sheol otar ol okeedy chor ychear qokaiin qopchaim or cthaiin dal olkeey chg opchair
okeey raiin lor qokey oked araiin oteedy oeos solor lkais okeeey shckhy shey air qokeey rain qokeedy olcheeor aiin

shody ckhdal dair cheey okshes ain sain dchey qokeedy qol cheey lkcheedy lcheedal qoeeo oledain qoky qokeedy chedy tedy syeod ol
dchdam redor ykeeody chaiin saiin ol qokar ycheedaiin shedy qoteeedy otedy or chey alyedy qokeedy sho kchiiin y sheol shol chedy
qoky chs qokeey aiin cthed okchy tair lfchdy shd rd oty oleear dar lkan cheeor lkain dar otchy dal chdy

dar shckhy al sain dar cheeody chy qokdair sheeo qotain chckhar qolkor okeey shedal y chey okedy ain qokeedy ordar

cthedam ofchor sheody aiin qokal qolo okeey qockheor ol sheey solkeeo ycheeor shesy oltor tchar chedy

saloiin okol pedy cthedair ytas sheear qokaiin qoeos qockhedy lkeey qopeeam chaiin oed ofcheear olsheedy dar

shol ychear otshedy ypchaiin dairor oteedy odeey dain ol olkaiin shail olcheesy ytdaiin al cphaiin

ar yor lain otchey qotain ocheedy dar sham aliiin ckheear oledar otal dshom ol

olky aiin qotr alyedy otal chedy lkedar ral okeey shes shedy olsdy cheam sheedy am yshaiiin okshdain qoty keal arear

dar chcphedy qopcheeey qokchedy cheam odyeeo okeey dar dleal ytes oleear lsdy dal lkaiin odyos pchdam fcham odeeedy

sheey qokain sar qokeedy cheeos sales sarain tor sar qochey raiin ddy opchor teor cheols yshair opcheeody shey
cheedy kols pol kshy ol dykdy okaiin sheeal shedy tchaiin dal kchear saiin al ytchedar qoiir schdy aiin
shedy dain chey qocthey qoty qokeedy ychody ol qofcheedal okedar dar kchar ykeor qokal dchedy daiin oteey ykain qokeedy ofchaiin daiin sairdy

qokar yteeod dsheedy lkaiin oiindar qotal shol olcheeey tedam chckhody aiin qokeedy lshdy dal lchey qotchain ychaim dykain cpheedaiin kor
ochedam daiin oty chedy qokeedy sheody qoam ped otey shedy okeey qotaiin ol okaiir qocthedy sain or qokeey lkol otaiin ol
chckhey ycheeody aiin okal okedy dar daldy lkdy chckhs solaiin otshear qokar qoky otedy or ley dytes shedy aiin

qokal olchsy aiin lchey chary otair olkeey shey sar opeedy ol dolaiin qokal chor or dar qokal qotedy chedaiin or
lkeey aiin opcheody schaiin daeeedy qokal y dal qokeol oreeol odyeain ykeedaiin oeody olkeey otedy al
cheol lcheer qoes ol olkar kair okeedy qotedy shol oky lteeo rched ar ssho sheeody chedy lcheedy oly ol

kor qokar otedy qokey aiin schos raiin ol aryedy chol qokaiin teor tshey lshals opey ockhes qol qokain lkain otedy al
dcheedy kdal lcheedal kedam chcphed sheol olkal olchar oro chair tcheear kos dar qokar otedy qotain dair yedy olyeod aiin
okedy qokchedy chckhy dairey lchol chey tchol qokeey chey qoeedy qokal or ockhdy aledol qotey redol dar qopchody ykor

qolkeeedy qotedy lchor qotar ychal sar qokedy ol otedy lkaiin lteed ykeedaiin cheol shckhdaiiin chedy qokaiin qokaiin odyear okal lkedy kchal y
lcheeedy qokar chedy ykched qoty oteedy qokedy laiin oledaiiin otain ol otal shedy araiin qokey ytedar oky lseear lkol
olkedy opal olky dshar solkeeod qoeear tsho lsan lcheo opcheeos shedy qokey al kar qotdaiiin dar kchal al

dchey qopchor lkaiin shy chedy cthedal res ocheedal qosy cheol qokal ykchee otar okshear chol qokeedy oteey ar
olteos saiin shckhy ol cthdol ain chckhy chey y olyes ytedair qokain okedy chdar ordy raiin orcheey ol schdy
ocher qoy fchedaiin pchedy okeey kody raiin okchy qokal qokedy chckhal omedy qokeey aiin dy ain kshail chckheeor kshedy

leol qokey lteeam ockhdy chckhdar shdam qokchy rdain chal qotaiin y olyol otar reedy qokaiin ol okal otedy
olky oleedy qokal olcheeey qol ssho roiin lcheedam ol otey lkcheor chedy sain lsal qokedy shckhear okeey okaiin or
chor keeeo qodam shol cheol qedy dain odey solor opcheeod okd dam fchees kdy olyaiin schdy

lkchd ody aiin lkaiin qotchear kshedam daiin aiiineos ty shes otar qokedy chcthdar dam qokedam ykd dleey oledal qokaiin or
ody chcthaly qokchy shar opdal sshes otedy lsal qokeeedy cheol okeeod chedy otchor okchor okchdaiin shedy opchg yshdal sheeey kaim
lkedy opchor osaiiin ain qotal ocheos yshedy shedol olcheeod ytam chedy sheol olydal shal ar soly chol

pshey opchar olkedar qoky cthdy chey odydy red qokaiin dar otey qotsd aiin okaiin y oky olcheds shey al
lcheaiin ar qokol qokain ar oteey araiin olkchy ykor ykaiin ofcheedy chedy qokeeedy kor qoteey aldy dair cphdar shcthody qokedy
qoky cheeor lchey qokchedy qoeeal qokedy qokchey qol tsheeey saloly chedol qokaiin okain roiin lteedar dshar sheeaiin shedy al

odydaiiin qopedam okcheeos olchedain kaly otedy dam chey oiinol keos chey rdor dchdy or qofchain seedar qotedy
qoreal taly lkedar chom sheey qol kcha aiin qokedy aiin otchey qokain qokedy ypched odeo shs cheol cheey keeey dar
yeos olkaiin sheedaiin ofcheeor kal lkaiin raiin sheody olsheos oteedy shedy qokeey chcphor opcheeody chedy opcholy aiin qokchey okdor qokar shey

dcheos lkeeey shey ol okar ykdol otedy oteey oredy dleeol okeesy cheey shail qotain shey oteey qokedy lkain ychaiir chedy
qokee qol yedam qokchy olyaiin olsdy al kchedy lshail alyear chey ar opchy ytal okcheody okedar shedy pedy
qokchy qotedy qokeedy or odeeedy oryaly ctheedar al kchy chedy otedy okchedol shedar qopdy qotar qol ochor sheol dal qokedy ochedy

otar kor shckho cphedair otedy al olkchey okain chedy areeol rl salar ytaiis y cthdaiiin pedy
doledy dy chctheody lcheeedy olysdy shedy olal tsheedal dar cthaiin ypchee olyeeam sheam ol okaiin qokedy lchey cheol
qotaiin otes kdaiin ol tshesy al qokeedy tsho yor okches y qokshear okeedy ar qokeal lchedy

lym reedy dar opcheeaiin shdol chal qokdaiin aiin qolaiin cthed yain oteedy okedy qocthdy ytair daiin qokaiin kaiir chdy
y opcheeody dar qotal otal cheol qotaiin aiin otchy cthdy ched opchaiir rs chdy dar pchol otcheds ytey dair rd qol
qokeey shey shol qokaly daeol qotedy daiin olky ytr chedy chcthdair okchdy qopcheor or chedar qokain cheey shedy ochair

dal aiin dy shsy chedy chdy chey shom chedy osear qokal ypcheol olydair kchaiiin ain okeedy odyeain qol
opcheos daiin qokchy y opcheain chedy lkaiin al daiin oddy shar yched okaiin chal ain dy lcheody opcham otdam chdy
sar oryedy rshaim chctheeo ar lsedor cheeody ar okeedy dcheor otr qotchain ypchair qorain teed lteain chdy

dy roiin shckhaly shckhy ar qokey shd yteeo yedy daiin cheey y ytal lchey lkchs sheody olcheedain oteedy chol
olkal chdy otchey olshiir scheody ol qol ctheoly lsoly qokeedy dar okedy shy chckhy ypchy chedy qedar al chedy ykchaiin cheey ry chedy
opchor daiin okchey otain okchy qotchy shedy chal otol opeody okcheeey qokedy okealy qokain koiin olkedy shey ockhaly deor chctheey qokeedy chdy

dain al aiiraly qokey qoair lchaiin soledy cheey qokedy daireol qokar otedy qokchy otal qokedy lsedor rom chckhy
dy al dal qokey dar okeedy alok saleey daiin aror qol okchr solks soleol ysholy sheees ytedar ytedol aiin
chdy olkar ros qokdaiin lseedy okedy raiin ain qofcheer chal chey ol shcthey teol chctheor sheody qokain ain qokaiin dar

opchor dain lsheedy chol dykeody dair pcheeedy cheol opcheeey lkcheeor aldor y olyees chody ol ctheeedy
cheey olches daeos qokeey qokaiin otchor qokain qofcheeey cheedaiin cthed qokeos ychor lcheedam lsheeey y olkar dar daeor okchedaiin aiin
daiin ar okal ddair dy rchaly qopcheed fcheeey rar ychar chckhs chckheod ches lcheol ockhor

qotchdy dar schdaly kd chey shedy solkal octhedy tam yksd otedy oo reol opchdol ol oteedy lcheor olyees am
cheey ykeeey qokain aiin kedam chckhy lkain ltar lkeeedy dshedor dar daiin saleedy daled ockheeedy qokeey qokshedy yeeey okchedy raiin aiin
ykcheol oaim opchd ol shol qokain lsos olcheod olsed otal sardy qokeey reeos shedy dchod daiin pcheeedy

chckhy dalydy dalod ofeal chedol chckhey shey daiin qoeedy saiin shedy qoiin pdar ctheeeody chedy otal qokey dar lcheeey qotcho al
cheeo chcthedy qoteedy sar ain okcham dar dy odeor ol okal ol oty ches otal oleed chey am dchain tees ol
chedy saiin chan pol chor air olyal lchedy lses rsheey qokeey al dar ales qoky chckhy dain dy chckhy tshaiir oiineody am

odyeeoy qokchey solkeedy otaiin otoiin ol okaiin qoeeey qokedy ytar lcheal osaiin qoeedy or sar lchedy qopchedaiin or
oedy otal chdy chctheey olcheeo dar qoty opes soreey oteedy ytey ol daiin lcheos tchal qokain qokal ockhdal
chdaiin qol qoty lchedy qokeedy qokchey otched okcheeey otedy yteees oles otal chedy aredaiin y chor kedal chckhy oteedy olkaiin or

ockheal opchaiin qockhol cpheeam qokchedy kair qockhed olchan odee saireody am chor chedy qokal yteeey okain ykcheedaiin ol
ar chey odyal oteey aiin ctheol olyeeos aiin olkain solaiin qockhaiin qokcheody sairo okshdain ol
lkaiin qochol oky to qokar cheol kas olcheeody tchdy qoedair chedy okar shdol qokeedy raiin areedy chol kshary pedol okal ol

ykchdal qokal qokaiin tched pchdam ol ar aiireeos rair qokal chdy oteedy odyesy okedy chdy ockhaiin lcheaiin olsheeedy otar chdy
lyed qockheeedy olkal chedy cpheeam qokedy ol shor alr ain dy qokal sheed qokain ol lyair otar shedy okchy ypchdy or
ody pchs am otedy lsd ykoly saliiin ychear qokeey redair qoedy ood tor okar qol

solaiin sheol otedy shom chal qokain qokaly qol ypches aiin yshedaiin chdy okal shcthaiin tchdal shor shedy okchy ypchod chol
sheedy okched ocheody lsoiin cpheedam cheesy qokal aleal opches or qoky al okeey shes aredy olkeedy chckhy qokal qokal aiin
shody oteol ctheos okeedy qokeey chdy to lsr raiin dain lchdy osal olchy redy sar am olkeedy daiin ksaiin qokal ychair

ytaiiin al oteey shey okeedy qokedy ofchaim lked odor cheol lchor qokeey shedy qokchdy okedair olkal ain
qokey qotedor ols cheey ykr qokedy pcham ol oeor daiin ked lchaim oro qotchey keeos ol
chey kary pchaiin cheedy otedy dain alal omaiin ol shckhy al okeey keeos redair oltol ain qokeey rchedy qokchedair ain

shcthed tchdy shdain shedy dalod okesy qocho chdy qaiin odaly ykeod chdy qokal odedy qokchy qokeedy keeody cheol
okeees qoedair shoiin qokm lchor sareeedy lkam sheol ltoy chckham ykeeo odedy aiin
otedy okcheeo shedy okdor oldo olkain shedy shckhy tdy okeey okaiin qoteol daiin redy chey ol lkaiin ydy ytok otain ykoly ol

qotar ain tor okchedaiin ain okchey qokain sain shedy ain qokchey yshaly odey qooly lshes ykar chedy am
qokar kair qoldair dal opcheol shor okeod daiin ched ldar dardy okey ol okal cheey shedy qoky or daror
chedy daryeey otedy opcheeody keor ykchos y oky qokeedy olchd ain sain chary ckhedam qokeey shedy rshedy y

chcphor qokedy lkol qokchy qokain ky or shedy okal aiin otar qoky lchedy sheol chdy cheey y yshr qokain sheol qopair cheey y
cha okes okar keeey qokedy dal lkdar chor oleesy ol oteey qokain ol shcthdy ykchdy qokeeedy qokedy chdy
qokaiin sheod otaiin y ofchol okeedy aryedy opchol aiin otey qopeol okeedy ykcheody qokey chedy opchal qotm opcheeam qopched sairor

lkain qokedy chedy rchdaiin ltes qotair kcheeody lsod ykeod lkaiin air kchom sheol solkaiin ykchair daiin dar oiiineey ycheeaiin ykeol
lkain qotiin olkain chckhy qokal sched otal okok cphedy otedy saiin okedy olkod oty okshedar aiin okal aiin peeo otdaiin dchaiin
qoky dshdaiin sar lteesy dched oo oky ol solam air qopchsdy al kshees okeedy or cpho otain chcthy shedy sheeey shedy chol

otol qokain ksd otedy qokchey fchdy reeody or qokol otear ypcheesy lsg choiin qokaiin lchedy qokaiin okain otchas chdy
lkain ykedal qokey raiin saiin otedar dched soror cheey olches qotar ral otshaim okchey chckhedol qokal chckhr ar
okal raiir otain shey lsedain lkcheeor qokar res qokeol dy qokedy qokar cheeody chom qotain qopchedar ol

dar okey qoeod daiin ychdol shedol aiiinaiin qoteedy qoko okeedy lkchaiin olkol pedy oteey qokaiin cheol chcphaiin okedy chedy

qoky olcheedy chol cheey shey chcthor
lchaiin opchary aiin qokor shor qokedy
aiin oty aiin okedy ytd air chctham oteedy chckhoiin lkchory qotedy cthy aleeody kar sheain orcheal chedy
solear cphes y to ol sheol darod sheey chedy okal ol otchy oleain qotaiin okeam shdy
dleey shok ykeeol qoleos qokey chckhy qokal ol oshiiin chedaiin olkaiin aiin daiin redal qokaiin tcheeedy ypched dy orcheal dar

shcthdy yshair qokchdy shedy otal okedy aiin qokeey sheain air dair okar ykar shdaiin sheedar ytdy
shckhy oiinain qotal chdy chor reeeo ar olchedar qoky chedy soreor araim dain rd shol ychy reedy qofchedy
daldy tshor opchedy saiin ochm chedol al ykor qokar chal chedy sshedol lkcheeor saled shedy

qokchdy qoeod lkdar qokaiin pody shoiin qokaiin am yeedal lshees air qoteey sheey air qoteedy yteeey tshor teeey chedy
ordy tsheedam cheed cheees ral qokeey ytedar qolkdair olyeeody ycholy raiin shey dal cheedy shedy ar
cthor pchedy aiiine aiin okey or dareor osedaiin odys daiin aiin okedy aiin daiin ockhol qotsheeedy olkeedy tshain

cheey ytes qockhdair keeey qochedy qoky qokeedy ykody ol lsdam lkcheedar ol oteey solkeam shal oleeor saley
shedy opchr qocthedy olkal cheol oteey opair qokchey sheedar keols otal kaiin sain chckhy opcheeod chdaiin qokeey dar dykdaiin chol
teor okedy rdor qokedy opcheeey qotedy lss am osedol chedy qoky aleeor lkcheedaiin dar leor chckhy

al opcheeody chedy octhedy qol pcheear ychaiiin ar yeaiin dsheedy chckheal kcheoly al lchdair okeey lchdar qokey qokeedy qol
tchdy darain daiin oeeedy dchdal taiis lshedaiiin fchain cthedair ol olteedal qoam rar chcthdy al
shedair olky tod qokar ain qotshaiin saiin qokal al oteey lkaiin tdy soredaiin rdol shedy okchy keod chsdy sheol ol

qokedy odyeeey aiin okar ykal sar ychaiin qotedy qockhor shedy oteey raiin qoedaiin ar kedol olky chol os lsheedar kedam
shor aiin raiin sain qoteeos shedaiin olaiin qokshaiin tdaly lss pcheo pchary chol otchdy qol scheeody chedy sheeey olsaiin
dalyor kdor kes chedy sared sheey char shedy okedy oiino shol aiin dain olky qoteal shckhy oiinod am

ofchedy qokeedy qokaiin lsal qokaiin ycheeor qotsy shedy lkedy shctheoly qokedy dsheeeody shes ypchain dyteedy okady olsaiin
saiin chdy aiiiney daiin sheey chedain kair shckhy oiinedy cheey qokedy kshey rshdal otal dar sorm qoteeedy raiin ol
dchear taiir alydar qokshee aiin oteey y chcthy chal qoeedy shckhy qotchol opchor dal chctheody chctheeod lsheeaiin qokeeedy ol

sairdy sheey chedy sain koly opoiin otol pedy chey ol tchaiin ldy sheeod tchm qokar shedy daiirdy or
shody pdal shey lyeeol lkcheedy schdy qockhor qokeey soreedy otedy sheain rcheody tsheedal shedy dar aireeol chdy ychiiin oteos qokeedy ctheody ol kcheain shedy
tsheedal chedy qoteey keed okeols olyaiin okeedy al kal otey reeo areedy ytedar otain dsheedy olshady ychaly

cheey shedy sordar qokar saleeeody dar cthedam okey shedy okal cheey salar qol okchg ycheeedy shor shoiin kcheody
okol peol olyedaiin aiin oleedy or qol ypchedol reeor chckhedy shckhy alyeody lchedy taiin daiin saiin chedy sshear aiiram raiin
oddaiin or chedy qokeey lkeos darain otchy aiiredy otsheor dchdy fchair saiin qokaiin shey okeey olted dy osdy

chey odyeedar char qol dalyedor qotedor lsaiin ypchor qokeey ofcho qokeedy aleedy chor raiin qockhear okchedaiin qokedy
lcheol teom lkchal ar kal olkchey yched ledain chdy lchor chctho sarod chckhey shedy ltiin pey cthes qol
scheey chey oleedy shedy okeey qoky cthear dy darain tain qol okar qokedy dshdy doleedaiin cheol okchdol shedy okar lchedy dy qoko

chedy yor aiiiney or qokal shedy reeey chey okchedy kdor otedy dar ykar shedy qotchey okas shedy fcheoy dar ykcheesy ol
chey al orm yor aiirsd ltaiir oledar shedy olkdol res qofchear char okshed sarey
qotar lsd ain dain lchor opchealy otain dar lky or lor darain qokeedy aiiraly rshair sarear cthes chdy

ood lkar lshody shedy saireol dleal dar otal oo chey shy dshiiin okain lkain oly sheey lted qockhedy
chdy qotal qoky olcheedy otaiin rm daiin qofcheedam olody qotedy lsdain shdol tchedy chey qochey rdaiin oteey shd otaiin chol
solaiin cthedair chsdy raiin ain daldy okar qoeos daiin chor chedy tair shar qokeedy chol qockhedy

shedair oreeol rdaly okedam kchaiiin shedy daiin olkol opedy qofchear osam reeey otedy daiin otol otdal olyy chdy
chedy pcheedy choiin olkaiin chdy okchey shey chdy okaiin dar qockhdar daiin opchey qokol sheedy lchedy ytchy riiin am ocheos
yts shedy okchdo ycheol okar qotar olchs okeey ykar aiin aredaiin aiin okal aledal paiin chcphod lsal qokaiin ol

okal shedy chol dain otaiin ychr qocho qokar kedy shey olm aiin dal ol lchoiiin sheedy olshd qoeedaiin cthdair lchdair
cheey odyedor olan kees qoteedy peos dalyeol dcheedy shey lses otdaly areody qokar redal chedy lkedaiin aiin
olkedy chckhals sheedy qoo chey qochain chey odys tain ykeesy qokey lkchar oddaiin ltaiin opchal ckhair cthg kor qofchedam

qotchdy yteeo olkaiin qoteeody kdor qokedy qoo laiin shar dyteody reedy shedy qotain oeor qopchd dar shody qokain dar kshedaiin air
chey oiindy chedy qokedy lkeor shckhor lkeeo qoeeor chedy aiin osa oledor dar olyd qoeedy qotol oto qotey raiin
oky ykeey qoy ytesy chedy qokeedy shckhy alyear tair solcheody lkcheees lseedy lchedy lkcheod char qokaiin aiin

otaiin sheedy qokom kr aiin ctheeedy qokeedy ocheer or dleal oles pchol sedar rain okeedy ol dair ykedor shedy
otshaiin dchor pchedy qokeedy chdy tedain cham oteedy shdain aldam soredy qoedol dolair aro chcthary ol
chdaiin olcheees kedol aireeol qotedy dal areos oeor qokol qokain qody ocheaiin al teeo aiin daiin dady shor shedy

ldal ypched ocheody qokees chol olkedy kd olcheod okeeedy aleeey qokchedy olaim qokeedy okar qotedy lkary chdy
chor otedy qofcheol aiiinais olsheeody shedy tshedy okeedy pchdal otal daror dar oo qotshey shar cpher shedy opchedy
oky sheedy oteedy olchsd cheeos kain lkdy olyedy ykcheeol ockhedaiin kody air yteedy qotaiin qotedy qokeey olkaiin ol

ain qotchealy okain shd olkaiin am shckheeedy qoteedy ytdain ar cphedol qoteos cheeo lkedy qokeedy shor otedy chey olshal chedy
okol otain ar olkal qokal cheols chd pchdy lkaiin oryod lkcheeody ychesy am chaiin ykchsaiin chckhedol ctheal olseda y
lchedy chol pcheedy chedy oras qoteol dy lkchaly qokey cheeor otey solkan pchs al ochor dain shal shedy opchol

yeedal olair shor lsheear cthol chckhey dar daiin qokaiin qokeedy ain chedal y oram dar aiiredy otches al oky olkeeaiin olsor
cheey chedy okal dykeor ypches ytal oair otchy olkok otal shedy reod cheey ykiin qokain chedol oed qokeey ksaiin okched
yeedam okg shedy lsais chedy tchoy qol teol qotaiin qoked yshear qotchaiin schor ochaiir qokchedy ykor shiir qotain lfcheds aiin

shol qoeedaiin ol cphol dal okaiin dar ocher olcheesy qokar ltal cheey re keedain pcheedy olches keeam aiiraiin
okchor opchiiin y solar qoar qokaiin or sorair olchaiiin dar chctheol qokeedy chedy dy solksy okdaiin lchair
qokar olchaiiin rdain dar qokar chdy oeedy dar chdy kshee riiin ychok qotal shedy aiin qolchedy daiin shedy orchoiin chol

sheey olcheedaiin qokchey ol ody aiin lsheam shedy aiin qokeedy olal pchm opchedam dar tshaiin otar qolcheody shdar ley oteedy lchaiin
qofcheedal chedy oteey shedy shol chdy qoteedy oloy qokchdy chsy ltedol soror chckhar qokedy qdy qokchey aiin osam qokedy
schair chor al sarain lsal olkedy chdy qockhed qokal chol otey aiin cthedam chdy qokcheol okedy chedy qokeedy lkaiin ol

soled qopchdy dsheed kdain aiin daiin qokaiin chedain qokain tes solkair dy qofchor tcha chaiir aiin dal qokaiin shedy
qokeey shdam shedy ar opcheeedy otedy ydar teeey oiindy aiirol okal oty qokedy aiin qockhdy okdam cheey ol ocheeedy daiin chedy
chiiin reedy okeey cho opchsdy shdaly cheey shey cpheedy otedy dar dykey keeed qokain okshoiin chor chedol leeedy kchary qotedy

okeey chedain qoky qokeedy dar cthed okedy y opchsairy opar ykaim kcheeeody oledol okeeod chedy qokeedy soleos opchdar
dcheeor shedy opchaiir shedy oky qokedy aiin otchey oteeody oledol olkar yteesy oedy qokchdal chey qotees pchaiin darol
yeos ledy chor okes dykeos lky sheol solkdy ypcheeey otedy doreos yeaiin chedy soldal qoty qolkor olyol

qoaiiin otedy qoesy lty rs re keedain chdy saraiin lchr keos lchdal cheey dar
okedy alydar qofcho lchedy yedam chdy okchy daiin chedy ockhes rol sor ypchees chedy otey redair sheey chedy rchaiin qokchy okal qokedy ol
olky shey pain qain otchy qokal ychaim sheedy okchaiin chey qocthear cthear okedy ykd oiiineeol ar qokeey dchaiin chor chedy

qokeey dar qokaiin okain qopeody cpheey lsdaiin oo ypcheedain kcheody chedy aiin yshl otedy ytched orchedol shedy ol
lchey ltody cheeo odyeain air shedy qokear chaiir aiin otar okedal chedy dy dar daaiin dair opcheeedy
chckhey shedy otchdar qokaiin oteedy al qol cheedy chedy lkar cheeey okchedy shey oteed qotdar lkdy olyod solchair orches qokedy cheol

opcheol lkr choiin cheey am lkm cheey ol dleey okan qoked oteey otaiin ar saiin otal lseam ain qokeedy sheey lchedy
lchey qotchain opchor sheey ytl raiin qokal keam shey oleeor otal y qoky lsheedy chedy soleal ar

oseeedy dal chcthedy okchol qoteey lteod schedy olkchy dar dair sheey shedy or dain ochdair taiin or lcheeey aiin qokeedy okaiin chedy
qolkol qokeedy ypcheol daiin lkchsy chedy okal schaly chary ytaiir qokchedy lshedar peear opchor qokey dar sheod dy otedy
shol air daiin qokol fchol shol olkaiin chckhy okeedy ry ar shedy dair sheey lteedy olyedam cheey keedaiin sheedy shedy qokedam sheol odedy

shcthaiin oty olkeedy kaly chey alyedy ykcheeam okain olcheed ochor qokchaly qokal qotaiin lteol qopchdaiin shey qokchy reody aiirg lsal osdy
qoky chckheeor tdal dal lyeol soiindy saiin schedy lkain qoes olcheeo ckhed qokey shey sheol qokeo sheey lchedy
otedy opcheod ain opchr opeedy ol qopoly ol teols chedy daiin qokaiin okshal dar chor ol qokchey okchey aloiin dair qokedy

ykchedy qokeey okain dar shcthaiin cphoiin otedy qokchey shedy tshey dy qoteeedy chedy chey ral reed chey keal rchedy
lkeol qopchdal okcheain ltair opcheeey odyeeor ytan shedy okedy alydar qokeey otedam raiin daiin qoedain keeey qokedy
dam ral dain ar dcheos odeeor chol okchees cheees qoeedy schedy okal keod qokchy otain qodain sheedy soredy

qol scheey shey qokdal qokeey qokshey arees cheol chedy lsedal oteos otedy otchdy lchedy olyey shckhdy lchdy
sheody chs ctheeol shedy olkchey otedy ol qokaiin qokeedy olchar qeey qotaiin sham ol okar redol odaiin sshol dain sorey
lched qokar octheody or okcheeody y ochaim okcheeeody qokedy daiireody y dain otcheody chey lkaiin qokchedy kedy lain kcheeody qotedy sar shey

dshas aiin qopom lsheeor shoiin chedal shckhy qokeedy qotam qokeos opchain ockhair ley daiin okaiin chedy
chor shedy ypcheedain kain opcheos qokal oeor qokeedy chckhdy chedy cheey salar qokeey qoesy am oteey chedy
kal chey olkeedy dsheeody qotedy okchdy shey ypchdy ol daryeey chedy qotaiir shy chedy qotchey ykol sheol qoksheeor chedy shol chd qokaiin dar

qolkedam shedy cphod qotain daiin qokeey oldo shedy otchy olkal olsheos daryeeol qoeeo okaiin qoan lkcheod okal qoeeey qochm air qokeey chedy
otsheor okol qokain ches chey qokchedy oly shey qokchey opdol chees qokaiin y cheeey lchey reedaiin chal qoteey otedy cheey kain
ocheer chckhy otsheody chedy ardam lkched oky rr qotchm cpheor tcheody qokeey ltal daiin ol lkaiir ltedal dar

opchor daiin shor odyedar chdaiin aiin yeer ol otaiin okain rdy qokey ykesy kd qoteody dy qockhod darm ar
sheody ain soleeey qotaly chey shy cheeo otedy olyeel otam okain taiin ctheol qokaiin fcheol otey shey rchdal
dalydy ole keo olkal yteeey qotchol saiin qoky sheedy okcho teeody shedy ockhor tedar dsheedy otchey qokedy chckhey shedy ar

qoky al ykeeey qokchedy oledaiin ytail dsheod olkedy aiin lkod aiiinedam kshees tchor kshas dar lkain shedy okaiin ol
cthdal dain kdain ol chctheol opchedaiin or daro dedy qokaiin qokaiin cheeor qokal ol qokaiin olkeedy shdain or
ychoiin dleey chedy ykches cheol okaiin okes chckhaiir orydy oksheedaiin dar qoror okeedy okeey otedy lteedy lkain qotom ol

saledam lchey rdain qoteees lcheody or qotedy lchedam shcthedy oltor ctheeol shedy qofcher dar aryeedy ol laiin
lkain sheedy sheckhy salam ol daiin cheey odyaiiin y kchar ycheols cthdy y otshaly qoky dsheedy qokeey reees chdy
tsheedal dar otey chedy cheedy chckhy chsdy otedam ctheeody otedy tdy aram or qokar chal aredy olair saly

qokchdy chedy daiin sarol otchy sshdy redar ol chor qoteedy dshdain qokedy odyar shedy lkaiin al lain chcthedar qopor dy or
qokal aiin rchdar qokar qoksheos qockhain tcheeo y aiiinol qorol yshr res qolkor otshaly olkeedy otar shey
qokaiin ol ypchesy alyol qolko opiir ted qokey lchedy shaiir oiineody dchm qotain qokeey qol qolchory sheod oedam opchdal

qoky chdam okedy qokchedy chedy daleor oty qopchor qokey chckhy oedy daiin omaly chedy doleey odyd lkaiin qocheody al okar qol tdain shedy
lkdy lchey qochedy oredy qokal lteeey ltody cham solkedol qokedam qokshdy qokain yaiin sheol aiin
qokedy aiin dy reod qolkedy tcheeody char qokeey ykes raiin aledol olkaiin otcheor sheody qoeedy otar otedy chod lchaiin qokeedy dod

solcheody ckheeod chedy qoteedy cthor qokar ral cheedy reeo chckhal okeeedy chdy qokchey qotedy opchain chol shcthaiin tcheeedy
chais oks qokal rody y osedaiin cheeody cheedaiin shckhy oteody qolchedy saiin tshair chey olkdor lchedy
ctheody aiin lchaiiin qokchedy qokedy sairol qokched otar qokedy shdol y dain opcheol leor saiin okaiis cheol qokeedy y

qoedar y qokeey ochdy shedar qodaiin schaim chey kedy qokal cheey kes fchedain chedy shey daiin qotal oteeal ar
qokchedy odyod aiin shas chcpheedy dar shol lkchals otdar cthesy shy oleeo raiin y qokeedy keeos shey lchdair
shdor al saiin otaiin qokedy qokchey shedy chdy lkair sheody reedy daldy qotshdair tedaiin chaiin solchdaiin fchdain chedy

dar lko aiin ol qotal otey chedy yshor lkor dain qokaiin saleeal shedy chckhey am ol otar ycheeey aiin
odey seeedy chor olshedar oleedy lkain ar qokeedy qotey kedor chckhy tees qokeedy olcheeey am ctheeedy qokeedy al
lcher ar qokol otain dar qoteey qokedam aredy qokar oty raiiin oiinod ol dey tchdal opcheain ltair opchy qokedy chey aiin

qokchair ockheal yedy olsheod okedy shy ar qoteedy koly chedy qokey ytdy otal ldy lkchom lchedy solor qokeedy y
yeer qokedy air otaiin tor qockhaiin shedy schdy lko lyedy sheody qokeedy qotedain ol lcheos tcheey chctheeey ol
olkol qokain olchedair dar or ted qotchy qokchy shedy reeos keeo lteedaiin qoan dchain chey lkaiin qokchedy kedam cheey rs al

keod cheedy ks saleed sheody olkain y lkedy lchor shol lkaiin olshedy dain qokeeedy chdy rshee orr qol
rdol chedol ol qoksheedy okshas qoteedy kaiin ain olkedy chedy saiin ol schy qopcheey ksy dar teeam aiin qokchy dal chdy
oky peedy qokeey chal qokeor qopchaiin olkal yty qokain yte chdy tcheeedy otal qol qolcheedy ckheeo lched

ldal opchedam daiin ody otar okoiin teor lor soleeo aledam cphal dar qotar dar daiin daiireos orchal ol
otaiin pedaiin qoked olkaiin qokain cheol dykdy lko rd shckhaiin olkar chdy dain keel ar lkam chol
chckhy otal olchos lchm alas olks qokchy okeedy sham qoked sheol cheedy aiin qockhain ctheol qopcheos qokchy opchair

chey shy dar lkey saiin chol olkey air ochey areeol or oteey olcheedy shdain reedaiin chan qokaiin cheol
aiirol qokal qoky qokeedy keedar air dyteal orees y qockhdy ardal scheain lkcheeos oteedy kody ar daiin qokaiin aiin
ykcheol kshr chedy sheol or qoky rdy otol paiin dain daleeedy ytchaiin teol daldy qokchy qoar odaiin

eseeol dar qokeey otaiin ry qokain y dyteeor keeody lkchsairy qol olkeedy shaiiin y qotar olsdy chd areos
lkaiin okchedy ar saiin dshe keo olches arol lcho olkar cheoly keey qolkear qokeedy shckhy qokain lkchy chedy
chedy qofchm ral odyd shckhaiin daldair dal odyeedy qoky odyeeey odyaly qopchiir aiin qokar qoal okaiin aiin

dchey oteedy aiin arm okeey aiin opcheedar odyos otaiin teol arain kal ofeey chckhy orees lshs ry ar
daiin chckhy okal qokar okshoiin qokaiin chain kchedy ypchaiin dyked otal qokal cha res air okeedy aiin oraly
dcheey tches chol okcheor sain chckhy lcheeoy dshedal y opcheeody shedy shckhed qokar aleod redaiin ar

tsheer qoedair ol okchod qotar aiin cheey shedy shody opdar ctheeey otchedy am cheedy ar aiireos dal ofchor solaiin
daiin dshdo cheeor lair rshedy chor dar dchdar tol oreeo chody oty qopedam lkaiin otchedy alo chdy
qokal or soleo chdy ted dardy shckhy oleody dain chey am qotchy kcho qoked dshaiin oreeey rar ol

dy lsheeod dar sheol chdy qokal qoks red qokeedy qokchy al lol opchees al lcheeoy chedy daiin reees qoksheol shedy chdy

dchaly qokeedy or oo ytchor
yaly opcham rery qockhdy kdy
shar shey ytos shey okchy al daredy qokey olcheed am cthdair lkain ches shol sheedy aiin sarey sheol doleos
qokol opol schdaly am kshedar cheeey ocheedal raiin reoy oled pchor ar qokedy aiin qokchy olkeeo odair shor ol
ctheeedy sdy al arol qokar ofchdam sheain qolor oltedam ykcheeody aiin cthail dar ykcheol lchol sheol qokchdy ain

chedy dleal cheesy cthed cheedy rd dair olchail qokchedy ol otshdy al otar ykeedar cheees ytsy chdy
cheedy kar chcthol qokar opy shas chal shol raiin ar qoteedy dchdar dam lked tsheeoy qotedy solor opcheeedy
dcheedy qoeed soleos ytr lkcheesy pdy lcher solkeeam opchdar qokaiin am qokeedy sheey roly ykeed cpheedy shedor or

qotaim ddy teody saror qokal qokeey otedy chdy olkal chdy qokar aiin qokeedy al shol ran otedam aiireos
cheedy lshes olkar kdair lkaiin am olyeam lkcheear pchedam chckhy ofeeol shdaly kor shes cthedam qokeedy otey saloly shey
dain cheesy otedy lkchaiiin shckhy qokchedy shedy qokeey shoiin qokaiin shedy sheedar al okeedy qokol qotain shedy otal lsory olkchdy or okchdol reain aiin

dair aiin dy qoky chedy sheol qofcheaiin otedy al qoky qokain qokeedy otshedy qokal qokar ykor dchaiin qoteedy ykchaly qopcholy kdaiiin shal qokedy otsheody
qokar ytas okeear qokal or ledy kchy dar lkaiin oryedy dain ltal qoty opedam qopchedy chor olsheedy dar
qokeey al sareear yteed chary olchal otaiin rar chdy ockham tod kchor opchedair shsaiin olkeor cheey otedy

oddal opcham air oty odyar qokeey kedam otshdy qokol opain cthedar okain opchom aiin oteedy qoteeody ks ar
lchey oryedy qokeedy kody ykdam ol dair cheey reedaiin lsho scheos otar olshor ol lyiiin dshy qokaiin y
qokal shedy doldar tor okchey fcheeody ol al shar aiiredy ol qokal qokeeor ain lkain saledal keeor dar

osheody dain ocheer chedy saiin qoksheor olchaiiin chdaiin chedy ar otaiin pchedy okeedy okcheos lcheer lsholy ks qoy olkaiin aiin
teol cpheols shey chol qockhaly qotedy olyeoy qoed rcheedy shedy ydar cheey sheesy octhedy otal qokey shey qokeey aiin
otar shedy qofchor kchom dar daiin sored qokey ol tshdair ykchar chedy chey reain lkain am chdy qokeey qoky dshy qokdair

soiindy opcheeey chedy okcholy al ledy lchor okal saiin ckhedain cheeody okain dam lkeeedy qoteedy qopchdy soleeedy
dar qotal schaiin aiiino oo lkedal dar otey air qokal dyteody oddy chedy ol oteey sar aiin qokal sored
lcheeoy chedy kchor dair dcheey tal chedy sdy dar shedy okshesy okedy qokchedy raiin okais chckheeor chckhdol shedy lkor

lcheos qotar okos shey qokey ar daledy dleal raiin shes chey opal olcheeeo aiin schy qol
cthaiin shal qokchey ar otaiin odor kchedy otal alsy shey lky qol shol cheesy ykcheody dsham cheol opchy ain
okedy oiinedy chor ol okal qokain kar otedy olchedaiin pees arair saiin chdy aiirdy sain yty lkches qokaiin chol

shckhy al solm olyedy ykchdaiiin shey cheol olkar qokar chg sshod ol otcheeody chedy qokal otchey lteedaiin qokchy odydam shol chdy opchy al
or shckhy shy keeedy sdy soiinedam qotal chcthod okedy al opchor qolchl shedy olkal olchedor aiin orchedol shedy chdy
shey daiin qokal otm qolo qokeedy yteeam keeedy opched olkeedy sain shedy chol daiin tsheos ted ol ypchealy qokain olcheain otaiin ain

chedy saiin chey reedar shedy daiin lkaiin qokedy ro okchiin okain olar okaiin shedaiiin ckheor dy pcheol qokeey okshg ypchm ol
cheey ar ykcheol schoy qoeear aiin lkaiin oryedy qockhod dykedy chor ar okal qol ochdy laiin
dshdo teeol qokam lsar okody sheody qokeedy qoedy leol qotedy opchor dal oty ar qopcheeody chedy qotchey reols schm cheol

okeey ofcheor qokeedy shey qoko olkeey roiin qokchdy dshaiin qokaiin kesy qotchedy qoeeam keeol dcheear shey qokar ol
lcher dar soiinedy daiin olshar qokeey ar okeedy rair otal ochdy chedy ykcheam opor tdol keeam oteedy shoiin shor aiin tshol
solo tsher rok daiin chody qokain chcthair dair chedy chcthed qokeedy ar qokchdy octhey ain oty olshody ol

oky dar qokeedy redain qokedy yshaiin daiin chedy oltor qokeedy dam shey dalain qokal ytaiiin qoteedy al lchey chckhy
dleey chedol olkal resy orydy reees y ledy qokeedy aiin qokal qoteel ol qokeedy ol saiin ytedaiin otaiin al
lcheeoy chedy qotshed kal kcheo dorear shey okal qokeey okain ain dairor yedam qockhedy cthdair tshear

ychaim daeor daro ofchear tcheesy alr sheol aiin chey cheeol daiin qokal pedain dar okaiin okeedy shary qokaiin aiin
daraiin qotal okcheos qokar chdy qopchdy rar okain okesy rody dshes soldy oshol al
opchain aiiineor qotshee dair ain qokedam qokedy ockholy otedy oteedy dcheeor saleeal ytaiiin qotchol ypchdaiiin ol pchom al

okair schoiin lkchdor choly qodaly shes soror sed qofchair sheckhy dar al
dykeor lkain raiin leos qockhey qokeedy qokeey qotedy okain dy chdy saiin ardaiin rdam aiin odey lsoiin oor
chedol qoam saleda ykeol oleedy sheel chedy qopcheeaiin lsa chedair dcheol qokal lshor

lkaiin air oreor oky qoeedy ocheol sheol qokal lteedar ytiir daiin ltedy sheody dshdaiin rs saiin qol daiin cheey al
cheey qokain okd chedy chcthedy cpheo kedair ltdor qotdair cheol qokaiin qotaiin lshoiin sheey lkcheeo orcheeol ol otcheeody y
yeeedy qokar al lkaiin lkaiin oiino al oteey okg olkdar okeey otedam shckhair qokal chey air dy qokey redol sheod cheey y

qoksheos lkr ychaiin qokaiin yshed lkos lshg otod shar okal kear ykchdain ain dsheedy qotedy olyeeedy ytdam cheey aiin
ches lkain otain chey aleeam aiin pchees ykiiin qopey oeor qokal ol qo shsy otedy qokeey sheey cheol
qolkedy tchedaiiin opear qokal cthaiin lchdaiin reeey chckhy chedy olkeedy oteoy lshdaiin pchor ssheeol raiin lkaiir chol tcha y

otedy dal chckhey qokedy pcheedy shedair lsdaly oddaiin okedol fchaiiin kedain redaiin ol chedy ldy qokeey odaly
otar aiin qoteey qokeear redain olkar kedol shdaly qokar olchail qotchear shcthed qokey chedy or qoky ol sheol qokal qol pchedam
dleedain lses lsheedy ol qokaiin taly ycheeey lseod pcheeedy qoteedy odar ypchaiir kedy okal aiin qol qokeedy okaiin keed otaiin qol

shey rdain otedy okeedy qotedy okey aiin cthan ykeeody shedair sain shedy al olkedy chckhy soly qokeedy solkedair olchees y
ofchol tchsdy dar daredy qokeedy chm opchl okair odeeor keeey cho otal lo lteeos reeeo dar qokeedy chedy
solkeeod chedy qokeedy qokshaiin okeedy qokal aleedy chedy lkcheeod chedy teol pchedaiin aiin olkeey qook dy chdy aror

lchedy okey qotoly qokedy qokal chedy lkeey ches qokain ocheody oddal opchy rody qos ar
okaiin cheol dy qokedam ssheor solkr al daiin cheey qoaiir qochear ykchair qokeey qotain sheeo chdor qokchdy kair dal olseol
qokey qokedy okcheeey chsdy lsedol kdal saiin olkaiin qopeody chedair olkain ykchees shey sor ytchor ypchain tol

okeeey rody okeeod chckhy qokeedy qokeey chedy olyom keedy dcho fchdol qotes lchedy rcham or kchady qol
qokchdy dar dain cheos dchear yshed dain daror otal otdair la kg qotedy ain yshal lkcheody opcheeam otedy ain otcheain aiin
ored qofchr ltdaiin cphey okedy alyedy qokched lkeeol shedor raiin ty opary chair soiinair daiin olsed

qokeey qotody olcheeey chey lteear shol shey aiin ocheedal dar ypchody kor qotchy qoteear chdy tchain qokedy dal oddair ysheod aiin
chey lkchdaly lchey otedy cheedaiin odyo dam soleody okeedar dar shsdy dar yteeey qopedy chctheeey shedy qokain soror qokal sheeor lchor
okey dar cphg ar dam daleeedy eseedain chedy otal qo oteedy or okedy al qokal ofchdy olkain lseeody cheedy aiin qokeedy daiin y

dar oiiinee ol cthol ockham tchaiin oteey deal pchaiin okeedy dar qotd sheody ykaiiin tsheody aiin schedor aleedy sar aiin
cheey ykom chedy olkar qoredam keod octheody shoiin chey ol oedam olyd olchealy qokain chckheees cheey ltedol qockhor ykchy ain
ytcheey aiin shol ka kedal lched taiir okchedy keeos qokedy qokey oleedy dytor qokchy dal chdy kes chey chol tchaiir aiin

qotaiin chol cthdo fchal qoeedaiin olsheeedy tsheeey qotchedy kody shey chm oiiineey lsoiin cheey solkeam sheedy shedy qockhor saiin qokaiin al
ofchain tes aiin lchey chdy daiin cheedy odyeeor oain ypchaiin qokaiin chedy qais oteedy shedaiin ol lkom chckhy ockhes ol
chcthdar lkees aleeey alyedy oey daiin otaiin tcheos chckheed dar okar shsd oldal to lchaim ctham aiin

ychor sareody cheey shey ykoiin aireey ar qokal ykchdal orcheor al qokey qoteol okal otchey cheol qofchey sches ol
qokal al olkeey qokchey ytsdy kdaly ykched olkeedy chor chedy cthed okar lkchdam chey qotchedy chedair ychear qokeedy ol
solear sshal or qoteedy chedy shes qotaim shckhy yeedal qotedy ldy chedy ykd aiin oteey qokeeor yteam olchsy chckhy qokal ykcheol

cheeey air aiiindar ol peeam chedy ykchedol qokedy okeey okain oteedy qotaiin olshdol ycheeor saledor lshs or
dleeol chdy olkeey ykeeey ltal cpheear chckhedaiin opes or daiin oeos shes rdaiin sheody lseeo odeal qopchain
qokchey chdy opchal air chor ykeed cheeedy oteedy qokaiin okshal oeol lkcheedy ytdaly odeeor chdy oresy qochm qos cheol

qoteey qotedy cheey dar opchary teos olcheody qokal qokain lod lked dal arol lchey sheol dar lsy fchdaiin chedy
shor solkes kees cheol dy cheedy raiiin chckhoiin qokair otey ol dal ltedy qotsheol okedy shedy dar daiin shol qokedy
okshs cheedy reeor qokedy reedy ctho daiin oteey qokain ar otchey shedy qokchy sheedy qopol

qoksheedy kdor lsaiiin ol opcham qol opchdol lkchaiin ytcheeol chol opchor qokair qokar lkchsy ychain aiiredal qokedy
qoky ain shey oeody olkey okeees qokair opcholy y qokal opd dalo daryeey okan otaiin qotedy chcthain solchal qotedy
otoiin dchaim lcheeedy qokeey aleedy qopey qokeey otaiin chol okey aleod ltear qoked chey shey chd chctheody

lteeody otedy saraiin sheody chedy qokchy olchan okeol lcheedal dshes otedy opcheols lchedy orcheain qokedy
shckheol ychsaiin qokal al olkeedy ykeeedy ytcho lsheeor dshal lkain shedy ykcheody qokal ral cphol qokey shedy
chdol cheeo oro qokaiin chesy aiin ypchedy yo qokedaiin sholy ykedy qokeedy ar qokchy dy raiin

ycheedaiin ockheey kshary okeedy ol aiiindy chor kam dar lkdy chey alyo y qokeedy qoteesy chsd qokedy
olkal chedy ypchor qopcheam raiin shar sheedy yshedy chey rody ykeeedy ypcheeoy rr ltoiin okedy chy qokaiin dar
qoty shdy yty oteol qoreeedy oteey qokeey olchdy daiin okol sheedy cheed odeody shor chedy oteedy okeey shedy qolchdaiin dar shor qotedy

lor chcthees tched yshos raiin cheey qokain okchiin opain olshoiin oltod opchealy otain chedor aiin schy okeed dar otaiin qokaiin chedy
qockhor olted ctheor ar yedam opchar reees olcheod otaiin shedy dar shedy y dain al okaiin or qokedy
cthain ofcheol qokeedy qokaiin shey qoteey qoteeey redain chedy shctho oky als qockhdar teeos lchedy qotaiin otaiin ar

cheey kdaly ksaiin ychary chedy kee qokeey qotaiin ycham yched olkar sheody qokeedy kdain ol otedy
shal okain yshaiis cheeor qokchdy lkchain dain aiin ldar lkain qotedy otaiin pam qotaiin res dareor dcheody daiin qokaiin aiin
dleal ycho olkeeos kr ol areor olkeey qokaiin ar teedy ol qdaiiin olkain teed okeda daiiraiin qokedy

qolkeeedy qokeey yo alal lshes lchedy shcthdain okoly chedy qokal okey rr or qotchdy y cthols qokain shey opcham al
olkeedy kedain shedal dar tchaim lteedy qolm osed otaiin chedy lkdy lkaiin oiinedy sshdy ltedor chedy
olky shdam ar qockhed shs sshear dam pcheos cthod oor ysheos otshm solom koiin sheey aiin

dshedor ykeeody ykeeo oltedy opcheeody chs okair qokal pcheedy ches qokain qofchm sairedam qokey dar
dsheedy ol otedy okal lkaiin ain cthdain aiin ool ypchol aiiinedain oldar saiin shedy qokol qokain cham olcheeor lkdy
chey cheol daiin ared oseeody aiin yeedy dsheeos rdy qokcheoy cheees chey qokchedy sheeo oledol cheedar am qockhol

ofchor shey tshedam sedy osey qokcheoly lchedy qokeedy lcheeol ain odedy yshdol shedy okedy ychor lcheeey qochdy ol otchar shedy

reees cheey okedol kar qokedam qokal pcheody shol y solches kor dain odyaiin dyteey teol qoteedy ytcheor

sheol char peear cphey okeedy oty yteedy otey chedy okeedy aireey shedy opcheeos shey dchdy sheedy ody leor qokchedair lchedy
ctheey okedy olshol oteey cheol otal saldaiin qokol oted ctheol ksheeo sho qools sheedy chdy ockhedar aiin tshor
qoteey keeey aiin lol saiin shol am okal okedy okchedy chedol chdy lchaiir chd otshedy oror qokeedy qokaiin qotedy ockhedol chedy

oliin okain shedy lchedy arair odeol chey shedy shedal tsheo aiirair keees lkee oksheedaiin odyr aiin
cthair okaiin dar oteey qokaiin alol qokal lchey lkchedair ykcheeedy cheey sheedy daiin ol syeal ssheedaiin kaiin qokey keeody qokedy
sheol aleoly ofcheedy chedy soledy daiin qokdal qokeedy ched ofeeol ar okal lkain raiin soledaiin qotedy okchary aiin okchey aiin lchor

ofeal chedy ycheeey orydar cheey shey dcheor dal qokchy lchedy qotal saleod aiin kcher ytaiir qoctheody qokchsaiin opeody lkain shey
sair qoar lkedam qotchy ckho dalaiin qoeeos ol okal qokain otedy orm tair otar aiiinedy opchy ol
otol otain ches ockhed qockhm qokeedy qokeal tsheedal chedy oshor qokeedy seol qoky dar tes ykeees keeeody otedy

otal sheedaiin okaiin taiin qokchdy lshed qokeody areedain otshor ocheedal qoaiiin air daiin qokaiin oleod oded
qokshdal qopey dyked dcheedy ychody chckheeody ychal cpheor otchy otal ychaiin qopchar qoteol cthedy sain shcthedy
ochor aiireeod lteeey aiin aiiinor qotaiin reed chsaiin pdy olkaiin res lsdain dcheedy chedy dair qokeol

roly okshes lchain solam lchedy saiin otal ol shody oted qokal kol shody oteol opchy cheeam ar okar okar chedy

chedy rshdo dar soram oksheeo ycheol otshedy qokal shckhy kedy cthaiir otchedy lshary olkm aiirg olody shcthey

qorain qokeedy yeeoy ykeeedy qoty tedy okchy ltedair ytody dshal olkaiin ar keod chey alydar ordy opchdy olkeeedy kdal

oksheod cheey qoedal yedy otedy olkal otchey ckhdor leos lcheedal ar cthy por yshair solchg shedy reeeo keds raiin or

shol ykeeey alyeeol daiin or schedaiin taly qokchey yked qokeol solkody ol shedy solaiin chor qotdam qotedy

lkchdor ychedol keeaiin kair sairey cthaiir shedy cheedaiin tsheedain otedy reeey y okchedaiin dar ledar qotal am
shdol am qopchair chcphedy qoteedy ochor olkal rs lcheedam cheed am kcheeedy kd rchain qokeedy okeedy or
qokeedain qokaiin sheey keed qockhdy ol qoko daleody chy oteedy odyeol ockhody shes solkey lkan chedy qokar qokshes ain

qokchy ykair shol kedal redol lchedy shaiir reod okal lshan qokshair daledy shckhair qokeedy syeal chedy tcheear qol
aiiinaiin rdaiin chctheody shckhaly okaiin rg olkal olshol dy cheey y am qokeedy qokol okain salor qoteedy qotol sheedy shedy qokey raiin

ofchaiin olkeedy ol cheey ychar aiin
sar chol dal qokeos lpchdy otor
dchair tedy chol chor keees lsal omo chdy otar chaiir lkchal qokal or ykcheor qol qoredy tedaiin ar

dchaiin qokeedy dshed ochm ol lkr peees chdy okeedy sheedy qokchdy kal dar pchom oksho dal yeo otedy

chaiiin ltedain qokedy olyesy raiin y qoty dar qokeedy qoar qokeey ar tsaiin keey chcthedaiin okshol sheody keeedy

ytchor qotal okey oly chdain raiin qokeey chcpheody oteedy sheod cheedy odyo qokal cpheeor ol opcheeeody shedy orchdy fchd aiin

pshedy daiin qokeey odydy lkchaiiin alyedy lkol dam ocheody chedol reol ctham teos yshol aldain chedy

lkeol dchdar qokaiin olaiir lkchody lchedy chckhedaiin qokaiin chckhy opchary odydy solkdain shedar qoky lseedy dar shckhy tsheeoy kaim

okar yteeeo chedy lkain raiin sain ltes pchdy solchs olsha chol daiin shckhy qokeedy shedy lkees aiin lchdam shedy soly y

ockhod lkdy dalyedy odaiin qol qoks sheesy y ofchedy qopchey cheey chckhedol qokchdy qodam odeos

olky chedy olkeedy lcheedam chedy okal sheol chg daiin air dalod qolkeeor lsg olchdo raiin aleeos shedy solol tcham aiin

olkal kedal salsy okeeody qokeedy sho scheeos sheedy res lcheedal qoedal am qockheeor chckhar chedy daiin kchaiin

ykchm ordy qokey dar cheey teol cthair okeey ote lchedy qokeedy doreody olcheeey oryed lkedal chedy odair
lkaiin otchedy okeel chol qokal ltedal chey aiin qotaiin sheey aiin lchedy schdy dy okchy qokchedy keedaiin chedal qodaiiin y ockhedair dar

qokey chedy oeedy olchos qokeey shey ykchaiin qokal qotain chctheed otain teody ol dsheedaiin dykeody qokey chdam okar lkchedol ykchey

shckhy qokchedy dshedain shdy qockheol qokal odydaiin dy reod lcheos opchor qokchdy qokchdy cheod dshedor aiin cthes dar

qokey lshdol yshair lkeed shedy shedol okedy qotedy ram areeedy chckhey kdy chedy qopeeol olkeey shes chckhy lody chckhy
ytchedy qokchy olyaiin qokdal lchedam dam qokain opchod ykched oreey or psheos olyy lsedaiin lchedy

chckhy lsdol lsdaiin ar olcheeos keod aredy kcheeody ar tols opaiin dam olkaiin rey oty solkeeey ain

qofcheedal dar dy ram chedy qokeedy ol dain dy aiin sain odyeesy aredam ykeain dchair okeedy qockhor scheeedy lcheeedy

chedy ofched qokeedy otcheol dair dam oksheol okedy qotdal shol shckhy otd ctheeedy qolkedy sheol lsheeo reeaiin qokeeedy chckhy

dar ofeey ar ykcholy shedy dcheos yshy aiin qokchy ol cthedol aiin oleeos shedy dam lteedy sarey cphdy ol

aiin okchedy dorey shom or otd shar alyedy yshdy ytan lchedy opcheeedy dy qokeey kdaly qol oresy olshed

qokol fchaiin daiin otshor lchor ykcheey kr otchedy chckhy okaiin qotain otaiin otaiin redol qotar ltal lkain solked saiin okal qokain daly

or chey po dain ltar qokaiin teeedy qokeey chg dal y oteedy qokal cheol chctheeey salor qotal okeeey qotcheody ytedor qokedy
lcheedam olod dcheos tam lteols shedy sheedy cheey shedy otol sheedy qoeed olkaiin y otchy aleal olkedy ykeeedy seor tor

arain daiin odaiin lchaim shol areey olsheeos keeod qokain okchedaiin ykedair kedy dady chedy olkchy qopcheol sarm
chey rody chedaiin olshe raiin ol sar chod dain aredam yshd ain cheey dar cthaly olkchey dar oey
qoky dar yshes shiin olkair ykchy fchos otain dchey qoteedy okal aiin qed qoteedy oked okcheeody or okey shedy

chcthol otal ykchdy aldain all qooiin qodar qolchain aiiredy kshedar qoeedy olchedy qofcheedy okeeos chedy
opcheeedy dain aredy ain chey qofcheey ykchy reoly qos lcheeoy qoeesy qockheor lkor qokchedy chckho dleey qokedy dalydy
oeos sareeedy cpheod dar lchor olkeey olcheeody ykedar ychal qokaiin ytedal shedy dykear chckhey ar

olkar cheol oky ar taiiin alydar qokol opey qokeey okaiin odyeedy chg olyor qotchedy shdaiiin ol rchees resy ykedor qokedy
qokshedy tedol ol qotey okeeor shaiiin dar rshedy cheey okdal qokchy ykchaim sheol shedy or tdaly chol
oeody cthedy qokedy qoky lseedy okal qol yshdar dar qokchdy dar daiin lkaiin otchedy chol ykcheo shedy sheear olkeedy salsdy shedy

oro lchaim qokar oko ypchl shaiir ocheor chdy saiin ykedy qopeed lseedy otar shdar opchor opchedar olcheedy otal cheol
shckhdy dain lcheeoy dar qokal leol chedy solam qokeedy lkches qol aireeol lsheeo ardy air olyedar tor qoky okshd dar
dchedy qopched chcpheeod otchor shor cheol yshes chckhd aiin opcheeod chs arey qopody koiin yteedy qotal ol

shckhy aiin kshod aiiined qokeedy qeol okey ol shey reeody ain orcheod dar otchaiin otchy olshor dain chedy
lol daiin soreeor qoeeey qokchedy chedy okal ykchair om yedy shedar ar yshey ksheeo dar te qokeedy chckhy qokeey otaiin air
sham aledair dleey dar yshol dain qokaiin lchedy dar yty ol otal sheody qokeedy ltdaiiin chan okeey qotedy ral chedy

ody qolcheeol okshoiin chey teor qoteey qokaiin shedy ol osedam shckhdal odom raiin otar chdy daiin keam qoar qotaiin aiin
lyedy dardar tsheeoy olain reain ood odyedol ar sarair keedaiin qol olkchey okeedy aiin dal qokaiin chedy
koiin otol ckhedy ctheedaiin qol ockheey lkaiin chedy lteod odar sole keear chol qokey olchiin okain okeeo odor

dchedam shey okar olshsy ain cthedal kaiin sheckhy qodal pchdaiin shedy lkaiin dar cheeeody lchedy oteey lked qolkeedy al daiin qokdar
lkedy olkar doleody qol dal lfchedy oshain sain sod qorear sheol shckhy qochdy okshar oty ol aiirdol olos lkeor
ykcheol lchoiiin okain chol lkain shedy rsheo lkcheeor odar schody shedy ro kchy chedy olkeedy dain al qokchey odyal qokdar

cthaiin ssheedy chdy olseor ol tsheedam dar olkar shedy oed olteedam kor qokar ykesy reod olkchey dar qokeey qokeey raiin
tshor qokar shedy daiin lchdy ytm am lkain shedair ol saiin olkaiin y oky oteedy shey shctheody qolkdy okal al
rshaiin qofcheeey otedy ol qokal ykody kdar ychaiir ral tshedy odam qotl dar okchdar cheed ofchs olar qokeey shedy

char dshsaiin fchdy qokaiin olcho lkaiin reedar qoes qokey dshdam ol chey cheeo pchm schor
kchdar olkeey olteeor kar olkeey chckhy oky ol cheey sheol oleeody chedy scham sheedy ltr chdy tor qotsheedy or sheey dar
lcheedal chckhy leor lkdar arear chey air qokeedy y seol daiin ches aryeey ral qokchey shedy ypchaim

otchey chckhy oedy chckhy shol oteeo pchaiin opchady or om ochedam qokeey ar solas chedy tair pchedy
lchedy ol tg ltdain chckhy okchom ain dalain cthey kcheos dal qoky olchs okey qoeod qokod
choiiin qokain dar solam shedar ol tchedy ol sain chedy ytcheal shealy olkain saleeos qotedy qokair qokaiin ar

qokeey dar dolain dain lshdy olyam chedy daiin lkain ychedar oleedy tsheedam dar ockhdal qokeedy shedy dcheo odyedal ar
qokdaiin olchedol chedal olkeed sheey qol daiin olkeeedy chdar dchor kees taly saiin raiin sheear okchy solkody chedy dain rcheody

lchey qochdar qokal oledal lkedy ysheedaiin solkeedy al soiiney kal oteey y ypchair qofcheedy cheeody qoeod sheeey ol

che lchedy tdair otsho lkeo lkam chckhoiin olsaly ofchdaiin lchedy daiin cheedy dar qotd qokaiin dar okcheeaiin or

dar oair dleey lshedal odeol okedy sheol cheeos qod oteeedy ol shckhy qotaiir reain qokey chal dar

qolkey tchedam koiin qokaiin okeod okeeedy ol cheey ol teeam ain qokar dshal qokedam olkaiin qoal chedy

daiin rd ockho shedor otchm qol qokal air lcheeedy otedy kcheeam chsaiin daiin am ody qokeey y okchey ykar qokaiin qol

lcheeedy qokeey qokedy oteey olky shedy olkeedy odyeeody kiin ckhedy okal ykchedam yteedar lteedy chedy ol lchey tshey shol air

lkain dar orary ytody air kchedy araiin sshm ol qokal qol qokal chiir ytedy saiin dchdar oredam

qokar lseeody raiin otar so lkear qokaiin okain saiin oiinaiin kal ches lsy ped qokchdy aiin tedal or

lchey qochedy kchdar olkal lkeo y shckhy aiin daiin qokedy odyd otedol qotal sheedar shedy soldy dair shckhedam qopchar chdy

sheoly qoky qokeedy char soleos pan lkaiin kdol chedy ockhed ctheey shckhy chedy ofchdaiin okshdaiiin aiin opcheeos ol

aiin dam cheedy dshedaiin qotedy qokey qod aiirdar cheody ltes shedair or qokeedy qokchy or qolkes lto qol

oldy aiin ockhaiin qoty sheol odysy chckheeey qotchol ypchsdy cheeor qokar saldol kan olter ykeo cheey dar

oseeedy opchos ochdal qokal chckhey shdaiiin dar qokeedy tchdair aiiined shedy osedy okchdy shedaiin okaiin chedy kal okedy oteeody dar

olkchey qotd otedy odedam olkol qokain chedy solees redair shedair qokaiin ol okedy am yshees chedy lkeol opchy chol

dar oreeo olchody keod ytal oeeedy sydy ol qokeear lsom qokaim aiiindal qokey ar chdy

ltos olcheod qokaiin reeod chdy cheedy sheol chain soleeod otedy qopchm okaiin aiin sar qotchol daedy cheedy shedy

qockhear qokeedy saiin odyar okedar okain schesy olkeedy aiin dchdy peeam kor qokey ol opchdy qoksheor dsholy raiin

chey aiin ldy dy tsheor chol shedy y qokeo sareo ain qofcher olshaim laiin kchm shckhedy oteey qokaiin shedy

ar ykeeedy sheol otedy lkas am dal cheey ain keeedy qofcheeor chedy cheey ain otedy kcheedain okchor daro am

sain yteeod reody chey qokchedy chedy qokal cpheedy ol odeo qokchaiin qokeedy okeey ycheel olkain lsedal olkeey lkchedair qokaiin ain

areey chcthair qotaiir oryain qokaiin chckheod pchedy rsheor qol sordar okal chdy shckhdy cpheo otcheody

schol dykair okal sham cheed okaiin ytey oshair lkaiin qocthedy arair qokeey ksheody qofcheeol qokeedy shey
olteedal dar yeody aiin olter chedy dykdy old dleal qol shol opdol chedy cthody lkcheedy olkaiin ol qokcheedar aiin olyeeody al
okedy rd qockhm oloiin okedy qoched shedy osor qokeey otaiin qokeedy shedy qopchaiin cpheeam shedy oteey saleedar alam qokain olkeedy raiin

sain ykeeeo olal aiirain ltd chor kor qokal chedor ytdy ctheody aiin okedy sar shy ked qokar am dair sordy

qoky ain olsheeey otchedy dar sheody dar sheol shar tdal okeeedy qokedy shedor otaim cthaiir otchedy chy otam chckhdaiiin qokchey oteedy lkchoiin ardy

daiin chedy ypched qokain ykchaiin oty shedy par lchedy tsheedy dar pched qofchedam qoteey olkedam qotaiiin am opchy shedy

chctheor lcheedal oledor okeeos opary ain shey ykchedor dsheedy saireor qokol otear okeey rcheol yor tedaiin chedy
okal lseed qoky cheod chaiir qokchedy okes ol dytdy poy chedy dair chedy keain daiin ol lor yshaiin
otedy dain sorain oldy opchdal cthees tcheeol ykeeos kail ychor lchey odyoiin okchey solkeedy pchdar

dalo esee chedy otal lcheeoy ar ctheedaiin qoa qotr aiin okar char chedy aiirol dain shal keeedy tchaly
qokal chdy shcthain aiiredaiin chees okain lsain cheey shedy lkchal cheey chedy sham chckhy qockhain osal chedy
chey ltar shedy qoteey okg otod ypcheeo chaiir oksheod chckhey ltedol qokain sain oled dain lchaim qokeedy or

chedy dleal chckhy cthedol or ofchm ol yer chg olkeor otshaim olkal qoas chd opchear
olkedy dar saiin ar lo chaiin qokal kaiin lcheos shol qokedy ytedol areeedy otey y qokchdair
olches or qokeedy saledal qoky air lky lseeey aiin ytcheor ldy oty qopchain qockhedy dam dy chckhy

qokal olchr okchedy shey chedal or aiiino saiin ky ytal qotaiin chedy ol cthail olkain dy okchey ycheeam scheor por olkal aiin
olyor kcher chdy yeeedy daiin qoky keey lkeoly dar qopchdal okcheda or yeeedy sdar chcthr sheol otedy rchees aiin
olyear cthar solkedol chey qochol tair qokchy shar qokedy ol qokeeol ary ral aiin oram qoteedy aiin qoteey odeo aiin qokal aiin

qoky chedy otcheos saiin otedy ar lkaiin ain opchaiiin dar chckhey olkedaiin raiiin oryain oear qokchy shey pcham aiin
dalyedy cpheod ol shedy olym dshdaiin sheedy orair ypchedy leedar chas dar tsdy qoeeody chedy tey
cheol dam sody lcheeoy chedy ypchdor ychedair qokedy olkaiin olcheedy ykcheody lko olchedar qokeedy ar lkeeey qokeedy shey qokam aiin

cthm chdy ctham oteedy ycheeody ckhear sheody otoiin okaiin shedy chey oryey kcheos daiin dchain oteedy solaiin ofchedy qokeedy chckhy
lkor olyeeeody qotedy shcthaiin dam otshaiin qokeody led oky lchedy qokeedy yeedal ar otedy qokeedy lsedar qoky lkcheeor qokaiin qokedy
otol qotain ytal oddair qokol okain qoar sheey shsy olsheedy odeey qokaiin cheor dain dcho lseeey ar qokeedy chedy

qol ctheo keesy cheol chctheeey shey y sar qochedy kchor daiin ypchm ored sheol shoiin osheeedy oteedy rcheor
daiin oldol qokedy shedy yty otaiin aleod qokeeedy qol okeeeody okedair qokal shedy yteeey kor to sole solkeod oaiin
ches chdy orchdaiin yteda otedy ol chor shedy lkain ycheeedy chey kor otal ykesy rdain dchdair tees qokedy

lkaiin ain dedy cheey ycheeo ochedy dal rchear lkaiin qotchedy aldol ltam aredam olkeedy olkeey okeeey aiin daiin cheedy ol
qoreedy lteod odor dar schdy qotchdy lshal rchdar shedy dain okol qokain lshedol shckhy oiinedy cthedair kedy chedy qoteey ofchedy tam al
qoky lchedy yshaiir qokchedy qodaly aleeo peol doledam opchy ol qokeey shedy cheey otedy qokeey chdy oreeey al dam oed

qokeey oty qoeees cha saledal shol raiin aiin dar qokain aiiror or qokaiin pchol okcholy chedy qokeedy chey lchedy qokeedy qokaiin am
darol scheol solchedol lkchdam qokedy lseam otom otain ted kedol qotol oted cthedar taim cheey sheedy ochedy
cpheedy olchady kaiin sairm qokey qokedy aiiraly ar qoky qoteedy dar qofchear lkain chedy dy arol qokar chedy tam ain

olkedy lseedar ltes sheey dar qoteey odear qokal qokal ar qokar qotsy ychedy opchals qokain lchedy qokeey pchaiin qokal olkaiiin lchedy
sain chdy dleey cho schair olkedy ykeeo otaiin shedy qokal cthaim daiin qoedair qokar shey al qofchor tedar oteedy ychaiin
lcheedal qodo olkedal lkchdain okar y lched daiin sheey aiin teeody lshedol qokeey reeal otar aiin daleeol qofchey

lke ar ysheor dal rdy opchees ar okchdar ykcheol oteey otain ytees oleeedy chckhey shey cheol
ody chey okr y ypchaim sheol tsheaiin qoedal cheol kchal solkdy cthd air otar chedaiin ckhedam
oleeey alydy dy odyedair chcthed lkedy ypcheedaiin qotedy otchedy ol qokal ytsairy lsheeeody chedy lo ol

qokaiin ckhedain kedal qokaiin sales schdal lkedaiin otedy shckhy reod schedam shol okaiin qotedy ctheedaiin or yshar qokain ain
olyear qokal chol qordy okeey qokaiin y okal shedar okshdy chcthdy yeer ycheos qokeey ral chcphod oloiin aiin
ar shedy opchaiin okal sheey teo olshaiis ain lky qokeedy chol qoky shedy ain shar okchy qokedy lseeor che qokal otain am

otar dar aiiredaiin okeedy kor chor keeey qosdy ol daredy daiin qokdaiin ltair qokal dalydy qockhaim olkeey cheod am
cheey otedy eseedain ches schedam shedy opcheeey ar kcheeos raiin y qokaiin oteedy chedy qor ypcheol soiinaiin peees qokal cheol shcthedar aiin

shedy okcheeody qokedy qokeey qolkeor otchdair cthaiin otar solkeedy oleos kcheeos saledam shsd daaiin qokar oky ain

saloiin qokchey keees cthair dched qokal leol dar ol ctheedain qokeey sar keeor cheedy dar okal chey cheol aiiinedar air

shor qokain lkchedol qofcheer shedy odydam okedal qoky otedy ysheor yty okeeey qokchedy dshees otedy cheedy qoteesy lchedy qokaiin sheey dar

cho y saiin okoiin odyedor lchedy chedy qokal qoar lchey tdy qokaiin odeey tear ol dair okaiin shedy tsher chedy
dcheeedy okchg aiin oseesy reeo lsheeam opchor dar chor chedal oteey lkches aiin shctho chdy qoleeeody saly ol
daledy olkal lseees shedy qokar lchedy okedy alyedy ody okshar qotched okchey olchy odain chckheedar qotaiiin oryedy

dshe oteedy kody ytaiin chcphedar qopchain lkeeo lkchaiin otal rsho daiin daledy lky okas chckheedy air ykchedy

qoky solkeeo shckhy olshaiin qokaiin qokeedy aledy qokeey qokeey cheal olyedol okain lain qokeey qokedy oteey chey alyeody chdy olkeedy shey

saiin kal shor dsheedy opchedam cheol soiineedy ar doleoy cheeol kchedain chan okoly okain opchar reedaiin dalm

dar lchedam qokar lchedy qoteey pdaiin qokchy dar chedy okey chol dar cheey olal areedy shod dain sheckhy sheedaiin cthor
otey oleedy orcheor aiiredy saiin shedy okam sheed reesy qokshdar qokeedy shckhdal tedy rd y tey
ol qokal sheod al dady olso ytoiin ain opchedar lshdaiin ytedol shckhy otd qotchey chol ykcheedaiin am

chey reed shey shor qoteeeody qotedam ypchdair okeey okedy qotcheody chdy qokeedy ytedaiin odyos qoky ykchdar olyeeos aiin tedy
olkey choiin qotedy tchol olcholy pedy tsheedam char salsdy res sydy cheod y olchoiin y soraiin
aireo shes chey aiin dy qokey chedy daiin ychedy qoteey otedy olchedol ypchor qoteedy y aleeor cheey okeod olkaiin dar ytdain ain qokeedy dar

cthaiin daldair osal alody yched sar reed shey dair chedy oky dsheedy okshas ykeeol chedy

araiin cthody otedy qokchey dshr olshor chol okol fchey saiin qokcheey otal qokaiin olsheedar aiin oshor chey ain

shedy opchy chckhy teedy or qoedaiin dsheeor qopchair qokedy qokal seor ain lchedam okeedy chcphor ar chcthdal otchaiin cphes shedy

soldy oltor otar chedy ofchey tcheeey okeed lked qokeedy shckhair pchm lkaiin lsor qokeedy olshedal chey qotchod air

shedy oksheeody qoteeo lkdy olchedol lkeeol aiin olky otedy chol tshedy qokeedy chckhy lchedy areeedy shol qotaiin al lshy or qopcheeody aiin

okal aiin doredy opchaiir oryear qokchey qol chey oksheees pchey opchy qol dleeol char qokaiin ol tshor sheol qokear

chedy shey ain qoky chckhy oteedy qokchey qokedy ctheos lkor qokchey raiin lkaiin ychaiin okeedy cphedam otar dshd qokaiin otedy
lshas ar qokeedy qol ckham y qokeedy shedy qokaiin ytaiir qotchdar eseeol otedy opcheeey qokedy lkeeey cheain oedy

tsheedal oles qokchdy dar daiin oleody kchals pair dam rchor okchdy chedy dair shckhy aiin olkar dsheeo saloiin pchedy dain oey
shckhy y shol shedy chdy oltr chal daledy olchdor rdaiin olol ared kchy lteeal chol shar qokchy ykeos

sheody qokedy ckhaiiin qokchedy qoeor daiin shedol sheey sheol qol oltaim dam qockhdy cheain sar qotchain lkeor ledam qokey or

shckhy solkeesy opo ocheedal olody keeody olshedain aiin lkees sheol chol kedol qolkeedy otedy seeedy or sor okeedy chedy

tsheeoy chedy dardy lchey dshaiin dedam olshedal okdol shey qokeey chedar olcheedy schaiin daiin cheey aiin
raiin redaiin keam qol qopor saredy chor chdam cheos cphd dar dalyaiin qokal reedy chedy

oeor qokol oteody ykchaiin cphdy olkeeo aiin otey qopchaiin riir aiirear olcheedaiin pcheedy ltl chckhoiin chor y

chedy raiin oksheedain dareor dchol yshdy dain qokaiin chedy qokchedol dar qokary reo laiin dal air
chedy dchear tcheol ckhy lkchs otedy araiin ody shes sheedy qotedy lcheeedy aiirr lkcheedy cheedy chedy
cheedy ky opor qotedy qol ledam qopcho sheeeody ykeeedy orcheey or qokeedy otshaiin qotes oror qockheear sheees aiin

aiiinaiin qolo sheees lchey aiin olkeedy chcthedy pcheey lkey daiin okaiin keol cthedaiin qokeedy chedy qofchedam tcheeody ar
odeody qopched ty ykaiis okdam lkedam scheedain qotedy lko lcheedal chedy rcheeol qokeey qotain am dal ar
chey aiin dal ofeeol qol okchom shedy cheey cheod ardy olkol opedy lky air ol okar lteedy qotaiin salody al qokeedy olkedy ar

dy roiin olkchey sheedy qokal olchees lchedy daiin qokaiin chedy ockhaiin qokeey shd oddal ychd qokaiin dsheod lfchdy y dal dar
otshedy cthaiin qokchy sheedy dytes qotedy chckheeody keeey okeedy qoteeo qotaiin rdal kcheda ycheedar or chey olteeedy oteedy chctheody
sairor qokey chsdy res chckhy lsedain okeod lss shcthm or qoky ysheos oshedy soledal shedy y kchedy

qoty dshs al yshdy lkaiin aiin qokar shey opchaiir shey shm qokaiin sheedy okaiin qokm okol qokain qody aiiinaim tar shedy
qofcher dsheeod ltedal lkedam dal qokchey or qokeedy okal aiin lkaiin lteeor soiineeedy cthg lchedy tedy qol ody air
lsdaly shdain qokedy olchaiiin lseeor kom ol qokaiin cheed aiin daiin lchor dy lchey reedy shol qotedy

okedy oryey ykchey qokeey soley olkeedy chedy chor chedy cthdor al dy daror chedy cthol chcthedal qos leody am

tshaiin okchees aiin qokor okor feor qokedy

lkain chol eseal chedal araiin oky cheol ty okedam okcholy ches qotchey keeedy yshey chedy okar lsy ots ain

opeod okey lchedy shckhy lcher raiin lkchl shey shoiin okedy aiin qoky chedy otchaly dain pchdy ochor olky dar qokchedam
ssheedy saldol qol dal olkedy lteols qokain shdy yteeeo aiin saled daiin kody qoeeod ysheol qockhdar

kchor dy raiin qokeey qoky qoeedy ytees chedy okar sho shor chdol qoeedy qokal rail shey ches ain
qotedy qockhedy okchy dal aiin oky chs qokar dshal chdy teeeo shey olchedair ytedol sheey yshaiin oteedy ykedor or

dar areeol lcheedal dar qokeey chedy lchaim qokeey pcheody chol opcheody lair dao dykaly
qoty or oteedy areor qotaiin qotedy oaiin shckhy ry chedy kshy shedy okedy qochey chcthor opcheedar oksheedy pcheody
sed qoty al qokedy okedy qochedy soiino otshedy lkaiin qokchedy kor daiin am opchody otedy oky chckhdaiin ardy olkey chdy

ody okeey kshey qoty cheeor shes sheey taly otey qokedy ytedar chs qol ykchy sheol ykais ain qokeedy qokaiin otedy
qokey chdam taiin ykair qoty olshaiin shar orcheody lsd y daiin qokol otain qotedar okeear qoky ol qoteey olkeey olcheedy chedy
olky ykeey ypcho dar dykedy qokal chckhy okchy dal am lchedam daiin qokey shey dar kcheeey oryey olkaiin ycheeod aiin yshary shey

okey fchor ykchedal keeey aiin qokeey ykr reesy sheeody al otey olar shedy dchee y rchey
lchdy al yeaiin cheed qokedy shor olkaim ykchey chedy dchod qokain daiin solkeod cheedy kody lsal odal oteedy chedy

daryeey shedy dy chey otedy osheal ain toiiin otain chedy odedy qokal okeedaiin ol dair am oredy okchy air sheey chedy
chdy qokal opchedam yesy shy qotear qokeedy ool ypchaiin otal qokedy qokey yka chckhedar lsdaly otain cheey chedy
yeaiin chal pchor qokeedy opchor chol okal qotedy air oltaiiin alyo shsdy ar chdy cheedy shedy qotchey kaiin qokar lol tedam okaiin dar

qopchaiin okaiin qokaiin aiin chey shy chedy daiin qokaiin chedy qoteey lshs qotal che lseeor odyedol chedy tshdaiin oteeody chedy

aryedy qokeey odedy leedar shey lsaiis chol oseeedy oo lkchedy cthor qokeedy sheody cheol yshedy daiin okaiin qokedy

shal am qopam chais ykaiin olyg chedy dal cheedy aiin shedol chckheedy ychedor sheeal qol cthsdy chdy solcho or

chey shdaiin aiin osdol shedy shcthor olydy aiin yedam kchedam tsheeey orym cheey koy taiin shar otedy cheol

dar chor dar qokal qokal shedy ol sain chedy cthair opchg rar ydy or daledy otal lchedy qotchy chedy dal pcho

lkaiin qokchedy chedy schaiin olkain qokeedy or ar aram chs opchair qotchey ol chey dar okey lseod qokaiin yshear olkar chdy okeedy chedy

dar sheedaiin qokaiin sheol kedain aiin qokal qokod cheam olaiiin dar okal shedy otchdy ched qokaiin raiin

aiin pcheey yeedal ral y oteedy kedal ocho dshal chcfho ol chaiin yshedaiin chedy

okas keey dareeedy aiiror qokeedy oked kchaiiin aiin tched lsar solaiin olshedain shedy qotchey lchedy opcheain aiin
olteaiin char keedar qokedy oshedy yedy sheol dalain scheol qokal reedy aiin lkesy shy kedy olkeedy chol
qokeey ykeeey oiineor ream opdy solol okeey sheey am rcheeor shesy ry ol dam pchor qokeey dar okchd air

okedy y lkod olcheod lkain olcheeal qokar rdy opchiiin shedy dam rdal qokal shes sheedy sain chedy oteedy qol
qoky shdaiin qokal aloiin olkedy aiin lchdair qokeey chedy ocheedal oledol pchaiin tshey qopchain ar octhedy ypchdaly aiin
oreor shckhy lteeal dar okeedy lsdaly dchair qokeedy scheol qokeedy chey res yteeody okshsy chedy ysheol

qokey oleees olshedain otar aiin shes sheody ykedy chor pal daiin reeed otedy otal chedy lkaiin ol qokeey pchain cthes air
oteey dar ary chedy saror ockhy lchedy shckhy ar taiir oiineody ol qotaiin lkcheeody shes pchain olkar otain qokeedy or
lkain keel dar lkedam shedy osom y toiin odyeeody qokain opchl okeedaiin qotshdy qokain lod chey ches ykchor

dleeol chedy solary ain qoky sheed qoteey alody okar al lchdair sain dshy chedy qokeedy teol cheedy olkain olkeedy qol

cheey shey qoteedy ain shckhy rody cheeey okshedair olkod lcheedal oledar otedy lsal cphain ololy qotedy chey lchedy

dair ro qokal oleols qokchy keol okey olchdor y fchd cpho aiin tal aiin qoky dar tdol saleedaiin ar qokees aiin
lkain shey schaiin daiin chey qokedy olchedair odyy qokaiin lkcheeey odydain qoeol otar y tches oksheed rcheedy raiin kchar chedy
lkdair ypcho ar otchaiin qockhaiin aiiineos char chckhd oteeedy olchair scheeey qokain dair kshor shol qokshain pcham aiin

qokshedy tcheeod ycheeol qotshdy shedaiin ches otedy rr lcheedal shey lcho soledam oredar ykal kshol
ofeey chckhy otal qokal qol ypchey pchy otain teol cheeo yor cthor qokeedy aiin lkaiin qofcho shedy ykchsd qokedy oteey y
aiiinaiin lkedam ykchor qokain oseoly sheedy aiirom air osheey otol otear cthaiir qokchedy dar tsheor okey koiin qokeey dar

qokol otain lsal otshedam schear qokchy qokchy olody shcthdair keesy chor ycheeo qokedy ytam lteeor kar aiin
lchedy ytchan chedy oteedy octheol qokeey tshdy chdy okaiin aiin chor olcheeey lkchy chckheain aredam or sed olyy dar
otol otdar chcthary ykeeey otchedy chody sho sairaiin sedy okcheeedy okchdo saleol otsheody okey kan ain

cthair qokchdy air lchaiir alody shey qotchdy lsar ydy lkcham okain ody redaiin tain okar ol daiin rchedy
olkchy ytes oleos qokam odydaiiin pedol qokal keom oteedy rey okedy qokchedy otedy cthor lkeeey oteedy qokedy lkar lchedy
dleal dar saiin okchy ykor toiin lkcheeod keeol opchdair aiirsy raiin ypchedy qokchy sydar sain dor shsdy ald arain

olkar dar kchy tedy ocheedal ar ypcheo dy redal dcho yshy ltiin otain chedy ytchy al qolo okeey lkdar
schair cthy oteedy aiin ofchdy ol dain solchedy cheol qokeey salaiir oiinain ood sheody key pchair sairedy
keos qokey chckhy dam aiirdy sain choiin shckhy oksheed keeey odydain ycheeedy lor qoteedy shedy lkeed ar

ar chey olcholy cheey keeey ain otar chail aiin teeod reedar air yshy al chey yta chedy

ychal olkchey lshdaiin dair aiin
shckhy qol dair olkaiin aiin qokey shedy
shes soredam qokeedy dair olchdaiin oedy okal ol qokar old okaiin dar lcheer chedy qokeey shey chey qotchedy shedy sheedy shol chedy
ody dal lseod oteeedy olshaiin cthaiin qokshod chedy sheey yteeos qotdol pedy lchor qotchy osaiin pcheor
shckhy oiiney cheedy kedaiin tain lky qoteda kaiin sheey olkain arees air qokar salaiiin ral shckheedain oteey chckhy

dain aiin qokey ychy lkcheear sain okeod qokaiin qokedy chedy kchdair qokey ky al teeal oleod odaiin qokod
olkar shedy qokey chedy solcheols kdair saloiin odeos olkeedy olyedam chey ain ledy shckhy otchedy keos ldy qeeedy qokey cheol
cheeey qokchedy ykor qokar qotedor redair qotchy ol ar chey okshdain okeeey oiinain otedy reols oted qokm

shedy lteed lkchal odyair otal pchedy oteedy lfcheeedy shckhy dsheedy lcheedal olshor darain qokal ol qoky shedy ltaiis qol
chedy qokam dar qokeedy olyaly qokar or qokchaiin daredy ary shiiin qokeedy okeeody cheedy chckhol solchs chsd dar
sheol dshg redol olchey okol sheedy lses qokedy qokaiin ol shcthed keees reod otal dshal reeeo chdy

ssheedy qol okcheeody qotedy daiin qog oteedy ros oraiin shr aireeol ol okaiin salal ared okeain chsdy dar
