dcheal soredy saiin qol otaiin chedy teeor ol yeaiin chols ckhdar ory al qokeedy shey okedy dshsy dar

okedy okdaiin qokchdy dar tor qokchey kedy okeedy chol chey yshee otshdar saiin dshey dalo qokey dar qopchos ol
chey y okchedaiin tedy otchy am ypchey lcheol dair otedy olyaiin dear dal sorey qokal sham oteedy ol
lkeeedy sardaiin or ypchdal qokchy chal ardar sar olkchedy qoiin olkeody dykeor dar lkor qdain cheeor qokeey ol

ctheor aiin qofchaiiin orydy qokchedy ol shor chdaiin okar ychg ctheody sched octhed tchl ol okain dam qokaiin lsain olchom qopchair
chckhy ypchedor chal qokaiin otchain qokal qol tg lkchedy opal okchy alydy lsy dsheedaiin chdain chdy dy shedy
qokchy olkeedy chdy qotshdo ykaiin qokal keed dchdy ty shedy okeeody raiin lkaiiin y kair oleeeody qotedal shody sheedy aly ysheol

fchs ctheol sheol ockhdy qotchey shedol ol oty keos sshg kaiin okedy aiin ley tshed osod
ool scheo olyeeody dar qotal ol sheey olshiiin ytal osor ol saiin chdy qokal qotaiin okeedy al qokeey sar otchedy oleeor qokar aiin
olkey al scheols air daiin oteey qoteed qoky olar shol ain otedy leor soledy qokeedy kedar qopor qokchey chdy dain otedy

okol oped dy cheey air lchdy qokeey lchor oteedy shol qoeeey lchedy yshl okdam al sales ssheedy or okchedor qodaiin seeedy

chedy qokal cheey qokain lkaiin ol aiiinod al otshm solary chedy qoteey oles ar okeey opedy lke ol daiin dy dar
qoty qokeedy ar ordar ykched sorol ts olchedy sar aiin okche qokedy chedy okchdar ykchedy qolkeey qokchy daiin or
otal chol orchdy qokaiin pcheos cheey lchedy dal sheey tchaim chckhedol dar qokchdy qokeedy chdy sain solkar chedy tshaiin aiiral dar

dshar keedy ol tshiin pol soraiin qoky lkchdy chey qokchedy lchedy saiin dched oteey odor shctheos qokeedy lkain dar
lcheeoy chedy oteey y ypcheos ol darm olkey lteedy qol yshdaly aiin ykeod sheey lshal lkain oledy qoty okain otchy kchaiin

otshedy schor oedy sain aiin kchm lkcheeey chedy qopeoy dar qopchor lcheedal ar dy sheey qokeedy y daiin chdy

lkdair soiineedy lsedair odys dykdal opcheody rchair chey qokchedy oledar ytdam qolkain qokeedy solor okcheol

chedy qokal ykchedy okchy qotedy aleeey chedy sheees ofchol qopchy ar tcheedy lsom pam okaiin chiin qokain aloiin rchain

qofcheedal chedol otal cheol lchdy dalydy cheey chas chdy shol lkdal otchar ycheeos olchsdy ytal arain

ain okaiin olkaiir qochedy lkol dchey toiiin ckhey oteey soreos olyiiin lchedy okeedy daiin ram taiin otaiin rchaim
olkar koly shedy solan dar qopeody chey reod reed chey qotedy lm oteey chedy oteey shdy
otaiin qotain qotchey aiin qokeey otaiin shedy ofcheear qokedy sain ol ocheedal raiin al cheey qokedy qoteey rsheol qokaiin soreos lyaiin qokedaiin ain

lsheody al shes otain ycheedaiin olchoiin qokchy redal qofchdy yteeey qocthain areedain qoctheol shedy
olkchey air qokeedy shol chedy pchdy pchm taiin lyeey ain tcheeody oleesy ytody qotedy lsody chedy dain arain

qotar sha ykody aiiinm yeedal shey otaiin qokain chcthain ocher chedy osar keeeody redair chd arey
qokchedam lcheeedy shol chedy qain solos ain cheaiin ol otedy kshdy shckhaiin okaiin okaiin ol ofchain dal or

ykcheody okedy shedy aram qol chckhey keod cheedy chedy qokal cheol tshdy qokedaiin ol olky olchdaiin qokaiin otedy oddal

okiin sheedy lchedy ypcheesy ked lol chor ltais al saiin oteod cphdal odain dair ochdy y kchedy

dchor kaiin qoky oty tdar qokeey okeey rr rd dykeor old olteedal chedy shody otain qoeed otaiin lsaiiin ol qokchy otchy salaiin

ol scham chedy odedy teeor shes qokain dy cphedam qokear otar chcpheeedy okal ar qotshdaiin ltal qokeor

cthain rchs chedy shal shedor saleesy ykchain olteaiin qol osal y qotesy qokain y tdy ol okedy okedy chedy qokeey shedy

daldy dody shey y qokey chos aiin opchor chdo olchail alyeor lkchedair ychesy ral y qoteey yaiin
lcher dar orcheedy cheol dain dalod oteey kor aiiineody oteey pcheedy otedy daiin cphol ody okeey lssd dar qopchey

qordy sheedy kchdair aiiry ykeeody olsheeey am okedar ykeey opcheeedy dy ardy tdy solais lkchal cheey ain

cthdy cheey shedy qokeedy otedy okaiin otaiin olshaim chey olteaiin otedy qokeos okeedy qoteey dar olchedol otal lkchdaiin cheol qokedy daiin octhod chaiir qokchedy shedy

ytcho soreedy shedar sheed kshaly qokar shcthor qoky chedy qopeed aiin omeds yteedar qokedy soly qokain sheol or

lcheeedy qokeey ycheed lchear opchdol lshedain ldair kchedy olkal ytealy oteol okeedy qokair qokal qol lkaiin ochaly

dleeol keeeo otedy cheey ykg ar dy rchear chcpho qokain tsheeoy qol schedaiin qoteedy aiin sarey qokaiin qokeedy aiin oky qokshaiin

chedy shey aiin lses otm lkod qokey lchedy cphoiin lkchal al oseeor kdain olchal cpheeedy

chckhy shedy lkchaiin okal qokain qoteeey aiin dal qoky shey ytal shar chedy yshedy ar lchor aiires ckhedaiin odor
sole kdam ky aiin sain sheesy ol cheedy qoy olkaiin lty shedy qokeedy ychdain chdy daiin qotedy

chdy okal cthaim qokeedy oo qokeey soredy chcthol sheedaiin qotal chsaiin dy aiin sheedar olkchdy ain otal chody chckhal shey

cthor okedy redair qokal lkcheeod reody qofchor opches chckhy ocths lsaiiin okedy qokedy chdy ldy sar shedy olyar dar

shody pain qotsairy ped schody aiin daiin oedam ofchedy tar oksheain ol reeor solchor cpheedaiin keeedy lkdal

eseeol chdy dy qokeor lkdy qokaiin qoeeam dam aiin daiin aiin qokeedy qokal yteed qokain solcheear or opcheedy chsaiin qokedy

dar qokedy am aiiindal ar soly qoteedy aiin aiiinedam otal okaiin rar sheeor ar ykeeeo ol cpheeedy

sheody qoeedy lkchaiiin ain sain dchdam dar dain dalol qoteedy qoky qokain aiin ykesy qotchain sheey ckhy okaiin cheol otar aiin oteedy qokaly

lkaiin qocthdar chckhey lchedy qokal rsheal qokaiin otain tcheos qokchey kaiin chey alydy oteed olches or qoky ain oteedy qokdal

ol qokal ypcheos okeedy lchdair ledy qolod ldy olcheeey ain ctheeod shaiiin okshody dchee opchy aiin
lkain shedy chcthar olshor teeody qokedy qokeedy qoam chedy cheey olkain osals qokain dsheol daryeo chedy ctheeey chol cheey opees aiin
lkaiin qokchedy okedair lkeey aiin kchaiin odeos qor y qockheor sardy ol daiin chey y olkeedy shckhy al aiirok shey sheedy daiin odor

chedy qokeey kiiin qokain ycheeos shey ytal chcfheor ol qokal ol qokeedy otedy kshedar air oteey okaiin cheol aiiineey otaiin aiin
qotshaly odedy kar ol dchedy qokeedy chey qocthol ctheam dsheody dchain oteedy lkaiin otchedy ole okoiin kshdal qokey ol
qokchy qotdal aiiredy qokal dar oteedy tchor qokeedy shckhy oryedy leol otey chedy olkaiin char y ypcheal soror

dar cphm shedair sain or chedy chctham okeedy aiin shcthm reedar ycheedy ycheeey oiinod chckhody shsy or
sheody chedy teeey qotcheody qoty qopedy cphaiin shedy olkal lteed dchdy tedaiin air sheody qoteeol olchedor cheol lchaiiin kor
shckhy qocthear otar qokedy om lchol qoteey chcthedy lcheeoy qokedy lcheeedy olyes opo ytchedaiin shedor ol

cheedy kar oteey qoeeal ykealy oteody tshaim kcheoly qoteeol ood aiiindy ockhes dar ssho ol chey chey ychedam
qotol sheedy ol cheey okd qokaiin ysheeedy okeesy qokeey lsheeey roiin oor okchey chedy cheey dar sheol shey chey ain
ar schail lsdaiin ody kchaiin qokal qool daley schod ol qokal qoks shedy shcthm qokaiin shaiir tsheor y

kal dalm chcthdal lkesy odyar oledy saleos ykoiin qokey chedy tchedair shd sheey ykeeey aiin
dcheos olam qol saror schedal kdy sheody ytar lkeody ysheody chcphdar dal lkaly opcheeody aiin
alols qokain okeedaiin dcheol oteedy cthaiin qopchail qochedy qokar shey qoky cheol tchain or daiin okody shedy lcheos

dar olkal cthdy lkdy lor oran dshedy olky odyod lkaiin ain ksho or dain chor ol dain cheey aiin
sain shedy cheey salar oredy oty qoeeor yeaiin qoos ar okaiin qokain lkdy qokeey laiin okeedy qokeedy shedy otaiin y
qoo aiin okal olshar ltoly shedy soliiin okaiiin salaiin cthar oteos cheey ychody olchal cheedy aiin

qotal alody okeees odain pcheey ol lchor kcheed chs sareor shody fchdar ykchaiir qotcheo saireor pchor
otchedy olchdy ochor opcham tchdal sheey dar lo lchor qed daiin dalaim dleey okedol qoteey lseeam okchy shedy aiin
chedy lkchdaiin chckhaiin otaiin odedy olyeeeody qotealy olkeody qooly qopchdy daiireds res oeor odor

eseedain chckhal dardair okeey ol qopchaiin keeody otedy daiin chckhal oteeedy shedy sheedaiin cheey al cthaiiin chdaiin shg orcheody aiin
cheedy qotiin okain chedy qokal cthaiin qotedy qokal chey pdy okchdy dshes okal raiiin lcheedal qotedy okshedaiin opom pcheos qokey chedy lkain chckhy
oeol saiin qody lkair qolkeedy ol keeos ychy qokain qol sareody rchaly sales shor qokedy ol orcheeam shedy aiin

shedar qolkdaiin char olkeey ain qokar odyeeo orain ytedain cheol dam qokeey shedy dy qokedy shol areedy ol raiin okal oty shedy cheeody dar
qokal ol shol okedy otedy olcheedar sain rdy schody qokain qokeedy air okiir salody sor qokedy opchedor lsheeor cthor sear daiirady ain
sheody ols otoiin olkeey chal qotaiin shedy dar qokeedy shckhy okchedy yteal olyeol qokey shedol qokal dar shal ykedy qolol

yer dar dy lyeody olyedol yteed otain dairaiin chey chaiin ytcheoly otedy ytr dsheedy lkeey aiin ypchdar oteeedy omor

otedy dal qokchey oleedy okcheeedy
tshaiin daiin sheey redo raiin
salal qokeey opdaly qoar otaiin tol lo pchaiin daleal opchdal cthy ol okeedy shedy qolkaiin
chey otchedy chedy shckhaiin ochedy dalyaiin dam solchdam olcheain qoky otedy chedy olkaiin qopchey yshor arary chedy ycheain sar oldaiin lkaiin oiinod aiin
dalyey dy qotdain olkar aiin qokeey lkche taiin qoky olsheey lchdaiin ota chedy ykchedy lkees raiin qolkaiin

chedy aireal kedor shedy sheody dshdam scheeedy teedy qokedy doreody okal chedy qokeey aiin sheody dar qopcheeey qokchedy otedy al
daley qokal oky sheedy olkeeedy olseos chey oiinain ypcheeod olkeedy rdo lteod odair olchl shedy qokeey qokeey y qokchy otedy sheey qotaiin qol
shckhy kdaiin ol lchaiiin okshar rchaiin okar olkar okshdy daiin cheedy kedy qoks odyed oeal opcheeey ltedar qos tsher qokedy air

lkain ckheod cpheear ol aiireeody aledor okes ypchaim odysy otedy lkchedor keeody qokedy pal or soleeey qopcheor qokaiin araiin
lchey alyol oeody ochedy ytaly dy shedal pchair shol qokedy lteoly or dcheol otchy sheedy aleear chor aiin
scheeedy shody paiin saiin qokeeor ol lkeed lshiiin rees olsheod olkedy oleedaiin cheol qotey shedy yteeos oteedy otedy rchy ol

ykchor olyor qokeey odeeor aiin lkaiiin cheod dalol qokeedy okedy lkchal soiineor dshal ar dshar soldar otchees or qokeedy odair
chcthdy lkaiin qokchedy chos chckheey lko pal oty y chey solkeody daiin oky tdy okar ytod otal oredy daiin oreos
lsedol okaiin qokeedy kar odor shckheody lsy air lchedy qoky solkm dam ltod lydy ytdaiin yksaiin sheedy ol qokeedy lkain y

lcheos solm okal otar chdy qoeed pcheedy ltol shedy ain ales lcheey okchaiiin odyeedar qolkedy daiin qokeey air
cheey ychar solo okal qokain yky qopchor shor alail qokchedy dar cthedaiin okeedar dchdair kchdair dal olky ol qokeey shol shey
qoredy qokeedy qoleey aror lchedy oain ykches qotsy qodol shedy okedy qotchair chey qotdair oty chedy dal ytchor

shckhod qokchy saiin shedy otaim okal sm odydol chd qokdaiin ain daraiin qofcheeedy okaiin chedy ytchedaiin shedy chcthdal qokeey qokeey otedy
ochor otar olshd lchdy odyedar lkcheor cheol olkedy raiin teed aiin kchedaiin qokeedy okeeey qos tsheedal qotedy chedy pchy shedy
oeody solcheedy chdy daredam kd olkchy qokeedy chckhdol reeey aiin sey daryeey lsheeey qotchain olkal ol qoteey soleody

odeedain arees saleed ral chcphdy ar dain chor shedy qokeey oky keedy qoko okar chckhes ol dardar qokaiin qokaiin shey
shcthaiin dchedy qopaiir okchedy oke aiin qokedy qotaiin shedy dorair solees otedy ofcheey qokeedy qokal chdy qokey ychar soraly
otedy dair olkaiin dar daiin oeor ocheeedy qokar dar chedar qodaiin okedy qotchain oteey oksheod lchey reeo olkaiin oteedy okam qoko

chckhey aiin cpheain dar shcthaly qokcheor qokeeedy ykaiin tsheedal odyeeody ykor otedy kcheeey salain otal ain olcheeey qokol sheedy qotedy lky ol
kal shar olsheey qokeedy kaiin ar ypcheam shedy dain chedy qoeeeody lteols dal dar qokchey qokedy daiin lchedam odaiin okal lchedy
odyr ltal shal reedy soaiin reeey oksheees olkchey okeedy aiin cheey ar ol schy tcheo qotr am opchees tm chcthy ol

qaiin dchol qopchr alyedy otchey qoteedy lta dar ar daledy qokal opeos okar ofcheedy ain chcpheedy kor olkar ol ypchain
chcpheody qokain soleeod shey chdy ochey olcheeody shey ltol oky dshdam rar qokaly kcheeody qotedy qokeey y qokees aiin
cthdy lys y cheedy aiin schey kchy raiin qoedar ykeey oedam qokal aiin sheol okal qoteol lkar chdy schey

olkedy qoteeeo kedam ykchedy dal otaiin ykeody qokal qoksheedy shedy qotar oksheeey chedy taiir qotcheor rdar rcheeol sheey oddair
aiiinair sheody chedy oteedy lcheedal chos raiin shckhaiin lyeos qoteedy olsaiin shedaiin tey qorey qokeedy qokeey aiin dal dar
kal soreedy okeols shedy tor olyod lchedy cheey kos qoko dal aredam qoaiiin y lkam qokeedy fchedaiin qotaiin aiin

ol oeor lted okeey lchedy olches ofcheeor lkchar oreor ledam ordy dcheos aiiredy
otchey chol teel al qokeedy sheeey ol saireody lchedam shedy opcheesy oksheeor rey olshal saiin odydaiin lchor soledy
chey y okar chckhy qotain ody otched qotedy chey lteod chol qolkedy qokeedy oddal qokeedy qol solchdy al daiin chedy

ddair yshy lchedy oty oleeor otchey aiin teeaiin chdy dar rshey qokeedy ckhy cheeody solkok okal olshor oteey dar
dain chedy qokal qoky olkeedy al lkan shedy leos qokeey saloly chol dain daiin air oleain dar ykchar qokain al ol otey qos dar
teey shedy daiin okeody okcheeey lshoiin sairo chedy otaiin aiin ykcheedaiin dshy odain cheey chdy daiin aiiror lkedy

ltal chckhey dshor ldy okedy olsholy chdar okedy qotedy lsar lcheey dain ocheedal ar qotar or qokal otchey shey ar sheol dar
cpheeol ol ytchom qol qokaiin aiin ysheor qoe okeedy dar oedam dair pcheey pchom ky ain tchody okeees qokair
okal oksheols otedy sheol lkcheees qolks kody redar chdam oo qokey oleedy qoteey char shckhy qotchm qoeedy chedy

dcheeol y pchain ltody ain ytaiis lsheeor chedy kal oteey dar aiiineol aiiredor ykeos cthedy daiin araiin
cheod qoeed opor shey doley opcheody chedy chcphedy olkeedy lkchoiin chckhy cthar chaiiin lteod oedam
shar shedy tor daiin chey rd shor shey lchedy opchaiiin qochdar soled oseds chckheeod qokeedy redal yke dar dal pchaiin

qokol qokain olcheedaiin oteod qokol sheedy lshedar okeedy salsdy or qoteey chedy chckhey oleesy shor redal qokaiin sheol odyody ain opchdol al
qolcheody olkeey okedy shady omed dsheel aiin daiin lkain qoeedaiin chdy soleo aldaiiin or lcheey schy lseeody dar
chedy ofchdy olcheod qokchy chedy ockhair otshor otey okeeo lkear qokeedy cheedy cheols qotedy odyaiir aiin dy chor am

qoreo ltar oteey keam shdaiin otchey reedy qokeeedy sheain lshedair sholy dsho okaiin ol chor chedy
tsheeedy qokal chey lkchdam opchey dyteol daiin cheey aiin okeoy qoar olkaiin chedy sain qo or opcheeeody ain oiiineeol chedy okal otal ol
ar chcthedar otchear ssho chckhd cheey lkcheain ol pcheey yshed lshar otdal dolor daiin pcheol cheey dar

chedy qokshol tor qotal lkcheedar shedy okchor yshg ycheeor aiin daiin lkeeol qokchy solchey saiin ockhed
cheedy okes kshdar cphal odyar qokain okshey olkeey lteeody chor lteedar olchey lchaiin solkdam shol qol
chedy lcher qotos qoreedy olok ychaiin dair daldair otsheody odyeeey ain ctheeey odyeedy oshaiin qokey dar olkal ockheol

olkal lsdo qokeedy aiin oey aiin dair olkedy ltok kchey shckhy lkcheed chey ychain okcheda ol chody rdaiin kshaiin

dar shedy dy oiiineeol ar okal chey otchedy dar qokchey shedy chor qol daiin olsaly kchaim daiin otedy sl ain teeo ol

qokedy sheody ltaiiin sheol chedy qokeey qotedy ol ypcheey shol shedy opchg qocthain chr otchedy shedy aleel shckhaiin pcham opeedy ol

lchey qokchedy dar shckhaiin dair chckham pdaiin alain dleo oles chey shy che odydy ol cphg qokedy qokain dam pchedam

aiin aiireeody chckhy dain ches chey cheear chey shy otedy solkody sald lteeor chedy okshedor ar qokal oty opoiin sheey y
chor chckhy schee dain kedor ar oteedy lkedam kal qokeey sheedy chey orydar oeody qokaiin chedy oro cheeos dar

cheor aiin qokar shdar lky tchedam cheol qokeey kshaiin ykr qocheody olcheeor sheeod qokeedy rail ar lkain chedy

dar shckhy qokchedy char ykeod shckhy aiin opchy taiin dain chey y dain lko or olkeey qokshdaiin chedy ypchm dy ssheey dar

ycheod lchdair opchom chedy daiin chedy dain olseol qaiin otal ycheda shedy ol chedy ypchaiin otar shees pched
dorol qokeey sheey kaiin saiin ychedaiin sheeody chedy okr aiin ledy kd sar reain sheey cheod ar kcheds ol

ols qoeeey otchedy raiin sordy sheedaiin sheedar okd sheey dar lchey oiino ytchor dair daryeedain qoes olkal shedy

qokaiin sheedy qokey cheeody okeedy ol koy qooiin chcphain yshr olkchedy chedy qoldal dlee ar qokeey olkaiin shey qokchey oles saiin shey

ypchair ody olkey keod ytaiis choiin cheedy chees rcheol ctho olkar qol qoteedy pchedy qokal qokal shedy

ros res lcheeoy chedy chctheol dain olsheos solcheod qoedor ykeed rchaiin qotaiin qotain otchoy or rched

lkaiin qotchdar kcheeedy dy qokar cheod chey alyain shol ytsdy chckhy olkeedy oeey octhl kair qokeedy leol qotchy qokchy teol sheey ol

ol dain lchey al qopchaly ykeod qoleor chckhy areeor odyeeol opchedar resy aiin qokod teody saror okal sareor
daldy qokeey okeey shedy y ykcheol cheey reeeo chckhy ody lcher peed peedy ol ain rshdo okeod olkedy dar
okal ol chor kedor kal ol qokchdy okshal okaiin olcholy chedy dar qokal otchy otchedam dche aiin lkor ypchsy shedy

shal shedy olkal odyeeo aiin shckhdy chdy shctho daldy okeey olkeey chaiin ocheaiin qotes chol olyedaiin dar kchdol chckhy
olyeeedy sored dain am dal oky okain qopedy shedy oseeol aiiraiin oteey ain ykchaiin dcheol qokeedy rchedy
yeos ley okcheol qokaiin fcheeor ol okal al qokeey por chey odydam lkeeedy dcheear lshal otshedy

lkain ol saiin cheedy shey dalyo dy solkal pchdar qokal qokchear otaiin qokaiin y ola olchar qokain lsaiin tees dar
chedy shol okedaiin qokain octhol kcheedaiin ol odeey ytiiin shedy chcthod lchaiin dain y sorey
qokaiin otedaiin yshor daear sheol shm dam odyd oeeedy qoky rdain res pchol shckhy ol tchees chedy

olteeoy dar otal chckhdaiin qokdar otey lkchar sheey qopaiin dleey ches schaiin dleeol ol daiin qotaiin al ofchedam qokaiin dar
shol lshok opey chey y shcthedy olkal sain ol qoar qokaiin tchor shal ol cthdol ykar chey lsheees qokaiin dar
chctheor tsheaiin chedy soiinor oteey qokaiin sheol ytdam sheey chedy yteeody shedy aiin qokol ckhdal ksheody chal okais aiin otaiin chedy

oaiin qokol qokain lshar aredy otsheo chedy qokeey qoees qokain qokaiin otedy tchear lcheedal qoted qotar dar dal qokaiin dar
ctheos sshedy osol oreody cheey chdy ykchedar olkeedy shey opchaiiin shey dchdy al shckhy aiin dy qockhain kchol
qoky okeedy chal cheey lsheear shol qokain alaiis yky lsedy ytsy chdy opchady yts ypchaiin otchy oloiin qokear

lchedy dchedy tesy qotchedy dar ctheal qokeey opdam olshol qokeedy chedy olches pcheeor alsdy keol otaiin chal ar
dchey qokeedy ytchedy daiin or sheey sheedy qopchaiin chas lshs cthed qokeey ckhaiin solol ssheeol olchesy ar
dardy qokeey chcpheedy ar qokchy kaiin oky lkcho lchey orydy dain or schy oteedy solkais reod otal ytedal dchey opchain

sed lkedy qokchy okain saledain shey aiin tchaiin aiiinaiin ychaiir okchedy chckhy cthok ks shcthod qoky qokedy ol tshain
lcheedal lchedy otedy dchedy oteey okedy qokedy orcheey shey oteeedy qokeeedy ald okeey ckhe dar olkeedy qokal aiin sheol shedy daiireds al daiin qokaiin qol

shedy oseam oleedy daiin al
chey lsoiin pcheos qokor ykeor
chs chol olkal redair am lkaiin odyor qockhaiin oteey yedy olyeeos cheear saiin lseedy keeeo ol
qokey chd otedy sedain red qokal dchedy oteey pchdam okshdar qoredy tchals opol otal ocheeoy chedy qockhedy qopaiin dal lchor
qokaiin ol ockhail otchedy rsaiin daiin qoeeeo ychedal okaiin ol dain qoan yteeor dshl doley ytchaiir qotcho okey cheol

olkol ckhaiin qokal ar dlee qoes saiin chdy ysheey shedy kcheol shckhy alyol opchedy ypcheam qoted okchr aiin
saireody daryeey olcheeody ytary tol daiin pcheeedy okal chdy chor shedy shckhy ar qoredy qokeedy shckhy aiin qokeey okeey lchedy
aiin oky oks qokeear qoody ry okshor qokshol okeedy okeey odyeed qokear sshd aiin qotar chckheain tshor

lcheeoy chedy cheey alr kdain yteeody qoes otar odyeod odol al dy dalol lkdy qor olkeey oteey chedy

chey ram olches cheey kols pedy saiin okchdy peear yshaiin qotaiin ltedy qokeedy ol ykched oreeey dsheed ol
okeees oteey olkes she pal qokaiin aloly ar ypchaiin tor qokedaiin ol saiin or chey oched

ypchod dchol opchar shedy chedy teeey qotched olshar saleel chdy sheol aleod pcheey sheey rcho qokar ltd chey shy shey

ar lchor otal shol keal okcheear qol aiiineody chey chedy qokal cheey yteey okchsaiin tair dal qokshdam qokain opcheeedy
oleedaiin otaiin sheol ain daiin lchedam qokeey por qotchy tcheor sairedam qokshedy sheol okedy oiinain qokar shedy kshail qotchedy shey or dy qokear

cheey ol olteeoy chckhy qokchey or qokaiin otaiin ltdaiiin qokain qoky al saleeos ykeeo shd olkchy pedy psheeor qokain dal y
qopeor chey odydor ykeod ydy lteol cheey keeor qoky lsheeor lcheedal qoody kedal okedy dar qokeedy qokshm
osor daiin qocthair ykedaiin opeed qoksheor tary al darod qoky ychedy qokaiin or daredy ol cthr opal aiin

ckhor aiiindy opchm shckheeol okar lor lchedy ain qokeedy solo chdy qokar lyaly pchary shedy shol pchedy sheol dcho
sheckhy oloiin lkain redor tain qokchdy dorol okeey qoteey chedy qokeedy cthaiin okaiin olked okar lseees olky shedy pas kaly
okeey qoeeo arair aredy shckhor oteey shol ychody reol opchod sedy oeor oredy qopas shedy

yor aiiinedy dareey opchar otaiin qokedy qoteeedy chcfheos qokey cheeor oear yeedal chckhdaiin oteey lteeo otedy chdy

dar tshdy qokchy lkches aledar cheear otey lchedy dy qokedam lcheaiin qoedor ol qockheody ol

lkod oain cthed oteey chey otchedy cheeam orcheor or tor qokedaiin yteo ytchail qokedy qockhair ychal ksheody cheeal dar
qoty qol qokeedy odyes dar chedy qokeey chdy okchg sheedy chedy aiin okchdol qotdair qokal aleeo shckhy keol saleesy ol okedy shey olkar or
lkaiin yteeos chedy tedy chos qokear qokaiin olkaiin ykeeey rody oldaly sheedy reeal lcheedal chedy soredy okar dar

olkeey chedy qokal otal ykdal qokey olar okeey dar dcheos pcheey qokaiin y chey oteedy chedy cheey lsheeor sheody tchm qokar chdy
qopcho oredar qotain aiin chcthedy saiin okeey shsy raiin solkody ykedam olchoiin olsheeal olcheedaiin okedal ol
lchdy am shckhy qotchair qokey chedy dareey pcheos oky fchs oltor daiin qokal or leody shdaiin shey okar chol

dy ain aiirdal qockhain sheol cheom okchdy olm aiiry okedair olchody olcheod chor shedy olkeey okaiin dar lkair
olkar ytdaly or tshor kshaiin shedy okchr qopchedy cheey shedy doldy schol qotar qoteel chedy ochdar
shedy daiin cheedy ckhdam qokal aiin sheeody ltedor taiin lcheeoy ytody dar lkees dar qoteey ordair oky dar ored

aiiinaiin cheedy keesy ykcheody okedy shy kam olkdaiiin aiin qokeey qokaiin ykar shedy lkaiin qokchedy dar daiin qokey dar chey chckhy
dalaiin scheeey qokain dain ytody lain daiin chckhey or qotaiin opair qotchey qol qed yshdy opcheam tey chctheeey qotcheody
okchdar schdain odyeod cheey aiin oteey qokain cheey lkchsdy chedaiin al okeedy kched qokeedy ctheody ockhedy sar lchedy

qoes pchdaiin y kchaiiin rar shey lchor scheeody odyes sar chedy chckhey kdaiin lair oedy chctheeey alyeor
ocheedam shedy daiin al dain chcphor lkos aiin soraiin chey chedy oteedy chedy chedy otey y ykeain lkchal orcheedy qol shor otedy
qoky okdaiin chey qotcho ain sheedy opcheoly odyaiiin solkair qokeedy qol shar ykeos dy or tchody keod qockhedy olkeey chey qotchedy shedy

salor lkaim dy yeos qotal qokain shedy ocheedal qoedaiin chal opcho ytody qotchdy aiin olkal qoeeey otchedy qokedy cheol dalyeody
lkain lshedair lchor qoteedy chor ykdaiiin ololy okeear otedy qokchy odyear chey alyey qotal chedy dalyeos otal qokeey shedy

lcheaiin lsheeody chdy qokal oredy chey oteedy dshy aiin qoteey qokain lkchiin opaiin oro air qokchy oseo odyody soror ypchedal shey

ypchaiin okar cheeor chedaiin to qofchain lcheedal qoody shod olkedy qol qokal lteed oty shedy daiireody am

lkchal cheey otedy rair saiin qokain saleeos solkeeal ol opchdol lsdaly pcheo chdy opcheeey rs chdy

ytchedy sheckhy oloiin ldal lcheeey y okeedy shol keod lshes shsd shedy qokair doredy ypcheedaiin ol

dar okeey shedy lkchal aiin okcheel odyedal kshdy oteey shedy oty dar olkeedy olkaiin dsheedar qoror sain al qokeedy qokeos
qokey oksaiin orchdar dal cheey ain qotes ydy lshes al chdy arey ochor qokeey kory chal kg daiin y
otsheol qokaim pchaiin shor qokeedy dar ychdal cthor qolkey qoteedy qol qofchor daiin olkchey oksheedy pchor

sdal eseey chedy ykchedol aiin ykeod dyts ol ardair chcphor qoty res ltody ytes shedy orchal aiin
shckhy qokchedy ar om olkeey chey chedy qokeey qoeeos otedy shal key qokeey res okeol qokchdy cheol opchees shey oltdair
lchedy qokod chedy opchey chdy kcheeey lkchs oedy ykchody rd rchdar dar oedy okal laiin lkaiin qotok daiin aiin

qokaiin ychar ychdaiiin chdy qopchaiin qoty chckhy yshary otedam qokchdy ar opcheam ol qokeedy opchod leor lchedam
cheeody okeear lsg ykdair opchesy oryol areedy ytedol kedair or oteeedy qoteeedy shedy chctheeedy okeedy qolchdy
lkeody chor qotedal okedy lkchal qockho qoal olkchey qopcheedain olkaiin qokaiin ol qopol shdaly oor otal ochear qokchey shedy lchor

qockhear shckhy chey shy qokedy ytdaiiin ol laly olyear ykchody am dal oeos ockhdy yer shedy ytody chckhaim toy shedy
qokchy cheain pchey ytedor or oteedy aleody okchsdy saleeody otedy odyan aledy soleal qoky chedy qoteedy arydal
oaiin sales ain yshaiir lkchar qokaiin qokain aiiinm qokchey ol sar okchedy dar areeol qotaiin shedy otchey reear doleor

otal aly paiin qokchey ain tcham oteod ol soraiin opchees y ain kchaim tchy shedy oteey dsheedy otchdy ol
chey qokchedy dar ctheedain olyed chcphair tom dshedy okal ol ypchees qokeedy shed soiindaiin chdy opchal solkdo qol otar chckhy
daldy qokaiin dar okar olches otoiin qokchy ycheel shedy lsoly shedair qolchey okedy okedy odyes chs otchdy chol

qokchey chdy chey okedy raiin lseod qokal chory dshar qokaiin kol shal shey dar oreeedy cthaiin daiin chan ardam lseedar ar
daldy cthedam qokeedy sedy lkain chedy oteey qokar lshol opchor kchary solkeeey lcheedal otedy aiireesy sheeod otedy qol dy sored
ordal olkal lchey okain okched qokeey opeeor orchedy chdy dain ochor tair qokedy okcheedaiin reedy qokal chedy qokair qokar chedy

ykal ocheey otedy tdy olkey kaiis olcheesy ol ytchol okar chedy kchedaiin ol chcthair dain oddal
chor saliin fchedy qokeedy y qokar chdy kchr olkchedy chckhy otey ychdaiin ykody yteeo dar qoteedy qokol qokain olchal lkain aiin
osheal osheol ody odyod okal daiin koly aiin lkain shedy qotar olches shedy qokeeedy qotedy chdy okaiin olchd pchaiin

chcthey osheos okeey qoteey chees py qotaiin y chcphdy dar daiin odydy qokal qokar qotedy roly olshedain ol dain daleos
sheol shey lkedar olkdair oteey keeedy ykcheey kaiis lto kchedam daiin lkeol okeedy olos aredy ol daiin shckhy solkeear or
chor ches otody shoiin ol dain qol rcheo qopchaiin qoky solkos olkaiin ltdy daiin doleol dal oor

yeaiin choiin saiin lsody dshal soredy olkar ar shckhdy qokedaiin ol lchedy lkchdaiin qokar chdy lchaiir lteedy ol
cthdal lched qopchaiin cheom sheedy lkchal shdy qokar ol qokchy shedy opchol oty olchary okeeor okchdal
cheey shey otey aiin kiin qokain chol dain cheedy am olyain qokal sain aiin dal chor y sheeeody al okeedy olchaiin qoledam taiin

ldy olyar dshsaiin olyeol qotey lsedaiin lchedy shckhy lkchody chedy ykcheey al okar lkedy arees ar oteedy dam chol
lshiin opeol daiin rchdy aiin scheol qolcheom shedy ol qoteain okchy qokeedy sheeeody air aiiiney opchy qokeedy shedy y qokey otedy qockhaim
lcheeedy opchedor qokedy lshal yeeoy olal cheedaiin or aiiindy ol otal saloiin syeeol chol oro lkesy qoeeor dy ol

ochm ain ocheaiin chedy aiiraly tdam or odear cheey qokedy okar keos yedam qokeedy kshedam lkeeey tchdy soiinor
chedy oredy teoy ain ypchor ol lkaiin qotcheody aiin solaiin tchaiir ral ol ykchees qokeedy aiin soredy qokeey pcheos
yteeody roiin kchaly shckhy oiinedy oteey qol dcheear lseeo ol schedy ychaiin tcheeor kedor aiin

odaiin kchy aiin qokey ain olkchy otal ychdair chey oiinain qotey kar kaiin qaiin olyo rshain lkom al
qoky olkdaiin sar qochedy qokar ychaiin chey al oteey chey kedy dair soeol opcheos aiireedar qotedy sshaiin tchs qol
shckhy alyaiin cthaiin shckhor qokeedy odeeol kchaiin ocheos dol shor ckhor olkal shol odyeod dcheedy chedal qotaiin al

daiin aiin dy chedy dy qokain lkchsy lsaiin ykchdy ain okeedy lsheeey lkaiin oiinod ldy qody araiin ockhair qopcheear ol
qoty oleear reeam ycheeor shedy qokchey rdaiin qotaiin peod or otal qol shol qokain lsdaiin aiin otaiin or
tshor okar chedy saiin oke kaiin ochdar dsheedaiin otey sales okal ol opchedair qol oteey opaiin qokar qol sheol taiin

okal ain otar shedy air qokar chol chedy lkees sheol reol cthes lts cheol kal olkeey olkes olchok y pched
oey qokeey qokaiin teol olkeey shedy qockheeedy otal orey koiin qoldy chees olkeedy solkear tdy cpheo lsdaiin chor aiin otar lo
dcheos shey chckhey shedy qoteey kshol doledy daiin lchedy chol shol ochor ypchy lseeey oiineody ykchaiin dam lkchedaiin ol

osain dchedy tchom lsd soreos cheedy ykody cheod qoty shdam schaiin kcheeeody aiin shor al sain aiiindy
tshedam dam ytchedy tchory sheol peod chy soreos lsheeody ykdain sheod otshor okedy otchedy salan y dain al
saiin ychan peeedy olsheeey odyody qokshaiin qokchy olyeor qolkdy olkain dal ain ardy chedy oky shedy sheedy kshedam qdor shedy

cheeeody qoedair otal qotedy olchody qoeeo chol sheody lsheedy chor ol olkal tsheedain dal rear okchdy opeeedy dal aiin
cheedy chedy ykchdy ol otal pchdaiin ksairy shey or okal shee cheey lsl ychedair dar rchdal chey dar qokeedy chey shedy
shckhy qotchol saiin sorain sedar ran lss qokedy ytr aiin oteedy odeeedy chdy qokaly opchy okshar opeeedy olyor

qotd ytchedam sdor ol oraly sheody dchm okedy alyedy areey qokam shedy osheey qopchail qokchedy chedy tesy shedy
chedol raiin qokom dar taiin olkaiin shey qokchy qokeedy shd ody qooly kg qokeedy lseees qokchey lseeal ol
daleal okcheeod cheeey tshaiin olkaiin ltedain choly dshar okar odyaly qokal qdair okcheeos redair qoeedy chey shedy

qolkeedy shedy lkeeey qokedy olchd lkedy dy dyked chey aiin dain shody fchey sches sham okain tcheoy shg oteedy olchody chdy
cheam taiin dam lkaiin chan ochor cheedy cheol ochaiiin al tcheed y or daiin tsheaiin chdar daedy cheey ols qockhdy
okeey shsd char oteey shedy shsd qokain okaiin lteeody otedy pchaiin ykchedaiin kg opcheol sheckhy qoteedy aledain ol

chey air otal opdy oty ram olo yeer oleeos ytes qokeey cheeor qockhor chor chedal lchedy tedor shedy
qokchey okain qokaiin tchaiin lkeeal opary chol rcheeedy cheedy lseedy dal rdy daiin olkchdy chdy shckhy olteedam qokedy qokchy saiin shedy ltoiin chedy
olkedy al qokey qoes sheed lchod ltes kody shedol sheody oteedy ry ar chctho dair lsheedy qokey shedy

cheey shey qolko opoly shedy qokeedy oldy sain chdy qokal qockhedy daiin shey qokeedy lchedy okeedaiin lkol qokeedy qokar lkchal dar
oky ykeey ctheo oseeam solkear orar qoeedy opchedam okchas otain reeod chedy sheol okshaiiin otchedy saledor chedy solcheeam shedy aiin
ypchaiin chctheey qokeedy otchy lsheeor dair opdair dalyedam qokchey pody leeedy oear ockhedal ytoy dorm aiin dal chedy

orchdar dal otaiin lchedy okey ykedy daiin qofchor opches chdy daryeal chol cthey chedal qokeey qoeedy okchedam opcheeody ar dyteols kor
ksho oly shedy taiin okedy chey rdain ytal qoleol olkaiin rdy otal aiiindy rary okan odyeedy am
olyedy ykchiin otain shes ycheos otey otedy otey solkdal opchr aiin otchair chedy dchdy qotain dam air osesy qokchedy chedy sshg keos

oty am shedy lkdy oteedy qotaiis al ockheed qoain qoky or sheol soiinol cheedy keeey reesy reedy al
lcher chckhy ochor okeedy qopor dair y olchsdy ols rd aldy qotal olkedy taiin dchedar ltsd ar oteedy daredy
oty chedy tedol ytaiiin ol leeod lseols opchaiin qoas or qokeedy dalydar chckhey shedy yeeedy qokeey sheey y teos

otol opear sches ykail alyain qockheor opchaiiin chedy daiin okshal chey aiin qokal okain ychail qokchedy cheoly chedy toly dar

raiin okcheam qodam olyor
shckhy chol osees ain doedor shedy
solcheor ol dshs or shedy opcheesy reeey reeedy dal chckhey qoar otdol otedy lseesy qokeedy shedy qokar doledam seoy al
lkain dsheedaiin aleeey aireey olcheeey oiinain lched oedy shd qoes qol schary qokeedy ain okchy olsheeor ain
lkdy ddy cthedy ol dleo ches sar qochear ypchaiin yshal kear dairaiin olyoiin odyeeor lkchedain otchdy al

olkol ckhaiin dain oeeedy qokdaiin qoeeedy okar octheedy ar otedy daiin lkdy qodain dar qokeey shedy qoky qol qokeedy qokeody qopeeedy
tshaim qokeedy yshey osa aiin cheey okain okchaiin qokaiin lteeor qokar chdy qofcheedal chedar chol solar shedor cheol
qokeey aiin qokaiin pcheeedy okal lseeod shedy oksheols cphdy ol chor cheedaiin lsar qors rody qol otchedaiin ycheedy air

qockhedy dal shedy sheod qockhain qokeedy opchedam shedy dar okedy ychaly ytcheeey otain dam or qotchy tdy cheey chol qockhair
oteey aiin chctham cheol aro qotaiin okain lkaiin qokchedy ol schaiin dolo sheey al daiin lchedy qokeey oleeal qolcheedy shedy
chedy oreed ar yshed olkal chey ckhd cheey qokedy opchedam qokeey odeedy yty dar qokeedy tdal oty yshaiin qockhair

sheeoy shedy aiiinedy shckhy qokchedy ar chcphdy yteols oiinedy dykeody otshdy olyain otal al olkeedy shcthdar qokar qokchdy qokeedy shedy
sheol shey yedy dain okaiin kol qockhear tsheeey qokchedy shedy cheeody olchedair dar shckhdy shedain sain dar olshal tshol okeey chedy
chckhoiin lchaim oteedy ldar opcheeody sheedy odyedol ofcheeol tesy qotcho okar ar opchear qokeedy otedy okar olody doldaiin qokedy

ol qokal ches aiin qokeedy shar olkeedy shedy qolaiin shedy qokchdain shey aiin daldair olkaiin otaiin aiin okeedy okeey olchy odol qokeey chckhy
qockhor saiin qokeey qodaly qokey otedy oteey solksdy dar qoteedy okar dar oleos teol lkais qoam soraly
darod olkeey qoteey okdal okedy ain oredaiin y qokeedy lkdy otey otain oksheedaiin chedy dar lkeed chdam yeeedy sheol sheey ar lkedy

chos qoeod ain dal otchey ltar qokeey okm saiin qotshor yor yeedal char ol chy sordal
cthed opcheol rcheey tched chor dar saiin otal reeey oksheody oeody lchol tdar shedy
qofcher chdor okg qokal kedam kshy ar solar dar lsy chaiir olkchedy okaly ypcheeedy tedair aleel qopchol sheey odeol

qopcho lchaim okar raiin oseeey qotair oteedy lchdair qokar ar olyeeedy qokedy tey shol qokaiin ol dody y ar raiin
qokal yteod odod ochor otey okdam qokeey ain lshols oteol olyeeody red dair odydy shckheey aiin qopchg keedain opchedaiin shedy
qokchey lshd opchdair qokain opchaiin oteedy ram sha shey shol okees qotain qokam ychol qokaiin qokeedy dar shey

ofeeol olches lkdair cphdaly qotedam osedam ychr shedain sheody ychaim olyeel olchdaiin opcheey sairdy ar pal qokaiin shedy
ol qockhedor ykedal lsal oeeedy ykcheos qokeedy qoksheeor dar qoteey aley qokal y okeedy qokey chckhal olkaiin qol qotchy otchy kor
sheody qokeedy qotedy qokar shaiir alyain lko chd qotaiin sheol or ctheeedy tl lsy qotaiin pedaiin shedy chedy dcheey daiin qokaiin shey

chey okshar saleeor al okaiin ol okcheeody aiin lchdy chckheeo tsheal daiin aiin olshedair qockhdy lkair cphsaiin keos
cheedy okeedy shedy lfchady ytsdy ytair qokar dsheed kail alyol opchesy rd qokaiin sheol shdam y qotedy qokcheeey y ctheedaiin aiin
shckhed oltedy daeol shdy dchdy lshail ral qokaiin ychal qokain rsy kair shar ssho aiin

olan lchedy aiiineody qokeey qoeeor qokedy ol oedy qokeey qokaiin aiin qokal ltaiiin y oreos cthedol aiin
qopedy oseeos chm dain dardy okeey qoky chy oddair dain reody okd ain okeey otaiin yshod qoky to chedy cpher shey
lchedam lod daiin ochdy aiin okal olkeod air oles sheey qokedy aiirees ain olcheed chcphdar qokedaiin am chl otchor ypchedol air

cthaiin qokchey alody chdy daiin ain okeey qokaiin qokeedy yto qokal qokaiin qotain aiin ol osm sor qoky ykol okchy qokchedy shedy
ytoly ykdam aiirain okedy qokchedy shedy okaiin oteed okaiiin alyear ychsdy olshaiis kedar shedy chedy chor shedy
lcheeedy chcthdy lkeor ocheeol qokeedy ain oty chedy tdaly solkeain rshey teees aiin qokchey qokeedy lchedy orcheer shey

qotol fchey qokeey otaiin shey qokal lkchdam ley cheey shedy yeo ychedar lchedy kshees chckheedy leor dykedy otsho
qotaiin okain rchy ain chey qokchedy dar opcheey otsheeedy choly yche okeedaiin cheol qokaiin odyedor ol lkain chdy
otchey otoly keols okeedy or otshedam qokar ol orchg ychor qopcheeey alyear okaiin okain daiin odyal shckhy qopchedy chckhey shedy

opchol qokshdair okaiin chdo otoly chedy ypchdal octheey aiin daiin shsaiin oted ctheeos sheol cheol olkedy or
cpheal keeos am cpheeol dar qoteedy sheol aledy qolcheoy chal okshdain oledy raiin dain ytcheo or dalydy qokaiin chdy
shckhdar yedy chey okshedol qokeey qoal olydair olchar ytchair salear okedy al olyedol ol olkeey chcphaiin cheey or

olkal lseedaiin pcheedy al lcheedal shedar qoty qokeedy oledal soledam dear cthair qokeedy lsheod olchy tchdy qoked
oly okg ssheedam otedy lso aiin olches otshedam qokchdy taly okcheeos keesy chckhr sheedy shedy olkey air ochedy
opchol saiin sain al opcha rar olkeeeody aiin okey okeedy shedy or chedy qokeey okeey dsheeor orcheedy sholy shey okaiin cheol

dshod odyaiiin qokchedy dsheeod y qokeey qokeos soleos kcheeey reain ockhor sheol al keees lkaiin qokeedy reeey chedy
shey cheol okedy y dchor qokeedy okain lky shedy yee lchail kiiin qotain qokedy chedy ochedy yshy air
schaiin rshdy chs sheeal reeam schm dshedar otedy oteeey oryaly qokal qokaiin sheol aiin qod okcheey al chey dar

chcthdy qokchey redal qokeey kar rchaiin qokaiin reeody shedair daireeedy chey al yeos qoky chckhy yshy air
orcheor qotaiin odaiin sheey aiin qokar salar or yshedy shey odeedy shes air qokeedy oeor shol lkchy otaiin aiin
chedy sar qoteedy cheeos aiin lcheeoy chckhy ctheeody aiin qokaiin odedam yshes cheol sardaiin olshair lkor shckheam qoeedy qokaiin ain

qotar ale qoeear okedy qokchedy ychor qokar shedy okeey lsdam chedy raiin otchdy qopcheo soleeey kaiin araim ar chey lkchary areos
olkey shedy opchar olais olcheey tdal okal lseedar shedy lsl qokain lkcheod shaiis reols qokal keol
shckhy qocthey chor keedaiin rs aiin shl qokchdy tcheol qofchr olshdal qokeedy leody lyaiin shckhy olaly qokchy qokchedy shey ram qokaiin ain

oty y shey sar air qokar keod sar qokedy lsdy daiin aiin dam otshod qokeey oky cham odedam qokar ol cheey okshg ctheody ol
ypchaly okey air orom sheol chdy qofcheeedy opcheeos qoteeaiin raiin lkchd cheey lchedy osy qokeedy reedar shedy otchey shey orar chedy
qokaiin chdy opchom qol chey qokchedy qoary olchdaiin cheey raiin pcheey sory chckheed ycheeody otedy oteey qoky lkchsaiin scheody chol

sheey reeo pcheeedy chey oryedy olkol pedy qokeey sheey ltdor shey lkcheeo ar orchal odyeeor qokar shedy cheey shedy okeey shol dar
qolkaiin qokeedy aiin cthey qoky chedy tes dar oiiineeol shes shey ykdor olshe oloiin oraiin raiin
ocheeoy qoiin okain olchedol soiineos kar ykol sheey chy sheesy okchy chedy opchy chedy qockhain olydy oredal lchedy

olkedy shedy qokey lkchar qokdaiin chdy olkaiin dar otchs olchar lkcheod ltain kshedy aiiine tey shcthed qokedy
ctheos sardaiin aleeody ykaiis ltdy qoes qotedy aiin dal lkcheeor lsy keod aiin sain shey
lkaiin odyeain chdy shckheam dar oteeedy qokedy aiin opcheeor shedy qokaiin tcheol qokeey qokeey qokedy lshaly lkesy aiin schees chol qokedy

qokal or solaiiin qoteos cthedam qokchey chedy qokal qoey saredam ofchear qokeedy olkedy air schail shedy oky ain ldy
dcheedy okshody chedy lkeed kair qokar oledar dsheear scheeedy qockhedy okeedy shail cheeos olkail ol
aiiinaly kchdaiiin ykal aiin olches ochedy okcham tchor ofchs shedy chdy lchaim dy qockho lsheees qofcheaiin ky aiin otar shedy

lkol qokal qokain olyiir olchdor chedy opchy chedair or opchdy laly lkaiin solkeod saireeol lcheol
qotal chedy sol olkar dors shees opedy oteedy shedy qokeey qoksheedain am soley okol sheedy chedair qotal ycheol daiin lchdair qopchair
chckhy qokeey chedy okal olchdo chdy olkar cheol pcheal sholy aiin qoky redaiin ar ypcheeol chey or

ocheos oteedy pchey lkdy ol chsdy ol ykchaim ysholy shedy qokeey ar olkedy shey otar ain qopaiin
dam chedy ypchair olydair shol otaiin tchaiin yeor odam chol lko shckhy ain qokar chedy lkeal res chedy
aiin shol qoeeody chckhy qokal olkaiin otees sheey rar choiin ar cphm qokaiin olcheam aiin teol

sar qokchedy dar okchy sheedy qotsaiin qokal qotedy okdaly okar reoy solkeeor soldy dar oteedy lshdy schiin fcheol otal orm oeey rdaly ar
lkaiin air dain olyeos kedar chedy qokeedy qokshor lcheos lshedor sheedaiin chol lkaiin odydy tshaim qokar qoky olchiir dain qokedy
sheeo oteey cheol ykeees dar oltdaiin qokain lkaiin ocho lseeey aiin kches chckhy oteey pey qoty lss aiin qokal ar

okal ol cphedy opchy choiin otedam dykdal cho lkeeol qokchdy qokedy areody ssheeol aleeody ytiir olyeody
am qopg y qotchy ockhdy al chedy cheedy shedy okeey qokar shey olkeey peeor lseer or olysaiin dshal chs lsees ol
shal saleos qokeedy cheod olsair qotedy dam odedy chctho chey qochol pcheeol shar qokedy olchy choiin dchdy shg okcheody

yor lkdy otchy tcheody cheey sheor chey lteees ykchaly shal ytesy sar shedy shedair qoeeeo lsam or
dar shey areedy chedy lcheaiin cheeey ykaim ycheod qokaiin chedy orain qokeedy sheody dsheear tm lkedar reeo rchdal
ssheal chol qokeedy lkain shdam qokal otain dal okal qol ypchees qokeedy resy okshedain ytes qokey chedy okeedy shol ychg otair qotaiin chdy

chcthey schaly otal qokaiin olkeedy oledor aiin qotal aredy shol shedy qolkaim lchaim pchdy okedy al lkedaiin qol
tchdy lkeeod paim oteey chedy okeedy pcheey sorary ychdy ypcheeo chdy qotaiin ykar qokchey chol tear ol qokal soreear qokain otedy
shckhdar saiin shedy lkaiin chy dar okeey lchedy chcthdy oky olchdam okal kaiin otaiin otain chckheoly al lkam or

qokshear qopchor chcthedy lchaiin okar qoky qokedy oedy qokeey odod saiin olkeos solcheeoy ychoy otain otedy
chedaiin aiin qopchal shedy cheol qopcheody sarol cheey qoeedy okal chedy dolol saiin ypchol chcthary chedair qokal chedy
okol sheedy qol opcheeos ram otedy cpheody y qokey chs cheol otsho sar chs lshdy otchey qokain shedy

rshaiin lcheeoy okoly ychal solkeody ales alg olal pchear shckheol saredy ctheedaiin dar
salal otsheody qopcheo chcphedar oleedy schaiin teeedy odaiin okair qotsheo qotchy qokchy ykdaiin qoteey otedy
ol qokal ykar ar olkar aryeody qol tchdaly chedy shar chckhody otchdy lchedy cthor qopedam shedy ksheod dar sches dar

otain kcheol lol okchoiin odyeees ytchaiin sheol shedy aledar y qokeey chctheeol rcheeedy otsheody qokeedy lkdy
sheey aiin oteey okaiin lteeey lkchar saleeey aiin qotar ar osheo reeor odyar olky olcheear ky otedy

aiin cphoiin lshsd ar cheey qokain okaiin qol otchey otdair tchaiir qochdar ool cthaiin qotshedy tchair

ches okal or chcthey okchedor sheod ltees ol dam chor am saiin chckhy opchedaiin qol qokal ar aiirom ol
qokeedy aiin ared cheeody keeo lchear olyeeeody dar leol okchor osdain qod olchr olteeedy qokeedy shar al
orear opcheeedy daiin chey alydar chckhedair qockhdy soleeedy ar dardy solor sheey qotaiin rody qotedor qod qokaiin qol

qotedy odyar qod arod or qokchy ked dalaiin qokal chckhody qol dy cheey dar qokeey qokaiin tchair kedol qokchy solkeedy solcheeedy
olkchey qol qopchar rees olkaiin ral ltdy opal al teear shedy okchdy shey saiin ar kshaiir sheol solkedal chey shedy air
qoky chedy qoteedy lcheeoy dar lchey lkcheain cthdy oksheeey chey qotcho okcheols qoteal cthair odain qokeey rchaiin lkedar al tsaiin aiin

shes ykchor teel sheedy kor qoro otain sordy qokar keeeody al chckhes ain soly rar lcho aiin
qoky lshs odyeeey qotcho soiineody ood rsheey aiin shckhy otchedy saley chcthol okchary shedy qokshdy olchoiin ardy
ral oeody odyedaiin sheol qoody yteees olkedy aiin qokeedain qokaiin aror qokar shedy qoped okedy lkaiin aiin orr otedy am

chedor shey qoldy qoredam ykesy qokchedy qoeain am otal shor ololy chedy or cheey ol dykair opcham shedy
qokal ltar qofchdar okcheeody lsheeor chedy chedy okal ssheor qokeedy or qoteedy olky chdaiin saiin keols yshaiin opchdor shedair otedy
chey oiinain solaiin dche qopchedy oteey qokeey shedor chdy dain odal sairdy dykedy olkeedy qokeey keeey shd okaiin raiin

yor okar ar ypchdo cheol ypchr reod yeedal cheed odaiin qokedam chckhan oraiin kar sheedy qokal olchedol shedy
ocheedal qoar chdy dy daiired sarol qoledy olkeedy qokal al qotchy solks ror otain lkaiin tshol okal cthor
shckhed lkain ychdaiin lshair cthsairy ytes okedy reod ychedy qopchol air qotar ar pcheey yair qokal shedy

oeody lkail lshoiin dalain qokal yteed okeey aiin rd qolain lkdy leos dalyol saledal daiin oledol qokal aiin
dchain taiir dar daiin okaiin ain qopor sheey dar okdol cheol qotal oteain cphear lkeor qolkor opchedy
oeol otal ytcheedain okshody chdy olar sheey tor otshm oteey oey orchal y qokeey redy shal lsheedaiin ypcheeedy

ocheos ordy daiin oleoly otain redal chaiin schdo ral daraim qotchy lchedy sheol raiin ltoiin chedy
or qokal oty kol chdy qokal qoky shedy chckhy cheey lshedol chckhos sheey sheols saiin qokedy chdy qokair oteedy rr tshdal
qodol shedy ksheeey shs tshair qokaiin cheedaiin cheod aiin qokeey okaiin tchear sheody dar tcheed y aiirain

lko ody otal ar cpheeol ltaiiin lkchdor oleeody shr ltdaiin olkedy ol okedy oksheeey oltaiin

shedy opcheam lchedy qopchd ain
lchey chdy opchy rch otey qokedy ychdy
qokal okain y sshdair lchedy shey dal kal qokchey chedy teod am cheey chedy qotaiin olkaiin rdain shes chl res qokchy ar
soreo sorees oksheeody keoly shedy dshedaiin taiin lkain ykaiir lkches aiin okeedy shckhedy qokeedy tdy shar opchor
tsheeedy ley qotal olchr cheeor lkaiin qokchedy qokedy olchr qocthain oo olyam odys dam rdy qotal qokey redair sshdar

kchear ctholy sheol qotedy qokees lkchdain chedy omady lkcheeody ar qokal oltair ledar y aiiinaiin okal ksaiin okchdair
okey qol opchedy cphok shedy chdy poiin qoty y qokeeedy chcfhaim sheeo solaiin shey schdal qokeedy qotchy rain sheody tcheos shal odyal chor aiin
dardy chey pm okeey sheedy ain cthor lcheos cheey shey chey okdam lkches lkcheeor oo syeod ain

dleey ar ockhaiiin qokedy dair cpheedam kor ocheedal lchedy qopchm qaiin daiin qoair chckhey pal otol otdar okees roiin cheey al
ods ol qokal dchor qokeeedy qokeeedy rey ctheeod shey chedy chor ar ockheol qotal okaiin lseeor shedy ofched qoleey ted
dar qokchedy cheol dalo qokeey qokaiin saleain qokaiin ain koiin oeor chedy ochdy qockhaiin okal ykcheor qokedy okal lyor daiin dalor

aireey olcheedaiin chedy chckhey aiin shor chedy oty dar teeam olkair toly raiin qol odar okal chody oteeor chdy
qoky shey fchedy dchdy qokain qokchey aiin okeey lko yeor daiin dytdair dam ykchm chey or ytchy dshedol qokcho
otal or oty aleedy okaiin dar qoleeedy dalyedy oteey aiin olyeedy chedy dain dalol dairo qokchy opdam or

okaiin lsedol okeor olkar sheeam kal qoiin opeody sardy qokchey ol ochedy olchoiin daryee qoedol ctheor
chail air otar qoaiin odaiin qotedy olkchey lteeor pchain olkeeedy qokeeedy ar cheey or saiin al tar ain syes shey
ytes lseedy qotedar aleeos shedy qokchey otaim sheol lkor dy qoky lteod qokeor tshey ypches shey

lkaiin al lkm cheey chol raiin otar lkcheeos qoes olcheedy am lkaiin shckhy shedy ytar chey y otchy qokal shey
olkar rsd olshedy kchaiir qokchedy cheear qokedy sar shedy daldy chedy opchedair shedy ol qopsaiin saleod key rsheeedy shol oteey shedy
qokedy okchsairy kd odyaiin qokchedar al soady aiin yeedal lchedy yky tcheeedy dain ochdal cheear lseeey sar aiin cpheedaiin qotedy

qokedy olyiin okain dar qokeey qotaiin aiin ypcheeol am orchedam dalain schaly lkr qotcheor cheain or qokeey lchor olkeey lkdy
cheey shey sshedy oteedy ykdair olyedaiin qokeedy aiin qokey olchody okar oksheeey kol saiin qoky rey olkaiin ol
rchol dain opchain ytar shey opchdy lkam ted chedy qotdair dalod ar rcheedy odyeeal qokedy sain y ksheeo qokedy

olchedair chol qotar chdy dain lkain ar qokeey odeear shedor otedy darod opchor otey chdy qoky qokedy okam cheol
daiin al qockhedam areeedy tedain lchedy daiin odedam chedy aiiraim otey keam qokeedy opar qokeol qokeos sheol qotedy
otshm chey oiinol ypcheol qoksheedy ycheeal ol doledam otal otchy shedy chckhedy qopcheol tey ofches chedy qoked

opchol qokal oshor daiin cheey odyain qopchaiin dal okshdy cphal okain chor qokedy shedy dchdar lchaiir chol sheey aiin qokeedy qokedy
oeol ykchody dar olkeeedy qokeeedy solkeody dain otol sheedy shaiiin kaiis chedy opchdy ar okchsdy chedy qoteedy olkeey odyedair dykedam qokal qokeos
darod cthaiin lchey ain aiiroiin al kody olchr lkchd qoky chckhar qokeey olshody sheeam otchy qokedy odyeedy qokedy

oltor aiiinear ykdaiin ain olkar ol kchais chedy qopches qoar okeey chedy sheol lcheody qokaiin odyody aiin ctham aiin
qokal chckheees okchor lkain chckhy ctheols ykeey qotchdy kes lchedy reed pas oleeor saiin odyais ltd aredy
oiinair okchd am cheol dchaly lkar chckheeor okal olchg dar opchedaiin dar lor daldair shckhy lkchedair qotaiin aiin

shckhy qotchdar odal ockheey dain qokal or okaiin ltary opees sheey shey qokchedy sheod daiin aiin okal qol qotsheedy al dam olkaiin chedy
qokey chedy olkeedy ksheeedy ykchaiiin ytar rchain ypcheedaiin am chedy qokey chckhal daiin al chdy chcthair daiin qokaiin air chcphdy ar sheey sheol al
cheedy qol qokchair qokal pcheeor olchar dchor kcholy ytedor alal kchdair qokey dar qopeed res qokar air kchy chedy

otsheody oiiineey ol dareody okal ytar okain dchedy oteedy ctheeedy kshair qokeey ytcheos rchol areeor am
qokey raiin oeor cheey dar sedam daiin chey y qopal qokain arm yor olyiir okeedy chdy dy shckhedy qokeedy qokeeedy ar
lcheeoy oleesy keoy ol qokaiin otaiin shedy dshal lkaiin qopcheey dalain cthdain okeod qokaiin chckhy cheey shey okeedy lshees okeedy ain

sheedal saleeey aiin qokar okdaiiin chdy shckhy chedy ol daiin qokchor tedol chedor chckheear qotal dar qolchain qokeedy omey
or cthain sheody qopdy ledy qolkdar otchaiir solkar oteey qog kdal dain char ksheey kchor
ypchol lkedy shckhy ain dair lkain lshaly lkas lshy pched qockheol dair dar qokal qoy dar qoteedy qokeeedy chedy

ledy daiin qokaiin tdy air or opchdol qol qockhaiin cthdy resy shckhy qotcho qokar otedy lsheor ychd oteod ain
shckheeol teos olkeey chey y dal otaiin qokeedy ol rcheody dar ykor shol ychees am okeey otaiin reeeody shedy oreed shedy
orchdy chol cheedy ychedor chedy cheey qoeear sar lkchan odeeol otedy kcheos opchar reod ody orcheody otain kchor

qokshedy olkeedy tsheeoy kor cheol qokchey kok sheedy qopaiin qopches ain shedy dcheor chedy otsheor ol okchey qotsho lkeeo shey
ar saiin otshor ykchaiir ar cheedy qokain lchaiin lol lchdair qokeey kdam shedy olkeey qokear pchedaiin dar
qoaly shol olkeey chd rcheody lkchr qoctheol otal otol opdal daiin otaiin ro opcheeody shedy chy qokeedy aiin otchy qoteeo qokeey raiin

olals fchedy ykchsairy teey olkeey qokaiin sham ltaiir okedol or ysheeo keeey qopol olkedy chedy qokaiin otaiin chedy
doraiin oteey lked oseeody y ypchsy ychar ltedain chdy oky lkcheeey y cthdy okey ol qokal lkedy
yer keeedy otshdy qokeey qokeey kedam qokaiin qokain qofcheeoy chedair rr lcheedal qotedy aiin ol olkaiin oleear taiin solchol pcham dar

oteey ches dshdo or olsdy lkchd tsheeoy dsheeod rdaiin qokaiin qotedy dy lkchal ksheos daiin qokchey qol saiin oteey chedy
saredy osedy chor qokedy shckhy reed chedaiin otain chey lsr ochdy aloiin dar sdy chey air
shctheol lkaiin qokchedy ar rcheor otar chedy opchaiin ol solo qoksheal dy cphedy daiin sheey otedy oteey shes okeey lchedy

oleeos ches qokal shedy lsody chckhy shcthaly otal dalyeeedy ypchor dal qokaiin kol otches al chckhey qokedy shckhy y
laiin qoteey qokchey lkcheeor qokeeedy or shcthod ypchair qokaiin okain olchesy qotcheody or qokeedy lsdo chckhsd okes qokal qol
shckhy okchedy dar aiiinod shckhdal qokeey y shor qockhedy opchdy qopchdol ar okal seos daiin cheey y qol dy pcho chey ain

shedy shckheo ykaiir odyes opdy lchey oryey olkal ytg alyo lkeeedy schaiin otchdy okedair saiin qol
chey reees otsheeol chctheeo shedy shdaiiin shdaiin otal ol dalydair orcheesy qoteol lkain lshedair led teeey qotchain okeey chedy
lchedam dey okedy okchedy cheed fchedam kcheody otal or qokeey yor daiin lcho lsoiin raiis lshes otal ol

dar olyor kchedar opeedy shedy ltols otod oty olshaiin daiin dytedam okchdy odyes ltok olyedy oteey ar
or opcheeaiin koiin chedy eseey ar qokeey sheey al okal lkchaiir al qoked olyom odyeeod raiin dar okchor
lcheedal dar okaiin ol dy otaiin chedy ctheody opchg fchain opchedam olyan ltoiin reear yteol qolkas tain shol chedy

ol cheey ykaiiin cheeor ksho oty ol okaiin qopchaiin shol lssy chd ol lshdam chal aiin
char chedy om sar keeedy shor por kiiin ar daredy aiin qokdar chctham otedy saim opcheor aiin
olkeedy cheeey lsam ychaiin sain chal pchain kedair kchor qokeey otaiin qopaim olchaiis ol qokeedy reeo oloiin ain

lchedam oteey shey olky ol tedair ol kcheeos aiin shedy schas dar qopeeey aiin qokeey orol opal cheey ar qokar solkeees kedam
ool cthaiin okeey ckhaiin orail opeedy qoted odal cheeeody ykeed orey qockhm qol
olkeedy qotain qokchey otchey shey chckheod qokol pdy kchor dy lkor opcheam lchedy sain leody daiin cheeos ytaiir aiin osdy y

ychdain shedy qoteedy or qokchy cpheor qokain dal oteey ychesy solkeees cthaiin lkaiiin rdaiin qokaiin ol otar keol
sheody lkchos tshdy ol chey lkchal dchedam olter shey qoky shedal lkdy lkain qokedy qokey chal olshody qokar al
ypcheol qockhee kchor oteey lchor cphes salor cheey chedy otal qol tdy olky chdy otedal shckhy ycheol

lseeo kshed otedy saiin chedy cphsaiin lshs shdor okeees sorear dleey ar ypchar olches qotody aiiinor
chedy dalyor otal okaiin qoted sairain qokeey sordaiin qol oteey qokain qoky chedy olkeedy saiin ol qoteey opeol lkail qochedy okchy cpho ol
darair ofeeol ches otal cheeey qoeear lcheedam shey lshedy qokaiin arey toiin cheeey ke shdam rchdy okar seeedy

ofeal olchal daleeedy daiin lkchdy shckheey qokar leeedy qokal aleeeody odysd qoedol qockheol opchain otchy qotchy ykair
cheedy qotedy soleos qokaiin qotaiin air oty chedy qokeedy qoled yshais olchar okeey aiin ol ctheody qokeey qokchey dar oteedy olsaiin ardy
ctheos otsheey shckhy lsoly otedy ksheed chedy yty arm chedy daiin qokaiin kol qotshair lcheedam chedy shckhear cphg keol

ykcheos otey raiin okeey aiin keod olkaiin lchedy ood okol qokain chedy okeey pchaiin schy ysho qaiin otal okchaiin qokaiin shedy
ol shey dlee ol ykcheody qol dy lchor okeedy olyeeedy daiin qokey chedy otshain lky ykedair ol daireol tshesy kdal
ofchedy qoteedy lteeey qotchol solaim dain ochor opchd reody otedy opchar otedy dar qokar lchedy chckheod daleol pchm

oear otal qokey qor lcheeoy shedy y dchor osy dar otchy okain aldam oair qokey shdor saiin qol qokaiin otchaiin tsheeey olshaiin
lcheedal chedy qotey chedy dam qotaly dalyedy qokeedy kshedam opcheos olshdol lsedair ol qokal qokaiin qopaiin otchdy ol aiireeos chdy
chr qotchear schaiin qokchey dar qoteedy omeol lkm okar qotedy otal otar chedy dain pchol qokeey ochaiin lchr ychaiin

ar qotal qokchdy ckhedam daiin aiiinair lsheeo odeedy reed chckhoiin daiirdal lo lseeody qotdain ytal cheedy chdy
lo otsheody lkar lchedy shar sheedy aldaiin cheedy olchols otdar ctheols taiin daiin oear tsheedal chedy dykol daiin dar
chedar dsheedy cheedy y qotal reedy dal roiin qokshaly sheol qokal cheol solchs ykeedar char oty ytoiin lkain ol

otol otain or osy reol olkeey ofchain sheey odedam tol sheedaiin lsheol opcheeey y oteedy tcho rchedy daiin ar
qotol olkdar scheedaiin shedy lshod ol oteey aiin daiin okedy qokchedy qoedar dar olkeedy olteal air tchedy cheoly chs chcthol daiin dain y
olkal ychr res sar shy shey cheey dar cthdain rd olkaiin lkchoiin dcheedy kaiis sham ycheel cheees chedy

chedy qokal schor oty sheeo lkor oty chdaiin schdy shol aiin sched otshm cthdar dal kchor
qoky y salaiir okchedy okes shs chckhey ky dar oshol sdain shedy kchey lkeeod shedy chedaiin chckham chedy
olkaiin otedaiin qokeody saiin qotody lsar chey qochdy saiin aiin tdair shedain odydaiin odear otshdy dar kchd air

olshedor shedy chey air daiin qokeey dar qokchy dy shey okeeey al opchedar qol oteedy am otal ar rdam dal ol otaiin ar
otedy shol kdaiiin shedy ockhain olshal sshaiin olyal solkes or syo ltaiis shey dal dar otaiin okaiin ol
olteer chedy qors shey sain chdy ytedor olaiin qokaiin qokain arees ar ypchaiin cthy olkeedy qody dal qotchy ol okchoiin chckham chedy

cthaiin olkeey lcheor y cthedair shealy olkeor dalyo cphdaiin chdy olkey qotoly olcheeo aiin qokal chckhy ody chdy
otaiin shes oltedam otal ofcheol lsees ytedol qokar chckheear pchdy oteedy aiin ctheey kaiir aiin daiin lkain alal daiin ol
chedy ytoiin lcheedal chdol otedy lain cheey qoed ytchm rshaiin qockhdar aiirdol qoedaiin otaiin ol

tshedam opches olkm qokeey oloiin shor olchr qokchedy qokedy cheedy ol pchair ypchas ol qokeedy soredy salal otchy chol opcheod cheol
chedy aireedain olar okaiin odyl or shol sordy darain olkal qol qors ykody or okey chol ykches dar
qokeey chdy qokshdar okeedy chckhy ar oeody chey redair reear lcheer chedy opchedal olair chcthar or opcheees qol

shar raiin ytedy olkeedy shsdy yteedar ctheol otey oleesy aiin qokeey qokaiin qopchey olkaiin pchedam chey shes ypchedy
shckhy roiin ypchdal teols saloiin chedy lkedy lchor opcheeody rar qokedy dal ocheeor rail otedy lkaiin chey oiineor qol
chiiin cheol cheedy ychiin qokain dar qokal qotal red cheedy qokain daiin lses okaiin sheol olcheedy lchor olkeey dchair ypchedol chedy

dleey salal cheedy olsheed lchedy daiin qokeody sain okar lkchg choiin qokear ocheedal ar shol koiin shedy chey shckhy otchedy olshaiin
dy dar ypchaiin cthy qokeedy chckheeed ain schg otedy shdar tsheeoy ar lchaim ykchody olkeeo ltar olteo shal olkchey ol
qoar chody ar lkain cheeo olkar ol chey y oseesy dar qoky shedol sedy oky ycheeey tsheedam olshed

ockhey qopdy qolkey okdam olcheod otchy tor qokar laiin pchedy olkedy pd alody opiiin qotchey ol
qoky dar tes lsedair otedy otaiin ltdol raiin okchy otedy okain okedy oiinedy otey kedal lse qoky ol ory cheol
olteaiin okr aiin dair ypchdy lteeey sar qokchedy kedy shckhy res olyair lkeeedy osheol lchain ol qokeeedy oteel olkchey cheol

saiin y qokchey al daiin daleeedy chedy chey ckhais aiin lko lkaiin olkchedy chal aiin daiin lchdy okchdy olchan olkaiin or
qokal reeey air aledor chckhy sairedy qokeedy chcthair okcheda ol lor kchees chol tchedy chdy saiin oor oreed aiin
sairedy qokal olcheeor chey odyeeedy qokey ches air kshesy aiin qotchy qokal shey odyedar otedy opeed ain qockhdaiin qol shol pchaiin

okol fchm sareor shor dar kchdy qotar qotar rey qotol otm olyeeody shey sshdy otd chedair lyeeedy qokeey lkeos
qokey ykdol ycheols chckhy okchom chair okaiin rcheeol shckheel olchom ol keain sheedy opchor orary oleeor chey aiin
lkaiin qotchol saired saiin otedy qotain qotar chckhoiin ofcheear ksy cheol cheey qoteeod sheeor dshaiin seos olkeey oror

chody chedy okchees sheol dsheeey alyo aiin qokchair qokchy qokedy okain ydair dam ypchedam tsheeey okchedy shedy aiin chey okeear chey aiin
dykod otshdy pd chey aiin ykchaiir lsedar y chcthdy cheey shedy qokar chdaiin chckhey chol ctheeedy ysha am
tsheedal okeain ain dain dched okeedy chaiin ytchedy qokeedy olcheedaiin or keeey aiin odyail qocthedy yshaiir al

qokol otain dar ycheedar keed ssheedy saleeody al qokshedy olkeedy qofcheedal dshar dar pcheey qokeey qotedy cphor tcheeeody ain
otshdy qokeedy yksaiin olkain chckheedy chor chdy tchedar ykeeol aiiinear qofcheedal ches olsheol otal okaiin oteedy kory otcheey qokaiin qokaiin shedy
cho raly ykcheey qokedy dchain tcheeey shy oledal ar qolchedy kcheedy qotedy sar ain oteedy oeos

sshdy olchary oiinaim qockhey lkain qokain odedam okedy al shedy oched dchol cthedol raiin shedal chey keo qokaiin qoko
qoar dshair saiin cheed qokeey otedy solko opchy qos lo opchey shey oaly okal olkeeey yaiin
chcphedy oteedy ram yteeos lkchail yeeoy ychor sheody shedy otain qofcher chedy ykcheor lses qoks saledaiin qokain olkaiin qokaiin otedy

okeeody ar otal cthdy chol ockheedaiin solkeedy octheol sheey otaiin dar opchdol ros shedy cthaiin qokeeedy sheedy yeeey ol
shody oted cpho fchedain qotched dy aiiraim lkor sody chedy yshedal y cthear ctheey shol shey opchiir alyedy
air dy chor shedy al daiin ain osain qokchdy qokchdy ykody lseody saiin cheol schdy daiin dytee alan areo lkaiin lched

shedar qoty qokeedy lsheed qokeey aiin chey shey reedaiin solkoly qokain lkaiin alsairy yteeey qotchedy dar qoky ycheod qokchy alyol
aiiineody otsheor solos dshdy ykchsy otedy qokeey lteo osais aiin chey ras qoteeol chdy okey shoiin sorey
soleor ocheaiin dshes ol lyed tsheeey ychaiin dolol dy yor dal okal resy lcheedam shedy raly aredaiin ychd shar qokchedy chedy

cheey shey olkol qokain cheedaiin saiin or chctheeedy qokeeedy olkeeedy olchey qoteey lkaiin ol oty keeam ctheor ol qokeol qotshaiin opchom dar
lcheeoy oleedaiin lseeo salg yshed shckheam ykaiin chey reod olkal otoiin ssheedal kedy dedy oteedy cheey ain qokeey dar
qoor tchar olchaiiin qofchaim lkeeey qokedy ytear aiin taiin qoeor dy ofchdy qoeeody kar qotaiin ol opchy ar

okaiin lseody chckhey chedy ar saiin aledar qokain otaiin qokeol dam chdy chey qochol oteedy qoteed ofchee y olkeey chedy
lsedol oeedy qotain cheey rar peeedy daryeey olchal odair ody lkan cher lkchod am orchdaiin cheol omo dar
qotchy olkeedy olchoiin cheey ykaiin qokshedam otaiin okair okcheds kdor shdam qol qockhdy dytes kedam okeey dar

okals otain qotoiin qofcheor lkm chckhoiin saiin ar opcheeedy lky okeedy chedy qokey shedy lky dar oteey ol chcfhdy dar

raiin oseam dshs okchedam
yaiin opcham ain olkor shedy shaiin
ain kshdy qokar solkd olkar ytg redam sain qokedy qokeey chedy qoteedy otedy soley ssheey lsaiir shey
lkaiin oiindar qokal ar lcheos lkdar cheey raiin chor qotedam chey qochey cheey ykoy aiin dal rched olkaiin chedy

sshm or qoeedy qol dykaiin sain raly cthed lkol shar otear daiin arear qokaiin ltdain olkchdy or
qeos opchy olchy shedy oedy ctheos chctheeey aiin okchy ypcheor aiin shedy kchedaiiin otdar qotal olkal lsais ol qopam ar

qotedam qokey shedy chor shedy oky chedy qopeedaiin dar lchor kshy oledy ofchdar sheol cthor otchey aiin oseeeody aiin

qokchey ckheos qopcheeody lshedair olchl odyeeey lchaiin qol chey kair lkeeey ckhd soleeedy qorol qopchaiir qochod ol qokey ol

qokal olais kaiin okchary qoain qopchair dain lkchair okaiin qokain okaiin odo qol tshesy dar lkdar ychal sheey yshdal seom chedy

lcheedal shedy dar shckhy aiin ctheal ykedain chckhear lky otchedam ocheedal qoedal shedy okedy olkeedy sheedy chey sar salair

rshor tedal chedy qoky lshdaiin lyor teeaiin ytg ykair daleor ofchaly sheol olkal lsan shedy ol

okar chol shedy ral solkeedaiin qokey keeos otedy dair olaiiin yshain daror chey shy chedal kaly

soledy olkedy qokedy aiin pcheor ykchaiin qokeey chey shedy ypchear qokaiin otaiin reeor qoky qopain dain otshey olkeedy shckhdaiin fchy qokaiin y
chckhey qotees ckheol otal chckhy oteeedy kor dy chedy al qokeedy olky lshal ksheol dchedy oteedy odey qokeey soredy oredal aiin
ochaim qokar qoteos oty y okaiin dar shedaiin ar daiin okeeor cthor qockho shol ltaiin solail qokedy fchy aror

shody qokain alal cheey aiin schaiin daiin aiin ory okeedy or qokedy qotar chdy sshdy opchey chor qotais yshdar shol chcthor
dykeody qoleor okeey shedy odedam tees lsaiiin qotchol qotal oty qotedy ol aiirom lteeody chedy otal qokedy aiin lcheeey qotcho

qolain schal ain okeey qotaiin sheol redar lkcheees pchol olkedy ycheed lkdar rdain cheol cthol doleeor or kchaiir qotchain
lshaiiin lchedam olkd chckhey okeesy otedy aloiin qokeeedy kaiin daiin cheey shey soldal opchy lsin shedy sheey cheol

cthdal qokchy keeol saiin otchdy otain sheey otaiin rey qoty ar tes odyar lchedam qokchy qotal olshor oeo qokeedy am

ofeeol ches qokeey or odary qokain qokchey qokchey odyedy odedam sheol dy solkeeo qotain lchor opchsdy okshedol olkaiin aiin

otshey tol ldy qokchey ytaiiin cheedar leos ol otal olshed qotal lyaim ykches chaiis aiin ykchor

dchor shedy tsheaiin okeod qokaiin oteedy sham shedy chedy qokeedy ytedor ytody dam chedy cthaiin ockhedaiin odyas aledal qokeey am

qeol okchol daldy soredy qokchdy chedy shckheey qopchm chd chedy qokaiin tor shedy ytd dar

ctheey dal alg shey qokain dy orain lseeey yteeod ltaiir chey qotcheor redy kd ytcheey schal reeos ain

dar chor ches ypcheor olchody dshiin opain qokal ypchedy cthaiin olydy leol ytal sheey ychaiiin ol

or qotal qored chor tey qotsheeol lteedy cheey ar saiin chor qopo ary lkcheol lor tchol qol olkar olsheeey ol

qoky okeear cpheeol or saireol qokchy dy or qopcheedaiin sheeeody ral dam sheeos ches olchedaiin aiin qopchody cheol

qokeey chedy sareey aiin shey chcthed qorear okeedy tsheaiin olshos aiin daiin lkaiin lkcham char qokaiin ykeeody otain dar
cthaiin dalyaiin ykchedol cheos dam daledy doldy shol cheod omor lko cheedy ykail qokchedy qokedy osaiin

dareal kchr reedy dchor qokain olkeey okedy shedy tor chary sheedy qotaiin olkaiin or otal ol oched saleain ol

okchedam osals opedy ypchedair qotedy ol yeo shedy shckhee qokeedy am otaiin odaim sales qoky olees okaiin aiin oles aiin qokar dordaiin qol
lchdair daiin okeed oror qotain kchaiiin aiin cthedar redar chdaiin ypchdal otar qol opcholy qol olkeedy otaiin olkain
