dykeol lkain ckheees okol pain dar qokchey ytaiir olkchedy lshy peeey air qokeey qokaiin otm to shckhy kal okchy qokchedy dar
cheey pal cpheody opal qofchor qokeey okedy orydy oly soredam chedy ocheaiin chedy ypchdy okal chdy otey qokedy olkal shor qotedy okeey aiin
oteey ycheeey qoctheos shar aiirey lkeedain ochod lkain otody dar shody okain shey daiin sairdy qoteey okaiin raiin kchg qokchedy chedy

lcheer chedy olydair osar shedy chey al olysdy chedy qokeedy sheol keol cthor tsheeey qotchm solkeed ain okeedy qoty tdy okeey y
qoled ctheeey otd chol kchedy dolory kaiin cheol daiin daled tchdol keod ol okcheeaiin olsheol qokal ofcheedy shey qotar y
qokar kal shedy lkees qopchdair qofcheaiin chedy qoleody shody qokain qoeody cheey olshais yts shdol shey chctheeedy

otol pear chcthedaiin ol salan al ykchain pchedaiin shdy dal sheey aiin yshal ltaiin lkain salody okshaiin dalm qokar al
qotal alok shedy olkain lkaiin okshes sheeos odyedor ar okal qol aryaiin pchees dar okal solkd otshed
dchor yshedaiin olcheeody shey cphdy olkain aiirail olkchedy shedy oror qockheedy qol okal otar y cthdaly lchedy qokal ykdain aiin

daiin qokain ctheesy shes odeedy ol sheody kaiin osedaiin ol lcheeoy ar lyed oltain chctheeo oleam teos daiin cheey cheol
aiin ycheees cheey okain okeedy shan soledy qockheor qoksheey aiin qokaiin qodal qockhedy teeeo kees or
qorol qokeedy odyail olkchedy shes chas chs chey ain qokeey okeey chedy kchedam daiin ytchedy chey y dal chor cheol

sheody aiin qokeey yeor cheol okchor kcheeo otedy ol qoldy dleeol chckhsd oksheed ardam shdaiin ola darm otaiin chdy
saiin okshar ain ockhedor ychody odyan pchain qokeedy yshaiin qofcheedal dar qokeey olkeear otchy oleeedy qokar ol shedy
qoksheeor lshal qolear sheol ar ycheedaiin qokar y daiin arol shedar ycheey otal olshedy qokey chedal shes qokedy qokaiin or

oltor chctheor ytcheeod chdy oteedy key kedam lkeey lo otal oksy chckhdy
lkaly okcheeaiin olcheoly sheeor okal ol tol chedy okaiin olkain okaiin soror sain ykeedy ychy yshair lkan shedy
sheedaiin otsheal qofcheol qokar kedam okeedaiin keeedy sar chey qokchedy ychaiin olkal opeody cheedy tdy olseeaiin sho

dar qokal chey reeal ycheod tshdy ream saleeam qokcheor oteos ockhar lsheeam opo raiin sod cheor qoky shedal soleody
olkey ltes orcheor olcheain shckhy kdy dal om olary qokeedy reeey qocthedy dardy ofeeol ol cheey otedy chey otchedy qokedy okchdal
qotol pedy shol oded qoky otedy or opcheeol qokeedy cheol olchos opor shedy qokaiin chedy yshedain ykd saloy olchar lkod

ykchaiin cthl qol otey raiin daiin sar chedy dykeol saiin aiin qopchair shcthaiin arom fcham ykal ol
chey qotchol shckheeol cpheeam yched ychd dair qol daiin lfcho qokeey qoteeey qokchedy ar ody ypchor osy aloiin aiin
yeos osor okchdy octhdy kes qokaiin tdar qokar al qokal or otcheeody dar saiin lsdain olchdam ycheees chdy

opcheeedy shedy or olyeeody alsd chdy deeod ar okeedy ctheeedy oteey res qotedy kchsaiin ain oky saled daiin aiin
yaim aiiinaim okar yeaiin dshy reedy dal ol or ykcheol qokshain teeody qokain arair qokeey qokaiin taiin chckhey or
lcheedal olal shal ykoiin aiin or olkedy char lked cthdy dchair yshol shedy qopchdar shedy opchedor olcheod aiin

dleo chdy dy daredam aiireeedy keam qokain sain leos cthaly qockhey ctheol otchee solcheody ytoly ol
qoky olkain qokchy opchdal lcheos cthar aiin ykchedy dchol qokeedy okeeo shol cheeor dar ychd qolked qokeedy qokaiin chedy
otshdair dykedy yteeos reedy dar qokeeedy qokeeedy or qolkor lchor ksheor cheey sals qol olkedy chdy

chdy qotar qokchdy y qokal olody olchd shedy qotedy dal lkeey cthedy tchl dsham qokaiin olchar qorair qopam dar
shol reol qockhain sain chal pchedy okal ddy odyedain olchdar orary qopchedam oky reed chedy
odyoiin cheey otedy okshaiiin qochear shckheey olshair chey lkaiin solkeedy soreos daro qokeey otain lsaiin tam dar

qoty okshdam lkeody qockhdar tes peor cthey ssheey chckheod chey chedair ol ssheedy ykody y ytchedy
raiin shor shedy qokar shedy shckhey chey okary qokain qokaiin pchor oo olkeey chey lteeeo oleedy qokaiin aiin
daryeey chedy qotal lchor qotal odys okedy qotchol ockhdy dal shckhain qokeedy kchdair sain keain qol lkaiir aiin oredy

okey chedy olydy lody re am kdy dy soleo qokal ykchdy soredam cheey qokedy oredy tedaiin aiin
ocheedal chedy qokar ol ykeees aiin dal otey ycheeeody old chdy soiineody lkaiin ol otcheeo opain chdy chey daryeey dar
oksheeal lkchaiiin okchedy cheeody ychees solkeedy olyaiin tchan shedy lsedar redal ym ytedy chcthais ar qokeedy qokaiin y

dleedain shey dykdy otar kaiir keain okeey ar orm yeos laiin ykchedaiin sheol qokain ke shedy lsr qokol okain dar
reedam laiin otchaiin soiineody qokchy qotal qotaly shckhy qokchedy chols opaiin ypchedy ockhes shey oteey okedy dar otal ytchedy
otal sheedy leor cthain qoty kaiin opcham chol lchor qokaiin chckheedaiin qokeey ycheeor ychoiin chckheeey shody pol

qokeey okain olkchdy otedy okaiin sheedar chal okaiin dshes sheos dy cheedy chckhy saiin ol saredy okal lkedy

ofcheedain tg chckhedaiin am okeedy ykedam
lchaiin olyedaiin air ykdy
solcheody lsdar yshaly saiin qokeey aiin schol ol okal am qopcho olseda air dal okaiin dar qokchy keey olyam aiin
qokchaim oltee kdain dar yshdy cheedy qoteol daiin shckhy chedy qopcheeey otchedy shedy rr redor ols lcheedam qoteol
ychey oteedy otain oreol saiin chody okedy ltes qokeey okain re shedy ckhaly olkal qokedam dcheey kchees y

cheesy ol aiiredam qokam okr qotchol ltedar dchor soldy sorair chol saiin qokain otedy tshedy qokeedy shckhy otchedy ycheol
ckhar qofchdy aleeos olshg olcheees orchain otchey qokain odyeedy chey ain dam ypchedy aryo sched okcheeey dar
lkaiin qokchedy ches qoeeey or cpheeam keos olya shedy qaiin opchols qotain chckhd cheedy aiin qokeey y saredy sheol yer kaly

lko lcher chedy qokal choy shedy cheol aiiraiir otchedy chedy qoes chsd ar qokeedy qotar ksaiin ykchdy chckhy orcheeol chckhal yey
schair cheey solkedor ykol qokeedy lseeody dshedair chdy otchdy dsheedaiin okal shair opeedy oksheedy cheol
qokshey tary qoteedy ain qoky dchair chckhy otaiin chol aredy chor ksdy ar daiin yksy qol dy olkeedy shd ydar

opcheos qokedy ar qokeedy cheol dyked qokar ockheedain dain cpher dar qokeey lkaim led qopchedy shd okedy rdam ol
okedy solkdain dar cphedy dain sheey cheeey qokchedy lchedy sheody ar dy oraiin ytar fchor lchair sain qokar shey osor
lkaiin alyedy qockhaiin ochor otal chey fchaim okeedy dar dsheeey solkdaly lcheos qopchedar lkcheeody ychdain odyeeor chdy

oleeody dar chey shckhy riin fcheol scheeo rdaiin qoty yshain lkor otshaiin ykchdain chdy qokaiin odm daiin al
qolkdar yshes kiir qokeedy rar solm dykair qoky odyeedy otar chdy tees chedy oteedy y oran cheols qokchy qoteol
otchy otedy fcheod ches qoky lkchal chckhy olyom ar qoteey aiin dalyeeor shdaly oteey qokain ltedol daly tdy dal y

oltdair pcheol qokal shcthaiin qoky ofched qokeedy qokey chedy chctheody reol okchail odys scheos qockhain cphiir qoted
otain kches otody lchedy oky chdaiin ykchaim otar shdam saredy olydy tar otedy qoteedy lsary qokaiin ain
lkaiin okchedy ches qokar fcheos otey dar okeedy qokeey qokain y opchear solar ckhoiin qockhedam ykchdal yshedar olchs chedy olkchy sshdy ol

oaiin ykchedaiiin otain chdy ctheeey ain qokar shey al pd qoky raiiin redy octhory olsheear shedy qokaiin taiin aram am
ctheos lcheeey qotcheor aiin qoky oks olkedy reedar or okcholy ytdaiin ykchor lkain opesy ytdor ycheeedy
olkeedy shey qokey keeody kes qordy qokain scheey lkaiin cheod okaiin oledy qokar chol okchy otchy qotedam sheol shckheol sheey qokaim

ofchdair keeody aiin qotchy olydar ypched odedam or cheey char shol am leol qoky qoksheol qopcheor aiin
qokain okcheees y okchar qol oky ar qokey ol lcheaiin qooy shedy ol daiin ochdair cheeos qotedy lkor qokary y
lse aiin lchor qol qoky reeey reey dy or okal otaiin qokeedy al chol otal oteody pos chey shedy ain

qokal ain shcthdy lkchody qol lshar otaiin tedam ol opcheeey rdaiin okchedam daiin qokchey chol okedy qoair okar aiin sorees y
ledy olyy sheol chail okchedy dar qotedar qokeedy ykody olshl ycheol dal tsheeoy kaiin oty oty or olkeedy daain olkeedy shdaly qokedy
lses scheos olkeedy shckhy qokchedy lshl cheod tshor opcheeedy qokchdy okchdy qood okal solchaiin ykchedy odyedaiin odaim

cphs shedy otshaim oshair shckhed tsheeoy ar ypchedy okchy ykal aiin lkaiin lcheaiin shedy lseeey chckhes shedy
chedy okedy qofchedam cthed okcheols oledair dareor dalm aiin qoksho chg ol cthey sain or olym
aiin qed otedy saredy cheey qopchaly qokedy ody shol shedy qotchey or qokaiin sheey kor okchey shal kesy qotaly okal qokedy

dadar ody lcheedal chedy shol odar ssheain cheol qokal kaiin tcheeam lkchdor oloiin odeody pedain lseees shey
shol shey shckhy oiiney okeedy dar sain reees al kchedor ckhor ctheod oled otal qoks okshsdy dar qokal aiin
shckhy qotchol qokal ol otal raiin qokeey qokain lchedy qokaiin sheol chckheedaiin shedy olkaiin qoteeo ykeedaiin roiin pched kcheor

qockhey cheey qokedy chey odyeedar dar scheaiin olcheeeody tdy otaiin sorol okey chedy qokeedy oteey reesy tshdy chedair y
sheey tair rchy ytd oeos scheol chedy qopchey chey ain daiin otal cham aredy qokeedy osedy qoty old olyedy
ocheer ar opcheos daiin ordy otar qokain odaiin osaiir ltody dar shctheeedy qopy ytdaly oty chedy saiin aiin

qolkedam keeey air lol ofcho pol oky qokedy otedor chedy okeedy ytchor daiin air shedy okey lshoiin opchain
ctheo oltaiiin chedy otal sairdy qockho dal solke keey lcheaiin qotedy or otcheos ytedar qolkair qokeedy ykedor qol
dchedy qopr qochedy otal aiin oltaiir qotcho al lkain she qopol orar aiin daiin ain okal soledam olkeey ardar okchoiin ar

lair sar otchedy qokedy opchaiin ychedair okchy shedy qokain lkeeedy lshoiiin pey ykar dar dy qockhedy opchoiin chaiin okeedy olshaiis chdy
lcheeedy opcheey daiin dalyaly qokeey chckhy okal olkal reed okchol ykcheedaiin chedy sheey soror ar qokal qog qotchy chedy sheol air
oded daiin aror yer dar okal cheol lchedaiiin sheedy lsal oteedaiin qokal sheod chckhy daiin olkchy qokchedy salor otaiin pchdy otey or

daraly oty lkcheeod oty alar arair dykdal yches qofchedy okal cheed arm shes dain reeey lcheedam shedy ols air
qokair ykchaiir oiindar lyaiin qopcheody qol dorey ol pcheos dcheal qopcholy chedal sar tm dchy ain
cheeod qokedy otoly shedy tshedy opchy lkchar qoky ykeedy otaiin kdar olyam qokeedy lkchar chedy dardy dsheeor ain

kal chedy lpchm areo otedy ksheedy chdy chdaly otshey chdy chsaiin okdy qolky al
yaiin dain qokaiin or qokey yteod qokaiin fcham sheey saleody dair qoteey shey chody ched dareey opchaiin olkey aiin lchain
lcheeedy dam olkol olkdal kchees aiin cheedy kols pedy qokal lkeol otal shcthor cheeod lteed ydy ol kshail yshdy sheody sheey aiin

qoty odydy oshedy ydar qotes okeey ar qokchy okchor schedam sheol daldy soled daiin araiin okedy tor lchear
aiin dain chor lshod lkdy shar qokedy otaiin rchair ty sheedy pchees olshdy dam soleey cthaiin dcheody chdy qokchy qokchy salair
chedy olkedy chedol soledy dain qotchy ykaiiin odyody qosy dar daiin dam qosdy chedol reeey chedy

ykchaiin qokaiin olkain qopcheoy ol okedy qocthedy to qokar olchedal dar okal shedy oteey qoes dalyaiin cphsaiin ychdal
qolkaiin tey ol lkain dar olkal qokal aiin ocheos qopeor otar ks shd chor odyeor opchees air teain aiin
chey rody chedy lchdair okal oto shckhy otchedy cheain reeeo chedy yor qokeey chdal okeey solair orchiir otedy qol

cheey lsy olkain qotaiin qokaiin chedy dched tam ykos qol chy odeol qokey or shey scheols kor sheol dam aiin
ykchedam qokeey aiin qokal lkaiin qoched olkey qoair lcheeedy opcheedaiin dar okeey ytain qokedaiin dar chey am dal qokaiin chedy
darod aiiinedy olsalsy ltes ym qoedol chey olcheeey shckhy saled aror lchaiin dcheedy qokedy qofcheeedy td aiin

ofeeol chol daiin odair ypchaiin opchaim qokey olcheols lchedy olyam dar qol schady aiin cthaly okchey qokeedy ain okchees chedy
daedy qokeedy daiin y shedy chor shey yedy daiin sairor chdy daiin aiin ykan lchedy qokey y saledal lsas dshy lchedy
qokar lteeo pcheedy chckhees chedy opchedy saiin ol qockhdy chdy olkedy olshg saleedy olaiin saiin leeedy dain pchain

chedor qotedy teeam qoteedaiin saleos qopchm shol chcpheo aiin kshedy qockhedam shedy ys cheeeody chy dar
otchey odyeedy qokeey dar chey olkchedy qoedal ychaiin shcthor qoeed oky ar qokeedy olkaiin ycha ar qokeey otaiin ltes y yeos
okar shoiin lkcho ksheody chdy ledar oldam okok tchdy dy chey am olkar chedy shor y kedal ykol qokaiin chedy

ody lseod qokeeedy shedy qockhedy dy qotedain qedam keees opcheol aiireds qotaly dykor shedy qokain osais ltail aiin
dchey qokeedy ol saiin qokaiin olkeedy or qokey ycheol yeeoy cheel qokain soldy cheol chcthedar qopaiin ar osheos sheol qokaiin ar
ocher oles aiin shol chol okal shedy qokeedy olaim qokar yto daiin chckhy qokshaly tdaiin chdy cphdy ain chey y

ctheol dam kdain dar lcher chedal saleel opor yshdol qokedy lain shaiir lchor okeedy qokaiin chedy
qoky oleear qokal reed oty shey tdal yshey olteedam saley qokeedy qol ol daiin lchor okeedy dalyo okey y
seol okeedy ol saro syeesy qokedy shoiin chor aiin ody okey chckhy opcham chol tedam lkody y tchees dar

lshr lkchody lshaiin qokar dar ytchan ol cphg dar tchesy alyedy qolkeos sheol qokeol otedol shedy soiinedam
areedy chdy solchg dar saiin or qokchy chedy dam odain sheody dar tee ody okeedy olyedam saredy otal okal chedy
chedy otshdy lcheol ykchaiir ytdaiin opchedy qoteey qoteey olkeod okeey qokedy aiiinor lkedaiin qokeedy chckhedal shckhy qokchedy otedy qockhaim

lchor kshdy cheol saiin dykm solor qeody aiin qokeey or osheam salan shs otol opol okal schedy
chckhd kody okdaiiin lkchdaiin pcheal kched oddar soreedain qokedaiin chols oted aiiry dar
dleey aledal raiin lkchl ypchdy or dain cheey ain oeor okeedy chedy shiiin ol qokeedy shol raiin doley otal otal dar

ykor qokey shedy olkedy shedy olkd ol dardy saiin odyeedy sheey qokeedy qol qokeedy tedy shol ychaly qokey chckhal oddar
qokshear qopchaiin octhl qokeedy qol tsheeey qokedy lss shcthod lchedam daiin qokeey shedy dyteeor sheain cheey qodal okchey qokchey chom pcheos
lcheedal ar lor okeey kshear qotar lshdal shckhed tchedol aiin oteey ain qokar shedy cphes shey ol opchy dar

am alyeody rody doleedy oledor or opchedy shckheal odyeeor lcher choiin chedy qokchaiin qoteey qoky chedaiin qokaiin al
qokdam ar qokey aiin schees chedy daleor chees sheol solkaiin qokal dar shedy okal dshody lseod raiin aledor qockhdy dam solm
chy ol osam dsheedar ychy reedy daiin chol otedy lkaiin lkchoiin cheeo solain ytedair qoty dshy odeos

lkain shedy sain lseear chdy otey shedy sshdaly kaiin chey olkeedy oleeody oksheedar shey daldy qoky salal qokeey qokedy
qokshdar qopeeey qokchedy oles odyeeal dols lsar lteedy tchdy qoteey lchedy cheed ycheeor qotedaiin teol shol lkdar
ar shey al qokeey chedy orcheo cheees cheey aiin qokal dar kedam ypcham okeedy olody shedy qoky ycheod oteey raiin

shol aiin shsd dar sedy daiin aredy cheey shey chcthar dar okedy qokchedy ychor oky aiin kshair shol soley
lsedol qotal ain otcheeey al opchor qolcheom shedy chey otchedy qokedy oleedy ol ar sheody tchey qokchy olchdy
ocheaiin oledar chedy yshedar lseeor saiin ytdam qokar ykeeol aiiredar okshesy aiin lked qopeedy dsheed qokaly okeey oredy

qokeedy olsheeo qolkee aiin lkear okar ykeeey ros ykeeey reeal kedam pchaly qokar olcheor
dal chedy cthdain odyeedy qokaiin shes sar odydam qoky reeey reed shey qokair ledam olkeey okedy kedam ypchy qol
dchedy ysheeedy okar olchdaiin otchain oteey odeos led okaiin olkain oky qoeedy tsheedal dsheeeo olchod

lkaiin sheed dar qokches sheeal kor qoky ols sheey solks dal ol olkeedy chckhedair odeeor or dalyeos saiin qoked
qokal sholy rsd saleeedy lkeos kcheam reor solkiin sheedy ar okeey qokaiin ain qockheor ol otchy orchm ain
daleody oteey lko aiin sain chdy qol otaiin qoesy rody qoary ol opchy sheos qopchaiin sheey odyedol qokaiin cheol

okdol oles qokal ked qain dair chedy ksheed qokain olyedain lshdo chdy sory aiin aiin scham qopeol sshg kedam
okeey chedy daryeo dar kaiir okchedy ches chaiis lsoiiin oteol dair dareos chaiiin pod cthdy sheody olsheol lkaiin dar
qoky keey shor y qokal oddar okar okchedy ol dy dsheeam alam rear qokeey pcheos qoky chckheed olkeey ol orcheols qokedy ain

yeeoy chedy ody otchy keo qokeey qokaiin y olkey lkches chedy ysheesy al shol qotain reed raiin otchey qol okedy ar
soiinedy qokeedy or sol opchees qoeeos shom tey sain okeeo ykol ykches keeoy qol odor qotal qokedam
tsheedal qokedy qochair soiinor ykcheey pchdair shey dain otaiin olkeedy shdaiin qofchaim opchees okain otaiin araiin qoty ytaiir dar

al opcholy raiin y chey olkchedy dsheedy cheol solks qol shes or deol okeedy shedy okchaiin qokey reesy aror
odair shor okedol shr dleey lseeos otedy otaiin chedy qokey qoeeor aiin kshdy daiin qokeey or olkal qol
doledy opcheor olkchy dam chol ledy daiin qokaiin cheam okain otshaiin otal pdy qoteedy qokedy lchey y cthy aiin

lsiin pain saiin cthed otchey reeey dsheedam or oles saiin ykeeedy teeody okeedy qotedy qotaiin qokeol qokal ytedair chol
qoky chdaiin aiin lcheer chedy solol seeod sheol dar dleey shey dalydy okeey keear qokedy shckhy aiin sshdaly raiin chedy
ofeey cheol qokal soiiney teed aiin chdy okedy alyain okeedy lkchoiin qokear opchor okcheed qotaiir ales ol

okm rar chckhy opcheeol ain qokey chckhedair dsheeam qokchy chedy dal ltd sheey shedy pchor shar qokal qokedy dar
okar chedy otar aiin qoteedy ked solkeey lkeos olcheesy chdy leeedy qopeos ytchor lchaiin okcham aiin
sar qochedy okar ychedal redair lchedy or daryeal olees shdaiin areeol qokam chody qokedy chdol ltg qokal ykdar

oo lkaiin saledam odo qolkdy lsr tsheor chckheeey okshal lkor otal or tchdar or qotal shody paiin kchy y
qokal ol aiireor okar alody shedy shaiiin oryedy shckhy lkcheod ockhed chctheey or oty chedy yshar ral ol
dalyedy dain chal cheedy realy otain otedy lchedy qol shal qokchey ol aiireod ol pchair sheey ol daiin sheey aiin

chdy qokar air olkeedy lcheeoy ar daiin chedy qotal ytody lshd sheey chedy otar shedy okeedy ol cphod lteain or
qofchor lm dal lcho lkchol qokal ypcheody shedair qokal y sheol qokeey qotedy oeeedy scheeey lchedy qain dal otaiin dar
olteeoy dar cthdal lkain y saiin lchain qokeeedy soeol qol osr reedy lkain chal soreedy aiin lo qokeey otain aiin okchaiin

schaim aiiindy al otar lsey qokeey odeedy air chedy salaim chedaiiin qotain okedair cthair cphain dain okaiin dar
yeeoy dar qokeedy olchal lkaiin odyd saiin ckhdy dchair qokeedy chckhy qockhaiin kchedal qokedy shckhy ain opcham chedy daiin sheey otedy
chey aiin qotar chedy ol daiin oleed shol qokain dy qokaiin lkchr chey or qoteey lkedy chdy cthees oteedy redol alody lchedy opchees chckhy

dal reor chedy otchaiin qokey qol aiiinedaiin ckhedaiin ardy shckhdy lkos kedy chckham sheey chedy opchy qokedy

lshedol ytdol odyaiis kor okchey lchedy tchody shdy qofchor arain qokeey areeedy qoky otain opchy aiin
kcheeedy olyeed sheeal qokar cheod otshaly shor qol qokshedy tedar tchain solcheol qoteedy lkain shey qotchey dar ody aiin
qolkdar ysheeey orydar ykche otcho dar otchy solkeeeody sholy shey odyol qokeedy shdol shedy qokeey qokchy ykeeol opchy aiin

qokey ar oteedy lsody dar dy sorey lsaiir air lkdy or ypchom solkar ltedal ofchear qokees aiin
aiiraim daiin oddy oshain yshody lsdaiin lkol okol sheedy dshedol qokal shoiin al otal qokeor dalm chey chckhy
okedy oiinain ctheey qokar chdaiiin otedy ol qokaiin qokeedy or qokal okey oleedy ltedy qokal ltal pchedy ykcheesy qoom ardair

dal ral shol rar chckhy kchees dar oseeody shedy keeedy lkain ychaiir oksheeos raiin octhol shedaiin qokeedy kaiiin dar
qokeo cthaiin shor dar oeedy aldy cheey qotos aiin qokshdam ol koiin lkeey olkal shaiis dar sheey ared
cheedy shedy dleeol ar soly aiin qokar ain opchees chs qokedy oedy oteedy lshdar qokchey chedy ypcho okedy dar

chckhy kedam kshey cpheees y qokeedy dar ytd otsho ytody red laiin sshg salor qokeedy shckheear oly odaiin
lcheaiin cheols ychair opchor okcheedar shdo qotchey sham olsheeey ltesy solkedain chedy otshdy aloiin olseor
dar soiiney ood rdain ol kail qotchol ypchas aiin cphiir kedam schedam otar qotchdy qokeedy chdy cphol sheey qokaly

opchedam shedy olchoiin otshdar okeedy qoeeal yeos osoiiin qokain qoeeo qokeos okchy kor tchal lkcho daiin opcheol aiireeaiin shey
tod lke qokain aiin orain dleedain sheain qokeos dcho opais solky qopchedy leos y aiiined qokedy
qokar shedol qokchey yty qokaiin aiin lchedy oaiin saiin okaiin qokeedy olchdaiiin y qokeedy aiiinaiin lkaiin qochedy aiiraim opcheeo sheey shoiin daiireor

oty tdy aiiinaly chey qotchol lkod ches olchar qokain pcheeedy sheol opchaly tedor okeeody oteedy lseody
chey odyes qokain ycheeey okchedy chsaiin qokedy shedal olshr por dchdam okeeos dar otal ol shckhy solkeed qokaiin ol
soldy chey qokchedy ar lkeey am qotdaiin sheols cpheor areey otchdair las qoeedy olyeos daiin qokchey ytdy

qokar ytsdy cheeody shey saiin ol qotain olyaiin daiin saledain chdy lkaiin qochol olky solkar qokaly
soleos qotal ytar lteedaiin dar qotaiin odaiin ykeod shor chedy teeo solkal aiin keedy shedy cpheey ol qokeedy dareol
dlee oleedaiin qotal or okchain daiin shol lshiir opchedy teol ykchaiin dalydy ytedar keey rchor qokeey otaiin qol

okey ar opcheor lody air ytes cheor al olchal keeal ytedair rody dolaiin toly ol
ochor shcthdar ardy qokeey soraly sarod ol otal arear qopchaiin cheeody qokedy chctheeody chedy cpheees aiin oteey ol
chd qoedol shctheos olkey dar tcheeos chedy cthdy aiin lchail oiinm rd chan qokaiin aledy qoked qopeeody chdy

dar ykcheesy ol opchedam dair lcheody lkain shedy lchey chaiin olches chey otoiin ol chey aiin soleol
olkar qol qokal ol qokeey tshdy alaiis shd dar cpho oteedy okeey ltes ain lkeols qokain qol qoteedy cheey ytd oedam
lsg qotain kar ol cheedy saleedaiin olor dal okol opdal opcholy redal otedy qoky redal cheol

oty ckheedy dykdy oteedy qotchy yches keeedy qokeey ychy olkeedy cheol lkar chair cthain qokedy oky qopchain cphaiin dal chor air
olteaiin qoeees cheeal lkchar otaiin tchaiin lkeeo okeesy olchdor shedy orchedol qokedy odyeedy qoteey lses saly cheol
okedaiiin pedy saiin ypched daiin odyal teor kshedar olkdair shol chedy sheesy oreeol y cheey shey aiiinaiin opcheeos aiin

laiin olkedy ykeod solkar rchdaiin ain dchair dar qokeey chedy cheeos oleedaiin shedor ky ol
sar shedy opchr qotchedy kain chcthedy ar qokal qolor ykcheeey dshdol otain lchaly shey olyeeey al otar shedy dain lcheor shsy or
aiiinaiin dy qokee lsedy schor ql tched qokaiin fchy qokaiin chdy shedy dam lkey oteedy lkchody ykam qol

okeey olkain oteedy lkol qockhdar qopchedol okain otedy cheey ar saiin ypchedam lchor redor chedy olky qokeedy kair ytchees olchsdy or
olkedy shedy shckhy okd oeeedy air laiin opchy ltaiin opchor olshedam ytchor kcheeo ain qopchdol lchedy ctheedaiin aiin
cheey qoes ol areey ytom chdam qokeedy ytdar scheal dy scheol qokal ardam okshed dolory oteedy qol yail shey ol daaly

ol oryo orear yshedor alod qokaiin lsedol shedy qol cheey koly res aiin qokeedy dar redal pchedy ypchedair ain
osaiin qockhedy shol chdy dair olsaiin opchor lkaiin lcheeoy qotedy okdam chod dair shar tchair opchedaiin qoody olky dar lkedaiin cheol
kchdair daiin olkedy ral osdal dareody qolkeedy aiin sardy olyesy ar okar all aiin teeody dar ykches ain

aireeol lsheedaiin otal sheod shedy laiin syedy opchees qotedy qokal shal paiiin rar qotedy oky qopchedy lkam qol
shol aiin scheoly chs otal rdol ain okal ochey qoteey fchedam dair daley scheol lkeo ol qokaiin dar qokeedy yshaiin
dareor shckhdal sheol okaly qokal ochm qokaiin qokaiin qol daldy dy olkeey sheedy ltiin qotain kedor saliiin ar oteey soraiin

qoeos qopeol shedy dal qokaiin qoeees aiin opchedal arair opchal al kshaiin dam olseol shar qokain chckhy qopcheedy or
scheor shor shedy qockho qokaiin opeos kear ctheey dain ockhaiin schedaiin qopcheeedy orm sheol lkcha chckhy
chor qotals opedy shedy tsher ckhal leeol qokeedy redy qokain dam lsdo aiin soleeo alos chedy teedy qol

lkaiin chedy sheol ochair otar shedy solear okeedy ytdy dy odedam oteedy dal am qolaiin qokal chedy oky tor oey
ykchol okaiin olkain chedy seol sheol shedy olyol oledar air kam keeam olkain ol teeody aldy daiin qoteey cheod ain
shol ytedol yeeol opchaly sheody or qokeedy okaiin qoeor daiin qokaiin cheeeody ykedar shaiir dar cpheeedy cheey chedy

ocher chedy qockhaly qokal qoky dar qokeedy lcheedal lchedy otaiin qokedy yshaiin yaiiin ain daiin lkaiin qotdal qokeey lkear shedy qokal shckhdam ar okcheos
shedy fchar qokm dy shedy ytd redal oledair ol qokeey dar qokches ol chedy soiindair qokair
oraiin oseds chedy solan aiin shal aiin yshed cthaiin otey okdaiin cphaim olkchy kchaly qain daiin ain

sheeoy qoteeam lchedy opcham oleeey alyey otshedam qockheedy okan pcho ar chcthar ols daredy soiinor okaiin ol
chedy olkal or chcthaiir shedy ol qokeedy qokeey cheeos chs ydar soled qokeedy dar qotd qokal ytedal cheesy saiin or
okeey dar qokchdy lchedy dair qody opchy oloiin ody ocheody raiiin oiinedy dardy y pchdy olyeeedy olkaiin chdy

olkchy okain ol oteedy otshdal lchor shcthey chedy shol pchaiin lydy lsheedy or chdaiiin chdy pchy chdy qokchey okedair saiin chdy
dchedy sheol opchaim dain olar kshedy okeedy lcheeedy qoteedy sheol chy odaiin dardal ypchdy olkeey qoky qopeos kchm
chcphaim kaiiin otchedy qoeoly rd chedy qokeey qokod sed opchor qol qotal chol oty qokeedy okeeos lchedy cthes or

ain cheol qokchory dar tom redaiin cheeody ar lkaiir y chey qokchedy ol okchdy qolchaiin okcheeos aiin dain shey
lchor chcthedaiin dar shey tsher dar shal qol qokam yteor dair cheey okshdain shedy qokair dar ytchedy ockhedor sheeam cphm or
chedy sairor sareedy dar ory saldy daiin shal reeor chey ol qopcheedaiin qokedy chctheal ro qol oteedy lcho y dain qotedy

sydy par sheey al qokchy ycheal cheedy keeey shedy okshdol chckheedaiin chckhy olkeey qokaiin chedy qokal qokal chedy lkaiin alg otchy shey ol
lkor dykeeor ytedol qokeedain odyeeo qol ossaiin pain char qokedy ytd air daor chedy chdy dchdar sheol otaiin aiin
araiin ypchaiiin alyain cthy qokain ain ksheal lkaiin lchain qokeey soleos qokeedy qokaiin cheedar dar dal qokeeedy cheol kchaiin ssheeam shedy ol

lcheer shedor lchedy rchdar qokeal dar okal odee odyeeod chol otsheedy cheeo odyiiin shckhear oteedy otaiin al
oky chedy olkeedy tsheey sheody shey ody qotchy otedy ol cheedy otedy tshor olkeey pched ody lky oteedy dar olkaiin otaiin shey
ocher chedy schiir ychair qokeedy ody dam chor chdaly al le oks kor qokeey otedy sheeody kedal dar olkeedy okaiin aiin

okey shedy okeees ychdal shor dar cheey lshdaiin leeedy dain odol chey ocheedal olshey lchaiin oty dchey okal qokal qoy ardy
otar y dain or qokal sairdy dar rshdy qokal kedar qoky okeeo ocheeoy shedy otain air olkar chcthed dam qokeeedy qol sar qokain ysheol
shckhy aiin qokchor yshg kair oddaiin shedy qokeey qokaiin ykear qokol opey ytchees kr al dam okeey ain ytchedar ar otaiin olkaiin shedy

qokey kedy opchaiiin qopcheeol cheedy chedair dalyod dar dair kedy qockhear cheedy olshes olcheeod qokeedy dar ksheeo peeor chdy
chor raiin okaiin sheedy reody otchy choiin qokaiin olshedol kol lchee qokeedy lsedair odys leol cphaiin cpheod chedy
dshsd oleeos qokeedy ytm qokeey lseees otaiin olcheam shedy oksheedy lchor qokar qodair lkr olkain tchaiin

qockhdy chedy dal qokedy ytsd okeeody dar qokeedy qokal chdy soreey or tor sdal shckhy oiiney dcheor ol otchy opchol
otey chedy daraim okey lsear qokeey ltes or oleeos olshedy opchedam otaiin odear lcheeoy qotedy shdain cheol
chey chedy chcthaiin qokeedy olody salor oty cheeor chey qochear daiin ral sain or tsheeey redain qolkair qokchy opchdar

soiindy chedy opcheor or qokey dar chor chedy yshes qol qotchy oloiin sheey dar shody otaly daiin okaiin al qoteey or sain or
char qooiin ckheesy saiin chdy daldy dal lteor qokshdy chees sham shey lor qockhedy
olchsdy lshdam orchdair cpheod aleedy pcho qokey kol opcha okes chol pcheeol shdo ol qeol

lchedy shol qoeedaiin otedy yeor qokaiin y sain dar rar ltdor qokar ain cpheody aiin qockhear
qofcheeoy oleam ain lky shey kd pchedy qokeedy qoteedy shas chedy teain lkchdy lkaiin otcheey ocheody shal olshar lkor
lkor olyedol shedy otchy ykee qokeey qokod rail tsheeoy shedy qokaiin qokain ro qokeedy olshsy redol otaiin ykaiin ockham otcheeedy qokey chedy

rol qordaiin lchedy sheody yteear ol qokeeedy shedy aiin dy lcher lchedy dal okes chckheoy shedy solar aiin
cheey dar qokal qotaiin por lchey odyd ordy otchy scheody ream yto sheody qoeedy olches okedy olkain daiin qolchedy opchain
saloiin sheey olkees pchaim otshedy otal shr chey oksheeor orchain okeedy dain aiin lkary qokeedy ros lchdy chcthar air

olteeoy oles qoaiiin shey qokaiin qoked cheey ky shes ked otaiin opedaiin okaiin dar qoksheody oleain ar
lkdair opcheeody olsham keeor chdy dair osod oleeol opchody olcheedy tshey okal dardy qokey qoal arair
okshg opchain qokey ychedair ypchair opchail alyain chcpheol qokeedy qokear shar cpheor yteees cheey aiin qokey shedy chedy dal lchedy

shckho am qoteedy ar dal oteeedy cheol qokar qokedy ol doredy daiin qoky otain ain shedy qoedal shol lsheedy lchor daiin qokaiin old qokeol
chor otedy dleey dar oteey qokaiin or daro solcheedy lsheeo lkdy aiin daiin yer qoal solkoiin otaiin ycham lteeey chey ol
ledy tcheeey qoeeody chedy ypchedar solkais reesy areey aiin lkaiin okchedy dsheed salair qokeedy cphedam shcthedy daiin araly

olkar al qokal okaiin keedam qol opchg keeol qokeey qoko olso ol ycheees lcheey ltdaiin lshey qokaiin chdy okeedy daldy qokeey lkaiin raiir lchaly
qoky cheeor daiin ain okchedor ar oseody yshar lsal lfched lchor opchar otedy cphdaly qotedy rdal scheol oteedy lchor
qokar or saledair oty oksheeod res otaiin opor ypcheedam shdy daiin ytcheos otar shctheeedy qolain ykchaly qokchdy aiin lchr or

qotar air ypchy keedy shedy osheor py lsd qokal rail reedar otoiin qody daiin tshaiin oteedy lkaiin aiin
qed ykedair dcheos qoky res olkaiin ckhor lkor cthdy shckhy qotedy qotaiin oksheeor shedy oteey qoky ain daiin otshedy
lkair opcheeaiin lsr qotchedy qotedy ol lair tchdar lchedy shar okeedy raiin daraiin kdor ychar okshoy qokchdy ol oteedy yeeedy

y tedaiin otedy rshair okal kedy qokaiin chckheeey otchedy ar qokee alyaly qokedy octhedy dal lkchal cheey dar
areal sheol kail shckhy lsees peeey ral ofchaiin tshol okedaiin qokain lkaiin lkchal ordar opchal aiin
qoteey ykeos lkain kaiir ltes qockhedy qopedol olsairy shckhain sorary ral lkchedair olyaiin qokeey lkaiin aiin okcha dar

yty ar opchedy chedy qokched yedy cheey dar dor dain qol chey qotchain shal dar dain kchaim
qotal chdy okchees qotail qokchedy dar cthol solcheols kol shckheey qokeedy lkchd qokeey qotesy shey dykm cthod
qotchey chckhy oltain qokeedy al chdy schedor ksd chdaiin dorol dy chedy oteod qolkdy chey yeor rdaly oltedy dain daiin y

qokey chedy tchedal aiin cheey qokedy qokaiin dar lcheeoy qoiiin ol shey qokaiin olchal sheey redal lty olkaiin raiin cthod
chcphs rsy chedy dardy lain dain qokaiin shedy lcheedam shedain chin daiireos daiin aiin sarol qokar doldaiin dar
opcheeedy osg saleo shar opchedy qokol otear cthail qochear okaiin otain chor aiin olkaiin qokedam arys chdo olshes otedy

otol pdal okcham chedy qockhor ockham ar cheey ches rchain sain oty ain lcher qodaiin otedy shcthey dl tchdar
ykchey solchiir lchedy okar aiin dain chary chckhor shckheam shey ocheor rdar tshor okeey qokeeol lol
qotchdal ychees oteedar otedaiin shary ltdar yshdy kchor dykaiin odedy lol okar doleear dar

cheed okl chd qokaiin shedy oteedy shedy lchey lkcheedy oeody dar otey chckhy lkain qokedy saiin opdor chedy
qokey okeeody ted qotedy pchedy solaim qokar ykeeam qokal ychaiin dy sheey chdal otol sheedy chedy otal cthaiin shey dal okchey chedy tchody chol
okedy oiiney osaim opchedar qokain y qoks aiin qockhaiin qokeedy qolkedam lkair ykal oreey ykchdar qoky shedy qokain dol

lair lcheos dal otshaiin qopcheeeo aiin saiin qokeol oteey opeos cheey y okal y qopey lkaiir qochear otchody cheol

qoky qotain qokeedy solchair pchor qopdy ain
tshaiin daiin pchor dalydy raiin
ofchaim lkaiir shedy olcheeey oiinain scheol ocheeey y qokchy okal shedy cheain olsedy air aiirey oteey arol dsheesy saledy pchedy
shckheo tor yky cheeor aly chedy pchs chdar okol otain lsam qotaiin sheol aiin soiinor ockhary dar
ytchor teeody dar qotal olkeey qotam yshaiin oteey shol chedy choly ykeed olkeey qoedor solkeor chey oiineody kshdy chedy rchey

yteain oteeedy shedy tsheeoy dar shedaiiin opey soly rdain aiin dain qokaiin lchedy shckhdair shol lkol sheol qokey lkches sheey ar
ypchaiin opchdy olkar lchedy oedy qotchy dain chdol otedy lkair qokal qoteear dar ytoly saleeedy
osheey qokeedy cthor okeey chctheol shctho chckhy qoky ar okeedy rary qokaiin shsd kaiin opchar okais res ardar

kdair qokeey am opcheeeo ychs qokchy kedol otedy odyedy oky ols kcheey cthes lsedair qokaiin qokeedy aiin sheol shey al
cthedam lchey kear okal qoky dar okeedy dalain qotedy lcheeoy chedy qolkdar oteedy opchor dy ytedor dsheeor dairedy
lchor lko qokeedy qokedy lkeeod sheedy reeo chedy shes qotal aiin yshed shey ctheeody qokain olteol seor aiin

qokol ckhed ockhedy ocheos scheo shedy olteer cheeey solkar or qotoiin daiin ol dal sheeey qokedy qokeey chedy
lkeeol dordy qokaiin chdy daain olkedy ar y dy lkain lshar qotedy laiin taiin okey shedy cphdaly olshaiin
okedy shy olail okeedy okeeody chain dal oksheees saireor yedy dain lkain aiin chedair qokchaiin chedy kchor dy ar

qokaiin chckhedair qoky yteedy soiinear dleey oles qokcho cheeod ain ykeeey oryeody okcheos saiin chaiir otedy dytedol shedy ol
dsheal seody qokchody choiin sheey lsheedy olshy y yshal ltedor chedy sheol qokal okain otedy
chaiin doleoy taly lchaiiin ykor otal okal or qockhain ykchedain shey dy ain tchedal shedar ofchm qokchy saiin salaiin

y qokchy saiin am teody ol saireor qokal ol rchdy daiin lkain ykar qokeey chckhy chcphey taiir otain shey
qokar odyos odeedy aiin lchdy aiin ocheaiin chedy sheody redaiin chaiin ctheol otal raiin okchok opaiin kchor soly okeedy cheol
lkchas yshedy shar qoteos dar pcham chedy qoteedy opchor daldar qokal saiin ain lchey solkeeedy opchdol kor shckheal shedy

dleo sheedaiin ledy ysheor qokaiin y solkiin paiin cthsaiin qoteedy chdy olsdy olchedain qokedy rchdy lor okeey qokeeor or
okeey shedy odyedal al olyoly peeody ykeear cthain okaiin otear qoky lsdaiin ltdaly dar qolol qokchy daiin am
olkedy otedy qokar qokar salar qosdy shedy old daldy osdaiiin chckhy qokeedy oseeedy cheeody shedy qokol sheedy olches tsheeoy ykor orees qokeedy ol

qoky qoeedy qokeedain pchy shey lchear qopr qoctheor otshol ykcheeody aiin saiin chedy olyy cheeor chedy qotchy dy ain
to qokeey qoty okain oksheed oledair sheedy shedy lkeos dam shedy al om dleeol qol qokey chedy daiin py aiin
otey shey qoteedy otaiin oteeody ar saiin ocheody chedy qokchody ychody ain qokeey lkol dshaiir air dal saiin qody okey ar cpheod aiin

dy lkchd dchain sheol dairaiin tody lsedar dar tchd am opchdaiiin ol tdar qotchedy odyeoly ar tdol otain odedam
qol qockhey oey qopcheedaiin chol saiin areos chctheeedy ctheeey qokchedy dshy olkdol kar keedy qokedy
chaiir oiiney qotsheeol odair tcheeody ychas chedy olkeedy qokar cheeey aiin okchedam oteey chey olshee qokaiin ain

scheey lkchg al lshes qol cphm ckheees roiin qokdaiin ykar rcheeedy daldy qokar ol oteedy qokeor olkeedy shedy
led lkain qotees ar opchedy qokchdy tchey shol odyeedaiin raim qotey chedy shedy schaiin shcthedy daiin olkaiin qotedy
daiin aiin opchos okain solkeod olchd okedy rody chg qokain ol shey sain lsedal ltal ytchor shol oky qoteeor raiin

qotol otain yksdy qotedy chctham lto raiir al shedy oky lseedy cphor cthdy qokedy dain opcheeedy qofchey opchy raiin
cheey ytdy lkain dsheain ardy okar reedy okeey ycha ar ypchair sain lteear aredy ytaiis qol daiin odedy
lcher dar rsheeedy oreed chedy ysheeeody sheedaiin oteedar shd qol lchdair saiin chcphaiin dshar qokeey chedy kchy otedy

dleey ksy shedy qokeey olkaiin reody ltail solkd aireey chedy salaiir olkchedy oles chees qopchedy oraiin olyy ar
qokey shey ty qokain dal reod soldy qockhol qokeey rcho tedam okan cheol oseda olchsy ykeda shedy aiin
yor dair rl pshol olkeedy cthair saiin qokeear chdar soley qokchy qokain shey qopchees ckhees otaiin chedy shody sheedy alal pchedy

otar cheol qokeey ar qotaiin qokain chcthed qokedy ole opor shey shes lcheedain olydair olshal oeody olseor aiin
oaly dain aiin ke chedy teeey qochain otey choiin ycheear qoky al solos ycheol qokar qolkod otedaiin solkeed qokaiin al
qokchaiin qoleos dalyedy sheody otain qokeedy qotchy lsy ain okeedy qotedy oksheaiin ol cheedy qopchdy rchedaiin ro kchdy omeor ain

tdy oteey dcheey aiin soledy qokal aiin chey oksheeey qodaiin pchedam okchaim osaiir qoeoly air shol pchor
otal otedy shckhy qokedy qokedam qokar qoair opcheeos qol tan olkeed odyedy shedy opchary aiin tchal ain
oty qos shody qokain or daiin qokaiin lkchdy olkeedy qoror qoteey solor shg qokain otedy cheedy sheedar kam cheol lchey okedy air oredaiin ain

aiiined dykdar ody qotchy ychair tsheeedy okar oleeody qokedy lkaiin oiindy opchaiin qotedair dytdy ain teod air
ar cheol dain oaiin otchar olkeeody raiin opcheeedy qokary dar opchor okcheeo qoteeod qokain aiin qokaiin chedy
ofchedy tor chl okain ltd qoky lshd qoteey shdam dardy pshain saiin qokeey odyok otchy otedy ltdaiin osor

cheol daiin salody cheeo reod air olcholy chedal soreear shiin qokain or yshey qokar solkedaiin dar
okeey chedy qokar qoteeey lteod lkdar dal qokeor ycheos rchdy qotar qoeedy qopor olcha dar shol shol ar
okd aiin okcheeo yteod qokeeedy aloly qotes chy olkaiin ltom keel ykedy qokeedy daiin aiin aredy

tshdair olkar lchedy chey shedy aiin daireeol to qokeey qoky reed qokaiin air okedy otchedy yksd ain otal char lkedy

oshdar ochedy cheey chedol cheedy lchedy qokeey pcheedy odydaly sham rair sain sheedy al qotey okdam chey dshal otaiin qokeedy ain
oleedaiin qol lkdy opcho shol qokeear ol oty ytdaiin rchedy cheey kan lchedy qokeos qokeedy oteey chedy

odyeeody lkches lchol scheal okar ched chey pod qotshdy cheey chdy osin qol ychedy daiin sheey tchor
qoky oleedy ockhedam opchor qockheeedy lched qokar okar qoteees pcheey daiin chedy lchor dal chor okain ochdy
chor qoteeey dshair oltedam qokar olr air dy oeey tchar qotedor oteos qokal qokol otain ykd chey chckhy daiin olkaiin sheol y

pcheey chctheeey qol saiin qoldy keedaiin sor daiin chor ain odeeol chctheos qokey qokeedy chckhy olkeey chcthaim ctheo ocheody
qoteey ol saiin odeedy olchs cheol qotchy shedy aiin osol shedy dy chey rd odeedy ol tcheody ltal odyal qokshor opchedaiin ol
chedy qokeey lkol sheol cheey shedy chedy dal lkol qokar sheody qopey otal otedy qokeo rm qokeedy shok ssheor saireal shckhy qokedy

daryeey lseod otaiin roly ykoiiin oted dchey qokeedy okain osedain ychiir cthdy olchod rar qotaiir y kchy ol
arair dair pchor ody schaiin dar qopchaiin qockhaly sal lkchdy qokchy kaiin saly shedy
lcheos kchedar lkcheeey okshy chedy sain oky lkchedar qoeedy schaiin dykor ssheedaiin olshair dchdam lteain qokaiin qol

lshsd okdaiin lkor dain aiin yksdy ain cthed qokeedy shckheey yshaim dain qokeey dshal qotaiin yky shedy
opcheos dy olky chedy qokeedy solksy shey chcthy ychos qoky ykeedy ychees shey qoty ol tchdaly chdy olyeeos aiin
chdy otal olchdor ar daiin solaiin chor ytdain aiin yshaiiin reeor pchdar oteey shedy koiin okey qokedy pchod

ypcheol qoreedy kdain cheol qotey oksheeey lchedy yeedal qoedar lsar qokeey aiin soiineos otal sheod cheey aiin
qockhdy daiin olkeedar opchdair dy okchedy sheom oleod soreol scham lsdain chal pchey olkedy ychar qokeey lchedy
lsheeody kedy areeor al ytd am shedy qokcheol olyeeody aiin sheol ar shedy rchedy qokeedy ol opcha air

qoedar oteedy qoteeal cheol sar oiinedy chckhey dar ykchy qokain qokaiin pcheeedy daiin aiin dal qokeey keeol dardy lkedal chedy
olky qoeeor or qokal qokal peees cphdal qopos shey otd qol ctham olkeedy qol otedy shol y dal y oksheedy qoar odedy
qorair qokeey qokeey odyok tchdy cheey qol kcheeos ain qodal dal lchor olydair dam lkeol otchey otchey shedy solar dar

lkcher otshdy lkar shey al ofchaiin saireedy chr alyol okey odyeeey otedy chctheos daiin qokol pear qokeey sorol
dsheeey aiin aiiindy y oor ldal osdol shod ar chey chey lkches shees oleedy olseol
oeody chey chedy dy dalor olchody chdy rchain cheey ol lkaiin oteor lair ykchedy lsedor lsheeo odedy

lchedy saiin doleeol aiin dy deol chedy lky sheol odyiin olkear lkees lteeey raiin okchg okchedy keeedy qoteey qokchey okdaiin omeol
qokchair okedy res dchaiin chor chedy saiin or keain dalyeody om lsedy ofchedy otchor oraim opchedam
otaiin qokeedy ol qokam chedy saireol sedam oteedy ypchol lkaiin ain oteedy ool chckhey lchedy ypchdal dairedy qokeedy sheeey ol

ctheos lyeeor chedy dal qockheedain lkches ar oteey chcthain teeeody ar scheeey aiin olyy qokeedy or tod aiin qokeey oteos daiin y
lchey tain cheey ltaiiin okchedy chedy ctheey oeor ted olsheoly chckhy qoteedy qokar keos chdy saredor qokedy lkeeedy
dcheedy qotody chdy ocheaiin chsaiin qokedy olkoiin qotchy qotcheor ol qokal qoky ol oreeo ra lsheedaiin sheody lchedy tdol y dair y

qotar ol qokchey shedy sar sar or qokal kor yaiiin qokchedy qokedy dchol qokeedy okal ol dar qokeedy chedy doley dy oshdy soledam
lchedy qokey okeeody tair keeam choiin otaiin cheody daiin daiin chdy kchalsy qokedy chckhal y shedy okeey dar darear oteedy okeey shedy
dar lchdy ytedal olteeol kchdar cthee daiin orcheeedy qokal qol cpheeor aiin qokaiin sheey shaly lkos keeo y

chckhdaly saiin odyeear or qokshdy otaiir qokchedy qoais teor laiin ctheor ltaiir lcheedal ykaiin olky oks qoteey shey
otchy opeol qokeedy sairaiin sdy ycheod okchair opcheda ychedy qockhdy cheey qokedy ain olkar octheeor dar lcheos kcheedar sheees soreody
ytdaly okedy odyeesy aiin qokeedy oedy cthdal dchdy chedy olkaiin ysheol dam am dain oeody qokey cheeor okeey qokedy

dshas am qotedy chey otchedy lsheam qokain leedar odyeey okcheeod ain chey odyas qokedy ckhed otey sheod qokod
peeody salaiin okchy qokeedy qoteeody olchs saly qopcho shaim olkeedy chckhas qoeedy dal rdy
otchy qokeedy keeody chdy qokeedy seor okedy shy dar otal chear sheody shedy chedy okaiin qopeos chedaiin olkom olkaiin keeo ol opcham shedy

dal solkd okedy qokeedy oleeeody aiin ocheeoy lchedy qolkol yshedaiin chckhy teedy olcheeeo chol lkain chdy ytal tshor shedy
y ledam qokeey otedy lkain otdaiin odyaiiin alyedy osor opchiiin lkchar lkey qoksheal kchedaiin y

dchedy okeedy olkal saledam chey yeedal keam peody dareody cpheear shsy dar qoledam ctheeedy qopcheeal oteees odor

cheedy qotedy dalyo scheeey qotedy cthdy okedy ochdy odydor ykeoly ol qokeedy olaiin daiin yaim ofchey okeedy otaiin otedy

chom otees otaiin keeody olches chckheedy yke lsol qopaiin opchan y qokchey qokchey qoeear aro

lcheos qokeey raiin otal kaiir ykdar chey otchedy kaiin lcheal ycheesy qol qokeedy aiin doraiin qokchey lseedaiin qokal cheol

qoky oleedy yer lsheod chckheedaiin qokeeor oteody qolkdy lchedy olkaiin olcham okshar aror qokeey ke aiin qokchy opchaiin
dain am opchedar qotain tas ar ysheesy lteed ain kcheol yshdol ches chedy qoky aleedy lkchedair dar
okar ol dchey olkeedy qotal ol sareody okeey otaiin qol qofcheeoy qoeod aiin daiin lear kcheos shg am orchal chdy

chedy lchor lol ol okal shedy ain tl ykeees y dam olchedar ofchdaiin solkeeody chdy shedy schan ltes chedy

ctheey ochol cheey dshes shckhy shey okes chor kos ches yts qotchy ykeedy dy lteees shor lteedaiin chedy

tsher qoair pcheal okaiin sorod qotain opcheam kdaly qoldy shckhol oteedy sheol aiin shedy ydy okchy qokal ykdaiiin odydaiin chdy

qolchedy kchedal chckhedar lchedy okey qody chey qokchedy okaiis aiin otal ched cheedy ycheedy ockhedam qeey odeeedy

soiindy teeam qotedy okal kedam qm okey chd ked cheey olchiin okain chedol ykchaiin qokchdy chdy kcheeody qol

qoreedy chdain chedy olkey or olyar shedy yer okl shg okchair dykdal olyes chedy otchy aiin sorain

qokey redol okeey otedy olkar ychair qokal rdaiin lkchedy ain otchy oleees qotaiin ar lkod lchey opeedy cheol

ocher lchedy chiin otear okal cheey odyedol shckhy chckhy qokshaiin oeeor oleol tsher lshd reain ofchdair soledal aiin

chor ykos chctheor redy dchaiin tchol keees dalydar olkeedy kchor shedy oleeo lkol tdor aiin qokeey chctheos

daiin ain daiin okaiin qotedy sain shs shedor ycheols ockho shdaiin solaiin dy shckhy al qoteedy qokaiin qol qokchdy qotchdy cheol cpheedaiin ykaiin
cthaly okchey ytody ycheols qokal kair chckhey ar ykchaiir kol qokal lted ledy ysheor olkeey ofcheey ltar lchedy
qotar dshar ytcheos olesy otchedy ar dykdy chd olair dardy dy qockhdy qokaiin qol teeey qokchedy y qokar chcthaiin ssheesy ykeol

qokaiin aiin chcthedaiin ros ol taiin ocheedam ytsdy chckhy otshedy qopchals olkain okeeo aredy lcheos ytchedy
dal ral qokaiin qotedy rsho shg qopchaiin dykol laiin shckhdy dar otaiin keeos saleedaiin oledaiin pchor
okol otain olchd rcheos osaiin qokaiin otdaiin ol olchar dar dal sorod yshy koly kedal sheody qokain rar ar

olky rdy sshdy qokain kcham otedy okchey otedain dor ol otal qol opchg okeedaiin qokchdy ar opchol qolol odedaiin y
okedy odyoiin qokal qotedy chedaiin ol daor shckhy cha raiin qokeey shol okeor opchom tchaiin odedy olkol opdy dain tshdy
chdy lkain pal qokeey chey olchedol ar okshedor shedy ar otar cheod sar alyedy ykchdy lsedair sheey teody lchedy sheol dar qokaiin qokaiin air

olyedam keeal aiin kchy qol otey lsdain qokchy yked olky ol tchees qokedy ardy chckhey kedol sald lkaiin qokedy
olory chedy ol qokaiin olshody keed qodaiin ycheeey y qopcheeody ar oteey rsheeol chedy
shckhy qol daiin qokaiin chckhees odyeear okedaiin oteedy aiin chg solkdol kees fcheeey alyey qockheody kchaiir qotedy

schor qokar ychor qaiin dar oredaiin qokeedy y dar kor olkeey ain schdy sheedar chedy olyeeos opol
qokeey olkeeo ltaiin opcheeody shsd qol sain odyol qotdair sheody chedy daiin shol olcheody ytal cheey sheees oeos
ofcheedy aiin qolain yteeey dleal qotedal areol teees okes okais ytdam am qokal dar soleal chedy

oleeody olsheedy qokedy daiireeaiin or leody chol ctheal keed ykeeody qokedy aiiinaiin aiirdol lsal cheey air
tsheedal chedor air ctheeo ololy shedy sheol qokal al qokeey dchod okeedy areeedy cheey keear y laiin qokchy dal ol
oldol ksdy ykey odeeedy dsheeey odyeod qokeey reedy sorey ledy opchady keos okchair aiiroly y

chcphedy teeey qotchain qokal cthdy ol sain cheeeody kan otain lsedain ytg solchdy al qokeedy lair orcheol okchy dain ol
lchor okchor shol tshedy otedy ykcheeos ytoiin daiin al dsheoly ar oteedy okshoiin ral ordal olkar otar keeor otedy
shol ar osear qopchdy oky sheol chedy dain darol qoty chs okedy qokchedy chckhy okar ar okcheeo shedy qokshdy cheol ssheod ol

qoky chedy olkeedy chey qochol chcthaiin olky ofcheeol opchary yteod ain qokedy daor qokeey qokaiin tchdy oeody qokeey shey otcho
daror otey chedar chedy qopchaiiin solkody oty chol qokchy opchdy lsais shdaiin odear lkdy olkeey shckhy chdain chol
shey opchsdy yka shedy qol okar y qockhear ychedol shcthaiin daiin qotaiin ol lkaiin okshaly qokeey air soledar qokedy teody

qokar qol qoteey okeesy chdy otar lteedy chor dar cthdal shol qokshol tchaiin chctheey qoreoly qokeedy lshdain ol
soreos okeedy qofchol qokeey shol dar shedy opchar otain oteey aiin keedaiin lkain kar ykeeos chdam keeedy qokey y soly tchor
daiin lteod qockhdy chcthaiin oteedy chedy dolory chaly schedar cham qokedam qokol olkain lsheedaiin qotal shedaiin oleeal chdy

okedy orydar sheody chedy qokeedy dleo ald oddy soldy daldy sar chedar qoteeol cthdy kchedam lky qopchedam
qokeol dy qokaiin lkcheeod ran qokeey olshol dalain ofcho otain sairdy qokchdy chal ydy yteed lchey okain daiin aiin
chedar otedy okain qoleor lched qopcho olkaiin cheol okaiin okaly tdol dar kal dlee qoes sar qokchedy qokedy aiin qokeey rcheeor al

ychdair solor opcheeody chedy shol lkey olkeedy chey al daiin pchedy dain qokaiin ain qoky shey otoly qoteeam raiin qokain daiin aiin
chor shedy olkeey lkdy air lcheeoy dar solear aiiindy rsheeedy oteey qokeey chedy dchs shedy ol qokair chey keey rchor
dar sheody qokedy fcheeody shedy saireal qotchdy qokchdy qokedy reod qoes olchody chedy okchary chedy olcheeeody fcheain al

tshdair sey chcthar cheeor sheody sheedy lty olesy otchedy otain daiin qokchdy chal lkain ykeed qoks kl qotain qokaiin y
qokedy opchedar raiin oteeod lkchar ytchain chor kam odyeedy dairaiin yeeey ked chcphdy qokain tcheor okedy yeedal qotedy
qoldy shol dar chey oryey shol chedy daled dcheeedy olteedal saledy qoky aiin qokeey solain cheedy ckhy y

ar cheedy oles scho chol otar chedy qokshedy olkeedy aiin okedy qokchedy dar soreal qokeedy keel shey lchr alydy
schair qokar chckhy olyedaiin chedar qokain olkeedy shes dar lchedam lkdar okaiin okeeor yshey dain ar
chckhey qotedy qokey ar qoteedy olches qokain lchol pchedy opchain doleeor okdol shey ore shedy yeeey qokchedy qokedy

qokol ckhedy ypchedol rm dam osho okcho qokaiin redy shedy daiin oliiin dairaiin otchdy shedy ypchl dar kchear
lkaiin qotchol cthed soleeol cheeey solkar qotedy ochedam oteedy tedy olcheeeody ol qokar aiin tdar
lchor okar chdy ctheedain chey shey daledam yeeedy tedar ain sheol ol okchy shar shedy lkchedor lshal ar

qokaiin chol opchedaiin lkchos ycheeos aledaiiin sheedy yteod rchedam qotaiin qopchor qokey sheeos shs cheey aiin oteedy ar
qokeey qotail otchedy lshedaiiin olked dain okaiin olkeod qotol qokain lchedy oltaiin qokeedy kam or lkdy lkedaiin ar opcholy lchedy
ydam okan lkaiin dar qokeey rsy sheol lshos qokeey shes chedy qokam dar teod rsdy ol ockhor oteedy ar

dar daryeey sheees odaiin otchy chedy osom qoas olsheeol qokal sheed ckheeo ycheod pchain daiin ool
qoky qoteo qokey chckhy dared dolain daiin chckhy ol leol oteedy chckhy che keey soiinm solaiin okar ol
dar lcheos olkar okeed qoky dshaiir lkaiin otchedy shedy ain ypcheey aiiror shes ytes qokaiin qokeedy am sheol ar dal cheey chedy

okeed ches lsody yched qopcheol qokchy shey air okcheain reees rchdy cheey qokedy qoteey shckhaiin sed
shor ar otshs qol kl okdal sheey tdy oltol chedy oedy saiin olkal ytas shedy chal sheeal dar osedaiin chedy
sheey shedy qotaiin al qokeedy qokeedy cheol aireey dar okeey otaiin ol dar lchey otedy chol soleeey okain dair chdy ockhedaiin tair doleedy ol olkar ol

qokshdaiin y lchaiin ochail shedy yteeod qokain oteedy shckhy qotchdar sheey y qokeey soror okeey ykedy opchor ytchedar chckhy dain olkaiin chedy
chey al sain olar aiin olyiir shedy qol schey cheedy qokain ches cheeey keod daryeeol oke shey ol cpheedam ar
ocheedal char ks qokedy chey okchedy otedy okain lkain ain daiin dchedy tey olkeey okeey dar toly ain cthedy dy aredy

yor so aiin qockheeedy otal chedor sheeody ykeeey dar okeedy qokeal sain qol dchas or okchy qotchain
shor qokedy cheedy qokedy qdy cpheor otain dam rchor ychd qoteey okain cthaly schees okeedy rok shedy qokeedy ain opchey
chcthdy yeer chedy odaly okedy ar qokeedy ldy shal chedy qopchdaly dar ykcheeol tsheody qockhaiin shar alyedy

otedy qokey qotody kedar aleear sarey keain okain opchaiin soiindy qokeey shey air opchear
chedy oram ol qokaiin shedy lchair cheedy qotedy lkeey qotchdy shedy sheey lkchey solar qos okaiin sheol qol olkaiin soror
dar saredy odar okeedy olo opcheeol osy chody oky shedy lkchais ycheey sheody dsheedy qokeey rd dar

cheal olyaiin cheey lkcheain osaiin olshd lkeeol qokal dar okchom qokeedy ol taiir rd shary qokedam
chckhey al qokal shckhy dar lkain ycheeal ol daleedy okeeody shedy ydar tdo keeam cthod olkedam saiin leody aiin

lshaiiin sar ain dareos cthdar dam okaiin keedaiin al otaiin qokain ras ol lkain tchedy chod y
qokaiin shedy chey oks lchaiin qockhair qokar rdar lchaim sedy dleeol ychan qotees olchaiir shody ckhdar
tsho y qofcheedal lshedar cheol qopol dalyeol qokshs shedy qaiin ody sole ol tdy al

shedy opchdol shedy qokar shedar qolked okeedy shor qoeeol olyaiin ctham olkeedy lsaiir aiin dair aireey ar qokal qotal shr ofee dar
dytm otain qoky qos ypchear qotchy redaiin chedy okedy oiiney ykcholy res odyeeor chckhey kedal ardy okal cthdal
dleo chdy okcholy aiin otsho dytdaiin lseain cheey shey qokeey qorol ary lkcheody okchdal qokal olkaiin okeedy oteor dy chdy chey aireo chedy

chedy daleody oteedy ytchedy qokaiin oteed qoeeo keedy okdol dar qokal ol soiindy otal okal ol
lkain oledair chey otain otedy dal solkeeal chedy kchey chor chedy shedy rsheey qokaiin sheod soreol ykchdy qokaiin chedy
chdair daiin sairol lkchg okchdar qokeey ocheody chal olsdal chor shedy qokeey otchey or otey raiin ykchedair chdy

dykey dal olkedy salail qol pchol cheey shedy qokol pedy qokches dar olkchdy yshed chey ochdy olchaiin teeos ykom chckhy
okedy qotchair doloy okeedy chckheeey olteor olcheear opcheos qokeey okaiin ysheol shal shedy cpheesy shedy chckhor dcho lkeor lkam ted qotaiin air
ar otal okeey chsaiin dy aiin oteedy so qoky ol qokeedy chaiin octhey dam shedy qokchy daiin redy okar olshy chedy

qoteedy qotedy qokeey sheody rd oey qoteedy schedy otedy chey reod sardy lkeos odear le lsheedy qol areos
yeeoy dar rshaiin qokeedy cheeal opchor shey qol qofcheeoy kody ytes opchain lkain kos qotedy taiin
qokeey chedy ofeedain ar qoteeey qokchedy dar okedy olshaly laiin chas lchedy qokeedy dy aiin ychaiir ral cheedy or aiiral yty aiin

qoky solkm qokey qoteeody shey qokchy cheod okaiin kair chey shckhy qoar ar keees qokchey y yaim oeody qokeedy qol
lchedam daiin qoksheor oly oteedy qoeey opchg raiin solksy qokedy daiin chedy otaiin otaiin solkaiin kchr shedy darey tcheam ain sheol otaiin lchedy
qokchy tchdy lkain chdy kcha air chdy orear qoky qotain qokeedy aiiinaiin qokeedy okaiin ks ol leol qokeedy qoko oteedy ol

chedy ctheal shedy qokey chedy oain chol lcheedal shedy opched olkeedy soleody dchey teesy olchdain am okeedy pchey
lcheaiin ar schaiin cphok okeedy shedor chol okey sheols ykaiin ycheod qokey okeear ockhaiin olkaiin dshs sheol chdy
okar chdy oear ctheody ain okedy shckhy oryeor qotshaiin ochedy sheed cheeal qoky okeedy lshaiin qotal lchey ychain cthe reedy qokaiin dar

al qopchaiin dain sairor lses lseesy pchor lko qoteedy chckhy kal odaiin daiin qokaly cpheey dar qopcheeor or
sar qokchedy lchedy qoredy oteedy lkain ral ol okeey qokeey lchedy ol soleeol odyeor qoky chckhy olkeedy oredy lcheey aror qopchod
chey okshal aireal dar olkal scheos olchedal oky dar qokaiin qokedam lcheedal dshas ykedy olkaiin chdy cheey shedy qokeey qodaiin tair

dleey ol daiin daror okal cheol dal otedy qokar ol qokar otedy olchy al tcheees ain sairdy lyedam qoteedy qotedy
ytedol dar tshor ytchedy tsheeoy olos al dain qokchey otaim teeody ychdaly lchedy otedy qockhedy sheol dar
shedy solkdaiin qokedy lkaiin ain okchor qokchdy qokchdy ychdy qokar saledy qokedy dain ltd olkchey shes chcthdy dar qoteedy qoteedy ain qokeedy qokedy

qokal air oeal yed qokar ychor yer chedy otar qokedy qokshor otaiin lchedy ol soiinol lkain chedy tedy
qokchey ol qokeedy qokeey salaiir okshedain y laiir oiinedy cheey aldaly lkor kchoiin am oteey shedy qokeey ockhear qokchy or
chckhey qokedy chcthar lshr alyol qokchedy or shedy shckhy qocthol daiin okshd qokaiin shedy oky qokain ain qokedy otaiin chedy aiiredy tey

shcthaiin lkdar shor dar dam olkedaiin al qoky shey sheedy chey oiinedy otar chedy olseda chdy cthedy qotchy chol
qockhear ypchaiin daiin chor air okal qotedy rail lchey qotcho ar lchor opchedair olsaiin qol loy dar qol olkey sareos ypchy lchedy
chckhok qokain ychedal chdy cheedy keeey qokain ychsd qotd lkchor oteey lkcheees daiin aiin sheody otedy cheeam ol

aiin lkain aiin qokchaiir dar qolkaiin cheey okeedy chedy lo am lkear qokaiin qokain leol lkr lkches otaiin chedy
kor areody sairm qopcheos cheey ychedal shol kedam ocheody rail otchedy chedy leol qoky dched taiis dar
shody qokain qol daiin oeos schear cphaiin sl qodain qotedy shckheal tor opchedal olshedaiin res aredy

okeeody cho lkedy qokeedain shsdy dar soledal shey ochol opchees ltes chckheedy qockhedy
ytcheeedy qockheedy ol qokal ytdaiiin lseeey sar kaiin dy am olyody qoteeo lsdaiin olshaiin dain lcheeoy keey oteey lchedy
saiin chees ckhdar lcheos okchy ychary qol qokeeedy qotedy ltal qokol opaiin daiin qokaiin okain daiin eseeol okeeod ol tedor dar

tsho rail qokchedy oksdy dar oain qokeey qokaiin shedy shckheo ofchain ysheeey qotchol kchdair kchar shckhy opedal chckhy
oaiin qolkdam keear ctheos shckhy y tain olcheesy shr dleal ar daledy qotal qol dchaiin tshedy
sar qotchain daraiin cthain pchy chckhy oteedy kcheos qotchey ral okaiin oleed aiin opchdol keam qotsheey chcthdar

dal y opcheeody kody sheod qoled qokedy lchey alyain qotcheol kedar qoeedy qokol qokain oleesy yeedal oldaiiin olchaiir chedy
lcheedal kok sheedy sheeor cheey ol chcpheal qopchaiiin y daiin otal ain lcheeey qokchedy shedy solkeeey alyedy kchor daiin qockhdar oain
daryeey qol okcha air olkedy ychedal or daiin otedy okar yty rdy otal lcheeedy qokeedy dchor orchod cheol qofchain

qeol cheedy kdor chol dy dareol ychais dar qopcholy ol ty qoteam am ysheeaiin ol or ypchedar qotear darain
shckhy lkchar ycheam teo cphaly qopchr am dain qokey raiin chedy dy oteey kdy qoreody otchy yshdy cthear dain ardy
lseeody olkeeo qol tes aiin otchedor kok ykes shedy or eseal cheol dain otsheos qokeedy ychedy cheey chedy

osor shedy ol dy otshaly dykeol leoly chckhy yshes solkedor ar qoteey chcphedy qokeedy aiin ol pchy chedy dy olkaiin shedy
reesy otaiin tedy oiiineo shoiin areos qolkor qokaiin oled daiin okal shedy y chey sar oryeor ytes qokcheey dam okchy or qokeedy oteey shedy
lcheeedy kchy taiin qots chol qokchy qokchy otedy qokeey qos aiin qotaiin shedy dam ychedy saiin opaiir lchedy kchy shey

chedy chor lshaiir tshedam she al okedy aiin alas lkchaiir aiin peees okchey qokain sedain ain oshair qokeedy olkeey shedy
dalyedy okeedy chcthedam cheey shedy daiin ain shedy tshedam qokar dshedol ol dain aiin qokam olor lkaiir olkeeor air

lchaiin olyedaiin odyedo sareor
qolcheey qotedy aiin cheey qotd oshedy ysheod rey chor raiin daiin y olkaiin qokaiin dar sheody tdy qokey qol qotaiin ol

dy reain lyedy ochey shedol qockhm olkeey redain shey aiin shol shedy solchs odyar ytchedam daear ykcheos
yor aiiinedy okol qotain chedy qokal lyeey lody raiir qotcheor soiineor chey ykaiir am qolkedy sheol oredy
aiiredy sheeo chedy olyy shedy qokeedy dareody lkaiin al okeey shey shedal dcheedy re lshes al

lcheedal oles rail shckhy otchedy raiin reeo olkaiin ol qopchedy ol qorain qokeedy okaiin oksheain ral okeey y otchey shal qoeedy kshedy
lteod oedy qotal ol qokeey shckhy aiin sheol araiin shcthdy ol okeey ol qoksheey oded lsheel shedy sairaiin
shcthdy kshaiin chey yeeedy chctham al dar cthdair okar qodam rdain aiin okchey olkchey dar qokeedy qokeey dar

shol kaiiin lkchdain oleeey kain chey aiin qockhdal chor kdar qotaiin ysheos chckhos opaiin ssheeol keeeody chdy
ofchain sheol opchor dain qokeey qaiin yshs ykeedy qokeey ychey oty chckhy td aiin dal cheey or qopcheeody olshr reeaiin olkeeedy aiin
qotedy opchaiiin aiin qoteey shr qokchedy okes leeedy schol chctham shedy odyeam aiin teed oled daiin lkaiin shedy oeol

sair dal lkain ytedor shdy odyeeod chedy qoteedy cthaly oleedy dar ol otar aleedy y char ain olseeaiin al
shan ocheeedy olkal odaiin okcheeos ro qokal lm reeody fcheeey or chey otchedy qoeeeody keeey chckhy dalyed
oky peedy olkchy oted qokeedy otshed okedy qokchedy cheeeody olchdain qoam fchal ain dal qoteey qokedy lsdain rin daiiredam

salor ytchedy kchom kaiin qockhor ocheody chedy yeor sheeo olteey dam aleeod qol tey qokey qol
qoty tedy otchy yteedy qoky dar okeedy oty chdy ochedy ar qoky oleedy qotar olshar chckhy yshm ochor tchdol kaiin
cthdal cphoiin okeedaiin cheey shedy daldy odyaiiin alyedy saiin che chaiir lkaiin cheol soraiin qokal chedor ol

qolkeey qopchair orchal ckhar cheey chedy kdar tchair kches oledair solks lkchain shol qokeey odyeedy ood ol
qokain opchaiin qoky or qopor qokal shm dal qokaiin pam pchedy dar qokeedy ol ar poiin shctheeedy daleeedy
solm lcheedal qoeeod olcheedy chdal areeor shdar orar ar al sshoiin ar tsheos dy chey reedy om chdy

oiiineal lshdy solor daiin solkar oty qokedy tary kody qol olar okaiin qopedam lkaiin qotchedy qokedy aiin cheey aiin
qoleody chcthar shey lkchain chor ches qokcheody chdy sear pcheey qokey dar otchor cheol sheody qoksheear choiin cheedy shedy
chckhy cheey qokedy ted lkaiin qokain okcholy shedy ol qokey olcheain lkeos olkal dalyey daiin cheey lto ypcheain air oeeedy

air sheol odeeol ocheedal shedy qokeey lchedy olteeoy qoes opcheos qokeey pcheedy okshiiin qokain qotar okar y lyain okcheeody raiin
chedy oeody dal aiin qotas chol yshedol olshedar qokain teeey solkody chedy soledy pcheey ar
oty ol ty kan kshdy qol oseeey air qokeedy otal odyy okdain ofcheos oty ar tcheeey shes okeod cheey qokedy

chey am chctheody oty dar teeol aiiraiin soiineeedy chey dar cheey dar qokaiin qokaiin aiin shckheedain chckhy
y dal oedy otal laiin chedy chcthy qopcheos olkar shey odydol shedy chctheeo lchedy tchod oredar air dain olkedy shedy
ola ain qokar chdy kcholy qol okeey chedy dleeol kd tsheody lkdy qokey yteed ckhedy

ar keeedy aiin oltdam chedy qol qokaiin olkeeor cheol chey oiinain pcho sor okcheeody qokedy
dchedy oteedy soror tcheees ytdaiin aryedy cthes olchdal chey lkches otod shckhy oiinain qoko shckhol ochey
shctheol oteedy or dady ssheedaiin shedy or okain cheey ykeeor ol olshar lshody shedy kshear lchor daiin cheey shey

otedy rom ykar lsheols po sheey chckhy tor qokol otain or opchary al otar shedy qotal chedy yol
to qokeey qoky sheedy air soledy dshar chedy otey ololy chedy olkeedy shckheeol okar seos dam ral qotal ol qokeey lchdy cheol
qokcheo chor qokedy oteedy yeody odedy tcheedy qol dyteor opal qokod qokedy aiiroiiin qokain chedy ockhes olchsd cheeey ar

olches ockhor qopchair otedy daiin lkaiin y sdy dal lchdy olchod shckhy odyeees dleal cheedaiin saiin yteam chckheeo lchdy qol
shckhy olkchedy dar qokal lsdor al okeedy qokaiin cheeody shey okeey okeey ltes qockhdar shcthedy dy dalyor lkeal okeey y
dar sarear dam daiin raiin oiiineal shedy chcphain qokeedy ykcheor dal qokchey dar tchd sheedaiin chair okar dolaiin lkr otedy qol

chaiir ain saiin olkeey olkeos qokcheo shcthear qoteey chody chedy otshain chcthody raiir chedy ypchaiin
