shckhy qotchol otol qokain qol cthdar or lkedar olees rchaiin dchdaiin dsheeam redy qokcheo okshas lkchedor chckhy darol
led qokal shey qokchy daiin lsdain cheod arol sshod cheol ordy aiiinedy pchy chckhy sheedaiin kchain sshor

al oteedy shr sar reedy daldy qol lor ol pchaiin dal odedam kd shor kedaiin air shedy ockheoly ykol daredy
qolks odyr shail ochdy or sain lkain ykar ol saiin keedy qoksheedy ychair chey qocthedy qokeey chckhl doreal raiin
yeedal dar qoreeedy kal odyeees lkdy olky oksheedy raiin qol chcthol ykcholy ykoiin rd tchdy oleeody chedy

lchedam orm ood qokeey okeey chckhy ykes sain ychdair dareal chey or oleor rr am okcheedaiin qokain shedy
shor aiin ykchg chedy aiiindain ro kchor okeey ardaiin keeod ytar lko aleeody poiin sheeo lchdal olkal chol
chedy qokaiin ros qokaiin ain ocher shedy solkeol qokal qolkeedy shey aiiinaim dyteedy or lkain odydaiiin oteor

chcthey opchy shedy so oty qokeedy dar lkeeo aiin daryeeol ol oteey shedy ckhal deal odyedor dar olkeedy oaiin saiin ol
dar dykear kchedaiin lseear shctho daiin chedy otal qockhm oror dar daleody yshl okair qotaiin shey
qoky ol qofchm qokchey qoteeey ycheeey qocthedy qokeey aiin dain lked dair oteeedy keedy lsdain qol ykcheol

dyto lsedy qokeedy or olyedal redor qoped dy aiin qokedy otaiin chckhal sheey res lshedor ytom shedy
ykcheody otain okal sheey kody qotedy otchdal cpheols ykaiir okchedy qoes olcheees aiin qokees chan dar solcheeol dar
yer dar otal qoar aredy qotal ockhedy sheeod qoty shdaiin ksdy ytal lkain chdy qoky keey ypchaiin qokaiin shedy

air qokey otedy sheol qokaiin otedain qotedy olcheeod lchedy okeedy yeedal lshar ycham shedy otshdy ypchol cpheey chedy
daireedy sheedar ar shol ardar qoteey qokeey lkcheeos otedy yedy cheol yer qoeedar ykeeo chedy dy okaiin ykedor ol
cthdal qoky okshar chcthdal lkain okes chsaiin ol otar doledy dcheos lkom qol ykd sheey to dar qokchy qokain lchedy

dal ain kedy qokeedy chdy olkey shdor cheey lkchaiis qoais keey okchedam daiin qokeey shes kaiis or
qokal chol shol lched qokal qol oteey qokain qoeeos lchedy taiin qockhdal seeedy olchdo okchey ykos olkeey shedy
oty sheedy qokeedy lchor qokar cheain shedor chckhy lcher yteesy chdy sheody qotedy or qokchy olkchy keol olchdaiin okeedy shey qokey chdy

cho air shedaiin otaiin chedal ycheal daiin dchedam sar ain shol kor qokain olkedy qokedy lkar shey
sheedaiin lcheeol opchair ocheos ksheol dy qoedair opchdair daor syo tor opchedy
oty ro qokar qotaiis res oteey otedy ytes qokar olchedy soly teos qdy odyol cheey ykar shol raiin

chor y cthr chody otedy aiin ofchdal oeeor chedy cheedy olshealy otair okal okeos otchey qokchey lshd shol shedy reain chedy
okeey keoly pdam solchaly okol qokain ychal dar qokal dyto qokeedy odyeeody odyedor chedy qokeey dar qotar aiin
kshedy kas shey dar lkdy qokeey oded dain kchedam opchor dair qokeey qokdar chdy qokaiin pedam orol qopdor al dair chedy

chdol dar okal qotal salaiin okar chedy otal chdy seos qopeeody chedy qokal doldar dal lshar lchey dar qokar aiin
chor chedair lkeedain lkcholy lkchaiis chedy tedaiiin qokain sals qokedy qokam ol lkod olkeedy shey oteey oddair oteedy ol
shody qokain saleeo kdam keoy or qotaiin aredy olshes olkar sheesy otaiin or oteedy cheedy cheol qokaiin aiin qopedy qokar ain

deol qoty qos sar alyear ofchdy peol qoky cheeor otaiin rdy opcham chal daro ol okcheeey reedy or
okey lkchedair okchy ycheedaiin aldain chedy osedaiin dshaiin qokar dar chedar qokeedy old daredy sheol chdy otedy
or ykcheeey otd qolcheedain aiin dain lys otain otaiin odedam cheedy ykeees aiin lkees yshair om dor taiin

dam chaiir tchedy qol qokedam qokeedy aiirain lcheedy chedy ol rcheal okeedy ytedain lsdy
yeeedy olkar shedy olyeeey saleeedy chedol otchey shedy ssheedaiin shey qokain aiin qokal rsheedain lked kcheds chdy sheedar solkeedy dar
lkchal cheol pcheey sheol shes chckhy lteeody olchoiin kody y lchedy qotaiin olkes chcthaiin shedy

cthor kched qokaiin sheedy qoteedy aleesy oledy oteey chedy sedar okeedy dar oteey chckheees olsed qodam qokeedy y olkeedy ar
lair qotal shes qokaiin otcheos dcheo lkchy dar dsheear qopaiin tedar chedy qokeedy sain ol otal reeedy qolcheor dar qokaiin qokaiin ain
aiin ofchain okeedy ars al chcphedar odyeos qokshedy oteedy sheody resy reeos kedor keols y tear

shcthedy dam qokaiin qokeedy lshail alyain cthes raiin ar daiin chedol chcphdaiin shey lor sheckhy qoal cheedy keeor chckhy qokedaiin al
qooiin dsheeo dar okedy aiin opcheeody shedy qokeey cheeo qokaiin cheed lkeeedy shcthdy okeey ckheear chdy
chedy lkeed dar qokeedy okcheeedy kchas okain aiin lchaly qokchy qotedy y kcheeody saleedar aledol cheedy shey cthedy olkaiin aror

aiiinaiin qokol oteol dain sairor sheedaiin qokar lses oteey shedy sheey solkeedy lchol al ochaim dal ofcho qotain lchey qokain qokeedy ol
al shckhy ain dal qokar chckhy dain ocheeoy lchedy opcheeedy dy olkedy oldar lchor teeor okeees dar okal sheckhy ar okchdar
lkaiin aiin opchees sheol sheesy olkchey chdy pchy lkcheedy dar cheol oeos dykeedy or qoteey ckhaiin lyaiin odam qokain oteedy chdy

dleal kal tshm qofchedam otar dchdaiin chedy okcheeos chdaiin chcpheey rdy lcheedam cheed chcthain taiiin aiin dain okey old dar
qol deeedy tos chedy ley daiin arair shedy opchsd odydy dardair solchal dshsd qotedy ty qokain qotaiin ar
okeeody air dytd dar aiin qoty qoeeor qol sheeey shedy reain shckhy otchedy qoedain ar tom ol oky olal chedy

rs olky qodaiin qofcheer okody chckhod opchor olyeeod opeeedy dalair ykcheol ytchaiin scheey olkaiin chedy
ytody al olkeedy cheey chckhy qokal lkeey rar okain qokchdy shedy chary olkaiin ltedor reedaiin qokchy dshdaiin soiinm oteey y
oaiin ypchaim lkain kor ofcheedy reeod qokeedy keos lkor dal qokal chr aiin kshear olkaiin otary ar

lshedar dsheedy yeer oldy osy qoal olkedy dar qokeedy daiin al daiin oteey ykeoly por oeor qockheody oteey aiin
dshe oleedy qokeey olar qokaiin chol dal odedy sheedaiin lchee dain rol lkar chedy otcheeody ol cthe tchdy leos
cheedy ol dleeol qoes okal am aiin dardy chdy olkeedy lchedy lkcheeam opchear dsheam oshear qokaiin aror dar lkain chaiiin shedy lkor

tear qokeey olkaiin chdy lkedy ody qokey shedy cheey choiin cheey solkeoy ar okchain solam ykeedar am
tsheaiin dshedol sair ykchaiiin shy dar shol cheol okar lsedy chor oles qoky okeedy reeo ytchdy shcthor lsheeody dar qokeey okeey air
shdor am teod olcheed tshol salal soreeor chody ain ody otedy dain shor al lkary tchor ctheor sain aiin

okail qotchedy ykais dar qokeedy chedy lkar cheeor chctheey ltedor shedy tshdy aiireeo ltedar qokshdaiin okedal soleos
shol dchedy qokeedy or chail lchey chedy scheedaiin qoal olsed okeeo okshedol dchol qokeedy aireey dar soly aiin qokchdy qoteedy olcheedar ol
lkaiin qokchedy lchedy ockhan ykeol dardy oreal ytg tair dy cheey oleeaiin sheeey ol keees dolaly qoteey lkor lain qoteey lkedam

okaiir oiino dchor oedy tear orcheear ol lfchdy lsor dy lteedy dar lchedy qokchey olchody chdy
qokaiin qoody qodol kas dsheear cheey oleedy oky chdaiin olteedal ol qokal pchs salar air tody aiin olyedaiin shey
aiin opcheeos dar qokeey olchy pcheedy ycheeo otaiin shedal shedy sar qotchear cthaiir ltal otaiin qokeedy sheear ychedam olcheeal chol

oleeody dar chey qokchedy ychedar ar qoteedy qotoiin orcheody fcheear qokedy ale or sheol lcheedal chdy aiin daiin pchod
qoteey olshaiiin qokchedy char otedy rshdal darol ykcheol qockhol olyeeody dar otaiin qoked cpheeoy shey ram qokaim
chedy qokaiin chckhedol olteeedy opchedor otedy qod tsheedal lshes aiiinaiin qokal chdal ykchy qokeedy okain otedy salody chcphdaiin ltd sheey shedy

dleeol chedy shol qokaiin aiin qokaiin tdy qokchey al okeedy sain chdal qokar am sheol ofeo qol cpheody otoly qokedy lkor rchom al
qokeey ycheeod shedy qol dal okchy dar y oteedy dalyeos ocheer chedy qokaiin oteeody chedy qokchaiin saiin soreear aiin shedy daiin sheey okeees cheedy dar
yeeoy cheeey al qokeedy sheol chaiin qokcheeed ar okcheeey air kcheos okeedy chor shedy opchain oltor teedy ain sory al

lcheody shan chey sheedy opcheeey al kchdaiiin okain ored shcthol dal pchain otain opcheoy lchedy olyedy shais oty tedy opcholy chckhy
daiin okedair otol paiin saiin qokeey ykiin pear pcheody qokchair dy otedy aiiinor qoeeeody qokedy lkeody qokeedy chol
qokshol tr oiinedy cheey qokedy shar shedy sheedy qokchy dy qoeeor okal qokain kaiir kdal solail otain daiin qofcheeedy olyy dshal cheey ar

soley qokal choiin olkaiin rair aiiinor tedy qol otal sheedy ksy dsheeos chdam qockheor okaiin shedy yshaly
lkcheol otal opeor cheol chey otol sheedy shey okeey ardal okeedy dlee chos qokair chey aiin tal kaiir chedy
chckhey odyedar solkok keal soly odye qoal pchedy qopchsdy chedy dy olody lseedy pcheor taiin

sheedaiin qokdaiin solkl qoeod dar lcheer chal aiin daiin rshair ockheal ltdain okchey chedy ockhdy ochey
dair roiin oleam lchedy ykchdy lchdy oddal osor aiirain saiin ol doleey al daiin ol
cheed ordar daiin okeeedy lseeos riir dam cheom chal okchey tcheey ody ltol tdal daldy yedy

ykchair ldair teeey otchedy olcheeody lshan ordair odeeor ltedar dchor qokeey shl doreol dair cheedy okshal ol
cheedy qokedy qokeey al dykeedy chdy daiin ltod qokeey kedar shey chol kchok okais ar sheol qoks dar qofchdar qokeedy shckhy okchedy qokedy
ldal chey aiin ley pcheeor ychedar lsdaiin oddy qokedam qokeey shedy tair okchy ykeeedy opchair

pched okedy ocheody aiin qokal okshaiin lkaiin yeor y lcheaiin olees otas chdam qokaiin dshal ar oltain taiiin otchedy shedy

chcpheal tg yty aiin qopcheody aiin
chey chckheod otaiin reeeos qokey ykeody shedy
dchedam ory solkaly qockhey ol okchey shedy opchdar or ypchar ckhor sheol lsg ychor dair lsody chal odedam
cthdal qokal aror saireeedy qokedaiin ain qokeedy qoey lsy pchain opchom lkchg sheedy lseedy oeol otey ol
dal ar ockheol lo lssy qokedy qokeey sheey ol oteey qokedy aiin qoty lss dshed ochor daiin odol dair soror

dar shedy reeey olkm okchedam qockhaiin okeey dar olkaiin ar chol kchr rs qokchey oteedy qokain syed qokey ol
olkedy saldo ckhor tchedaiin ol qofchdar lsain qoledy olyy oteedy lkcholy keeey chedy chdy shckheos oteedy okeey chedy
saiin ry qopedam qoky ofchdair lkain ykody sheod oaiin ysheeey alydy lkchdaiiin lteedaiin keols qopcheol shor ol

lair oiiineo ar qokal qored cheey tol qockhedy olkeedy ytr chedy shckhy qochear qokeey chol sar lcheeedy tar chedy
oedy qokal sheey keeal raiin otshedam okey air cthedy qokeedy tsheedal oleod y daiin shol shais yshdy dalyair
qolkaiin olkeedy schaly dain qolaim daro qoky ol tes or tchedy qol okeedy cheedy otedy qokeedy qotar yke al qokeedy olkeey dar

solkal cheey shey aiin leol chedy lkom qokeedy y kdaly aiiino lkchedor chedy oain oteedy qokeey ol qokey dyko dykaly
olkeey kal cheesy pcheey lkches otody dar tsheaiin kedam ody qokeey okedy cheeor dy y lkaiin okchedy shey ol oteedy y
daryeeol ytal okaiin lteesy ytam olkain ol tair shar ychor dam ofched qokeedy qokaiin or rdol char chey qokeedy shedy qokey ol

dchedy qopor arod oty qopchedy okchy oksholy y cthr chedy dchaly cheey tchear ydal qokeedy al
yeedal qoody ka shedy leos ory teody lsody am qokeedy qoed okedy otain raiin tear otsheey shckhy shey
y okchy dy lshoy opor oseeedy reeod dsheedy lseeor qoedy ypchar qokain al lkaiin y opchy olkeedy qol qokeedy ain

lkain qopdy olseeaiin qol chor keeo qokeey lchedy okey lsheear aiiinear saiin lsg py qoes olkain chey qokedy
daredy qokchor dal arey cthes chary otaiin okshedy qotsho chedaiin saleedar or dal olsheam dar qokeey otaiin aiin
ykchedy qokeedy tdair teeos chedy ochdy oleeey okchedy qotedy ocheedal qoeeo raiin qokchey ytal daiin ain daleedain lkaiin shey

okal ytd shey dedam lcher chesy qopol qol qokaiin rair darair otar chckhdam qoksheeor qoar qokaiin aiin
ol oaim qotchy olyain yeos lkair dar lor otchdy kedair chr qotchdar olky ked sar dar
areos lkom raiiin alyain oaiin otal qoky saled tshedy qokeedy chckhy otedy dain chckhom okaiin lkchedy cheedy dar shol rchor

dykdair okeey areedy qol olche dchs dar dal oteey ksd ol oaiin cheed qokeey okdaiin okey ar okeedy aleeey lchedy
otaiin okeedy shg sshol ychal qokaiin chckhy daiin olseor ltal qoey oedy dain qokdam okshaiin qokey ain otedy olkal chckheed qoksheody okg ol
soleody tsher dar ockheol opcheor sain aiin sheeody chedy qoteey chcthed saror qotal syedy ysheam chol lchey chedy

chedy olkeey chedy tdy qockheos qokchedaiin lkcheor kchsdy dar qopcha sales chedy qokedy chctho qoky kol cpheol
shody otain chedy qokchas kdar shar olcheear qoedy or qor qopals qokain chedy okal cthedy dain ol sheey ckheeor chdy
shckhy qotchear sheody qoeeor dchm ol sar oleear oeody dal aiin qokey aiin ykal qockhaim qokedy chctho ypchear cpheol

qokshdair shedy ochor shcthear otal shckhedam oltor aiiineos qockhedy lkeor kal chdy qokal okaiin peear cheol
dchol tdaly or lkeeol ol okchey aiin tchedain yteeey qochedy okchair qokaiin chdy lsar chdy okal otedy qokeedy chedy
ypchair dardair soiiney oty shedy okain qokedy opcheeo oted otar cheol sheey ols sheeody opeear or

lkaiin aiin soldy cthed dal raiin otar al dcheeor ar qoteey okshdar dam okaiin qopchaly ycheod cheey kar otedy qopchain
shckhy otchedy cheedar am pchdair soledar olshdaiin shedy rched qokal qoedy shcthaiin ykeod ain opchedar redal cheol
rshod daiin chey shy chedy saiin olchr ltar yted qair areol yches shckhaiin ssheor aiin qotedy tedy

ain tees shedy qoty otain y pchol ytedar ofchaiin sheol chedy tchealy otair daiin okaiin cheod sheeo lcheeedy qokeey or
ykchaiin sarey qopchdy qokaiin olchees okeol qokal shsaiin dar dy okaiin cheeey qotchaiin saredor okeear ol
oltdy chdy shol lcheedain okchaiin okar y qokeedy oleor dain soldar olkal lseo odal qolchdy okal chey ain qokeey qol

oky dar qokeedy ain lkaiin olkchedy chedy qokchey aiin olkeedy okeey chaiin qoky qoky or oteedy cthed ytcheeol olchdor ytary oleedy ol
chcthey aiiinais qoteedy chdar qokeey kshain qokeedy qokchdy qokain roiin chol qokar chckheod ltal chey qotair ytcheeey opoiin orol cphd al
ar sheckhy ckhaim daiin aiin olchal yor teeey shy cheom otain reod shos kaiin ypched yedy taiin

schain qotaiin opey sheody olchdaiin odyeesy chdar cthody qokedy lteeo chg okain lsail cheor dy dytear otchy dair aiin
okeedy ychar qoky ckhor qokeey ychdair qokal qokain shedy leedal ol dy olyeos chol shcthor otcholy qokedy shol sar ltedor chedy qopcham ain
qokar or chey shedy reedar qokchedy shiiin cheol okaiin rcheos cheey qokedy cheey olkain pshl olshaiin teeod otedy ckheeod okeedy chedy shar daiin ain

chey olkchedy char shdain rs dar choly ycheel qokain rdaiin qotedy sheod aiin qokedy aiin okchey otchey qodam aror
dar saiin lseain kody ytal reain qokey shaiiin solkal ol ypchedaiin sheol ain qoty shedy cheeody dar
lkedy dareedy kees qokaiin ol aiin olkaiin solkdam qokaiin lseeeo yteees aiin daiin qoedal okain y lain tedaiin aiin

dar lkain chckhy ockhedol qokedy shedain oledaiiin opeol aiiry rdaiin chckhg kaim osiin pdy shor cheeos dar
olkedy ks oddy qolkor lkeeo shey al dalaly keod otshdy qokedy osdaly chckhees ytedal qoky chedy qokaiin otaiin or
dcheey taiin okchdy chaly olkaiin okeedy shey shckhy okail shy dar lkchedar qokeedy lseeody shedy shal chedy oain

y qokchy olydar otchey lteedy qokar or lkee lky chdy dain omm ol okal okedy qochedy shol dar qokaiin odeol
chedy chckhey aldain olchedaiin chckhy qoteedy ytain cheey chedy lkaiin aiin dy qokal cho oteod qotedy sheey cheol
chcthedar dar lcheor osheody chey ytsd chdaiin sheey otom chedy oiindal kal oteey chr okshedair qokal chckhy otaiin qokaiin ol

saiin qol oiiinee shes lkeol kcheeaiin chckheos dchol sheol ol qokeedy opchaim olyear lkey opchedaiin kam qol
daiin okeed shedy cheey qokedy ledam olkeey otaiin tchaiin laiin shedy ocheaiin chedy qolkdar oteedy lsheel rshedy qokary aiin
tshor qokar qoedar chedy qokeedy qotey chedy sheol chor raiin shckhdaiin solkoiin chor chedy qotedy daiin oty ykair dain sheey or okey ycham ol

ofchedy teos ockhaiin ral cheedy chedor dsheeam dy chol cthor daiin pchedy okal saiin oledaiin areeedy
daley schedy qoky qopcheody qokar dar osor areody lfchdy chedam leos kchaim opchedal ol qordar
cheeody dar qolks qotedain kaiin qoredar chckhy qokaiin shedy octhdy schdy qokal sheam shal dar pcham aiin

lcher lchedy solor dam y raiin opchedor lto lkm shckhy okshdain chedy qokeey sheey olkdol ycheos ychoiin ol dchain
otshdy daired qokeedy ockhdair aiiinain ypchol chedy oiiineeol ar chctham lsedar qokeedy kdain ytsd aiin shar cthdy ol
ledy qokeedy qokeos cheey qotdaly y darain odyeeody kory shey ol qoteey qokar air olyeeedy opcheeey aledar ar

lteedy qoky okdam lcheedam chedy shols opedy chcthedaiin alaim shar opchaiin schees tched soldy taiin okedy lcheeedy syedol kaiin
sald kchdal qoked qockhol schair qokey kdaiin okaiin opaiiin qochedy lchey reod lkeor orchedol olsheol
dsheeos oles shan kshey opchedal roly lchedy arear dain dar qokeedy otal lsar rg ctho or

ofee char rchain qokcheeod tod daiin oltdy ofchm reedaiin yteos opcheeody ar ordy qolkdy qokchy ockheody chdy
ted qokchy qotedam opcheeody ykody ols shedy soreol qoteedy lsho opchaiis lteody qokeey olaiir aiin opcheeody y
tsheedal dsheoy ckhor daiin shedy dar qokeedy chedy shey sheedar okshdaiin kair chey ochor shar ykcheor chdar dalydy solcheedaiin shedy cheol

yor okal okshdam lcheedal chedy qopeol qokchy olshor osed kchdol ain yteod daraiin qokeedy ltaiin ykchdo ltal cheey y
ytched chey chey am okeedy shol lsheedy cheey okos pchaiin ykal okchaiin qokair otal ykeeed qos qokaiin lsy chckhy
oty dar tedam leos otchaly olkal saly chdy cthdal lkaiiin shedy ol qopchor chckheedaiin sain ltd lkain aiin

ral cheey chedy dchedam kchdy chol shctheeey qokchedy chedy lkain ykeod ar chey dshar qokeey ycham aly chedy
lkeeol qopeols chckhdair qokchy olyol or leos qopeeey qokchedy cheeody chedy opchees qopchor ol soiineos qotedy oteey shaiir chey ar opcholy chedy
chckhey shedy sheol kees chal oks qokal odyol koiin qotey aiin qokedy otal shedar aiin cheedy dar ory lsary lchedy

qokal qol olyor aryeody cthedy shor shedy qopchy qokain dorey ol pcheedy keeey dar shedy aiirary lshd chor chedy
ofchain qokeedy ctheos ockheor sheckhy chdam odyair otchoy raiin sheey yshdy al dsheoly qoeedy am ssheey ol oteedy cheey ol
chey oryedy ykcheol doll kaiin lear dal pchol oteey chdy dchaly tedair yteedy sheey chedy olyas tchedy dy olkedy dar

qotal shes qokain daiin chckhedaiiin sheedy aleed ykeol okar chedy omeeaiin or opcheeedy qokedaiin lshy olcheedy cheey ol
rshaiin qofchedy ales dar oteey qokaiin chedy qokal schear qol dy aiin ykedar aleedy qodaiin qokshod otain yshed cheey dar
oshaiin qokaiin qokair shckhy al leal dain lkdar chey tsheedal ychor opcheeey oiinear rcheey qokom odys cheol tdol qol

lchedy lchdair qokeedy qokeedy dar or lchor daiin okaiin qopor schesy ykey scheoly qodaiin dleal qoes ykchey lkedaiin qopcheol cheey chedy

olr aiin sain koiin chey shedy qol shedy tsheos olkar dar qoteey yche qokain aiin qokchey cheol okeedy laiin otchy olkeedy aiin

lkedy qokair olkar otar cheees sheey ol solar ykeeey y ley dol qotal dar ol qotchy teeedy
qoteey shedy shckhy aiin aiireeo olkeedar aiin or saiin chey rd soleo okar olchdaiin oeeol dam shol oddy qokeeedy okeeedy aiin
okcheeedy daiin qotshor teol dardy oteey kshedy alary qools opedy oteey olkaiin lkchan kair qokchy qopaim

ar lkear qorol dy shol shos qokeey shedy oltedam ledy ol qotal dalyedam oteey pcheedy aiin otchy sheedy shedy daiireeaiin al
qokchy opdy lfcheds or darey daiin qokeeor am qol okal reed qoky chedy lcheeey otchedy qokedy redor air chcthees qokeedy ol shey shcthed qotchy ar
ydy al chey oryey sheody or oteedy dareey qokeedy al qokaiin kais olchdaiin okeedy cheoy doledy qockho lfcheeaiin air

olkar sheeod oleeor sar qotchedy ar odar dair areeor aiin qol sheey otedam okey aiin ockhedy oteedy pchair lkain shg dar

yeedal okedal ychdal solkdaiin qokeey lseain or okaiin ltdaiin qoledy schain qokeedain chedar shedy chol orchol

chcthear cthaiin shor okeeos okain qokaiin ytedy qokaiin pchedy tcheees olchedol shedy ody qokeey saiin cheeam aiin

qoty rm yor lo opchaiiin shey ltar chedy ykchain chcphaiin tor qotal chedy okar olshedy
okchey qokedy sshedair shey y qokal ytedain okeain otaiin chedy qokaiin paiin qokchy fched sheol daldal dar tcheor ochol qotey chedy
ctheeol qain ardy qokchey qokedy ols y ales lcheeedy lear tsheeoy dshy otain dardy lchedy

kshed dal cpheeol dshais oleedy shckhedy sheey soreos tsher qoe odydy dy aiin opchar raiin octhedy qokey chedy
olkedy ol qokal lsedal lkedy qoked qotaiin chckhy qokey choiin chedy chedal keedy shey qotar sheod chedy
okol qokain chol qoteey qokedy shes kody chckhy kchy ain chey qochedy dalo okar lchedy daiin olkeey or ykchain sarol

qoksheear chal oedy kchey qokal lchey aiin qopchedy olchees ckhy otaiin chdor chody psheear or pedain lseod chedy

ol daiin lchedam oteedy otshdy okchy lchedy qokeey qokaim oreeey ar dy daldar solkedor chckhy qoksho pl chedy qokal saiin ain

qoteey al qokey qokeedy lses rcheedy peody solaiin olyg okain lsheor olyal lsy qokain qoteedy olchedair qokey aleeo chedy qokal qokal ain

qotedor shedy okeey or sar shckhy lkchg saiin shedy ar otal olkain dain ltear ypchaiin otal qokeear rdy olyeed ychedy sedy

ofchey teesy aiin oky qoeedy shckhey pchary aiin schor lcheeedy aiin olyoly qoeed shedy dcheedy ar qotar chckhy

chedy dytod qokain olyam aiin ctheeol otedy yeos sain ykeod chey ykaiin ol lkain reeod dar teol yshain
chey rdal dyteal cthaiin olyoly lkchas yshod otar qol chedy oty lteody ol dalyedor ykeeeo ol

shckhy lkchar shedy qokshedy oteedy choiin qokeeor lkches aiin oteedy aiin oteey chey olkchedy qokedy lchedy qokeedy chdy aryeeor qotain aiiraiin

chcthor qokaiin qokeos lchdair chcthdy dolol otal lcho lchedy qokal lcheos sain keos otsheor shor kar ain
otey chd ardy qokol oteol otaiin okaiin qopchor lkear olym solkdaiin ychaiin dareey dar olcheeeody sheedy dar
lchedam qokeedy roiin alees ksdy okeain shedy dar opcheeos saleel kor tcheeody ol ykchod soleos

areeol okaiin qokod shckhy ol opchedaiin shedor ol oseom cheod chedy sairdy tshy qol qokaiin otear

oteey shey lshoiin okshdy daiin lchedy ary qoeear kcheos cthear qokchdy chedair ypchain olseda chedy odee ar

qolkedam oraiiin ykeol lcheaiin cheor qotchey kor qokeedy olshain qokal qol qokal qokeeor chiiin yshain lkesy qotchedy chain tchl chees sorey

lkeor lchedam dedy scheey chey chedy scheo lkaiin chedy qotd chey otedy qoes qoteey qor lkchal oaiin

air shar opcheal okchdair chdam ol dchain osoiin olkees odyeeody shedy soledy qotedy olcheedaiin qotedy
ykchear sheody chal dal chedy ofchdy dar okchol cheey oksheeey yer qokedy ar qokal shedy ltail lcheaiin raiin chor sheeor cphaim
orol rshor qokeey lkol qopchsd otedy shor shedy ksheol sheol chedy qokchdy doledy oteedy tshaim odaiin ctho

ol oedy kshaiir tm qockhear okeedy ykchor sheol otchey al qopcheedar chedy oty olsheey opcheos daiin qoteey oty olchdaiin orchaim

lair saiin cheeam dyteody lchedy lfchear lcheedal key ypchaiir qochdar qotal qoteeody kedar qotg daiin dar
tsheos ledy cthod shor ycholy chedy saireol qokal yteel oteedy ar cheey cheey she ol okeedy oddar
qokey okeees otedy sheol lkaiin al opchedor dar kchedaiin rain chey odyeod dy otain qokchdy chckhy lchedy lchaim olydy qotchy okchear

dar qokol otain lseesy keody qokaiin qopchor dalyol tchaly qotoiin lchedy cthedy ytcheey dar tshaiin sheol qokaiin ar
qokair cthm ar sheol yteain daryeeol shey shor shedy olkeey chol qokal saror chey qotchaly cthain qoky ar kchoiin chedy
okchy otedy aiin qotey olcheod okcho dar shcthedy tshdair cheeos lsdaly peody oro cheey shedy oty olcheedy qokaiin chedy

qokal y ytchais or soeody reeody cheod pchs aiin qol saiin al olkeedy eseey qol aram tdair lchor kcham lshal daiin chedy

sar qokchedy aledol lchedam okal otal reeeody otd sys shedy olkchey ral rchdy taiin odedam qokey olal dy chedy

choy otedy ol opchail qocthey qokal chdy qokal qokaiin qopchdar cheey qokedy okey okdaiin qokar qoteols qokal shedy y ldy qoteey odedy

ctheol qokal areedy chedy otched sar ain shcthedy lkey ykchedy lchaiin qokeedy olym dshes ain orar cheol

ykched dedy dy qokear chedy qokal keeedy chey lcheedal ykor dalyol okal cthdal daor scheesy lsheeos kedy chor shedy

aiiror dair lkaiiin dar chcthedy qokar ytdy lcheeedy dain chcthdy daey qokal lkchaiir chedy qokar aiin pcheos

chcphey qokeedy qofchedam pchaiin ykchedar qokeedy shedy chedy qokchy lkcheeody dshom qokaim qokar ykeam qokain oty qokeedy kain otchy ol

shckhy odyedain dshdaiiin shaiir oiineody chor chckheeey reedaiin dchair lkeody chor salos schdar qokchy ol

qokchaiin sheckhy okeesy otal ol oedam daiin okcheol otol otdar lky odyey or ykchy oteedy dshaiir ran ar

shckhaiin sheey sheey qokchedy cheol qokchaiin qedy opchy oledal sheedy ald oledair raiin ain chey lcher kor oteey lcheedain qopchaiin

aiiinedy daiin ol okal rair lkain chedy oteey qokeey ltdar sar lteedar chees opar dar sheedy ytchaiin

yeos kshod sheody rdy lcheedal okdol olchedy chcthar chckhais qokeedy chedy soledam rsheey shedy
ykchair dolol saiin ykchair oor okcheain sheedar rar okeey ar okeey qokedy dshaiin okeey odeol qokeeedy shedy aiin

ar oo qokeey otain aryeody qokedam oky ol tedor chok kor otcheod aiin ol qokchy salaim oteedy okcheeedy

darain lkdy odar tchair otaiin reol shol okdain keam chedy okedy chaiin qokaiin aredy oredam

lkcheod otshedy schdaly lseol qolkais qokeedy char lkor lkain oteees chcphdy rar aiin okeey qolkeor otchedam

sar alyol led otshs lchedy rsheol qokeey aiin dalyeear sheam olshsaiin ctheody ain daledy saiin shedy teos

lchedy lchor leody okchail ykdair ypchedy lcheos chcthey qokeeol ody oliin oped daiin okaiin chckhy
shy chol dal dam ror qopcheeody otedy dam chedy qokaiin taiin qotal al oteedy odyol dleey dar qokeey qokedam chiiin reedy otar ol
qofcheedal chedol opeain shedy dalyedy tchar ltdal cheedy ycheos shckhed lkm qokar qotg otal otedy ol dam qokdar

qokol ckheor dykdar qokchy okchy kor dair ypchaiin qokchees chedy lkaiin tedy shedaiin qokain qopchey otal ain teeal ol
otshain qotal dar sheey qokaiin okeear daiin okshedor shedol okshs chod qokal dleal ytedair oleam shedy daiin ar
olcheedaiin dleedain shedair lchedy dar shckhaiin odedaiin or cthaiin olkaiin aiin lkaiin lchaiin pchdal olyedam tody ol

dy oledol aiin okeedy chor ychd dsheeey qokchedy keeedy daro tshor lkeeedy aiireos qol lchesy qokal olshoiin chedy
okaiin ckhedaiin odear dal shom peedy dar chcphain okeedy cheedy kedor dar sheol lkedy qokeey air qokeedy pchdy

aiin opchdol qoar ychedain opdair qokey lteod rdal chor qotsd chs olkeey kas lkcheedy qotaiin shedy

tshedam opchdy chcthy qokedy daiin sheey aiin olches chckhy ycheeody olchy okshail shy chedy cthdal chcphor qokeedy pcheody

dy chedar opdaiin qokchol okedy qopchdar ol sheey qokain qokeedy okeeey alyey shol reod lyor qokeedy chckhy
otshdy dam aredy ctheedaiin raiin cphdar dain soaiin okol qokain cheed qokaiin ol qokeedy okedy odyar olchey qokedaiin ol
laiin dleey dshedair otal chaiir qokchedy qol opchoiin lkchm daiin pchear cthes chy areeedy chaly aiiindair oteedy ar

olkal chdy olky tedam sarey cheedy oloiin qokeeedy chol yeer oleeey odyy ol kcham reol shol chcthain pchary ol
qoley otal oreedain ain ctheal ledy shckhaiin ctheeey kol ykchan lsheedar ofcheedy chedy okol fcheor chedy pcheeedy
opchedy qokal qotol fcheol cthan shedy qockhor ctheeam olals opain cthaiiin qokchedy lsody chdy orchg otedy air qopcheam qopchey qokaiin olkaiin chdy

okedam qokeedy cheol qokal salr y otar qoair qokeey saly reeody ar okedy yshedy qokeos
lkaiin dar dain qoror qoteedy odaiin cthaiin dalydy otchees qokain cheedy olshols fchey ykchedair ytr lteeor lkain qol
yeer dar lchdy reeey oiinear okeey lchor chey lchair daleeor qotedy lfchady chdy kal qokeey lshg dair lteedaiin shedy dar odeeedy

shor dar ysheos oleeey qocthedy lchey y lol rshedam otchody ol dy lkcheees qokeey cheol tshaiiin aiin qokeedy cheedy chol
qokar am okal olkaiin qodaiiin shedy chol pchain lsedair ychd qokear dain olso okshal chor ches qol tchees chedy
qolkol qokeedy lkaiin qochaiin to kshedar al okcheeos cheeor qokal shdain chckhees dar tdy cheol ar lkdair qokeedy oaiin

tsheeedy oreor cheey ol daryeeol cheed qokeos tshedam tar odyedal qota shedy ofchaiin qokeedy qokaiin chedy

otol opedy okeey areey schy shey shctheol cphod or sair kal ltal qokeey olshaiiin chdy aiiraiiin chedy cthdaly ol
oteey chedy opchor dain qokeey chedy tchsdy shom cheol qoo daiin okaiin rdam opchor ood ykchedy qokedy
oteey qotedy dchs ar lchdy lkor qoldy shol okshe tair lkdy rshair dykol qotal cthaiin

oty dar yshdair kchedy lchey cheeo qokeey kees sham ain daireey yteedaiin shedy oleeed otchain shedy
ofchee qokeedy cthor okchey shckhedy qopchey qopchol qol dy okedy y otcheeey shy lses lcheal opchdal lkcheam oshdar oteedy olkaiin chol
okeey raiin qoky dar qopcheedar sheedy qokeol soleed okaiiin odyeedar ar qokeey olchedor chs lkain dsheody

olkal qol ockhy teol chey alyedy qolkedy olkeedy qed qokear tcheody olchees qoaiin qokshol qokeedy rchaiin
chcpheeol ain qokaiin lsheeed dar opchol ytchan dar yshees sheedaiin ocheedal chedy okchedam opchos ykiiin ol sches ol
lkey okedy ral cheol qokal qoks ol ldal ardar tdy ol qokeey qoteeey odyeees qokey chedy qoteedy qokeol

laly opchor kchees qokeedy or oteey leey sheey shey lkaiin olchdaiin tsheeedy ol cthaiin qokeey sheedy cheol qokeey dchaiin qotal cthed
sheody chs chctheey aiin lseedy octheor sors kor olchdaly lchey opd solaiin daiin daiiraiin otal qol qokey aiin ykcham ol
chedy olkedy lchedy qotal ol yeedal qokedy ytsy oll ykair opchaiir ytedy chor ches ol cphod or ypches ol

chedy air cpheain ole okeear okar qokain okaiin ol okcheds shaiiin tol oeody chcthy aiin qokal okaiin ol
ytchedy ypchdal ochedam olkeey shdol shey otar chckhy chcthos ol shey dy ockhed qokeey al tchedar tedy qokeey or
tsheos qokar dar qokchols otain chdy sory okeedy aiin daiin dar cthar oko aiiror dam lsheeor ytr sar solkes qoked

ofchol olkeedy odyols qokain ol ockheey daiin shody ckhedy lcheeedy chcthaiin sheey olchal pchor qorol kshdal
oky chedy oteedy lkeeol al dykeol qokal ain yshr qotchain qokaiin qokeedy shg okchy aldair cphal dar sheckhy shedy olkal qol dain chey saled
qokeey ain cheey shey lkeam shs okchedam dain qoteey shey olky sheedy ltr aiin opchaiin okal qokaiin sheol ol chcthedar char or

osaim dain qoty tedy opchdol olcheod qotal ykody reedy sheey cheol scho ykeedaiin qokey solky air ol lchdy or dy lkaiin qotedy chdy
qokeey qotedy qol pchedy oshear lkain ar okal ychear lseeey olshor qotshed qokeedy daiin ral okchdy shedy chedy shckhy qokedy
lchor ledy shedy okais odain cheol okal chdy shol otain yteoly qopm qokar olcheedar chckheod lcheor or

olteal otedy chcpho otedal kaiiin lkcheod qotey chedy kchdy ol cheey kr chdaiin ldal ypcheam chckhy qofcheor
lkaiin qocthedy chcthain oteedy okey ol opcholy al dairaiin te dar qotchy cphod aiin qoeeey lteed shedy qokeey soreos schy y
qokeedy kom teeedy qockheol oteedy oty ckheeedy kdy qokal cpheedy lsal oeal shckhy aleeody lsheols okeedy chckhy ochdy

aiin oseeeody qoe ykaly okchar dshedy olkchey shey otchy chedy opchod ol qotes oreey y pshey saiin dalyor okal qokaiin y
dar oshear qoky qoted okchg dar sheol ody ytchdar shedy qotshedam otal ypchm oko qokeey ytsdy shedy
lchey oiineo cheey keedy qorair qokeedy qokal cheol qokeedy ody lchdair oreor shckhair sorees lkcheeey ltedair qokaiin y

oreor qol aredy chey okeedy otedy qoteey qokaiin qokedy cheol oso qol deey ltedor chdam qockheor oky shedy okain qokchy qokeedy alaiis shedy
aiiror dain qokeey raiin shedaiin chaiiin odyedain dar sheody lshal daiin ytaiin chor aiin shar dam chedy okey chal aror
dar daiin ain daiin shckhy olkeedy cheeody qotedy ol olkaiin chedy qofcheedam ltg olyain ol chey eseal or qokey keesy ol otey qokedy

ytsdy oly dar shedy saiin aiiror shor am lshedair shor oleeey ocheedam kaim qokaiin dar lky sheeal qooiin pchor
dar schedar aleeo odor ysholy chedy otal chol lcheer kdar chcthed yeedal chedy qokey qoteols olkod dalaiin
qotol pedy oredaiin al shor kl shan qokaiin shedy shsdy aiin shol pcheedy y chcthaly ypchsdy ol sain dar kchy al

okeey chedy led olkal chdy tsheo oty kdol qokedy orcheor shair okal qoks air qotey saleeam olkeedy shey cheey chdy
sheedy aiin lm okcheody lkdy qol arear qoeod okshal dchey ydair qokeedy dar laiin pchy dar
lkeody shckhy qokchedy oleesy qokchy qoteal cheey cheeedy cheey ksd ain otedy sheey tchdal qokey air sald y opcheear shedy olkedy ol

osaim kchsairy lsedaiin chedy yor sdal qokchy daiin ar ctheeey qokchedy ar olkal ol qokeey lchdy ol qokedy sches ol ary ar
oedy qokal lsedal ped leol cheedy otchear chedy qoteey olody qokshes qotedy chey lshedy olkal sheed lkaiin otedy okey aiin
lkedy qofchedam ledy otshdar chcthody ltdal olkeey qokain lkcheeod ychair lkaiin chedy oteedy lchey oksheedar qokchdy shary rchol

yeos qokeey keeed dar yty otcheor okedy dar lsody chckhy tshor lod oksheeo chey to qockhedam
dchedam otedy soldy okeedy ychsdy lkches qokeey chedy odeo pcham sheeody kar raiin yteees qokaiin chedy
ytals otear qokal ypched dchaiin tchy chckhy redor qoes olkar okshoiin lkain lkchol qoky ykeey qockhdy daedam

ockhor lkee y rchaiin ochedy okeedy dar dshes okaiin qokeedy lsar okar otain otaiin ytdaiin solol okar aryo ol opchees chckhy
qoky qokain odyar dsheeor solm qokal choiin omdy aiin ol otal seor aiin shckhy okain dcho chckhey okshdy daiin qokchy dsheols daiin am
lcheaiin lchedy qokchy shedy ol opcheal ltedor chiin okain chan pchdy y daiin ychaly qockhedy chol lkain olchsd or osam lchedy

chos ykaiir ain qokar dar lkeol chedy sheey qokaiin lseeey qochedy okchol cthar chg dal am
ofchedy oteedy okedy oteos qokaiin oledar tod shr oiinain qokeey ychaiin ykchaiin lcheos qokeedy oaly aireedain okedaiin chol
yor qokeey kaiiin y otcheedy ar shcthody air daiin oledair lkey okedy reod oor qopedy okchy okchaim

dleey kaiis qotes or daror daiin okched qotar qokedy olchsdy shedy chor olshor ksho ctheody olam or
ochedam qotar lchedy dain chedol scheo aiiinain om qokol pedy qokal chey qokedy chedy qokcheed keeal shedy qokeey chedy
lcheedal chedy sheody qokedy qotain qokal paiiin qoeod odedy lkey dam qodaiiin chedy cthedar saleol daiin chy ol

chedy soledy cthed chcthedaiin qoes qokcheol qokeey kr olchody qokchdy shedy okshol sheol kar chedy
daryeeol ytes okar qotiiin qoesy ychor tsheaiin chedy ofcheeol qokeedy cheey alody kaiin dain lsam olks ol
otaiin tched lkdain okain odaiin dolod cthedy oreos daiin dchear otchees opy olkaiin dshg oto olkeey ar

lchor qokar old oky okos chey alyeody chedy olkeedy lseeey qotchol qokeeor or aiirols fcho qotal cthaiin qoe ckheedy qol
odeear ytg qokchy rd oteey kdy dchedy okeey lkaiin salaiin lkaiin raiin y lcheer chsd kedy okcheeeody qokedy qokchey y ysheody
sheody lsheedy okar am oeeedy okedy oiinedy ykchdair qoteey ardy olkar saloiin cthor qopedar shedal areal sheol qol

lkdy shor ykeeody ychdair dolol opchas keo otsho qokar shedy cthedair dar olkeey qoksheedaiin qoal oeeedy yshm
qoks yteedy chcthdy daain tcheain aiin raiin dar kal lchod ol qokeey shckhy opeain ytcheeol otsheor qol
cheeey lcheos ocheedal shedy ocheedy dar ksheeey chckhy otchdal ctheody daiin al soly oteedy shedy ytedain lkchs shey

dar lkeor chey ain aiiinedy tshod chdy qokeey yeey opchdair aloiin ro qokey dar aiirm ol
qokey chedy chckhey dar yteeo shedy cthor qokar doreedy or chcpheody dar okched lkain qokedy ykchol aro oteeedy raiin chdy
opchedy ctheel res cphor oteedy olteedal shey olcheeor lteeey alyain cheey qokedy saiin lchedy shedy opan qofchdy chdy

dchain daiin olkeey lsdaly chckhy pchy aiin tos ar otol fchedy okal ocheaiin lshiin qokain shey ordy opcho olsdy ol
olydair dain sheody qokeedy y lchey dar cheey dar okeey qokeey chedy tsheos sey soreey shsdy sheol olar areody
oo ofcheody okain oraiin qokey qos chedy sheain cphdair ytchr shedy ain lkeol lchey chckheedy qoteds keol

che dar qokeedy okaiin chsy lchedy sairedy tdal keeey ain sain qoeeody olchols opedy shol sheey shey
sedy qopcheol qotedy dy dardy lkeor am daree olkedy shey oteedy schedam qoteedy qofcheeedy opchdol otedy lfchdy solkal shedy
chcthdy lcheos lol sheesy ykor lcheeey qotchod lo rsheeol teeal ol dal otedy shckhol ytchedaiin qotedy

aiin sheckhy okoiin oloiin olchees aiin yteeey oto qockhedy cheey chedy ysheesy olshy okeedy y dain shedy
cheedy cheesy sheey qokeedy qoteo oseam lkchain qokaiin aredy teees shedol yeeedy dair chey dar cheey ar cpheedy ol soeody qol
oty ysheody seol okedy qocthedy cthed aiiineor qokal shedy olsdy ol qokeey aloy doled olydol odyal qokedy

cheedy qoedol cthee aiiinedy lchey qokchedy chedy sheody lchedy ty qokain otaiin qokaiin y ykes ocho dar schar shedy oteey oky sheds shedy or
olyaim ykeed okdor aiin cheol chey chey qoedal kear oky dar qokeedy aiin oredy cheedy shedy qoteey yko
otshdy daiin aiin kaiir qotcheor chdy sheol otedy sheol qokaiin qokedy olchom otaim dcheor ol ochol qokeedy pcheody solaly qokeeedy kdal

lchdair lkeody otshaiin peod chor shedy qokol pedy qokches ycheed ofcheor qopcham saledar shedy shedy
cheey ar qokaiin soror qokar keam qokain dar oair pshedy chdy otaiin tchdy chey cheeody keeos otedy
lkm lkaiin okain sheol olchedain okeod otaiin dar chesy qopchey cheey shedy yeos qokar chedy chckheeody saldy

shedy lkchedor dar qokchy cpheor rl chd lko oltor ledy qotaiin olkom sheod olyeody chor shey
dam cheedaiin qoksheedy solkedar oteedy keeedy qokal opedain qoear qofcheedal dar lkain chedy ockheody al chey chey qokchedy keor cthy sheol ytsaiin qokchy otedy
dchey qokeedy yer lchedy lchor oteedy olkos shckhy lsar raiin lchey aiin shcthear otaiin otain oteedy qokedy sairo

qokar qol dam ain dain ksheos chey qokchedy yky oteeo dshoiin chas dar tcheeey alyain lseols cphdy
ol opcho ldal cheedy cheols opched kedair qotchy qopchaiin cheey solkeeody qoes shedal qolkain okeedy cheol
lcheeoy ar ordy saredy cthdal chckhody lteedy sheey ol kaiir aiin olydal ypcham oteedy opeody taiin qokchy solchdy

olkol pain kshees odyeeody raiin lkar qokedy reeody keedy shedy ody al ol ypchaiin scheeol aiiinain sheol or
shckhy qotchedy okeeod qopchdy ytody ytedor qoair dchair qopedol shary reos olydol dar cthes sheam okeed olkeey shedy
ykcheo oltey dal oddar oky raiin paiin lkeed shdy darod daryeo chckhy okal chey alydar sches qoeeor ol

ytcheody qofchor okar cheor ypcheed oksheedaiin lchey qotchear qokeey shedy lkaiin dar cthaiin dshedol olkal ycheed aredy qokeey oreor
dchain okeedy oddam ain oky qoky ales qokain shckhy chaiir ain ledy schesy chdy ctheeody aiin qochaiin qopeeedy qokeey dar
cthear rchedy dedar chedy yshaiin opcheeaiin chedy otshdy dalyed ofcheos ysheody qokeey dchedy oredal qotedy

qoty okeear qordy fcheedaiin okees kady qokedy or lkeody qokar shedy lkod aiired chctheeey al chcthedy
cheey dar dal pchdam raly ykcheed opaim oteedy sheeam syeor air otal or shckhdy qokchy fcheedy ol shol cheol daiin qokair
qoaiiin rar ykeeey oiineody opedal lsaiir qokchedy keey solaiin lod to oteey dcheey al qokeey lchedy

dain chedol lor lkain am ocheeoy dar ykcheeo olg ckhedy dy soredy ochaiin aiiry odyaiir ol kchom or

qolkair okeedy lsdol otedy oraim
qofcheol daiin areos qockhdy
qoky am lkeeey otedy ol lkaiin qocthey lchor okeey araiin daiin qotaiin ykoiin ykcheol qokol sheedy otedy ockhaiin okey solkeesy lkey
okedy aiin opchees sheol ol okal chey ain olkeedy lkedam olkedy chedair okedy olshain ypchr oiinedy otal qokal ol oteey chedy cpheey shey air
cheedy ychedy soreedy odyaiin otal ytal arm tshor sar qokchedy dar saiin ol qockho kcheol sheey ltedair lkey

lchear olyedaiin aiin dar lkaiin okeod rchdal okcheod otedy chas keeol qokal pesy lchain ctheeody keeos kaim
olyedy schdair chcthy sheol okody lkcheeody dar qokain qopor dcheol ytchdy ysheody ardar kchoiin ar
qockho lchm dal aiin sheedar al kchy keeody chedy qokol otair shey oty ysheody leol qotain lkail olshor

orchdair qockhain okeedy oseeedy ockhdor ain daiin daror saiin ykoly shey laiin daiin aiin keod saly aiiror
dar kshdy lcheol dain cphdy alal chor ain keees lkeeol cthair leody shedar okeeor qockhain opchd lchedy

chey qoar ol qokeedy chedy lyeal salain qokeey lkchal raiin otos sordy opcheor ytd y
ocheer oleeod oleedy otey lkches ar sheol oedy otal qokshdam shedy qokar aiin ol qokar lkcheedy lkaiin shy qotedy lkear dair qokaiin am
ool kchedaiin yshdair olkal chedy saiin chsaiin dyto odeedy qol lkar qokedy raiin olkal otaiin yshor dchas rdar ypchaiis chckhal y

chedar qokeedy raiin shcthed lcheaiin otedy am sheedaiin redor qoped daireos kshar ychaiin pchees ar dy qokaiin am
sheedy daiin ytd ol qokaiin opeedy aleor dain tsheedy ykar odeeedy chedal qoteey ar tal ain dair ofchm ckhdar
sar yshedy otshear ytedy cheedy saledaiin chdy saiin shal chedy cheedy chedy chedy oteedy ol lchor daiin sorol kchy al

qotar olchedair dolain opchol sairol okaiin pcheos qol dyteol ofcheody rchor ocheedal cheam qokain chedy
ksheos otar sain am dched kshy aiin yshey shdaly shiiin oleeody dshar qotedy dy lchear sheol ol
seor otsheor olkeedy qokedy qokeeedy olkeeedy raiir aiin kcheesy qoas lseedy odyedol lchedy lkeal chedy

qokedy am qokal qoteeey tedy cheey ar qokaiin qokeody okaiiin otedy aiin lcheedam dar dal lkeo ol shckhain qolain lshs chdy
shor chg cpheody ror tail alyeor ol teeedy kshdy tsheos aiiinedy qokeal qockhain dardy
aiin cphal kr reod areedy qol oeody olkeeedy shey okshd oley shal ol ypchedal cheol chedor cheear chol

ardair qokeey odor qofcheaiin ar chey rd ypchaiin okedy otchedy olshedy soled sain aiin olkeey okeey qotedy otedy qoky ychedy saireody
chdy oeody al qokshey qokeedy cpheear cheol qoteeedy kaly sheody shedy shaiiin otol sheedy qoa qoteed oty kdaiin or qokeedy ldy
okal olchedair okaiin odyedol or otey aiin qokeedy solkear qokaiin qokain odom al okchedol ckhm leor dardy dsheeody qokedy

qoed qokal ldy al dolol cthdy okeey qol sheol lchdair dody chedy kcheeeody olcho cthaiin qopcheedar shey
lcheal kes shdol lshar rcheedy sha chedol okedy shedy qoeedaiin rshee qokeey qoteeey y kchg keal dair okaiin chdy
shckhy otchedy oledal lsheeam opchor okchey olkain yeedal qokedy oaim okey dar shol okeey shedy sheody reed ytdam qokar qokedy

reedy shody qokain kaly qokal alals pain okeey sheey ychor osedar qopchdy leol chcthair qoty qoksheeol olyedaiin or
olkal chckhody olshair to qokeey dchedam okeey qokaly qokar sheeo otain yteeey ltal ody oteeedy ychedam kchedy
sdy orom qopchdy olyg dsheol lkey otchy qokain shey rched qokeedy olaiin saiin tsheey daiin ol qotchy ycheey dam okaiin or

qoredy sheol tsheeoy qoy pedor chg qotchy qotaiir odyeain olkol okain sheod qokaiin qol oteedy sheeam otedy ral chedy

chaiiin qoctho ypchan lse qoky qokeedy redar tm ol chckhy chey qokchedy qokedy or otal qokain shey shol aiin chcpheoly aiin daiin chckhy

dalyedy sairod shody fchair opchy shaiis ks qokeal qokal alyeol qotchey shees soreos cheedy qog dal y
dardy sheol cheeeo dar qopain dy lfcheol chedy chey rody olsheain chey kdair cheey cheol okal lkchs chol
lkaiin qokchedy cheoly shes qokal sheod pchedy sdair teody ofchedy qokeedy cheey olchdaiin ctheor qokeedy ar orchoiin ain

areo shol aleody lcheedal chedy qokal dairedy lchey qoeody olyaiin schl olcheed okain sheeody kody lkchdam or

ar qokeey aleor shckhy qocthain otal qokchey ar lkain chckhedair leol scheeody dar cthey qokeey chol doleody daiin chedy
shedol otsheeedy qokal y olkeedy chor shedy otal qokain chey tear soo olcheor opchos qoy qokaiin chdaiin chedy qokchy qokedy
qokey qokedy daiin lkaiin ar daiin cheedy aiin ychoiin pcheos qopoiin odyedol chckhy qokchy chedy opchom keeeo shey lcho olyedy

chcthair shey qokol okain dar okal chey qochain ykcheel dar qolkaim okeedy qokaiin olcham aiin oair qokal shedy chg tey orcho

air dy cheey chedy rchdair qokeedy qokol okain qol otaiin al chiin po olyeds qotedy aiin chey qokchedy chedy daraiin ypchail keedy qokeedy aiin

cheed oror shary pchol qokeedy tchdair saiin rdaiin cphor sshedair ykor odar cthdy olchdaiin shl shey

lkeos sorees ar solar reols keos dadal osedy sheey qotaiin ky qopchdy olkeain oshed qokeedy aiin
shol chey qotedy oky keeedy dain lshol qoty aiin qokar dchedy aiin chair ofeey ar olkal qofcheos schedol chedy
lkor qokaiin odor ykchedaiiin oted cthy otain dal sheed tshedy lkedaiin keeod chdy yshedor dar lseeal or otchdair

olky lto ofcheedy ar oteey ytchedam lsedol odey okar olky reeey qokchedy chedy qokeo pchees res shckhy shedy okes dykor okal cthear

lchear oraiin qokeedy chais oldaiin dykedam schain qokeedy cheey ychdaiin solkeedar ol qokedy qokal oddair ctheesy dar

chols opedy ockheeey okchedy lshdaiiin cheeos aledor yteedy ain keod shckhod daiin solkair qopey daiin ain

dar am syal okedor chdy ypches dar ain opcholy chedy qokeedy air oair dain okshedy olky raiin chd al

qokol opey qokchr qokchedy chedy shal qoeeod rdy lkaiin otchedy chedy ctheesy ycheeol lkaiiin koly otedy tchdal daol kchd chdy

tsheedal qoeain reedaiin okeey lchedy solcheal qotam chedy qoteedy qokedy chol qokal koiin orcheey chol osedy qoky cheees opchair

raiin opchedor chs scheol shol ofchaiin qotchy osed teody dalyor qokal orear saiin am lkees otain lkches aiin

sar qochedy dalyol taiin olkar chd aredy dchs odyedor ar lkain dar tchoy qokedy lkaim shar olydal

cthed qokeey qokain cheol okcheol soreey qopched lcheer ar otshod qokal chdy tcheeam or qoreol teeey ol

qoky ar oteedy lkcheeey qokchedy olsheeey tain chor odyeeey oiiney otal olches pchdal qokal chedy rchdy sheeey kaly

qoky chedy qoteedy pchdar shol shey olkey olok cphm yteeey solkody lchedy saiin ol saredy sshg ykedam

otchey olchy pchedam leedal or qokedy ypcheor dshary redy okedy okshar shedy sm shckhed chey qokchedy ychdal qopor

aireal ar qoteey sheey rdy air qol qokal otain kol sairey ykches qoteol sain char qotedy ain ofcheos lkar aiin
dor lkedaiin oteedy shdaiin sheey keedain dal okey dsheedy okshed okol pedy ctheeey qochey sheey oteeos shedy shcthaiin olyeeody otedy
otaiin cheeor qokeedy chckheody ctheos qotey kar aiin lkaiin al ldar qokaiin ykol daiin ypcheos sairor lkeeo y

cthor okchdy olal yer qoy otain okaiin sheey aiin raiin cthdaiin chsaiin osor lkaiin oiinain qokaiin oteed sar qol daiin cheey shedy
qokey am qokal qokchy lchedy dar chey reain arain opchees shdaiiin chdy cheeo soledy qokeedy saro yshary okain sorey
ksheeol qol sheody qokeedy raiis okeeody dar dair qokeeedy ol olshoiin ofeey chedy chctham qotedy lchor yshedar ychsaiin teol daiin chor shedy

qoal okshal qoreeol qokeedy ypchedy opchair odeo yshedy sheody olkeedy redor ar chor okain sheey chedy
oreeedy daiin rdy opcheesy sheedar dsheod odain lchey qochey cheey shos okas cheeor okchey chedy qokedaiin chol
shctheol ar chcthedal cheody aiireed kain ledy lkaiin ain olyedol sheedaiin y oteedy okeey qol scheedain rchey

qokshdar sheol shckhy alyedy dleey chdy osam qokain dain dleal dar dleey char olkaiin ol sheol lchedam oreol oledaiin qokair
dardy olkeey qoky y orary air yair daredy or qoksheeor ain saredy oeeol soredam qokchey ykeees dar
olkeey salr rody chedy lkaiin aiin shol qol shedy aiirar por shol chg opcheeedy ody tchear sory ol

soley lcheor aiin dal ain opcheam air chctheed ar yches tsho chedy qokal chey alyain okaiin peeey cheol ldain shedy dam chedy
qors aiin oeey lkaiin chckhy tchedy doleom cheed sales kar qokain odyo dar okchey qokchey chary otaiin qotedy
shckhy qotchdar dain al olyedal ol tchear aryl chdaiin al chckheeor rchm otar lseear otain kal chedy

chr shedy okshdar lkar qoeedy opchor okcheeod otain lteeo qoedol ykeod sheey chedair cthear odary qokedy
shckhy qotchol deal redor lteees otol olkear oteey rchey qokeey qokaiin dar cthes dar dam lteod oteey reod qokar or opchr olkchedy shedy
chedy qokar ytal chey ain shey okal qokshdaiin ykeedar aiin lcheedal chedy dam okshoiin schm qokchedy ol qolkedy tchsairy qoees sheey shedy

qockhee ram sheedy tsheaiin ar qokol ckhedy qokeey odedam qockhol yshe olsheey qokeody shol ykody qolcheor chckhd yeedal shedy

shckhy qotchol otal ol aiired okaiin opeedy sheor okchiin olkain chedol lchey qokchedy ar ckhor dchor kshees sheain ocheeoy shey

rd cheedy dar qotal otal qokedy olchal yor qopchaiin odydaiin ody olkeey aleeor dar doloy chedy qoteedaiin olky okg orchdy al

dal okshal qoteey chedy scheedar ytey chcthy qopchedam qockheos okeey areedy al dorain okchaiis shedy qokeey okedy tdy otey chedy

lko qokey oleod dy oleeos chckhy chckhey sheedy chey dar kcholy reody dair daireody daiin aiin ol qokol peor chey shey
qoky odyar yeor lseeey odyal lcheedal keal solain chckhey okain osiin otain qool qokeey lkear qokeedy ody okey okdaiin qokeey chedy
tshdair kchsdy qotedy chedy aiiroly kedor aiin qokeey qotaiin teor cheam otchey cham otaiin shedy saiin lchedy qopaiin cheedy shey lkaiin shedy

dchol qoteedy shckhy oiineey dain dal ol soleeey char solkeedaiin aiin dy chear ol saiin soreedy al shol chedy teeo lchedy

tsheedal chedor res ol daiin cheedy y oty oleedy qokched dshs ar shey schdaiiin keeam cthdy al dchedy tchos lchedy

ypcheol ym tcheeey qokain saiin or tal olchom qokain qopaiin yeeoy qoar qotain cpheeam oles qokal aiin
shdaly shr dar otchaiin qokar ain oteedy qokdal ctheam ol octhdar dain qokeey olked qol qokeedy qokaiin dar

sar qol daiin rchor qokedy otor

sheol shair qokchdy chedy alal lkcheeo sheey tchaim tdol qokedy osedy shckhy solkal qokchy shedy otd sheey or

odal shody qokain dar qoteey sheey al sar qokedy ches rdy dam chey oteor schedam qokar doleear olchedal qol oky qoksheey olyam ol
sar qotchdar saiin otey aiin shol odeedy rody y opcheeody lkcheam ol chey dar ofcheedy raiin lsr qocheol ctham otchaiin qotal otar cheol
dalol ctham teor pal dairor ody lkaiin qokeedy raiin orom ream olkdal kshar olkeees qoked

qolchedy dy ytchdy lchdair dain soiinedy aiiral chedy ypchey kes qol lkaiiin shedy lss ofchain qokeedy oky ol okal qokar qol
ycheod chdy olkal lcheey dy okedy kedy cthor lkain chckhy qokal qol qokal okaiin shsdy kam pchedam tdy qol
lchey otchedy dar chcthaiin okedy qokol sheedy kar okaiin ain yaim daiin okal otd ol chedy ykchdal qokal qotaiin qoteedy or oty ol qokal aiiined

qolkain qoteedy chey otchedy ar olkal qotal ol shal shsy lteeor air otal shais oteedy ychody shsaiin saiin reedy qokedy chdy
daldy shedy aiin qokeey pdar qokedy dain ksheal cthaiin qokaiin oldaiin okeedy chckhar qol dain areol
yeedal oledar y chey ltees aiin lchey lchaiin yteedaiin qoreol ofchair qotal lsedain lshdain aiin qokeedy keol

qokal shedaiin otdal chey kees qokaiin olcheeey oryedy cheey otedy chey okshedair opdy chckhy qoksheody olcheod olkaiin cheol
ocheedal lshe tdy lssd res lkedy qokal char qolkdal qokal saiin chaiin olkal oteey okain lkchiiin cheol ary lkchs chedy
ar chckhey keeey fchdy ches shoiin qokey shedy chor ykaiin qotaiin qol kcham odye kaiin olyedaiin cheol

ofcheedy lkcholy qokain qofchol char qokshaiin daiin daldar kdaly laiin qokal ol cheey okees olkaiin lteam qokedy ain qopchol
yeeoy cheol dareody shol okey kaiin ardar qokchear qoky chaiiin y yshedy chedol shedy shsaiin dal otedy
qoky okdaiin ain shckhy olkchedy chedy otchey chdy ody odyeedal ol qokcheey sheody oksheeos dshes ofchaiin ory lkchs chedy

oty dsheeor qokol sheedy ar shol otaiin odyes dar dalyaiin dal cphey ykchdy rear keeody aiin qokedaiin lkchdam shcthaiin otchy opchm
ordair opcheeody oks lshes olshees oddy dar ordair ctheeedy shod cheey chaiiin qokeedy oly aleedaiin qokedy
lkeody lky oteeos qokedy lsar shedy tsheedal chedar ol qopol yteesy al tsd ychedor ol qokchy olyod

shols ckhdar chcthary odyeor okchees choiin dalain kedol dchair oky chdy chedy lchaiin qokeedy olkedy shey opchaiin qokal qokedy
dal y opchsd ol opcheees al keedaiin am yshedar oleod lkeor chckhy sheol shey sheod yteeaiin ol qopey odedaiin dar
cthair otshaim qokey chckhy qokchy sheoy qopchdy dar olkal ctheos yte dar ysheeo cheedaiin qol olkal qokedy

qokar shaiis olchees qotedy qofchaiin dain aiin chedy schaiin ykcham olkeedy chedar or yshy qokedy lshes chedy qokedaiin ar
ody oteedy al qaiin qofcheedal dar shol reain okeey otaiin yty chr qotedain ykedaiin cheear aiin
ol qotal qol aiiindy otal otedy olkeeedy otedy ol tsheedal olas ykedy sordaiin y lkol okchy qokain chy soredy

soror solom aiin qotal qokedy aryedy tchain shckhdy dar dal chor dar saiin lsedor ltes okaiin dar yshor

dchair tchair cheey kan aiin
oltdal daiin otaiin am shaiin
cpheey or tcheeody or dy lkain ral ches qokeey pdair lydy dytedair keos tshor kchedol chdy qokar oksheeor dar
tsheedal chedy qokal otain daiin al qoedol shes sheey tchdair qoy qokaiin chedy olkeedy oseol cthody chedy dy odain soledar keeor or
ockhdair oty okeedy shedy sain al qody olyain qokchey lyeol olkchdy kes ar qockhaly ypchor tey

okol peol opcham al sheody oleedy qokar dar daiin pchedy dar oky ols qotal okshesy rar shedy qokchy qoteear chdy
chey ltal pchaiin dair qokeos teeeody qokedy opchain shal dar ocher lshar soledy tal aiin olyeeod okain y qokaiin dar
kshair opchady chckheols sheedy lkam shdaiin daleor ykcheeol keeey qotchm chey ycheeedy tdy deor qoped

qokal chckhy otey or otsheo dam dleey chedy ykchey otaiin qokeos tain shes or otal aredy olkeedy aiin olkaiin dar
aiiinol shckhy rdaly or okey shedy lky yteeody teody ody ain aledaiiin olkdar qotal schaly qokshaiin ty dar
daror qockhedy otal okain daiin leos odaim dar ockhed ypchy qokeedy lkchar yke oldam lcheey aiin sheey chckhy

dar cthdy lkaiin am lo opchaiiin saleol lssdy ol cpher qook qotchy otedy olcheedy olyedy ockhaiin olkeedy odedy
cheey qokedy okol olkdar ockhdain ol chedy olkeey olkaiin qokeedy aiin lcheedal ar chckhey qoal pcheedy aiin chol soledy qokal lsody chdy
qokaiin shoiin rchor olteedal qoedain ytdy dalaiin ykchdar ykes reeey chey olkchedy ycheos olyeeedy daiin qolked oteedy sorear

shor chckhy lkain shedy yedam okar lchedy oaiin keod otshdy qokeey olsheeos keedy aldor qol
cthor doleesy shedy yedam year tchaiiin okchedy kedam chey qokchedy olo oky qokedy ol dain chedy olkaiin kais ain qokeedy pchaiin
oky chdaiin chcthaim qoldy soleam olchdaiin lshdal ypchdor ain opcheeody ain yeeoy chedy cthod lcheeoy kaiin laly

lkaiin alyedy chcthear otal olchan qokaiin taiin odal cthaim sheol kcheos opchiiin lkchar chcthdar sheey y qokeedy otaiin or
qokar reesy sheey lssy ks odeal opchedy ctheeey otedy dar ockheeo ytdaiin chckhy sheckhy dolol sald qockhaly daiin aiin
lshols qokain ol qoteey shedy aiin otchy dy chckhy ofcheos qotaiin qoal oteeedy chckhedaiiin otaly otchy shedy okain laim tchy ol

chedy chcthain darair qokal oeeor otedy qokees ras shedy olkain solkdain dshoiin ctheeedy dal qokaiin qol okcheeedy
qokchey redal oteey lchedy okal dchaly sheol pchm sheol chedy or qoteey qokeey or salar chdy oteedy choy qokchdy oldor olchal shckhy al
okok ychee dar shol peeody okes aiin qopcholy shey opchedy okar rd cheey or daiin ain

y okeedy sheey shedy okeedy keeal or opches qoam olkaiin odyeeor solaim sareedy shedol qotaiin ckheeedy dordal opcheeey aiin
ody ar rcheedy odyedar lshd qokeey ol okcha aiin alaiir keeedy shckhy qochain oteey qotedar qokeedy dshes kory chol
qokeey lchedy chctheed dsheedy otey qokain aiin shey qotal shedy chckhy qokdair olchar lkeol kais tdy aiiinaiin lcher ar oteey sheey or dy tshor

shcthain okeey oteey rees qotchor koiin opchdal opchin shedy rody or olsheeod dar tees chedaiin shedy ydy okchdy cheol
chey qokchedy dshaiin oteey ar sheey y qokeedy yey soreal rcham olches or ldy chdy chey olks chdy
daryeey dshedol qokal shdain ol pchain qokeedy ycheol al opcheeos kdair solaim opchiiin chdy otaiin olkaiin rar shckhy qopcho qolchaiin

ctheos qeody kcheor kshy qopchdair lair qokchy ssheody lts qoledy qokal ytoiin shedaiin okain tched
olteaiin chedy chor oledol qockhaiin cthor qopcheeos dar ypcheeey ykedy olkal saiin solkody al daiin otshaim shedy leoly yshain kchy chdy
cheeey lteedaiin shol pdair saiin qokain ldar qotedy cthees cheedar dchor opchedy lod olkeey olkain qopchair

oltor olyals opedy qotal qokal she olcheear sheey chckhy lkaiin alyedy lkee lkdy qokeedy ytody okar dar dam sordal
lchor olyg keo dair otaiin reeo qotedy sydy sheol olchsdy ol sheody chdaiin okal ar soleeod shedy oteedy dar
shedy opchail oiinain oty ycheo qokeos oredaiin aiin am qokchy okchdair qokeedy lsedal alas qoky qopchdar solol dain qoked

oko ltol qoteedy ol yaim opches opdy ldal sairedy schar or cthod qoteedy dar
daiin reees laly ochr lkchs ordy odyeed ar opchdair okchaiiin al aiiineeol al shcthar shaiiin lcheos otchg chedy
ytd olsod ctheoly teor aiiinedam qoky chal solo dar teeos lshedair chctheedain raiis lshal shedy tchey

chl chedy or qokdaiin saleeey chols pey ykches cheol tsheeoy lshedal raiin chctheeey air oteedy qokchy dar
oeody qokchdy dar opchedy keod sain qoeeam saiin qotedam oreor lkeey qokchdy shedy qokaiin aleedar okoiin qokaiin ar
ocheaiin chckhy cthed okaiin sheey lkcheed qokain odyeeod dar oteedy otaiin okody chcphor kchaim opchan ychar qokshor tg chedy

okol otain chckhd pchdar shol qokeey chedy otchesy al kcheeeo chal ked chckhey shedal oles otain lchain opchedaiin chedy
eseeol chedy schr qotchain tchair daledy daiin qokeeor aiin sheedaiin okeey ltedair cheey ain qockheody odyear opcham sheol ol aiiindy
okchor opcheoly ar qoteedy ocheeedy ockheos teedar ol ofchedy qokeedy ctheo qokar oke qol okeedy shor cheod sorear

dchedy qopcheeey qokchedy qotedam ypcheeedy daiin shar cheols kchor okeedaiin ol qokeedy qokear lchedy saiin qokain qokeey lteeey oryod qol lm
ytchdy opchor ypcheeeody shedy tdar olshesy okchedy okody qol kar shedy sain cheol orcheor dair lseeo qokeey dar
ded okedy oteedy dsheeody oks qolkee reed okeey raiin dar cheey kedor dar cheedy chedy tar kory qokeedy lsody shedy

char cheesy chedy oshair dain ared lkeody chd rar pcheedy chedy ytchor oseoy cheol solar chedy
ol qokaiin sheod qotaiin ol or qokal qokaiin lchedy chcfheeaiin lseain aiin kchedy okar lseedy alsy raiin shar ypcho or
yer dar solor dcheear ol okal chcthor schal aiin opcheam otaim okedy lcheeoy otedy reeey shy or dain chor lsan kshedy

qokaiin chdy qokal chedy yshed daryeey shedy okey kedol chdy dleedain shs qokaiin aliiin or qokar qoteols ykchdy ol
cheey dshes chdy cthedaiin okshe ytdol tol okedy qotchedy lchedy qoteey dsheeal oty tchedy ctheol qokeey sheds ked
dor okeey okaiin taiin okcheeos resy y ledy lkais kdaiin or chedy lkaiin air qotar chedy okchey otedy otchy ctheor ol

okl dsheol areedy keeey chedy tsheos qokar shedy opchail qotedam tcho daiin dyts ol oteeedy otedy ol
sheol shedy dal otchy sheol chol oteeedy qotedy ytdy ockhedal ain ctheeody chedol qoted okchiir qoes keeey shy ol ofeeol char areos
lkdar daiin qokeey raiin okchdy shedy qokal qokaiin qocthaiin qokchol daair soreos qoky ar qokeedy qokeey opaiin cphs lseda otedy ol

oltor tcheeody ykdor y tary chdy qokal opcheeedy dam qokchey oteedar ol ykan qokedy cheedy qotiir dar qokeey qokaiin aiin
ol cheey shedy qockheos oteeedy olsheeedy dal dshol lseear chedy daiin oedy sheol oteey shedy ol cheey shedy al
chey aiin daiin sheey py areos qotal oteey sheedy aiin olkchy sheol ytoly kdam lchey lkcham chdy opchedaiin ain dchdaiin chos qokedam

qofchor okar dar or qokol pedy olkal ypchey qoky yteedy odyeedaiin chedy qokar otedy shckhedy shckhy shedy air
chedal qokedy pcheedain qokedaiin aiin qokchody qokedy reol lor qopchey ychoiin saiin qotain ychar qotody otedy qokeey chedy
lkaiin alyey doredy chdy ods olsheeey ar oleeey ctho qoteey qoteey odyd dar cthdair qokchdy qokcho y

dy reod cthdar lkain salar qolkdy cheol shckhy shody sheedy chedy qokar olchan shedy qokeey okeain oks qotedal chckhy
qofcheaiin ches reeo qoky cthain opcha lteedy sairedy ykchdy ltaiiin chey qochdy okeey por ykeedy shedy chckhey dar aiiram qotedy
leody sheeal chedy dy sorol opeain shedy otaiin lseor dy oky ykeeol sar y orol ody qockheody lkey

shey rsd otedy chckhey kas qoteo qokchey okshedair cphor olkeedy shor shedy dalydy oledor qokedy aiirr lchedy olyy shey
rshaiin toly saloiin aiin keeey dar dal qokdaiin rear cheey ychan okdaiiin aleedy shckhy reeor aiin okched
qoksheor olkeeody air saiin shckhy qotedy shey daiin dalyeeedy sar lsheeey qokchedy chedy ykeees dykdy qokeey qokdal saiin okain yain daiin otaiin shey

lchaim shol salaiir keees qokchy okdaiin okal or osheody qokchy cthdy shdol ycheedaiin qol otaiin ral ol
soiinedy oedy olkar rcheol qokal dalydair qokal odaiin dleal yteod oor qokal alain yshey dar dcheedy qosaiin daiin al
solo lcheaiin qoeedy qokedy sorain kchg lsdy okal qotsheor ctheeey alyol lyaiin olkal aleda ral ol

dy ar qokal or lcheos oteedy otaiin cheeos ches lchdy chckhy qotal okshaim daiin lkain ychdair tchdy dykain sshd aiin
ordy qokaiin qokeedy aiin qockhed opchdain am cthy dar orchdy aiin ychedy yair olkeedy dar dsheoy okes qokchain
okaiin or daiin soreeedy yeedal dar daiin ltd qokeey kas aiin lkar solkoiin qokaiin qokeedy lseear oedy saiin okeedy qoeeam okchedam

ches chey shd aror olkedy qokedy dleeol dar ykes otain aiiindy dshs yteeody salols pedy olkal saiin chedy
lchey alyo aiiror daiin ordy sain oty chedy dy daiin aleed salr qochol qotal sheeo qokain otey lkchedol shedy
cheey ol qokal deey sheey solked lkeeod okees qoko dlee shey dain olkedy kes dar olyor daey otal schedy

dchor keed qotaiiin sheod olkaiin chol dain lkain lkchedaiiin qotain chedy qokcheedaiin kaiin qokeedy oain daiin sheey shedy chctheos qokal qokedy
lkeody qokchey ckhor qokeedy solchdy tdal sheey shedy olshd otaiin y qoteedy kcheos olchoiin reody otaiin qokeedy cheeeo aiin cthom dar
yedam qokar dar soly okes ypchol qockhdy tsheor dain chaly lyain qopeedar kas aiin okal raiin

chor lkchd dy chdain shedy qoty ol qopedor ar qopchal ain daiin cheedy chol sheckhy olchedair qokal am qokeey lcheor rdaly qokaiin dar
otar shaiir qokchedy oleed qol okeedy qoteedy lsheed rcheor opchy olchr shedy qokaiin qoair qokeey lchedam qotal qokaiin ol olyeeody ain
otchey keod olter dar ypchain daiin am otey chedy olyor qokear shy ytal okcheos okeedy raiin lkaiin reedaiin olkaiin chedy

dar chor chedy dam otaiin okeedy solkaiin okal okain opchedal dar kchy shedy lcheeedy aiiineody dy lcheody qol sheol qokol otair opcheeody air
cthor ysheol sshsaiin qotedy solkeeos cheedaiin olchsaiin taiin qoteeedy ychaiin odyeain chor chedy qokeey ol chey shckhy chd ool
qotey lchedy qokeedy ol tshain olchody rdam ar chedy ocheer chedy qoky lkcheor shckhy yshain soleeey dar ol qokar ol kcheeeody aiin

otar otain cthees raiin qoky qokal raiin ochaiin qokaiin al kd pchedy oddal kcham ain oteedy okedal qoky cthol dam qoley
tsheedal chckhy qokeody ocheos aiireeody opesy olar qokain oty qoeedy qokol opey olkal cthaly chcthaiiin ol cthdal
oteeo ol oseda ol to oteey olches qokedy olkeedy kchedy shol lkeey dy chor ychar lchear daiin otshol

dlee ytes ardy olyey ssheol okeey qokeey chedy qotes olkey saloiin cheey lsheedaiin sheed qokain sheam otedy lsedol qol
dchear olkeedy olkal ol otaiin oteol qokeey chees chedy shedy dain saiin qoteoy chedy otchom olcheees ain dain rshedam okeedy or
okeey qoal ral lchor sain ol qofchedaiiin fched chey qokchedy ytedol okar olchs dair y aiirar qotedy chey cheol qokal ol

otaiin peeeo paim ored qokshdar okeedy cheedy qotiin oted shedy qoky ked opchary chedy oro opchdo salor teol
eseey okedal qokdal qokchy oiindy qokeedy ykchaiin olyeeody chdy shckhy qocthey opchy rs dy lkcheeeo ol ssheedal olg solchdy ol
ykchair okchdy chedy cthes lseeos roiin dain chol yeedal ol olkal chey qokedy ches okaiin lssd qockhaly cthedam oteedy ol

qokedy aiin shckheeol yka dar saiin ykaly qokchy kcheor oain okal lseed chol opchary olchsaiin yshedy qokchy cpheody cheol
lcheedam qoeeody y ley okcho okedy aiin qokar chedy opchaiin qolkain qopchesy sheedar seor olyedam
sheedy otchdy cheod qokeey kody qolkeor opchiir qokain ol qokeey old am okcheeo shedy okey alal okg qotchy salair

qokol opey oteey qokeor lcheaiin oledain dar sholy dar qoteey qokaiin qokeedy ol qoksheor sheedy qockhdy tsheody dal aiin
rshs cheol arol lchedy aiiinair chedy orees qokeedy rdaiiin otain otar qokar shedy ar cheey cheeo oror qol cthl dsheedy qokaiin y
chedy dareor yor ypchdair otchy opcheol chm rees qotchedam qokar alar oaiin qokol pdy opchor

lkdar lkeor dardy qokeal qokaiin pcho okal ykaiin okal otaiin tdy chedal okeey dar oteedy dalyeey aiin sar dar otcham air
oo tedy olkaiin qokeedy red schedain otedy okshedar olchs cthaiin tchy chedy dal otey saledy olyail redol qokey raiin solor
solchdy okeedy ol dain otsheos qokeey fcheoly chckhy okeedy cthor doledy olchees ran chedy yshees al

eseeol qoes ypchaiin qokal pcheedy air okchey yked okar sain okok sshdy olchdaiin chedy dshar chey chdol chckhy qokal oteedy olshar ain
otshm qokchy okeedy chckheeaiin otedy shoiin yeaiin dar ctheey dam rey ypchaiin cthees tchor oshor tedam
yteody py am soleor shckhy alydar qoky shedy olchr lchedy shedy opche als ol daleor chcthor

ctheol cthom qoteedy rr oiineol dchedar tear oteey oreos ol chor lkain okshdam aiiraly qotes dy lteed qokaiin sheol reeey lkchs aiin
ofeey chedy schas olshear qokeear y shckheey okedy qokchedy ar lchedam dain saiin lseoly am qockhdar yshey qokal qotal chol
y otchey shckhain qopchedal chaiin lkaly dal qokaiin ol okedy oiindy olar shan olkain odyy dar chcthedam sheol air

ykchdal oiiineey qokedy opchedaiin olchdaly fcheeey dar yer lchedy qokaiin yshair opchedam otedy qoky qoteo qokchdy chedol ykchaiin
oteey qokshdy taiin daldy qokeol qokal ar chckhody aiin oteedy yeeoy chedy okaiin fchees pchaim ockhdor air olyoly y
qokchaiin cphdy olkoiin dar orcheeedy ykchaiin dalm kshair dchear okeedy daiin lkchsd oledol qokched

chal pcheeor odyedor okdaly shes qokdal aiiinedy olyam lchedy otain kshdy oty qopchor shal rd dalor
oraiin okey okdam qotsheedain lain ksheeo ain lcheedal dshos dar ykchsd qoeeor redy otey oks al
shsdy qoeeos dar tam aloiin aredam opcheeedy dair lkee otchar cho ykchedal lchedy yor daiin dalor

shedar qokshdam chedy okeey oteey odysdy qoeeos qotedy ycheedaiin ctheo ledy otshdy daryeey lchedy okal chey chckhy qoteedy y
tsher chg ycheeol salal tshed sheol osey dchdy okain qol otshdar opchy sheol okshedor ykeeeody chedy
olkal shoiin qokchy dar ctho lkaiin cheol dy chdy qokaiin otdam alain qokal shctheody kchod qokeey olkaiin qoeedy y

kchedy qokal ytedair qokeeor shas salr chey ychor okal chedy rcham qol qokal otaiiin qoeedy olsheeody ar
dleedain chedy cthedol okshaiin otey dalyor lchdal rchor oain okaiin chedy qokar qoksheor shckhy qopdy lky shey olchd shey
cheey dar qokal chey sheedy raiin ypcheol ardy dy aiin olcheo otchy qokain qokeey soreody dain chctho qoky tchor saro oear

reeor olkeey oledaiin olkes okshaiiin lkaiin oiindy aiin oedy ctheol sedy opchees oly ted daiin otedy
cheey ykes sheedy tshain shedy okchedol otesy lchedy lkain otedy chedaiin qoteedy al chol saiin okedain kear schaim lkain chedy
cpheody chckha chedy ockhor ary chdy dykaiin tshor olyeeo dar odedy qopcho olkar olchal shedy

qolkain otchsdy chdol oldam chedy ltg daiin choy dar dal daredy dal qokaiin okeedy y qockhdy cphaim qoldar
otal chdy daiin shedy sair qokeey sheees sheey yteeey oiinedy otal aiiineos daiin sairedam rshaiin ypchdaly qol lchain
oshaly laiin okcheor shal dar oteey qokedam ytaiiin qotchedy shedy saireor schain qotedy doley okchor sairedy

ykchedam oltaim tchas lkchedam daiin otshol saiin ypchaiin shckheey oltaiin yaiiin qotedy sham chdy qokchy qokedy chdy chey chedy
cphdy okain oteey aiin shedy opcheeey shedy ches lkain olcheeol sheol ltey olkedy chedy chcthan chol olkedy chdy qokar or qopchary ykeear al
cheeeody olchedy shol ordy schdy ltedor qod okchol shals fchedy qokeey qokaiin she lsesy ar

qokey cheeody shedy al qotal ars chedy shckheor ol sain otar chedy qokchy syeody chdy tes shs lkain chedy kchees dar qokeey chcpheor qokeedy y
chckhey ykos shedy cheedy ain tor lkain qokedy sheckhy cheeody ol chedy otshdy qokeedy ychail lcheol qokeedy otshedam
chey alydar shesy reees qokeey shedy cheedy oleeor qol sheol osheey qoreody pail oiiney sareody tedam

olkol pol qokeey ardy ltal daredy qol aiiinol qopod sordair sheol opched shedy cthy okain ain oteedy shedy qokchy okain ol otcholy aiin
qoes ctheedain sain chedy qoleal dam odyeeo qoky qokedy qokeedy olkaiin am yeedal ar dain dchedy dain solo ar qokeedy shedy

sheody lkchdy chey qotchain qotaiin shd qokaiin aiin chor shey saiin or odal opchaim soly qokeedy olchee lked dy qokeeedy chdy
