qokeey otedy qokar raiis chedy qokedy scheeey ychey qotal okedy qotchear qokaiin okain qokaiin odm otal ked okal olkaiin teor cheol dalyeol okchady ol

qokal otedy qokeey qotaiir or opchees lkchal aiin opchoy chdy lchail ain kcheeedy oseoly dar alal or
sain ytedaiin qokeedy chedy ofchedy tchos al dair qoeor dain oo soiineody daiin lseees qol qokeeol oteedy ol
qoo dy pd chol dchedy tar lkchoiin shdar okeey olkeey shear qotal otody sheod ol

lchdair aiiinedar ykol ykcheeey ol dal qoked yshedy cheedaiin qockheeedy ockheols dar yshan otain ytdain kar qokain taiin
dar lsy otaiin chedy okeey oks okeey shedy yteain y qotols opedy keed chckhd sordy ctheeol qokar shedy
qokchey chedair shedy sar qokedy araiin kcheeos aiin lkol daleor chey olkeeor olchm dain ocheo qopaiin

qokeedy sheedy qolkeeod chckhy otedy okal oteey kedol chckhy dy olseody ral chedy tshor olyaiir reear cheedy kal fchody shedy
qoty ran lchdy olches yteedaiin olkeeey cho daiin lkaiin qokchedy chody qoteeor ol octho schsy ycham qol
cheedy chedair qokshedam qokey qodaiin ches olkedy keeody shedy aiin dy olchdaiin qokeedy chol otaiin sheam qokain sain qotedy

chedy cheey kar shol ar dleo chckhal cheey okshes olkoiin chckhe olchg otal olshaiin chckhy qokaiin teody olkaiin chdy
daryeal ol dal saireos qokal ytar sheedy ol shol dar shcthain daiin soed qog shey qol qokeedy kedar lkchedal soraiin
ytory or rchy chedy oteedy qokal ol okal ardaiin aleeeody aiin ykcheeey lshair qokar aiin qokeedy shctho opchedor qotedy odaiin

areey lchs chedy cheedy raiin chey qotchedy oloiin ches qokshey okaiin odor y opcheeody chedair olchesy ran okaiin cheol
lkm qokeeor or olkeey shol che qodaiin shckheeedy oteedy qed qokeedy qokal chdy doredy qokal qotal shok opaiin oseeey kaiin
shedy ykchaiiin olkm sheody lseesy ol otaiin ltaiin pcheeol rcham res sain aiin opcholy aiin ochor lky ol

qoo dair dleo ar saiin ocher chedy qotchey lkcheedy olcham aiin chor olches ol schaly oseeey olshaiin
chedy sheody qokeedy kody chdy dshe aiin lkail qokedy olcham ytal soredam oteey ain oo ytchiiin oleeey ar
chey alyedy otshor qokchy olyain lchdair ypchas ol dykdy opchaiir okdaly or qolcheor cthair dair oltm cheol

qokol opaiin dair sheey olkoiin shody sheedy dar chckheedaiin chckhd ol sheey otdaiin yteey qokar or olyair cthdar chey dar
shsy dar tcheeos saledol oteedar olom otees qokaiin aiin shckheeedy chctheed chedy olsheod shckhee kshdair
oaly shody qokain ches sarair otal al tail qotchedy chckhy olkal okain okchor qoedair cheol cthy tedam qokchey oleeey chedy

dar oty lchedy tchor shctho teor or lcheody lteeey okchedy ychedam ody ytchan kan opedal y
okol olkain lsd otshdair daiin chckheear ted shedy lcheedal olal aiin daiin oleeed otchdy lchedy ctheeo chedy shckhy rd oedam
schor pshedy daiin qofcheedal lshal okes qol ofeey otedy osary shes okain ochedy dar lkaiin qokchedy qoteeol lkedam

odydaiin chol olky qopcho ykchdy rr lcheedal qokedy chol aireeol cheedaiin tsheer kor otaiin keedy keed sheody reain otsheos
lshsdy dar otshdam chdy ykdy ypchy ckheos yeeor qooly ar tey cheesy aiiindy aiin olkedy keedy chckhy
olyain okal okey chdaiin riiin chdy qokeedy qokeey raiin yeos shcthear chey dar opchedaiin qopchor keain qokaiin okshoiin otshedam

tsheor rail oiindar opchor aiireeal aiin tchedy olaiir kedam lcheeoy lchedy oky peeedy aiiindair ysheor tchedy
daiin ral chedy shol ar oseeedy daiin lkedar qokal oleod lkain aiin sheol otshm qokol qotain ches qokal aldy daley ol
tsheedam oledar chdy sheol qokedam qopchm okeey chey chair sain ol osoly aiin qotedy ctheod ain soly otcheeedy qoteey shedy oteedy chedy

sar olkchedy okiin pedy cthes chdy qokey otedy qokey olchdaly fchail cheeey qochey soleody sey chdy
sairdal ykchos peos okal qokain yey opchees cheeey otchedy chedy dair lkchal qokeey keeody keed qokain opchaiin
cheey ol otal olkain otedy osey odal qokal ytody lkcheedy lkaiin qokchedy ol ockhor qopcheed keod pcheedy qoaiin

ofchedy qokeedy okeey olkdal doldair opchees olchy oldy scheeo olkain lkcheedy lsg solcho chdy olkeedy dar ol oee daiin ol
okol fcheol ytchdy chctheeod olaiir chey okchedy qotdal okaiin rdy kchal aiin qotey char fchar lko chcthom dar opchady ar
dar otaiin qokaiin lchedy qokeedy kcheol qotal olkar chedy dy sheey chs qotody chol dal chedy kcholy oksheeo shedy peod cheol

oiiineal ychal daldy cheey shedy oteey chey choiin otshey chdy okal otain olkal sheey qoteedar dar qoty ltam dshal okeeedy chedy
qokchy shedy peeody chdy odees ain kd lsy sheey air rcheol dal soreeedy cheey yksd lshoiin ar dam cheey aiin
shckhy qokchedy chedy qokshdy qokain osor opchdaiiin chckheeey shy chl qopchain dalyo lchor dain qokeor dal qotchy cheain olsedy

chedy shody qokain chckhy lkedaiin chaiir aiin dair qokeody daiin otchy choiin sheeey dar char lkol otchdar saloiin qotaiin ar olydol al
ykchedy lkaiin aiin lkol okchy qoeod okeeor ol okaiin cheeey qotchol sheody tdair lkain otain shckhy ar
lchdair opchar ar lol dar oraiin olyeda alar chedy sedy shedy ykchr kedy okal qokar raiis qoeod cheey al

qokal shaiir okdam qol otshdy lchaim lkam solkeeor redy lkaiin oryo ykchaiin daleey okedy chedy
olydair dain qokeey qokaiin ol oeeol olyody lkcha ltedy qoty chs lkchar odyees sheey redol oteey chg opchaim
olsheeody ched okal chckhy oky air olshe qoteedain chody ar dal qokeeor chol qokal otr dar

ral oain qokal ykchdy sheeeo sardy old sar oiineey opchedain cheeody chedal shedy sain lkcheesy lsheeam dal aiin
shol cheeey lkchal lkain al oteey qoky chckhy yeor chody chok qokal otedy odyear chcphey qokchy okchy shedy y okchey teal pchedaiin cheol
lchedy qockhor qokedy aiireol qokeey lkaiin chy oleeey al dain cheey ksy chs chcthdair shedy dy cphey qokchy okchedam

qokeey qoiiin am lkar oldal dcheey kchary y sched ochedy oteedy chol lkain chedy oeedain odedaiin ol
qoiiin reeo qokeey cho ctheeey kol ockhdair keees soleedain or qokey keeor qotaiin olkeeo ote chcpheedy okdor qol
schair qokal olkain tshain chor ar schedal otsaiin cphol cthas chckheeor qokeedy cheom qokchdy dar qokeo pchy chol

otar ol okal lseod chdy pcheo yshair schair cheey ytedal okeedar dcheedy dar soleeey chedy qaiin
solo aiiindy ykchey okar choiin qokdar solkeeod chedy tchaiin olya y shes yts pcheody qoteey qokaiin ol
chey qotchair cthdal doreor odeeedy daledy qotal olchdaiin odain qokchedy or aiiineol oseeey oryey olkaiin qokeedy lchedy sain chdy

ofchol qokeedy air chcthedy cthr chckhedair cheey al shdain reear cthaiin lcheaiin shey sheear chckhsy olshedal otaiin or
otshain ypchaiin ofchdaiin qotody ytedor shey otchary sheedy lkain keed chcphor olyol lshar chg kcheol
otaiin sheedy rcham or okal lseoly chedy tchdaiiin cheeaiin kedam daiin otol pdy qokey kedal shr qokol qokain qotedy lkam cheol

lkaiin al qokeey otedy lyeey shckhaiin qokees aleeam shedy ytedair or qokaiin ar teedy ytoly chedy syoiin chdy
chor kom okain pchees ol qotal qol opcho okar sheedaiin qokshain okeedy qokchey oleda qokedy ain olyol
okedy y kshod lyeey lyaiin otaiin qoked qokal olchedor chedy tg keod dsheeod tedy otchy dy ol

ytchdy lcheer keos shckhy aiin qokar aiiinain daiin olkedy lkchedaiin ckhed air sheody qolkdy dal shey ltal chedy
shckhy qotchol saiin qokain qotar or okchaiin dy ytees fchdaiin olchdain or salal lkchal lyeey dar
opchol qokchey olshair qokol ckhaiin ykchiiin olkain ykal otol ckhedy okal otal cheeody opey ofchain qopchar okshal chckhy

al qopeed keod aiin dy oky oteedy air lchol chckhey qoedal lkol aledor ytal okaiin qotedy qoky shedy qokain dar
dareeol opchoiiin qokain ar qofchdair otar ar lkaiin rar qokaiin sheedy ycheam par sheain daiiraiin oty ol qopchedy
shckhy al aiiinm opchr chedy tedy octhl chedy qokeedy ockhedy oky chdy olkeedy odyes okedaiin qotain dar

qokar chdy qoky okdam yeaiin chedy dched shey chol qolchain dam lcheor al ocheedal dar okchor olyedar shs chedy
qoky ar daiin qokeey or qofcheaiin shey chs lsedy ykchair okedy olchg kor dal lkaiin olkchedy chedair qokar reeo qokeey chedy
olkol peol dal dalor qotshee cheey qoary qokaiin lkchaiiin qotcho chedy cheedy olshaiin cheey kody shoiin olkedy sheeor chedy

opcheeedy olyeer lte qol qokeedy cthaly odor lkdy lcheaiin dsham fcheees aiin kchedar lkchan qokeey chedy
sheckhy qoal qokey lchedy chor ar oteedy chey qokchedy okeedaiin lyeeol qopchey lcheedal cheeey qokchedy shedy okedal cheeo dshal opchdair
lseeey sar salor lkaiin qotchear tedy qokeey sheedy shckheam kaiir kdar olyam oldo lkchos lkey

dair am opche chedy tar olcheoly chedy tedy qokedy otal oseey sain chdaiin reor opchaiiin oryain dar okcheod al
qokal shedy okar y sheey reedy otshdy shody ckhaiin lkeo am qokeey okoiin olesy chedy shol okeey dar
lkaiin lteod lcheos dam qokeor opchg chedy dal qokaiin dshody lsdy olyey ochedy oredal okeel dshal opchaim

opcheos olyar shedy dsheed qokaiin odal qopedy ofchs qotedy shctheey olkar olkar ltedaiin olkain aiiinedy solar ar
y okeey dsha cheedaiin qokar lsheds omaim shckhy chedy okeedy lcheaiin ykor shckhed sheol ytcheor ofcheey solky dar
areeor saleol olyg aiin qokal ksheody tsheeoy fchal oteedy qoy odedam dal odyeod shsdy chedal lkedy

aiin daiin chor char qoaiir saleos qofcheedal kedam sairo oteey qokeey qokedy chals pedy oteey qotaiin al opchor otaiin chedy
qopchol cphaiin saiin ofcheeor olkeeody cheain olseol chedy dleey oledair qockhey ool otchear shedy sain qoreol teor
ycheees tsheer okedair rar soreedy ol qokal cheedy kody qokedy ol shey daiin ardar okchady shedy lkcheain qolkear oteedy lcheal y okaiin chckhy

char oked otal chctheedain teed chdol qopcheor olsin qoteesy ykor ocheeey qochdy chey qochdy ol qokeedy otedy
daey saireedy ol shedy chckhsy oleear qoteey y scheol okar cheod odain qopchedy ksheeod chedy pchy y
shm qopey cpheor ocheedal okeed solkeod sor cthary salain qokchdy qokain aiin daiin lkedam kcheedy qol otcho

lcheos dy dleey chckhy chcthy chckhdol ykedal sorm okcheeaiin shedy aiin opchedar yshedy olyeeody olshes sain shedy y ool qokaiin pchor
dar chey rar kais otaim odear okeey qokaiin cheol qopaiiin aiin olyals pdar ypchaiiin qotchol lchdaiin cheeody otedy
otshedy ypchedar oteedy shey seeedy dched daleedy ar okoly chedy ykcheod ran qokeeor air ody qokal ar pchy am

lchedy qokol qokain char qokedam odm soldy lsar ar las sheol qoeeod keeedy qokar olkchdy y shedar shedy chedy ody
qoky okdam qokchey lss otaiin ychody al shor chckhy okeedy cthol daiin qokedam chey lkcheedar qokain ain seedaiin cheol kshedal aiin
chedy yteesy shol shedy ar olches dair lkchaiir qokchedy chedy aree dam roiin qokey chedy oeor

lcher chiin opedy ykcheesy ychedy qokaiin qokeedy chdy ctho qoteey otaiin y ykchy ycheom chedy daiin dsheol qolcheol ytcheeo ain
lcher dar oteey lsal qokeeedy sha shedy soledaiin koiin qokeeedy shedy odyoiin dar ol qotshiiin chdam seol dar daiin chiir ol
dy ar qotal sheedy olyeeey aiin soldy yeos aiiinol dy ar qokchdal qokal areeor ltedar shedal lkor

dchedy taiiin otchedy dar ypchdaly qokedy osaiir solkeod pcheeor ol okedy qokchedy chedar otedy otsdy aiin qokal qokaiin chais olshey syaiin
ockhor oky qoty shedy opcheody air opchaiiin ain teeor dar dy pchain koiin oshaiin ctheed cheol oky lseedy odedy
lchedy qokshedam shedy cthaiin shckheel chedy qokedaiin redair shey aiiry chedol ykchey sheey qokaiin am schain shar ol

qockhdy chedar shey oteeey qochol daiin oed tal ain cheedy shdam ycheeeo qol qokeey qote ytdaiin okaiin chedy
oky lchedy qokeedy lcheeoy dshal odyd okaiin reedy opchaiin odaly qokal eseey or qotal okos shedy okar ltsy chckhy
shckhy qokchedy yke oleed lkaiin qol oky oleedy cthor qockhdar qokeedy solkey opcheeedy opcheeoy lseedaiin ol ty chedy

cheeody shedy lcheor aiin oreeedy dy solkeol qokal shcthor dy daledam qol chcphedy qopchedaiin ar ofchdam reeeo chedy
dchair tchdain chal raiin cheey ar lol otal shedy chctheed lkchear dols saleed shol aiin lshedain reesy pcho
cthdy qotol qokain ol ctheor olchal olkedy olchs solkdar okcheos daiin lkeol qoky chedy lseod chckhey y dykol

ordy qokchey lshar or olkchdy chedy ykches ykeos dar aleeor qokeedy qotedam chedy dleeol chedy ctheedaiin raiin lky lteedaiin arm
shckhy qokchedy dar otchey qokain otcheos okcheeey solkedain dar okeey qoky lseeeody dar qol cthol lkeeey qokeedy saly qokaiin opdam dar
kal sheol chedy okcheeody cheear odor tam ykes saleeos otedy sheol kam sheey shedy dalyaim ctham qotedy

daiin solkal solo chal saiin ar sshedy opchedaiin qotedy olcheod shckhy aiin tam okeedy ain sheody oky y olkeey kr olkain tchedy
olcheeam ykeo lkain kr chol okeedy okeey ykaiir aiin qain aireey cho lkaiin alyedy soly qokedy laiin
ykchdar doleody cheol cheey lsheody aiiraiir lsody qoky odyedar oteedy kdal chey qotchol qokeey ykey opchody ol qotaiin fchs dar

shckhy alyeor qotchor dykear oeey aredam pcheeol qotaiin qotaiin al qokal dalydar tal ain sheody olkeedy olsheeal ol
qotal odyeeod otchee daiin qokar rar qokaiin sheol lseeor okeey saldam qotedy otchy ycholy aiin chdaiiin chedy qopchor oltey
qoky air oteey lkaiin qotedy chckhedar rdaiin qokaiin yteedy qotal yts oksheed ol otedy dal shol oteedaiin qol sar ykody cheol

dar saiin ar okchy dy odyedor saldol olshiir qokedy ol lkain qopcho olkaiin qokeos chedor dar qokcheos lchain
lchey ain qopeedy dar yshes y sain ol otchas chedy oteedy sheey sheedy rchy al ytcheey odyail qol aiiinody keain y
dchey teor qokeedy olaiin ctheam shedy olyol olches shey dy qokaiin sheol cheol teeody chedy saiin lseam aiin sar ar

okchdair dy lchdam lchedy dardal sairor dal opchair olkchdy oldaiin odeol cheeo okeeor okar sheeor sheey shedy dal ain
ofchedy tchedor chedy daley qokeedy qoeeol kcheam ots ol olkeedy dar lseedaiin qokeear aiin lkcheam qokchey qos oleeor chedy

chor lsdaly lkaiin chedy olyees okeedy ltaiin ctheeey okeear lcheaiin olsheos dsheed ycheeos shdaly okedy ols chey qotchm lkchaiin ctheeey chedy osedaiin qopor
qokar ain qokey dshar kedair lsaiiin ofeedain olchdy kcheey opchs shedy aredam daiin lkain am qockhed lkedam

opchedy qotal or sain raiin qol sol daiin odey olkchey chedy shol qokain qolcho olkaiin okshaiiin shan al

cthed qokchy saiin rdam raiin aiin lkeol olkey qotedy qokaiin or qoldy olkaiin rdain okar lsar aiin

qoky oleedy otal chckhedal shey sdy qokal kam otain chckhey qotedy olyain ocher chedy okchaiin okedy qokol otear
lkain chedy otal chctheey aiin sheody chckheear qokal shdaiin chedy lchedy cheedy kals otain oles otshdy aryedy shees qokeedy ychaiir chckhy
ol lcheey shedy qokeey qotedy lkaiin y qdy olyaiir qotedy chdy oteedy otshor dchedam qokal po qoksheor shr okol qotain ar

lseeey ain okeey areey shedy shckhaiin shcthdar shol pcheody chs shedy dar daiin ltdaly dalyeor ody okedy chedy
aiirain chey al opchedol chdy saredam chey dar dair olas chal lkdal dam lkain odyeol daiin lkaiin al qopchaiin
otsheey opchair qokal ars rsd lshs aiin sheees cheey chckhdaiin ched okal ytdaiin chdy sairdy chey chckhy

dalo aredy saiin raiin olkeey dar otal shedol okain sar chedy ain okcheeos chedy ksheody opcheam ykor qokeedy ol
qokey aiin lky qopchdal oteey qotain qokeey qokaiin ol daiin okeeedy ol olkeedy keedar sheeor qopchaiin yedam dal olkey oksheor
chedy otaiin qokaiin ar qokeedy daiin ol ypchody chd arain okeey raiin shckhy ain lain cthdaly lshor yshaly

okan cheeor keeal olcheees oleeody shedy pchedy lchey ain sol dchaim shedy
tsheedam chedy shol lsdam dshy chedy qockho solod qokchdy qotedol shedy yshdy qokchey cheol pchy otedy
dar qokeey lkedy okeedy qolkor qokeedy or tsheedam chdy cthedor dar oedy tcheod reod olkey raiin okchor shedy

lkaiin lkchody chedy qoleol dchod opes qoees keeaiin shedy ol qoty shedy opchees shey chom ysheol pchy qotedy
ytedol ol qokchey ykaiin okaiin cheol dleeol chedy shedy lcheeoy chckhy dalyaiin dy daiin ltaiin teos qotaiin chdy
otal ar qokey lsal ypchaiin qotey oksheeey chckhy ar ted olkal saiin ar shar qokeedy shd okshes yched qokam otedy

tsheeedy lko lsedair solkeedy olcheeaiin kdair opchedar qokeedy aiin kchedaiin or cheeody qokedy qockhedam otaiin or
otal keed ol opchy keeey chedy qopcheeey alyo shctheeedy qokeey areedy ytdaiin dal air soiined dyteor y qoteol
aiiredy qotal areos sheol opchear qol qokeedy lchedy cheod chedy qokchaiin leody tched okchedam okaiin or

eseeol olches oreody cthaiin sedy dy rchaiin dchedy teeey olkchedy olols po oreody laim kaly
dchain oteedy shor qotaiis chedy tcheeey res alar qokain olyeos opchsy keeody dar qokol ckheor otey ar
cthaim qoteedy chedy osheedy qotg oleeor qotedy oksholy dar qokal dar qokam chedy tal ol dchdaly ain keol

qokol opey qokal cthee dain redy oeeol chedy chedy rchdaiin chedy lkaiin otchedy qoeeo oledain qordam qosy otedy qokey chedy
chedy qokeedy dar otchy opched qoteey chdain qoky okeedy cheor opchy sheol dar oleod olkedy otdar qod oteain aiin
daiin y olyeeey ychdam olteeol osedal lcheedy otedy qokam ltain areey otaiin qokaiin aiin chey saleeor yeeol dy oreeey qokeedy qotedy qockhear

qokeear ar qokey aiin cthy ar ar olkeedy chol qofchdal okchary chdy areeedy chor olchaiir keol oteey lcheey okcheeedy
cheey qotedaiiin opedy okal ctheor okeey oty shey qopam shedy shckhy aiin opcham lseedaiin qokar ar qokchaim daro qol
lcheedal ol sairor syal chody oleeor odedam oteey shdaiin kaiin otchy otedy opeeo qokeos otar ckhal aiin

chedy raiin ain oteeos kal qoes lses ckheeey lshais kee chor ked
qolain saiin leor dy y taiiin chs lchey qotcheody lkcheo dam qol qokey air ochedy leos cheey chedal soreol
shckhor tan chedy dleo shedol shal qotain cheey lsedol ol dy orchey qokal odyaiin aiiinair sheol shey ol

okeedy otedy lkeeod al okcha oldaiin eseey olcheod sheey al qotsho aleedaiin qokain opchg lseedaiin qol qotshdar qokeey pchaiin
cheey ykedar chckheeor chdy otshdy chcthor qokdal daiin sheey rdy otal dal aiin oram teos cheol aiiinaim tol
shol qokedy tchdal syiir cheeor chckholy shey opchy ain tal aiin ochedam qokair cthsdy qoar sheey chol

cthair chcthee or ocheedal ychaiin tchedy olseeaiin chol soledy okchy olkain shedy otaiin shedair shdaiin cheey ain yshedy

qokar qol ofchol qokeedy tsheedal okeedaiin olkeey qol lchs aiin cheol sain al oteedy dar keees ocheedal qody aiin qokey lchedy cphes keos

qoty qos al lcheedam dar cthedal res lcheeoy lchedy qokey sheedaiin ctheey sor lshaiin qopcheed dar

ytcheey okeedy dytedam olyedam shedy opchd qotain aiiinedy tair qokchdy qokedy qokal qokedy qokchey qol dao cthes dar

okeedy okeed oteear shar chdaiin qoraiin tedor dsheedy qokol po daiin cheey kas saleo daldy shctho sches chedy

dar olkol okain ychdar qotaiin olchy yteeey ked lkeeey opd qol qoteod qokeey ckhor ctheeedy tshor

dleedain lsheor ocheaiin choly shedy qordy daiin orchey ctheor daiin al olyeedal or yeeoy raiin okal cpheedain shedy olkedy qokedy

shckhy ltal chcpheeedy shckhy rody y qokeos chcthedy shar oteody rchdair cthair ledar tedy osam qol

aiin lkain ltes lchdar okeey qotaiin okedair cthaiin dleal cheol scho okealy qokain lsoiin qokear cphear lody dar

chcphey oteedy chey qotcheor reoly tear cpheeedy qokal or okar cheod arey shedy opcheeey qotchdar oteey ychal ychady olsheol

tor arey chol dy lkain odyaiiin shoiin pcheol dalyaiin chedy sairm lchear alols opair cthod

laiin qotey cheeos otedy shcthor ykchy kg oteedy otedy lkain yteain okedy tdy okeey qokaiin air lcheedy shedy chcthary al

dshy or shey ydaiin shey qokeey okaiin olshaiin aiiroly ol osoiin chdam ol qokal chy ychedam sheody chedy

yeedal chckhy dcheeedy qopcheol daiin otsheody yshedair kedar qoeear lkedy ol okey al qokeey rcheedy keedy ar shar otedy

saiin ycheed shey qokey ar oeedy qol sheey yshaiin qokal redar lchedy tedy chckhey chdy saiin otchdy chedy ty aiin

qoky cheeor lcheedal qodaly olkeedy oleeam dal rdol olshedar oteedy alg shsairy qoteol dardy qokeey chdaiin aror

qokal raiin qokeey ycheeeo lshdol qoteedy shm ypcheeos oteos ykcheeey qotchedy okeed rsdy oteedy alar chal olyeol

dlee dar saiin chey oiinedy shcthor qopchdaiin sheeody qokedy chey aiin qotal qolkeos dareody ocheos olkaiin dar dain daiin ol

okal shedy orod dykey chckhey qokeedy or cthaly oreey ofchedy yshl keol yeedal sheed chcthain otaiin qol
shckhy qotchear rshaly qokal ran chey aiin qokees y dar ypchm daiin cpheaiin qotedol dar lkear otchey ain qotal cthain
lko lcheer oleod al daiin oty opeeedy ytchaim qokchey shal tdy tcholy chd qokaiin qokeedy reol oreo ytody chckhy araiin

qockhedy qoldam sheed oteey kedair ytedol qokain shol qokeey oteeor shedy aledy ykchedor ykedor ar okeedy dedam saiin qokal ar
otsho oiiineeol ches dalm ore lsg daiin chol dar chor shedy oiiineey qoes cheey qotl al chedy aiiinody chckhy
chey qokchedy lchedy deol raiin dalyeol cthor qokeedy daiin aiin aiirail reod ain doreoy cheod qosy odyeedaiin qokal chckhy

otey cha taiin shol lko lseedaiin tshod solky soreos oo ychedy okeedy otain chcthair qokchain qokar ledy
lkedy sshd lsy olchaiiin solkeod qotain dair yches lseeo olkain ytl lkcheod odaiin odain
oiiineey olcheod cheey al otal lcheeedy okchedaiin sheol ol tchdy lkchar okeeam daiin chedy qokeedy lseey kchain okar qokar chckhy

qockhedy cheey taly lkos ykedair alaiis olcheeor qoteda kaiin dar ykchaiin qotey qokedy cthedaiin shedaiin dar
om okol okain chedy ycheeey oiinain okchy okain ol qokeedy chor aldaly ychar aiin qokal shdol chedy qokal lyaim ochedam
redor chedy chckhal yeedal ychan qoiiin shey opcho ockheol olkal otain dy qokchy ytedy qokaly odedy

oleol otsheol okeedy lshaiin daro daiin qokaiin choiin qoledy qokeedy qotol ped osy y dar qoky y ochor
ykchaiin soleey aleeo ochs shey qokam otain yshed shckhm or daiin cthedy rchedaiin cheear chckhy sor qokeeedy omedy
ocheedal dar olyedam soredy taiin okchal am otar aiin qokal pchedam ykeees sheody ol tcheeeo redol al tshdair

oledar lsdam tair kchoiin aiin lsaiiin qoteol lkeeey qokain olyeedaiin odyedar dar qokeedy okedal odyalsy omear
chor chedy ockhory chckhs octheol dar cheey dar ctheam oteedy ol pchedy qokal chey qokchedy chedaiin ol dain soror lshg qokeedy qoeeam otedy chdy
olydal daiireody roiin lshey daree chaiir aiin qokeedy roiin ar otchedy ytal qotchey or otaiin qokaiin choy okshady daiirol

lshals qokain okeedaiin otsho qoky aiin sheol oddair shar ol qokal otal aiin chedy olkedy otedy dain ltdaiin saredy qotchy ychaly
ypchdy lkdy yor opchedam lkesy ar qoteedy ol opcheees okshain otol otain oles dareody tchair okeey tshm chdy
okedy qokchedy ar olkar chckhes cheaiin shsdy ykar aredam shedy cthesy rd kor cheey yksy kal qosaiin shedy or

reaiin otchdy lchedy qol pchdal qokain dain qokchy qotchear qopchdy shedal dar daiin al dy oteey otedy ockhaly okeey lchdy ol

oredy qokeey qol tody lsar qoteey dar darol qotal lor olyom chr qokchedy chedy okal olcheam qol oreeey kair

ar shckhy tdar cheey lchedy oteedy cheey olr keol qokeey tsheeol aiirr qochedy solchdy ol dchedy ted sheol qokeedy chdy

chcphair okeedy ol oeody ytcheeedy
lcheol dy odor qokor okor
qokol qokain shoiin chor reeey aiin ykcheedain qokedy ocheedal chy qotain okaiin qokedam ockhdain ain okcheeody lted qokal qokcheey seol
chor dar cthedy qokar kedal qokshedy okeedy ycheos kchor orary qopchedam oteey olsheeeody qokedy qokeey yol opcheeody dar
chey qotchol qokal sshdy aiin sheol kcheos oedam qokchy kchedy dchaiin qoteedy qokaiin okedal shey tshedam dy lkeey shcthair

ykchor okedy olshedy otal lkaiin oryain okeey aiin ykcheeeody shedy otal qokain kas okeedy shedy qokar shan ol yeeey chd cheey ar
qokeey pory shedy soraiin qedy daiin odain ytcheor oteedy qokedy qotshaiin dchair sheol qokey chedy daiin pchedy
qoky qodam qokar lkchedol qokaiin dar ctheey shckhy ykm dair yer chckhy otain opchair teor shol chcphedol dar aiireeody ar

olols opain shol aror olcham pchor olkedy ches chey salain cthdain otedy dalyear opchal olair okar chedy opchary chckhy

dal ches otchdy chal qoeeody chy ardair tdair lky otchdair shal olkain pchair shckhy chd otaiin chedy

qokshedy tcheeedy chey alyey areey qokaiin arain ofeal oles qotal dar olkey yksdy lshes otesy shedy
qokey shedy olas otedy qokain qokal olkail chedy olyeeeody lteeey ain otar shey okchaiir shedy sheear al okchaiir ol osam shedy
cheedy lsody shey sheedar oledain odyeear kaly qotal olchoy qokedy ykchm qoaiiin lseeody olkain chey shedy

aiin dalor okal tshedy alody lteedy sar qotchedy cha olsheedy shedy oreeedy areol shcthdain yteod otaiin otedy
qokol okain ol olyam air olky olchs lchedy qockhdy olchdaiin chckhey ar daiin sordar kal qokol sheedy dsheel ypched shedy ykches shedy
ocheeoy ol sardy qoeod rar qoky shey tedaiin am chcthor qokal cheey keeod chedy dam oreor chedy qoteedy shol ol dain qokaiin qokedy

chcphor chcthaiiin keol chey qochdar ychaiir ol teor dshedol sheedy qofchdy cheey kes chckhedar saleedaiin otal shedy
ltd oeor odysd ycheeos keody dy sshedy qokar okar chol pchor saleesy lkol lkees al otal otody chedy
qoksheedain aiin okeey oldam ordy cthedy dal qokeeedy ykdair ol qokal qotaly kcheeam chedair otedy ochdy soliin po ypchedair shedy

olka keedy qokar qokedy ofchaiin oteedy qokey dar peod shctheeedy yshdor aiin otchdal otcholy kiiin kee ledy

qor olkeey qokeeor shd cheedy air saiin opl chedy qopchom yteeody dar qotal oteey otedam lkaiin chckheeey qokain qokar dar

dar olteeedy qokar dar lkeey aiin opcheos chdy ykchaiiin res qokal lkcha chedol qol ochedy sheey qokeedy or

chor chedy qokal chckheeo chol sas solkeeam dal qol olkey qoal qokaiin okshaiir alyedy qoty dar daiin ar sors ol

oltor ordy ysheor aiiinedam qokeey okeey oksholy cheol okeey qolkain aredaiin ol qokeedy qoo dal otsheo otchy raiin aiin

ypchaiin qolkaiin oteedy rchear kal okar okr qokchedy chedy olkey chedy oedy qoedar chdy arey otedy cthar redol dar

chedy chor qotedy rcheeol rchees keedaiin rs solcheedy yta qokedy kshor daiin ykcheor okeey odyedain qokar qokedy

qofchor qokal olko chey qochain scheey tshdar ychoiin ley olsady okshas chedy tchas peeod ykes ykchair

aiin ysheol sar aiin daiin y chcthr cheody olkal okar chs olkaiin lteeeody ches qokeey opeeedy tshair daiin rcheos

otshear kail koiin qokol sheedy chedy chey okchedy lchedy qokar ykiiin olchal okedy dar ysheeey qokchedy kor qolkedy sheol sar ykeeam otal shedy aiin

dain y okcheed lshg po oteedy lcheedy ykeed odor dchedy qokeedy qokal olar olky chedy qokeedy kedy dal qokeeedy qol

saiin chdy okal okaiin taim shckhy qokchedy chedy soledy solcheey dsheeey air dain qokal qoeesy chedy solcheeam shedy dshdain qoeeey aiin
chcthor qokam air qolcheal aiin opchaiin shedy kchees choiin lfchdy ltoiin lkaiin qokchedy chsairy chody chdy otal qotsheeor opedaiin qokaim

ain olkeedy ol chey ral aiin chcthaiiin ar yor sain qody ykchody ol qokchdol ar saireeol odam al

olols qokain qoeedaiin chey qocthedy qokey dar saireor olyedy otal yts chey al oey shckhy ypchdy qockhaim
cpheeol otedy cpheesy shedy chedy qokal sain ain lyeey lcheey ychiin otain dar qotal okal shedaiin oks qopaiin qokshes air okeedy cheol
chey qokchedy dshais shedy qol shar kchear okedy olcheedy schor lchedy oshedy chor ar oteedy ycheeam al qokey ykedor am

aiin otchair okedy al okchor shol tshedy lcheos shcthol oteey shedy opchd sheedar lteeor ol

chey qokchedy oleear ycheam lshor qokaiin sheol rm olchoiin ltod dair okol opey qokeey sheey lkcham odyal oor

lkcheear olcheeey aiin dain reed lchol chckheeo shol ol qotoly shey eseey qoes lchey qokchedy okes aiiinor dam cheey al

pchair qokal qokar shedy oteey qoeedar doldy y qotal qotedy olkar ol sshedam cheedy dar saiin or leeod okeedy dshal okaiin qol

shckhy qotaly soleeey fcheod qol tsheeedy shol ol qokol okain ol qokal qoedair otal dsheeeody shedy shor chedy dam odair

ar cheol qokey qockhol qokchy daiin yteeey oiindy am qokchey rar solo shedair otsheey qokchdy sheckhy shedy aldam seor air
ypchdy esee chdy oro dykey sordam aiin ol qokal lteeey redol al sheol sar alyedy qokal sarey oteey qokaiin ar
qokdar qotar oty al aleeo qoky chy qokaiin qol otchees shaiir dar dy dareos dain ain dal qoky chol okaiin shedy aiin

shcthed chor ar qokal lsl aiin chey chey olchaiir qokchedy oleeey ltedal chan oksheain aireal lchedy lky chedy
seor dcheody opchar chedy yaim daiin qokched okchey rs olsed cheey chedair soleal re dsheed am
dchey qoteedy shckhy okchedy olshor daldy yor qopeeol solaiiin shdaiin qockhdy om syeeor lsd dairedy qokeey pchey

sheody rdy qol qoky qoky qokeedy olos chcthor oltdair dain okal lkchr lcheaiin qotaim qolkdy qokain chckheeey ochedy qokeey y

dchedy olkeedy daiin rd odey daiin chedy qokeedy olkar shedy shey dal sheedar qokar shedy qopeol sheol chcthor soledar dar chctheos

shedy solksd chedy okchy ssheody al shckhy qotchain qokeo chey sheol oleeody olshiin qokain ar chcthy qoeeey reed chedy
dchain tchr okchedy saledam cthain daldy yor otar lsoiin aiin aiiraiis lsheeody qotedy lchor sol
shol keeey otchedy olar qoan aiin okchr tedy daleey aredy oteey al dy solkaly chcthr redal chedy

qokchey ol shedy yedam shcthol dleal qody lkaiin qokchedy chedair chckhaiir ran shedar oks dal okshedain lchedy
she qoky tdar olyeeos cheom chckhy dal sain olchedol or qokeey otair aireal qotdol shedy odaiin olkaiin chedy
shor okeeos ols kcheos opche ckheos qokeey dar shes qoks qokedy dam al opches ol oty yshedam qotar lchedy

oteedy dar dytal opody okedy chckhy qokal y qokeedy olkain qokar otey keos cthedy opcheeaiin ytas chdy sheey chedy
chor aleeey yteedaiin otshedam chckheedar aiin qoteedy lchedy qodol aledor raiin dalyaiin chcthedar ar tair oseeaiin ol
tsher chedy qockhod daiin ochdar ockhed dardy dady daiin chol sareeedy qokal aiin dain qoked otaiin chedy

dair lteod ytiir qokain shey oreol lcheedal cheesy ain ldair shes odyeeal chcthdair doreedy lsd oteeedy ol
sain shsdy ychd ochedy cthol olshas cheeor ocheedal dar sareo res dshol lkeeo dshdam shor ykoiin qokair
chedor ykd qokaiin ol dykeor opchaiiin ar chey aiin opcheeo ckhair octhain olyeody okcheol dal qokeeedy chdy

qokal or oky tdy aiiineol qokey kom ol cheey qoes lcho syes ychedam cheesy chckhals sheedy olshd qokeol
qokod okchey qol led yshed otey olshiir ctho yteedy dchdar yshr qotchain dy dshedor okeeody shey
cthair tedy dyteor odyal qolol cthdy lseod qokchy ches ykeeody keoly kal odaly

oeody shckhy y okeedy qoky qokedy shol otedam ykeees solkal fchedal ochdy sheol sar al okar chaiiin qokeedy chedy cheey shey
cphedy okcham shedy schdy laly tsheedy qotedy solary qoted aiirdy qokedy olyiiin dar qopchody olcheel ar oey
otol pedy otal dardy oky shan shol qokain qopcho chedy ofeey ches dardy qoty or lkeeo qokedy dcho lsheeody shedy

chey oryain otal opd olcheeody chckhy cthor dair lyedy sheol daiin am opal am kchedal ykeedy kedy darey
sshdy shdain shod qol okchdy fchor daiin qockhdair schdar tcham rdaiin daiin solkaiin ypchor olkeey chcthair
ar sar ychor saireor dykm qokey lsedal oky chedy opchain lyeeol aiiiney tcheeey cheeody chedy

cheey shey okey otedy daaiin oteey qoredy olyol ocheer ar qokar qoteed ar olkal chdy qolkor lkeeo chdy

soleor lcher okedar ltees cheed lkey qokeey fched qokey ain cphes qotedy aledy oredal chedy oteedy qokar aiin qokeey kshaiin

ypcheol opchdy laiin qokchy ypcheos qopchod odyedal chol aiin opchdol char kais ol sheol ockheol
pchor qokeedy daiin yty cheol okchain saiin qol okedy ol okeedy dal cheor okchesy qokchedy chiiin pedar ain qofchaim
lchey tol cheey oly qokdar ychal qokal opm okedy qokchedy dar qoky ram qoair olchdy otain otaiin sheeor qokcheol

qor qopchedy cheey dshd dalor chcthaiin oltesy chedy chcthedy shedy dain oded dal qokaiin ain shckhor lchey aiin

shal otoly okg daiin qol cheedy ychaiis okeod shedy tchedy ol ofeedain cheeo pchedam cpheor solkaiiin aiin

ockhed qokal odeedy chckhedar chs olkchy ted okeeedy otedy chdy chey oiinedy cheedy lsar shey qoreedy rdo ltd oed

opchor dy dchod kchos qoes am tshr qokchedy olshor qotedy daiin shckheor daiin odyaiin okal chdy dcheedy shey shcthair aiin olyoly chdy

qokeeol qokaiin otaiin redal sheedy ltaiin ldair olkeedy qotal or cpheody pedar y oteey chedy yteeody okeedy kam odeal tair

otal resy lcher ychdair ol qokal ol dam reed otaiin tair qoteedy cheeos dshal olkeeedy ykeeedy oseam ckhedaiin oteeor qol

ral oear kr tchdar qolain aram qody osiin opedy ockheesy ol dar okcheos dain soledam qotsheam ar qopchar chedy
cheey sheor dy chor kdy qotal qoreo olseda y oky olsheo ool qokal dchair sshdal olydar okeey shctheos
qoeear kedar tdar osdol salain kchol otal cheeam dar dain qoko olky chedy qokeedy qokey chedy tar ar

dleey chckhy saiin ypchedy qokaiin qopchedy chor lteod opchedy ypcho qokchey olkain yshedar cheeor okchdy olchedaiin okaiin lshedal lor
okedy alyedy qokee okey ololy chedal qokaiin shedy daraiin otal ol qolear oteey areeor sheeor oksham ol
cheedy otedy daiin sheees okeeedy shedy lses sheckhy aly sheey ar okeeedy qokeeedy ol tas keey oee daiin so qokal qotal lsheed qokar ain

lkchais qokeedy okoly char qokaiin qokedy dair olchalsy shey ltoiin dleey chckhal qokedam otchain leeedy qokaiin ol
ches ytdam shdol kaiiin chedy rcheo ol oeol shody otdar otal saiin shedy lsar chcphol arary shedy
yeer chedy schaiin qoksheedy otedy qokar shaiir sheols olsheeedy dain daiin air kchedor cheeam cphdy roiin soredam oded

oksd y shedy aiiindair okeedy odaiin otal shedy rchey daiin chedy pchedy olkey kar pcheear oly sheey shey
chol qokchy ykeedain cheey kaiir qol tr alyedy dal lkchdy lkaiin alyey dardy y otey lchedy sairedy leos
kcheos daiin chey solkeod ltedal okedy kaiin sain ltair kchail okshdaiin odeal qokam shey olkal shedy ches dar qokaiin odo

dar lkain oleod daiin chedy otshor ykcheeey oleeey aiin solm shal ytom qokaiin al okeey chey dar ldair
sheody cheeor shckhy otchedy cheody okal aryear opchoiin solkedal qokaiin tchor ykal dleedain chedy chcthom aiin doley daiin ytchair qotshiiin ykal chdy
tsheeoy dshols opedy qokal lcher dar qockhor cthain shedy olkedy cheey ykedam ar dair air shey okey am otal chedy sor

okedy air lkdy dalaly daryeey qoeedaiin cthaiin ychdain olchg kal ar oeody qockhdy dain cheol
qoty dsheedy okchey chdy tchody ychaiiin shy shedy ol qokeedy qol qotal chdy qokar olshaiin tsheos qokeedy pcheol qotey qoteeo odeol

dy y okchedaiin cheos tshesy sheedy otal rchedam qokshedy sheol chey qokchedy chedair soiineody ksheeedy qotchaiin shedy qokol qokain qotsy shedy
cheey lteeeo rok opchol lchaim okeey lsdol qokedy ofchdy dy qoked lko qokey chckhy daledy

sain lsedar chs lcheedal chols qokain ar chcthy lteedy chckhy cphd rer or qokchey or pchees ain chey kedor shedy
qolkain okeedy cthdal qokey qos lseeey dar olkchey chedy daldar shg saiin solkeedy shedy chckheedy saiin qol

chctheody chey rody dar shedy ypchl lseeey tsho lseedaiin otedy dar yshan aleedy led okeain ain dain dchaiin qoteedy qokal or
shckhod dair lcheer lchedy schdor lsedy okeey sheey sheol aiin olkal aliin opol okeey qokeody reod dcheedy solkeeod rd chedy

lkaiin lkcheed qotedy sain lseedy otar ol qockheol shey oksheeeody al qokchy olyol tchaly qokchy keeedy daiin chedy
shcthedy daiin qokaiin qoteedy ar lcheedal chckhy okal qokal ol sairdy okedy lchedy lsedar chdaiin okeed lkedy qoteedy oty tchey qokeey qokaiin aiin

oshol cheey okaiir okchedy qoey lkchd cheedy ychor cthedy dykair shedy qokal yteam sheol ain dain qokaiin chedy

dchedam raiin qokar ychedor aiin okal solod lseoy dsheol okaiin qopchm yedy choly lchedy qokeey chcthaiin dcheedy aiin opchy dar

ypchaiin shckhy ofeo shdol qoteam peeedy tcheeody chckhy qokal aiiino ro daiin pchol qokeedy daiin air qokchey aiin dam okaiin lchedy

saiin sheols qokeedy shin kaiin yeedal okeedar shedy sairair lcheer otedy ain so tshor daiin qotshol qokeey lkeor
yor qokar kal lchdy ytm lteeody qol saiin sheesy qokedam oty ysheor sdy qokshod ypchor
lyaiin okedy chey shedy or ypcho sdy chedy qotedy sar air dy oltain otaiin qotaiin qotory chedy olyedy cheed olky tchedy qokeey oteey qokedy

qoeed dar qokchy ckho olkaiin ytdy yor qokar oles dykain tcheol lchain shol okaiin shey ypcheos
kchedy lkr teor solar qoe sheeeody olkeedy qoeeody oles rcheey lteeey sheear am otchey taiin odedy
lcher chedy ldy qoteey chedy pchedy shckhy rdaiin aiin qokar lsal oleedaiin otchdy opaim oseam shey cthor

shal lsheeos chedy ar oreedain shol qokdal opcheds cheol chor otedy okedy y lkedy qokeey qoty ols shedaiin dar

qooiiin qokain dar chcthees lse sheear oldal okar chedal qokain chckhiin qokain qoteeos kary ol sheey chedy

qol qokal okal odyeedy aleo daleor daldy sheol saly qokaiin ol olkar dar aiiry chos cheod qoko

qofchor oteey ychar dchod yshor cheey qotedaiiin qokain chedair cthor alody lteedy chaiin sar chey olar al

chcpheor dar odeedy lkchedar cheear saiin dar qokedy shol keedar keols keeor ain qokal shdo qopor daiin qokaiin chckhy

shedy opchdol kan kedain air okeey lkedy ckhal ykcheey sain olsy okeeor lkaim daiin reody

dar schaiin ddy ytdol aiin daiin dam she shedy chedy kchdal ody qokal chedy sheey keda kair
qokar shedy chckhey ycheeo qokeey chdain ykdam olchody ks olchain ochaiir rdy cthoy ol okeedy am osear

yedam lko otey ykoly kedam ctheey osoly cheol ctheol cthy qopchdair shar taiin okchdol chedy

shedy olkchy kchdy qokaiin okshan olshr shy chsy ychoiin qofchol or qokcheedar raiin rsd ain otal odeos

qotd lchedair shedy qokeol qokey kedaiin ol oky dar teeey otain qokedy otal sheesy lseedy dyter chedy oteeedy lfched
ool ctheol opcheos soledaiin oteedy aleom or shol ykeesy shey chey or shol shedy chctheeey qoteedy kar okeey chedy

ykchedy qokey chdy qotal ol otaiin cheeo odaiin okdo ol chey qocthain rchaiin oteey olkeey qokedy shckhy qotain oteedy shedy

lchor opcheeeo raiin dar okchail qotchaly otedy aiiredam chcthy qokeedy qotedy taiin solchg shedy lkeody qokar lsy fchs shey

ofeo ar kshy lkcheeey aiin daiin otchey y qokeedy pcheos oedy qokal otchey aiin sar rar qoaiiin lkchal oaim
shcthod qockhol daiin aiiredy y dy otsheody aiin cthedy sared otedy ctheor al sar olter shedy shedain aiin olyees shedy
okedy qotchedy dar otal otedy opcheeey okain qokeedy soiined qopor daiin sheody okeedy qotedy shr ltedair areedy re oky lteoly aiin daiin otshedam

dchor shey okedy qokchedy cheeod lsheedy syeedy ol olso shsd sheedy ltes lcher dar pcheal otaiin shdo olkchey qopaim opcham shey
ykchor dain aiin lkom qokeedy al keeal ofchain sheol cheol otsheeedy qokeedy chedy or daiin olsdy okal lsody lteedy pchey

oro yeedam chedy saredy cheey otom lkcho qokal soiinain oteedy qoleody qokol ckhedy okeey soraiin sar y qokeedy soredy
olkal shan oty lshoiin oleeey okchedy dar qokal chol qokchy keo qokchdy cheod chedy otedy opcheees olcheedar al taly
qoteain okaiin lchedy oleody opcheol qokal qokaiin qopcheey qokedy daro shckhy shedy aiin okedy roiin shal lteedy pchedy

otshod otol pedy ykchaiiin qochedy ykches lchedy chor ykaiir y qokar lsheeo dar daiin chedy opcheam qokedy al qokeedy chol
ykchaiin ley dain odol olkaiin okain olchedy cheedy olshedam daiin oain shedaiin chedor ar osal chedy
chey ain chctheor lkedy olkchy fcheody qokchar chedy okedy aiin okcheeody y otal oteeal ar yteod lcheeedy otcheol

chals fchear ypches or dchm shr alyey olkchy pm oeeedy ykchedy qolkain daiin daiin chedy
oedy ypchain otar qotdar sheesy kaiin lkaiin al qokeey raiin chol saiin pchor qockhaim ypchor
ytedair chckheedy otedy lkedar ltar soraiin lchaim lkeor qokar yke qokeedy dar otey chal opchdar

ockheol olteedal shey dar shol chdy ldy saiin kam ol dal rchey or qokal tsheeol dam qokchey kg otal shedy qokain ain qotal al
opchor daiin oiineol yeos dal dchdy okain qoteey oky chdam ol dain olsair lcheeedy aiiinedy soleeey tdy rchees aiin
opchain cthan redair lkaiin qochedy tair cpheols ychaiin soreedain sheey areos dy redal qoks reeo qokeo air qokal air

qoky chdaiin solkedol kol yeos dam lkaiin dsheeody qokain qokaiin lkchesy qotchain daledy orcho qokaiin qokedam
shor chg daiin cheol shey okcheor okeeor otain olkeey shedol dar lody dar ofchedy qokeedy qokey ololy okdaiin dar
chol olyeeaiin kaiir qokchedy qoeedaiin qokar keesy ky cheol qokeedy qokal shey oteey shedy ol qoty okeedy chckhy okeey qofcheedy qokedy odedaiin al

ykchdy olches qokaiin qokeedy ka pey qoksheo opchedaiin salr oiinain dy aiin dain ofchain tedal shedar lsheedy dar
qokeey okshd darod leol dain lkain shedaiin keeal ol qoky okdaiin yer olo qokeedy chdy sheody sheody ain qoteedy otaiin shedy
oiiineeol lsal qokaiin aiin dleeol chan ared dalyod okeedy soreey okaiin cho okchais shedy ol lkaiin chedy tedy

shes fchdy otal ytedal okedy keeedy ocheer chckhy dain ain dair saiin qokedy solaiin qokeedy chol oseam air ty shedy
dal chedy cheey ychod alom otaiin shoiin olsaly chckhy dalol cthes qokedy lsail otedy reeor ychedal dchor daiin darair
lchedy qokchaiin qokchy qoteedy sheeaiin shedy ytdol raiin qoldy lkchr qokedy y okal kaiiin reedar qolkedam oteedy qokeor

yor sol chor keed lchol olyary dar lcheedal chdy oor sheey okaiin lkcheear lkedy lkaiin ain oseeody chol
dchdam ltoiin odor qoes keoy chedy osedaiin dshdy daiin qotol olkain ar okal chey qotchain otal qotal ykedy oleeo dchey oteedy qokedam
qoky chedy tcheeey otchedy okedair ol ksheal chol qokchdy roiin pchaiin lkeor cheey qoteed shan chey aiin oseeody cheol

shol dchedy opchedy cheey shey ksheed shedy rey olkain dal y ytees odear daiin qoldar okeedy chey dar oteedy pchor
sairedy cthaly syes reedy qoteol shal olkary fchdaiin qol raiin qokal aireo lseedaiin dcheear y lkain qokain lkaiin dar
cpheedy lseeaiin kaiin otshdy dykdy daiin lsedy qoky oteedy chesy cheeos old sorol lear qokeedy sheey air

sairaiin aiiineeedy cthees ar chctham chedol schol ldy qotey kdar opchiin okain qoeed okaiin sheedaiin otaiiin dar
sain ol olkol okain dar kedol qol chor kan sheey kdaly cthor kchedy otal qotar otedy reeey ain te yshm qol
qofcher chedy rsheo qokeey am qokar ledam yaiin daiin qokaiin al sheol cheey qodaly solor okar qeos cheey paiiin lchedy

qoteey dchedy sheol shedy daiin aiin keain arear kchol qokal ol chctheal ol odol ra qoted
cheedy shedy qofchear lchey oksheesy solkdaiin okedy qotchol shol olchoiin opchedam shedy saiin dal rody chedy okaiin por
chedy qofcher raiin olyor cthedal ytar ar ykchedair keer ytedol ol otchey cheeos lchedy qeor chdy

areeol leor qokeey okaiin kes okal cheol lkary qokedy qofchor okchedol redal olkaiin ycheedaiin okal ol sheol olkeey otdair
olyol qotal chdy ofchdy shol odaim cthdal qoky aiin ycheeo qotaiiin qokchedy keeedy kshaim daiin qolkeody chal y
dar keod lsdaly qokaiin qopcheo kedor al okeey areedy shais kor cpheols salaiin olkeedy ar ofchedair ckheeedy

otar dshal odeedy shedy roly otedy qofchol qokey sheeos qoal qokaiin qopcheos olchedair qotey otedy dalyor kshey dain al
qoleody dleal qodaly cthor ykd ochedy olyeeeody qokedy ry tedy qokar rdaly ol qockhed opal schair sedar am
qokeey opoy ychy odyain soleeod chedy qokeey solor ytg olkain shedy shol sheeody kl ytedair choiin al

ycheod lkain kedal ofchm oteedy okshes olchody reeor chedy rd cheey qotedy reol olkey dalyaiin shcthedar aiin
chckhal okedy odys qokey lchedy qopches chdy qokey otedy qopedaiin olkeeey okchedy dar qokar olshar chg okain oly qokear
qokedy aiireel shey kcheedaiin chdy qoky ol schdain aledy or otal okain oreeey shey qopcha ches lchaiin sain oty am

qokey otedam qokal chey qokchedy ycheos oteedy qoar dcho qokeedy ykeol pchdar lchey oiinedy areor chor saldaly oly qokaiin dar
chckhey otedy cthedy shedy oleeos chody shcthdy ol cphs alees lkchesy shy okedaiin olkain chor kaiiin qochedy
ofeey lchedy schedair al lcheedal chedy qokal qol ytchedar dsheedy ol okcheds chol sheey olshody sheody qopchdair qokar qoam pchedy

lsho ain cthol opcheos dalyear lshes dsheed chey tdy qokees opdam chaiin opchedaiin salr qotchol
chcphedam daiin okchy lkchal cthor oteey chsaiin dy am cheeos chedal oteey odyes okshdor ykdal cheedy sairod odeol
darain qokal sheod kedain oleeey qotchol daldy aiin shol oryeol lyair okaiin qokaiin chedy chol otar ycheeey alyey

qoldy ochdar shedy ored yked chey olkchedy dar lchod qol lkeeey pd alsdy qoar qokaiin otedy qokeol
dam lchedy ockhaiin lkeey ol okaiin oleedy tair shal otedy olcheeody shedy oeos qoky qolkod chckheeeo qoeed qotaiin chdy
ar ypchaiin qokeey qotain ol otaiin lchedy sheol taiin chedy dleey chedal olkaiin qol cheedy redair qofchey qockho otaiin qol

qoes rcheal aiin shckheedy olchy okes qotal odyair lkeed qol yksy otedy cheeod shedy fcheeeody shedy sshain shol qokair
otal or chckhey al soiinol rcheedy cheol rchees cheol chor dar cthedy okchdy shey chdy kcheeey alyey qokeey qokeos schain
ofeo lchedy lkedaiin olcheear dar qokey qoedol chdy olsdy reod qofchod otar shd olshdo okan qokaiin qol

oledar qokeedy ychedain qol chol ofchedar okeedy olar okeey lkchaiin qokal otchey otedy olyeeody olar pchey olky shdam am qokal chedy

ol yer dshdaiin ychedal qoksheey y shol oleedy aree qokary oles cheeey shs solkedair ar

qoksheos lkail otedy ol okaiin yshaly chan lkol otoiin okal qotain sain chos olshar chey qotcheor ol qokeedy shedy
qokeey salaiir qokchedy chedy kshedy otal shckhy chckhal okedy tor ol olkey oleeo orey olkain opchees qol saiin tsheedy kedal qokaiin ol cthdaly ain
cthm daiin sarear tal okshed qokey olkeedy ar doll dsheey dal sain okedal okoly opeees lkedam ctheeeody shedy

lshesy y ledy oteey ots qokchy lshain qockhaiin oleeeody qoeod odeedy ytdy dair qolcheol ypches aiin
dalyain tok ychal okeesy otedy chees ol solor otal qoky dar tdo chckheedy lshedam opchor tain
cheol qokal cheol daiin aiin okey kady ycheol dy aiin okchas dar yshaiin saiin lcheey kcheam chol ockhes ain

lchor chctho qockheor saireody aiin ockheeedy okeey chey qokchedy shey olchs yty rar qoky qokchol daiin daldair qokeedy dar
sardar dy kdaiin chedy aleeeody olkain olaiir alyedy okeey salsdy aiin schsaiin shedy dar dam lkchaiin daiin ram ol
dleo chckheedaiin tshedam opchsd lsheees shey dar lkod olchedair qokal oksheedy aiin or qokeedy cheey ar olyy dar shdain aiin tedy

sain olshedal qoeed qoteedaiin ycheees oles yeol dain qokdair chedy opchedy ockhed qokeedy aiin qokaiin ol

qoty otain qopchr lkchody qoar qoky redal chckham chckhaiir shedy okaiin ol dar shedy aiiindain y qokaly

ofeo chedy olkeey qokaiin shedy dar lchedam ypchee raiin shckhy shy chedy orcheody qol ochedaiiin okain chedal reeod taiin saiin chcphear qokees aiin
qoledy qokal dal lkchar qokaiin tor qoky oleedaiin qokal ykaiir ol dy aiin lchedy qokol opdar okeey soreor qotchey fchear
dardy lkeal ypchair lkaiin qokeedy am lchol shes otchy taiin oseeeody chedy air rsheam shey lcho aiin chedy ypchol rchees aiin

otal chdy oaim opchal chol qokar otedy or shckhy reed salal qoas chs al dcheody otdar
otar lkcheed oteey cheeor qokal lssd shedy ory ol qokeey fchair dalod okeey arair sheol chaly rchy chal pchaiin
dchor qokeey tsheor ol yeedal qoedar qokeedy kody chol saiin oledar sheeor okshedair char fchedy

daryeey yteesy dar chey y ctheeol shedy shckhy qocheol oedam sar yeaiin ykdal char aleedy syeeedy aiiiney daiin otaiin ol
cheey olshsy chedy oey yshol dshail otal shey solar or oteedy qokal rar ltes chedy opeain oky raiir aiin
chey qokchedy ar dchain qopchedor ololy ar toiin ral qockhedy cheey chal odedy qoldy dalydar daiin odaiin

qokaiin ol ockheeal ykeel dar tsheor y shedaiiin opey otal otal okain ctham qoteedar am osheos lchor
aiiinain daiin qokeeor dar olteedal oleeody ar ary aiin rsheedain dchedy qokeedy lcheedam dar sheey aleoy doled okchy olkal shedy
dchdar tsy chckhy otshey qokeedy lchor ytchaiin okedy qochol aireey kal aiin olyer qol ockheeedy chey ain

shedy opchees chedy qokeedy qokeedy or chy ar teedy olcheody cthedain saleeedy tsheos tedar ltain lkaly qokeedy shg otal qokedy
araiin kchedaiin lteeey aiin dal otal salaiin cthom qopeody chey oiinol ykchd sheedy qokar qoeeor ral ros qokaiin oteedy aiin
yor dy cthey rchedaiin chckhy qokeedy kchor ofcheear ain qoky am okeey qotedy qokaiin redal chdy sshsaiin qokain or shar ctheor

chey odyoiin ykchear oeo lshan qokaiin am ykchedy opchear ykchory chair otaiin ain ocher shedy ain ory teeedy
lkor dy olkal lsheeody pey qokcheey okedy otedy oredam saiin ar lchey alyain qokeey olchdaly ycheedy air
qoiin otear oteey qokaiin red dchedar ain tom oleedy chckheody olyedy ypcheeal am daiin oedam qokey lkchan okaiin tedam

ytiin pedy lkedaiin ol qotey ltr oledair qotedy dain shckhdy ol aiiinody chdy qokaiin odysaiin shedy okeedy air
lkeor otol sheedy qotedy chedy qokaiin aiin lcheos dair chedy qokeey qokeey reor ypcheeos odyes oltain leody lkr oiino ain
olteedal qoeed otedy okchey shr chaiin dain dar saiin ytcheey al okcheeody chedy otal pchs otedy kchor lkedar qokedy tor

qokeey kesy ain okar cheeod qos okedy dar kshos ol oteedy okchey olchy kr shdair okeedy kar ocheedal shedy y
qokal otedy qopdar shcthdy dcheeor ked dam chedy okal lsaiiin dleo qol ysheody qokshedy teeey lkcheed qokeey shey
pcheal qotaiin otaiin kar shey qoky okshos ytoiin ain sheedaiin qokeey odyal ol qoteedy oeey daiin qokchey salan lcheedal ykedam

yteedam koiiin opair okchom y daiin oledol ol shcthain daiin qokaiin dsheeal ykaiiin aiin ledain lteeo qokeey otedy

qolkaiin qoteedy olcholy shedy lkedam
tshaly opcham redo qokor qockhdy
lain dy rchs ychor olkedy okain doll otedy qol dalyeol dchedy qokeedy okal lkchsy ycheed aiin oredar lchedy opchedaiin y
chor chedy saiin chdy qokchey oteedaiin cphm chor shdaiiin otedy qol qokar shcthaiin okedy qochey otal al qokeey qoky lshal okeey chedy
par shckhy saleal opchar qoky kdaiin y lcheedal ar qotar kiiin chesy olaiin ary okeain odeeedy

oeor tshedy dy chor al keees pchdal olyy aiin lcheedal chedy qokeo pcho sheol ykedal okoiin lkol

doley opchedy sar qocthedy qopchdal shar qoteos dy shd olkedy redair qol lchor aiiinas dar opchar lchedy

yor qokar sald lcheody sholy otoiin qotol fchedy ololy shey odyedor qoar aledar dcheey opchy or
ykchaiin dal ykdain ol soreo olchain lyaiin taiin sydy aiin dain sar qochedy lko or
cthaiin dady okeey sheey yto kchedaiin char sain cheol ts raiin pchdal chal ltd qoledy okchey pal sored

qoty ar qoteedy tsheeoy oledair chdy daleeedy dy kchaiin lchey oiinedy dchedy oteedy qokol otain chedy chcthedaiin sheeody olshair
qopey ssho ltal sordy ocheeedy opcheeody olkr lchedy alyaiin osedy okal reeo ssheal ol ysheeody aiin
qokal olchedor shedy okeedy pcheey lcheaiin dar doleeed chedy cthaiin aiiined opcholy ol dair qol kchod or

salor oo soleeo qokedy olches shol peeedy qoky kaiin ochdar yshedy cham aiin qokeey okaiin lkchear olkaiin sheear sairor
qokey chedy okchy olyaiin qopedy otar oldol ykor ol ockheor y chey ocheedam shedy sar qokchedy chedy rsheal aiin otcheeod al qopchy dar
daryeedain ol dy cheey oles saiin qol dshd pcheeor lkchr ltes shckhor lchey ain odyal sairod lkchedal ar qokar ofchdaiin yteedy cheey aiin

cthor pshain osail otchedy chiiin chdy lcheos daiin rchedy dal soraiin ofeal qoeeo qokaiin cheol yeeedy ty dar
olchedol qokchey olchear lkchdar qoldy dleey shd sheey chckhedal lchdaiin kees okaiin opeedy qol
qokar shedy qokal chedy cphg oked ldair qokeedy chedy aiin saiin kain dalyain dedy opchy qoedam otchey lts pchedy

qokol pedy ypchdaly lseedar ar cheey dar chcthdain chckhedor ain tshey sar otchedy chedar chckheedain tair
soror otal arair shctheol qokey lshed cheedy ches lkeedain olkchdy shedy sheey lkcheol otchdy qolcheol tchoy ol okchy saiin kdair
dalm qopchaiin olkchy qoteos dal lss lchedy qol dal chey reedy olkar shedy okar qoteed dar shedy dal lcheey taiin

lchedy oeor oreeo chckhy yedy yshy lkchaiin oky ycheey sheees qokchy fcheeo qokaiin am dykdal qokchy qokal ykaim
pcheody lkaiin aiin kchaiis shedy oleod chedy chcthaiir shy qokedy qol tair qopeeos shedy shckhy chs lchor dain qokey shedy chedy dair pchm
lkaiin otchedy shedy qoleeor ykeeaiin oteeedy redol or qokeedy tsheos pcheal rdal sheey or saiin sheckhy qoeear olsaly qokchy qokal shedy am

chedy qokedy re chdaiin qokchey otedy otal solkar am okchey keeey shedy shs sshor aiiindar daiin rchdy
dshas ar taiin qotain sheey y sheol kam olchail qotchol okol olko dain chey shedy chctheeey okeees cheey lchedy
tshaim ardal otal ched aiiindair yshaiir aiin daiin qockhdy cheod chey otchedy cho dal qokar cheeo ychody dcheedy olal pchdy

lkaiin qotchain saiin qokchdy oleod cho dam otol qokain ol opchees y qotchdy chckhy opcheeey rody olar shedy daiin pchey okcheeos chckhy
okedy aiin chctheody olchaiiin tshdar olyoly chedy chdy otar ain tdar chedy sheey aleod pcheeedy otar ol qokchy qotchy kdair
dleey ol opchy am qoksheody okain otsheody pshedam dain odair qokaiin chedy ychal lkdar shckhy reedar qokshdaiin chckhy daiin lkain chedy

qoleey opchealy pedy ytes oleed lkol dam oteeedy ol aiin otey chy sheod okaiin air olchedor qokey lseain pched shar otchy shedy aiin
tsheer chckhy chey qotedy chdy soleeey fcheees otchdy chedy opcheeey alyey qokchey olkeos oteedy chor olsheedaiin cheor lko pchs aiin qockhdal
ytes odeear ain osor dal cheeey shy qokain kches qokain qokar dsholy qoteed sheedy al tchair qotchy okchy kor

qoksho otaiir qotchedy dar qoteod shes qokeear chol lcheos kchedor ychol okcheeey oiinedy chcthdy qotar y okey qol
ctheol qokar qod pchedy chdy lair olyeeos aiin daldy sar shedy chol olkeey lcheo dain lcheedal dar chey qodaiin opchedy
ychedol dykedy otcheeedy shey dal lchey oiinedy oteey olshdo air opcheeeody shals otain dsheeo ared dcheedy lkchedor qol

okaiin ytes qockhedy qokeedy odyaiin qokcheor olyom lshedair cthey qokary aiin leor aiin shol okaiin lchedy toiin chedy
okedy ltedair qokain raiin yeedal qoody otedy ood qokar y lky taiin ykeedaiin qolks kdain odyaly olkar lkcheedy chedy
sairdy sheey pom sheey chdaly dshar qokain lky sheod qokeeedy chedal okody dcheor pchear okeedy dy chedy

qokeey otaiin dar qokeedy opchedy otal ypched qokey ain qofchey cheey lshes olkey qoeeor or oltey ol otain qokaiin ain qoteedy lchedy
lchey qotchain chckhey ychr olair qokar ain qokedy qokeey dar qoleody lkear oty shdam ykchaiin daiin oedam
keos otaiin ycheel qol okeedy rsy ar ool qopchain odysaiin olyey otey shes ain yshey

oteey arey okeedy dy shey ykchody raiin qokaiin fcheol okcheeey reedy ol otedy dair lkaiin rody salal oltdy shd chckhey y
scheol cthy am dcheedy okeeey ral shey air lcheedal dar shar to chor ol olkal ol yshail lsd aiin
daro qokol olkeody otal qol sshm oteed aiin olkey sheol olcheos orchal olaiin qokchedaiin teos doleol opcholy aiin

qody ree lkain shedy qoky qoeeor kd pchdar qokal olkal qoary rchor otdain aleees aiin
chedar chedy taiin otam y oteedy shedy soreol cheey kaiin saiin olkod lkaiin solkal qofchedam qopcheeos dar
cheey qotom sheedy aiin qokedy olchdor oksheedy ykeol otshdy odyg sheedy ol qopdol ol shedy cthar redor qopcheol opchor

qdal ody olchal lcheos tos chy okain okeey choiin pcheody cheol qotal pchdaiin cheeey odys oain
qokaiin ykeedy olcheeor sordy qokey chs shol y scheey shey soleody ocheedal olary qokain ytcheey am daiin chckhy
tsheos daiin qokol oted dal qoko darol opchy shedy ofeey lchedy oteey qokaiin odyeol ledam yshedaiin keeal aiin teeeody chckhy

dal reees okchey otes shedaiin cheain odedy cthed solaiin aiiram lseody daiin odedy olyeeaiin ykaim okchol
otshedy sched solcheal cphdaly ykaly cheey otedy ochdam keeo qokaim ol daiin omo laly sar okedy rdaiin okeey shedy
lkain rsy chedor okshdaly ar olchody dar opchaly qopeeal ycheol dcheeor odydo chedy okeey qokeey otedy air dy lchedy

qolkedy oteedy ain qokeedy shey chey aiin olkar kal lcho chdy yky otees pchdy daryeal chedy ykdain aiin sheol oro
lcheedal okas odyar olkeey al daiin otchey cheol oteedy ypchor ochor qopchsdy aiin qokal qokchy cheear ar ol cheey otedy ain
olchedol sheeal shey or tshaiin sheol shedy otaiin lsam dar chcthor okchaiiin aiin daiin lcheos ysheeo qokedy

chey qotchol qokchain okeey lkedy sheol choly oles qokar al dam dareos okes lchedy oteey kshain okeedy qokar keeedy
otal yteeal aiin ty lchedy chey oiinedy ykcheeo rar qokaiin dar okcheod chedar chedy tail qocheor lkchsdy otedy qockhed
dshols otain qoes okedy shy chedy qokeey dchol olkeedy yteos otchy daiin dar lyedy dalol cthaiiin rody otedy air

lchor daiin cthed qolkeeor okeeody dar pchom olchaiir air aiiror oteey lchdar dal daiiraiin otey kedor chdy
soreedy or qokaiin qokedam shctheer aloiin dal reeody qoes laiin qopcholy ar ypchaiin shcthor qoteedy qokeos qopcham ain
chedy cheey chedy schdol qoteeor shedy ary aiin qotar alyeol daiin dcheeedy lkom odyair ykchaiin teody qockhaly

qokal chdo okeedy aiin kcheeody lchedy roiin ool qokeey koiin osheedy am osoly ytedaiin olkees qokaiin redol ain oteedy sheey air
oey ockhedam sheol qokaiin air ctheol opcheos lshees otaiin oldaiin daiin ltaiin otar shey solkeeey ry lsal odor
daryeo chdy daiin qotaiin ltoly ales po or qotal aiin qokeedy lkain qokedy qokchdy dar aiiredy chedy qokshor ty aiin

qokeey qoteeey odydor kor rchaiin lkaiin dleey ycheey dal oeeedy cthr shey olkeey oteey kdor ain lkaiin sheod qokeos

olais lkchedal qokeey lkchal dleey lseod odedam shsy chdol lchedy tchar y kchar oksheeed qokal ychdain shedy

oiiineey okeesy cthdy olchedol ars otedy cheol qor qopchod qofcheedal chedy dy qokaiin lkcheeor dal aiin qokcheody qockhedam daiin dy al
qokeey raiin chey qokchedy ychaiin leol daiin otaiin qokeedy al opcho daledy qokchdol ycheeeo ykeees rair qokeey dchedy okaiin qokaiin am
oty chedy qopaiiin shy chedy otal ofcheedy qotedain redaiin okeear opchaly qopedam sorey tody shey daiin aiin oseod y

dar dardar otedy qokeey shedar oldaiin lcheedal okam opom odeor qokchedy sheod olyeeedy cheey qotedy qokal chy sheey aiin
ofeo alal qokaiin y cthair okeey pair olkey dsheeody okain arair lkdy dcheedy odyeam am daiin oeol
opchedy qotal qockhedy qokeedy aiin ykd tsheedal oleed shedy dleedain lsham chckhaim cphal dar ycheain odedy otal qokal okedaiin areos

dleey keod chey kar shedy dcheeol odysy cheeos chckhy okeedy ochor shcthol kshm shckhor dain dardal
qokchear oros chedy tcheoy chair pcheos dain qoes cheol qokees aiin lkaiin qokchedy chedor oleeody chedy
dain ltd kal qokol sheedy okes yeeoy cheol laiin lcheaiin chedy sheody odyar shckhy kdal qoteey qoeeey ain opcheeody ol

dar dalear qokchedor ar qoledy yshol okody qokedy oteey fchdaiin chol qokar chedy qokeedy yain cheey chedy
shckhy qokchedy cheols yshaiin okeeedy raiin chol qokshaiin tary y oteedy keed yey lshory okain ral or qokey aiin qokchy ctheor ol
shckhy rar shedy ody dytdaiin cheol lkain aiin shey daiin qokchy sheol qol oeeedy qoteey qokedy oky tedam shckhy ar chor chedy

otal ol cthary qokeedy lkcham ar okeedy dal qol tor qofcheer ar shckhy am qokeey shey cphedy qokeedy sain odyg ykcheor ol

koiin chedy lkeeo ol cphear qokeedy or sheol tsheor ytan lkchal cthair saiin areedy qoa oldar
ofcheedy ykody sholy aiin okar kal qol sody aiin okcheor oke aiin kedor qotedy okeedy qokaiin otdol shedy
qokal reedy cheedy keod qoees chedy oteedy sheeey aiin daleor qoky reeos dar lkom or otshod dshol

qoty al soleeey ychaly opchain dareey ar dchdar opchee ypchedaiin olshdain shedy qokdaiin keeod opeeody otedy
qoky qokeedy qokedy opchaiir kedar shedaiin key chckhs lkaiin shd cphedy olkal keeo ychsaiin shedy qokeedy chdy kchaim
saiin qokain qokal okaiin shedy qotar lkchol rcheey qokaiin odaim oaiin dy qokchy ches salr olshedol otain cheey otedy

dleedain lsheed qokeody lteedy dareody opchdy cheey shedy ytcheey rcheeol otaiin qokeor lkeol seedar ychdaiin ol dain air
ar cheey keols raiin sheedy olkey otedy daiin yeeedy dain lkod okedy qokchedy chsdy chedy tchar y cheedy shedy y
rcheo arom otedy otaiin olshdaiin olcham ykar odyeees rear pcheeol qokaiin qokaiin shey qokm qokeedy or daiin air

chedy ody ain opcheody lkeody am chey aiin aiiredaiin shoiin soredam darod qoteey kor
shaiiin roiin odedy qotar dchedair yteeor qokol olkain chedy chcthy ychor qopcheeos shedy daiin shedy qoteey qokedy otar shedy qokeey ar
