aireeol chedol qotal shaiir shy chy lsoiin qokdair sheckhy cheedaiin cthair daraiin olkeey okain y ykas olshedy cheey raiin
chedy lchey am cthain keeey qokchedy chedy ctheol dchedy tcheed dar ar okedy olkchedy chckhy scheol qolkeeol dy qokeey chedy

dain ches aiin teeody shedy dy olaiir oiinol osheol kcheain aiin kam chckhy teeaiin ycheed cheeody shey
lkeor okeeos dar teol chey oryedy okal cheedy keeo rees otaiin lteeody olchesy okshar aredy otedy
chey solkd aryey chdy qokdam shedy chey chedy qoteey kaiir ltedain dshedaiin sheedy otey lsheeos shedy

shol shdaiin qokeedy qol dar qokeedy oll chedy ochesy ol saleey olkedy ykedaiin okaiir redol ar shey
tsher chiiin otl qokedy chctheol dalyaiin lsdaly chey chdy daiin pchor otcheeey shy oleeod oleedy cheey y qokchy schdy chol
sairedy qotal qotchey shes cthor daro okeey shol ar ldy qokeey oleear lshs chedain dar qotedy

dcheal aiin saly otsdy lchedy lkain dar qokeedy chey y okeey saleeody shedy soledam sshedol ychaiin shedy dal oreos okchy qokal raiin ol
cpho otdol kiir olkeedy ytoly olchs tsheeedy qokar kor lcheedal cheol sheody oteedy aiin qordam ykeeedy olydair ledy
qockhor qoky ar tes chol otchor lkeol orchdy olkeeody shey shal odyeols otal shedy cheol qoteees rshor cphes otedy chdy

dar daraly schar dar pcham qokedy qokar am qokchy qokeedy qol chor aiin saleod qotchy olsheal shol kaiiin aiin qokar ar
shedy daiin osheor daiin rdal oain qokeey kshdair qoteey otaiir chey lsheeos air dal al chory tchedy chedy
cheey keeor qokedy sain cheees chor ltdol oles shckhod al qokeedy qokee olkaiin qokaiin lshes oleeey olkchedy olsheos lain

dchey tchr qocthedy solain tshedam dy qolor cthor lkg otain chdy qopeeeody air yer lsheam dar chedy
scheol shckhol daledy ycheain lcheeor otedy soledaiin al okol olkain chos qokaiin chedy qokeey air daiin y saledair okar pdam aiin
ol chey qokchedy chedy qokeey otedy ofchaiin qopom aiin dal okal chckhy shol shaiiin oteedy chedal chey ol schol dar

chckhey shiin opear chctham olchedar aleeor qokaiin cheeedy dain lkain ar ykcheel keeedy sheol chain led okaiin oteear al
cheedy shedy otaiin qokain pchy ar schedy lkeey dar okchey oksheols qokal olshear okeey ral odyair chcthedal qokedy qokeey raiin
shody fchedy shedy okedy qokchedy dar lcheedy cheeos chy sheey chedy otchedam ychoiin chey olkeedy otedy qokeey otaiin lkchedor olal qokeal okeedy air

dalaly cthaiin saiin okaiin ysheol oky yts aredy reees chor chckhy solor opchor qokedy dain rchey qokeedy lcho lkeor
oeody qockheos qokaiin qokedy kar chedy otar qokedy qofchdy teeey olkain schdy kshm qokeey qokaiin or dy dain air
eseo olm okedy okchedy olchaiiin qokeedy kar ardair qokey lchedy okcheeol qokeos lshl qokchdy chckhy qokeedy qokal qotedor kar qokedy

oleeey lteedar qoals qokain shedy dal lchm ychedol qokchy saiin reeor kor qoteey ros okedy yteain daiin ain
lkain okdaly ol otshdair kchd or cheey okes lchey otedy dar ykchedam ches shey olcheesy otaiin tdy lkeeey sheees opcheor
olkedy kar ain otaiin qokaim saiin oteody lkaiin ain ardal aiirees or chey ar oteedy dy qol qokchey sheees olyeos

chey rar kdol qotedy okedy lkcheod rcheeor shols otain ar saiin lkain okeesy qokchy qokeedy chdy olyg ychor qokey ol dam aiirm
chey oiinedy orey aiiinais oteedy lchedy lkdal dam sheey ltedair ody qokeey cheeor odor dar ypcheedar yteedy okaiin otedy qokeedy aiin
qokeey aiin otchey lyey olkeedy qokeey oledy chcphor raiin cthdy aiiriiin chedy oteedy olyaim odal daleeol ar lseod dair otedy

char al sheey otaiin aiin otal opdy lchey y qokeey qotail qoeedy okchain teeo odys soreor qokeedy ain
shckheedy shoiin lkaiin qoan ocheeedy dolain opchain cheey chy qokaiin aiin chedy yteal okchy olkain oram otedy kchor
okeol schom sheol ycheel kal dleeol ytsaiin olsheey qoldy cpheor qokeedy reody dy cphod qokeedy aiin

reedy otar saleedy lses shes pcheos oty otchedam okey chedy otshedy qopoly qotsdy olshd y
qofcheedal ar otal opoiin odyedy ypchaiin qotal odeear odyaiin qokeey olky chy pcheeedy otshedy cthair qokchey qoeeeody chedy
ykg oteol schdain ar dal qokaiin ar qoody dcho oleeor chdy dlee dshar qokedam olkchy kaiin teeody qotedy opchor

chckhy chcthaly dchedar otedy chey qocthey chckhey ol qokal solchdaiin ol cheey odym olyok shedy qokain lcher chiiin shey dar otshedy
sheedar okady olsedam ykedol qoks cheol qokees ain cthedy cheey opain qoldy lkeeey qopain oteeedy kor okcheor
ofchedy tal sheedy ctheedaiin redar tor oky qokeedy shey lkchdain cheeor salom okshedal shedy lkeor qoeeody chckhy

qokar or ofchain qokeedy cthed qokal rcheeor peor lchedam kchr oleedy otaiin lshesy lkchoiin ody daiirdy ltd qokedy
ocheedal chckhy odeey qokam kals qokain char qokaiin ykeed aiin aiirar dcheor qoteedy qotedy odeody sheed qofcheeedy qokal okaiin qotedy
oky to sain or chey otchedy ol soiinedy lkeeo dar qokeedy dalyain sheol ar okedol cheeaiin olshaim aiireody

qokchdy chal qokaiin ar dair chas qokain lto qol lchey okedy reedy sshedy qopche chdam ykchm shor ltes qokaiin otedy
oldal dy yer qoedar chedy oteedy cthedy dykdair lchdy oky otain lsheedy kes qokedy
lkedy sheey opeesy kg ped ysheeody kl okeees oledy qokeey okeesy ychair lkaiiin ain okal rcho

rdam saireo aryl ychy opedy oeo okchdy qotedy oded daiin oor chctho qokal otedy
otar chdy otedy rdol kar lchdy lkcheols ockhdy chedy otcheeedy qokcheel al yshedaiin ches chg yteedar chedy
raiin daiin shckhy alyain otaiin shedy okeey qokaiin tchm dain cpheeedy opchedair shedy qoky dar osar qotedy chdaiin oteey lkchees qokaiin kes qotedy

oain dy qoks aiin ytes ytdain ofchdy chedy oteeedy oteeedy lsdol salals pedy qokeey otaiin odydaiin lshaiin olkar dar
oltaiin qoteey opaiin otal qolkeey daiin sheey aiin dair rd sheody otaim arain qol qockhear otchar salam aiin
kshear opcheeedy daiin chey al qokar okedaiin oteedy otedy qokeey odo olkeeedy otedy sheeedy qokeey oledaiin dar riiin shedain chedy

lkaiin qokchedy dar oty oleeor chy arear tchal shes lsheols cphol char pchaiin doldy saiin ykees ain
oiiineey lsoiin areey kchiin sheedy dar qockhear otsho oteey ykr alyol dytdy okain qoteey pchaiin ledy opchary ar
ydy ordy qokeedy qotedy lke aiin opcholy oldol olcheedaiin lsd ches cthor olchedair dareody aror

chedy qokshain qopchor qokol fchol okeey pchair oshedy qokeey areor aiiraly rchaly orchdar opcham chedy
chol qokey oleedy ytedor ky ytd aiin daiin lchedy shol shedy dy ar ocheol qotain ordal
ykal qokaiin okeedy olchar okols otain shedy dchdy pedy aiiinedy dair rey shckhy chey chedol saiin chckhy opchom chedy

otal y yshey cphedy oky oldam chey fcheody dleo cheeo otaiin y qopdar orchal aiin dchaiin opedal chdy
qotd olkaiin chdy daiin odeeedy olchdor y tedy dar olshd odeol opchy aiin chor shey cthedy rcham air
yeedal dar kcheeol saiin qokchdal qockheeedy cthor dal qokair dar ody qordy opeol peeo cheol

qokal lchedy ledy dam qokaiin kam qokain sory lchedy okchear otal chctheo odyedol ykedy qokdair ytar ofchedy rchees aiin
chey sheol ar lsd chckhey aiin chdy qokeey qokain reoly olshaly okedy dar qopcheeody kg olkeedy or olseody chdy lkain lty ol
daleody shor qoeedy qoteey chdy sear daiin qotaiin chear dleey qoteom ol okeey okaiin shey qokal oleam shckhedy sheey aror

qoeeey ykdair chedy lkas yshedy oros aiin olaiir qoctheor olchdaiin al qokey qoteeo shedy olyor otaiin ol
kchol cthdal lkr teor ody oteeor ol orair okchedaiin chdy qotedy olyiin opear otedy qotchy ar okar chedair ctheody
lcheedal dar daiin cheedaiin lsdor or lkain qokeedy chdar qokchdy qotchdy cheear ypchdy otched yeos sain aiiinor qokaiin qol

dchain qokeedy ros ar qofcheeedy opcheeody rm cthr redair aiin qopeeody otedy tshair dchol okal ypchdy
chor otedy ochaim qokaiin ytedair cpheear ol sody qol ctheol qokal sheey shedy lkeed kody lkches otdain chckhy
oear solchal aldain ar opcham dar shckhy reees okey kain dal tsheedam ar lkm daiin shckhy shais qoky qoedair schdy

otsheey kchedaiiin opey chcthed opcheda lsdain qoeeor tshedy lkain keedaiin rdaiin sar ran qokeo ldar
qokal reeey shedaiin qoteeo al daiin qorain tg taly chor ykeeody keam otchey ar okeedy dar daiin rcho
kshor qokal cheey qokedy qokchey dairedy qopey dam daror dal qoes oty qopchdy olkar ykedy okeedy rdal lcheey aiiiney

okchdy ytedal qoked qokey ol lkm olyedy qokeey lchedy chey solkedol kdam chr lsheod qokeody
lkaiin ain aiireedaiin kd kchaim tshedy kcheeaiin ol oky chs shsdy chedy teeo ol saiin okain qotaiin dar
oteey odyeesy olchdain chedy daiin rchey saiin chol qokchey chedy daledy oo chcphdal otchol dam qokeody

dchor shey lcheer ches ar sheody yshdy qokar chedy qoary qol cheey qoteam otedam sheol tshaim shctheoly keey qokdar
lchedam okchedor oleees dal ar or qokedy laly olkeey yeedal ykaiin ykchdy opchal al shckhy chedy dy qokaiin olshedar cheod opchear
qoky oks lchdy oteedy yeey dair tshdy cheey oldaiin chaly chey qotol qokain shedy shol arair sheol qockheor qopy sheedy otaiin chedy

qokar she aiin shedy shckhy qochol saiin arol qotar qokshaim qoledy saiin ytiir taly olsdy or qotey chal kchear
chcthaiin daiin daiireol dolaiin aredaiin chedy qokeey okar al qoredy olkeedy lyedy otaiin rchor ody ochs ychos qokaiin aiin
qoked ypchdar kal opcheeedy okedy chckhy dal lfchaiin sched shar otedy okain qokeey saldam qotedy soredy okchoiin ar

sheol shedy qokchy qokain chol tdol ol rody chdy otedy dain chedair olcheel ytaiir olteor lsaiiin olkchedy chaiin lchdaiin ykan qokaiin ain
qoky keeol lkdy oredam deor syedol qotaly qofcheeoy lchedy cthaiin chctheey olchesy qokchedy qokedy or sheol chedy okeeedy qokeeedy chdy
oraim qokal shees salais ckheos daleody lke rdaiin qokeedy chedy lsedor dar ool tail qoteedy ycheeo odor

ycheeedy qockho daldy qokeey am dchdaiin ol saiin lsheody qokaiin ol osedaiin chckheol sches chedy qokchy qopchain qokeeedy olsdal
qolko air qokey chedy okeedy oty aiin olkeedy sheey chdy qotaiin ol opchol cthedy lain dy pchm oteey shoiin odedy
shckhy okeedy chair qokaiin dar chdy okaiin qokeedy alar qockhedam okal chdy yshedar oldam qokol pain qokal ypchaiin cheol cthedaiin dshin lfchaiin

sar oryedy qokol olked opchy qokain okchols olkain dar keos chol qockhedy shsdy ychan qokaim dared otey olcheain pchey
lkain yky qol dy ared ol aiiindain yks or olseor ltal daiin reod sain qotedy lkeos ytchais olar ar
opchedy lo qokar air lkom otcheeedy olkedy ykoly ykeeedy qokaiin chdy daiin otaiin aiin qokeey dshdain doleody shd pchey

ar daryeo ar ykchedair odydal otar lkcheedy yeedal chedar qoteedy ychody res ychdol salos oltedy lkol
yeol opchy shoiin oeos ol qockhey leol yshm ol orchdam olcham shedy or ofches dar osed
ood daiin ol daiin daiireor chdy saiin chedy otedy qokal lchedy lkeey chedy lseesy ycheeos raiin olkeey okaiin chedy lkedy

sheol ykos qoky por soledy yteesy olcholy yksdy otedy dy shr shd otaiin kes okeees cheol
lkain qol sheey otain okaiin pchey olky chol qokeedy qokod cthed doredy cheol otaiin shesy y okeedy qotaiin chckhy
qokeey olshr oryedam solchoiin chedy dalydy shol okaiin sheeo choiin qokchey chedy ofchdy peeo qos qoal ol

air solaiin kchees redar chol os dar okedy alyol olky oleedy otar dar yeos qokar qoky al ty ar
otal dshedal orain qopchedaiiin qokain qol cpheody otes or chcthesy qotdal dal saireos qotes oedam ykchail lchedy ctheeedy chey aiin
dam oles dlee aledol aree oteey otedy dar qoldy dchedy tchey sheey aredy sheol daiin shedal reedy pchey

dleedain ytes chedy qokol otain dar qokal cthaiin kchg dar ctheeey oiinol lkaiin ral oddal osees air orchdy ltaiir air
cpheey shs dareol olyey okal shedy aiin lchaiiin oiineody cthaly olyedam shol otaiin oteedy ol otchear olkchy shedy daiin or
shey dair daiin or dedam qopchaiin rchor okeey olshaiir qotchedy oke chdy tcheeody qotiiin ain chey aiin

qofchedam okeey kdam kaiiin ain olkeedy chctheody lsal shckhy aiin qokeedy aldal ockhed oaim okaiin qoks shedy opcheol
dareody chey reedaiin otod tsheedam chol qokchdy qokchdy dar ypcheedaiin kedor shdol ychdor shs qotedy chdy
tsheos qokar qoeeody dar otal okeey y qokal okos qokear ykches chckheeal qol okaiin qokeal ardy dain chol

chckhy chor oles qokal qoted ledy olkchdy ales lkain dsheds olsed dshes oleeam okchy yched cheey tm or
dleey lseees arain soleeo oleear qoky por pchedy shedy dy olcheain otchy ar qokal ain ar ykal qol olkal ddal
qokaiin qokain qotaiin qokdal okeody dair ypcheey ychain okeey keeeo res dar qokar chey shy dar lkdy chdy

oky chs okedy qocthear ykcheedaiin shedy dar qokol fchol qokal qotal shey chey qocthedy qokshedam okeedy qokedam ockhed sheody olches qaiin
qokchy keey qoteey okshaly otar yteeor qokedy ol airee sheod oeeedy ypchdaiiin ychg olkal ykeeol okshes ody ody y
yaiin ysheeey or sheol lkeor olkey aiin cthedal chedy chor chedair ol opcheos lky qokeedy qol chctheol qotal okar cheol

qdal dykeor cheain shedy aiin deol raiin ochedam opchedol ykor lchr qokchedy keed qotr rody shedy y
cheol olya sheol aiin qoky chol qokeedy qokal chdy kcha aiin chedy daiin al qotaiin cheol qotg qokeedy lseod dcheol pcheeor keeey shey
oo okol opey olkeey qokedam salody qoredy qopcheody odyg saleedain ytcham qokedy lkedal shedy lor ole shey am

dleeol chedy keeody ckhedy yeaiin lshan qook shar al daiin otal chdy chctheey qoksheody oteam cheedaiin ykr shedy
sheody chckhy tchol chcthar oleeor dcheedy al dcheody dal dleey qotos qokeey keedar otedy qol oed ssheey lkam ol
solor dair otshdar okeey pchaiin ysheos qokeey chckhiin oteol lkdy lkain otain oleedy sheeody shedy okedy qokedy

qofcheos olkal opeor ocher cheeody qol shol saleod ychar oddam yteesy chedy qokeey olchg solchdy qokain orees cheol
cho cthas sha sheol dar ofchain ysheedaiin rr qokain qotair otcheeeody qotary ain qokchy qokain soly aiin
ykcheey otar chol opchaiin lkedar chesy ykedy pchdal opcham ltaiin shcthaiin yshedam okchy okain shol sheey or

dardal okal otshain soly tor sardar dareor shody olkdar saiin qolkeol cheey qokeedy dshedor qoy qokain olkeey qokdair
dardy oraiin dal otaiin or chey orydy lchedy qoteey olchaiin chey qokain keeey yshdy qoteey odaim qokal chedy chey qochdy sheeeo shey
oteedy shail lchor qotar or olyeeos aiin ody eseey okeed rchor otchey qotedy odyeedy qotey lchedy dal otedal qokaiin y

dar okol fchear shedy olteaiin oksy shey cheedy cham sheedy qokaiin qokaiin shedy shedy odol las shedy cphdaiin lsedor shedy
chcpheedy ykaiin chey otchedy chedy qotar am ysho solar chdol chckhy saiin alory dar ctheedaiin ytos oky lkcheed qol
lcheer char or lkaiin olkol qokain raiin qokeey qokaiin rr ain dair cthair okal ol kchaiiin ked olail aiin shedy shckhy cthaiin qockho

soldy lchedy chor dar ypcheal okchg qotchain chcthedal lkchain ypcheo kchok air scheol saiin otaiin taim qoror lkdal
dleo dar ctholy fcheeey or chctheeedy qokees raiiin olkain raiin shor shedy qokeey soledy daldy sed olyoiin qol
ypchaiin solchain dal odedy qotoiin qokchy tched okaiin alody odyl ycheedaiin chedy chckhy sheol cham otchor qoteey ol

cheey otedy chey y olyees qoteedy olchedar kdar okaiin qokeedy ltedor chdol qoteeo cheeody chedy qokeedy lchedy chdy dal daiin chol
rchair dain qokaim tshdair opchedaiin dar kchy olcheeody keedar keedy qol yshar ckhed shckheor cphedair ykeol
lchey qotchain dy air dain qokar aiin qokey chedy al sar qofcher shedy redar dar tcheeey qol okcham chdy yshdar y qokeey shd dam chol

chesy aiin okchees qopor ol ypchedain lssaiin qotchy otedy rdam qoty cheol cheey qokeedy ololy ycheam lsedain qotsaiin qokal shedy ol
shol shedy lchedy ool qokal sheedy chey ykaiin tsher chedy dor qokeey lkol otal ytees opdal oaim aiireod qol
airee or aiireeody al tsheer qotd cheol otey ked qokeedy y qockho dain ol tedair cheeey ychiir cthdy ol

otar or qoty cheear chey alyedy ykchees okdain qoky rsairy otg qokchy chedy qofcheedal chedaiin ytar lkedam daiin opchaiin
esee kdo chdy sheol olody qoky qokain olyedaiin lteeey rody lshory olkeos kcheeo chckhs araim qopchedy
tsheedal lchedy lchor okar dshes ctheody oryaiin cheedy chedy qokal oky ol opcheod air shal sheedaiin cheol cpheeedy dam opchaiin

dsholy qokeedy saleeaiin lfchey qokeedy dshdor ltedair qotedy aiin lchr olkchedy qokedy ol cthe tcheody otar aiin chdy ledam tain
qokeey raiin tsheaiin ar qokchy qokain shdaiin dalaiin opcholy aiin qokey okeeor qokeey y ykcheey qotais oleain chedy sheey oteedy qotedy
aireey or olyy chedar aiin qokeey kshdy sheckhy shedy saiin qolkey tcheedaiin solkan opor shckheey qokal olkchy odyeedy dar

dalyedy qopchaiin shcthol dal pchedy dy dar qokchey aiin olkeedy orey qokaiin opam chdy qopeedy chedy okaiin qopchdy
seeedy otey lchedy dal cheey air qokal qol cthdy qokeo okaiiin tedy cheedy qoeain dalor redol pcheeor lss olkaiin otedy
ain qokeedy shd qoleos cphdaiin or qokeeedy otedy shaiiin lkchal otey ar opcheeey alydar soleor qokar qoty okees qokeedy shedy

orcheedy sheda keol qolaiin shody ckhey ykchedol or lcheeoy okedar otedam soredy qol shey opy chdy qopy otedy
chedy odeedain shcthdy oredy qokchy po qokeedy qol kr ltal qokal ol shckheam chckhy daiirdy lkchal dar
qokeey shedy olteer ar oaiin cthdol raiin yedy sheol aiiino y cthor lchey aiin yshal y opche yteedy qotaiin qokedy

chedy chey lteedar qokedy dy shckhy keeedy okol olkear shol otaiin alar shoiin pched odyeear qol qokeeedy kor dair lchedy

qokshaiin otcheol cheedy otedy shol al
lchaiin dal sheey okshdl qokor qolsheor qokedy qokedy
otey qoeedy okchy ykal chedy okar chdy chor qopedy shckhdy sshedair salaiin cheey chedair qokeeol solkeam shey sshedair saleos
qokain qokar ycheedaiin oledy chol ctham olcheeod ycheeol ocheedam chedy lcheeor chaiin okaiin opdam cheol
qokaiin cheear aiiineor opchdar dairo lkeeo am qoley qokary chdam daiin aiin tshor okchedal keeam ykcho aiin

areeol chcthey chey redair dar shedy chey oiinedy qokal pody ol kchaly aiiraiin aree oteedy ol
aiirdair psheody cthdy odaiin ory olshar qokedy lkaiin qocthol qokal qokeey fchor oshaiin pchees y tedy
daiin ain opcheeody shedy lkeeos dar qokchy dam y chor shedy oshaiin qopcheed kar paly qokchey olchy areo qopaiin

kchedy qokal qockhol dair odeedy ar pcheeol ltar shedy sheol ol chey chey dar okeey lchedy schair aiiineos tchedy
chcphol qokeedy schor tsheey shedy lchaiin qokal qoleos dal dar ykchain qokaiin pchol olkeedy opchair dchdal tshdar
ochor lkeody dar syedy ysheedar ycheod ol pcheos olkol qotain chedy oredaiin lkchiiin kor olkeedy chedy

otol ckheody lkedy ol dal am shedy shcthain tchod lkain shey ytal aldo ol chey chedy
qoldy lkaiin chckheeor otedy sheey olcham dshdar qokchy keey okeey odym dain qokaiin taiin lor yshedaiin shes shey
lkear daleor lkas chedy qokeedy chol olyalsy sheam rd qokaiin sheain ol shor kedor ol oltain

oor dal daiin ol qokeey okees qol dal qokaiin al orcheedy or dam otshedy chees sheod odeos soiinair saiin qotedy
lcher chols otaly otal otey qokain aiin ockhg qoteedy ol daiirod ol ar chdy sorain opchaim opcheedy shedy yeeedy sheol yshey
chcthee sheeody shedy olkeey shey ytal soeol otey opedam ypchsdy aiin schaiin qopeeo chdy opcheeaiin yteesy shey

schaiin rcheal ytl dar daiin shey qokchy opcho qokair kchdair daiin dcheedain qokeedy olkeey rail lchor qokeedy yshey
lsr qotcho cheedy ain laiin dy cheey chdy qeol qokar y qokal odain shckheody yty chedy
cthdy doley qokeedy ol qokar dar opchy ar lses qoleor lair dain qolair qokeedy ofcheeor qoaiiin am qokeedy tain

shedy dy sheey chdain ykeed dar qokeedy qotedy chey oksheedy oeody lsm opchees oledar ykedy pchair rchol
qotedy daiin arain otar sheeam daiin qoteam shedy lchol osalsy chol koiin aredy okeey lseeody pd or
qokol olkdal dain areey dal daryeey chm olyeeey qopchdar ol qokaiin otdaiin qol okoly qokedy qotchdy reod qokaiin ol okaiin chedy

lteedy daryeey qoan odeody okedy qochear daled ypcho daiin lydy laly qokal chdy chey okain opchair
chckhey ar ctheey opchdy olkey chedy qopchedal lkcho opcheam kal qokol okain otedy qochaiin dalydar chckhey otedaiin chedy
cthear qockheody sheey lchedy chcthedar shey okeedy shedy qokaiin lsedol raiin yteeody otoiin chdy shdol otain dain cheol

okeey qokain ofcheeod ockhdy shckhy lsaly odedy qoky okeeor ssheedy sheds shey chol chor qokedy qockho oteedy qokeo arain
qokaiin sheod qokaiin ltaiir alyedy qoky lkchar okeey shr lkcheod ctheor ltail lcheer shedy cthedy qokey olchdaiin oteey shedy
qoky shedy olkain ol ctham redor dar qoteedy kshdair otal oteedaiin qokeor laly qoteey chdy ctheey pchol

chedy qoteos lcheedal chedain shdy oky oldaiin olkar shedy aiin dykain oedy qoteedy kchor opchdal tcheed qokedy
oky otedy olkain ocheedal ykeam y oky qoeedy okal lkcheed ckhor pcheo odedaiin kdain kear olshedar oteedy otedy cheeam qokchedy shey
otaiin shedy ofchor oteedy qokchy rey qoky sheol shedy chsaiin ltaiir otchedy chedy dal reees oteey qokedy dshal reed yaiin otchar raiin

oty chedy qokeedy tsheedal qoedaiin okain ain orcheees qod otl lshedair keeos qotan qokal lshg qotchedy shedy
cheedy otedy okeey opaiin ldair qokeedy qokaiin or qokal ky olcheeey ain oty qopcheor qog qokchedy shedy okaiin opor shedy
oteey kail oiinear qotal qokeey y sody lkchedar kair yedy tchedol ykar ykoly qoteed qoky otedy qog okchedy shedy

ol dair yor qokeedy qokeor qoksheeor key orchdair tain solchdy dain lsaiiin olkchedy chedy oty otain am otedy
lkaiin saleeedy shckhy qotchol sheey olksdy qokain aiin qokal keeey qotchol lchor olyedal dar otchaiis keed yteod qotedy
cheey ain qoky aiin qokaiin sheod qokaiin rsd ar dalol teesy ykaiin otchey shal qoary odo shol otdair shedy

dalydy dain chey ytam otdal cpheeol chckheedy otshdy alo leos dykod okar chedy dair otaiin ykeeol sain ol daiin otedy
qokey lchedy cheedy otedy doldar or ars ycheeey chr ain daiin okol qokain qol aiirary otedy doley ol oddy
sheody dar okeedy ykcheor ldy dar qotedy qolkeeor key shar qokchedy shedy rchm lchey otchedy keey cheey aiin dal cthedy seol dy shey

ykchdy aiin lchaiir qokchedy qotdol ol ody reeos saleesy qoedaiin otaiin qokedy chedor okoiin dar qokeedy chol qokaiin shedy
shckheody chctheed raiin daiin cheedaiin aiin otchaiin odedam tchal chedy chor qotedy qokar al soledaiin sheol chckheedy aiin
aireeol chdy daiin qokaiin y shedy chckhey dshsd lkchy ychedar otcheody ar shar olkchedy qotedy qokal oleeo ral sys yty qotedy

salal lkain ycheol cthedy pchees cheeor oseeedy ctheeol qokar olar chol odol qopdy lfcheeaiin chdy yshor
aiirol cthiin paiin cthoiin y aiireeo qoteeody dar qor yshedy cheey cheeor okedy qocthear chcthdy daiin qokey ychod
ofchedy qopchr yshedy lsom qokain qoteedy shes aiin lchaiir oiinm aiin qokair daiin okaiin odyeeey qokchedy salair olkeedy aiin

cho al ocheaiin ytes oshm daiin chckhy chor ykam fchy rchdy sairo qokeey shedy shedy
cheol dchas qopchor qoky shey opchiin olkain sheeeo lseeo qotr ltedain kedam lkain air qockhain ol
cthaiin ta rdaiin daldar okal chor lchedy qokeey qotoly lchedy tdy air shey daiin lol qokchey shey dain raiin otedy

okchdy chdaiin aiireol olkeedy daleeedy qotar lseeey lchol olyoiin ol qokey aledy lkor okeedy qopchod daredy or
qolkol qokeedy tsheer keeedy otchy ped qokeedy oaiin qokeey oro qokeey olkain ytcheos otar chol ychedam ar qokeedy chdy
cphm ol qoty oleeor lear qokeey pchear solos aiin okaiin ytedair okol oped ypchain shedy dalyeos ockhedy chdy

lcheer okes ol ddy ol okey keeo sorair otey chal chedy olyeeody ain chctheor dal ochol qoteedy chol
dshedar qokedy fchol qolkdy po aiirary okeedy olchedor chol sheody dar qopches aiin otchaiin orchsaiin shedy aiin
cheey dshes cheol ctham chdy otal otain tshear shckhy shy chedy oeol orol chedy okey okdam qol

oed shody fcheody kchaiir qotod dam daiin shd oteeedy raiin kedol ddy ain qokey cheeeody qodaiin okchey olkain qokar qol orchg shey al
lchey qotchol qokal qored oteedy olkal olchdaiin seeedy ory olkeedy yteeey alyeol odeol ypchedor shedy lkees olchr dar qolain
chckhy qofchol cheedy ar qokal chol aiiinedy shcthor qokeedy shedy shed qokaiin ol kchedaiin lkchedam otal pchdaiin shg cphm aiin

aireo cheol otal chckhy chey aiin ctheey qotaiiin qokchedy lshar oksheeam oseol dy oor shor cheeody chedy
chey qotchain chor y qoky res qoteey air sshal solkedol olchas shos kshm y opchol shedy sain qolkeedy oleed qoteey ol
teor otar ol olyear dar qokal shes qokdaiin odyed okal olchdain dshd sheey chal aiin dal qopchdy cheeody ar

chey ltam olchedair oror olyod air lkaiin oiinedy qokol pdal olkeey ky otedaiin sorair ochedy soleeo or
qokar raiin cheol qokey ychar kaim dal chedy lchedy lsal lcheeedy yshedain koly shey ory qokedy qokal qokal ol
opchedy qokal chey am oteedy dar otedy saiin daleeedy saiin lkaiin lchedy qofcher chd qol okedy daryeey dar dalaiin qoar qokeey ol

lchor lkod cthed dair chedy qokey chedy sheedaiin qokeey lkchedair olkeey shey cheedy otedy lkdy shar shey ockhedol ol
oltor chcthod lsedair qokey chckhy dal pchor dain chedy okal chedy qokchey air cphedair shedy chedol chedy qokey shedy
qoteey shedy qolkey qokeedy cheedy olaiin qokal chdy olkeey ar daiin qokaiin dar daiin olsaiin saireody lkdy doldy qokal schair

solkeeo am aiiindain qol ypcheal chey chedy chey otchedy qoary ol okcham aiin qokm okal chedor otedy
daleol ochdair daiin lchain soram otedy okar y oteedy odaiin ctheor shes aldain qotair qokar chedy osees dar
qokeedy raiin oty tchol qokeey pchaiin pal qoky reeey y qoleor shody ckhain ctheeey oiindar dched qokeedy okeeeo shedy

cheel shes lses raiin opchiir sheedy ol shctho chdy pchaiin aiiry am chcphor lkeeo chedy okchedaiin dar
lcheedal peod ytdo lsedor qotes saiin olchar al ockheeody cheedaiin lsy sheedy qol qokchy qokal oksheear shey chdy
chcphor solar olches ol oreeey kaiin yshain aleedaiin chdy rsheal qokaiin peear qol sshedy kchary dar

olter lchedy qoky chedy qokeedy qokedam yshoiin lss dar chol ockhiin sheedy shd otaiin raly ldy ol aiiinear shcthor qopchdy chol
lchedy chcphol qoteedy lkor daiin ol oteedy chedy qokain kcheoly odyaiir odyo dy qokol otain dshar olkaiin yksdy chedy sheol qokeey shedy
qoky keey lkeody lchor dam lchear qolkey qopched chor shedy okaiin fchaiin dalydy odedaiin lkchs shedy chdy

kedam chey yshol oor dchedy sheol saiin ytaiir otedain chedy yeedal keos qokeey lkchiiin rshedy olkeedy solod
cheedy cheedaiin qockhod qockhor ted cphok shey raiiin qoctheor oteey lsdam lchedy ychedal qokar aleedy okeedy ky aiin
oredy ctheor aiin ochaiir alyod okar key qokedy daraiin qokal otain qotsairy oksheeo olkeey lsheedy air shedor qodam okeey shedy

oledain kdam salaiir lkchdaiin chor ol olteaiin olshor otchey pm oky shedy paiin ysheeody qotedy qokaiin aiin
qoredy qokeedy eseey ar okeey otaiin ain sheeo solkan qokaiin dar dain cheeor odaly opchees raiir qochdy otchy raiin olkoiin ksheor
saiin chdy oteey ofchey pchees ain lm aiin lkaiin solkeedaiin dalyaiin saiin reedy chedy keain shckhdy okcheody qokaiin aiin

lkcheeoy chdy doll ral oaiin opchom lchedy cphdam chckhady saled lkchal cheey qokedy ltais qopchedy okeey otain daiin qokeey qokedy
lydy lchaiiin sheear qokal al qockhdy shol ras cheear qokal yteedaiin sheedy chey lchedy chedaiin sheey chs kched
odeol dy qokeos yeedal lchedy olkal shedor cheeody sheedy sheey ytaiis qotr aiin aiirar qotain dy oro

opchedy okal qokeey sheedy aiin qokshdaiin aiin otchey aiin dy cheey odysy ychdol qotedy chey qotchol qokeey otedy dal odear olkeedy dair ol
cthedy dyteol areeedy qofchedam kcheol sain ain tey shey olyeedain opchsd aiin ykcheey ley
ydy solkesy oiinedy qolkol tes opeees qokedy qotey chedy sheol kshor kshdy lkealy oteol chor oleedy dy qol

oteey otain olkeey otaiin sheod omey dshaiin lcheeey ykeeody chedy daiin ardy chedy okal lkcheedy lchor lkam opody chckhy
aireo ytedal shedy tshedam okcheam saiin ol otaiin qokedy raiin dain chcthod dar sol qoky qoeedy okaiin sheesy lor olkedy aiin
lcheedal qoaiir kor chey shy shey sairdy shckhy okshain pd lkey shcthedar ctheor tshey qokcheey qotar chckhy

cthaly okchey reedy otar lseo dain ychsy dar qopeeo ol saiin cheey shedy qokol sheedy dshar okaiin ltoiin aiin chor am
lcheear lsheeos lkcheeey qokchedy otedy qotey otedy otsheor qoky lchedy taiir alyedy sheody keo cheey ykeedaiin olcheedy sshor
cheey shedy lchol olya realy opear lkam odyeedar qotedy okeey dar kchy raiir otchedy keeam lteeos aiin

poiin sheody okain dy pchor qokeey aiin qokal aiin ledy qotar qol solchg kor qokeedy otal qoees yteear solchor
yeaiin ar qockhdar kchy raiin ocheody kchiin qokain oleed chedy qofchdair olkal qotedy shes ol qokar sheody yshain lkaly
lcher dar shckhain dal chary otaiin poiin ain shdain qokar keedy ol qoteedy okal odyody dordam aloly chdy teols y

oltor okeey sales alody lchedy opchom oldain ked pcheey sheey pchaiin shol lkchar dchedy qokeey qol
qokar kdam shedor lseam salar lkeol shey aiiineedar okshoy otedy otal chdar shedaiin olkaiin chal araiin

lsiin okain dar schdaly aleesy qokain lchdar sar aiin araiin qokal lkdy daro sarey okchary qol
okedy okchedy chedor aiin qokal orchear tedal olshdol chckhes chedy otedy sheody dar taiin schom olkeedy reol qokeey dchedy otaiin aror
lshdy sain oty reeo chcthdy qolcheor otal sar qokchedy chckhy qokar ol kedal qotedy lcheos daiin okeey dar dy rchdal

ofchol oteedy aiin olteedal chedy qokal okchdy chal ocher chedy darey qokal dykeeedy cthey tchol solkeoy shedy lshedaiin qokedam

rdain yteody oraiin oteedy cheol oty keal sar lkcheedy qokeol qokar yked shckhaiin otey ar ykcheedaiin ol
qoty sheedy yshaiin dleey ar ctheeey alyeody aiin qokeedy keeey aiin ta y yeeoy cheeody fchd osheol okchees dar
ocheedal chl qol okchy daiin kaly daiin ochor qokeedy sched qokal qokedy kchg qokain yteol qotal lsody ol ldor chedy saiin qokal chdy

okchdair daiin ofchedy olkeedy lkaiin qotchol qoksheody otaiir okchedy fchal lkdar leoly qokal kr ar lkdar loy ycheol olyees dar
qokchey am lkar chedy kchedy cthsd qokedy qokey lkchedair pody dar yeedal ycheos ldy okeedy chdy saraiin
chey oiinedy ardal qokal chedy chcthain qokar oty qokeedy dar qokol sheedy or okal kshey oteedy aleeody ytedor olchal arey

qokar she qos ockhaiin sardy qoteey qokair sar qotchedy ar soled okey shor ol otal oksheedy chdy okey ol
otedy opchody chedy qokchy qotain lsdam cheey shoiin chor reo opchair oraim qokal chdy qokshdal qokeedy soiiney dam qokeeedy chdy
shctheeol oded okcheeody aiin qokar shedy odyed dey shol ykees taiin okey chdy cpheedaiin raiin shaiis ol

daiin chedy qokchaiin ofcheedy aiin shal ain dain daraiin lchedy lcheedal otedy als ol shol olkeed okeey shedy oredaiin ar daiin olseol

olkedy shey otaiin tey chey aiin okal air qokeedy ykear cheedy oteain shaiir air aiiredaiin dar opchol olyeda qol

ches olkain daiin oaiin sched okal rcheedy lkcheeey lkchdain chckhy ks shey qoled ykeedy otedy

tsheedal dar ofeey ykal lcho qoiin sheedy kal lkain shey qoteols qokain chol olkal otar dar opchy qoar olsheeo sheody shedy sheol shedy

lkcher dleal chckhal sheey ltol okedy aiin okeedy otaiin okshod saiin otshdy qokeedy lchedy lsheeey rody qoiiin saledam lchor
shes otar shedy raiir lkchal yain qokom al chiin sheedy olos pchedam ytiin pedy ykchaiiin olkchedy ksy raiin daleor
okedaiin cheol dain otaiin okshaiir shy chedy daiin lteees qokchdy yteeo qokaiin chckhed daldy yol oteedy qokshor okedy aiin

al saiin qokain oltain oly qokaiin qoeeor osair tsheedal chan air cthair kal odear ksho dalo

lsho dal otaiin ar dain ool opchedaiin dar qokaiin oked qokar key qol qokeedy okeedy shedy cheey shedy

olkol opedy cthdaly cheol lkaiin raiin tchaiiin sheedy cthed oteeedy kdair opcheeey otchedy cheed qotedy yaim dal okedy okees arair
dchaiin qopchear dykaly raiin dal pchey ochor otar dar ctheedain olkar ar qopain lyedol chckhy lkedal am
olkedy olches otedy aiin lchaiiin okchedy saldain olshedy otedy ol saiin dleey olchal qokaiin al lcho qokeedy tshee dam lke chedaiin araiin

shctho qoky lseear soiinear qoky kd odeol oain ypched daiin lkchos areedy lsdar qokchey shal qoteols chedy
qokshedy tail oiinear okal leor odyedor qoteeo odydy daiin saiin chedy kedaiin sheedy ody rdar qopeol aiiinedy lkos ain

ofeeol qol cthey qokcheeam qoor aiiinear qokaiin taiin ocheaiin chedy pcheey soredaiin lkcheed ytiiin otchey shedy orchedy

olky lchedy dam shol ytd dalor aireal chedy qokcheoly qokeedy otedy opchaiiin kais shey ltor kcholy ches qokal qoteor aiirdol otedy qokchy chedy

pched qokal oks or shey y shealy fchdar sches shsy qotedy qokeey otaiin lseees rsy ol
otey dar cheedy chedy qopchedor lkches ar otey ol qofchor shcthain chctheody chey ral otey chedy opcheod ar
qokal olsheedar chdy qotchy air shedol tshedy oteedy lcheedal olshor chr al ledy qockho shol shey daiin sairor dalyed

qokar ol olyeos dal oleedy ol dain dareol sar ycheeedy qotal ar oky qokeedy y dcheeor qotedy okedar chedy dal osedy
